papers.title: Towards Differentially Private Reinforcement Learning with General Function Approximation
papers.abstract: We present the first theoretical guarantees for differentially private online reinforcement learning (RL) with general function approximation, extending beyond prior work restricted to tabular and linear settings. Our approach combines a batched policy update scheme with the exponential mechanism, together with a novel regret analysis. We show that, even under general function approximation, the regret in the model-free setting under differential privacy matches the state of the art for the linear case, scaling as $\widetilde{O}(K^{3/5})$, where $K$ denotes the number of episodes. As an important by-product, we also establish the first regret bound for online RL with batch update that depends on the standard complexity measure of coverability, complementing existing results based on a newly introduced Eluder-Condition class. In addition, we uncover fundamental gaps in recent results for private RL with linear function approximation, thereby clarifying its landscape.

analysis.tldr: 首次为差分隐私在线强化学习在通用函数逼近下提供理论保证，遗憾界与线性情况持平。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有差分隐私强化学习理论仅适用于表格或线性设置，缺乏对通用函数逼近的泛化，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在通用函数逼近下实现差分隐私在线强化学习，并给出可证明的遗憾界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合批量策略更新方案与指数机制，并引入新的遗憾分析技术。
contributions: 首次给出通用函数逼近下差分隐私在线RL的理论保证，遗憾界为O~(K^{3/5})。
建立了批量更新在线RL的首个依赖于coverability复杂度的遗憾界。
揭示了线性函数逼近下私有RL近期结果中的根本性差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果可能依赖于较强的假设（如coverability）。
遗憾界可能不是最优，存在改进空间。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次为差分隐私在线强化学习在通用函数逼近下提供理论保证，遗憾界与线性情况持平。

papers.title: Unlocking High-Fidelity Molecular Generation from Mass Spectra via Dual-Stream Line Graph Diffusion
papers.abstract: De novo molecular generation from tandem mass spectra is a challenging inverse problem whose core difficulty lies in the circular dependency between atom-level and bond-level reasoning: determining a bond's type requires knowing its endpoint atoms' chemical environment, yet an atom's environment is in turn defined by its incident bonds. Existing graph diffusion methods process atoms and bonds within a single computation stream, where atom-bond information synchronization can only occur implicitly across layers. We argue that this single-stream paradigm, rather than the choice of any particular aggregation kernel, is a key architectural bottleneck. We propose DualLGD (Dual-stream Line Graph Diffusion), which reformulates molecular graph denoising as the alternating solution of two coupled subproblems: atom-level reasoning and bond-level reasoning, each operating in its own dedicated representation space. The line graph provides a natural mathematical construction for the bond space, in which bond angles, dihedrals, conjugation chains, and rings correspond to local topological motifs between bonds. Incidence-constrained bidirectional cross-attention synchronizes the two streams at every layer, ensuring that each atom attends only to its incident bonds and vice versa, respecting the fundamental chemical principle that an atom's environment is determined by its bonding context. On the NPLIB1 and MassSpecGym benchmarks, DualLGD achieves top-1 accuracy of 34.37\% and 23.89\%, approximately $3\times$ the previous state of the art. Ablation studies confirm the architecture as the primary source of improvement: DualLGD without any pre-training already surpasses the previous best fully pretrained model.

analysis.tldr: 提出双流线图扩散模型DualLGD，通过解耦原子与键推理实现质谱到分子生成，准确率提升约3倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 从串联质谱进行从头分子生成是逆问题，核心难点在于原子级与键级推理的循环依赖，现有单流图扩散方法无法有效同步原子-键信息，成为架构瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 解决质谱到分子生成中原子与键推理的循环依赖问题，提升分子结构重建的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单流范式是架构瓶颈，而非特定聚合核的选择；原子与键信息仅在层间隐式同步，导致推理不充分。
analysis.method: 提出DualLGD，将分子图去噪重构为原子推理与键推理两个耦合子问题的交替求解，各自在专用表示空间操作；利用线图构建键空间，通过受入射约束的双向交叉注意力在每层同步两个流。
contributions: 揭示单流图扩散架构是质谱到分子生成的关键瓶颈。
提出双流线图扩散框架DualLGD，解耦原子与键推理并实现有效同步。
在NPLIB1和MassSpecGym基准上达到SOTA，top-1准确率约34.37%和23.89%，约为先前最优的3倍。
analysis.experiments: 在NPLIB1和MassSpecGym基准上评估，DualLGD达到top-1准确率34.37%和23.89%，约为先前最优的3倍；消融实验确认架构是主要改进来源，无预训练即超越先前最佳全预训练模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定质谱数据格式，泛化性需进一步验证。
双流架构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双流线图扩散模型DualLGD，通过解耦原子与键推理实现质谱到分子生成，准确率提升约3倍。

papers.title: An Interpretable and Scalable Framework for Evaluating Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Evaluation of large language models (LLMs) is increasingly critical, yet standard benchmarking methods rely on average accuracy, overlooking both the inherent stochasticity of LLM outputs and the heterogeneity of benchmark items. Item Response Theory (IRT) offers a principled framework for modeling latent model abilities and item characteristics, but conventional methods are computationally expensive and numerically unstable, limiting large-scale implementations. To address these challenges, we propose an interpretable and scalable framework for LLM evaluation based on the majorization-minimization principle. Our approach reformulates the problem as a sequence of constrained matrix factorization subproblems, enabling stable and efficient parameter estimation with theoretical guarantees for identifiability and convergence. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, including MATH-500 and six Open LLM Leaderboard benchmarks, demonstrate that our method achieves superior scalability and interpretability. It delivers orders-of-magnitude speedups over competing methods while maintaining comparable or even higher estimation accuracy. Our results align with established scaling laws and offer insights into item difficulty and discrimination, informing more principled benchmark design.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于MM原则的可解释、可扩展LLM评估框架，实现高效稳定的项目反应理论参数估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM评估依赖平均准确率，忽略输出随机性和项目异质性；项目反应理论虽能建模潜在能力与项目特征，但传统方法计算昂贵且数值不稳定，难以大规模应用。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、稳定地估计LLM评估中的项目反应理论参数，同时保证可解释性和可扩展性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于majorization-minimization（MM）原则，将问题转化为一系列约束矩阵分解子问题，实现稳定高效的参数估计，并具备可辨识性和收敛性理论保证。
contributions: 提出基于MM原则的可解释、可扩展LLM评估框架，克服传统IRT方法的计算瓶颈。
在合成和真实数据集上实现数量级加速，同时保持或提高估计精度，并验证与缩放定律的一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据集、MATH-500和六个Open LLM Leaderboard基准上实验，表明方法在可扩展性和可解释性上优于现有方法，速度提升数个数量级，估计精度相当或更高。
limitations: 可能依赖特定IRT模型假设，对复杂能力维度建模有限。
未讨论在超大规模模型或连续评估场景下的实际部署细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于MM原则的可解释、可扩展LLM评估框架，实现高效稳定的项目反应理论参数估计。

papers.title: The Context Gathering Decision Process: A POMDP Framework for Agentic Search
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are deployed in complex environments -- such as massive codebases, enterprise databases, and conversational histories -- where the relevant state far exceeds their context windows. To navigate these spaces, an agent must iteratively explore the environment to find relevant information. However, without explicit infrastructure, an agent's working memory can degrade into lossy representations of the search state, resulting in redundant work (e.g. repetitive looping) and premature stopping. In this work, we formalize this challenge as the Context Gathering Decision Process (CGDP), a specialized Partially Observable Markov Decision Process, where an agent's objective is to adaptively refine its belief state to isolate the necessary information for a task. We model an LLM's behavior as approximate Thompson Sampling within this CGDP, and introduce a predicate-based method that decomposes an LLM's implicit search into explicit and modular operations. We then derive two plug-and-play interventions for iterative LLM agents: a persistent, predicate-based belief state that bounds context while preserving multi-hop reasoning, and a programmatic exhaustion gate that halts unproductive search without premature stopping. Across four methods and three question-answering domains, we empirically validate that replacing an LLM's implicit state with our CGDP-motivated belief state improves multi-hop reasoning by up to $11.4\%$; while the modular programmatic exhaustion detection saves up to $39\%$ of tokens without any degradation in agent performance. Ultimately, we argue that framing the LLM agent loop as a CGDP can guide the design of modular, non-interfering improvements to agentic search harnesses.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM代理的搜索过程形式化为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），提出谓词信念状态和程序化终止门，提升多跳推理并节省令牌。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM代理在复杂环境（如大型代码库、企业数据库）中搜索时，工作记忆退化为有损表示，导致冗余循环和过早停止，缺乏显式基础设施来管理搜索状态。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化并改进LLM代理在有限上下文窗口下的迭代搜索过程，避免冗余工作和过早终止。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出隐式状态会导致有损表示、冗余循环和过早停止。
analysis.method: 提出Context Gathering Decision Process (CGDP)框架，将LLM行为建模为近似Thompson采样；引入基于谓词的显式信念状态和程序化穷举终止门。
contributions: 形式化LLM代理搜索为CGDP（POMDP特例），提供理论框架。
提出谓词信念状态和程序化终止门两种即插即用干预方法。
analysis.experiments: 在四种方法和三个问答领域上验证，谓词信念状态提升多跳推理最多11.4%，程序化终止门节省最多39%令牌且性能无下降。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定问答领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
谓词信念状态的设计可能依赖领域知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将LLM代理的搜索过程形式化为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），提出谓词信念状态和程序化终止门，提升多跳推理并节省令牌。

papers.title: Dr-BA: Separable Optimization for Direct Radar Bundle Adjustment & Localization
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Dr-BA, a first-of-its-kind radar bundle adjustment (BA) framework that operates directly on 2D spinning radar intensity images. Unlike camera or lidar sensors, radar is largely unaffected by precipitation, making it a critical modality for autonomous systems that require all-weather robustness. Existing state estimation approaches using spinning radar typically extract sparse point clouds from range-azimuth-intensity measurements and apply point cloud alignment techniques to estimate vehicle motion, scene structure, or to localize within an existing map. In contrast, Dr-BA uses the full radar returns from multiple scans to jointly estimate dense maps and sensor poses. By formulating the problem as a separable optimization, we derive an efficient and general solution that decouples pose estimation from mapping. In addition to solving the BA problem, this formulation naturally extends to direct radar-only localization (DRL) within a previously built map. Dr-BA achieves state-of-the-art radar-based BA and cross-session localization performance, demonstrated on more than 200 km of on-road data across five distinct routes. Our implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/utiasASRL/dr_ba.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个直接对雷达强度图像进行束调整的框架，通过可分离优化实现高效建图与定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 雷达在恶劣天气下具有鲁棒性，但现有方法通常提取稀疏点云进行对齐，未能充分利用雷达全返回信息，导致建图和定位精度受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多帧雷达强度图像的全返回信息，联合优化密集地图和传感器位姿，并支持在已有地图中的直接定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将雷达束调整问题建模为可分离优化，解耦位姿估计与建图，并扩展为直接雷达定位。
contributions: 首个直接对2D旋转雷达强度图像进行束调整的框架
提出可分离优化方法，高效解耦位姿与地图估计
自然扩展到跨会话直接雷达定位
在超过200公里道路数据上验证了最先进的性能
analysis.experiments: 在五条不同路线、超过200公里的道路数据上进行了束调整和跨会话定位实验，达到了最先进性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于2D旋转雷达，未扩展到其他雷达类型

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning

papers.title: Cognitive Agent Compilation for Explicit Problem Solver Modeling
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used for tutoring, feedback generation, and content creation, but their broad pretraining makes them hard to constrain and poor substitutes for controllable learners. Educational systems often require inspectable and editable knowledge states: educators want to know what a system assumes the learner knows, and learners benefit when the system can justify actions in terms of explicit skills, misconceptions, and strategies. Inspired by cognitive architectures, we propose Cognitive Agent Compilation (CAC), a framework that uses a strong teacher LLM to compile problem-solving knowledge into an explicit target agent. CAC separates (i) knowledge representation, (ii) problem-solving policy, and (iii) verification and update rules, with the goal of making bounded problem solving more inspectable and editable in educational settings. We present an early proof of concept implemented with Small Language Models that surfaces key design trade-offs, particularly between explicit control and scalable generalization, and positions CAC as an initial step toward bounded-knowledge AI for educational applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出认知智能体编译框架，将LLM问题求解知识编译为显式可检查的智能体，用于教育场景。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在教育中难以约束和检查，教育者需要可检查、可编辑的知识状态，而现有模型缺乏显式技能、误解和策略的表示。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM的问题求解知识编译为显式、可检查、可编辑的智能体，用于教育场景中的有界问题求解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Cognitive Agent Compilation (CAC)框架，使用强教师LLM将问题求解知识编译为显式目标智能体，分离知识表示、问题求解策略和验证更新规则。
contributions: 提出CAC框架，实现从LLM到显式可检查智能体的知识编译。
通过小语言模型实现初步概念验证，揭示显式控制与可扩展泛化之间的设计权衡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在小语言模型上验证，可能在大模型上效果不同。
显式控制可能限制泛化能力。

papers.title: SLayerGen: a Crystal Generative Model for all Space and Layer Groups
papers.abstract: Crystal generative models have shown rapid progress for accelerating the discovery of bulk, periodic materials. However, many material systems such as 2D superconductors, thin film semiconductors, and catalytic surfaces are diperiodic, i.e., aperiodic along one of the lattice directions. These systems are invariant under the layer groups, which are known to influence materials properties yet not considered by existing models. In this paper, we propose SLayerGen, a generative model that produces crystals constrained to be invariant to any space or layer group. SLayerGen consists of coarse-to-fine discrete autoregressive lattice generation; transformer-based autoregressive sampling of Wyckoff positions, elements, and numbers of symmetrically unique atoms; and space or layer group equivariant diffusion of atomic coordinates. For the diffusion component, we corrected an inconsistency in the loss from prior work arising from hexagonal groups being non-orthogonal in fractional coordinates. To facilitate progress in generative modeling of diperiodic materials, we assembled and filtered datasets of monolayers and bilayers, propose relevant evaluation metrics, and developed novel representations for layer group symmetries. For de novo generation of diperiodic materials, SLayerGen achieves consistent performance gains over bulk crystal generative models and is competitive when training jointly on bulk and diperiodic materials.

analysis.tldr: SLayerGen 提出了一种支持所有空间群和层群对称性约束的晶体生成模型，在双周期材料生成上优于现有体相模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有晶体生成模型主要针对体相周期材料，忽略了层群对称性对双周期材料（如2D超导体、薄膜半导体、催化表面）性质的影响，限制了这些重要材料的生成能力。
analysis.problem: 如何生成受任意空间群或层群对称性约束的晶体结构，特别是双周期（diperiodic）材料。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SLayerGen 采用由粗到细的离散自回归晶格生成、基于Transformer的Wyckoff位置/元素/对称唯一原子数自回归采样，以及空间群或层群等变原子坐标扩散。在扩散部分修正了先前工作中六方群在分数坐标下非正交导致的损失不一致问题。
contributions: 提出SLayerGen，首个支持所有空间群和层群对称性约束的晶体生成模型。
构建并筛选了单层和双层数据集，提出相关评估指标，开发了层群对称性的新表示。
在双周期材料从头生成上取得一致性能提升，在联合训练体相和双周期材料时具有竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于晶体结构生成，未涉及其他材料属性预测。
层群对称性表示和数据集可能局限于单层/双层，更复杂多层结构需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SLayerGen 提出了一种支持所有空间群和层群对称性约束的晶体生成模型，在双周期材料生成上优于现有体相模型。

papers.title: A Systematic Investigation of The RL-Jailbreaker in LLMs
papers.abstract: The evolution of generative models from next-token predictors to autonomous engines of complex systems necessitates rigorous safety hardening. Adversarial jailbreaking, the strategic manipulation of models to elicit harmful output, remains a primary threat to safe deployment. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) frames jailbreaking as a multi-step attack through sequential optimization, a mechanistic understanding of why the framework succeeds remains incomplete. To fill this gap, we present the first systematic decomposition of RL jailbreaking. We deconstruct the framework into problem formalization (reward function, action space, episode length), and algorithmic measures (RL algorithm, training data, reward-shaping) to identify the structural determinants of adversarial success. Our results reveal that the RL-jailbreaker successfully compromised all targeted models and safeguards. Through this first-of-its-kind analysis, we demonstrate that environment formalization, specifically dense rewards and extended episode lengths, is the primary driver of jailbreaking success. This work provides a tool for improving RL-jailbreaker efficiency and, ultimately, harden generative models resistant to RL-based attacks.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统分解RL越狱框架，发现密集奖励和长回合长度是攻击成功的关键驱动因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成模型安全部署面临对抗性越狱威胁，RL框架将越狱建模为多步攻击，但其成功机制尚不明确，缺乏系统性理解。
analysis.problem: 揭示RL越狱框架中哪些结构因素（问题形式化与算法措施）决定了攻击成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RL越狱成功攻破了所有目标模型和安全防护；环境形式化（密集奖励、长回合长度）是主要驱动因素。
analysis.method: 将RL越狱框架分解为问题形式化（奖励函数、动作空间、回合长度）和算法措施（RL算法、训练数据、奖励塑形），通过系统性实验分析各因素对攻击成功的影响。
contributions: 首次对RL越狱进行系统分解，识别出结构决定因素。
发现密集奖励和长回合长度是攻击成功的主要驱动因素。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有RL算法或模型架构。
分析可能依赖特定攻击设置，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统分解RL越狱框架，发现密集奖励和长回合长度是攻击成功的关键驱动因素。

papers.title: BGM-IV: an AI-powered Bayesian generative modeling approach for instrumental variable analysis
papers.abstract: Instrumental-variable (IV) regression enables causal estimation under endogeneity, but modern IV problems often involve nonlinear structural effects and high-dimensional covariates. Existing nonlinear IV methods directly learn the causal relation in observed feature space or rely on learned representations within two-stage or moment-based procedures, which can struggle when the causal information is embedded in a high-dimensional representation. We propose BGM-IV, a latent Bayesian generative modeling approach that reframes nonlinear IV regression as posterior inference in a causally structured latent space. BGM-IV infers latent components that separately capture shared confounding structure, outcome-specific variation, treatment-specific variation, and covariate-only nuisance information. To account for endogeneity, BGM-IV replaces the confounded outcome likelihood with an IV-integrated pseudo-likelihood that averages over instrument-induced treatment values within the latent model. Across various benchmark datasets, BGM-IV remains competitive in the classical low-dimensional regime and performs best in high-dimensional covariate regimes. Together, these results show that structured latent generative modeling provides a principled and effective strategy to nonlinear IV estimation with rich covariates. The code of BGM-IV is available at https://github.com/liuq-lab/BGM-IV.

analysis.tldr: 提出BGM-IV，一种基于贝叶斯生成建模的非线性工具变量回归方法，在高维协变量场景下表现最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有非线性IV方法在高维协变量下难以提取因果信息，需要更鲁棒的估计策略。
analysis.problem: 解决高维协变量下非线性工具变量回归的因果估计问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将非线性IV回归重构为因果结构潜空间中的后验推断，使用IV集成伪似然替代混淆结果似然。
contributions: 提出BGM-IV，一种潜贝叶斯生成建模方法，分离共享混淆、结果、治疗和协变量噪声成分。
在高维协变量基准上取得最佳性能，在经典低维场景中保持竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在多种基准数据集上评估，低维场景有竞争力，高维场景最佳。
limitations: 可能依赖潜变量结构的正确设定。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BGM-IV，一种基于贝叶斯生成建模的非线性工具变量回归方法，在高维协变量场景下表现最佳。

papers.title: Learning Cross-Atlas Consistent Brain Disorder Representations via Disentangled Multi-Atlas Functional Connectivity Learning
papers.abstract: Functional connectivity (FC) derived from resting-state fMRI is widely used to characterize large-scale brain network alterations in neurological and psychiatric disorders. However, FC construction critically depends on the choice of brain atlas, and different parcellations may emphasize distinct organizational features, leading to heterogeneous and sometimes inconsistent representations. Existing multi-atlas approaches partially alleviate this issue but often fuse atlas-derived features or predictions at a relatively shallow level, while single-atlas disentanglement methods do not explicitly address cross-atlas heterogeneity. We propose Multi-Atlas Disentangled Connectivity LEarning (MADCLE), a multi-branch representation learning framework that jointly encodes FC matrices derived from different brain atlases. Rather than introducing a single explicitly shared latent variable across parcellations, MADCLE learns atlas-wise disease-related representations and encourages them to be cross-atlas consistent through distributional alignment. Meanwhile, covariate-related and atlas-dependent residual factors are modeled separately using covariate similarity supervision, atlas-specific reconstruction, and decorrelation constraints, thereby reducing the leakage of non-disease and parcellation-dependent information into the disease-related embeddings. Experiments on the ADNI and ADHD-200 datasets suggest that MADCLE achieves competitive or improved performance compared with single-atlas baselines, multi-atlas GNN/Transformer models, and recent multi-atlas consistency frameworks. These results support the potential value of structured disentanglement for FC-based disorder identification under heterogeneous parcellation schemes.

analysis.tldr: 提出多图谱解耦连接学习框架MADCLE，通过对齐跨图谱疾病相关表征提升脑疾病识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 功能连接（FC）依赖于脑图谱选择，不同图谱导致异质且不一致的表征，现有方法未充分解决跨图谱异质性。
analysis.problem: 如何从多图谱FC中学习跨图谱一致的疾病相关表征，同时分离非疾病和依赖图谱的变异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同脑图谱强调不同组织特征，导致FC表征异质；现有多图谱方法融合浅层，单图谱解耦未显式处理跨图谱不一致性。
analysis.method: 多分支表示学习框架MADCLE，通过分布对齐鼓励图谱间疾病相关表征一致，并用协变量监督、图谱重建和去相关约束分离协变量相关和残差因素。
contributions: 提出MADCLE框架，实现跨图谱一致的疾病相关表征学习
通过结构化解耦减少非疾病和依赖图谱信息泄露
在ADNI和ADHD-200上取得竞争性或更优性能
analysis.experiments: 在ADNI和ADHD-200数据集上评估，与单图谱基线、多图谱GNN/Transformer模型及近期多图谱一致性框架比较，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定图谱集合，泛化性需验证
解耦约束的平衡可能影响性能
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多图谱解耦连接学习框架MADCLE，通过对齐跨图谱疾病相关表征提升脑疾病识别性能。

papers.title: Delulu: A Verified Multi-Lingual Benchmark for Code Hallucination Detection in Fill-in-the-Middle Tasks
papers.abstract: Large Language Models for code generation frequently produce hallucinations in Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) tasks -- plausible but incorrect completions such as invented API methods, invalid parameters, undefined variables, or non-existent imports. These failures pass superficial review yet introduce runtime errors. We introduce Delulu, a verified multi-lingual benchmark of 1,951 FIM samples across 7 languages and 4 hallucination types. Samples are curated through an adversarial pipeline: a frontier LLM generates plausible hallucinations, four diverse judge models evaluate them, embedding-based clustering mines progressively harder examples, self-contained Docker containers verify that golden completions compile while hallucinated variants produce the expected runtime error, and a final human-expert review removes any remaining biased or trivially decidable samples. We evaluate 11 open-weight FIM models from five families spanning 0.5B-32B parameters: a six-point Qwen2.5-Coder scaling slate, plus a cross-family slate (CodeLlama, DeepSeek-Coder-V2, StarCoder2). The strongest model reaches only 84.5% pass@1, no family exceeds 0.77 Edit Similarity, and every family produces hallucination-aligned completions on a non-trivial share of samples, confirming that the difficulty exposed by Delulu is task-intrinsic rather than family-specific. We release the benchmark, containers, and evaluation framework at https://github.com/microsoft/delulu.

analysis.tldr: Delulu 是一个多语言代码幻觉检测基准，通过对抗性流程构建 1951 个 FIM 样本，评估发现最强模型仅达 84.5% pass@1，幻觉问题普遍存在。
analysis.research_motivation: 代码生成模型在 Fill-in-the-Middle 任务中常产生看似合理但实际错误的补全（如虚构 API、无效参数），这些幻觉难以通过表面检查发现，却会导致运行时错误，亟需系统性的基准来检测和评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个经过验证的、多语言的、覆盖多种幻觉类型的基准，用于评估代码生成模型在 FIM 任务中的幻觉检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：即使最强模型（Qwen2.5-Coder 32B）也仅达到 84.5% pass@1，所有模型家族在相当比例的样本上产生与幻觉一致的补全，说明幻觉是任务固有的而非特定模型家族的问题。
analysis.method: 通过对抗性流程构建基准：前沿 LLM 生成 plausible 幻觉，四个判别模型评估，嵌入聚类挖掘困难样本，Docker 容器验证编译和运行时错误，最后人工审查去除偏差。
contributions: 提出 Delulu，一个包含 1951 个样本、覆盖 7 种语言和 4 种幻觉类型的多语言代码幻觉检测基准。
通过对抗性流程和严格验证（编译检查、运行时错误验证、人工审查）确保样本质量。
系统评估 11 个开源 FIM 模型，揭示当前模型在幻觉检测上的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 评估了 11 个开源 FIM 模型（5 个模型家族，参数范围 0.5B-32B），包括 Qwen2.5-Coder 缩放系列和跨家族系列。最强模型 pass@1 为 84.5%，所有家族 Edit Similarity 不超过 0.77，且每个家族在非平凡样本上产生幻觉对齐的补全。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 7 种语言，可能未涵盖所有常见编程语言。
幻觉类型可能不完整，未覆盖所有可能的代码幻觉形式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Delulu 是一个多语言代码幻觉检测基准，通过对抗性流程构建 1951 个 FIM 样本，评估发现最强模型仅达 84.5% pass@1，幻觉问题普遍存在。

papers.title: OneViewAll: Semantic Prior Guided One-View 6D Pose Estimation for Novel Objects
papers.abstract: In many practical 6D object pose estimation scenarios, we often have access to only a single real-world RGB-D reference view per object, typically without CAD models. Existing methods largely rely on explicit 3D models or multi-view data, which limits their scalability. To address this challenging single-reference model-free setting, we propose \textbf{OneViewAll}, a semantic-prior-guided framework that performs pose estimation via a novel Project-and-Compare paradigm. Instead of relying on computationally expensive CAD-based rendering, our method directly aligns reference and query observations within a projection-equivariant space. OneViewAll progressively integrates hierarchical semantic priors across three levels: (1) \textit{category- and scene-level} priors for efficient hypothesis initialization; (2) \textit{object-level symmetry} priors for geometry completion via mirror fusion; and (3) \textit{patch-level} priors for discriminative refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OneViewAll achieves \textbf{92.5\%} ADD-0.1 accuracy on the LINEMOD dataset using only one real reference view -- significantly outperforming the CVPR 2025 baseline One2Any (52.6\%). It also yields consistent improvements on YCB-V, Real275, and Toyota-Light while maintaining low inference latency. Our results underscore the efficacy of symmetry-aware projection in handling symmetric, texture-less, and occluded objects.

analysis.tldr: 提出OneViewAll框架，利用语义先验和投影-比较范式，仅需单张真实RGB-D参考视图即可实现新物体的6D姿态估计，在LINEMOD上达到92.5% ADD-0.1精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 实际6D姿态估计场景中常只有单张真实参考视图且无CAD模型，现有方法依赖3D模型或多视图数据，可扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 在无CAD模型、仅单张真实RGB-D参考视图的模型无关设置下，实现新物体的6D姿态估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OneViewAll框架，采用Project-and-Compare范式，在投影等变空间中直接对齐参考与查询观测，并逐步集成三级语义先验：类别/场景级先验用于假设初始化、物体级对称先验用于几何补全、块级先验用于判别性精化。
contributions: 提出一种仅需单张真实参考视图的6D姿态估计框架OneViewAll，无需CAD模型。
设计Project-and-Compare范式，在投影等变空间中进行对齐，避免CAD渲染。
引入三级语义先验（类别/场景、对称、块级）逐步提升估计精度。
analysis.experiments: 在LINEMOD、YCB-V、Real275和Toyota-Light数据集上评估，LINEMOD上ADD-0.1达92.5%，显著优于CVPR 2025基线One2Any（52.6%），且推理延迟低。
limitations: 可能对极端对称或高度遮挡物体性能有限。
依赖RGB-D数据，纯RGB场景可能不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OneViewAll框架，利用语义先验和投影-比较范式，仅需单张真实RGB-D参考视图即可实现新物体的6D姿态估计，在LINEMOD上达到92.5% ADD-0.1精度。

papers.title: Behavior Cue Reasoning: Monitorable Reasoning Improves Efficiency and Safety through Oversight
papers.abstract: Reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs) poses a challenge for oversight as many misaligned behaviors do not surface until reasoning concludes. To address this, we introduce Behavior Cue Reasoning for making LLM reasoning more controllable and monitorable. Behavior Cues are special token sequences that a model is trained to emit immediately before specific implicit and explicit behaviors, acting as dual purpose signal and control levers. When fine-tuning a weaker external monitor with Reinforcement Learning for reasoning oversight, a compressed view of only information surfaced by Behavior Cues is sufficient signal for the monitor to prune up to 50% of otherwise wasted reasoning tokens in complex math problem solving. When leveraged by an almost optimal rule-based monitor in an environment where excessive constraint violations results in failure, \ours allows for the recovery of safe actions from 80% of reasoning traces that would otherwise end with the proposal of an unsafe action, more than doubling the success rate from 46% to 96%. Through evaluation across two model families and three domains, we show that \bcreasoning improves reasoning monitorability and controllability with no cost to performance. More broadly, our work progresses scalable oversight by demonstrating how the monitored model itself can be trained to reason more tractably to oversight. Code to be released at https://github.com/christopherzc/text-games

analysis.tldr: 提出行为线索推理，通过训练模型在推理中生成可监控的信号，提升LLM推理的可控性和安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推理过程中，许多不当行为直到推理结束才显现，导致难以进行有效监督，存在安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 如何使LLM推理过程更可控和可监控，以便在推理早期发现并纠正不安全行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 行为线索推理：训练模型在特定隐式和显式行为前发射特殊token序列（行为线索），作为信号和控制杠杆；结合强化学习微调外部监控器，利用线索信息剪枝浪费的推理token或恢复安全动作。
contributions: 提出行为线索推理方法，使LLM推理更可控和可监控。
实验表明该方法可剪枝最多50%的浪费推理token，并将不安全动作恢复率从46%提升至96%。
analysis.experiments: 在两个模型家族和三个领域上评估，显示方法在不损失性能的前提下提升了推理的可监控性和可控性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务的行为线索设计。
外部监控器的训练成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出行为线索推理，通过训练模型在推理中生成可监控的信号，提升LLM推理的可控性和安全性。

papers.title: FlashMol: High-Quality Molecule Generation in as Few as Four Steps
papers.abstract: Generating chemically valid 3D molecular conformations is critical for computational drug discovery. Classical diffusion-based models like GeoLDM perform well but require hundreds of steps, making large-scale in silico screening impractical. Recent efforts on few-step molecular generation have accelerated this process to 12-50 steps, but they often largely sacrifice sample stability. In this work, we present FlashMol, an ultra-fast molecule generative model producing high-quality molecular conformations in as few as 4 steps. To achieve this, we adapt distribution matching distillation (DMD) - a reverse KL-divergence minimization objective - to the molecular domain for effective distillation. Considering the local minimization behavior of DMD, we respace the molecule generation timesteps, providing the generator with much better initialization and enables effective distillation. Additionally, to mitigate the mode-seeking behavior of DMD and improve diversity, we further regularize it with a Jensen-Shannon divergence term, which incorporates the mean-seeking behavior of the forward KL divergence. Extensive experiments on QM9 and GEOM-DRUG datasets demonstrate that FlashMol matches and even surpasses the original 1000-step teacher, achieving up to 250$\times$ acceleration in sampling speed while maintaining high molecular quality.

analysis.tldr: FlashMol 通过分布匹配蒸馏和 Jensen-Shannon 正则化，在仅 4 步内生成高质量 3D 分子构象，速度提升 250 倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统扩散模型生成分子构象需要数百步，计算成本高，难以用于大规模虚拟筛选；现有少步方法虽加速但牺牲了样本稳定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在极少的采样步骤（如 4 步）中生成高质量、多样且稳定的 3D 分子构象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）在分子域存在局部最小化行为，且具有 mode-seeking 倾向，导致多样性不足。
analysis.method: 将分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）适配到分子生成，重新调整时间步长以提供更好的初始化，并引入 Jensen-Shannon 散度正则化项来平衡 mode-seeking 和 mean-seeking 行为，提升多样性。
contributions: 首次将分布匹配蒸馏应用于分子构象生成，实现 4 步超快采样。
提出时间步重缩放策略和 Jensen-Shannon 正则化，克服 DMD 的局部最小化和 mode-seeking 问题。
analysis.experiments: 在 QM9 和 GEOM-DRUG 数据集上，FlashMol 匹配甚至超越 1000 步教师模型，采样速度提升 250 倍。
limitations: 可能对复杂大分子或特定力场依赖的任务泛化性有限。
Jensen-Shannon 正则化的超参数需要进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlashMol 通过分布匹配蒸馏和 Jensen-Shannon 正则化，在仅 4 步内生成高质量 3D 分子构象，速度提升 250 倍。

papers.title: LensVLM: Selective Context Expansion for Compressed Visual Representation of Text
papers.abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) offer the exciting possibility of processing text as rendered images, bypassing the need for tokenizing the text into long token sequences. Since VLM image encoders map fixed-size images to a fixed number of visual tokens, varying rendering resolution provides a fine-grained compression knob. However, accuracy deteriorates quickly as compression increases: characters shrink below the vision encoder's effective resolution, making them indistinguishable. To address this, we propose LensVLM, an inference framework and post-training recipe that enables VLMs to scan compressed images, then selectively expand only the relevant images to their uncompressed form via learned tools. Building on Qwen3.5-9B-Base, LensVLM maintains accuracy comparable to the full-text upper bound at 4.3x effective compression and outperforms retrieval-based, text- and visual-compression baselines up to 10.1x effective compression across seven text QA benchmarks. LensVLM also generalizes to multimodal document and code understanding tasks, with the accuracy gain over baselines growing as compression increases. Our analysis validates this approach: training makes visual compression robust to rendering choices, and as compression grows the model increasingly relies on expanded content rather than unreliable visual reading. The analysis also yields practical tool-choice guidance: text expansion is preferable for rendered text, while high-resolution image expansion suits native documents whose layout cues carry task-relevant information.

analysis.tldr: LensVLM通过选择性扩展压缩图像中的相关区域，使VLM在高效压缩下保持高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM将文本渲染为图像处理可避免分词，但压缩时字符分辨率下降导致精度快速恶化，现有方法在压缩与精度间难以平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何在高压缩比下保持VLM对渲染文本的识别精度，同时避免全量高分辨率处理的开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 压缩导致字符低于视觉编码器有效分辨率，使字符难以区分；训练可使视觉压缩对渲染选择更鲁棒，且模型在高压缩时更依赖扩展内容而非不可靠的视觉读取。
analysis.method: 提出LensVLM框架，包括后训练阶段让VLM学习使用工具扫描压缩图像并选择性扩展相关区域至未压缩形式。
contributions: 提出选择性上下文扩展方法，在4.3倍压缩下保持与全文本上限相当的精度，在10.1倍压缩下优于检索、文本和视觉压缩基线。
验证了训练使视觉压缩对渲染选择鲁棒，并揭示了模型在高压缩时依赖扩展内容的机制，提供了工具选择指导。
analysis.experiments: 在七个文本QA基准上评估，并泛化到多模态文档和代码理解任务，摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VLM架构（Qwen3.5-9B-Base），泛化性需验证。
选择性扩展机制可能引入额外推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LensVLM通过选择性扩展压缩图像中的相关区域，使VLM在高效压缩下保持高精度。

papers.title: Computer Use at the Edge of the Statistical Precipice
papers.abstract: Evaluating Computer Use Agents (CUAs) on interactive environments is fraught with methodological pitfalls that the field has yet to systematically address. We show that a 1MB replay script that blindly executes a recorded action sequence without ever observing the screen outperforms frontier models on prominent static benchmarks, and prove that its expected success rate is exactly equal to the source agent's pass@k in deterministic environments. We trace this and other failures to two root causes: non-principled environment design (static, unsandboxed, or unreliably verified environments) and non-principled evaluation methodology (naive aggregation and misuse of pass@k for stateful UI interactions). To address the first, we propose PRISM, five design principles for CUA environments (privileged verification, realistic environments, integrity-checked configurations, sandboxed execution, and multifactorial variability) and instantiate them in DigiWorld, a benchmark of 15 realistic sandboxed mobile applications able to evaluate agents in over 3.2 million verified unique configurations. To address the second, we develop an aggregation framework pairing Wilson score intervals with hierarchical bootstrap, producing confidence intervals that correctly account for the nested structure of CUA benchmarks, as we empirically demonstrate. All together, we show that principled environment design and rigorous evaluation methodology are not optional refinements but prerequisites for meaningful CUA research.

analysis.tldr: 揭示当前计算机使用智能体评估中的统计陷阱，提出PRISM设计原则和DigiWorld基准，并开发分层置信区间聚合方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算机使用智能体（CUA）在交互环境中的评估存在系统性方法论缺陷，导致基准测试结果不可靠，阻碍了该领域的可信进展。
analysis.problem: 现有CUA评估中环境设计不严谨（静态、无沙箱、验证不可靠）和评估方法不严谨（朴素聚合、pass@k误用）导致虚假性能提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一个1MB的盲重放脚本（不观察屏幕）在静态基准上超越前沿模型，且其期望成功率等于源智能体的pass@k，揭示了基准的脆弱性。
analysis.method: 提出PRISM五原则（特权验证、真实环境、完整性检查、沙箱执行、多因素可变性）并实例化为DigiWorld基准；开发Wilson分数区间与分层bootstrap结合的聚合框架。
contributions: 揭示CUA评估中环境设计和评估方法的两类根本性缺陷
提出PRISM设计原则并构建包含15个真实沙箱应用的DigiWorld基准
开发考虑嵌套结构的置信区间聚合方法
analysis.experiments: 在DigiWorld上实证验证了所提聚合框架的正确性，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: DigiWorld仅覆盖移动应用，可能不全面
PRISM原则的实施成本较高
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示当前计算机使用智能体评估中的统计陷阱，提出PRISM设计原则和DigiWorld基准，并开发分层置信区间聚合方法。

papers.title: Adaptive auditing of AI systems with anytime-valid guarantees
papers.abstract: A major bottleneck in characterizing the failure modes of generative AI systems is the cost and time of annotation and evaluation. Consequently, adaptive testing paradigms have gained popularity, where one opportunistically decides which cases and how many to annotate based on past results. While this framework is highly practical, its extreme flexibility makes it difficult to draw statistically rigorous conclusions, as it violates classical assumptions: the number of observations is typically limited (often 10 to 50 cases) and decisions regarding sampling and stopping are made in the midst of data collection rather than based a pre-specified rule. To characterize what statistical inferences can be drawn from highly adaptive audits, we introduce a hypothesis testing framework from two 'dueling' perspectives: (i) the model's null that asserts there is no failure mode with performance below a target threshold versus (ii) the auditor's null that asserts they have a sampling strategy that will uncover a failure mode. Leveraging Safe Anytime-Valid Inference (SAVI), we formalize the auditor as conducting 'testing by betting', which translates into simultaneous e-processes for testing the dueling null hypotheses. Furthermore, if the auditor is sufficiently powerful, we prove that these two hypotheses are asymptotically inverses of each other, in that passage of a stringent audit does in fact certify the AI system as being globally robust. Empirically, we demonstrate that our proposed testing procedures maintain anytime-valid type-I error control, outperform pre-specified testing methods, and can reach statistically rigorous conclusions sometimes with as few as 20 observations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自适应审计框架，利用随时有效推断（SAVI）在少量样本下为AI系统提供统计严格的鲁棒性保证。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI系统的故障模式标注成本高、耗时长，现有自适应测试方法虽灵活但难以得出统计严格的结论，因为观测数量有限且采样/停止决策在数据收集过程中动态调整，违反了经典统计假设。
analysis.problem: 如何在高度自适应的审计过程中，从有限样本（通常10-50个案例）中得出统计严格的推断，以认证AI系统是否全局鲁棒。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于安全随时有效推断（SAVI）框架，将审计形式化为“通过赌博进行检验”，构建同时检验两个对立零假设的e过程，并证明在审计者足够强大时，两个假设渐近互逆。
contributions: 提出一种自适应审计框架，结合SAVI实现随时有效的统计推断。
证明在强大审计者下，两个对立零假设渐近互逆，从而严格认证AI系统的全局鲁棒性。
实验表明该方法在有限样本（低至20个观测）下仍能保持类型I错误控制并优于预设检验方法。
analysis.experiments: 在合成或真实数据集上验证了所提检验程序能维持随时有效的类型I错误控制，优于预设检验方法，且有时仅需20个观测即可得出统计严格结论。
limitations: 方法依赖于审计者的采样策略足够强大，实际中可能难以保证。
仅针对二值性能阈值假设，未扩展到多类别或连续性能度量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自适应审计框架，利用随时有效推断（SAVI）在少量样本下为AI系统提供统计严格的鲁棒性保证。

papers.title: Optimal Experiments for Partial Causal Effect Identification
papers.abstract: Causal queries are often only partially identifiable from observational data, and experiments that could tighten the resulting bounds are typically costly. We study the problem of selecting, prior to observing experimental outcomes, a cost-constrained subset of experiments that maximally tightens bounds on a target query. We formalize this as the max-potency problem, where epistemic potency measures the worst-case reduction in bound width guaranteed by an experiment, and show that this problem is NP-hard via a reduction from 0-1 knapsack. Building on the polynomial-programming framework of Duarte et al. (2023), we give a general procedure for evaluating epistemic potency in discrete settings. To control the super-exponential search space, we introduce two graphical pruning criteria that depend only on the causal graph and the query: a novel path-interception rule that exploits district structure to certify zero potency in linear time, and an identifiability check based on the ID algorithm. On Erdos-Renyi random graphs and 11 bnlearn benchmark networks, the two criteria together prune 50-88% of candidate experiments on average without solving a single polynomial program. For the general subset search, we show that ID-pruned experiments are combinatorially inert, yielding a super-exponential reduction in the number of subsets evaluated. We close with an end-to-end demonstration on observational NHANES data, selecting optimal experiments for estimating the effect of physical activity on diabetes.

analysis.tldr: 提出在成本约束下选择最优实验以收紧部分因果识别边界的框架，证明问题NP-hard，并引入图剪枝准则高效求解。
analysis.research_motivation: 因果查询常仅能从观测数据中部分识别，而实验成本高昂，亟需在实验前选择成本约束下能最大程度收紧目标查询边界的实验子集。
analysis.problem: 在实验前，给定成本约束，选择能最大程度收紧目标因果查询边界的实验子集（max-potency问题）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 形式化max-potency问题并证明NP-hard；基于多项式规划框架评估认知效力；引入两种图剪枝准则（路径拦截规则和ID算法可识别性检查）以指数级缩小搜索空间。
contributions: 形式化并证明max-potency问题为NP-hard。
提出两种图剪枝准则（路径拦截和ID可识别性检查），在随机图和基准网络上平均剪枝50-88%的候选实验。
证明ID剪枝后的实验组合具有组合惰性，实现超指数级子集搜索缩减。
analysis.experiments: 在Erdos-Renyi随机图和11个bnlearn基准网络上验证剪枝效果，并在NHANES观测数据上演示最优实验选择。
limitations: 方法主要针对离散设置，连续变量需进一步扩展。
剪枝准则依赖于因果图结构，图未知时需额外学习。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在成本约束下选择最优实验以收紧部分因果识别边界的框架，证明问题NP-hard，并引入图剪枝准则高效求解。

papers.title: TRAJGANR: Trajectory-Centric Urban Multimodal Learning via Geospatially Aligned Neural Representations
papers.abstract: Multimodal self-supervised learning (MSSL) has emerged as a key paradigm for pretraining geospatial foundation models. However, existing geospatial MSSL methods are mainly designed for static pairs of modalities, such as satellite imagery, street-view imagery, and text, where learning is driven by aligning observations from the same or nearby locations. This assumption breaks down for human mobility trajectories, which represent continuous movement along paths rather than discrete observations at individual locations. Although trajectories are important for urban understanding through their ability to capture human activity across roads, neighborhoods, and places over time, they remain largely underexplored in current geospatial MSSL frameworks. We present TrajGANR, a novel trajectory-centric geospatial MSSL framework that aligns continuous movement patterns with static, location-based observations. TrajGANR learns a continuous neural representation of trajectories at arbitrary points along each path, which enables fine-grained alignment with nearby street-view images, even when they are not co-located with any trajectory waypoints. We leverage this capability to introduce an MSSL objective that jointly aligns three modalities: trajectories, street-view images, and their geographic locations. We evaluate TrajGANR on four urban mobility and road understanding tasks. Across these tasks, TrajGANR consistently outperforms existing geospatial MSSL frameworks and a trajectory-specific foundation model. Ablation studies further demonstrate that our proposed MSSL objective and the multimodal learning framework are the primary drivers of these improvements, highlighting the importance of fine-grained geospatial alignment over coarser aggregation, as well as geospatial multimodal learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出TrajGANR，通过连续神经表示对齐轨迹与街景图像，实现轨迹中心的多模态自监督学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有地理空间多模态自监督学习主要针对静态模态对（如卫星图像、街景图像和文本），无法处理人类移动轨迹这种连续运动数据，而轨迹对城市理解至关重要，但尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何将连续的人类移动轨迹与静态的、基于位置的多模态观测（如街景图像）进行细粒度对齐，以学习有效的轨迹中心地理空间表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TrajGANR框架，学习轨迹在路径上任意点的连续神经表示，实现与附近街景图像的细粒度对齐，并引入联合对齐轨迹、街景图像和地理位置的三模态自监督学习目标。
contributions: 提出首个轨迹中心的地理空间多模态自监督学习框架TrajGANR，能够对齐连续运动模式与静态位置观测。
引入基于连续神经表示的细粒度地理空间对齐方法，实现轨迹与街景图像的非共位对齐。
在四个城市移动和道路理解任务上，TrajGANR优于现有地理空间MSSL框架和轨迹专用基础模型。
analysis.experiments: 在四个城市移动和道路理解任务上评估，TrajGANR持续优于现有地理空间MSSL框架和轨迹专用基础模型。消融实验表明，提出的MSSL目标和多模态学习框架是主要改进来源。
limitations: 可能依赖街景图像的可用性和质量。
连续神经表示的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TrajGANR，通过连续神经表示对齐轨迹与街景图像，实现轨迹中心的多模态自监督学习。

papers.title: Drawing Lines in Psychological Space: What K-means Clustering Reveals in Simulated and Real Psychometric Data
papers.abstract: K-means clustering is widely used in psychological and psychometric research to identify profiles, subgroups, and potential typologies, yet its classical formulation does not test whether such groups exist as latent psychological categories. Instead, K-means partitions multidimensional space into regions around centroids, favoring compact, approximately spherical clusters defined by geometric distance. In this paper, we examine this limitation through a sequence of controlled simulated datasets. We then extend the analysis to the SMARVUS dataset, a large international psychometric dataset comprising survey responses from university students across 35 countries, to evaluate whether similar geometric partitioning patterns emerge in empirical psychological data. By contrasting simulated and empirical data, this paper argues that K-means can produce stable and visually coherent clustering solutions even in continuous Gaussian latent spaces without true subgroup structure.

analysis.tldr: K-means聚类在心理测量数据中即使无真实子群结构也能产生稳定聚类，需谨慎解释结果。
analysis.research_motivation: K-means聚类在心理学研究中广泛用于识别潜在类型，但其经典形式不检验类别是否存在，可能导致虚假发现。
analysis.problem: K-means聚类在无真实子群结构的连续潜在空间中也能产生稳定聚类，需评估其局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: K-means倾向于产生紧凑、近似球形的聚类，即使在连续高斯潜在空间中也能生成稳定且视觉上一致的聚类解。
analysis.method: 通过模拟数据集和真实心理测量数据集（SMARVUS）对比分析K-means的聚类行为。
contributions: 揭示K-means在无真实子群结构时仍能产生稳定聚类。
通过模拟与实证数据对比，强调聚类结果需谨慎解释。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对K-means，未讨论其他聚类算法。
实证数据仅使用SMARVUS数据集，可能缺乏泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: K-means聚类在心理测量数据中即使无真实子群结构也能产生稳定聚类，需谨慎解释结果。

papers.title: PLOT: Progressive Localization via Optimal Transport in Neural Causal Abstraction
papers.abstract: Causal abstraction offers a principled framework for mechanistic interpretability, aligning a high-level causal model with the low-level computation realized by a neural network through counterfactual intervention analysis. Existing methods such as distributed alignment search (DAS) learn expressive subspace interventions, but the relevant neural site is unknown a priori, so finding a handle requires a computationally burdensome search over candidate sites. We introduce PLOT (Progressive Localization via Optimal Transport), a transport-based framework that localizes causal variables from the output effect geometry of abstract and neural interventions. PLOT fits an optimal transport coupling between abstract variables and candidate neural sites, yielding a global soft correspondence that can be calibrated into intervention handles. In simple settings, a single coupling over individual neurons suffices. In larger models, PLOT is applied progressively, moving from coarse sites such as tokens, timesteps, or layers to finer supports such as coordinate groups or PCA spans, and optionally guiding DAS based on the localized signal. Across experiments of increasing complexity, transport-only PLOT handles are exceedingly fast and competitive on accuracy, while PLOT-guided DAS reaches DAS-level accuracy at a fraction of full DAS runtime, providing an efficient localization engine for causal abstraction research at scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于最优传输的渐进定位框架PLOT，高效找到神经因果抽象中的干预位点。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有因果抽象方法（如DAS）需要穷举搜索神经位点，计算成本高，限制了在大规模模型上的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何高效定位神经网络中与高层因果变量对应的干预位点。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PLOT通过最优传输拟合抽象变量与候选神经位点之间的全局软对应，并渐进地从粗粒度位点（如token、层）定位到细粒度支持（如坐标组、PCA主成分），可引导DAS搜索。
contributions: 提出基于最优传输的渐进定位框架PLOT，无需穷举搜索即可定位因果变量。
实验表明PLOT在准确性和速度上具有竞争力，PLOT引导的DAS在部分运行时间内达到DAS级精度。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂度递增的实验上验证，PLOT仅用传输方法即可快速且准确，PLOT引导的DAS在更短运行时间内达到DAS级精度。
limitations: 可能依赖候选位点的质量，粗粒度定位可能遗漏细粒度特征。
最优传输的计算开销在极大规模场景下仍需评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于最优传输的渐进定位框架PLOT，高效找到神经因果抽象中的干预位点。

papers.title: Group of Skills: Group-Structured Skill Retrieval for Agent Skill Libraries
papers.abstract: Skill-augmented agents increasingly rely on large reusable skill libraries, but retrieving relevant skills is not the same as presenting usable context. Existing methods typically return atomic skills or dependency-aware bundles whose internal roles remain implicit, leaving the agent to infer the execution entry point, support skills, visible requirements, and failure-avoidance guidance. We introduce Group of Skills (GoSkills), an inference-time group-structured retrieval method that changes the agent-facing retrieval object from a flat skill list to a compact, role-labeled execution context. GoSkills builds anchor-centered skill groups from a typed skill graph, expands support groups through a group graph, bottlenecks the selected group plan into a bounded set of atomic skill payloads, and renders a fixed execution contract with Start, Support, Check, and Avoid fields, without changing the downstream agent, skill payloads, or execution environment. Experiments on SkillsBench and ALFWorld show that GoSkills preserves visible-requirement coverage under a small skill budget, improves over flat skill-access baselines, and often improves reward and agent-only runtime relative to structural retrieval references.

analysis.tldr: 提出GoSkills方法，将智能体技能库的检索对象从扁平技能列表变为带角色标签的分组执行上下文，提升技能检索效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有技能增强型智能体依赖大型可复用技能库，但检索到的技能通常以原子技能或依赖感知的捆绑形式返回，内部角色隐式，智能体需自行推断执行入口、支持技能、可见需求和故障规避指导，导致使用效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何将技能库中的检索结果组织成结构化的、角色明确的执行上下文，使智能体能直接获取执行所需的关键信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GoSkills方法：从类型化技能图构建以锚点为中心的技能组，通过组图扩展支持组，将选定的组计划瓶颈化为有界原子技能负载，并渲染带有Start、Support、Check、Avoid字段的固定执行契约。
contributions: 提出GoSkills，一种推理时分组结构检索方法，改变智能体面对的检索对象为紧凑的、带角色标签的执行上下文。
在SkillsBench和ALFWorld上实验，证明GoSkills在较小技能预算下保持可见需求覆盖，优于扁平技能访问基线，并在奖励和智能体运行时方面优于结构检索参考方法。
analysis.experiments: 在SkillsBench和ALFWorld上评估，与扁平技能访问基线和结构检索参考方法对比，GoSkills在可见需求覆盖、奖励和智能体运行时方面表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的技能图结构，构建成本较高。
实验仅在两个基准上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GoSkills方法，将智能体技能库的检索对象从扁平技能列表变为带角色标签的分组执行上下文，提升技能检索效率。

papers.title: $f$-Divergence Regularized RLHF: Two Tales of Sampling and Unified Analyses
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) has become a cornerstone technique for post-training large language models. While most existing approaches rely on the reverse KL-regularization, recent empirical studies have begun exploring alternative divergences (e.g., forward KL, chi-squared) as regularizers in RLHF. However, a unified theoretical understanding of general $f$-divergence regularization remains under-explored. To fill this gap, this work develops a comprehensive theoretical framework for online RLHF with a general $f$-divergence regularized objective. Rather than treating each possible divergence function individually, we adopt a holistic perspective across the entire function class and propose two algorithms based on distinct sampling principles. The first extends the classical optimism principle with a carefully designed exploration bonus, while the second introduces a new method that exploits the sensitivity of the optimal policy to reward perturbations under $f$-divergence regularization. Theoretical analysis shows that $O(\log T)$ regret and $O(1/T)$ sub-optimality gap are achievable, establishing provable efficiency of both algorithms and, to the best of our knowledge, the first performance bounds for online RLHF under general $f$-divergence regularization.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一理论框架分析f-散度正则化RLHF，设计两种采样算法并证明对数遗憾界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLHF主要依赖反向KL正则化，但近期实验开始探索其他散度（如前向KL、卡方），缺乏统一理论理解。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对一般f-散度正则化RLHF的统一理论分析框架和高效在线算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种基于不同采样原则的在线RLHF算法：一种扩展乐观主义原则并设计探索奖励，另一种利用最优策略对奖励扰动的敏感性。
contributions: 建立了通用f-散度正则化RLHF的统一理论框架
提出两种在线算法并证明O(log T)遗憾界和O(1/T)次优性差距
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析可能依赖特定假设
未讨论实际实现中的计算效率
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一理论框架分析f-散度正则化RLHF，设计两种采样算法并证明对数遗憾界。

papers.title: Decentralized Time-Varying Optimization for Streaming Data via Temporal Weighting
papers.abstract: Classical optimization theory largely focuses on fixed objective functions, whereas many modern learning systems operate in dynamic environments where data arrive sequentially and decisions must be updated continuously. In this work, we study optimization with streaming data over a distributed network of agents. We adopt a structured, weight-based formulation that explicitly captures the streaming-data origin of the time-varying objective: at each time step, every agent receives a new sample, and the network seeks to track the minimizer of a temporally weighted objective formed from all samples observed across the network so far. We focus on decentralized gradient descent (DGD) with a limited communication/computation budget, where at each time step, only a limited number of DGD iterations can be performed before the objective changes again. For strongly convex and smooth losses, we analyze the tracking error with respect to the time-varying minimizer through a fixed-point theory lens. Our analysis reveals that the tracking error decomposes into a fixed-point tracking term and a bias term induced by data heterogeneity across agents. We specialize the analysis to two natural weighting strategies: uniform weights, which treat all samples equally, and exponentially discounted weights, which geometrically decay the influence of older data. Under uniform weighting, DGD tracks the fixed-point at a rate $\mathcal{O}(1/t)$, whereas discounted weighting yields a non-vanishing fixed-point tracking floor controlled by the discount factor. In both cases, decentralization induces an additional non-zero bias floor under a constant step size. We validate our theoretical findings through numerical simulations.

analysis.tldr: 针对流式数据的分布式时变优化问题，分析了有限通信/计算预算下分布式梯度下降的跟踪误差，揭示了均匀加权和指数折扣加权的不同收敛特性。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典优化理论多针对固定目标函数，而现代学习系统常面临动态环境，数据顺序到达且决策需持续更新，现有方法在分布式流式数据场景下的理论分析不足。
analysis.problem: 在分布式网络中，每个智能体持续接收新样本，网络需跟踪由所有历史样本构成的时变加权目标函数的最小值点，且受限于有限的通信/计算预算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 跟踪误差可分解为固定点跟踪项和由数据异质性引起的偏差项；均匀加权下固定点跟踪误差以O(1/t)速率衰减，而指数折扣加权下存在由折扣因子控制的非零固定点跟踪下限；两种情况下，常数步长下分散化都会引入额外的非零偏差下限。
analysis.method: 采用基于时间加权的结构化公式，将流式数据来源显式建模到时变目标中；通过不动点理论分析有限迭代次数的分布式梯度下降（DGD）的跟踪误差。
contributions: 提出了一个统一的加权框架来建模分布式流式数据优化问题，并分析了两种自然加权策略（均匀加权和指数折扣加权）下的跟踪误差。
通过不动点理论揭示了跟踪误差的分解结构，并给出了均匀加权下O(1/t)的收敛速率以及折扣加权下的非零下限。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分析限于强凸且光滑的损失函数，非凸情况未涉及。
仅考虑了常数步长，自适应步长或更复杂的通信策略未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对流式数据的分布式时变优化问题，分析了有限通信/计算预算下分布式梯度下降的跟踪误差，揭示了均匀加权和指数折扣加权的不同收敛特性。

papers.title: Bringing Multimodal Large Language Models to Infrared-Visible Image Fusion Quality Assessment
papers.abstract: Infrared-Visible image fusion (IVIF) aims to integrate thermal information and detailed spatial structures into a single fused image to enhance perception. However, existing evaluation approaches tend to over-optimize both hand-crafted no-reference statistics and full-reference metrics that treat the source images as pseudo ground truths. Recent IVIF reward-modelling efforts learn from human ratings but use scalar regression on aggregated scores, neither leveraging the reasoning of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) nor encoding per-image perceptual ambiguity in their supervision, but naively introducing MLLMs with discrete one-hot supervision likewise collapses fused images of similar quality into different rating levels. To address this, we introduce FuScore, which utilizes an MLLM to mimic human visual perception by producing continuous quality score, rather than discrete level predictions, enabling fine-grained discrimination among fused images of similar quality. We exploit the agreement among four IVIF-specific sub-dimensions to construct a per-image soft label whose sharpness reflects how consensual the overall judgment is. We further introduce a tripartite objective combining per-image distributional supervision, within-source-pair Thurstone fidelity for method-level ordering, and cross-source-pair Thurstone fidelity for scene-level ordering across scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FuScore achieves state-of-the-art correlation with human visual preferences.

analysis.tldr: FuScore利用多模态大语言模型生成连续质量分数，实现红外-可见光图像融合的细粒度质量评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有红外-可见光图像融合质量评估方法过度优化手工统计指标或全参考指标，且基于人类评分的奖励建模方法使用标量回归，未能利用多模态大语言模型的推理能力，也无法编码每幅图像的感知模糊性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态大语言模型实现红外-可见光融合图像的细粒度、连续质量评估，避免离散标签导致的相似质量图像分类崩塌。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接使用多模态大语言模型进行离散单热监督会导致相似质量的融合图像被划分到不同等级，无法区分细微差异。
analysis.method: 提出FuScore，利用多模态大语言模型生成连续质量分数，通过四个IVIF特定子维度的一致性构建每幅图像的软标签，并引入三部分目标函数：每幅图像的分布监督、源图像对内的Thurstone保序性（方法级排序）和源图像对间的Thurstone保序性（场景级排序）。
contributions: 提出FuScore，首个利用多模态大语言模型生成连续质量分数进行红外-可见光图像融合质量评估的方法。
设计基于子维度一致性的软标签构建策略，并引入三部分目标函数实现细粒度排序。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称与人类视觉偏好达到最先进的相关性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定IVIF子维度的定义，泛化性需验证。
计算开销可能较大，因涉及多模态大语言模型推理。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FuScore利用多模态大语言模型生成连续质量分数，实现红外-可见光图像融合的细粒度质量评估。

papers.title: AI and Consciousness: Shifting Focus Towards Tractable Questions
papers.abstract: As language-based AI systems become more anthropomorphic, the question of whether they can have subjective experience is increasingly pressing. I focus here on the tractability of research questions in the space of AI consciousness. I argue that the fundamental problem of whether AI systems can be conscious is currently intractable in its direct form, given the absence of a universally accepted scientific theory of consciousness, as well as the historical open-endedness of the philosophical mind-body problem. In contrast, questions around the adjacent subject of perceived AI consciousness are tractable, timely, and highly consequential for society. The general public is increasingly open to the possibility of consciousness in AI systems and routinely adopts the vocabulary of human cognition and subjective experience to describe them. This phenomenon is already driving societal shifts across user experience, ethical standards, and linguistic norms. I therefore propose an increased research focus on uncovering the causes and effects of perceived AI consciousness, which ultimately shape how we see our own human subjective experience relative to artificial entities. To support this, I map the current landscape of AI consciousness perception and discuss its key potential drivers and societal consequences. Finally, I urge developers, decision-makers, and the broader scientific community to commit to clear and accurate communication regarding the topic of AI consciousness, explicitly acknowledging its inherent uncertainties.

analysis.tldr: 本文主张将AI意识研究从不可解的“AI是否真有意识”转向可解的“人类如何感知AI意识”问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI系统日益拟人化，公众普遍讨论AI是否具有主观体验，但直接回答该问题缺乏科学共识且哲学上悬而未决，而感知到的AI意识已对社会产生实际影响。
analysis.problem: 直接研究AI是否具有意识在科学上不可行，需要转向研究人类对AI意识的感知及其社会后果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 公众越来越倾向于认为AI可能具有意识，并常用人类认知和主观体验的词汇描述AI，这正在改变用户体验、伦理标准和语言规范。
analysis.method: 提出研究框架，将焦点从不可解的“AI意识存在性”转向可解的“AI意识感知”，并绘制当前感知景观、分析驱动因素和社会影响。
contributions: 论证了直接研究AI意识问题的不可解性，并提出了转向感知研究的必要性。
系统梳理了AI意识感知的现状、潜在驱动因素和社会后果，为后续研究提供路线图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证数据支持感知驱动因素的分析。
未讨论如何操作化“感知意识”的测量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文主张将AI意识研究从不可解的“AI是否真有意识”转向可解的“人类如何感知AI意识”问题。

papers.title: From Surface Learning to Deep Understanding: A Grounded AI Tutoring System for Moodle
papers.abstract: This demo paper describes the development of the AI Teaching \& Learning Assistant, a modular Moodle plugin that leverages Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to deliver high-quality, hallucination-free education. The system employs a dual-centric design, providing students with interactive, Socratic-based tutoring and educators with a "human-in-the-loop" workspace for supervised content generation. By grounding Large Language Model (LLM) responses in teacher-provided materials, the assistant addresses the risks of misinformation while encouraging deep conceptual mastery. Evaluation via the Ragas (LLM-as-a-Judge) framework and a preliminary user study confirms its effectiveness, achieving faithfulness scores up to 0.97 and a 4.00/5.00 recommendation rate.

analysis.tldr: 基于RAG的Moodle插件AI助教，通过教师材料约束LLM输出，实现无幻觉的苏格拉底式辅导。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线教育中LLM可能产生幻觉和误导信息，需要一种既能利用LLM能力又能确保内容准确性的教学辅助系统。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个基于教师提供材料的、无幻觉的AI辅导系统，并集成到Moodle平台中。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发Moodle插件，采用RAG技术，以教师材料为知识库，结合苏格拉底式对话进行辅导，并设计人机协同的内容生成工作流。
contributions: 提出一种基于RAG的AI教学助手Moodle插件，实现无幻觉的交互式辅导。
设计双中心架构，同时支持学生学习和教师内容监督。
analysis.experiments: 使用Ragas框架（LLM-as-a-Judge）评估忠实度，最高0.97；初步用户研究推荐率4.00/5.00。
limitations: 用户研究规模可能较小，未提供具体样本量。
仅评估了忠实度和推荐率，缺乏对学习效果的直接测量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于RAG的Moodle插件AI助教，通过教师材料约束LLM输出，实现无幻觉的苏格拉底式辅导。

papers.title: Learning and Reusing Policy Decompositions for Hierarchical Generalized Planning with LLM Agents
papers.abstract: We present a dynamic policy-learning approach that combines generalized planning and hierarchical task decomposition for LLM-based agents. Our method, Hierarchical Component Learning for Generalized Policies (HCL-GP ), learns parameterized policies that generalize across task instances and automatically extracts reusable components from successful executions, organizing them into a component library for compositional policy generation. We address three challenges: (1) learning components through automated decomposition, (2) generalizing components to maximize reuse, and (3) efficient retrieval via semantic search. Evaluated on the AppWorld benchmark, our approach achieves 98.2% accuracy on normal tasks and 97.8% on challenge tasks with unseen applications, improving 15.8 points over static synthesis on challenging scenarios. For open-source models, dynamic reuse enables 62.5% success versus near-zero without reuse. This demonstrates that classical planning concepts can be effectively integrated with LLM agents for improved accuracy and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出HCL-GP方法，通过层次化组件学习与重用，显著提升LLM Agent在广义规划任务中的准确率和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent在复杂任务规划中面临泛化能力不足和效率低下的问题，传统静态规划方法难以适应新任务实例，且缺乏可重用的规划知识。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM Agent自动学习可泛化的策略分解，并高效重用成功执行中的组件以应对未见过的任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HCL-GP框架，结合广义规划与层次任务分解，通过自动分解学习参数化策略组件，构建组件库，并利用语义搜索实现高效检索与组合。
contributions: 提出一种动态策略学习方法，将广义规划与层次分解结合，实现跨任务实例的泛化。
构建可重用组件库，通过语义搜索实现高效检索，显著提升LLM Agent在挑战性场景下的准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在AppWorld基准上评估，正常任务准确率98.2%，挑战任务（未见应用）准确率97.8%，相比静态合成提升15.8个百分点；开源模型动态重用使成功率从接近0提升至62.5%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的任务分解和组件库初始构建。
语义搜索的效率和准确性可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HCL-GP方法，通过层次化组件学习与重用，显著提升LLM Agent在广义规划任务中的准确率和泛化能力。

papers.title: Kurtosis-Guided Denoising Score Matching for Tabular Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Denoising score matching (DSM) provides a way to learn data distributions by training a neural network to recover the score function, defined as the gradient of the log density, from noise-corrupted samples. Once trained, the score magnitude at a test point reflects how consistent that point is with the learned distribution, making it a natural anomaly signal. The key practical challenge is selecting the perturbation scale: too little noise yields unstable score estimates in sparse regions, while too much erases local structure and weakens anomaly sensitivity. This is compounded by the difficulty of hyperparameter tuning when anomalies are unknown and no validation set is available. We introduce kurtosis-based noise scaling (K-DSM), a per-feature scheme that sets noise levels from the shape of each marginal distribution, improving coverage of low-density regions and precision in high-density regions without extra model complexity. Contrary to prior claims that multi-scale or noise-conditioned training is necessary, we find that a carefully trained single-scale model is already a strong anomaly detector. On standard tabular anomaly detection benchmarks, K-DSM achieves state-of-the-art performance in the semi-supervised setting. When combined with a lightweight EMA-teacher filtering rule that removes low-density training points before each gradient step, it also achieves strong performance in the fully unsupervised (contaminated) setting, suggesting that simple, data-adaptive noise scaling enables robust anomaly detection while reducing reliance on hyperparameter tuning.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于峰度的噪声缩放方法，使单尺度去噪得分匹配在表格异常检测中达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 去噪得分匹配（DSM）用于异常检测时，扰动尺度的选择是关键挑战：噪声过小导致稀疏区域得分估计不稳定，噪声过大则抹去局部结构、降低异常敏感性；且异常未知、无验证集时超参数调优困难。
analysis.problem: 如何为DSM自动选择每个特征的合适噪声尺度，以提升表格数据异常检测性能，同时避免多尺度或噪声条件训练的额外复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现精心训练的单尺度模型已能成为强异常检测器，推翻了以往认为必须使用多尺度或噪声条件训练的观点。
analysis.method: 提出K-DSM：基于每个特征边际分布的峰度设置噪声水平，改善低密度区域覆盖和高密度区域精度；结合轻量EMA-teacher过滤规则，在无监督（污染）设定下移除低密度训练点。
contributions: 提出基于峰度的每特征噪声缩放方案K-DSM，无需额外模型复杂度即可自适应设置噪声尺度。
发现单尺度DSM模型经适当训练即可成为强异常检测器，挑战了多尺度必要性。
在标准表格异常检测基准上，半监督设定下达到SOTA；结合EMA-teacher过滤，无监督设定下也取得强性能。
analysis.experiments: 在标准表格异常检测基准上评估，半监督设定下达到SOTA；无监督（污染）设定下结合EMA-teacher过滤也取得强性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 方法依赖边际分布峰度，可能对多模态或复杂相关特征不够鲁棒。
EMA-teacher过滤规则可能误删真实异常点，影响无监督性能上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于峰度的噪声缩放方法，使单尺度去噪得分匹配在表格异常检测中达到SOTA。

papers.title: Multi-Objective Constraint Inference using Inverse reinforcement learning
papers.abstract: Constraint inference is widely considered essential to align reinforcement learning agents with safety boundaries and operational guidelines by observing expert demonstrations. However, existing approaches typically assume homogeneous demonstrations (i.e., generated by a single expert or multiple experts with identical objectives). They also have limited ability to capture individual preferences and often suffer from computational inefficiencies. In this paper, we introduce Multi-Objective Constraint Inference (MOCI), a novel framework designed to jointly extract shared constraints and individual preferences from heterogeneous expert trajectories, where multiple experts pursue different objectives. MOCI effectively models and learns from diverse, and potentially conflicting, behaviors. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that MOCI significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving improved predictive performance, and maintaining competitive computational efficiency on a standard grid-world benchmark. These results establish MOCI as an accurate, flexible, and computationally practical approach for real-world constraint inference and preference learning tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出MOCI框架，从异构专家轨迹中联合推断共享约束和个体偏好，提升约束推断的准确性与灵活性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有约束推断方法假设演示数据来自单一专家或目标一致的多个专家，无法处理异构专家轨迹中的个体偏好差异，且计算效率低，限制了在安全对齐等实际场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从具有不同目标的多个专家的异构轨迹中，同时推断共享约束和个体偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多目标约束推断（MOCI）框架，通过逆强化学习联合建模共享约束和个体偏好，从异构专家轨迹中学习。
contributions: 提出MOCI框架，首次从异构专家轨迹中联合推断共享约束和个体偏好。
在标准网格世界基准上，MOCI在预测性能上显著优于现有基线，且计算效率具有竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在标准网格世界基准上进行实验，MOCI在预测性能上显著优于现有基线，并保持竞争性的计算效率。
limitations: 仅在网格世界基准上验证，未在更复杂或真实场景中测试。
可能对专家轨迹的数量和多样性敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MOCI框架，从异构专家轨迹中联合推断共享约束和个体偏好，提升约束推断的准确性与灵活性。

papers.title: Research on Security Enhancement Methods for Adversarial Robust Large Language Model Intelligent Agents for Medical Decision-Making Tasks
papers.abstract: Motivated by the challenge to improve the adversarial robustness, security, and trust of medical decision making intelligent agents, this study develops a full-link security enhancement framework, which describes "input risk perception - medical evidence constraint - knowledge consistency verification - decision confidence reweighting - security output control - adversarial feedback update." We propose ARSM-Agent and define a weighted joint objective consisting of decision accuracy loss, adversarial robustness loss, safety refusal loss, and knowledge consistency loss, with weights of 0.3, 0.3, 0.2, and 0.2, respectively. The whole medical decision formulation is implemented by multi-module collaborative linkage. We verify that the algorithm is more efficient than four baselines, including LLM-Agent, Retrieval-Agent, Filter-Agent, and Adv-Train-Agent. Under semantic perturbation, prompt injection, drug-name confusion, and false-evidence attacks, ARSM-Agent reduces the overall attack success rate to 8.7% and achieves a knowledge consistency score of 0.91. Ablation experiments quantify each module's contribution: removing risk perception, evidence retrieval, consistency verification, and confidence reweighting reduces accuracy by 6.7%, 9.1%, 7.6%, and 4.4%, respectively, and increases attack success rate by 13.8%, 11.1%, 8.6%, and 6.9%. The proposed approach addresses key security issues of medical decision making intelligent agents, obtains secure decision making in challenging scenarios, and provides reliable intelligent support for medical decision-making intelligent agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出全链路安全增强框架ARSM-Agent，通过多模块协同将医疗决策智能体的攻击成功率降至8.7%，知识一致性得分达0.91。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗决策智能体面临对抗攻击、提示注入等安全威胁，现有方法缺乏系统性的安全增强机制，难以保证决策的鲁棒性和可信度。
analysis.problem: 如何提升医疗决策大语言模型智能体在对抗环境下的安全性、鲁棒性和可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ARSM-Agent全链路安全增强框架，包含输入风险感知、医疗证据约束、知识一致性验证、决策置信度重加权、安全输出控制和对抗反馈更新六个模块，并定义加权联合目标函数（决策准确率损失、对抗鲁棒性损失、安全拒绝损失、知识一致性损失，权重分别为0.3、0.3、0.2、0.2）。
contributions: 提出全链路安全增强框架ARSM-Agent，系统性地提升医疗决策智能体的对抗鲁棒性和安全性。
通过多模块协同和加权联合目标函数，在多种攻击下将攻击成功率降至8.7%，知识一致性得分达0.91。
analysis.experiments: 在语义扰动、提示注入、药物名称混淆和虚假证据攻击下，ARSM-Agent将整体攻击成功率降至8.7%，知识一致性得分达0.91。消融实验量化了各模块贡献：移除风险感知、证据检索、一致性验证和置信度重加权分别使准确率下降6.7%、9.1%、7.6%和4.4%，攻击成功率上升13.8%、11.1%、8.6%和6.9%。
limitations: 可能仅在医疗决策场景下验证，泛化性未知。
框架复杂度较高，实际部署可能面临计算开销问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出全链路安全增强框架ARSM-Agent，通过多模块协同将医疗决策智能体的攻击成功率降至8.7%，知识一致性得分达0.91。

papers.title: Adaptive Memory Decay for Log-Linear Attention
papers.abstract: Sequence models face a fundamental tradeoff between memory capacity and computational efficiency. Transformers achieve expressive context modeling at quadratic cost, while linear attention and state-space models run in linear time by compressing context into a fixed-size hidden state, inherently limiting recall. Log-linear attention navigates this tradeoff by organizing memory across a Fenwick tree hierarchy, growing its hidden state logarithmically with sequence length at log-linear compute cost. However, its memory decay parameter λ is fixed and independent of the input, assigning uniform weights across all hierarchy levels regardless of the content, which introduces unnecessary rigidity. We propose learning λ directly from the input via a lightweight two-layer MLP, producing per-token, per-level decay that adapts to content rather than position. A softplus activation lets each Fenwick tree level scale independently, avoiding the inter-level competition that softmax introduces. This modification preserves log-linear complexity exactly and adds negligible parameter overhead. We evaluate on associative recall, selective copying, and language modeling, finding that input-dependent decay consistently outperforms the baseline, with the largest gains in long-range memory settings where baseline λ degrades or collapses entirely.

analysis.tldr: 通过轻量MLP学习输入依赖的衰减参数，使对数线性注意力在保持计算效率的同时提升长程记忆能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 序列模型在记忆容量与计算效率之间存在根本权衡：Transformer具有二次复杂度，而线性注意力和状态空间模型通过将上下文压缩为固定大小隐状态实现线性时间，但限制了召回能力。对数线性注意力通过Fenwick树层次结构以对数线性代价组织记忆，但其衰减参数λ固定且与输入无关，导致不必要的刚性。
analysis.problem: 对数线性注意力中固定的记忆衰减参数λ无法根据输入内容自适应调整，限制了模型在长程记忆场景下的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出固定λ在所有层次上分配均匀权重，不考虑内容，导致在长程记忆设置中基线λ性能下降甚至完全崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出通过轻量两层MLP从输入中学习每个token、每个层次的衰减参数，使用softplus激活函数使每个Fenwick树层次独立缩放，避免softmax引入的层次间竞争。该方法保持对数线性复杂度，参数开销可忽略。
contributions: 提出输入依赖的自适应记忆衰减机制，替代对数线性注意力中固定的λ参数。
通过轻量MLP和softplus激活实现内容自适应的层次衰减，保持计算效率。
在关联召回、选择性复制和语言建模任务上验证了自适应衰减优于固定基线，尤其在长程记忆设置中提升显著。
analysis.experiments: 在关联召回、选择性复制和语言建模任务上评估，自适应衰减在长程记忆设置中显著优于基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在长序列场景下优势明显，短序列场景提升有限。
MLP引入的额外参数虽少，但可能增加训练不稳定风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过轻量MLP学习输入依赖的衰减参数，使对数线性注意力在保持计算效率的同时提升长程记忆能力。

papers.title: A Generalized Singular Value Theory for Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Building on the abstract Generalized Singular Value Decomposition (GSVD) theory of Brown et al. [2025], we prove that most modern neural architectures admit a generalized SVD representation in which they are left-invertible before a final linear layer, with no change in input-output behavior. Furthermore, the left-invertible nonlinear portion of the input-output behavior can be made to be \emph{norm preserving}, meaning that perturbations in the left-invertible ``embedding'' (the activations prior to the final linear layer in this representation) correspond proportionally to changes in the input, i.e., distance in feature space can be calibrated directly to distance in input space. We provide a data-driven algorithm for estimating this representation from trained models and propose a model architecture that naturally facilitates the decomposition. We then provide a proof-of-concept that the learned representation can be used to identify adversarial perturbations to model inputs, and develop the theory necessary for future applications to areas such as model bias and invertibility.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经网络广义奇异值理论，证明现代架构可在最终线性层前实现左可逆且保范的表示，并用于对抗扰动检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经网络缺乏统一的奇异值分解理论，难以解释特征空间与输入空间的度量关系，限制了可解释性和鲁棒性应用。
analysis.problem: 如何为现代神经网络建立广义奇异值分解表示，使其在最终线性层前具有左可逆性和保范性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Brown等人的广义奇异值分解理论，证明大多数现代神经网络架构可表示为左可逆且保范的广义SVD形式，并提出数据驱动算法估计该表示，同时设计便于分解的模型架构。
contributions: 证明现代神经网络在最终线性层前存在广义SVD表示，且具有左可逆性和保范性。
提出数据驱动算法估计该表示，并设计便于分解的模型架构。
展示该表示在对抗扰动检测中的概念验证应用，并为模型偏差和可逆性等未来应用奠定理论基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅提供概念验证，缺乏大规模实验验证。
算法对模型架构可能有特定要求，通用性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经网络广义奇异值理论，证明现代架构可在最终线性层前实现左可逆且保范的表示，并用于对抗扰动检测。

papers.title: Bridging the Last Mile of Circuit Design: PostEDA-Bench, a Hierarchical Benchmark for PPA Convergence and DRC Fixing
papers.abstract: LLM-based agents are increasingly applied to the "last mile" of Electronic Design Automation (EDA): repairing residual sign-off Design Rule Check (DRC) violations and converging Power-Performance-Area (PPA) targets after tool runs. Existing EDA-LLM benchmarks, however, omit DRC fixing entirely and rely on flat hierarchies tied to a single toolchain. We introduce PostEDA-Bench, a hierarchical benchmark with 145 tasks across DRC-Essential, DRC-Reasoning, PPA-Mono, and PPA-Multi, supported by EDA toolchains with machine-checkable evaluation. Across eight commercial and open-source LLMs under multiple agent scaffolds, we find that agents handle synthetic DRC-Essential and single-objective PPA-Mono reasonably well but degrade sharply on the more practical DRC-Reasoning, where the best success rate is 36.66%, and PPA-Multi, where the best success rate is 20.00%; vision augmentation consistently enhances DRC-Bench; and trade-off reasoning, rather than knob knowledge, is the dominant PPA-Multi bottleneck.

analysis.tldr: 提出PostEDA-Bench基准，系统评估LLM在EDA后端修复DRC违规和优化PPA的能力，发现多目标权衡推理是主要瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在EDA后端的应用日益增多，但现有基准缺乏DRC修复任务且依赖单一工具链，无法全面评估实际修复能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个层次化、多工具链支持的基准来评估LLM在EDA后端的DRC修复和PPA收敛能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在合成DRC和单目标PPA任务上表现尚可，但在实际DRC推理和多目标PPA任务上性能急剧下降，视觉增强可提升DRC性能，多目标权衡推理是主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建包含145个任务的层次化基准PostEDA-Bench，涵盖DRC-Essential、DRC-Reasoning、PPA-Mono和PPA-Multi四类任务，支持多种EDA工具链和机器可检查评估。
contributions: 首次在EDA-LLM基准中引入DRC修复任务，并支持多工具链层次化评估。
系统评估8种商用和开源LLM，揭示多目标PPA权衡推理是主要瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在8种商用和开源LLM上使用多种Agent框架进行实验，报告了DRC-Reasoning最佳成功率36.66%和PPA-Multi最佳成功率20.00%。
limitations: 基准任务规模有限（145个），可能无法覆盖所有实际场景。
仅评估了有限数量的LLM和Agent框架，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PostEDA-Bench基准，系统评估LLM在EDA后端修复DRC违规和优化PPA的能力，发现多目标权衡推理是主要瓶颈。

papers.title: XiYOLO: Energy-Aware Object Detection via Iterative Architecture Search and Scaling
papers.abstract: Object detection on heterogeneous edge devices must satisfy strict energy, latency, and memory constraints while still providing reliable perception for downstream autonomy. Existing energy-aware NAS methods often target limited deployment settings, while real energy remains difficult to optimize because it is highly device-dependent and costly to measure. We address these challenges with an energy-adaptive framework that combines an energy-aware XiResOFA search space, a two-stage energy estimator, and iterative search to identify a single energy-efficient base architecture. We then apply compound scaling to transform this base design into the XiYOLO family across deployment budgets, enabling interpretable accuracy-energy tradeoffs under sparse hardware measurements. Experiments on PascalVOC, COCO, and real-device deployment show that XiYOLO achieves a stronger energy-accuracy tradeoff than YOLO baselines. On PascalVOC, the medium XiYOLO model reaches 86.15 mAP50 while reducing energy relative to YOLOv12m by 20.6% on GPU and 35.9% on NPU. On COCO, XiYOLO reduces energy relative to YOLOv12 by up to 53.7% on GPU and 51.6% on NPU at the small scale. The proposed two-stage estimator also improves sample efficiency over a joint predictor under few-shot adaptation with only 2-20 target-device samples.

analysis.tldr: 提出能量感知目标检测框架XiYOLO，通过迭代架构搜索和复合缩放实现跨边缘设备的能效-精度权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 异构边缘设备上的目标检测需满足严格能量、延迟和内存约束，现有能量感知NAS方法部署场景有限，且真实能量高度依赖设备、测量成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在稀疏硬件测量下，为多种边缘设备自动搜索并缩放出能量高效的目标检测架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合能量感知搜索空间XiResOFA、两阶段能量估计器和迭代搜索，识别单一高效基架构，再通过复合缩放生成XiYOLO系列。
contributions: 提出能量自适应框架，结合XiResOFA搜索空间、两阶段能量估计器和迭代搜索。
通过复合缩放将基架构扩展为XiYOLO系列，实现可解释的精度-能量权衡。
在PascalVOC和COCO上，XiYOLO相比YOLO基线取得更强能量-精度权衡，并显著降低能耗。
analysis.experiments: 在PascalVOC、COCO和真实设备上部署，中等XiYOLO模型在PascalVOC上达86.15 mAP50，GPU能耗比YOLOv12m降低20.6%，NPU降低35.9%；COCO上小尺度GPU能耗降低53.7%，NPU降低51.6%。两阶段估计器在少样本（2-20样本）下比联合预测器样本效率更高。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定硬件（GPU/NPU）优化，其他设备需重新校准。
搜索空间和缩放策略可能不适用于非卷积架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出能量感知目标检测框架XiYOLO，通过迭代架构搜索和复合缩放实现跨边缘设备的能效-精度权衡。
