Developing robust pediatric-specific models is hindered by data scarcity and fragmentation across centers. Federated learning (FL) enables privacy-preserving collaborative training without the need for data sharing. We evaluated the feasibility and performance of FL for developing pediatric-specific OAR segmentation models across two European medical centers. Computed tomography (CT) images from pediatric patients from Utrecht and Heidelberg with a renal tumor or abdominal neuroblastoma were retrospectively collected and locally processed. An nnU-Net-based framework segmented 19 OARs using local and FL schemes. FL was implemented with secure weight exchange on a cloud storage across institutional firewalls. Performance was assessed using the Dice similarity coefficient (DSC), 95th percentile Hausdorff distance, and mean surface distance. Robustness to patient orientation, false-positive segmentation of surgically removed kidneys, and failure cases were identified. A total of 310 postoperative CTs from 272 patients (105 renal tumors, 167 neuroblastomas) were included. Local models performed well on their respective center data but showed significantly reduced cross-center performance for four to seven of the nine evaluated OARs (DSC). In contrast, the FL model matched local performance for at least seven of nine OARs and achieved the best cross-center results across three metrics, with DSC gains of 0.003-0.007 over local models. FL also maintained stable performance across patient orientations and reduced false-positive kidney segmentations. Real-world FL improves cross-center robustness of CT-based OAR segmentation models in pediatric upper abdominal tumors.

analysis.tldr: 联邦学习能有效解决儿童上腹部放疗中器官分割的数据稀缺问题，跨中心性能优于本地模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 儿童放疗中器官自动分割模型因数据稀缺和分散而难以开发，成人模型在儿童数据上表现不佳，联邦学习可在保护隐私下协作训练。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多中心联邦学习克服数据稀缺，构建鲁棒的儿童特异性器官分割模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 本地模型在各自中心表现良好，但跨中心性能显著下降；联邦学习模型在跨中心指标上匹配或超越本地模型，且对患者朝向和假阳性分割更鲁棒。
analysis.method: 基于nnU-Net框架，在两个欧洲医学中心间实施联邦学习，通过云存储安全交换权重，训练19个器官的分割模型。
contributions: 首次在儿童上腹部放疗中评估联邦学习用于器官分割的可行性。
证明联邦学习模型在跨中心鲁棒性上优于本地模型，且性能稳定。
analysis.experiments: 使用310张术后CT（272名患者）在两个中心进行实验，评估Dice系数、Hausdorff距离和平均表面距离。
limitations: 仅涉及两个中心，泛化性需更多中心验证。
未提及联邦学习通信开销和收敛速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 联邦学习能有效解决儿童上腹部放疗中器官分割的数据稀缺问题，跨中心性能优于本地模型。

papers.title: Uneven Evolution of Cognition Across Generations of Generative AI Models
papers.abstract: The pursuit of artificial general intelligence necessitates robust methods for evaluating the cognitive capabilities of models beyond narrow task performance. Here, we introduce a psychometric framework to assess the cognitive profiles of generative AI, comparing them to human norms and tracking their evolution across generations. Initial evaluation of leading multimodal models using tasks adapted from the Wechsler Adult Intelligence Scale revealed a profoundly uneven cognitive architecture: near-ceiling performance in verbal comprehension and working memory (>$98^{\text{th}}$ percentile) contrasted with near-floor performance in perceptual reasoning (<$1^{\text{st}}$ percentile). To track developmental trajectories beyond human-normed limits, we developed the Artificial Intelligence Quotient (AIQ) Benchmark and applied it to six generations and two model families, revealing significant but asymmetric performance gains. Notably, we uncovered a sharp dissociation between modalities; abstract quantitative reasoning matured far more rapidly when presented linguistically compared to a visually analogous format, indicating an architectural bias towards language-based symbolic manipulation. While abstract visual reasoning improved, visual-perceptual organization remained largely stagnant. Collectively, these findings demonstrate that the cognitive abilities of generative models are evolving unevenly, suggesting that scaling and optimization approaches to AGI development alone may be insufficient to overcome fundamental architectural limitations in achieving balanced, human-like general intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 生成式AI模型的认知能力发展极不均衡，语言推理远超视觉感知，暗示仅靠规模扩展难以实现平衡的通用智能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前缺乏系统评估生成式AI认知能力的方法，尤其是超越窄任务性能、与人类认知基准对比的框架，难以追踪模型向通用智能发展的真实轨迹。
analysis.problem: 如何量化生成式AI模型的认知能力，并揭示其跨代际、跨模态的发展模式与瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态模型在言语理解和工作记忆上接近人类天花板（>98百分位），但在知觉推理上接近地板（<1百分位）；抽象定量推理在语言模态下进步远快于视觉模态，视觉-知觉组织能力长期停滞。
analysis.method: 基于韦氏成人智力量表改编任务构建心理测量框架，并开发AI商数（AIQ）基准，对两大家族六代模型进行跨模态认知评估。
contributions: 提出评估生成式AI认知轮廓的心理测量框架，并与人类常模对比。
构建AIQ基准，追踪六代模型认知发展轨迹。
发现语言与视觉模态间的认知能力显著分离，揭示架构偏向语言符号操作。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估两大家族模型，泛化性有限。
AIQ基准可能未覆盖所有认知维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 生成式AI模型的认知能力发展极不均衡，语言推理远超视觉感知，暗示仅靠规模扩展难以实现平衡的通用智能。

papers.title: Towards Security-Auditable LLM Agents: A Unified Graph Representation
papers.abstract: LLM-based agentic systems are rapidly evolving to perform complex autonomous tasks through dynamic tool invocation, stateful memory management, and multi-agent collaboration. However, this semantics-driven execution paradigm creates a severe semantic gap between low-level physical events and high-level execution intent, making post-hoc security auditing fundamentally difficult. Existing representation mechanisms, including static SBOMs and runtime logs, provide only fragmented evidence and fail to capture cognitive-state evolution, capability bindings, persistent memory contamination, and cascading risk propagation across interacting agents. To bridge this gap, we propose Agent-BOM, a unified structural representation for agent security auditing. Agent-BOM models an agentic system as a hierarchical attributed directed graph that separates static capability bases, such as models, tools, and long-term memory, from dynamic runtime semantic states, such as goals, reasoning trajectories, and actions. These layers are connected through semantic edges and security attributes, transforming fragmented execution traces into queryable audit paths. Building on Agent-BOM, we develop a graph-query-based paradigm for path-level risk assessment and instantiate it with the OWASP Agentic Top 10. We further implement an auditing plugin in the OpenClaw environment to construct Agent-BOM from live executions. Evaluation on representative real-world agentic attack scenarios shows that Agent-BOM can reconstruct stealthy attack chains, including cross-session memory poisoning and tool misuse, capability supply-chain hijacking and unexpected code execution, multi-agent ecosystem hijacking, and privilege and trust abuse. These results demonstrate that Agent-BOM provides a unified and auditable foundation for root-cause analysis and security adjudication in complex agentic ecosystems.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agent-BOM，一种统一图表示方法，用于LLM代理系统的安全审计，能够重构隐蔽攻击链。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM代理系统执行复杂自主任务时，低层物理事件与高层执行意图之间存在语义鸿沟，现有表示机制（如SBOM、运行时日志）仅提供碎片化证据，无法捕获认知状态演化、能力绑定、持久记忆污染及跨代理级联风险传播，导致事后安全审计困难。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一种统一的结构化表示，弥合语义鸿沟，使LLM代理系统的安全审计可查询、可追溯。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Agent-BOM，一种层次化属性有向图表示，将静态能力基础（模型、工具、长期记忆）与动态运行时语义状态（目标、推理轨迹、动作）分离，通过语义边和安全属性连接，将碎片化执行轨迹转化为可查询的审计路径。基于此开发图查询范式进行路径级风险评估，并实例化OWASP Agentic Top 10。在OpenClaw环境中实现审计插件，从实时执行构建Agent-BOM。
contributions: 提出Agent-BOM，一种统一的图表示方法，用于LLM代理系统的安全审计。
开发基于图查询的路径级风险评估范式，并实例化OWASP Agentic Top 10。
在OpenClaw环境中实现审计插件，并在真实攻击场景中验证其重构隐蔽攻击链的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性真实世界代理攻击场景上评估，包括跨会话内存污染和工具误用、能力供应链劫持和意外代码执行、多代理生态系统劫持、特权与信任滥用。结果显示Agent-BOM能够重构这些隐蔽攻击链。
limitations: 可能依赖OpenClaw环境，泛化性需进一步验证。
图构建和查询的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agent-BOM，一种统一图表示方法，用于LLM代理系统的安全审计，能够重构隐蔽攻击链。

papers.title: Enhancing Eye Movement Biometrics for User Authentication via Continuous Gaze Offset Score Fusion
papers.abstract: Eye movement biometrics (EMB) use subject-specific gaze dynamics for user authentication and identification. Recent deep learning-based EMB systems achieve strong performance by modeling temporal eye movement behavior. However, these systems typically overlook continuous gaze offset, despite prior evidence that it contains user-discriminative information. This work examines whether continuous gaze offset can improve biometric performance when combined with existing biometric features. We evaluate linear and nonlinear fusion methods on two publicly available datasets, collected via the lab-grade eye tracker and virtual reality headset across multiple tasks and observation durations. Results indicate that fusion offers performance benefits on both datasets, particularly when using nonlinear fusion. Additionally, fusing biometric information across multiple tasks further improves authentication performance. These findings support the hypothesis that continuous gaze offset may serve as useful auxiliary information under conditions of degraded or noisy eye tracking.

analysis.tldr: 融合连续注视偏移分数可提升眼动生物特征认证性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 眼动生物特征认证中，现有深度学习系统忽略了连续注视偏移这一潜在的用户判别信息，而该信息可能提升认证性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用连续注视偏移分数与现有生物特征融合，以改善眼动生物特征认证的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出线性与非线性融合方法，将连续注视偏移分数与现有眼动生物特征结合，并在多个任务和观测时长下评估。
contributions: 首次系统研究连续注视偏移分数对眼动生物特征认证的增强作用。
在实验室级眼动仪和VR头显两个公开数据集上验证了非线性融合方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在两个公开数据集（实验室级眼动仪和VR头显）上评估，涉及多个任务和观测时长，结果表明非线性融合提升性能，跨任务融合进一步改善。
limitations: 仅使用两个数据集，泛化性有待验证。
未探讨融合方法在极端噪声条件下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 融合连续注视偏移分数可提升眼动生物特征认证性能。

papers.title: LookWhen? Fast Video Recognition by Learning When, Where, and What to Compute
papers.abstract: Transformers dominate video recognition. They split videos into tokens, and processing them has expensive superlinear computational cost. Yet videos are filled with redundancy, so we can question the need for this expense. We introduce LookWhen, a selector-extractor framework that factorizes video recognition into learning when, where, and what to compute. Our shallow selector gets a scaled-down video and quickly scores all tokens across space-time, while our deep extractor gets the top-K selected tokens to approximate full-video representations without actually processing all the tokens. A key challenge is defining effective supervision for selection and extraction. For selection pre-training, we introduce a score on representations that ranks tokens by uniqueness using a simple nearest-neighbor distance. For extraction pre-training, we distill both a video teacher and an image teacher, for which we normalize its frame-wise representations to learn what changes within videos. Through these strategies, our selector-extractor learns general and efficient representations for feature extraction or fine-tuning to a task. Through experiments on Kinetics-400, SSv2, Epic-Kitchens, Diving48, Jester, and Charades, we show that LookWhen achieves a better accuracy-computation trade-off than efficient models and upgraded baselines of similar size. LookWhen Pareto-dominates in accuracy-FLOPs on 9 of 12 cases (6 tasks x 2 settings) and roughly matches on 3. In accuracy-throughput, measuring time in practice, LookWhen is more efficient still at 6.7x faster than InternVideo2-B at equal accuracy.

analysis.tldr: LookWhen通过选择-提取框架学习何时、何地、计算什么，实现高效视频识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频中存在大量冗余，现有Transformer处理所有token导致超线性计算成本，效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何在不处理全部视频token的情况下，近似全视频表示并保持高识别精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视频帧间和空间区域存在冗余，部分token对识别贡献更大。
analysis.method: 提出选择-提取框架：浅层选择器对缩放后的视频快速评分，选出top-K token；深层提取器仅处理这些token，通过预训练（基于最近邻距离的token唯一性评分、视频教师和图像教师蒸馏）学习通用高效表示。
contributions: 提出LookWhen框架，将视频识别分解为学习何时、何地、计算什么。
设计有效的选择预训练和提取预训练策略，包括基于唯一性的token评分和双教师蒸馏。
在多个数据集上实现更好的精度-计算权衡，速度比InternVideo2-B快6.7倍。
analysis.experiments: 在Kinetics-400、SSv2、Epic-Kitchens、Diving48、Jester、Charades上评估，LookWhen在9/12个案例中Pareto占优精度-FLOPs，其余3个大致匹配；精度-吞吐量上比InternVideo2-B快6.7倍。
limitations: 可能依赖top-K选择策略的合理性，极端冗余场景下性能可能下降。
预训练需要视频和图像教师，可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LookWhen通过选择-提取框架学习何时、何地、计算什么，实现高效视频识别。

papers.title: Distributional Process Reward Models: Calibrated Prediction of Future Rewards via Conditional Optimal Transport
papers.abstract: Inference-time scaling methods rely on Process Reward Models (PRMs), which are often poorly calibrated and overestimate success probabilities. We propose, to our knowledge, the first use of conditional optimal transport for calibrating PRMs, modifying conditional OT (CondOT) map learning \cite{bunne2022supervised} to estimate a monotonic conditional quantile function over success probabilities estimated by the PRM, conditioned on PRM hidden states. This yields structurally valid quantile estimates and enables efficient extraction of confidence bounds at arbitrary levels, which we integrate into the instance-adaptive scaling (IAS) framework of \cite{park2025know}. We evaluate on mathematical reasoning benchmarks spanning moderate-difficulty problems (MATH-500) and harder out-of-distribution problems (AIME). For PRMs with reliable ranking signals, our method substantially improves calibration over both uncalibrated PRMs and quantile regression. On downstream Best-of-N IAS performance, our method generally improves over uncalibrated PRMs. These results establish conditional optimal transport as another principled and practical approach to PRM calibration, offering structural guarantees and flexible uncertainty estimation.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于条件最优传输的分布性过程奖励模型校准方法，提升数学推理中成功概率预测的校准性。
analysis.research_motivation: 过程奖励模型（PRM）在推理时扩展中至关重要，但常存在校准不良、高估成功概率的问题，影响下游决策可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何校准PRM输出的成功概率估计，使其具有结构有效的分位数估计和置信区间，并提升下游Best-of-N选择性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PRM通常校准不良，高估成功概率；现有校准方法如分位数回归可能缺乏结构保证。
analysis.method: 修改条件最优传输（CondOT）映射学习，估计关于PRM隐藏状态的条件单调分位数函数，从而校准PRM估计的成功概率，并提取任意置信水平的置信界。
contributions: 首次将条件最优传输用于PRM校准，提供结构有效的分位数估计。
将校准后的置信界集成到实例自适应扩展（IAS）框架中，提升下游Best-of-N性能。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理基准MATH-500（中等难度）和AIME（更难分布外问题）上评估，对于具有可靠排序信号的PRM，校准效果优于未校准PRM和分位数回归。
limitations: 依赖PRM隐藏状态的质量，可能不适用于隐藏状态信息不足的PRM。
仅针对数学推理任务验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于条件最优传输的分布性过程奖励模型校准方法，提升数学推理中成功概率预测的校准性。

papers.title: When Does Critique Improve AI-Assisted Theoretical Physics? SCALAR: Structured Critic--Actor Loop for Agentic Reasoning
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) show increasing promise on research-level physics reasoning tasks and agentic AI becomes more common, a practical question emerges: How does the interaction between researchers and agents affect the results? We study this using SCALAR (Structured Critic--Actor Loop for AI Reasoning), an Actor--Critic--Judge pipeline applied to quantum field theory and string theory problems. The Actor proposes solutions, the Critic provides iterative feedback, and an independent Judge evaluates the transcript against reference solutions. We vary the Actor persona, the Critic feedback strategy, and the Actor model family and scale. Multi-turn dialogue improves over single-shot attempts throughout, but both the mechanism of improvement and the value of different prompting choices depend strongly on the Actor--Critic pairing. Increasing the scale within one model family (e.g. from the 8B-parameter DeepSeek-R1 variant to DeepSeek-R1 70B) improves some easier-problem behavior, but does not remove the hardest bottleneck we observe. Critic feedback strategy matters most clearly in the asymmetric Actor--Critic setting (e.g., a lightweight Haiku Actor guided by a stronger Sonnet Critic), where constructive feedback improves mean-score outcomes. In same-family Actor--Critic settings, strategy effects are weaker: lenient feedback is sometimes favored, while strict and adversarial feedback are not beneficial. Taken together, SCALAR provides a controlled testbed for evaluating which interaction structures help or hinder AI-driven scientific discovery.

analysis.tldr: SCALAR框架通过Actor-Critic-Judge流水线研究AI辅助理论物理中批评反馈的效果，发现多轮对话普遍提升性能，但反馈策略的效果取决于Actor-Critic配对。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM在研究级物理推理任务中表现提升，研究人员与AI代理的交互如何影响结果成为一个实际问题，需要系统研究。
analysis.problem: 研究AI辅助理论物理中，批评反馈（Critique）对推理结果的影响，特别是不同Actor-Critic配对和反馈策略的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多轮对话始终优于单次尝试；模型规模提升可改善简单问题但无法消除最难瓶颈；反馈策略在非对称配对中效果显著，在同族配对中效果较弱。
analysis.method: SCALAR（结构化批评-演员循环），包含Actor（提出方案）、Critic（提供迭代反馈）和Judge（独立评估）的流水线，应用于量子场论和弦理论问题。
contributions: 提出SCALAR框架作为评估AI辅助科学发现中交互结构的受控测试平台
系统分析了Actor persona、Critic反馈策略和模型规模对推理性能的影响
analysis.experiments: 在量子场论和弦理论问题上进行实验，变化Actor persona、Critic反馈策略和Actor模型族及规模。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对理论物理领域，可能不适用于其他科学领域
未探索更复杂的交互结构（如多轮Critic迭代）
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SCALAR框架通过Actor-Critic-Judge流水线研究AI辅助理论物理中批评反馈的效果，发现多轮对话普遍提升性能，但反馈策略的效果取决于Actor-Critic配对。

papers.title: ActCam: Zero-Shot Joint Camera and 3D Motion Control for Video Generation
papers.abstract: For artistic applications, video generation requires fine-grained control over both performance and cinematography, i.e., the actor's motion and the camera trajectory. We present ActCam, a zero-shot method for video generation that jointly transfers character motion from a driving video into a new scene and enables per-frame control of intrinsic and extrinsic camera parameters. ActCam builds on any pretrained image-to-video diffusion model that accepts conditioning in terms of scene depth and character pose. Given a source video with a moving character and a target camera motion, ActCam generates pose and depth conditions that remain geometrically consistent across frames. We then run a single sampling process with a two-phase conditioning schedule: early denoising steps condition on both pose and sparse depth to enforce scene structure, after which depth is dropped and pose-only guidance refines high-frequency details without over-constraining the generation. We evaluate ActCam on multiple benchmarks spanning diverse character motions and challenging viewpoint changes. We find that, compared to pose-only control and other pose and camera methods, ActCam improves camera adherence and motion fidelity, and is preferred in human evaluations, especially under large viewpoint changes. Our results highlight that careful camera-consistent conditioning and staged guidance can enable strong joint camera and motion control without training. Project page: https://elkhomar.github.io/actcam/.

analysis.tldr: ActCam 是一种零样本视频生成方法，通过联合控制角色运动和相机轨迹，无需训练即可实现几何一致的视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成方法难以同时精细控制角色运动和相机轨迹，尤其是面对大视角变化时，缺乏几何一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的前提下，从驱动视频中迁移角色运动并逐帧控制相机内外参数，生成几何一致的视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于预训练的图像到视频扩散模型，通过两阶段条件调度：早期去噪步骤同时使用姿态和稀疏深度条件以保持场景结构，后期仅使用姿态引导以细化高频细节。
contributions: 提出零样本联合控制相机和角色运动的方法，无需额外训练。
设计两阶段条件调度策略，平衡场景结构与细节生成。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估，涵盖多样角色运动和大视角变化，与姿态控制及其他方法相比，ActCam 在相机遵循度和运动保真度上更优，人类评估中更受偏好。
limitations: 依赖预训练模型的深度和姿态估计质量。
可能对极端复杂的场景或运动泛化有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ActCam 是一种零样本视频生成方法，通过联合控制角色运动和相机轨迹，无需训练即可实现几何一致的视频生成。

papers.title: VITA-QinYu: Expressive Spoken Language Model for Role-Playing and Singing
papers.abstract: Human speech conveys expressiveness beyond linguistic content, including personality, mood, or performance elements, such as a comforting tone or humming a song, which we formalize as role-playing and singing. We present VITA-QinYu, the first expressive end-to-end (E2E) spoken language model (SLM) that goes beyond natural conversation to support both role-playing and singing generation. VITA-QinYu adopts a hybrid speech-text paradigm that extends interleaved text-audio modeling with multi-codebook audio tokens, a design enabling richer paralinguistic representation while preserving a clear separation between modalities to avoid interference. We further develop a comprehensive data generation pipeline to synthesize a total of 15.8K hours of natural conversation, role-playing, and singing data for training. VITA-QinYu demonstrates superior expressiveness, outperforming peer SLMs by 7 percentage points on objective role-playing benchmarks, and surpassing peer models by 0.13 points on a 5-point MOS scale for singing. Simultaneously, it achieves state-of-the-art conversational accuracy and fluency, exceeding prior SLMs by 1.38 and 4.98 percentage points on the C3 and URO benchmarks, respectively. We open-source our code and models and provide an easy-to-use demo with full-stack support for streaming and full-duplex interaction.

analysis.tldr: VITA-QinYu 是首个支持角色扮演和歌唱的端到端口语语言模型，通过混合语音-文本范式和多码本音频令牌实现丰富副语言表达。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类语音不仅传递语言内容，还包含个性、情绪或表演元素（如安慰语气或哼唱），现有口语模型主要关注自然对话，缺乏对角色扮演和歌唱等表达性语音的支持。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个端到端口语语言模型，使其能够同时处理自然对话、角色扮演和歌唱生成，并保持高表达性和流畅性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用混合语音-文本范式，扩展交错文本-音频建模，使用多码本音频令牌以增强副语言表示，同时保持模态间清晰分离以避免干扰；并开发了包含15.8K小时自然对话、角色扮演和歌唱数据的综合数据生成流水线。
contributions: 首个支持角色扮演和歌唱的端到端口语语言模型。
提出混合语音-文本范式和多码本音频令牌设计，实现丰富副语言表示。
构建大规模数据生成流水线，产出15.8K小时训练数据。
在角色扮演、歌唱和对话基准上达到领先性能，并开源代码和模型。
analysis.experiments: 在角色扮演基准上比同行SLM高7个百分点，歌唱MOS评分高0.13分，对话准确率和流畅性在C3和URO基准上分别超过先前SLM 1.38和4.98个百分点。
limitations: 可能对低资源语言或方言的泛化能力有限。
歌唱生成质量可能受限于训练数据中歌唱风格的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VITA-QinYu 是首个支持角色扮演和歌唱的端到端口语语言模型，通过混合语音-文本范式和多码本音频令牌实现丰富副语言表达。

papers.title: UniPool: A Globally Shared Expert Pool for Mixture-of-Experts
papers.abstract: Modern Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures allocate expert capacity through a rigid per-layer rule: each transformer layer owns a separate expert set. This convention couples depth scaling with linear expert-parameter growth and assumes that every layer needs isolated expert capacity. However, recent analyses and our routing probe challenge this allocation rule: replacing a deeper layer's learned top-k router with uniform random routing drops downstream accuracy by only 1.0-1.6 points across multiple production MoE models. Motivated by this redundancy, we propose UniPool, an MoE architecture that treats expert capacity as a global architectural budget by replacing per-layer expert ownership with a single shared pool accessed by independent per-layer routers. To enable stable and balanced training under sharing, we introduce a pool-level auxiliary loss that balances expert utilization across the entire pool, and adopt NormRouter to provide sparse and scale-stable routing into the shared expert pool. Across five LLaMA-architecture model scales (182M, 469M, 650M, 830M, and 978M parameters) trained on 30B tokens from the Pile, UniPool consistently improves validation loss and perplexity over the matched vanilla MoE baselines. Across these scales, UniPool reduces validation loss by up to 0.0386 relative to vanilla MoE. Beyond raw loss improvement, our results identify pool size as an explicit depth-scaling hyperparameter: reduced-pool UniPool variants using only 41.6%-66.7% of the vanilla expert-parameter budget match or outperform layer-wise MoE at the tested scales. This shows that, under a shared-pool design, expert parameters need not grow linearly with depth; they can grow sublinearly while remaining more efficient and effective than vanilla MoE. Further analysis shows that UniPool's benefits compose with finer-grained expert decomposition.

analysis.tldr: UniPool 提出全局共享专家池替代逐层专家分配，在多个规模上以更少参数超越传统 MoE。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统 MoE 每层独立分配专家，导致参数随深度线性增长，且研究发现深层路由存在冗余，亟需更高效的专家分配机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种 MoE 架构，使专家容量作为全局预算，打破层间隔离，实现参数随深度亚线性增长且保持性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过路由探测实验发现，将深层 top-k 路由替换为均匀随机路由，下游准确率仅下降 1.0-1.6 点，表明深层专家容量存在冗余。
analysis.method: 提出 UniPool，用全局共享专家池替代逐层专家集，每层独立路由器访问同一池；引入池级辅助损失平衡专家利用率，并采用 NormRouter 实现稀疏且尺度稳定的路由。
contributions: 提出 UniPool 架构，将专家容量作为全局预算，实现参数亚线性增长。
引入池级辅助损失和 NormRouter 以支持稳定训练。
在五个模型规模上验证了 UniPool 在验证损失和困惑度上优于传统 MoE，且减少参数仍能匹配或超越基线。
analysis.experiments: 在 LLaMA 架构的五个规模（182M-978M 参数）上，使用 Pile 数据集训练 30B tokens，对比 vanilla MoE 基线。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更大规模或不同架构上的验证。
共享池可能引入额外的通信开销，摘要未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UniPool 提出全局共享专家池替代逐层专家分配，在多个规模上以更少参数超越传统 MoE。

papers.title: BAMI: Training-Free Bias Mitigation in GUI Grounding
papers.abstract: GUI grounding is a critical capability for enabling GUI agents to execute tasks such as clicking and dragging. However, in complex scenarios like the ScreenSpot-Pro benchmark, existing models often suffer from suboptimal performance. Utilizing the proposed \textbf{Masked Prediction Distribution (MPD)} attribution method, we identify that the primary sources of errors are twofold: high image resolution (leading to precision bias) and intricate interface elements (resulting in ambiguity bias). To address these challenges, we introduce \textbf{Bias-Aware Manipulation Inference (BAMI)}, which incorporates two key manipulations, coarse-to-fine focus and candidate selection, to effectively mitigate these biases. Our extensive experimental results demonstrate that BAMI significantly enhances the accuracy of various GUI grounding models in a training-free setting. For instance, applying our method to the TianXi-Action-7B model boosts its accuracy on the ScreenSpot-Pro benchmark from 51.9\% to 57.8\%. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm the robustness of the BAMI approach across diverse parameter configurations, highlighting its stability and effectiveness. Code is available at https://github.com/Neur-IO/BAMI.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的BAMI方法，通过粗到细聚焦和候选选择缓解GUI grounding中的精度偏差和模糊偏差，显著提升模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: GUI grounding是GUI代理执行点击、拖拽等任务的关键能力，但在复杂场景下现有模型性能不佳，需要有效的偏差缓解方法。
analysis.problem: GUI grounding模型在高分辨率和复杂界面元素场景下存在精度偏差和模糊偏差，导致性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过提出的掩码预测分布（MPD）归因方法，发现误差主要源于高图像分辨率（精度偏差）和复杂界面元素（模糊偏差）。
analysis.method: 提出Bias-Aware Manipulation Inference (BAMI)，包含粗到细聚焦和候选选择两种操作，无需训练即可缓解偏差。
contributions: 提出MPD归因方法识别GUI grounding中的两种偏差来源。
提出无需训练的BAMI方法，通过粗到细聚焦和候选选择有效缓解偏差。
在ScreenSpot-Pro基准上验证BAMI显著提升多种GUI grounding模型的准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在ScreenSpot-Pro基准上测试，TianXi-Action-7B模型准确率从51.9%提升至57.8%，消融实验验证了BAMI在不同参数配置下的鲁棒性。
limitations: 方法仅在GUI grounding任务上验证，可能不适用于其他视觉任务。
依赖MPD归因方法，其准确性可能影响BAMI效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的BAMI方法，通过粗到细聚焦和候选选择缓解GUI grounding中的精度偏差和模糊偏差，显著提升模型性能。

papers.title: Verifier-Backed Hard Problem Generation for Mathematical Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate strong capabilities for solving scientific and mathematical problems, yet they struggle to produce valid, challenging, and novel problems - an essential component for advancing LLM training and enabling autonomous scientific research. Existing problem generation approaches either depend on expensive human expert involvement or adopt naive self-play paradigms, which frequently yield invalid problems due to reward hacking. This work introduces VHG, a verifier-enhanced hard problem generation framework built upon three-party self-play. By integrating an independent verifier into the conventional setter-solver duality, our design constrains the setter's reward to be jointly determined by problem validity (evaluated by the verifier) and difficulty (assessed by the solver). We instantiate two verifier variants: a Hard symbolic verifier and a Soft LLM-based verifier, with evaluations conducted on indefinite integral tasks and general mathematical reasoning tasks. Experimental results show that VHG substantially outperforms all baseline methods by a clear margin.

analysis.tldr: 提出VHG框架，通过三方自博弈和验证器约束生成有效且困难的高质量数学问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM生成数学问题的方法要么依赖昂贵的人工专家，要么采用朴素自博弈导致奖励破解，生成的问题常无效或不够难，限制了LLM训练和自主科研。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM自动生成既有效（可解、正确）又具有挑战性的数学问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出朴素自博弈方法因奖励破解而频繁生成无效问题，说明缺乏独立验证机制会导致生成质量失控。
analysis.method: VHG框架：在传统的出题者-解题者二元结构中加入独立验证者，出题者的奖励由验证者评估的问题有效性和解题者评估的难度共同决定。实例化两种验证者：硬符号验证者和软LLM验证者。
contributions: 提出基于三方自博弈的验证者增强硬问题生成框架VHG，有效约束问题有效性和难度。
在不定积分和通用数学推理任务上验证了VHG相比基线方法的显著优势。
analysis.experiments: 在不定积分任务和通用数学推理任务上评估，VHG显著优于所有基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖验证者的质量，硬符号验证者仅适用于形式化领域。
软LLM验证者可能引入额外计算开销和偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VHG框架，通过三方自博弈和验证器约束生成有效且困难的高质量数学问题。

papers.title: Relit-LiVE: Relight Video by Jointly Learning Environment Video
papers.abstract: Recent advances have shown that large-scale video diffusion models can be repurposed as neural renderers by first decomposing videos into intrinsic scene representations and then performing forward rendering under novel illumination. While promising, this paradigm fundamentally relies on accurate intrinsic decomposition, which remains highly unreliable for real-world videos and often leads to distorted appearances, broken materials, and accumulated temporal artifacts during relighting. In this work, we present Relit-LiVE, a novel video relighting framework that produces physically consistent, temporally stable results without requiring prior knowledge of camera pose. Our key insight is to explicitly introduce raw reference images into the rendering process, enabling the model to recover critical scene cues that are inevitably lost or corrupted in intrinsic representations. Furthermore, we propose a novel environment video prediction formulation that simultaneously generates relit videos and per-frame environment maps aligned with each camera viewpoint in a single diffusion process. This joint prediction enforces strong geometric-illumination alignment and naturally supports dynamic lighting and camera motion, significantly improving physical consistency in video relighting while easing the requirement of known per-frame camera pose. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Relit-LiVE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art video relighting and neural rendering methods across synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Beyond relighting, our framework naturally supports a wide range of downstream applications, including scene-level rendering, material editing, object insertion, and streaming video relighting. The Project is available at https://github.com/zhuxing0/Relit-LiVE.

analysis.tldr: 提出Relit-LiVE框架，通过联合学习环境视频实现视频重光照，无需相机位姿先验。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于视频扩散模型的重光照方法依赖内在分解，但真实视频的内在分解不可靠，导致外观失真、材质破损和时间伪影。
analysis.problem: 解决真实视频重光照中内在分解不可靠导致的物理不一致和时间不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 内在表示会丢失或破坏关键场景线索，导致重光照结果失真。
analysis.method: 在渲染过程中引入原始参考图像以恢复丢失的场景线索，并提出环境视频预测公式，在单个扩散过程中同时生成重光照视频和每帧环境贴图。
contributions: 提出Relit-LiVE框架，通过引入原始参考图像提升重光照的物理一致性。
提出环境视频预测方法，联合生成重光照视频和环境贴图，支持动态光照和相机运动。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实基准上，Relit-LiVE持续优于最先进的视频重光照和神经渲染方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量参考图像。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Relit-LiVE框架，通过联合学习环境视频实现视频重光照，无需相机位姿先验。

papers.title: Optimizer-Model Consistency: Full Finetuning with the Same Optimizer as Pretraining Forgets Less
papers.abstract: Optimizers play an important role in both pretraining and finetuning stages when training large language models (LLMs). In this paper, we present an observation that full finetuning with the same optimizer as in pretraining achieves a better learning-forgetting tradeoff, i.e., forgetting less while achieving the same or better performance on the new task, than other optimizers and, possibly surprisingly, LoRA, during the supervised finetuning (SFT) stage. We term this phenomenon optimizer-model consistency. To better understand it, through controlled experiments and theoretical analysis, we show that: 1) optimizers can shape the models by having regularization effects on the activations, leading to different landscapes around the pretrained checkpoints; 2) in response to this regularization effect, the weight update in SFT should follow some specific structures to lower forgetting of the knowledge learned in pretraining, which can be obtained by using the same optimizer. Moreover, we specifically compare Muon and AdamW when they are employed throughout the pretraining and SFT stages and find that Muon performs worse when finetuned for reasoning tasks. With a synthetic language modeling experiment, we demonstrate that this can come from Muon's strong tendency towards rote memorization, which may hurt pattern acquisition with a small amount of data, as for SFT.

analysis.tldr: 全微调时使用与预训练相同的优化器能减少遗忘，称为优化器-模型一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 优化器在LLM预训练和微调中都很重要，但不同优化器对微调阶段知识遗忘的影响尚不明确，需要系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何选择微调优化器以在保持新任务性能的同时减少对预训练知识的遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 使用与预训练相同的优化器进行全微调，相比其他优化器甚至LoRA，能在遗忘更少的同时达到相同或更好的新任务性能。Muon在推理任务微调中表现较差，可能因其倾向于死记硬背。
analysis.method: 通过控制实验和理论分析，揭示优化器通过正则化效应影响激活值，从而塑造模型；权重更新需遵循特定结构以减少遗忘，而使用相同优化器可自然获得该结构。
contributions: 发现优化器-模型一致性现象：全微调时使用与预训练相同的优化器能更好地平衡学习与遗忘。
通过实验和理论解释了该现象的原因：优化器对激活值的正则化效应导致不同损失景观，相同优化器产生的权重更新结构更利于保留预训练知识。
比较了Muon和AdamW，发现Muon在推理任务微调中表现较差，可能因其强死记硬背倾向。
analysis.experiments: 在LLM上进行了监督微调实验，比较了不同优化器（包括AdamW和Muon）以及LoRA，并进行了合成语言建模实验。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 主要关注全微调场景，未深入探讨部分微调或参数高效微调的其他变体。
理论分析基于特定假设，可能不完全适用于所有模型和任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 全微调时使用与预训练相同的优化器能减少遗忘，称为优化器-模型一致性。

papers.title: When No Benchmark Exists: Validating Comparative LLM Safety Scoring Without Ground-Truth Labels
papers.abstract: Many deployments must compare candidate language models for safety before a labeled benchmark exists for the relevant language, sector, or regulatory regime. We formalize this setting as benchmarkless comparative safety scoring and specify the contract under which a scenario-based audit can be interpreted as deployment evidence. Scores are valid only under a fixed scenario pack, rubric, auditor, judge, sampling configuration, and rerun budget. Because no labels are available, we replace ground-truth agreement with an instrumental-validity chain: responsiveness to a controlled safe-versus-abliterated contrast, dominance of target-driven variance over auditor and judge artifacts, and stability across reruns. We instantiate the chain in SimpleAudit, a local-first scoring instrument, and validate it on a Norwegian safety pack. Safe and abliterated targets separate with AUROC values between 0.89 and 1.00, target identity is the dominant variance component ($η^2 \approx 0.52$), and severity profiles stabilize by ten reruns. Applying the same chain to Petri shows that it admits both tools. The substantial differences arise upstream of the chain, in claim-contract enforcement and deployment fit. A Norwegian public-sector procurement case comparing Borealis and Gemma 3 demonstrates the resulting evidence in practice: the safer model depends on scenario category and risk measure. Consequently, scores, matched deltas, critical rates, uncertainty, and the auditor and judge used must be reported together rather than collapsed into a single ranking.

analysis.tldr: 提出无基准场景下LLM安全评分的验证框架，用工具性效度链替代真实标签。
analysis.research_motivation: 实际部署中常需在缺乏标注基准（如特定语言、领域或监管体系）时比较候选语言模型的安全性，但现有方法依赖有标签基准，无法直接应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在无真实标签的情况下，对候选语言模型进行有效的比较性安全评分，并确保评分结果可作为部署证据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 形式化无基准比较安全评分问题，定义场景审计作为部署证据的契约；提出工具性效度链（包括对受控安全与消融对比的响应性、目标驱动方差主导性、跨重跑稳定性），并实例化为SimpleAudit工具。
contributions: 形式化无基准比较安全评分问题及其证据契约。
提出工具性效度链替代真实标签进行验证。
开发SimpleAudit工具并在挪威安全包上验证，AUROC达0.89-1.00，目标方差主导（η²≈0.52），10次重跑稳定。
通过挪威公共采购案例展示实际应用，强调评分需与匹配差值、风险率、不确定性等共同报告。
analysis.experiments: 在挪威安全包上验证SimpleAudit，安全与消融目标AUROC 0.89-1.00，目标身份方差主导（η²≈0.52），严重性剖面10次重跑稳定；在Petri上应用相同链；挪威公共采购案例比较Borealis和Gemma 3。
limitations: 验证依赖特定场景包、评分标准、审计员和法官，泛化性需进一步检验。
工具性效度链的有效性依赖于受控对比的设计质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无基准场景下LLM安全评分的验证框架，用工具性效度链替代真实标签。

papers.title: AI Co-Mathematician: Accelerating Mathematicians with Agentic AI
papers.abstract: We introduce the AI co-mathematician, a workbench for mathematicians to interactively leverage AI agents to pursue open-ended research. The AI co-mathematician is optimized to provide holistic support for the exploratory and iterative reality of mathematical workflows, including ideation, literature search, computational exploration, theorem proving and theory building. By providing an asynchronous, stateful workspace that manages uncertainty, refines user intent, tracks failed hypotheses, and outputs native mathematical artifacts, the system mirrors human collaborative workflows. In early tests, the AI co-mathematician helped researchers solve open problems, identify new research directions, and uncover overlooked literature references. Besides demonstrating a highly interactive paradigm for AI-assisted mathematical discovery, the AI co-mathematician also achieves state of the art results on hard problem-solving benchmarks, including scoring 48% on FrontierMath Tier 4, a new high score among all AI systems evaluated.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI合作数学家工作台，通过智能体系统支持数学研究的全流程探索，并在FrontierMath基准上取得新SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 数学研究需要探索性、迭代性的工作流，现有AI工具缺乏对全流程的整合支持，难以辅助开放性问题研究。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个交互式AI系统，能够全面支持数学家的探索性工作流，包括构思、文献搜索、计算探索、定理证明和理论构建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建异步、有状态的工作空间，管理不确定性、细化用户意图、跟踪失败假设，并输出原生数学工件，模拟人类协作工作流。
contributions: 提出AI合作数学家工作台，为数学家提供交互式AI辅助系统。
在FrontierMath Tier 4上取得48%的新最高分，展示硬问题求解能力。
analysis.experiments: 在FrontierMath Tier 4基准上评估，得分48%，为所有AI系统中的最高分；早期测试中帮助研究者解决开放问题、发现新方向。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定数学领域，泛化性未知。
系统复杂度高，部署和维护成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI合作数学家工作台，通过智能体系统支持数学研究的全流程探索，并在FrontierMath基准上取得新SOTA。

papers.title: Revisiting Adam for Streaming Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Learning from a sequence of interactions, as soon as observations are perceived and acted upon, without explicitly storing them, holds the promise of simpler, more efficient and adaptive algorithms. For over a decade, however, deep reinforcement learning walked the contrary path, augmenting agents with replay buffers or parallel sampling routines, in an effort to tame learning instability. Recently, this topic has been revisited by Elsayed et al. (2024), focusing on update computation through eligibility traces and modifications to the optimisation routine, resulting in the StreamQ algorithm. In this work we take a step back, investigating the efficacy of established updates, such as those implemented by DQN and C51 within this online setting. Not only do we find that they perform well, but through analysing how the optimisation algorithm generally, and Adam in particular, interacts with these updates, we contend that two properties are essential for robust performance: i) the derivative of the objective is to be bounded and ii) weight updates are variance-adjusted. Rigorous and exhaustive experimentation demonstrates that C51, which exhibits both characteristics, is competitive with StreamQ across a subset of 55 Atari games. Using these insights, we derive a variance-adjusted algorithm based on eligibility traces, termed Adaptive Q$(λ)$, which approaches double the human baseline on the same subset, surpassing existing methods by all performance metrics.

analysis.tldr: 重新审视Adam在流式强化学习中的作用，发现目标导数有界和权重更新方差调整是关键，提出Adaptive Q(λ)算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式强化学习无需存储交互数据，有望实现更简单高效的算法，但现有方法依赖回放缓冲区或并行采样来稳定训练，限制了其应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用回放缓冲区的情况下，使深度强化学习算法在流式在线设置中稳定且高效地学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析发现，优化算法（尤其是Adam）与在线更新的交互中，目标函数的导数有界性和权重更新的方差调整是鲁棒性能的两个关键特性。
analysis.method: 基于C51和DQN的在线更新，结合方差调整和资格迹，提出Adaptive Q(λ)算法。
contributions: 揭示了流式强化学习中优化算法稳定性的两个关键特性：目标导数有界和权重更新方差调整。
提出了Adaptive Q(λ)算法，在55个Atari游戏子集上超越现有方法，接近双倍人类基线。
analysis.experiments: 在55个Atari游戏上进行了严格实验，C51与StreamQ竞争，Adaptive Q(λ)在所有性能指标上超越现有方法。
limitations: 实验仅在Atari游戏上进行，泛化到其他领域需验证。
Adaptive Q(λ)的方差调整机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 重新审视Adam在流式强化学习中的作用，发现目标导数有界和权重更新方差调整是关键，提出Adaptive Q(λ)算法。

papers.title: Superintelligent Retrieval Agent: The Next Frontier of Information Retrieval
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented agents are increasingly the interface to large organizational knowledge bases, yet most still treat retrieval as a black box: they issue exploratory queries, inspect returned snippets, and iteratively reformulate until useful evidence emerges. This approach resembles how a newcomer searches an unfamiliar database rather than how an expert navigates it with strong priors about terminology and likely evidence, and results in unnecessary retrieval rounds, increased latency, and poor recall. We introduce \textit{SuperIntelligent Retrieval Agent} (SIRA), which defines \emph{superintelligence} in retrieval as the ability to compress multi-round exploratory search into a single corpus-discriminative retrieval action. SIRA does not merely ask what terms are relevant to the query; it asks which terms are likely to separate the desired evidence from corpus-level confusers. On the corpus side, an LLM enriches each document offline with missing search vocabulary; on the query side, it predicts evidence vocabulary omitted by the query; and document-frequency statistics as a tool call to filter proposed terms that are absent, overly common, or unlikely to create retrieval margin. The final retrieval step is a single weighted BM25 call combining the original query with the validated expansion. Across ten BEIR benchmarks and downstream question-answering tasks, SIRA achieves the significantly superior performance outperforming dense retrievers and state-of-the-art multi-round agentic baselines, demonstrating that one well-formed lexical query, guided by LLM cognition and lightweight corpus statistics, can exceed substantially more expensive multi-round search while remaining interpretable, training-free, and efficient.

analysis.tldr: SIRA 将多轮探索性检索压缩为单次语料判别性检索，通过 LLM 扩展查询和文档词汇并利用文档频率过滤，在 BEIR 基准上超越稠密检索器和多轮智能体基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有检索增强智能体将检索视为黑盒，通过多轮探索性查询和结果检查来获取信息，类似于新手搜索不熟悉的数据库，而非专家利用先验知识高效导航，导致不必要的检索轮次、高延迟和低召回率。
analysis.problem: 如何将多轮探索性检索压缩为单次高效的语料判别性检索动作，同时保持可解释性和训练无关性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多轮检索策略效率低下，且未能利用语料库级别的统计信息来区分证据与混淆项。
analysis.method: SIRA 通过 LLM 离线丰富文档缺失的搜索词汇，在线预测查询遗漏的证据词汇，并利用文档频率统计作为工具调用过滤掉缺失、过于常见或无法创造检索边际的术语，最终将原始查询与验证后的扩展组合为单次加权 BM25 调用。
contributions: 提出超智能检索智能体 SIRA，将多轮探索性检索压缩为单次语料判别性检索。
结合 LLM 的词汇扩展能力和轻量级语料统计过滤，实现无需训练的高效检索。
在 BEIR 基准和下游问答任务上显著优于稠密检索器和多轮智能体基线。
analysis.experiments: 在十个 BEIR 基准和下游问答任务上评估，SIRA 显著优于稠密检索器和最先进的多轮智能体基线。
limitations: 依赖 LLM 的词汇扩展质量，可能受限于 LLM 的知识覆盖。
文档频率过滤可能过于激进，导致某些稀有但重要的术语被排除。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SIRA 将多轮探索性检索压缩为单次语料判别性检索，通过 LLM 扩展查询和文档词汇并利用文档频率过滤，在 BEIR 基准上超越稠密检索器和多轮智能体基线。

papers.title: Are We Making Progress in Multimodal Domain Generalization? A Comprehensive Benchmark Study
papers.abstract: Despite the growing popularity of Multimodal Domain Generalization (MMDG) for enhancing model robustness, it remains unclear whether reported performance gains reflect genuine algorithmic progress or are artifacts of inconsistent evaluation protocols. Current research is fragmented, with studies varying significantly across datasets, modality configurations, and experimental settings. Furthermore, existing benchmarks focus predominantly on action recognition, often neglecting critical real-world challenges such as input corruptions, missing modalities, and model trustworthiness. This lack of standardization obscures a reliable assessment of the field's advancement. To address this issue, we introduce MMDG-Bench, the first unified and comprehensive benchmark for MMDG, which standardizes evaluation across six datasets spanning three diverse tasks: action recognition, mechanical fault diagnosis, and sentiment analysis. MMDG-Bench encompasses six modality combinations, nine representative methods, and multiple evaluation settings. Beyond standard accuracy, it systematically assesses corruption robustness, missing-modality generalization, misclassification detection, and out-of-distribution detection. With 7, 402 neural networks trained in total across 95 unique cross-domain tasks, MMDG-Bench yields five key findings: (1) under fair comparisons, recent specialized MMDG methods offer only marginal improvements over ERM baseline; (2) no single method consistently outperforms others across datasets or modality combinations; (3) a substantial gap to upper-bound performance persists, indicating that MMDG remains far from solved; (4) trimodal fusion does not consistently outperform the strongest bimodal configurations; and (5) all evaluated methods exhibit significant degradation under corruption and missing-modality scenarios, with some methods further compromising model trustworthiness.

analysis.tldr: 多模态域泛化（MMDG）领域进展被高估，现有评估标准不统一，新基准MMDG-Bench揭示多数方法仅比ERM基线有微小提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态域泛化（MMDG）研究日益增多，但评估协议不统一，导致难以判断性能提升是真实算法进步还是评估标准不一致的假象。现有基准主要关注动作识别，忽略了输入损坏、模态缺失和模型可信度等实际挑战。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一、全面的基准来标准化MMDG评估，导致无法可靠衡量领域进展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过大规模实验（7402个神经网络，95个跨域任务）发现五个关键现象：1) 公平比较下，专用MMDG方法仅比ERM基线有微小提升；2) 没有方法在所有数据集或模态组合上一致最优；3) 与上界性能差距大，问题远未解决；4) 三模态融合并不总是优于最强双模态组合；5) 所有方法在损坏和模态缺失场景下性能显著下降，部分方法还损害模型可信度。
analysis.method: 构建MMDG-Bench，统一评估六个数据集（覆盖动作识别、机械故障诊断、情感分析）、六种模态组合、九种代表性方法，并系统评估标准准确率、损坏鲁棒性、缺失模态泛化、误分类检测和分布外检测。
contributions: 提出首个统一、全面的多模态域泛化基准MMDG-Bench，标准化评估流程。
通过大规模实验揭示当前MMDG方法的真实进展有限，并指出关键挑战。
analysis.experiments: 在六个数据集、六种模态组合、九种方法上训练了7402个神经网络，覆盖95个跨域任务，评估了标准准确率、损坏鲁棒性、缺失模态泛化、误分类检测和分布外检测。
limitations: 基准仅涵盖三个任务（动作识别、机械故障诊断、情感分析），可能不全面。
未探索更多模态组合或最新方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态域泛化（MMDG）领域进展被高估，现有评估标准不统一，新基准MMDG-Bench揭示多数方法仅比ERM基线有微小提升。

papers.title: StraTA: Incentivizing Agentic Reinforcement Learning with Strategic Trajectory Abstraction
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as interactive agents, but optimizing them for long-horizon decision making remains difficult because current methods are largely purely reactive, which weakens both exploration and credit assignment over extended trajectories. In this work, we present Strategic Trajectory Abstraction (StraTA), a simple framework that introduces an explicit trajectory-level strategy into agentic reinforcement learning (RL). StraTA samples a compact strategy from the initial task state, conditions subsequent actions on that strategy, and trains strategy generation and action execution jointly with a hierarchical GRPO-style rollout design, further enhanced by diverse strategy rollout and critical self-judgment. Experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and SciWorld show that StraTA consistently improves both sample efficiency and final performance over strong baselines. StraTA reaches success rates of 93.1% on ALFWorld and 84.2% on WebShop. On SciWorld, StraTA attains a 63.5% overall score, outperforming frontier closed-source models.

analysis.tldr: StraTA通过引入轨迹级策略抽象，在分层强化学习中提升LLM智能体的探索与信用分配，在多个基准上取得显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM作为交互智能体时，现有方法多为纯反应式，导致长程决策中探索不足和信用分配困难，限制了性能。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM智能体在长程任务中有效进行探索和信用分配，提升决策质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出StraTA框架，从初始任务状态采样紧凑策略，条件化后续动作，并采用分层GRPO式 rollout 设计，结合多样化策略 rollout 和关键自我判断，联合训练策略生成与动作执行。
contributions: 提出StraTA框架，将显式轨迹级策略引入智能体强化学习。
在ALFWorld、WebShop和SciWorld上取得SOTA结果，分别达到93.1%、84.2%和63.5%的成功率/分数。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和SciWorld三个基准上评估，与强基线相比，样本效率和最终性能均有提升，并超越前沿闭源模型。
limitations: 可能对复杂任务中策略抽象的质量敏感。
分层训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: StraTA通过引入轨迹级策略抽象，在分层强化学习中提升LLM智能体的探索与信用分配，在多个基准上取得显著提升。

papers.title: Concept-Based Abductive and Contrastive Explanations for Behaviors of Vision Models
papers.abstract: *Concept-based explanations* offer a promising approach for explaining the predictions of deep neural networks in terms of high-level, human-understandable concepts. However, existing methods either do not establish a causal connection between the concepts and model predictions or are limited in expressivity and only able to infer causal explanations involving single concepts. At the same time, the parallel line of work on *formal abductive and contrastive explanations* computes the minimal set of input features causally relevant for model outcomes but only considers low-level features such as pixels. Merging these two threads, in this work, we propose the notion of *concept-based abductive and contrastive explanations* that capture the minimal sets of high-level concepts causally relevant for model outcomes. We then present a family of algorithms that enumerate all minimal explanations while using *concept erasure* procedures to establish causal relationships. By appropriately aggregating such explanations, we are not only able to understand model predictions on individual images but also on collections of images where the model exhibits a user-specified, common *behavior*. We evaluate our approach on multiple models, datasets, and behaviors, and demonstrate its effectiveness in computing helpful, user-friendly explanations.

analysis.tldr: 融合概念解释与溯因/对比解释，为视觉模型行为提供最小因果概念集解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有概念解释方法缺乏因果连接或仅能处理单一概念，而形式化溯因/对比解释仅考虑像素级特征，无法提供高层语义解释。
analysis.problem: 如何计算视觉模型预测中最小的高层概念因果相关集，并支持单图像及多图像行为解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出概念级溯因和对比解释，通过概念擦除过程建立因果关系，并枚举所有最小解释，再聚合以理解模型在图像集合上的共同行为。
contributions: 提出概念级溯因和对比解释的新概念，捕获因果相关的最小概念集。
设计算法族枚举所有最小解释，并利用概念擦除建立因果联系。
支持单图像和图像集合的行为解释，提供用户友好的解释。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型、数据集和行为上评估，展示了计算有用、用户友好解释的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的概念定义和标注。
枚举所有最小解释的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 融合概念解释与溯因/对比解释，为视觉模型行为提供最小因果概念集解释。

papers.title: GlazyBench: A Benchmark for Ceramic Glaze Property Prediction and Image Generation
papers.abstract: Developing ceramic glazes is a costly, time-consuming process of trial and error due to complex chemistry, placing a significant burden on independent artists. While recent advances in multimodal AI offer a modern solution, the field lacks the large-scale datasets required to train these models. We propose GlazyBench, the first dataset for AI-assisted glaze design. Comprising 23,148 real glaze formulations, GlazyBench supports two primary tasks: predicting post-firing surface properties, such as color and transparency, from raw materials, and generating accurate visual representations of the glaze based on these properties. We establish comprehensive baselines for property prediction using traditional machine learning and large language models, alongside image generation benchmarks using deep generative and large multimodal models. Our experiments demonstrate promising yet challenging results. GlazyBench pioneers a new research direction in AI-assisted material design, providing a standardized benchmark for systematic evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 首个陶瓷釉料数据集GlazyBench，支持配方到烧后属性的预测及图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 陶瓷釉料开发依赖昂贵且耗时的试错过程，独立艺术家负担沉重，而多模态AI缺乏大规模数据集。
analysis.problem: 缺乏用于AI辅助釉料设计的大规模标准化数据集和基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含23,148个真实釉料配方的数据集，定义属性预测和图像生成两个任务，并建立传统ML、LLM、深度生成模型及大多模态模型的基线。
contributions: 提出首个陶瓷釉料设计数据集GlazyBench
建立属性预测和图像生成的综合基线
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模可能仍有限
仅覆盖颜色和透明度等部分属性
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个陶瓷釉料数据集GlazyBench，支持配方到烧后属性的预测及图像生成。

papers.title: Recursive Agent Optimization
papers.abstract: We introduce Recursive Agent Optimization (RAO), a reinforcement learning approach for training recursive agents: agents that can spawn and delegate sub-tasks to new instantiations of themselves recursively. Recursive agents implement an inference-time scaling algorithm that naturally allows agents to scale to longer contexts and generalize to more difficult problems via divide-and-conquer. RAO provides a method to train models to best take advantage of such recursive inference, teaching agents when and how to delegate and communicate. We find that recursive agents trained in this way enjoy better training efficiency, can scale to tasks that go beyond the model's context window, generalize to tasks much harder than the ones the agent was trained on, and can enjoy reduced wall-clock time compared to single-agent systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出递归智能体优化（RAO），通过强化学习训练能递归生成子任务的智能体，提升训练效率、上下文扩展和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体在处理长上下文和复杂任务时受限于固定上下文窗口，缺乏有效的分治策略，且训练方法难以利用递归推理的优势。
analysis.problem: 如何训练智能体在推理时递归地生成和委派子任务，以突破上下文限制并泛化到更困难的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 递归智能体通过分治策略自然扩展上下文，但需要学习何时以及如何委派和通信；RAO训练出的智能体在训练效率、上下文扩展、任务泛化和推理时间上均优于单智能体系统。
analysis.method: 提出Recursive Agent Optimization (RAO)，一种强化学习方法，训练智能体递归地生成子智能体实例并委派子任务，实现推理时扩展。
contributions: 提出RAO框架，首次将强化学习用于训练递归智能体，使其学会分治策略。
实验证明递归智能体在训练效率、上下文扩展、任务泛化和推理时间上优于单智能体系统。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及递归智能体在训练效率、上下文扩展、泛化和推理时间上的优势。
limitations: 可能依赖任务的可分解性，对于不可分解任务效果有限。
递归深度增加可能带来通信开销和训练不稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出递归智能体优化（RAO），通过强化学习训练能递归生成子任务的智能体，提升训练效率、上下文扩展和泛化能力。

papers.title: Can RL Teach Long-Horizon Reasoning to LLMs? Expressiveness Is Key
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been applied to improve large language model (LLM) reasoning, yet the systematic study of how training scales with task difficulty has been hampered by the lack of controlled, scalable environments. Observed LLM shortcomings in long-horizon reasoning have raised the prospect that these shortcomings are fundamental to the autoregressive transformer architecture. We introduce ScaleLogic, a synthetic logical reasoning framework that offers independent control over two axes of difficulty: the depth of the required proof planning (i.e., the horizon) and the expressiveness of the underlying logic. Our proposed framework supports a wide range of logics: from simple implication-only logic ("if-then") towards more expressive first-order reasoning with conjunction ("and"), disjunction ("or"), negation ("not"), and universal quantification ("for all"). Using this framework, we show that the RL training compute $T$ follows a power law with respect to reasoning depth $D$ ($T \propto D^γ$, $R^{2} > 0.99$), and that the scaling exponent $γ$ increases monotonically with logical expressiveness, from $1.04$ to $2.60$. On downstream mathematics and general reasoning benchmarks, more expressive training settings yield both larger performance gains (up to $+10.66$ points) and more compute-efficient transfer compared to less expressive settings, demonstrating that what a model is trained on, not just how much it is trained, shapes downstream transfer. We further show that the power-law relationship holds across multiple RL methods, and curriculum-based training substantially improves scaling efficiency. More broadly, our results demonstrate that LLM shortcomings in long-horizon reasoning are not fundamental to the underlying architecture, and can be addressed by improved training methodology and data.

analysis.tldr: 通过合成逻辑推理框架ScaleLogic，发现RL训练计算量与推理深度呈幂律关系，且逻辑表达能力越强，缩放指数越大，表明LLM长程推理缺陷可通过改进训练方法解决。
analysis.research_motivation: RL提升LLM推理能力的研究缺乏可控、可扩展的环境，难以系统研究训练如何随任务难度缩放；同时，LLM在长程推理中的不足引发了对自回归Transformer架构根本局限的担忧。
analysis.problem: 系统研究RL训练计算量如何随推理深度和逻辑表达能力缩放，并验证LLM长程推理缺陷是否源于架构本身。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RL训练计算量T与推理深度D呈幂律关系（T ∝ D^γ，R²>0.99），且缩放指数γ随逻辑表达能力单调增加（从1.04到2.60）。
analysis.method: 提出ScaleLogic合成逻辑推理框架，独立控制推理深度和逻辑表达能力（从简单蕴含逻辑到一阶逻辑），用于训练和评估LLM的RL方法。
contributions: 提出ScaleLogic框架，支持独立控制推理深度和逻辑表达能力，为研究RL训练缩放提供可控环境。
发现RL训练计算量与推理深度呈幂律关系，且缩放指数随逻辑表达能力单调增加。
证明更富表达力的训练设置在下游数学和通用推理基准上带来更大性能提升（最高+10.66点）和更高效的计算迁移。
表明LLM长程推理缺陷并非架构根本问题，可通过改进训练方法和数据解决。
analysis.experiments: 在ScaleLogic框架上使用多种RL方法进行训练，并在下游数学和通用推理基准上评估，验证了幂律关系、缩放指数变化以及迁移效果。摘要未提供具体实验设置细节。
limitations: 合成框架可能与真实推理任务存在差距，结论的泛化性需进一步验证。
未探讨不同RL方法在更复杂逻辑下的表现差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过合成逻辑推理框架ScaleLogic，发现RL训练计算量与推理深度呈幂律关系，且逻辑表达能力越强，缩放指数越大，表明LLM长程推理缺陷可通过改进训练方法解决。

papers.title: DPM++: Dynamic Masked Metric Learning for Occluded Person Re-identification
papers.abstract: Although person re-identification has made impressive progress, occlusion caused by obstacles remains an unsettled issue in real applications. The difficulty lies in the mismatch between incomplete occluded samples and holistic identity representations. Severe occlusion removes discriminative body cues and introduces interference from background clutter and occluders, making global metric learning unreliable. Existing methods mainly rely on extra pre-trained models to estimate visible parts for alignment or construct occluded samples via data augmentation, but still lack a unified framework that learns robust visibility-consistent matching under realistic occlusion patterns. In this paper, we propose DPM++, a Dynamic Masked Metric Learning framework for occluded person re-identification. DPM++ learns an input-adaptive masked metric that dynamically selects reliable identity subspaces for each occluded instance, enabling matching to emphasize visibility-consistent evidence while suppressing unreliable components. Built upon the classifier-prototype space, DPM++ introduces a CLIP-based two-stage supervision scheme, where ID-level semantic priors are learned from the text branch and transferred into the classifier-prototype space for dynamic masked matching. To strengthen the masked metric, we introduce a saliency-guided patch transfer strategy to synthesize controllable and photo-realistic occluded samples during training. Exploiting real scene priors, this strategy exposes the model to realistic partial observations and provides richer supervision than random erasing. In addition, occlusion-aware sample pairing and mask-guided optimization improve the stability and effectiveness of the framework. Experiments on occluded and holistic person re-identification benchmarks show that DPM++ consistently outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods in both holistic and occlusion scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态掩码度量学习框架DPM++，利用CLIP语义先验和显著性引导的遮挡样本合成，在遮挡行人重识别任务上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实场景中遮挡导致行人外观不完整，全局度量学习不可靠，现有方法依赖额外预训练模型或数据增强，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 遮挡行人重识别中，如何学习鲁棒的可见性一致匹配，动态选择可靠身份子空间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 严重遮挡会移除判别性身体线索并引入背景和遮挡物的干扰，导致全局度量学习不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出DPM++框架，包含动态掩码度量学习、CLIP两阶段监督、显著性引导的补丁转移策略和遮挡感知样本配对。
contributions: 提出动态掩码度量学习框架，自适应选择可靠身份子空间进行匹配。
引入CLIP两阶段监督，将ID级语义先验从文本分支转移到分类器-原型空间。
提出显著性引导的补丁转移策略，合成可控且逼真的遮挡样本。
analysis.experiments: 在遮挡和整体行人重识别基准上，DPM++在整体和遮挡场景下均一致超越先前SOTA方法。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP模型的预训练知识，对未见过的遮挡模式泛化性未知。
动态掩码机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态掩码度量学习框架DPM++，利用CLIP语义先验和显著性引导的遮挡样本合成，在遮挡行人重识别任务上超越SOTA。

papers.title: MASPO: Joint Prompt Optimization for LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based Multi-agent systems (MAS) have shown promise in tackling complex collaborative tasks, where agents are typically orchestrated via role-specific prompts. While the quality of these prompts is pivotal, jointly optimizing them across interacting agents remains a non-trivial challenge, primarily due to the misalignment between local agent objectives and holistic system goals. To address this, we introduce MASPO, a novel framework designed to automatically and iteratively refine prompts across the entire system. A core innovation of MASPO is its joint evaluation mechanism, which assesses prompts not merely by their local validity, but by their capacity to facilitate downstream success for successor agents. This effectively bridges the gap between local interactions and global outcomes without relying on ground-truth labels. Furthermore, MASPO employs a data-driven evolutionary beam search to efficiently navigate the high-dimensional prompt space. Extensive empirical evaluations across 6 diverse tasks demonstrate that MASPO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art prompt optimization methods, achieving an average accuracy improvement of 2.9. We release our code at https://github.com/wangzx1219/MASPO.

analysis.tldr: 提出MASPO框架，通过联合评估与进化波束搜索优化LLM多智能体系统的提示词，提升协作任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM多智能体系统中，角色提示词质量至关重要，但联合优化多个交互智能体的提示词面临局部目标与全局目标不一致的挑战，现有方法难以有效解决。
analysis.problem: 如何自动且迭代地优化多智能体系统中所有智能体的提示词，使其对齐全局系统目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出局部智能体目标与整体系统目标之间存在错位，导致提示词优化困难。
analysis.method: 提出MASPO框架，核心包括联合评估机制（评估提示词对后续智能体下游任务成功的贡献）和数据驱动的进化波束搜索（高效探索高维提示词空间）。
contributions: 提出MASPO，首个联合优化多智能体系统提示词的自动化框架。
设计联合评估机制，弥合局部交互与全局结果之间的差距，无需真实标签。
采用数据驱动的进化波束搜索，高效优化高维提示词空间。
analysis.experiments: 在6个不同任务上进行实证评估，MASPO一致优于最先进的提示词优化方法，平均准确率提升2.9。代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖任务类型和智能体数量，扩展性需进一步验证。
进化波束搜索的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MASPO框架，通过联合评估与进化波束搜索优化LLM多智能体系统的提示词，提升协作任务性能。

papers.title: A Linear-Transformer Hybrid for SNP-Based Genotype-to-Phenotype Prediction in Grapevine
papers.abstract: Robust genotype-to-phenotype (G2P) prediction is essential for accelerating breeding decisions and genetic gain. However, it remains challenging to measure complex traits under variable field conditions and across years. In this study, we propose a linear-Transformer approach, LiT-G2P (Linear-Transformer Genotype-to-Phenotype), an automated predictive framework that integrates additive genetic variance effects with Transformer-based nonlinear interactions using genome-wide single-nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) data. We evaluated LiT-G2P on a panel of diverse grape accessions, genotyped with SNP markers and measured for phenotypes across two consecutive years. Target phenotypic traits include leaf hair density and trichome density of grapevines. Across both single-year and cross-year testing scenarios, LiT-G2P consistently improves prediction performance compared with baseline models. For hair density, LiT-G2P achieves the lowest error in both single-year and cross-year evaluations, with RMSEs of 0.469 and 0.454, respectively, while maintaining strong tolerance accuracies of 79.2% and 74.6%, respectively. For trichome density, LiT-G2P also presents the best overall G2P performance. In addition, we extract model-prioritized SNPs from attention weights and apply genotype-stratified analysis to provide interpretable candidate marker for downstream validation. These results demonstrate that integrating stable additive effects with learned interaction patterns can enhance cross-year robustness and support practical SNP-based predictive modeling for genomic selection.

analysis.tldr: 提出线性-Transformer混合模型LiT-G2P，用于葡萄基因型到表型预测，在跨年场景下提升鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 基因型到表型（G2P）预测对加速育种决策和遗传增益至关重要，但复杂性状在多变田间条件和跨年测量下仍难以准确预测。
analysis.problem: 如何利用全基因组SNP数据，结合加性遗传效应和非线性交互作用，实现稳健的跨年G2P预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LiT-G2P框架，融合线性模型捕获加性遗传方差效应与Transformer建模非线性SNP交互，使用全基因组SNP数据。
contributions: 提出线性-Transformer混合架构LiT-G2P，结合加性效应与非线性交互提升G2P预测性能。
在葡萄多样品系上跨年验证，LiT-G2P在毛密度和毛状体密度预测中均取得最低RMSE和较高容忍准确率。
通过注意力权重提取优先SNP并进行基因型分层分析，提供可解释的候选标记。
analysis.experiments: 在葡萄多样品系上，使用SNP标记和两年表型数据，评估毛密度和毛状体密度预测，包括单年和跨年测试。LiT-G2P在毛密度上单年RMSE=0.469，跨年RMSE=0.454，容忍准确率79.2%和74.6%。
limitations: 仅针对葡萄的特定性状（毛密度和毛状体密度），泛化性需更多作物验证。
摘要未提及与其他先进非线性模型（如纯Transformer或GNN）的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出线性-Transformer混合模型LiT-G2P，用于葡萄基因型到表型预测，在跨年场景下提升鲁棒性。

papers.title: When and Why SignSGD Outperforms SGD: A Theoretical Study Based on $\ell_1$-norm Lower Bounds
papers.abstract: Sign-based optimization algorithms, such as SignSGD and Muon, have garnered significant attention for their remarkable performance in training large foundation models. Despite this empirical success, we still lack a theoretical understanding of when and why these sign-based methods outperform vanilla SGD. The core obstacle is that under standard smoothness and finite variance conditions, SGD is known to be minimax optimal for finding stationary points measured by $\ell_2$-norms, thereby fundamentally precluding any complexity gains for sign-based methods in standard settings. To overcome this barrier, we analyze sign-based optimizers leveraging $\ell_1$-norm stationarity, $\ell_\infty$-smoothness, and a separable noise model, which can better capture the coordinate-wise nature of signed updates. Under this distinct problem geometry, we derive matched upper and lower bounds for SignSGD and explicitly characterize the problem class in which SignSGD provably dominates SGD. Specifically, we compare the \emph{upper bound of SignSGD} with the \emph{lower bound of SGD}, illustrating that SignSGD effectively reduces the complexity by a factor of $d$ under \emph{sparse noise}, where $d$ is the problem dimension. Furthermore, we elevate this framework to the matrix domain, providing an equivalent optimal lower bound for the Muon optimizer, proving that extending the sign operator to matrices preserves this optimal scaling with dimensionality. Finally, we bridge our theoretical bounds to practice, demonstrating that the theoretical superiority of SignSGD accurately predicts its faster convergence during the pretraining of a 124M parameter GPT-2 model.

analysis.tldr: SignSGD在稀疏噪声下比SGD快d倍，理论证明基于ℓ1范数平稳性。
analysis.research_motivation: 符号优化器（如SignSGD）在训练大模型时表现优异，但缺乏理论解释，因为标准ℓ2范数下SGD已是最优，无法体现符号方法的优势。
analysis.problem: 在何种问题几何下SignSGD能比SGD更快，并给出严格的理论复杂度分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准ℓ2平滑和有限方差条件下SGD已是最优，符号方法无法获得复杂度增益；但通过ℓ1范数平稳性和ℓ∞平滑性，可以捕捉符号更新的坐标级特性。
analysis.method: 提出基于ℓ1范数平稳性、ℓ∞平滑性和可分离噪声模型的分析框架，推导SignSGD的上下界，并与SGD的下界比较。
contributions: 首次在ℓ1范数平稳性下证明SignSGD在稀疏噪声下比SGD快d倍。
将框架扩展到矩阵域，为Muon优化器提供最优下界。
在124M参数GPT-2预训练中验证理论预测。
analysis.experiments: 在124M参数GPT-2模型预训练中，SignSGD的收敛速度与理论预测一致。
limitations: 理论假设稀疏噪声，实际噪声可能不严格满足。
仅分析SignSGD，未涵盖其他符号变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SignSGD在稀疏噪声下比SGD快d倍，理论证明基于ℓ1范数平稳性。

papers.title: SkillOS: Learning Skill Curation for Self-Evolving Agents
papers.abstract: LLM-based agents are increasingly deployed to handle streaming tasks, yet they often remain one-off problem solvers that fail to learn from past interactions. Reusable skills distilled from experience provide a natural substrate for self-evolution, where high-quality skill curation serves as the key bottleneck. Existing approaches either rely on manual skill curation, prescribe heuristic skill operations, or train for short-horizon skill operations. However, they still struggle to learn complex long-term curation policies from indirect and delayed feedback. To tackle this challenge, we propose SkillOS, an experience-driven RL training recipe for learning skill curation in self-evolving agents. SkillOS pairs a frozen agent executor that retrieves and applies skills with a trainable skill curator that updates an external SkillRepo from accumulated experience. To provide learning signals for curation, we design composite rewards and train on grouped task streams based on skill-relevant task dependencies, where earlier trajectories update the SkillRepo, and later related tasks evaluate these updates. Across multi-turn agentic tasks and single-turn reasoning tasks, SkillOS consistently outperforms memory-free and strong memory-based baselines in both effectiveness and efficiency, with the learned skill curator generalizing across different executor backbones and task domains. Further analyses show that the learned curator produces more targeted skill use, while the skills in SkillRepo evolve into more richly structured Markdown files that encode higher-level meta-skills over time.

analysis.tldr: SkillOS 通过强化学习训练技能策展策略，使 LLM Agent 能从经验中自主演化技能库，提升多轮任务表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM Agent 通常是一次性问题求解器，无法从过往交互中学习；虽然从经验中提炼可复用技能是实现自我演化的自然途径，但高质量技能策展是关键瓶颈，现有方法依赖人工、启发式规则或短视训练，难以从间接延迟反馈中学习复杂长期策展策略。
analysis.problem: 如何让 LLM Agent 从流式任务经验中自动学习高质量技能策展策略，实现自我演化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SkillOS，一种基于经验驱动的强化学习训练方案：将冻结的 Agent 执行器（检索并应用技能）与可训练的技能策展器（更新外部 SkillRepo）配对；设计复合奖励，并在基于技能相关任务依赖的分组任务流上训练，使早期轨迹更新 SkillRepo，后续相关任务评估更新效果。
contributions: 提出 SkillOS 框架，通过强化学习学习技能策展策略，使 Agent 能自我演化。
设计复合奖励和分组任务流训练方法，解决延迟反馈下的长期策展学习问题。
在多轮 Agent 任务和单轮推理任务上验证有效性，策展器可泛化至不同执行器骨干和任务领域。
analysis.experiments: 在多轮 Agent 任务和单轮推理任务上，SkillOS 在效果和效率上均优于无记忆和强记忆基线；策展器可泛化至不同执行器骨干和任务领域；进一步分析显示策展器产生更精准的技能使用，SkillRepo 中的技能随时间演化为结构更丰富的 Markdown 文件，编码更高级的元技能。
limitations: 可能依赖任务流的分组设计，对任务依赖关系假设较强。
技能库的演化可能引入冗余或过时技能，需要额外维护机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkillOS 通过强化学习训练技能策展策略，使 LLM Agent 能从经验中自主演化技能库，提升多轮任务表现。

papers.title: The Structural Origin of Attention Sink: Variance Discrepancy, Super Neurons, and Dimension Disparity
papers.abstract: Despite the prevalence of the attention sink phenomenon in Large Language Models (LLMs), where initial tokens disproportionately monopolize attention scores, its structural origins remain elusive. This work provides a \textit{mechanistic explanation} for this phenomenon. First, we trace its root to the value aggregation process inherent in self-attention, which induces a systematic variance discrepancy. We further demonstrate that this discrepancy is drastically amplified by the activation of super neurons within Feed-Forward Network (FFN) layers. Specifically, the channel-sparse down-projections trigger a dimension disparity of the first-token representation, necessitating the formation of attention sinks as a structural anchor. Then, we validate this causal chain through two controlled interventions: (i) isolating the aggregation effect via attention mask modifications and (ii) amplifying the variance of targeted token representations. Both interventions can replicate attention sinks at arbitrary positions. Our mechanistic understanding offers a foundation for the systematic control of sink formation. Finally, as a proof of concept, we propose \textit{head-wise RMSNorm}, an architectural modification that stabilizes value aggregation outputs during pre-training. Our experiments demonstrate that restoring statistical parity across positions significantly accelerates convergence.

analysis.tldr: 揭示注意力汇聚现象的结构根源：方差差异、超级神经元和维度差异，并提出head-wise RMSNorm加速预训练收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 注意力汇聚现象在LLM中普遍存在，但其结构起源尚不明确，理解其机制有助于系统控制该现象并优化模型训练。
analysis.problem: 解释LLM中初始token过度占据注意力分数的结构原因，并探索其可控性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力汇聚源于自注意力中的值聚合过程导致的系统性方差差异，该差异被FFN层中的超级神经元放大，通道稀疏的下投影引发首token表示的维度差异，迫使注意力汇聚作为结构锚点形成。
analysis.method: 通过两种受控干预（注意力掩码修改和目标token表示方差放大）验证因果链，并提出head-wise RMSNorm架构修改以稳定值聚合输出。
contributions: 首次从机制上解释注意力汇聚的结构起源，包括方差差异、超级神经元和维度差异。
通过受控干预实验验证因果链，并提出head-wise RMSNorm加速预训练收敛。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明恢复位置间的统计奇偶性显著加速收敛。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的LLM。
head-wise RMSNorm的通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示注意力汇聚现象的结构根源：方差差异、超级神经元和维度差异，并提出head-wise RMSNorm加速预训练收敛。

papers.title: SoftSAE: Dynamic Top-K Selection for Adaptive Sparse Autoencoders
papers.abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have become an important tool in mechanistic interpretability, helping to analyze internal representations in both Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs). By decomposing polysemantic activations into sparse sets of monosemantic features, SAEs aim to translate neural network computations into human-understandable concepts. However, common architectures such as TopK SAEs rely on a fixed sparsity level. They enforce the same number of active features (K) across all inputs, ignoring the varying complexity of real-world data. Natural data often lies on manifolds with varying local intrinsic dimensionality, meaning the number of relevant factors can change significantly across samples. This suggests that a fixed sparsity level is not optimal. Simple inputs may require only a few features, while more complex ones need more expressive representations. Using a constant K can therefore introduce noise in simple cases or miss important structure in more complex ones. To address this issue, we propose SoftSAE, a sparse autoencoder with a Dynamic Top-K selection mechanism. Our method uses a differentiable Soft Top-K operator to learn an input-dependent sparsity level k. This allows the model to adjust the number of active features based on the complexity of each input. As a result, the representation better matches the structure of the data, and the explanation length reflects the amount of information in the input. Experimental results confirm that SoftSAE not only finds meaningful features, but also selects the right number of features for each concept. The source code is available at: https://github.com/St0pien/SoftSAE.

analysis.tldr: SoftSAE 通过可微分的动态 Top-K 选择机制，让稀疏自编码器根据输入复杂度自适应调整活跃特征数量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 TopK SAE 使用固定的稀疏度 K，无法适应真实数据中不同样本的复杂度差异，导致简单输入引入噪声或复杂输入丢失结构。
analysis.problem: 如何让稀疏自编码器根据输入复杂度动态调整活跃特征数量，以更好地匹配数据的内在结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自然数据位于局部本征维度变化的流形上，不同样本所需相关因子数量差异显著，固定 K 无法最优。
analysis.method: 提出 SoftSAE，使用可微分的 Soft Top-K 算子学习输入依赖的稀疏度 k，实现动态选择活跃特征。
contributions: 提出 SoftSAE，一种具有动态 Top-K 选择机制的稀疏自编码器，可自适应调整稀疏度。
实验验证 SoftSAE 不仅能发现有意义特征，还能为每个概念选择正确数量的特征。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 动态稀疏度可能增加计算开销。
Soft Top-K 算子的可微分性可能带来训练稳定性问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SoftSAE 通过可微分的动态 Top-K 选择机制，让稀疏自编码器根据输入复杂度自适应调整活跃特征数量。

papers.title: AI CFD Scientist: Toward Open-Ended Computational Fluid Dynamics Discovery with Physics-Aware AI Agents
papers.abstract: Recent LLM-based agents have closed substantial portions of the scientific discovery loop in software-only machine-learning research, in chemistry, and in biology. Extending the same loop to high-fidelity physical simulators is harder, because solver completion does not imply physical validity and many failure modes appear only in field-level imagery rather than in solver logs. We present AI CFD Scientist, an open-source AI scientist for computational fluid dynamics (CFD) that, to our knowledge, is the first to span literature-grounded ideation, validated execution, vision-based physics verification, source-code modification, and figure-grounded writing within a single inspectable workflow. Three coupled pathways cover parameter sweeps within a fixed solver, case-local C++ library compilation for new physical models, and open-ended hypothesis search against a reference comparator, all running on OpenFOAM through Foam-Agent. At the center of the framework is a vision-language physics-verification gate that inspects rendered flow fields before any result is accepted, rerun, or written into a manuscript. On five tasks under a shared GPT-5.5 backbone, AI CFD Scientist autonomously discovers a Spalart-Allmaras runtime correction that reduces lower-wall Cf RMSE against DNS by 7.89% on the periodic hill at Reh=5600; under matched LLM cost, two strong general AI-scientist baselines (ARIS, DeepScientist) execute partial CFD workflows but lack the domain-specific validity gates needed to convert runs into defensible scientific claims; and a controlled planted-failure ablation shows that the vision-language gate detects 14 of 16 silent failures missed by solver-level checks. Code, prompts, and run artifacts are released at https://github.com/csml-rpi/cfd-scientist.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个端到端AI流体力学科学家，通过视觉-语言物理验证门控实现开放式CFD发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM智能体在软件、化学、生物学中已部分实现科学发现闭环，但扩展到高保真物理模拟器时，求解器完成不保证物理有效性，许多失败模式仅出现在场级图像而非求解器日志中。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能自主完成文献启发、执行、视觉验证、代码修改和写作的CFD发现智能体，并确保结果物理有效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AI CFD Scientist，包含三条耦合路径：固定求解器参数扫描、新物理模型C++库编译、开放假设搜索；核心是视觉-语言物理验证门控，检查渲染流场后决定是否接受、重跑或写入论文。
contributions: 首个端到端、可审计的AI CFD科学家，覆盖从文献到写作的完整发现循环。
提出视觉-语言物理验证门控，检测求解器级检查遗漏的静默失败。
在周期性山丘任务上自主发现Spalart-Allmaras运行时修正，降低Cf RMSE 7.89%。
analysis.experiments: 在五个任务上使用GPT-5.5骨干，与ARIS和DeepScientist基线对比，并进行了植入失败消融实验。
limitations: 依赖特定求解器OpenFOAM和Foam-Agent，泛化性未知。
视觉-语言门控可能无法覆盖所有物理失效模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个端到端AI流体力学科学家，通过视觉-语言物理验证门控实现开放式CFD发现。

papers.title: Patch2Vuln: Agentic Reconstruction of Vulnerabilities from Linux Distribution Binary Patches
papers.abstract: Security updates create a short but important window in which defenders and attackers can compare vulnerable and patched software. Yet in many operational settings, the most accessible artifacts are binary packages rather than source patches or advisory text. This paper asks whether a language-model agent, restricted to local binary-derived evidence, can reconstruct the security meaning of Linux distribution updates. Patch2Vuln is a local, resumable pipeline that extracts old/new ELF pairs, diffs them with Ghidra and Ghidriff, ranks changed functions, builds candidate dossiers, and asks an offline agent to produce a preliminary audit, bounded validation plan, and final audit. We evaluate Patch2Vuln on 25 Ubuntu `.deb` package pairs: 20 security-update pairs and five negative controls, all manually adjudicated against private source-patch and binary-function ground truth. The agent localizes a verified security-relevant patch function in 10 of 20 security pairs and assigns an accepted final root-cause class in 11 of 20. Oracle diagnostics show that six security pairs fail before model reasoning because the binary differ or ranker omits the right function, with one additional context-export miss. A separate bounded validation pass produces two target-level minimized behavioral old/new differentials, both for tcpdump, but no crash, timeout, sanitizer finding, or memory-corruption proof; all five negative controls are classified as unknown and produce no validation differentials. These results support agentic vulnerability reconstruction from binary patches as a useful research target while showing that binary-diff coverage and local behavioral validation remain the limiting components.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Patch2Vuln 系统，利用语言模型代理从 Linux 二进制补丁中重建安全漏洞信息，在 20 个安全补丁中定位到 10 个验证过的安全相关函数。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全更新发布后，防御者和攻击者需要快速比较漏洞版本和修复版本，但许多场景下只能获取二进制包而非源码补丁或公告文本，因此需要从二进制补丁中自动重建安全语义。
analysis.problem: 如何仅依赖本地二进制证据，让语言模型代理自动重建 Linux 发行版二进制补丁的安全含义（定位漏洞函数并分类根因）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出二进制差异覆盖率和局部行为验证是限制组件：6 个安全补丁因二进制差异或排序遗漏正确函数而失败，1 个因上下文导出缺失；行为验证仅产生两个目标级最小化差异（tcpdump），未发现崩溃、超时、内存损坏等证据。
analysis.method: Patch2Vuln 是一个本地可恢复的流水线：提取新旧 ELF 对，使用 Ghidra 和 Ghidriff 进行差异分析，对变更函数排序，构建候选档案，然后由离线语言模型代理生成初步审计、有界验证计划和最终审计。
contributions: 提出 Patch2Vuln，首个利用语言模型代理从 Linux 二进制补丁中重建漏洞的本地可恢复流水线。
在 25 个 Ubuntu 软件包对上评估，10/20 定位到验证过的安全相关函数，11/20 给出正确的根因分类。
analysis.experiments: 在 25 个 Ubuntu .deb 软件包对上评估，包括 20 个安全更新对和 5 个负控制，所有结果均对照私有源码补丁和二进制函数真值进行人工裁决。
limitations: 二进制差异覆盖率和排序算法可能遗漏关键函数，导致 6/20 安全补丁在模型推理前失败。
行为验证能力有限，仅产生两个目标级差异，未发现内存损坏等强证据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
