analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Patch2Vuln 系统，利用语言模型代理从 Linux 二进制补丁中重建安全漏洞信息，在 20 个安全补丁中定位到 10 个验证过的安全相关函数。

papers.title: UniSD: Towards a Unified Self-Distillation Framework for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Self-distillation (SD) offers a promising path for adapting large language models (LLMs) without relying on stronger external teachers. However, SD in autoregressive LLMs remains challenging because self-generated trajectories are free-form, correctness is task-dependent, and plausible rationales can still provide unstable or unreliable supervision. Existing methods mainly examine isolated design choices, leaving their effectiveness, roles, and interactions unclear. In this paper, we propose UniSD, a unified framework to systematically study self-distillation. UniSD integrates complementary mechanisms that address supervision reliability, representation alignment, and training stability, including multi-teacher agreement, EMA teacher stabilization, token-level contrastive learning, feature matching, and divergence clipping. Across six benchmarks and six models from three model families, UniSD reveals when self-distillation improves over static imitation, which components drive the gains, and how these components interact across tasks. Guided by these insights, we construct UniSDfull, an integrated pipeline that combines complementary components and achieves the strongest overall performance, improving over the base model by +5.4 points and the strongest baseline by +2.8 points. Extensive evaluation highlights self-distillation as a practical and steerable approach for efficient LLM adaptation without stronger external teachers.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一自蒸馏框架UniSD，系统研究LLM自蒸馏的组件交互与效果，集成多教师共识、EMA教师稳定化、对比学习等机制，在多个基准上提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自蒸馏在自回归LLM中面临自由生成轨迹、任务依赖正确性、不稳定监督等问题，现有方法孤立研究设计选择，缺乏系统理解。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地研究自蒸馏中各组件的作用、交互及有效性，并构建统一框架以提升LLM自蒸馏性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出自蒸馏中自我生成轨迹自由、正确性任务依赖、合理理由可能提供不稳定监督。
analysis.method: UniSD框架集成多教师共识、EMA教师稳定化、token级对比学习、特征匹配和散度裁剪等互补机制，并基于组件分析构建UniSDfull集成管道。
contributions: 提出统一自蒸馏框架UniSD，系统研究组件有效性、角色和交互。
构建UniSDfull集成管道，在六个基准和六个模型上平均提升+5.4点，超过最强基线+2.8点。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准和六个模型（来自三个模型家族）上评估，UniSDfull相比基础模型提升+5.4点，相比最强基线提升+2.8点。
limitations: 框架组件选择可能依赖任务，通用性需进一步验证。
未讨论计算开销和训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一自蒸馏框架UniSD，系统研究LLM自蒸馏的组件交互与效果，集成多教师共识、EMA教师稳定化、对比学习等机制，在多个基准上提升性能。

papers.title: Cross-Modal Navigation with Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Robust embodied navigation relies on complementary sensory cues. However, high-quality and well-aligned multi-modal data is often difficult to obtain in practice. Training a monolithic model is also challenging as rich multi-modal inputs induce complex representations and substantially enlarge the policy space. Cross-modal collaboration among lightweight modality-specialized agents offers a scalable paradigm. It enables flexible deployment and parallel execution, while preserving the strength of each modality. In this paper, we propose \textbf{CRONA}, a Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) framework for \textbf{Cro}ss-Modal \textbf{Na}vigation. CRONA improves collaboration by leveraging control-relevant auxiliary beliefs and a centralized multi-modal critic with global state. Experiments on visual-acoustic navigation tasks show that multi-agent methods significantly improve performance and efficiency over single-agent baselines. We find that homogeneous collaboration with limited modalities is sufficient for short-range navigation under salient cues; heterogeneous collaboration among agents with complementary modalities is generally efficient and effective; and navigation in large, complex environments requires both richer multi-modal perception and increased model capacity.

analysis.tldr: 提出CRONA框架，用多智能体强化学习实现跨模态导航，通过辅助信念和集中式评论家提升协作效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态数据难以获取且对齐困难，单模态模型训练复杂，而跨模态协作可提供可扩展的范式，但现有方法缺乏高效协作机制。
analysis.problem: 如何通过多智能体强化学习实现视觉-声学导航中不同模态智能体的有效协作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：同质协作在短距离导航中足够；异质协作普遍高效；大复杂环境需要更丰富的多模态感知和更大模型容量。
analysis.method: 提出CRONA框架，包含控制相关的辅助信念（control-relevant auxiliary beliefs）和集中式多模态评论家（centralized multi-modal critic）以改进协作。
contributions: 提出CRONA，一个用于跨模态导航的多智能体强化学习框架。
引入辅助信念和集中式多模态评论家以提升智能体间协作。
在视觉-声学导航任务上验证了多智能体方法相比单基线的性能和效率优势。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉-声学导航任务上进行实验，表明多智能体方法显著优于单智能体基线。
limitations: 摘要未提及在真实机器人上的部署验证。
可能对传感器噪声或缺失模态的鲁棒性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CRONA框架，用多智能体强化学习实现跨模态导航，通过辅助信念和集中式评论家提升协作效率。

papers.title: DINORANKCLIP: DINOv3 Distillation and Injection for Vision-Language Pretraining with High-Order Ranking Consistency
papers.abstract: Contrastive language-image pretraining (CLIP) suffers from two structural weaknesses: the symmetric InfoNCE loss discards the relative ordering among unmatched in-batch pairs, and global pooling collapses the visual representation into a semantic bottleneck that is poorly sensitive to fine-grained local structure. RANKCLIP partially addresses the first issue with a list-wise Plackett-Luce ranking-consistency loss, but its model is strictly first-order and inherits the second weakness untouched. We propose DINORANKCLIP, a pretraining framework that addresses both jointly. Our principal contribution is injecting a frozen DINOv3 teacher into the contrastive trunk through a dual-branch lightweight student and a multi-scale fusion module with channel-spatial attention, a self-attention refiner, and a conflict-aware gate that preserves the cross-modal alignment up to first order. Complementarily, we introduce a high-order Plackett-Luce ranking model in which the per-position utility is augmented with attention-parameterised pairwise and tuple-wise transition terms; the family contains CLIP and RANKCLIP as nested zero-order and first-order special cases, and the optimal order on every benchmark is $R^*=3$. The full empirical study -- order sweep, Fine-grained Probe on five datasets, four-node Modality-Gap analysis, six-variant Fusion ablation -- fits in 72 hours on a single eight-GPU H100 node and trains entirely on Conceptual Captions 3M. DINORANKCLIP consistently outperforms CLIP, CyCLIP, ALIP, and RANKCLIP under matched compute, with the largest relative gains on the fine-grained and out-of-distribution evaluations that most directly stress local structural reasoning.

analysis.tldr: DINORANKCLIP通过注入DINOv3教师和高阶排序一致性损失，同时解决CLIP的排序忽略和全局池化瓶颈问题。
analysis.research_motivation: CLIP存在两个结构弱点：对称的InfoNCE损失忽略了批次内不匹配对的相对排序，全局池化将视觉表示压缩为对细粒度局部结构不敏感的语义瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何同时解决CLIP的排序信息丢失和视觉表示细粒度不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RANKCLIP仅部分解决了排序问题，但模型严格一阶且未处理全局池化瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出DINORANKCLIP框架，包含冻结的DINOv3教师、双分支轻量学生网络、多尺度融合模块（通道-空间注意力、自注意力精炼器、冲突感知门），以及高阶Plackett-Luce排序模型（最优阶数R*=3）。
contributions: 提出DINORANKCLIP，联合解决CLIP的两个结构弱点。
引入高阶Plackett-Luce排序模型，包含注意力参数化的成对和元组转移项。
在多个基准上一致优于CLIP、CyCLIP、ALIP和RANKCLIP，尤其在细粒度和分布外评估上。
analysis.experiments: 在Conceptual Captions 3M上训练，使用单节点8-GPU H100在72小时内完成完整实验，包括阶数扫描、五个数据集的细粒度探测、四节点模态差距分析、六变体融合消融。
limitations: 依赖冻结的DINOv3教师，可能限制学生网络的灵活性。
高阶排序模型的计算复杂度可能随阶数增加而上升。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DINORANKCLIP通过注入DINOv3教师和高阶排序一致性损失，同时解决CLIP的排序忽略和全局池化瓶颈问题。

papers.title: Weblica: Scalable and Reproducible Training Environments for Visual Web Agents
papers.abstract: The web is complex, open-ended, and constantly changing, making it challenging to scale training data for visual web agents. Existing data collection attempts remain limited to offline trajectories for supervised fine-tuning or a handful of simulated environments for RL training, thus failing to capture web diversity. We propose Weblica (Web Replica), a framework for constructing reproducible and scalable web environments. Our framework leverages 1) HTTP-level caching to capture and replay stable visual states while preserving interactive behavior and 2) LLM-based environment synthesis grounded in real-world websites and core web navigation skills. Using this framework, we scale RL training to thousands of diverse environments and tasks. Our best model, Weblica-8B, outperforms open-weight baselines of similar size across multiple web navigation benchmarks while using fewer inference steps, scales favorably with additional test-time compute, and is competitive with API models.

analysis.tldr: Weblica通过HTTP缓存和LLM合成构建可复现、可扩展的Web环境，用于训练视觉Web智能体，在多个基准上超越同规模开源模型。
analysis.research_motivation: Web环境复杂、开放且不断变化，现有训练数据收集方法局限于离线轨迹或少量模拟环境，无法覆盖Web多样性，限制了视觉Web智能体的扩展训练。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可扩展且可复现的Web环境，以支持大规模强化学习训练视觉Web智能体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Weblica框架，结合HTTP级缓存（捕获和重放稳定视觉状态，同时保持交互行为）和基于LLM的环境合成（基于真实网站和核心导航技能），实现数千个多样化环境和任务的RL训练。
contributions: 提出Weblica框架，利用HTTP缓存和LLM合成构建可扩展、可复现的Web环境。
训练出Weblica-8B模型，在多个Web导航基准上超越同规模开源模型，与API模型竞争，且推理步骤更少。
analysis.experiments: 在多个Web导航基准上评估，Weblica-8B优于同规模开源基线，使用更少推理步骤，随测试时计算增加性能提升，与API模型竞争。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM合成环境的质量和多样性。
HTTP缓存可能无法完全覆盖动态Web内容。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Weblica通过HTTP缓存和LLM合成构建可复现、可扩展的Web环境，用于训练视觉Web智能体，在多个基准上超越同规模开源模型。

papers.title: Towards Metric-Faithful Neural Graph Matching
papers.abstract: Graph Edit Distance (GED) is a fundamental, albeit NP-hard, metric for structural graph similarity. Recent neural graph matching architectures approximate GED by first encoding graphs with a Graph Neural Network (GNN) and then applying either a graph-level regression head or a matching-based alignment module. Despite substantial architectural progress, the role of encoder geometry in neural GED estimation remains poorly understood. In this paper, we develop a theoretical framework that connects encoder geometry to GED estimation quality for two broad classes of neural GED estimators: graph similarity predictors and alignment-based methods. On fixed graph collections, where the doubly-stochastic metric $d_{\mathrm{DS}}$ is comparable to GED, we show that graph-level bi-Lipschitz encoders yield controlled GED surrogates and improved ranking stability; for matching-based estimators, node-level bi-Lipschitz geometry propagates to encoder-induced alignment costs and the resulting optimized alignment objective. We instantiate this perspective using FSW-GNN, a bi-Lipschitz WL-equivalent encoder, as a drop-in replacement in representative neural GED architectures. Across representative baselines and benchmark datasets, the resulting geometry-aware variants significantly improve GED prediction and ranking metrics. A faithfulness case study of untrained encoders, together with ablations and transfer experiments, supports the view that these gains arise from improved representation geometry, positioning encoder geometry as a useful design principle for neural graph matching.

analysis.tldr: 提出双Lipschitz编码器几何理论，提升神经图匹配的图编辑距离估计保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 图编辑距离（GED）是衡量图结构相似性的基础但NP难的度量，现有神经图匹配方法在编码器几何对GED估计质量的影响上理解不足。
analysis.problem: 如何通过编码器几何设计提升神经图匹配中GED估计的保真度和排序稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发理论框架连接编码器几何与GED估计质量，提出双Lipschitz WL等价编码器FSW-GNN作为即插即用替换。
contributions: 建立编码器几何与GED估计质量的理论联系，证明双Lipschitz编码器可产生受控的GED代理并提升排序稳定性。
提出FSW-GNN编码器，在多个基准上显著提升GED预测和排序指标。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性基线和基准数据集上评估，包括GED预测和排序指标，以及未训练编码器的保真度案例研究、消融和迁移实验。
limitations: 理论框架可能仅适用于固定图集合，未涵盖动态图场景。
FSW-GNN作为双Lipschitz编码器的实际性能可能受限于图规模。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双Lipschitz编码器几何理论，提升神经图匹配的图编辑距离估计保真度。

papers.title: NeuroAgent: LLM Agents for Multimodal Neuroimaging Analysis and Research
papers.abstract: Multimodal neuroimaging analysis often involves complex, modality-specific preprocessing workflows that require careful configuration, quality control, and coordination across heterogeneous toolchains. Beyond preprocessing, downstream statistical analysis and disease classification commonly require task-specific code, evaluation protocols, and data-format conventions, creating additional barriers between raw acquisitions and reproducible scientific analysis. We present NeuroAgent, an LLM-driven agentic framework that automates key preprocessing and analysis steps for heterogeneous neuroimaging data, including sMRI, fMRI, dMRI, and PET, and supports interactive downstream analysis through natural-language queries. NeuroAgent employs a hierarchical multi-agent architecture with a feedback-driven Generate-Execute-Validate engine: agents autonomously generate executable preprocessing code, detect and recover from runtime errors, and validate output integrity. We evaluate the system on 1,470 subjects pooled across all ADNI phases (CN=1,000, AD=470), where all subjects have sMRI and tabular data, with subsets also having Tau-PET (n=469), fMRI (n=278), and DTI ($n=620$). Pipeline ablation studies across multiple LLM backends show that capable models reach up to 100% intent-parsing accuracy, with the strongest backend (Qwen3.5-27B) reaching 84.8% end-to-end preprocessing step correctness. Automated recovery limits manual intervention to edge cases where human review is required via the Human-In-The-Loop interface. For Alzheimer's Disease classification using automatically preprocessed multimodal data, our agent ensemble achieves an AUC of 0.9518 with four modalities, outperforming all single-modality baselines. These results show that NeuroAgent can reduce the manual effort required for neuroimaging preprocessing and enable end-to-end automated analysis pipelines for neuroimaging research.

analysis.tldr: NeuroAgent 是一个 LLM 驱动的多智能体框架，用于自动化多模态神经影像预处理和分析，在 ADNI 数据集上达到 84.8% 预处理正确率和 0.9518 AUC。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态神经影像分析涉及复杂、模态特定的预处理流程，需要精细配置、质量控制和跨异构工具链的协调，且下游统计分析和疾病分类需要任务特定代码和评估协议，造成从原始数据到可重复科学分析的障碍。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化多模态神经影像数据的预处理和下游分析，减少人工干预并提高可重复性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 NeuroAgent，一个层次化多智能体架构，包含反馈驱动的 Generate-Execute-Validate 引擎：智能体自主生成可执行预处理代码，检测并从运行时错误中恢复，验证输出完整性。
contributions: 提出 NeuroAgent，一个 LLM 驱动的自动化多模态神经影像预处理和分析框架。
在 ADNI 数据集上验证了系统有效性，预处理正确率达 84.8%，四模态分类 AUC 达 0.9518。
analysis.experiments: 在 ADNI 数据集上评估，包含 1470 名受试者（CN=1000, AD=470），所有受试者均有 sMRI 和表格数据，子集有 Tau-PET (n=469)、fMRI (n=278) 和 DTI (n=620)。进行了流水线消融研究，最强后端 Qwen3.5-27B 达到 84.8% 端到端预处理步骤正确率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定 LLM 后端，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅针对阿尔茨海默病分类，其他疾病或分析任务未测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NeuroAgent 是一个 LLM 驱动的多智能体框架，用于自动化多模态神经影像预处理和分析，在 ADNI 数据集上达到 84.8% 预处理正确率和 0.9518 AUC。

papers.title: Improved techniques for fine-tuning flow models via adjoint matching: a deterministic control pipeline
papers.abstract: We propose a deterministic adjoint matching framework that formulates human preference alignment for flow-based generative models as an optimal control problem over velocity fields. One can directly regress the control toward a value-gradient-induced target under the current policy, leading to a simple and stable training objective. Building on this perspective, we introduce a truncated adjoint scheme that focuses computation on the terminal portion of the trajectory, where reward-relevant signals concentrate, which yields substantial computational savings while preserving alignment quality. We further generalize the framework beyond standard KL-based regularization, allowing more flexible trade-offs between alignment strength and distributional preservation. Experiments on SiT-XL/2 and FLUX.2-Klein-4B demonstrate consistent gains across multiple alignment metrics, along with substantially improved diversity and mode preservation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种确定性伴随匹配框架，将流模型的人类偏好对齐转化为最优控制问题，通过截断伴随方案实现高效对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流模型对齐方法依赖强化学习或扩散模型技术，缺乏针对流模型特性的高效、稳定训练框架，且计算成本高、多样性保持不足。
analysis.problem: 如何为流式生成模型设计一种简单、稳定且计算高效的人类偏好对齐方法，同时保持生成多样性和模式覆盖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出奖励相关信号集中在轨迹末端，因此截断伴随方案可大幅节省计算而不损失对齐质量。
analysis.method: 将偏好对齐建模为速度场的最优控制问题，通过回归值梯度诱导的目标进行训练，并引入截断伴随方案聚焦轨迹末端计算。
contributions: 提出伴随匹配框架，将流模型对齐转化为最优控制问题，训练目标简单稳定。
引入截断伴随方案，显著降低计算成本同时保持对齐质量。
推广框架支持非KL正则化，实现对齐强度与分布保持的灵活权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在SiT-XL/2和FLUX.2-Klein-4B上实验，多个对齐指标一致提升，多样性和模式保持显著改善。
limitations: 可能依赖奖励模型的质量和覆盖范围。
截断方案对轨迹长度敏感，需调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种确定性伴随匹配框架，将流模型的人类偏好对齐转化为最优控制问题，通过截断伴随方案实现高效对齐。

papers.title: Directional Consistency as a Complementary Optimization Signal: The GONO Framework
papers.abstract: We identify and formalize an underexplored phenomenon in deep learning optimization: directional alignment and loss convergence can be decoupled. An optimizer can exhibit near-perfect directional consistency (cc_t -> 1, measured via consecutive gradient cosine similarity) while the loss remains high or decreases slowly. This observation reveals that existing optimizers such as Adam, SGD, and RMSprop lack explicit mechanisms to exploit temporal consistency in gradient directions, relying instead on magnitude-based signals that fail to distinguish plateaus, saddle points, and genuine convergence. Motivated by this, we introduce GONO (Gradient-Oriented Norm-Adaptive Optimizer), which adapts Adam's momentum coefficient beta_1 based on cc_t: amplifying momentum under directional consistency and suppressing it during oscillation. We prove GONO matches Adam's O(1/sqrt(T)) convergence rate and reduces exactly to Adam when the signal is uninformative. Empirically, cc_t achieves oscillation detection with F1=1.00 (vs. 0.45 for gradient norm), and GONO remains competitive with AdamW on MNIST (98.15%), CIFAR-10 (43.14%), and ResNet-18 (75.44%), establishing directional alignment as a theoretically grounded, practically actionable optimization signal. Code: https://github.com/victordaniel/gono-optimizer

analysis.tldr: 提出GONO优化器，利用梯度方向一致性作为互补信号，提升优化效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有优化器（如Adam、SGD）缺乏显式机制利用梯度方向的时间一致性，导致在平台、鞍点和真正收敛之间难以区分，损失下降缓慢。
analysis.problem: 如何利用梯度方向一致性作为优化信号，设计一种能自适应调整动量系数的优化器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现方向对齐与损失收敛可以解耦：优化器可能表现出近乎完美的方向一致性，但损失仍高或下降缓慢。
analysis.method: 提出GONO优化器，基于连续梯度余弦相似度cc_t自适应调整Adam的动量系数beta_1：方向一致时放大动量，振荡时抑制动量。
contributions: 形式化并验证了方向对齐与损失收敛解耦的现象。
提出GONO优化器，理论证明其收敛率与Adam相同，且在无信息时退化为Adam。
实验表明cc_t在振荡检测上F1=1.00，远优于梯度范数的0.45，且在多个基准上保持竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST（98.15%）、CIFAR-10（43.14%）和ResNet-18（75.44%）上测试，与AdamW竞争。
limitations: 实验仅在图像分类任务上验证，未涉及NLP或更大规模模型。
方向一致性信号在复杂优化场景中的鲁棒性有待进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GONO优化器，利用梯度方向一致性作为互补信号，提升优化效率。

papers.title: Solving Minimal Problems Without Matrix Inversion Using FFT-Based Interpolation
papers.abstract: Estimating camera geometry typically involves solving minimal problems formulated as systems of multivariate polynomial equations, which often pose computational challenges when using existing Gröbner-basis or resultant-based methods due to matrix inversion needed in the online solver. Here we propose a sampling-based, matrix inversion-free method that constructs the solvers using sparse hidden-variable resultants. The determinant polynomial in the hidden variable is efficiently reconstructed via inverse fast Fourier transform interpolation from sampled evaluations, avoiding symbolic expansion. Solving this polynomial yields the hidden variable, and the remaining unknowns are recovered by identifying rank-1 deficient submatrices and applying Cramer's rule. A greatest common divisor-based criterion ensures robust submatrix identification under noise. Experiments on diverse minimal problems demonstrate that the proposed solver achieves strong numerical stability and competitive runtime, particularly for small-scale problems, providing a practical alternative to traditional Gröbner-basis and resultant-based solvers.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于FFT插值的无矩阵求逆方法，用于高效求解相机几何中的最小问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统Gröbner基或结式方法求解相机几何最小问题时，在线求解器需要矩阵求逆，计算成本高且数值稳定性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何避免矩阵求逆，高效且数值稳定地求解由多元多项式方程组构成的最小问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于稀疏隐变量结式，通过逆FFT插值从采样评估中重构隐变量行列式多项式，避免符号展开；求解多项式得到隐变量后，利用秩1缺陷子矩阵和Cramer法则恢复其余未知量，并采用GCD准则鲁棒识别子矩阵。
contributions: 提出一种无矩阵求逆的采样求解方法，适用于相机几何最小问题。
利用FFT插值高效重构隐变量行列式多项式，避免符号计算。
引入GCD准则增强噪声下子矩阵识别的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种最小问题上验证，该方法数值稳定性强，运行时间有竞争力，尤其适用于小规模问题。
limitations: 可能对大规模问题效率优势不明显。
依赖采样和插值参数的选择。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于FFT插值的无矩阵求逆方法，用于高效求解相机几何中的最小问题。

papers.title: Coordination Matters: Evaluation of Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) benchmarks commonly emphasize aggregate outcomes such as return, success rate, or completion time. While essential, these metrics often fail to reveal how agents coordinate, particularly in settings where agents, tasks, and joint assignment choices scale combinatorially. We propose a coordination-aware evaluation perspective that supplements return with process-level diagnostics. We instantiate this perspective using STAT, a controlled commitment-constrained spatial task-allocation testbed that systematically varies agents, tasks, and environment size while holding observation access and task rules fixed. We evaluate six representative value-based MARL methods across varying levels of centralization. Our results show that similar return trends can reflect distinct coordination mechanisms, including differences in redundant assignment, assignment diversity, and task-completion efficiency. We find that in commitment-constrained task allocation, performance under scale is shaped not only by nominal action-space size, but also by assignment pressure, sparse decision opportunities, and redundant choices among interdependent agents. Our findings motivate coordination-aware evaluation as a necessary complement to return-based benchmarking for cooperative MARL.

analysis.tldr: 提出协调感知评估视角，揭示MARL方法在相同回报下可能隐藏不同的协调机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MARL基准主要关注回报等聚合指标，无法揭示智能体如何协调，尤其在任务规模组合爆炸时。
analysis.problem: 如何设计评估方法以揭示MARL方法在协调机制上的差异，而不仅仅是回报。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相似回报趋势可能对应不同的协调机制，如冗余分配、分配多样性和任务完成效率的差异。
analysis.method: 提出协调感知评估视角，并实例化为STAT测试平台，系统改变智能体、任务和环境规模，评估六种基于价值的MARL方法。
contributions: 提出协调感知评估视角，补充回报指标的过程级诊断。
构建STAT测试平台，系统评估MARL方法在承诺约束任务分配中的协调行为。
发现回报相似时协调机制可能不同，强调协调感知评估的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 在STAT测试平台上评估六种代表性基于价值的MARL方法，改变集中化程度和规模。
limitations: 仅评估基于价值的方法，未涵盖策略梯度等方法。
测试平台为特定任务分配场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出协调感知评估视角，揭示MARL方法在相同回报下可能隐藏不同的协调机制。

papers.title: R$^3$L: Reasoning 3D Layouts from Relative Spatial Relations
papers.abstract: Relative spatial relations provide a compact representation of spatial structure and are fundamental to relative spatial reasoning in 3D layout generation. Recent works leverage Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to infer such relations, but the inferred relations are often unreliable and are typically handled with post-hoc heuristics. In this paper, we propose R$^3$L, a general framework that improves the reliability and consistency of relative spatial reasoning for 3D layout generation. Our key motivation is that multi-hop reasoning requires repeated reference-frame transformations, which accumulate errors in inferred relations and lead to semantic and metric drift. To mitigate this, we propose invariant spatial decomposition to break coupled relation chains, and consistent spatial imagination to promote self-consistency through an imagine-and-revise loop. We further introduce supportive spatial optimization to ease pose optimization via global-to-local coordinate re-parameterization. Extensive experiments across diverse scene types and instructions demonstrate that R$^3$L produces more physically feasible and semantically consistent layouts. Notably, our analysis shows that resolving frame-induced inconsistencies is crucial for reliable multi-hop relative spatial reasoning. The code is available at https://github.com/Neal2020GitHub/R3L.

analysis.tldr: 提出R³L框架，通过不变空间分解和一致空间想象提升3D布局生成中相对空间推理的可靠性和一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM推断相对空间关系不可靠，且多跳推理中参考系变换累积误差导致语义和度量漂移，缺乏系统性的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何提升3D布局生成中多跳相对空间推理的可靠性和一致性，避免参考系变换带来的误差累积。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多跳推理中重复的参考系变换导致推断关系误差累积，引起语义和度量漂移。
analysis.method: 提出R³L框架，包含不变空间分解（解耦耦合关系链）、一致空间想象（想象-修正循环促进自一致性）和支持空间优化（全局到局部坐标重参数化简化位姿优化）。
contributions: 提出R³L框架，系统解决多跳相对空间推理中的参考系不一致问题。
引入不变空间分解和一致空间想象，提升推理的可靠性和一致性。
通过支持空间优化简化位姿优化，生成更物理可行和语义一致的布局。
analysis.experiments: 在多种场景类型和指令上进行实验，结果表明R³L生成更物理可行和语义一致的布局。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练MLLM的初始推理质量。
复杂场景下想象-修正循环的收敛性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出R³L框架，通过不变空间分解和一致空间想象提升3D布局生成中相对空间推理的可靠性和一致性。

papers.title: Continuous Latent Diffusion Language Model
papers.abstract: Large language models have achieved remarkable success under the autoregressive paradigm, yet high-quality text generation need not be tied to a fixed left-to-right order. Existing alternatives still struggle to jointly achieve generation efficiency, scalable representation learning, and effective global semantic modeling. We propose Cola DLM, a hierarchical latent diffusion language model that frames text generation through hierarchical information decomposition. Cola DLM first learns a stable text-to-latent mapping with a Text VAE, then models a global semantic prior in continuous latent space with a block-causal DiT, and finally generates text through conditional decoding. From a unified Markov-path perspective, its diffusion process performs latent prior transport rather than token-level observation recovery, thereby separating global semantic organization from local textual realization. This design yields a more flexible non-autoregressive inductive bias, supports semantic compression and prior fitting in continuous space, and naturally extends to other continuous modalities. Through experiments spanning 4 research questions, 8 benchmarks, strictly matched ~2B-parameter autoregressive and LLaDA baselines, and scaling curves up to about 2000 EFLOPs, we identify an effective overall configuration of Cola DLM and verify its strong scaling behavior for text generation. Taken together, the results establish hierarchical continuous latent prior modeling as a principled alternative to strictly token-level language modeling, where generation quality and scaling behavior may better reflect model capability than likelihood, while also suggesting a concrete path toward unified modeling across discrete text and continuous modalities.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层连续潜扩散语言模型Cola DLM，通过层次化信息分解实现灵活的非自回归文本生成，并展现出强扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归语言模型虽成功但受限于固定从左到右生成顺序，现有替代方法难以同时兼顾生成效率、可扩展表征学习和全局语义建模。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种非自回归文本生成方法，既能高效生成高质量文本，又能有效建模全局语义，并支持扩展到连续模态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出分层潜扩散语言模型Cola DLM，包含三个组件：Text VAE学习稳定的文本到潜空间映射，块因果DiT在连续潜空间中建模全局语义先验，条件解码器生成文本。扩散过程执行潜先验传输而非token级观测恢复，分离全局语义组织与局部文本实现。
contributions: 提出Cola DLM，一种分层连续潜扩散语言模型，通过层次化信息分解实现灵活的非自回归文本生成。
从统一马尔可夫路径视角揭示扩散过程执行潜先验传输，分离全局语义与局部文本实现。
在8个基准、严格匹配约2B参数的自回归和LLaDA基线以及高达约2000 EFLOPs的扩展曲线上验证了Cola DLM的有效配置和强扩展行为。
analysis.experiments: 在4个研究问题、8个基准上，与严格匹配约2B参数的自回归和LLaDA基线对比，并展示了高达约2000 EFLOPs的扩展曲线。
limitations: 可能对Text VAE的编码质量敏感，影响整体生成效果。
分层结构可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层连续潜扩散语言模型Cola DLM，通过层次化信息分解实现灵活的非自回归文本生成，并展现出强扩展性。

papers.title: Ex Ante Evaluation of AI-Induced Idea Diversity Collapse
papers.abstract: Creative AI systems are typically evaluated at the level of individual utility, yet creative outputs are consumed in populations: an idea loses value when many others produce similar ones. This creates an evaluation blind spot, as AI can improve individual outputs while increasing population-level crowding. We introduce a human-relative framework for benchmarking AI-induced human diversity collapse without requiring human-AI interaction data, providing an ex ante protocol to estimate crowding risk from model-only generations and matched unaided human baselines. By modeling ideas as congestible resources, we show that source-level crowding is identifiable from within-distribution comparisons, yielding an excess-crowding coefficient $Δ$ and a human-relative diversity ratio $ρ$. We show that $ρ\ge1$ is the no-excess-crowding parity condition and connect $Δ$ to an adoption game with exposure-dependent redundancy costs. Across short stories, marketing slogans, and alternative-uses tasks, three frontier LLMs fall below parity across crowding kernels. Estimates stabilize with feasible model-only sample sizes. Importantly, generation-protocol variants show that crowding can be reduced through targeted design, making diversity collapse an actionable, development-time evaluation target for population-aware creative AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需人机交互数据即可评估AI导致的人类创意多样性塌缩的框架，发现前沿LLM在多个创意任务中均低于多样性平价线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有创意AI系统仅评估个体效用，忽略了群体层面创意同质化导致的集体价值损失，缺乏在开发阶段预测多样性塌缩风险的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖人机交互数据的情况下，预先评估AI生成内容对人群创意多样性的挤压效应？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出AI可能提升个体输出质量的同时加剧群体层面的拥挤效应。
analysis.method: 提出人类相对框架，将创意视为可拥挤资源，通过模型生成样本与无辅助人类基线进行分布内比较，计算超额拥挤系数Δ和人类相对多样性比ρ，并建立ρ≥1的无超额拥挤平价条件。
contributions: 提出无需人机交互数据的AI诱导多样性塌缩评估框架，包含超额拥挤系数Δ和人类相对多样性比ρ两个指标。
通过短故事、营销标语和替代用途任务实验，发现三个前沿LLM均低于多样性平价线，且估计在可行样本量下稳定。
证明通过针对性生成协议设计可降低拥挤效应，使多样性塌缩成为可操作的开发阶段评估目标。
analysis.experiments: 在短故事、营销标语和替代用途任务上，使用三个前沿LLM进行实验，发现所有模型均低于ρ≥1的平价条件，且估计在可行模型生成样本量下稳定。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 框架依赖无辅助人类基线，可能无法完全反映真实人机协作场景。
拥挤核的选择可能影响指标结果，需进一步验证其鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需人机交互数据即可评估AI导致的人类创意多样性塌缩的框架，发现前沿LLM在多个创意任务中均低于多样性平价线。

papers.title: MedHorizon: Towards Long-context Medical Video Understanding in the Wild
papers.abstract: Medical multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced image understanding and short-video analysis, but real clinical review often requires full-procedure video understanding. Unlike general long videos, medical procedures contain highly redundant anatomical views, while decisive evidence is temporally sparse, spatially subtle, and context dependent. Existing benchmarks often assume this evidence has already been localized through images, short clips, or pre-segmented videos, leaving the retrieval-before-reasoning problem under-tested. We introduce MedHorizon, an in-the-wild benchmark for long-context medical video understanding. MedHorizon preserves 759 hours of full-length clinical procedures and provides 1,253 evidence-grounded multiple-choice questionsthat jointly evaluate sparse evidence understanding and multi-hop clinical reasoning. Its evidence is extremely sparse, with only 0.166% evidence frames on average, requiring models to search noisy procedural streams before interpreting and aggregating findings. We evaluate representative general-domain, medical-domain, and long-video MLLMs. The best model reaches only 41.1% accuracy, showing that current systems remain far from robust full-procedure understanding. Further analysis yields four key findings: performance does not scale reliably with more frames, evidence retrieval and clinical interpretation remain primary bottlenecks; these bottlenecks are rooted in weak procedural reasoning and attention drift under redundancy, and generic sampling methods only partially balances local detail with global coverage. MedHorizon provides a rigorous testbed for MLLMs that retrieve sparse evidence and reason over complete clinical workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出长上下文医疗视频理解基准MedHorizon，揭示现有MLLM在稀疏证据检索与多跳推理上的严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实临床审查需要全程视频理解，但现有基准依赖已定位的图像或短片段，未测试检索-推理联合问题。
analysis.problem: 长医疗视频中决定性证据时空稀疏、上下文依赖，现有MLLM难以在噪声流程中检索并推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 证据帧仅占0.166%，最佳模型准确率仅41.1%；性能不随帧数可靠提升，证据检索和临床解释是主要瓶颈，根源在于弱过程推理和冗余下的注意力漂移。
analysis.method: 构建包含759小时完整临床程序、1253个基于证据的多选题的基准MedHorizon，评估模型稀疏证据理解与多跳临床推理能力。
contributions: 提出首个野外长上下文医疗视频理解基准MedHorizon，包含759小时完整程序。
揭示现有MLLM在稀疏证据检索与多跳推理上的严重不足，最佳模型仅41.1%准确率。
分析得出四个关键发现：性能不随帧数可靠扩展、检索与解释是主要瓶颈、瓶颈源于弱过程推理和注意力漂移、通用采样方法仅部分平衡局部与全局。
analysis.experiments: 评估了通用域、医学域和长视频MLLM，最佳模型准确率41.1%，并进行了深入分析。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖特定类型医疗程序，泛化性待验证。
未提供模型改进方案，仅诊断问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出长上下文医疗视频理解基准MedHorizon，揭示现有MLLM在稀疏证据检索与多跳推理上的严重不足。

papers.title: Sparkle: Realizing Lively Instruction-Guided Video Background Replacement via Decoupled Guidance
papers.abstract: In recent years, open-source efforts like Senorita-2M have propelled video editing toward natural language instruction. However, current publicly available datasets predominantly focus on local editing or style transfer, which largely preserve the original scene structure and are easier to scale. In contrast, Background Replacement, a task central to creative applications such as film production and advertising, requires synthesizing entirely new, temporally consistent scenes while maintaining accurate foreground-background interactions, making large-scale data generation significantly more challenging. Consequently, this complex task remains largely underexplored due to a scarcity of high-quality training data. This gap is evident in poorly performing state-of-the-art models, e.g., Kiwi-Edit, because the primary open-source dataset that contains this task, i.e., OpenVE-3M, frequently produces static, unnatural backgrounds. In this paper, we trace this quality degradation to a lack of precise background guidance during data synthesis. Accordingly, we design a scalable pipeline that generates foreground and background guidance in a decoupled manner with strict quality filtering. Building on this pipeline, we introduce Sparkle, a dataset of ~140K video pairs spanning five common background-change themes, alongside Sparkle-Bench, the largest evaluation benchmark tailored for background replacement to date. Experiments demonstrate that our dataset and the model trained on it achieve substantially better performance than all existing baselines on both OpenVE-Bench and Sparkle-Bench. Our proposed dataset, benchmark, and model are fully open-sourced at https://showlab.github.io/Sparkle/.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦引导的数据合成流水线，构建高质量视频背景替换数据集Sparkle和评测基准Sparkle-Bench，显著提升模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频背景替换在影视制作和广告中至关重要，但现有公开数据集主要聚焦局部编辑或风格迁移，缺乏高质量背景替换数据，导致模型生成背景静态、不自然。
analysis.problem: 现有视频背景替换任务因缺乏高质量训练数据而性能不佳，主要原因是数据合成过程中缺乏精确的背景引导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有开源数据集OpenVE-3M生成的背景常出现静态、不自然的问题，根源在于数据合成时缺乏精确的背景引导。
analysis.method: 设计可扩展的流水线，以解耦方式生成前景和背景引导，并经过严格质量过滤，构建包含约14万视频对的Sparkle数据集和最大评测基准Sparkle-Bench。
contributions: 提出解耦引导的数据合成流水线，解决背景替换数据质量低的问题。
构建Sparkle数据集（~140K视频对）和Sparkle-Bench评测基准，覆盖5种常见背景更换主题。
实验证明基于该数据集训练的模型在OpenVE-Bench和Sparkle-Bench上显著优于现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenVE-Bench和Sparkle-Bench上评估，所提数据集及训练模型性能显著优于所有现有基线。
limitations: 数据集规模相对有限（~140K），可能无法覆盖所有复杂场景。
方法依赖解耦引导，可能对前景-背景交互极复杂的场景效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦引导的数据合成流水线，构建高质量视频背景替换数据集Sparkle和评测基准Sparkle-Bench，显著提升模型性能。

papers.title: Why Do DiT Editors Drift? Plug-and-Play Low Frequency Alignment in VAE Latent Space
papers.abstract: Recent advances in diffusion transformers (DiTs) have enabled promising single-turn image editing capabilities. However, multi-turn editing often leads to progressive semantic drift and quality degradation.In this work, we study this problem from a latent-space frequency perspective by decomposing the editing process into two functional components: VAE and DiT. Through systematic analysis in the VAE latent space, we uncover that the DiT introduces dominant low-frequency drift that accumulates as semantic misalignment across editing rounds, while the VAE contributes comparatively stable reconstruction bias.Based on this insight, we propose VAE-LFA (Low Frequency Alignment), a training-free, plug-and-play method that performs alignment in VAE latent space. VAE-LFA decomposes latent discrepancies across editing rounds via low-pass filtering, and aligns low-frequency statistics to an exponential moving average of previous rounds, effectively suppressing accumulated semantic drift while preserving high-frequency details.Our method requires no retraining, ground-truth priors, or access to diffusion parameters, making it applicable to both white-box and black-box DiT editors. For white-box models, VAE-LFA is seamlessly integrated into the editing pipeline by eliminating redundant VAE round trips; for black-box models, it operates via an off-the-shelf VAE to perform inter-round latent alignment.Extensive experiments demonstrate that VAE-LFA improves semantic consistency and visual fidelity across diverse multi-turn editing scenarios, including both controlled and in-the-wild images.

analysis.tldr: 提出VAE-LFA，一种无需训练的低频对齐方法，解决DiT多轮编辑中的语义漂移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮图像编辑中，扩散变换器（DiT）存在渐进式语义漂移和质量退化，影响实际应用。
analysis.problem: 多轮编辑中DiT引入的低频漂移导致语义错位累积。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在VAE潜空间分析发现，DiT主导的低频漂移随编辑轮次累积，而VAE贡献稳定的重建偏差。
analysis.method: VAE-LFA：通过低通滤波分解潜空间差异，用指数移动平均对齐低频统计量，无需训练或访问扩散参数。
contributions: 从频率角度揭示DiT多轮编辑漂移的根源。
提出无需训练、即插即用的VAE-LFA方法，适用于白盒和黑盒DiT编辑器。
analysis.experiments: 在多种多轮编辑场景（包括受控和野外图像）上验证了语义一致性和视觉保真度的提升。
limitations: 可能依赖VAE的潜空间特性，对非VAE架构不适用。
低频对齐可能限制某些需要大幅低频变化的编辑。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VAE-LFA，一种无需训练的低频对齐方法，解决DiT多轮编辑中的语义漂移问题。

papers.title: SpatialEpiBench: Benchmarking Spatial Information and Epidemic Priors in Forecasting
papers.abstract: Accurate epidemic forecasting is crucial for public health response, resource allocation, and outbreak intervention, but remains difficult with sparse, noisy, and highly non-stationary data. Because epidemics unfold across interacting regions, spatiotemporal methods are natural candidates for improving forecasts. Despite growing interest in spatial information, no standardized benchmark exists, and current evaluations often use simple chronological train-test splits that do not reflect real-time forecasting practice. We address this gap with SpatialEpiBench, a challenging benchmark for spatiotemporal epidemic forecasting in realistic public-health settings. SpatialEpiBench includes 11 epidemic datasets with standardized rolling evaluations and outbreak-specific metrics. We evaluate adjacency-informed forecasting models with widely used epidemic priors that adapt general models to epidemiology, but find that most methods underperform a simple last-value baseline from 1 day to 1 month ahead, even during outbreaks and with these priors. We identify three major failure modes: (1) poor outbreak anticipation, (2) difficulty handling sparsity and noise, and (3) limited utility of common geographic adjacency for epidemiological spatial information. We release benchmark data, code, and instructions at https://github.com/Rachel-Lyu/SpatialEpiBench to support development of operationally useful epidemic forecasting models.

analysis.tldr: 提出时空流行病预测基准SpatialEpiBench，发现多数方法在滚动评估中不如简单基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 流行病预测对公共卫生响应至关重要，但现有评估缺乏标准化基准，且简单的时间划分不符合实时预测实践。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一的时空流行病预测基准，现有评估方法无法反映真实预测场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多数方法在1天至1个月的滚动预测中不如简单基线，存在三大失败模式：爆发预测差、处理稀疏噪声数据困难、地理邻接信息效用有限。
analysis.method: 构建包含11个流行病数据集的基准，采用标准化滚动评估和爆发特定指标，并引入流行病先验的邻接感知模型。
contributions: 提出首个标准化时空流行病预测基准SpatialEpiBench，包含11个数据集和滚动评估协议。
系统评估现有方法，揭示其性能瓶颈和三大失败模式。
公开数据集、代码和指南以促进实用模型开发。
analysis.experiments: 在11个数据集上评估多种邻接感知模型和流行病先验，与简单基线对比。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有流行病类型或区域。
未提出新方法解决失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时空流行病预测基准SpatialEpiBench，发现多数方法在滚动评估中不如简单基线。

papers.title: Market-Alignment Risk in Pricing Agents: Trace Diagnostics and Trace-Prior RL under Hidden Competitor State
papers.abstract: Outcome metrics can certify the wrong behavior. We study this failure in a two-hotel revenue-management simulator where Hotel A trains an agent against a fixed rule-based revenue-management competitor, Hotel B. A standard learning agent can obtain near-reference revenue per available room (RevPAR) while failing to learn market-like yield management: it sells too aggressively, undercuts, or collapses to modal price buckets. We diagnose this as a Goodhart-style failure under partial observability. Hotel A cannot observe the competitor's remaining inventory, booking curve, or pricing rule, so the same Hotel A-visible state maps to multiple plausible Hotel B prices. Deterministic value-based RL and deterministic copying collapse this unresolved uncertainty into shortcut behavior. We introduce a trace-level diagnostic protocol using RevPAR, occupancy, ADR, full price-bucket distributions, L1/JS distances, and seed-level confidence intervals. The verified repair is Trace-Prior RL: learn a distributional market prior from lagged market traces, then train a stochastic pricing policy with a RevPAR reward and a KL penalty to the learned prior. The final policy matches Hotel B's RevPAR, occupancy, ADR, and price distribution within seed-level uncertainty, while still optimizing Hotel A's own reward. We argue that the contribution is not a new optimizer and not a hotel-pricing leaderboard, but a reproducible failure-and-repair recipe for agentic systems where scalar rewards are easy to game and the intended behavior is only visible in traces. A key finding is that higher exact action accuracy can worsen aggregate trace alignment when the target is distributional.

analysis.tldr: 提出Trace-Prior RL方法，通过分布先验和KL惩罚解决定价智能体在隐藏竞争对手状态下的市场对齐风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 在部分可观测环境中，基于标量奖励的强化学习智能体可能学会表面正确的行为（如RevPAR达标），但实际策略与市场预期严重偏离（如过度降价），导致Goodhart式失败。
analysis.problem: 解决定价智能体在无法观测竞争对手库存、定价规则等隐藏状态时，因不确定性坍缩为捷径行为而导致的奖励游戏化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准RL智能体在部分可观测下会坍缩为确定性捷径行为（如激进降价），导致价格分布与市场不一致；更高的动作准确率反而可能恶化整体轨迹对齐。
analysis.method: Trace-Prior RL：从滞后市场轨迹中学习分布性市场先验，然后使用RevPAR奖励和KL散度惩罚训练随机定价策略，使策略分布与先验对齐。
contributions: 提出轨迹级诊断协议，利用RevPAR、入住率、ADR、价格桶分布、L1/JS距离和种子级置信区间检测市场对齐失败
提出Trace-Prior RL修复方法，通过分布先验和KL惩罚实现市场对齐，同时优化自身奖励
analysis.experiments: 在双酒店收益管理模拟器中进行实验，与固定规则竞争对手对比，验证方法在RevPAR、入住率、ADR和价格分布上匹配对手且保持自身优化。
limitations: 仅验证了双酒店场景，未扩展到多智能体或更复杂市场
依赖滞后市场轨迹的可用性，可能不适用于完全无历史数据的场景
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Trace-Prior RL方法，通过分布先验和KL惩罚解决定价智能体在隐藏竞争对手状态下的市场对齐风险。

papers.title: Process Matters more than Output for Distinguishing Humans from Machines
papers.abstract: Reliable human-machine discrimination is becoming increasingly important as large language models and autonomous agents are deployed in online settings. Existing approaches evaluate whether a system can produce behavior or responses indistinguishable from those of a human, following the emphasis on outputs as a criterion for intelligence proposed by Alan Turing. Cognitive science offers an alternative perspective: evaluating the process by which behavior is produced. To test whether cognitive processes can reliably distinguish humans from machines, we introduce CogCAPTCHA30, a battery of 30 cognitive tasks designed to elicit diagnostic process-level features even when task performance is matched. Across the battery, process-level features provide stronger discriminative signal than performance metrics alone, reliably distinguishing humans from agents even under output matching (mean process-feature classifier AUC = 0.88). To evaluate agentic process differences, we compare off-the-shelf frontier agents (Claude Sonnet 4.5, GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro), Centaur (a language model fine-tuned on 10.7M human decisions), and two task-specific fine-tuning approaches applied to Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct: action-level supervised fine-tuning (A-SFT) and process-level fine-tuning (P-SFT), which directly optimizes process features. Broad fine-tuning on human decisions improves human-like task processes relative to off-the-shelf agents, while task-specific process-level supervision further improves behavioral mimicry. However, this advantage diminishes under cross-task transfer when supervised process targets do not naturally generalize across tasks. Explicit process-level supervision can improve human behavioral mimicry, but only if appropriate task-specific process representations are available, highlighting process specification as a bottleneck for achieving human-like cognitive processes in machines.

analysis.tldr: 提出CogCAPTCHA30认知任务集，发现过程特征比输出更能区分人类与AI，并探索过程级微调对行为模仿的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM和自主代理在线上场景的部署，可靠的人机区分变得日益重要。现有方法主要关注输出是否与人类无异（图灵测试），但认知科学表明过程特征可能提供更强的区分信号。
analysis.problem: 如何利用认知过程特征而非仅输出结果来可靠区分人类与机器，并探索使机器行为更接近人类认知过程的方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出过程级特征比性能指标提供更强的区分信号（平均AUC=0.88），且任务特定的过程级微调能改善行为模仿，但跨任务迁移时优势减弱，表明过程规范是实现类人认知过程的瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建包含30个认知任务的CogCAPTCHA30测试集，提取过程级特征进行分类；对比多种代理（Claude Sonnet 4.5、GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro、Centaur以及基于Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct的动作级微调A-SFT和过程级微调P-SFT）。
contributions: 提出CogCAPTCHA30，一个包含30个认知任务的测试集，用于评估过程级特征在人机区分中的有效性。
实验证明过程级特征比输出性能指标更可靠（平均AUC=0.88），即使在输出匹配条件下。
探索了过程级微调（P-SFT）对行为模仿的影响，并指出过程规范是主要瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及平均过程特征分类器AUC=0.88，以及不同代理的比较。
limitations: 过程级微调在跨任务迁移时效果下降，表明任务特定过程表示难以泛化。
仅测试了有限数量的代理和任务，可能无法涵盖所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CogCAPTCHA30认知任务集，发现过程特征比输出更能区分人类与AI，并探索过程级微调对行为模仿的影响。

papers.title: On the Implicit Reward Overfitting and the Low-rank Dynamics in RLVR
papers.abstract: Recent extensive research has demonstrated that the enhanced reasoning capabilities acquired by models through Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) are primarily concentrated within the rank-1 components. Predicated on this observation, we employed Periodic Rank-1 Substitution and identified a counterintuitive phenomenon: RLVR may exhibit implicit reward overfitting to the training dataset. Specifically, the model can achieve satisfactory performance on the test set even when its rewards remain relatively low during the training process. Furthermore, we characterize three distinct properties of RL training: (1) The effective rank-1 component in RLVR don't maintain other model knowledge except mathematical reasoning capability. (2) RLVR fundamentally functions by optimizing a specific singular spectrum. The distribution of singular values of almost all linear layers in RLVR-trained model behaves like heavy-tailed distribution. (3) the left singular vectors associated with rank-1 components demonstrate a stronger alignment tendency during training, which echoes the discovery that RLVR is optimizing sampling efficiency in essence. Taken together, our findings and analysis further reveal how RLVR shapes model parameters and offer potential insights for improving existing RL paradigms or other training paradigms to implement continual learning.

analysis.tldr: RLVR 存在隐式奖励过拟合，且模型参数变化集中在秩-1 成分上，呈现低秩动力学特性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究观察到 RLVR 增强的推理能力主要集中在秩-1 成分，但对其训练动态和潜在过拟合现象缺乏深入理解。
analysis.problem: 揭示 RLVR 训练中隐式奖励过拟合现象及其背后的低秩动力学机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现 RLVR 存在隐式奖励过拟合：即使训练奖励较低，测试集性能仍可令人满意；秩-1 成分仅保留数学推理能力；线性层奇异值分布呈重尾分布；左奇异向量在训练中表现出更强的对齐趋势。
analysis.method: 采用周期性秩-1 替换（Periodic Rank-1 Substitution）方法进行实验分析，并通过对奇异值分布、对齐趋势等的观察来刻画 RLVR 的动力学特性。
contributions: 发现并命名了 RLVR 中的隐式奖励过拟合现象。
刻画了 RLVR 训练的三个关键性质：秩-1 成分的功能专一性、奇异谱优化特性、以及左奇异向量的对齐趋势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定模型和任务上验证，泛化性未知。
未提供缓解隐式过拟合的具体方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RLVR 存在隐式奖励过拟合，且模型参数变化集中在秩-1 成分上，呈现低秩动力学特性。

papers.title: Agentic AIs Are the Missing Paradigm for Out-of-Distribution Generalization in Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Foundation models (FMs) are increasingly deployed in open-world settings where distribution shift is the rule rather than the exception. The out-of-distribution (OOD) phenomena they face -- knowledge boundaries, capability ceilings, compositional shifts, and open-ended task variation -- differ in kind from the settings that have shaped prior OOD research, and are further complicated because the pretraining and post-training distributions of modern FMs are often only partially observed. Our position is that OOD for foundation models is a structurally distinct problem that cannot be solved within the prevailing model-centric paradigm, and that agentic systems constitute the missing paradigm required to address it. We defend this claim through four steps. First, we give a stage-aware formalization of OOD that accommodates partially observed multi-stage training distributions. Second, we prove a parameter coverage ceiling: there exist practically relevant inputs that no model-centric method (training-time or test-time) can handle within tolerance $\varepsilon$, for reasons intrinsic to parameter-based representation. Third, we characterize agentic OOD systems by four structural properties -- perception, strategy selection, external action, and closed-loop verification -- and show that they strictly extend the reachable set beyond the ceiling. Fourth, we respond to seven counterarguments, conceding two, and outline a research agenda. We do not claim that agentic methods subsume model-centric ones; we argue that the two are complementary, and that progress on FM-OOD requires explicit recognition of the agentic paradigm as a first-class research direction.

analysis.tldr: 提出智能体系统是解决基础模型分布外泛化缺失的关键范式。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础模型在开放世界部署中面临知识边界、能力上限、组合偏移等新型分布偏移，现有模型中心方法无法解决。
analysis.problem: 基础模型的分布外泛化问题在结构上不同于传统OOD，需要新范式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论证明了模型中心方法的参数覆盖上限。
analysis.method: 通过四步论证：阶段感知OOD形式化、参数覆盖上限证明、智能体OOD系统四属性（感知、策略选择、外部动作、闭环验证）、反驳七个反论。
contributions: 提出阶段感知的OOD形式化，适应部分观测的多阶段训练分布。
证明模型中心方法存在参数覆盖上限，智能体系统可严格扩展可达集。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证验证，仅理论论证。
智能体系统的实际实现和效率可能面临挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出智能体系统是解决基础模型分布外泛化缺失的关键范式。

papers.title: Learning to Cut: Reinforcement Learning for Benders Decomposition
papers.abstract: Benders decomposition (BD) is a widely used solution approach for solving two-stage stochastic programs arising in real-world decision-making under uncertainty. However, it often suffers from slow convergence as the master problem grows with an increasing number of cuts. In this paper, we propose Reinforcement Learning for BD (RLBD), a framework that adaptively selects cuts using a neural network-based stochastic policy. The policy is trained using a policy gradient method via the REINFORCE algorithm. We evaluate the proposed approach on a two-stage stochastic electric vehicle charging station location problem and compare it with vanilla BD and LearnBD, a supervised learning approach that classifies cuts using a support vector machine. Numerical results demonstrate that RLBD achieves substantial improvements in computational efficiency and exhibits strong generalization to problems with similar structures but varying data inputs and decision variable dimensions.

analysis.tldr: 用强化学习自适应选择Benders分解中的割平面，显著提升计算效率。
analysis.research_motivation: Benders分解在求解两阶段随机规划时，随着割平面数量增加，主问题规模膨胀导致收敛缓慢，传统方法效率不足。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地选择Benders分解中的割平面以加速收敛。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RLBD框架，使用神经网络随机策略选择割平面，通过REINFORCE算法训练策略。
contributions: 首次将强化学习应用于Benders分解的割平面选择
在电动汽车充电站选址问题上验证了显著的计算效率提升和泛化能力
analysis.experiments: 在电动汽车充电站选址问题上与vanilla BD和LearnBD对比，RLBD在计算效率上有显著提升，并能泛化到不同数据输入和决策变量维度的问题。
limitations: 仅测试了单一问题类型（电动汽车充电站选址）
未与更多先进的割平面选择方法对比
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用强化学习自适应选择Benders分解中的割平面，显著提升计算效率。

papers.title: DCR: Counterfactual Attractor Guidance for Rare Compositional Generation
papers.abstract: Diffusion models generate realistic visual content, yet often fail to produce rare but plausible compositions. When prompted with combinations that are valid but underrepresented in training data, such as a snowy beach or a rainbow at night, the generation process frequently collapses toward more common alternatives. We identify this failure mode as default completion bias, where denoising trajectories are implicitly attracted toward high-frequency semantic configurations. Existing guidance mechanisms do not explicitly model this competing tendency and therefore struggle to prevent such collapse. We introduce Default Completion Repulsion (DCR), a training-free framework that explicitly models and suppresses default completion behavior. DCR constructs a counterfactual attractor by relaxing the rare compositional factor while preserving surrounding semantics, inducing an alternative denoising trajectory reflecting the model's preferred completion. We define the discrepancy between target and attractor trajectories as a counterfactual drift, and propose a projection-based repulsion mechanism that removes guidance components aligned with this drift direction. This suppresses undesired frequent completions while preserving other semantic components. DCR operates entirely within the standard diffusion sampling process without retraining or architectural modification. Experiments on rare compositional prompts show that DCR improves compositional fidelity while maintaining visual quality. Our analysis further shows that the framework exposes and counteracts intrinsic model biases, offering a new perspective on controllable generation beyond explicit constraint enforcement.

analysis.tldr: 提出无训练框架DCR，通过反事实吸引子投影排斥机制抑制扩散模型的默认完成偏差，提升罕见组合生成保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在生成训练数据中罕见但合理的组合（如雪地海滩、夜间彩虹）时，常因默认完成偏差而坍缩为常见组合，现有引导机制无法显式建模这种竞争倾向。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练或修改架构的前提下，抑制扩散模型在罕见组合生成中的默认完成偏差，提升组合保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出默认完成偏差：去噪轨迹被隐式吸引向高频语义配置，导致罕见组合生成失败。
analysis.method: 构建反事实吸引子（放松罕见组合因子，保留周围语义），定义目标与吸引子轨迹的差异为反事实漂移，通过基于投影的排斥机制移除与该漂移方向对齐的引导分量。
contributions: 首次识别并形式化扩散模型中的默认完成偏差。
提出无训练框架DCR，通过反事实吸引子投影排斥机制抑制该偏差。
实验证明DCR在罕见组合提示上提升组合保真度且保持视觉质量。
analysis.experiments: 在罕见组合提示上评估，DCR提升了组合保真度并保持了视觉质量。摘要未提供具体数据集或指标数值。
limitations: 可能依赖反事实吸引子的构造质量。
未在多种扩散模型架构上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无训练框架DCR，通过反事实吸引子投影排斥机制抑制扩散模型的默认完成偏差，提升罕见组合生成保真度。

papers.title: Is One Layer Enough? Understanding Inference Dynamics in Tabular Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Transformer-based tabular foundation models (TFMs) dominate small to medium tabular predictive benchmark tasks, yet their inference mechanisms remain largely unexplored. We present the first large-scale mechanistic study of layerwise dynamics in 6 state-of-the-art tabular in-context learning models. We explore how predictions emerge across depth, identify distinct stages of inference and reveal latent-space dynamics that differ from those of language models. Our findings indicate substantial depthwise redundancy across multiple models, suggesting iterative refinement with overlapping computations during inference stages. Guided by these insights, we design a proof-of-concept, looped single-layer model that uses only 20% of the original model's parameters while achieving comparable performance. The code is available at https://github.com/amirbalef/is_one_layer_enough.

analysis.tldr: 表格基础模型推理深度存在冗余，单层循环模型即可达到相近性能。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer表格基础模型在中小型表格预测任务中表现优异，但其推理机制尚未被深入理解，缺乏对层间动态的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 探究表格基础模型中预测如何随深度涌现，以及是否存在深度冗余。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现多个模型存在显著的深度冗余，推理过程呈现迭代精炼特征，且潜在空间动态与语言模型不同。
analysis.method: 对6种先进表格上下文学习模型进行大规模机制性研究，分析层间动态，并基于冗余发现设计单层循环模型。
contributions: 首次大规模机制性研究表格基础模型的层间推理动态
揭示深度冗余和迭代精炼的推理阶段
提出仅用20%参数的单层循环模型，性能相当
analysis.experiments: 在6种先进模型上分析层间动态，并验证单层循环模型性能。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对表格上下文学习模型，可能不适用于其他类型
单层循环模型的具体性能对比细节未在摘要中给出
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 表格基础模型推理深度存在冗余，单层循环模型即可达到相近性能。

papers.title: FreeSpec: Training-Free Long Video Generation via Singular-Spectrum Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Video diffusion models perform well in short-video synthesis, but their training-free extension to long videos often suffers from content drift, temporal inconsistency, and over-smoothed dynamics. Existing methods improve temporal consistency by combining a global branch with a local branch, but they often further decompose appearance consistency and temporal dynamics within each branch using predefined criteria. This assignment is unreliable when appearance and action progression are tightly coupled, such as in camera motion and sequential motion. We analyze the video temporal extension issue from a singular-spectrum perspective and show that enlarged self-attention windows induce spectral concentration: spectral energy becomes dominated by a few low-rank singular directions, preserving coarse structure but suppressing high-rank spatial details and motion-rich temporal variations. To mitigate this problem, we propose FreeSpec, a training-free spectral reconstruction framework for long-video generation. FreeSpec decomposes global and local features with singular value decomposition, and uses the global branch as low-rank spectral guidance and the local branch as a high-rank reconstruction basis. This spectrum-level fusion avoids the rigid feature partitioning of previous decomposition rules, preserving long-range consistency while better retaining spatial details and temporal dynamics. Experiments on Wan2.1 and LTX-Video demonstrate that FreeSpec improves long-video generation, especially for temporal dynamics, while maintaining strong visual quality and temporal consistency. Project demo: https://fdchen24.github.io/FreeSpec-Website/.

analysis.tldr: 提出FreeSpec，一种无需训练的频谱重建框架，通过奇异值分解融合全局与局部特征，解决长视频生成中的内容漂移和时间不一致问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在短视频合成中表现良好，但无训练扩展至长视频时会出现内容漂移、时间不一致和动态过度平滑等问题。现有方法通过全局和局部分支结合改善时间一致性，但预定义的特征划分在动作与外观紧密耦合时不可靠。
analysis.problem: 长视频生成中，自注意力窗口扩大导致频谱能量集中于低秩方向，抑制高秩空间细节和运动丰富的时间变化，造成内容漂移和时间不一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要分析发现，扩大自注意力窗口会导致频谱集中：频谱能量被少数低秩奇异方向主导，保留粗粒度结构但抑制高秩空间细节和运动丰富的时间变化。
analysis.method: 提出FreeSpec，一种无训练的频谱重建框架，利用奇异值分解分解全局和局部特征，将全局分支作为低秩频谱引导，局部分支作为高秩重建基础，实现频谱级融合，避免刚性特征划分。
contributions: 从奇异谱角度分析长视频生成中的时间扩展问题，揭示自注意力窗口扩大导致的频谱集中现象。
提出FreeSpec，一种无训练的频谱重建框架，通过奇异值分解融合全局和局部特征，改善长视频生成的时间动态和视觉质量。
analysis.experiments: 在Wan2.1和LTX-Video上实验，FreeSpec改善了长视频生成，特别是时间动态，同时保持强视觉质量和时间一致性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定视频扩散模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
无训练方法可能在某些极端长视频场景下仍存在性能瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FreeSpec，一种无需训练的频谱重建框架，通过奇异值分解融合全局与局部特征，解决长视频生成中的内容漂移和时间不一致问题。

papers.title: On the Security of Research Artifacts
papers.abstract: Research artifacts are widely shared to support reproducibility, and artifact evaluation (AE) has become common at many leading conferences. However, AE mainly checks whether artifacts work as claimed and can be reproduced. It largely overlooks potential security risks. Since these artifacts are publicly released and reused, they may unintentionally create opportunities for misuse and raise concerns about safe and responsible sharing. We study 509 research artifacts from top-tier security venues and find that many contain insecure code patterns that may introduce potential attack vectors. We propose a taxonomy for context-aware security assessment to enable structured analysis of such risks. We perform static analysis and examine the resulting findings, filtering false positives and identifying real security risks. Our analysis shows that 41.60% of the prevalent findings may pose security concerns under practical usage. To support scalable analysis, we introduce SAFE (Security-Aware Framework for Artifact Evaluation), a first step toward an autonomous framework that analyzes tool-reported findings by considering code semantics, execution context, and practical exploitability. SAFE achieves 84.80% accuracy and 84.63% F1-score in distinguishing security and non-security risks. Overall, our results show that security is also important in AE for promoting safe and responsible research sharing. The source code is available at: https://github.com/nanda-rani/SAFE

analysis.tldr: 研究揭示顶级安全会议的研究工件中41.60%存在安全风险，并提出SAFE框架进行自动化评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 研究工件广泛共享以支持可重复性，但工件评估（AE）主要检查功能正确性，忽视了潜在安全风险，可能导致滥用和安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估研究工件中的安全风险，并实现自动化分析以支持大规模评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对509个顶级安全会议的研究工件进行静态分析，发现41.60%的常见发现存在实际安全风险。
analysis.method: 提出SAFE（安全感知工件评估框架），通过考虑代码语义、执行上下文和实际可利用性，自动分析工具报告的安全发现，区分安全与非安全风险。
contributions: 首次对顶级安全会议的研究工件进行大规模安全分析，揭示41.60%存在安全风险。
提出上下文感知安全评估分类法，用于结构化分析安全风险。
开发SAFE框架，实现自动化安全风险识别，准确率84.80%，F1分数84.63%。
analysis.experiments: 在509个研究工件上评估，SAFE达到84.80%准确率和84.63% F1分数。
limitations: 仅针对安全领域会议工件，可能不适用于其他领域。
静态分析可能遗漏运行时动态安全风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究揭示顶级安全会议的研究工件中41.60%存在安全风险，并提出SAFE框架进行自动化评估。

papers.title: MARBLE: Multi-Aspect Reward Balance for Diffusion RL
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning fine-tuning has become the dominant approach for aligning diffusion models with human preferences. However, assessing images is intrinsically a multi-dimensional task, and multiple evaluation criteria need to be optimized simultaneously. Existing practice deal with multiple rewards by training one specialist model per reward, optimizing a weighted-sum reward $R(x)=\sum_k w_k R_k(x)$, or sequentially fine-tuning with a hand-crafted stage schedule. These approaches either fail to produce a unified model that can be jointly trained on all rewards or necessitates heavy manually tuned sequential training. We find that the failure stems from using a naive weighted-sum reward aggregation. This approach suffers from a sample-level mismatch because most rollouts are specialist samples, highly informative for certain reward dimensions but irrelevant for others; consequently, weighted summation dilutes their supervision. To address this issue, we propose MARBLE (Multi-Aspect Reward BaLancE), a gradient-space optimization framework that maintains independent advantage estimators for each reward, computes per-reward policy gradients, and harmonizes them into a single update direction without manually-tuned reward weighting, by solving a Quadratic Programming problem. We further propose an amortized formulation that exploits the affine structure of the loss used in DiffusionNFT, to reduce the per-step cost from K+1 backward passes to near single-reward baseline cost, together with EMA smoothing on the balancing coefficients to stabilize updates against transient single-batch fluctuations. On SD3.5 Medium with five rewards, MARBLE improves all five reward dimensions simultaneously, turns the worst-aligned reward's gradient cosine from negative under weighted summation in 80% of mini-batches to consistently positive, and runs at 0.97X the training speed of baseline training.

analysis.tldr: 提出MARBLE框架，通过梯度空间优化平衡多奖励信号，实现扩散模型RL微调中所有奖励维度同时提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型RL微调处理多奖励时，加权求和或顺序微调会导致样本级不匹配和手动调参负担，无法高效联合优化所有奖励。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖手动加权或顺序训练的情况下，联合优化多个评估奖励以对齐人类偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现加权求和奖励聚合失败的原因是样本级不匹配：多数轨迹是专家样本，仅对部分奖励维度信息丰富，加权求和稀释了监督信号。
analysis.method: 提出MARBLE，为每个奖励维护独立优势估计器，计算每奖励策略梯度，通过二次规划问题协调为单一更新方向；并利用DiffusionNFT损失的仿射结构设计摊销公式，将每步计算成本从K+1次反向传播降至接近单奖励基线，同时使用EMA平滑平衡系数。
contributions: 揭示了加权求和奖励聚合在多奖励扩散模型RL中的样本级不匹配问题。
提出MARBLE梯度空间优化框架，无需手动调参即可平衡多奖励。
提出摊销公式和EMA平滑，显著降低计算开销并稳定训练。
analysis.experiments: 在SD3.5 Medium上使用五个奖励进行实验，MARBLE同时提升所有五个奖励维度，将最差对齐奖励的梯度余弦从加权求和下80%小批量为负变为持续为正，训练速度达到基线训练的0.97倍。
limitations: 可能依赖DiffusionNFT损失的仿射结构，推广到其他扩散模型需验证。
二次规划求解可能引入额外超参数，但摘要未提及敏感性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MARBLE框架，通过梯度空间优化平衡多奖励信号，实现扩散模型RL微调中所有奖励维度同时提升。

papers.title: PACZero: PAC-Private Fine-Tuning of Language Models via Sign Quantization
papers.abstract: We introduce PACZero, a family of PAC-private zeroth-order mechanisms for fine-tuning large language models that delivers usable utility at $I(S^*; Y_{1:T})=0$. This privacy regime bounds the membership-inference attack (MIA) posterior success rate at the prior, an MIA-resistance level the DP framework matches only at $\varepsilon=0$ and infinite noise. All DP-ZO comparisons below are matched at the MIA posterior level. The key insight is that PAC Privacy charges mutual information only when the release depends on which candidate subset is the secret. Sign-quantizing subset-aggregated zeroth-order gradients creates frequent unanimity, steps at which every candidate subset agrees on the update direction; at these steps the released sign costs zero conditional mutual information. We propose two variants that span the privacy-utility trade-off: PACZero-MI (budgeted MI via exact calibration on the binary release) and PACZero-ZPL ($I=0$ via a uniform coin flip on disagreement steps). We evaluate on SST-2 and SQuAD with OPT-1.3B and OPT-6.7B in both LoRA and full-parameter tracks. On SST-2 OPT-1.3B full fine-tuning at $I=0$, PACZero-ZPL reaches ${88.99\pm0.91}$, within $2.1$pp of the non-private MeZO baseline ($91.1$ FT). No prior method produces usable utility in the high-privacy regime $\varepsilon<1$, and PACZero-ZPL obtains competitive SST-2 accuracy and nontrivial SQuAD F1 across OPT-1.3B and OPT-6.7B at $I=0$.

analysis.tldr: 提出PACZero，通过符号量化实现零互信息下的PAC隐私微调，在强隐私保护下保持可用效用。
analysis.research_motivation: 差分隐私（DP）在低隐私预算（ε<1）下通常需要大量噪声，导致模型效用严重下降，且无法完全抵御成员推断攻击（MIA）。需要一种能在强隐私保护下仍保持可用效用的微调方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在零互信息（I=0）的强隐私约束下，对大语言模型进行微调并保持可用的任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 符号量化子集聚合的零阶梯度会产生频繁的一致步（unanimity steps），即所有候选子集在更新方向上一致，此时发布的符号条件互信息为零。
analysis.method: 提出PACZero系列机制，基于PAC隐私和符号量化。两个变体：PACZero-MI（通过精确校准控制二进制发布的互信息预算）和PACZero-ZPL（在分歧步使用均匀硬币翻转实现I=0）。
contributions: 首次在I=0的隐私水平下实现可用的语言模型微调，优于DP在ε<1时的表现。
提出符号量化子集聚合梯度的新方法，利用一致步实现零互信息发布。
analysis.experiments: 在SST-2和SQuAD数据集上使用OPT-1.3B和OPT-6.7B模型，进行LoRA和全参数微调。PACZero-ZPL在I=0时SST-2准确率达88.99±0.91，仅比非私有MeZO基线低2.1个百分点。
limitations: 仅适用于零阶优化方法，对一阶梯度不直接适用。
在分歧步使用均匀硬币翻转可能引入随机性，影响收敛稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PACZero，通过符号量化实现零互信息下的PAC隐私微调，在强隐私保护下保持可用效用。

papers.title: Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning is widely used to improve the reasoning ability of large language models, especially when answers can be automatically checked. Standard GRPO-style training updates the model using only the current step, while full multi-step lookahead can give a better update direction but is too expensive because it needs many backward passes. We propose Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization (GXPO), a plug-compatible policy-update rule for GRPO-style reasoning RL. GXPO approximates a longer local lookahead using only three backward passes during an active phase. It reuses the same batch of rollouts, rewards, advantages, and GRPO loss, so it does not require new rollouts or reward computation at the lookahead points. GXPO takes two fast optimizer steps, measures how the gradients change, predicts a virtual K-step lookahead point, moves the policy partway toward that point, and then applies a corrective update using the true gradient at the new position. When the lookahead signal becomes unstable, GXPO automatically switches back to standard single-pass GRPO. We also give a plain-gradient-descent surrogate analysis that explains when the extrapolation is exact and where its local errors come from. Across Qwen2.5 and Llama math-reasoning experiments, GXPO improves the average sampled pass@1 by +1.65 to +5.00 points over GRPO and by +0.14 to +1.28 points over the strongest SFPO setting, while keeping the active-phase cost fixed at three backward passes. It also achieves up to 4.00x step speedup, 2.33x wall-clock speedup, and 1.33x backward-pass speedup in reaching GRPO's peak accuracy.

analysis.tldr: GXPO通过三次反向传播近似多步梯度外推，提升GRPO风格强化学习策略更新效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准GRPO仅用当前步更新策略，而完整多步前瞻虽能提供更优更新方向但计算成本过高（需多次反向传播），亟需一种高效近似方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持低计算开销的同时，近似多步前瞻策略更新以提升GRPO风格强化学习的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GXPO，在活跃阶段仅用三次反向传播：先执行两次快速优化步并测量梯度变化，预测虚拟K步前瞻点，将策略部分移向该点，再用新位置的真实梯度进行校正更新；当外推信号不稳定时自动回退到标准单步GRPO。
contributions: 提出GXPO，一种即插即用的策略更新规则，仅需三次反向传播即可近似多步前瞻。
在Qwen2.5和Llama数学推理实验上，GXPO相比GRPO平均提升pass@1达+1.65至+5.00点，相比最强SFPO提升+0.14至+1.28点，并实现最高4.00倍步数加速、2.33倍墙钟加速和1.33倍反向传播加速。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5和Llama模型上进行数学推理实验，评估pass@1指标，并与GRPO和SFPO对比。
limitations: 外推信号不稳定时需回退到标准GRPO，可能影响一致性。
仅针对数学推理任务验证，其他领域效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GXPO通过三次反向传播近似多步梯度外推，提升GRPO风格强化学习策略更新效率与性能。

papers.title: Operator-Guided Invariance Learning for Continuous Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) with continuous time and state/action spaces is often data-intensive and brittle under nuisance variability and shift, motivating methods that exploit value-preserving structures to stabilize and improve learning. Most existing approaches focus on special cases, such as prescribed symmetries and exact equivariance, without addressing how to discover more general structures that require nonlinear operators to transform and map between continuous state/action systems with isomorphic value functions. We propose \textbf{VPSD-RL} (Value-Preserving Structure Discovery for Reinforcement Learning). It models continuous RL as a controlled diffusion with value-preserving mappings defined through Lie-group actions and associated pullback operators. We show that a value-preserving structure exists exactly when pulling back the value function and pushing forward actions commute with the controlled generator and reward functional. Further, approximate value-preserving structures with rigorous guarantees can be found when the Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman mismatch is small. This framework discovers exact and approximate value-preserving structures by searching for the associated Lie group operators. VPSD-RL fits differentiable drift, diffusion, and reward models; learns infinitesimal generators via determining-equation residual minimization; exponentiates them with ODE flows to obtain finite transformations; and integrates them into continuous RL through transition augmentation and transformation-consistency regularization. We show that bounded generator/reward mismatch implies quantitative stability of the optimal value function along approximate orbits, with sensitivity governed by the effective horizon, and observe improved data efficiency and robustness on continuous-control benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出VPSD-RL框架，通过Lie群算子发现连续强化学习中的值保持结构，提升数据效率和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续时间/状态/动作空间的强化学习通常数据密集且对干扰和分布变化脆弱，现有方法局限于预设对称性和精确等变性，无法发现需要非线性算子变换的更一般结构。
analysis.problem: 如何自动发现连续强化学习系统中的值保持结构（包括精确和近似结构），以稳定和改善学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: VPSD-RL将连续RL建模为受控扩散，通过Lie群作用及其拉回算子定义值保持映射；通过最小化确定方程残差学习无穷小生成元，用ODE流指数化得到有限变换，并通过过渡增强和变换一致性正则化集成到连续RL中。
contributions: 提出值保持结构存在的充要条件（拉回值函数与前推动作与受控生成元和奖励泛函交换），并给出近似结构的严格保证。
开发VPSD-RL框架，通过Lie群算子搜索自动发现精确和近似值保持结构，并在连续控制基准上验证了数据效率和鲁棒性提升。
analysis.experiments: 在连续控制基准上观察到数据效率和鲁棒性提升，但摘要未提供具体数值或对比细节。
limitations: 可能依赖Lie群结构的先验假设，对于非群结构的值保持映射可能不适用。
计算开销可能较大，因为需要学习微分方程和ODE流。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VPSD-RL框架，通过Lie群算子发现连续强化学习中的值保持结构，提升数据效率和鲁棒性。

papers.title: From Token Lists to Graph Motifs: Weisfeiler-Lehman Analysis of Sparse Autoencoder Features
papers.abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have become central to mechanistic interpretability, decomposing transformer activations into monosemantic features. Yet existing analyses characterise features almost exclusively through top-activating token lists or decoder weight vectors, leaving the higher-order co-occurrence structure shared across features largely unexamined. We introduce a graph-structured representation in which each SAE feature is modelled as a token co-occurrence graph: nodes are the tokens most frequent near strong activations, and edges connect pairs that co-occur within local context windows. A custom WL-style, frequency-binned graph kernel then provides a similarity measure over this structural space. Applied as a proof of concept to features from a large SAE trained on GPT-2 Small and probed with a synthetic mixed-domain corpus, our clustering recovers heuristic motif families (punctuation-heavy patterns, language and script clusters, and code-like templates) that are not recovered by clustering on decoder cosine similarity. A token-histogram baseline achieves higher overall purity, so the contribution of the graph view is complementary rather than dominant: it surfaces structural relationships that token-frequency and decoder-weight views alone do not capture. Cluster assignments are stable across graph-construction hyperparameters and random seeds.

analysis.tldr: 用图结构表示SAE特征并引入WL图核进行聚类，发现token共现图能揭示解码器余弦相似度无法捕获的结构性特征族。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征分析主要依赖top激活token列表或解码器权重向量，忽略了特征间高阶共现结构，难以全面理解特征语义。
analysis.problem: 如何建模SAE特征之间的高阶共现结构，并基于此进行特征聚类以发现传统方法遗漏的语义族。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将每个SAE特征建模为token共现图（节点为强激活附近高频token，边为局部窗口内共现关系），并设计自定义WL风格频率分箱图核计算特征相似度，进而进行聚类。
contributions: 提出将SAE特征表示为token共现图的新视角，捕获特征间高阶结构关系。
设计频率分箱WL图核用于特征相似度度量，并验证其能发现解码器余弦相似度聚类无法恢复的启发式特征族（如标点密集模式、语言/脚本簇、代码模板）。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-2 Small上训练的SAE上，使用合成混合领域语料进行概念验证实验，聚类结果稳定且与token直方图基线互补。
limitations: 图构建依赖超参数（如窗口大小、频率阈值），可能影响结果稳定性。
仅作为概念验证，未在更大模型或真实分布数据上评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用图结构表示SAE特征并引入WL图核进行聚类，发现token共现图能揭示解码器余弦相似度无法捕获的结构性特征族。

papers.title: Instrumental Choices: Measuring the Propensity of LLM Agents to Pursue Instrumental Behaviors
papers.abstract: AI systems have become increasingly capable of dangerous behaviours in many domains. This raises the question: Do models sometimes choose to violate human instructions in order to perform behaviour that is more useful for certain goals? We introduce a benchmark for measuring model propensity for instrumental convergence (IC) behaviour in terminal-based agents. This is behaviour such as self-preservation that has been hypothesised to play a key role in risks from highly capable AI agents. Our benchmark is realistic and low-stakes which serves to reduce evaluation-awareness and roleplay confounds. The suite contains seven operational tasks, each with an official workflow and a policy-violating shortcut. An eight-variant shared framework varies monitoring, instruction clarity, stakes, permission, instrumental usefulness and blocked honest paths to support inferences regarding the factors driving IC behaviour. We evaluated ten models using deterministic environment-state scorers over 1,680 samples, with trace review employed for audit and adjudication purposes. The final IC rate is 86 out of 1,680 samples (5.1%). IC behaviour is concentrated rather than uniform: two Gemini models account for 66.3% of IC cases and three tasks account for 84.9%. Conditions in which IC behaviour is indispensable for task success result in the greatest increase in the adjusted IC rate (+15.7 percentage points), whereas emphasising that task success is critical or certain framing choices do not produce comparable effects. Our findings indicate that realistic, low-nudge environments elicit IC behaviour rarely but systematically in most tested models. We conclude that it is feasible to robustly measure tendencies for dangerous behaviour in current frontier AI agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基准测试，测量终端型LLM智能体在低风险环境中追求工具性趋同行为的倾向。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着AI系统能力增强，其可能为了更有用的目标而违反人类指令，这种工具性趋同行为对高级AI智能体构成潜在风险，但目前缺乏系统性的测量方法。
analysis.problem: 如何可靠地测量LLM智能体在低风险、低评估意识环境中表现出工具性趋同行为的倾向。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 工具性趋同行为在1680个样本中出现86次（5.1%），且集中在少数模型和任务中；当该行为对任务成功不可或缺时，调整后的IC率增加最多（+15.7个百分点）。
analysis.method: 设计包含7个操作任务的基准测试，每个任务有官方工作流和违反政策的捷径，通过8种变体框架控制监控、指令清晰度、风险、权限、工具性有用性和诚实路径阻塞等因素，使用确定性环境状态评分器评估10个模型。
contributions: 提出了一个用于测量LLM智能体工具性趋同行为倾向的基准测试，具有现实性和低风险特点，减少了评估意识和角色扮演混淆。
通过1680个样本的系统评估，揭示了当前前沿AI智能体中工具性趋同行为罕见但系统性的出现模式。
analysis.experiments: 在10个模型上使用确定性环境状态评分器评估了1680个样本，并进行了痕迹审查用于审计和裁决。
limitations: 基准测试仅涵盖终端型智能体，可能不适用于其他交互形式。
低风险环境可能低估了高风险场景中的工具性趋同行为频率。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基准测试，测量终端型LLM智能体在低风险环境中追求工具性趋同行为的倾向。

papers.title: 3D MRI Image Pretraining via Controllable 2D Slice Navigation Task
papers.abstract: Self-supervised pretraining has become the mainstream approach for learning MRI representations from unlabeled scans. However, most existing objectives still treat each scan primarily as static aggregations of slices, patches or volumes. We ask whether there exists an intrinsic form of self-supervision signal that is different from reconstructing the masked patches, through transforming the 3D volumes into controllable 2D rendered sequences: by rendering slices at continuous positions, orientations, and scales, a 3D volume can be converted into dense video-action sequences whose controls are the action trajectories. We study this formulation with an action-conditioned pretraining objective, where a tokenizer encodes slice observations and a latent dynamics model predicts the evolution of latent features. Across representative anatomical and spatial downstream tasks, the proposed pretraining is evaluated against standard static-volume baselines, tokenizer-only pretraining, and dynamics variants without aligned actions. These results suggest that controllable MRI slice navigation provides a useful complementary pretraining interface for learning anatomical and spatial representations from large unlabeled MRI collections.

analysis.tldr: 提出通过可控2D切片导航任务进行3D MRI图像自监督预训练，将体积转化为视频动作序列以学习解剖与空间表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MRI自监督预训练主要将扫描视为静态切片/体积聚合，缺乏利用内在空间连续性的自监督信号。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种不同于掩码重建的自监督预训练目标，以更好地学习3D MRI的解剖与空间表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将3D体积转化为可控2D渲染序列（连续位置、方向、尺度），通过动作条件预训练目标：分词器编码切片观测，潜动力学模型预测潜特征演化。
contributions: 提出一种新的自监督预训练范式，将3D MRI体积转化为可控2D切片导航视频序列。
设计动作条件预训练目标，结合分词器和潜动力学模型，学习解剖与空间表征。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性解剖和空间下游任务上，与标准静态体积基线、仅分词器预训练及无对齐动作的动力学变体进行对比评估。
limitations: 可能依赖渲染质量与动作空间设计。
未在极大规模数据集上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出通过可控2D切片导航任务进行3D MRI图像自监督预训练，将体积转化为视频动作序列以学习解剖与空间表征。

papers.title: Litespark Inference on Consumer CPUs: Custom SIMD Kernels for Ternary Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed artificial intelligence, but their computational requirements remain prohibitive for most users. Standard inference demands expensive datacenter GPUs or cloud API access, leaving over one billion personal computers underutilized for AI workloads. Ternary models offer a path forward: their weights are constrained to {-1, 0, +1}, theoretically eliminating the need for floating-point multiplication. However, existing frameworks fail to exploit this structure, treating ternary models as dense floating-point networks.
