We address this gap with custom SIMD kernels that replace matrix multiplication with simple addition and subtraction operations, targeting the integer dot product instructions available on modern CPUs. Our implementation, Litespark-Inference, is pip-installable and integrates directly with Hugging-Face, achieving 9.2x faster time-to-first-token, 52x higher throughput, and 14x memory reduction compared to standard PyTorch inference on Apple Silicon, with similar speedups on Intel and AMD processors.

analysis.tldr: 提出Litespark-Inference，利用自定义SIMD内核在消费级CPU上高效运行三元神经网络，实现9.2倍首令牌延迟提升和52倍吞吐量提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型计算需求高，依赖昂贵GPU或云API，而消费级CPU未被充分利用；三元模型理论上可消除浮点乘法，但现有框架未利用其结构。
analysis.problem: 现有推理框架将三元模型视为稠密浮点网络，未利用其权重约束（{-1,0,+1}）来加速计算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计自定义SIMD内核，用整数点积指令替代矩阵乘法中的浮点乘法，仅使用加法和减法操作。
contributions: 提出Litespark-Inference，一个pip可安装的推理库，直接集成Hugging Face。
在Apple Silicon上实现9.2倍首令牌延迟提升、52倍吞吐量提升和14倍内存减少，在Intel和AMD上也有类似加速。
analysis.experiments: 在Apple Silicon、Intel和AMD处理器上测试，与标准PyTorch推理对比，报告了首令牌延迟、吞吐量和内存减少的加速比。
limitations: 仅适用于三元神经网络，通用性有限。
可能依赖特定CPU指令集，兼容性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Litespark-Inference，利用自定义SIMD内核在消费级CPU上高效运行三元神经网络，实现9.2倍首令牌延迟提升和52倍吞吐量提升。

papers.title: ReasonSTL: Bridging Natural Language and Signal Temporal Logic via Tool-Augmented Process-Rewarded Learning
papers.abstract: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is an expressive formal language for specifying spatio-temporal requirements over real-valued, real-time signals. It has been widely used for the verification and synthesis of autonomous systems and cyber-physical systems. In practice, however, users often express their requirements in natural language rather than in structured STL formulas, making natural-language-to-STL translation a critical yet challenging task. Manual specification requires temporal-logic expertise and cannot scale, while prompting commercial LLM APIs incurs substantial token costs and may expose sensitive system requirements to third-party services, raising privacy concerns for industrial deployment. To address these challenges, we present \textsc{ReasonSTL}, a tool-augmented framework that adapts local open-source language models for natural-language-to-STL generation. \textsc{ReasonSTL} decomposes the translation process into explicit reasoning, deterministic tool calls, and structured formula construction. We further introduce process-rewarded training to supervise both tool-use trajectories and final formulas, together with \textsc{STL-Bench}, a bilingual, computation-aware benchmark grounded in real-world signals. Experiments show that a 4B model trained with \textsc{ReasonSTL} achieves state-of-the-art performance in both automatic metrics and human evaluations, demonstrating that \textsc{ReasonSTL} provides a transparent, low-cost, and privacy-preserving alternative for formal specification drafting.

analysis.tldr: 提出ReasonSTL框架，通过工具增强和过程奖励训练，让开源小模型在自然语言到信号时序逻辑翻译上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 信号时序逻辑（STL）在自主系统和信息物理系统中广泛用于验证和综合，但用户通常用自然语言表达需求，手动编写STL公式需要专业知识且难以扩展，而调用商业LLM API成本高且可能泄露敏感系统需求，存在隐私问题。
analysis.problem: 如何让开源语言模型高效、低成本、隐私安全地将自然语言需求翻译为STL公式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ReasonSTL框架：将翻译过程分解为显式推理、确定性工具调用和结构化公式构建；引入过程奖励训练（process-rewarded training）监督工具使用轨迹和最终公式；并构建了双语、计算感知的基准STL-Bench。
contributions: 提出ReasonSTL框架，结合工具增强和过程奖励训练，实现自然语言到STL的翻译。
构建STL-Bench，一个基于真实信号的双语、计算感知基准。
实验表明4B模型在自动指标和人工评估上达到SOTA，提供透明、低成本、隐私保护的替代方案。
analysis.experiments: 在STL-Bench上进行了自动指标和人工评估，4B模型达到SOTA。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工具集，泛化性待验证。
过程奖励训练的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ReasonSTL框架，通过工具增强和过程奖励训练，让开源小模型在自然语言到信号时序逻辑翻译上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Patch-Effect Graph Kernels for LLM Interpretability
papers.abstract: Mechanistic interpretability aims to reverse-engineer transformer computations by identifying causal circuits through activation patching. However, scaling these interventions across diverse prompts and task families produces high-dimensional, unstructured datasets that are difficult to compare systematically. We propose a framework that reframes mechanistic analysis as a graph machine-learning problem by representing activation-patching profiles as patch-effect graphs over model components. We introduce three graph-construction methods: direct-influence via causal mediation, partial-correlation, and co-influence and apply graph kernels to analyze the resulting structures. Evaluating this approach on GPT-2 Small using Indirect Object Identification (IOI) and related tasks, we find that patch-effect graphs preserve discriminative structural signals. Specifically, localized edge-slot features provide higher classification accuracy than global graph-shape descriptors. A screened paired-patching validation suggests that CI and PC selected candidate edges correspond to stronger activation-influence effects than random or low-rank candidates. Crucially, by evaluating these representations against rigorous prompt-only and raw patch-effect controls, we make the evidential scope of the benchmark explicit: graph features compress structured patching signal, while raw tensors and surface cues define strong baselines that any circuit-level claim should address. Ultimately, our framework provides a compression and evaluation pipeline for comparing patching-derived structures under controlled baselines, separating robust slice-discriminative evidence from stronger task-general causal-circuit claims.

analysis.tldr: 将激活修补数据转化为图结构，用图核分析LLM内部机制，提供可比较的因果回路评估框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机械可解释性通过激活修补识别因果回路，但跨提示和任务族产生的高维非结构化数据难以系统比较，缺乏统一评估基准。
analysis.problem: 如何将激活修补数据转化为可比较的结构化表示，并建立严格的基线来区分因果回路证据与任务一般性信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 局部边槽特征比全局图形状描述符分类精度更高；筛选的候选边比随机或低秩候选边具有更强的激活影响效应。
analysis.method: 提出三种图构建方法（直接因果中介、偏相关、共影响），将激活修补轮廓表示为组件上的修补效应图，并应用图核分析结构。
contributions: 提出修补效应图框架，将机械可解释性分析转化为图机器学习问题。
引入三种图构建方法和图核分析，在IOI任务上验证了结构判别性。
通过严格的仅提示和原始修补效应控制，明确了基准的实证范围，区分了鲁棒的切片判别证据与更强的任务一般因果回路主张。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-2 Small上使用间接对象识别（IOI）及相关任务进行评估，比较了不同图特征和候选边选择策略。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估了GPT-2 Small和IOI任务，泛化性需更多模型和任务验证。
图构建方法可能对噪声敏感，需进一步分析鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将激活修补数据转化为图结构，用图核分析LLM内部机制，提供可比较的因果回路评估框架。

papers.title: GeoStack: A Framework for Quasi-Abelian Knowledge Composition in VLMs
papers.abstract: We address the challenge of knowledge composition in Vision-Language Models (VLMs), where accumulating expertise across multiple domains or tasks typically leads to catastrophic forgetting. We introduce GeoStack (Geometric Stacking), a modular framework that allows independently trained domain experts to be composed into a unified model. By imposing geometric and structural constraints on the adapter manifold, GeoStack ensures the foundational knowledge of the base model is preserved. Furthermore, we mathematically demonstrate a weight-folding property that achieves constant-time inference complexity ($O(1)$), regardless of the number of integrated experts. Experimental results across multi-domain adaptation and class-incremental learning show that GeoStack provides an efficient mechanism for long-term knowledge composition while significantly mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Code is available at https://github.com/QuantitativeImagingLaboratory/GeoStack.

analysis.tldr: GeoStack通过几何约束的适配器流形实现VLM多领域知识组合，避免灾难性遗忘并保持O(1)推理复杂度。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在多领域知识积累时面临灾难性遗忘问题，现有方法难以高效组合独立训练的领域专家。
analysis.problem: 如何在不遗忘基础知识和不增加推理开销的前提下，将多个独立训练的领域专家模型组合到统一VLM中。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GeoStack框架，通过几何和结构约束的适配器流形（adapter manifold）组合独立领域专家，并利用权重折叠性质实现常数时间推理。
contributions: 提出GeoStack模块化框架，通过几何约束实现VLM多领域知识组合。
证明权重折叠性质，使推理复杂度与专家数量无关（O(1)）。
analysis.experiments: 在多领域适应和类增量学习任务上验证，有效缓解灾难性遗忘。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的适配器结构。
几何约束的泛化性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoStack通过几何约束的适配器流形实现VLM多领域知识组合，避免灾难性遗忘并保持O(1)推理复杂度。

papers.title: Probabilistic Dating of Historical Manuscripts via Evidential Deep Regression on Visual Script Features
papers.abstract: We introduce a probabilistic approach for dating historical manuscript pages from visual features alone. Instead of aggregating centuries into classes as is standard in the previous literature, we pose dating as an evidential deep regression problem over a continuous year axis, allowing our neural network to output a full predictive distribution with decomposed aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty in a single forward pass. Our architecture combines an EfficientNet-B2 backbone with a Normal-Inverse-Gamma (NIG) output head trained with a joint negative-log-likelihood and evidence-regularization objective. On the DIVA-HisDB benchmark (150 pages, 3 medieval codices, 151,936 patches), our model scores a test MAE of 5.4 years, well below the 50-year century-label supervision granularity, with 93\% of patches within 5 years and 97\% within 10 years. Our approach achieves \textbf{PICP=92.6\%}, the best calibration among all compared methods, in a single forward pass, outperforming MC Dropout (PICP=88.2\%, 50 passes) and Deep Ensembles (PICP=79.7\%, 5 models) at $5\times$ lower inference cost. Uncertainty decomposition shows aleatoric uncertainty is a strong predictor of dating error (Spearman $ρ=0.729$), and a selective prediction about the most certain 20\% of patches can provide \textbf{0.5 years MAE}. We show that predicted uncertainty increases as image degradation worsens, spatial decomposition maps explain which script regions cause aleatoric uncertainty, and page-level aggregation reduces MAE to 4.5 years with $ρ=0.905$ between uncertainty and page-level error.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于证据深度回归的历史手稿概率定年方法，在连续年份轴上输出完整预测分布并分解不确定性，在DIVA-HisDB上达到MAE 5.4年。
analysis.research_motivation: 历史手稿定年传统上采用世纪级分类，粒度粗糙且无法量化预测可靠性，需要一种能输出连续年份并分解不确定性的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从视觉特征对历史手稿页面进行连续年份的概率定年，并有效分解偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到偶然不确定性是定年误差的强预测因子（Spearman ρ=0.729），且预测不确定性随图像退化程度增加而增加；空间分解图可解释哪些脚本区域导致偶然不确定性。
analysis.method: 将定年视为连续年份轴上的证据深度回归问题，使用EfficientNet-B2骨干网络结合Normal-Inverse-Gamma (NIG)输出头，通过联合负对数似然和证据正则化目标训练，单次前向传播输出完整预测分布及分解的不确定性。
contributions: 首次将历史手稿定年建模为连续年份上的证据深度回归问题，而非传统分类。
在DIVA-HisDB基准上以单次前向传播实现最佳校准（PICP=92.6%），且推理成本降低5倍。
展示了不确定性分解的实用性：偶然不确定性可预测定年误差，选择性预测最确定20%的块达到0.5年MAE。
analysis.experiments: 在DIVA-HisDB基准（150页，3个中世纪手抄本，151,936个图像块）上评估，测试MAE为5.4年，93%的块在5年内，97%在10年内；与MC Dropout和Deep Ensembles比较校准性和推理成本。
limitations: 仅基于视觉特征，未利用文本内容或历史上下文。
数据集规模较小（150页），可能限制泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于证据深度回归的历史手稿概率定年方法，在连续年份轴上输出完整预测分布并分解不确定性，在DIVA-HisDB上达到MAE 5.4年。

papers.title: Q-MMR: Off-Policy Evaluation via Recursive Reweighting and Moment Matching
papers.abstract: We present a novel theoretical framework, Q-MMR, for off-policy evaluation in finite-horizon MDPs. Q-MMR learns a set of scalar weights, one for each data point, such that the reweighted rewards approximate the expected return under the target policy. The weights are learned inductively in a top-down manner via a moment matching objective against a value-function discriminator class. Notably, and perhaps surprisingly, a data-dependent finite-sample guarantee for general function approximation can be established under only the realizability of $Q^π$, with a dimension-free bound -- that is, the error does not depend on the statistical complexity of the function class. We also establish connections to several existing methods, such as importance sampling and linear FQE. Further theoretical analyses shed new light on the nature of coverage, a concept of fundamental importance to offline RL.

analysis.tldr: 提出Q-MMR框架，通过递归重加权和矩匹配实现离策略评估，在仅需Q函数可实现性条件下获得无维数误差界。
analysis.research_motivation: 离策略评估是离线强化学习的核心问题，现有方法如重要性采样和FQE在函数逼近下缺乏有限样本保证或依赖强覆盖假设。
analysis.problem: 在有限时域MDP中，如何利用历史数据准确估计目标策略的期望回报，并给出可证明的有限样本误差界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 学习每个数据点的标量权重，通过递归方式（自顶向下）优化矩匹配目标，使重加权奖励逼近目标策略下的期望回报，判别器为值函数类。
contributions: 提出Q-MMR框架，在仅需Q函数可实现性条件下建立数据依赖的有限样本保证，误差界与函数类统计复杂度无关。
揭示了与重要性采样、线性FQE等现有方法的联系，并重新审视了覆盖条件在离线RL中的本质。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析限于有限时域MDP，扩展到无限时域可能需额外假设。
矩匹配目标在实际中可能面临优化困难，特别是高维权重空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Q-MMR框架，通过递归重加权和矩匹配实现离策略评估，在仅需Q函数可实现性条件下获得无维数误差界。

papers.title: Beyond Task Success: Measuring Workflow Fidelity in LLM-Based Agentic Payment Systems
papers.abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems are increasingly deployed for payment workflows, yet prevailing metrics, Task Success Rate (TSR) and Agent Handoff F1-Score (HF1), capture only final outcomes or unordered routing decisions. We introduce the Agentic Success Rate (ASR), a trajectory-fidelity metric that compares observed and expected agent execution sequences at the transition level, decomposing performance into Transition Recall and Transition Precision. Applied to the Hierarchical Multi-Agent System for Payments (HMASP) across 18 LLMs and 90,000 task instances, ASR reveals that 10 of 18 models systematically skip a confirmation checkpoint during payment checkout, a deviation invisible to both TSR and HF1, while 8 models enforce the checkpoint perfectly. Notably, GPT-4.1 exhibits hidden workflow shortcuts despite achieving perfect TSR and HF1, while GPT-5.2 achieves perfect ASR. Prompt refinements and deterministic routing guards guided by ASR diagnostics yield substantial TSR improvements, with gains up to +93.8 percentage points for previously struggling models, demonstrating that trajectory-level evaluation is essential in regulated domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agentic Success Rate (ASR)指标，揭示LLM多智能体支付系统中TSR和HF1无法检测的流程偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有指标TSR和HF1只关注最终结果或无序路由决策，无法捕捉支付工作流中的流程保真度，这在监管领域至关重要。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够评估LLM多智能体系统在执行支付工作流时是否严格遵循预期步骤序列的指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 10/18模型在支付结账时系统性地跳过确认检查点，而TSR和HF1无法检测；GPT-4.1在TSR和HF1完美时存在隐藏工作流捷径；GPT-5.2实现完美ASR。
analysis.method: 提出Agentic Success Rate (ASR)，一种轨迹保真度指标，在转换级别比较观察到的和预期的智能体执行序列，分解为Transition Recall和Transition Precision。
contributions: 提出ASR指标，用于评估LLM多智能体系统的工作流保真度。
在HMASP系统上对18个LLM和90,000个任务实例进行实证分析，揭示TSR和HF1无法检测的流程偏差。
展示ASR诊断指导的提示优化和确定性路由防护可显著提升TSR（最高+93.8个百分点）。
analysis.experiments: 在Hierarchical Multi-Agent System for Payments (HMASP)上，使用18个LLM和90,000个任务实例进行实验。
limitations: ASR可能不适用于非层次化或动态工作流。
需要预定义预期序列，可能限制在高度灵活场景中的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agentic Success Rate (ASR)指标，揭示LLM多智能体支付系统中TSR和HF1无法检测的流程偏差。

papers.title: PrefixGuard: From LLM-Agent Traces to Online Failure-Warning Monitors
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents now execute long, tool-using tasks where final outcome checks can arrive too late for intervention. Online warning requires lightweight prefix monitors over heterogeneous traces, but hand-authored event schemas are brittle and deployment-time LLM judging is costly. We introduce PrefixGuard, a trace-to-monitor framework with an offline StepView induction step followed by supervised monitor training. StepView induces deterministic typed-step adapters from raw trace samples, and the monitor learns an event abstraction and prefix-risk scorer from terminal outcomes. Across WebArena, $τ^2$-Bench, SkillsBench, and TerminalBench, the strongest PrefixGuard monitors reach 0.900/0.710/0.533/0.557 AUPRC. Using the strongest backend within each representation, they improve over raw-text controls by an average of +0.137 AUPRC. LLM judges remain substantially weaker under the same prefix-warning protocol. We also derive an observability ceiling on score-based area under the precision-recall curve (AUPRC) that separates monitor error from failures lacking evidence in the observed prefix. For finite-state audit, post-hoc deterministic finite automaton (DFA) extraction remains compact on WebArena and $τ^2$-Bench (29 and 20 states) but expands to 151 and 187 states on SkillsBench and TerminalBench. Finally, first-alert diagnostics show that strong ranking does not imply deployment utility: WebArena ranks well yet fails to support low-false-alarm alerts, whereas $τ^2$-Bench and TerminalBench retain more actionable early alerts. Together, these results position PrefixGuard as a practical monitor-synthesis recipe with explicit diagnostics for when prefix warnings translate into actionable interventions.

analysis.tldr: PrefixGuard 从 LLM Agent 轨迹中离线归纳 StepView 适配器并训练在线前缀风险监控器，在多个基准上提升 AUPRC，并分析了预警可操作性的诊断条件。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent 执行长序列工具任务时，最终结果检查往往为时已晚，需要轻量级在线前缀监控器；但手工编写事件模式脆弱，部署时用 LLM 判断成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何从异构轨迹中自动学习轻量级在线前缀风险监控器，以在 Agent 执行过程中提前预警失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PrefixGuard 包含离线 StepView 归纳步骤（从原始轨迹样本中诱导确定性类型化步骤适配器）和有监督监控器训练（学习事件抽象和前缀风险评分器）。
contributions: 提出 PrefixGuard 框架，将轨迹转化为在线失败预警监控器。
在 WebArena、τ²-Bench、SkillsBench 和 TerminalBench 上达到 0.900/0.710/0.533/0.557 AUPRC，比原始文本控制平均提升 +0.137 AUPRC。
推导了基于分数的 AUPRC 可观测性上限，区分监控器误差与因前缀证据不足导致的失败。
通过首次警报诊断揭示强排序不等同于部署效用，提供预警可操作性的分析。
analysis.experiments: 在 WebArena、τ²-Bench、SkillsBench 和 TerminalBench 四个基准上评估，报告了 AUPRC 指标、与 LLM 判断的对比、DFA 状态数以及首次警报诊断结果。
limitations: StepView 归纳可能依赖轨迹样本质量。
DFA 提取在复杂任务上状态数较大（151/187 状态）。
强排序不一定保证低误报率，部署效用需额外诊断。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PrefixGuard 从 LLM Agent 轨迹中离线归纳 StepView 适配器并训练在线前缀风险监控器，在多个基准上提升 AUPRC，并分析了预警可操作性的诊断条件。

papers.title: ORTHOBO: Orthogonal Bayesian Hyperparameter Optimization
papers.abstract: Bayesian optimization is widely used for hyperparameter optimization when model evaluations are expensive; however, noisy acquisition estimates can lead to unstable decisions. We identify acquisition estimation noise as a failure mode that was previously overlooked: even when the surrogate model and acquisition target are correctly specified, finite-sample Monte Carlo error can perturb acquisition values. This can, in turn, flip candidate rankings and lead to suboptimal BO decisions. As a remedy, we aim at variance reduction and propose an orthogonal acquisition estimator that subtracts an optimally weighted score-function control variate, which yields an acquisition residual orthogonal to posterior score directions and which thus reduces Monte Carlo variance. We further introduce OrthoBO: a Bayesian optimization framework that combines our orthogonal acquisition estimator with ensemble surrogates and an outer log transformation. We show theoretically that our estimator preserves the target, leads to variance reduction, and improves pairwise ranking stability. We further verify the theoretical properties of OrthoBO through numerical experiments where our framework reduces acquisition estimation variance, stabilizes candidate rankings, and achieves strong performance. We also demonstrate the downstream utility of OrthoBO in hyperparameter optimization for neural network training and fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 提出正交贝叶斯超参数优化方法，通过控制变量降低采集函数估计方差，提升贝叶斯优化稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 贝叶斯优化在超参数调优中广泛应用，但采集函数估计噪声会导致不稳定决策，这是一个被忽视的失败模式。
analysis.problem: 贝叶斯优化中采集函数估计的蒙特卡洛噪声会扰动候选排名，导致次优决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使代理模型和采集目标正确指定，有限样本蒙特卡洛误差也会扰动采集值，翻转候选排名。
analysis.method: 提出正交采集估计器，通过减去最优加权得分函数控制变量，使采集残差正交于后验得分方向，降低蒙特卡洛方差；结合集成代理和外层对数变换形成OrthoBO框架。
contributions: 识别并形式化采集估计噪声作为贝叶斯优化的失败模式
提出正交采集估计器，理论上保证方差降低和排名稳定性提升
通过数值实验和神经网络超参数优化验证方法有效性
analysis.experiments: 数值实验验证了理论性质（方差降低、排名稳定），并在神经网络训练和微调的超参数优化中展示了下游效用。
limitations: 可能依赖代理模型和得分函数的准确性
未讨论高维超参数空间的可扩展性
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出正交贝叶斯超参数优化方法，通过控制变量降低采集函数估计方差，提升贝叶斯优化稳定性。

papers.title: A Statistical Framework for Algorithmic Collective Action with Multiple Collectives
papers.abstract: As learning systems increasingly shape everyday decisions, Algorithmic Collective Action (ACA), i.e., users coordinating changes to shared data to steer model behavior, offers a complement to regulator-side policy and corporate model design. Real-world collective actions have traditionally been decentralized and fragmented into multiple collectives, despite sharing overarching objectives, with each collective differing in size, strategy, and actionable goals. However, most of the ACA literature focuses on single collective settings. To address this, we propose the first comprehensive statistical framework for ACA with multiple collectives acting on the same system. In particular, we focus on collective action in classification, studying how multiple collectives can influence a classifier's behavior. We provide quantitative statistical bounds on the success of the collectives, considering the role and the interplay of the collectives' sizes and the alignment of their goals. We make such bounds computable by each collective with only partial knowledge of other collectives' sizes and strategies. Finally, we numerically illustrate our framework on simulations inspired by interventions for climate adaptation in smart cities, demonstrating the usefulness of our bounds.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对多集体算法集体行动的统计框架，量化了集体规模与目标对齐对分类器行为的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实中的集体行动往往是分散的、由多个集体组成，但现有文献主要关注单一集体场景，缺乏对多集体互动的理论分析。
analysis.problem: 如何建模并量化多个集体在分类任务中协调数据修改以影响模型行为的成功概率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个统计框架，推导出集体成功概率的定量统计界，该界依赖于各集体的规模、策略以及目标对齐程度，且每个集体仅需部分了解其他集体的信息即可计算。
contributions: 首个针对多集体算法集体行动的统计框架。
提供可计算的统计界，量化集体规模与目标对齐对成功的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟的智慧城市气候适应干预场景中进行了数值实验，展示了框架的有效性。
limitations: 框架主要针对分类任务，可能不直接适用于回归或生成任务。
假设集体仅通过数据修改影响模型，未考虑其他干预方式。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对多集体算法集体行动的统计框架，量化了集体规模与目标对齐对分类器行为的影响。

papers.title: Constraint Decay: The Fragility of LLM Agents in Backend Code Generation
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents demonstrate strong performance in autonomous code generation under loose specifications. However, production-grade software requires strict adherence to structural constraints, such as architectural patterns, databases, and object-relational mappings. Existing benchmarks often overlook these non-functional requirements, rewarding functionally correct but structurally arbitrary solutions. We present a systematic study evaluating how well agents handle structural constraints in multi-file backend generation. By fixing a unified API contract across 80 greenfield generation tasks and 20 feature-implementation tasks spanning eight web frameworks, we isolate the effect of structural complexity using a dual evaluation with end-to-end behavioral tests and static verifiers. Our findings reveal a phenomenon of constraint decay: as structural requirements accumulate, agent performance exhibits a substantial decline. Capable configurations lose 30 points on average in assertion pass rates from baseline to fully specified tasks, while some weaker configurations approach zero. Framework sensitivity analysis exposes significant performance disparities: agents succeed in minimal, explicit frameworks (e.g., Flask) but perform substantially worse on average in convention-heavy environments (e.g., FastAPI, Django). Finally, error analysis identifies data-layer defects (e.g., incorrect query composition and ORM runtime violations) as the leading root causes. This work highlights that jointly satisfying functional and structural requirements remains a key open challenge for coding agents.

analysis.tldr: LLM代理在生成后端代码时，随着结构约束增加，性能显著下降，称为“约束衰减”。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准通常忽略结构约束，奖励功能正确但结构任意的解决方案，而生产级软件要求严格遵循架构模式、数据库和对象关系映射等约束。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM代理在多文件后端生成中处理结构约束的能力，并揭示约束衰减现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着结构要求累积，代理性能大幅下降；能力强的配置在基线到完全指定任务中断言通过率平均下降30点，弱配置接近零；框架敏感性分析显示代理在显式框架（如Flask）中成功，但在约定密集型环境（如FastAPI、Django）中表现较差；错误分析表明数据层缺陷（如错误查询组合和ORM运行时违规）是主要原因。
analysis.method: 通过固定统一API契约，在80个绿地生成任务和20个功能实现任务（涵盖8个Web框架）上，使用端到端行为测试和静态验证器进行双重评估，隔离结构复杂度的影响。
contributions: 系统性地研究了LLM代理在结构约束下的后端代码生成能力
揭示了约束衰减现象，并量化了性能下降幅度
通过框架敏感性分析和错误分析，指出了主要失败模式和数据层缺陷
analysis.experiments: 在80个绿地生成任务和20个功能实现任务上，使用8个Web框架进行实验，采用端到端行为测试和静态验证器评估。
limitations: 仅针对后端代码生成，未涉及前端或其他领域
可能未涵盖所有类型的结构约束
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM代理在生成后端代码时，随着结构约束增加，性能显著下降，称为“约束衰减”。

papers.title: SCRuB: Social Concept Reasoning under Rubric-Based Evaluation
papers.abstract: While many studies of Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning capabilities emphasize mathematical or technical tasks, few address reasoning about social concepts: the abstract ideas shaping social norms, culture, and institutions. This understudied capability is essential for modern models acting as social agents, yet no systematic evaluation methodology targets it. We introduce SCRuB (Social Concept Reasoning under Rubric-Based Evaluation), a framework designed for this setting of task indeterminacy. Our goal is to measure the degree to which a model reasons about social concepts with the depth and critical rigor of a human expert. SCRuB proceeds in three phases: prompt construction from established sources, response generation by experts and models, and comparative evaluation using a five-dimensional critical thinking rubric. To enable generalization of the pipeline, we introduce a Panel of Disciplinary Perspectives ensemble validated against independent expert judges. We release SCRuBEval (n=4,711 evaluation prompts) and SCRuBAnnotations (300 expert-authored responses and 150 expert comparative judgments from 45 PhD-level scholars). Our results show that frontier models consistently outperform human experts across all five rubric dimensions. Across 1,170 pairwise comparisons, expert judges ranked a model response first in 80.8% of judgments and preferred model responses overall 74.4% of the time. Ultimately, this study provides the first expert-grounded demonstration of evaluation saturation for social concept reasoning: the single-turn exam-style format has reached its ceiling for models and humans alike.

analysis.tldr: 提出SCRuB框架评估LLM对社会概念的推理能力，发现前沿模型在所有维度上超越人类专家。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM推理研究多聚焦数学或技术任务，缺乏对社会概念（如社会规范、文化、制度）推理的系统评估，而这对模型作为社会代理至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估LLM对社会概念的推理能力，并衡量其是否达到人类专家的深度和批判严谨性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出单轮考试式评估已饱和，模型和人类均达到上限。
analysis.method: SCRuB框架：三阶段流程（基于权威来源构建提示、专家和模型生成回答、使用五维批判性思维评分表比较评估），并引入Panel of Disciplinary Perspectives集成方法。
contributions: 提出SCRuB框架，用于评估LLM的社会概念推理能力。
发布SCRuBEval（4,711个评估提示）和SCRuBAnnotations（300个专家回答和150个专家比较判断）。
实验表明前沿模型在所有五个评分维度上超越人类专家。
analysis.experiments: 在1,170对比较中，专家判断模型回答在80.8%的情况下排名第一，整体偏好模型回答占74.4%。
limitations: 评估格式为单轮考试式，可能无法全面反映社会概念推理的复杂性。
专家样本量有限（45位博士级学者），可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SCRuB框架评估LLM对社会概念的推理能力，发现前沿模型在所有维度上超越人类专家。

papers.title: Hyperbolic Concept Bottleneck Models
papers.abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) have become a popular approach to enable interpretability in neural networks by constraining classifier inputs to a set of human-understandable concepts. While effective, current models embed concepts in flat Euclidean space, treating them as independent, orthogonal dimensions. Concepts, however, are highly structured and organized in semantic hierarchies. To resolve this mismatch, we propose Hyperbolic Concept Bottleneck Models (HypCBM), a post-hoc framework that grounds the bottleneck in this structure by reformulating concept activation as asymmetric geometric containment in hyperbolic space. Rather than treating entailment cones as a pre-training penalty, we show they encode a natural test-time activation signal: the margin of inclusion within a concept's entailment cone yields sparse, hierarchy-aware activations without any additional supervision or learned modules. We further introduce an adaptive scaling law for hierarchically faithful interventions, propagating user corrections coherently through the concept tree. Empirically, HypCBM rivals post-hoc Euclidean models trained on 20$\times$ more data in sparse regimes required for human interpretability, with stronger hierarchical consistency and improved robustness to input corruptions.

analysis.tldr: 提出双曲概念瓶颈模型，利用双曲空间的几何包含关系实现层次感知的稀疏激活，无需额外监督。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型将概念嵌入欧氏空间，视作独立正交维度，忽略了概念间的语义层次结构，导致可解释性与实际概念组织方式不匹配。
analysis.problem: 如何让概念瓶颈模型中的概念激活反映语义层次结构，实现层次感知的稀疏激活。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出后验框架 HypCBM，将概念激活重新表述为双曲空间中的非对称几何包含关系，利用包含锥的包含边距作为测试时激活信号，并引入自适应缩放定律实现层次一致的干预传播。
contributions: 提出 HypCBM，将概念瓶颈建模为双曲空间中的几何包含关系，实现层次感知的稀疏激活。
引入自适应缩放定律，使得用户干预在概念树中层次一致地传播。
实验表明 HypCBM 在稀疏数据下性能媲美使用 20 倍数据的欧氏模型，且层次一致性和鲁棒性更强。
analysis.experiments: 在稀疏数据场景下，HypCBM 与使用 20 倍数据的后验欧氏模型性能相当，并展现出更强的层次一致性和对输入损坏的鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的概念层次结构，构建成本高。
双曲空间的计算和优化可能比欧氏空间更复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双曲概念瓶颈模型，利用双曲空间的几何包含关系实现层次感知的稀疏激活，无需额外监督。

papers.title: From Review to Design: Ethical Multimodal Driver Monitoring Systems for Risk Mitigation, Incident Response, and Accountability in Automated Vehicles
papers.abstract: As vehicles transition toward higher levels of automation, Driver Monitoring Systems (DMS) have become essential for ensuring human oversight, safety, and regulatory compliance in a vehicle. These systems rely on multimodal sensing and AI-driven inference to assess driver attention, cognitive state, and readiness to take control. While technologically promising, their deployment introduces a complex set of ethical and legal challenges - ranging from privacy and consent to data ownership and algorithmic fairness. While overarching frameworks such as the GDPR, EU AI Act, and IEEE standards offer important guidance, they lack the specificity required for addressing the unique risks posed by in-cabin sensing technologies. This paper adopts a review-to-design perspective, critically examining existing regulatory instruments and ethical frameworks -- such as the GDPR, the EU AI Act, and IEEE guidelines -- and identifying gaps in their applicability to the distinctive risks posed by multimodal, AI-enabled in-cabin monitoring. Building on this review, we propose a modular ethical design framework tailored specifically to Driver Monitoring Systems. The framework translates high-level principles into actionable design and deployment guidance, including user-configurable consent mechanisms, fairness-aware model development, transparency and explainability tools, and safeguards for driver emotional well-being. Finally, the paper outlines a risk analysis and failure mitigation strategy, emphasizing proactive incident response and accountability mechanisms tailored to the DMS context. Together, these contributions aim to inform the development of transparent, trustworthy, and human-centered driver monitoring systems for next-generation autonomous vehicles.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向自动驾驶驾驶员监控系统的模块化伦理设计框架，弥合通用法规与具体技术风险之间的鸿沟。
analysis.research_motivation: 驾驶员监控系统（DMS）在自动驾驶中至关重要，但其多模态感知和AI推理引入隐私、公平性等伦理法律挑战，现有通用法规（如GDPR、EU AI Act）缺乏针对座舱传感技术的具体指导。
analysis.problem: 如何将高层次的伦理原则转化为可操作的DMS设计与部署指南，以应对多模态AI监控特有的风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用从审查到设计的视角，先批判性分析现有法规和伦理框架的适用性缺口，再提出模块化伦理设计框架，包含用户可配置的同意机制、公平感知模型开发、透明可解释性工具及情感保障措施，并制定风险分析与故障缓解策略。
contributions: 识别了GDPR、EU AI Act等通用法规在DMS多模态监控中的适用性缺口
提出了针对DMS的模块化伦理设计框架，将原则转化为可操作的设计与部署指导
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能缺乏实证验证，实际效果待评估
未涉及跨文化或不同司法管辖区的适用性差异
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向自动驾驶驾驶员监控系统的模块化伦理设计框架，弥合通用法规与具体技术风险之间的鸿沟。

papers.title: COVID-19 Infodemic. Understanding content features in detecting fake news using a machine learning approach
papers.abstract: The use of content features, particularly textual and linguistic for fake news detection is under-researched, despite empirical evidence showing the features could contribute to differentiating real and fake news. To this end, this study investigates a selection of content features such as word bigrams, part of speech distribution etc. to improve fake news detection. We performed a series of experiments on a new dataset gathered during the COVID-19 pandemic and using Decision Tree, K-Nearest Neighbor, Logistic Regression, Support Vector Machine and Random Forest. Random Forest yielded the best results, followed closely by Support Vector Machine, across all setups. In general, both the textual and linguistic features were found to improve fake news detection when used separately, however, combining them into a single model did not improve the detection significantly. Differences were also noted between the use of bigrams and part of speech tags. The study shows that textual and linguistic features can be used successfully in detecting fake news using the traditional machine learning approach as opposed to deep learning.

analysis.tldr: 利用文本和语言特征（如词双元组、词性分布）提升传统机器学习方法在COVID-19假新闻检测中的效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 假新闻检测中文本和语言特征的研究不足，尽管有证据表明这些特征有助于区分真假新闻。
analysis.problem: 如何利用内容特征（特别是文本和语言特征）提高假新闻检测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本和语言特征单独使用时能提升检测效果，但组合使用并未显著改善；不同特征（如双元组与词性标签）效果存在差异。
analysis.method: 使用决策树、K近邻、逻辑回归、支持向量机和随机森林等传统机器学习方法，基于COVID-19期间收集的新数据集，评估词双元组、词性分布等特征。
contributions: 系统研究了文本和语言特征在假新闻检测中的作用
构建了COVID-19期间的假新闻数据集并进行了多模型实验
analysis.experiments: 在COVID-19数据集上使用五种传统机器学习模型进行实验，随机森林表现最佳，支持向量机次之。
limitations: 未与深度学习方法进行对比
数据集仅针对COVID-19，泛化性有待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用文本和语言特征（如词双元组、词性分布）提升传统机器学习方法在COVID-19假新闻检测中的效果。

papers.title: Knowledge Graphs, the Missing Link in Agentic AI-based Formal Verification
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled workflows that generate SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) from natural-language specifications, with the potential to accelerate Formal Verification (FV). However, high-quality assertion synthesis remains challenging because specifications are often ambiguous or incomplete and critical micro-architectural details reside in the Register Transfer Level (RTL). Many existing approaches treat the specification and RTL as loosely structured text, which weakens specification-to-RTL grounding and leads to semantic mismatches and frequent syntax failures during formal parsing and elaboration. This work addresses these limitations with a verification-centric Knowledge Graph (KG) constructed from structured Intermediate Representations (IRs) extracted from the specification, RTL, and formal-tool feedback, including syntax diagnostics, Counterexamples (CEXs), and coverage reports. The KG links requirements, design hierarchy, signals, assumptions, and properties to provide traceable, design-grounded context for generation. A multi-agent workflow queries and updates this KG to generate SVAs and to drive three refinement loops: syntax repair guided by tool diagnostics, CEX-guided correction using trace links, and coverage-directed property augmentation. Evaluation across seven benchmark designs indicates that KG-based context retrieval improves specification-to-RTL grounding and consistently produces compilable SVAs with low syntax-repair overhead. The approach achieves formal coverage ranging from 78.5% to 99.4%, though convergence exhibits design dependence with complex temporal and arithmetic reasoning remaining challenging for current LLM capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于知识图谱的多智能体工作流，通过结构化中间表示提升SystemVerilog断言生成的规范到RTL对齐与形式化验证覆盖率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM从自然语言生成SystemVerilog断言时，因规范模糊、RTL细节缺失导致语义不匹配和语法错误，形式化验证效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何利用知识图谱增强规范到RTL的语义对齐，减少断言生成中的语法失败和语义偏差，提升形式化验证覆盖率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出规范常模糊或不完整，关键微架构细节存在于RTL中，现有方法将规范和RTL视为松散文本导致对齐弱、语法失败频繁。
analysis.method: 构建验证中心知识图谱，从规范、RTL和形式化工具反馈中提取结构化中间表示，链接需求、设计层次、信号、假设和属性；多智能体工作流查询和更新知识图谱以生成断言，并驱动语法修复、反例引导修正和覆盖导向属性增强三个精化循环。
contributions: 提出验证中心知识图谱，整合规范、RTL和形式化工具反馈的结构化中间表示，提供可追溯的设计上下文。
设计多智能体工作流，利用知识图谱进行断言生成和三个精化循环（语法修复、反例修正、覆盖增强）。
analysis.experiments: 在七个基准设计上评估，基于知识图谱的上下文检索改善了规范到RTL的对齐，持续生成可编译的断言且语法修复开销低，形式化覆盖率达78.5%至99.4%，但收敛存在设计依赖性，复杂时序和算术推理仍具挑战。
limitations: 复杂时序和算术推理仍超出当前LLM能力。
收敛性依赖具体设计，可能不适用于所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于知识图谱的多智能体工作流，通过结构化中间表示提升SystemVerilog断言生成的规范到RTL对齐与形式化验证覆盖率。

papers.title: Dimensional Coactivation for Representational Consistency in Frozen Vision Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Frozen vision foundation models do not merely extract features; they organize images through a learned coordinate system. We ask whether that coordinate system remains internally coherent within a single input. This leads to Representational Consistency: the study of whether a frozen foundation model represents one sample coherently across its semantic subregions. We introduce Dimensional Coactivation (DCA), a per-dimension instrument for measuring this coherence. DCA compares semantic regions by asking whether the same feature dimensions coactivate across them. Unlike classical similarity measures, it deliberately avoids centering, L2 normalization, and full Gram coupling. These operations are useful when comparing different models or distributions, but they are mismatched to the intra-sample setting, where the coordinate system is fixed and raw magnitude carries signal. Deepfake detection provides a natural validation task. Synthetic faces may reproduce plausible eyes, noses, and mouths while breaking the representational structure that links those regions in real faces. Using frozen DINOv3 features, DCA exposes this break: an eyes-mouth-nose fingerprint achieves 0.9106 AUC on CelebDF-v2 and 0.9289 on DFD under FF++ c23 cross-dataset transfer. The design is also sharply validated by ablation: reintroducing centering collapses CelebDF-v2 AUC to 0.459, L2 normalization reduces it to 0.862, and cross-dimension coupling reduces it to 0.478. Finally, replacing DINOv3 with FaRL collapses CelebDF-v2 AUC to 0.582. DCA therefore depends on a stable per-dimension coordinate system, not on region extraction alone. These results position DCA as an instrument for measuring intra-sample representational coherence in frozen foundation models, with deepfake detection as the first validation task.

analysis.tldr: 提出维度共激活（DCA）方法，用于衡量冻结视觉基础模型在单样本内语义子区域间的表征一致性，并在深度伪造检测任务上验证其有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 冻结视觉基础模型通过学习到的坐标系组织图像，但该坐标系在单个输入内部是否保持一致性尚不清楚；现有相似性度量（如中心化、L2归一化、全Gram耦合）适用于跨模型或跨分布比较，但不适用于固定坐标系下的样本内设置，原始幅度信号在此场景下携带重要信息。
analysis.problem: 如何衡量冻结视觉基础模型在单个样本内不同语义子区域间的表征一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 深度伪造人脸可能复制逼真的眼睛、鼻子和嘴巴，但破坏了真实人脸中连接这些区域的表征结构；DCA通过分析维度共激活模式能够暴露这种断裂。
analysis.method: 提出维度共激活（DCA），通过比较不同语义区域中相同特征维度是否共激活来测量表征一致性；避免中心化、L2归一化和全Gram耦合，保留原始幅度信号。
contributions: 提出表征一致性概念及DCA度量方法，用于评估冻结基础模型样本内表征的连贯性。
在深度伪造检测任务上验证DCA的有效性，使用DINOv3特征在CelebDF-v2和DFD数据集上取得高AUC，并通过消融实验证明设计选择的关键性。
analysis.experiments: 在CelebDF-v2和DFD（FF++ c23跨数据集迁移）上使用冻结DINOv3特征进行深度伪造检测，眼睛-嘴巴-鼻子指纹AUC分别为0.9106和0.9289；消融实验显示中心化使AUC降至0.459，L2归一化降至0.862，跨维度耦合降至0.478；替换DINOv3为FaRL使AUC降至0.582。
limitations: 仅以深度伪造检测作为首个验证任务，其他应用场景尚未探索。
依赖稳定的逐维度坐标系，可能受模型架构或预训练数据影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出维度共激活（DCA）方法，用于衡量冻结视觉基础模型在单样本内语义子区域间的表征一致性，并在深度伪造检测任务上验证其有效性。

papers.title: FREPix: Frequency-Heterogeneous Flow Matching for Pixel-Space Image Generation
papers.abstract: Pixel-space diffusion has re-emerged as a promising alternative to latent-space generation because it avoids the representation bottleneck introduced by VAEs. Yet most existing methods still treat image generation as a frequency-homogeneous process, overlooking the distinct roles and learning dynamics of low- and high-frequency components. To address this, we propose FREPix, a FREquency-heterogeneous flow matching framework for Pixel-space image generation. FREPix explicitly decomposes generation into low- and high-frequency components, assigns them separate transport paths, predicts them with a factorized network, and trains them with a frequency-aware objective. In this way, coarse-to-fine generation becomes an explicit design principle rather than an implicit behavior. On ImageNet class-to-image generation, FREPix achieves competitive results among pixel-space generation models, reaching 1.91 FID at $256\times256$ and 2.38 FID at $512\times512$, with particularly strong behavior in the low-NFE regime.

analysis.tldr: FREPix通过频率异质流匹配将像素空间图像生成分解为低频和高频分量，实现粗到细的显式生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 像素空间扩散模型避免了VAE的表示瓶颈，但现有方法将图像生成视为频率同质过程，忽略了低频和高频分量的不同角色和学习动态。
analysis.problem: 如何显式地利用频率异质性来改进像素空间图像生成的质量和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出低频和高频分量在生成过程中具有不同的角色和学习动态，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FREPix框架：将生成分解为低频和高频分量，分配独立的传输路径，使用分解网络预测，并采用频率感知目标训练。
contributions: 提出频率异质流匹配框架，显式实现粗到细的生成。
在ImageNet类条件生成上达到竞争性FID（256x256: 1.91, 512x512: 2.38），尤其在低NFE下表现突出。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet类条件图像生成任务上评估，报告了FID指标。
limitations: 可能仅适用于像素空间生成，未验证在潜在空间或其他模态的效果。
频率分解策略可能增加模型复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FREPix通过频率异质流匹配将像素空间图像生成分解为低频和高频分量，实现粗到细的显式生成。

papers.title: E = T*H/(O+B): A Dimensionless Control Parameter for Mixture-of-Experts Ecology
papers.abstract: We introduce E = T*H/(O+B), a dimensionless control parameter that predicts whether Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models will develop a healthy expert ecology or collapse into dead experts. E combines four hyperparameters -- routing temperature T, routing entropy weight H, oracle weight O, and balance weight B -- into a single quantity. Through 12 controlled experiments (8 vision, 4 language) totaling over 11,000 training epochs, we establish that E >= 0.5 alone is sufficient to guarantee zero dead experts, removing the necessity for handcrafted load-balancing auxiliary losses. We validate this cross-modally on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, TinyImageNet-200, WikiText-2, and WikiText-103. Six additional findings emerge: (1) dead experts can resuscitate -- triggered by balance loss driving router re-exploration; (2) ortho toxicity is dataset-dependent, not universal; (3) task complexity shifts the critical E threshold; (4) model overfitting is decoupled from expert ecological health; (5) three-tier MoE spontaneously collapses into a two-tier functional structure; (6) ecological structure is temperature-invariant across a 50x range. We propose that E serves as a unified diagnostic for MoE training, analogous to the Reynolds number in fluid dynamics.

analysis.tldr: 提出无量纲控制参数E，预测MoE模型专家生态健康，E≥0.5即可保证无死亡专家。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE模型中死亡专家问题普遍存在，传统依赖手工设计的负载均衡辅助损失，缺乏统一诊断指标。
analysis.problem: 如何预测和避免MoE模型中的死亡专家，实现健康的专家生态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过12个控制实验发现：E≥0.5可保证零死亡专家；死亡专家可复苏；正交毒性依赖数据集；任务复杂度影响临界E值；过拟合与专家生态健康解耦；三层MoE自发塌缩为两层；生态结构在50倍温度范围内不变。
analysis.method: 提出无量纲控制参数E = T*H/(O+B)，结合路由温度T、路由熵权重H、oracle权重O和平衡权重B，用于诊断MoE训练。
contributions: 提出E参数作为MoE训练的统一诊断工具，类似流体力学中的雷诺数。
通过跨模态实验验证E≥0.5可保证零死亡专家，无需辅助损失。
发现六项关于MoE专家生态的新现象。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、TinyImageNet-200、WikiText-2和WikiText-103上进行12个控制实验（8视觉、4语言），总计超过11,000训练轮次。
limitations: E参数的有效性可能依赖于特定超参数范围，未在更大规模模型上验证。
摘要未讨论E参数对模型性能（如准确率）的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无量纲控制参数E，预测MoE模型专家生态健康，E≥0.5即可保证无死亡专家。

papers.title: HumanNet: Scaling Human-centric Video Learning to One Million Hours
papers.abstract: Progress in embodied intelligence increasingly depends on scalable data infrastructure. While vision and language have scaled with internet corpora, learning physical interaction remains constrained by the lack of large, diverse, and richly annotated human activity data. We present HumanNet, a one-million-hour human-centric video corpus that captures how humans interact with the physical world at scale. HumanNet spans both first-person and third-person perspectives and covers fine-grained activities, human-object interactions, tool use, and long-horizon behaviors across diverse real-world environments. Beyond raw video, the dataset provides interaction-centric annotations, including captions, motion descriptions, and hand and body-related signals, enabling motion-aware and interaction-aware learning. Beyond scale, HumanNet introduces a systematic data curation paradigm for embodied learning, where human-centric filtering, temporal structuring, viewpoint diversity, and annotation enrichment are treated as first-class design principles. This design transforms unstructured internet video into a scalable substrate for representation learning, activity understanding, motion generation, and human-to-robot transfer. We conduct a first-step validation on the value of this design through controlled vision-language-action ablation: under a fixed set of validation data, continued training from the Qwen VLM model with 1000 hours of egocentric video drawn from HumanNet surpasses the continued training with 100 hours of real-robot data from Magic Cobot, indicating that egocentric human video could be a scalable and cost-effective substitute for robot data. By building this project, we aim to explore the opportunity to scale embodied foundation models using human-centric videos, rather than relying solely on robot-specific data.

analysis.tldr: HumanNet 是一个百万小时级人类中心视频数据集，通过系统化数据策展范式支持具身智能学习，初步实验表明第一人称人类视频可替代机器人数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身智能依赖大规模数据基础设施，但物理交互学习受限于缺乏大规模、多样且丰富标注的人类活动数据。
analysis.problem: 如何构建大规模、高质量的人类中心视频数据集，以支持具身智能中的表征学习、活动理解、运动生成和人到机器人迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 HumanNet，包含百万小时人类中心视频，覆盖第一/第三人称视角、细粒度活动、人-物交互、工具使用和长程行为，并提供交互中心标注（字幕、运动描述、手部和身体信号）。数据策展将人类中心过滤、时间结构化、视角多样性和标注丰富性作为一等设计原则。
contributions: 构建了百万小时级人类中心视频数据集 HumanNet，规模远超现有数据集。
提出了系统化的数据策展范式，将人类中心过滤、时间结构化、视角多样性和标注丰富性作为核心设计原则。
通过受控消融实验验证了第一人称人类视频可作为机器人数据的可扩展且经济的替代方案。
analysis.experiments: 在固定验证集上，使用 HumanNet 中 1000 小时第一人称视频对 Qwen VLM 进行持续训练，性能超过使用 Magic Cobot 中 100 小时真实机器人数据持续训练的结果。
limitations: 仅进行了初步验证，未在多种下游任务上全面评估。
数据集规模虽大，但视频质量、标注一致性等细节未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HumanNet 是一个百万小时级人类中心视频数据集，通过系统化数据策展范式支持具身智能学习，初步实验表明第一人称人类视频可替代机器人数据。

papers.title: WavCube: Unifying Speech Representation for Understanding and Generation via Semantic-Acoustic Joint Modeling
papers.abstract: Integrating speech understanding and generation is a pivotal step toward building unified speech models. However, the different representations required for these two tasks currently pose significant compatibility challenges. Typically, semantics-oriented features are learned from self-supervised learning (SSL), and acoustic-oriented features from reconstruction. Such fragmented representations hinder the realization of truly unified speech systems. We present WavCube, a compact continuous latent derived from an SSL speech encoder that simultaneously supports speech understanding, reconstruction, and generation. WavCube employs a two-stage training scheme. Stage 1 trains a semantic bottleneck to filter off-manifold redundancy that makes raw SSL features intractable for diffusion. Stage 2 injects fine-grained acoustic details via end-to-end reconstruction, while a semantic anchoring loss ensures the representation remains grounded within its original semantic manifold. Comprehensive experiments show that WavCube closely approaches WavLM performance on SUPERB despite an 8x dimensional compression, attains reconstruction quality on par with existing acoustic representations, delivers state-of-the-art zero-shot TTS performance with markedly faster training convergence, and excels in speech enhancement, separation, and voice conversion tasks on the SUPERB-SG benchmark. Systematic ablations reveal that WavCube's two-stage recipe resolves two intrinsic flaws of SSL features for generative modeling, paving the way for future unified speech systems. Codes and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/yanghaha0908/WavCube.

analysis.tldr: WavCube通过语义-声学联合建模，从SSL特征中提取紧凑连续潜变量，统一支持语音理解、重建与生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前语音理解与生成任务使用不同表示（语义特征来自自监督学习，声学特征来自重建），导致系统碎片化，难以构建真正的统一语音模型。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种统一的语音表示，同时支持理解、重建与生成，并解决SSL特征在生成建模中的固有问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SSL特征包含离流形冗余，导致扩散模型难以处理；直接使用SSL特征进行生成建模存在两个固有问题。
analysis.method: 两阶段训练：阶段1训练语义瓶颈过滤冗余，阶段2通过端到端重建注入声学细节，并引入语义锚定损失保持语义流形。
contributions: 提出WavCube，一种紧凑连续潜变量，统一支持语音理解、重建与生成。
揭示SSL特征在生成建模中的两个固有问题，并通过两阶段方案解决。
在SUPERB、SUPERB-SG等基准上取得优异性能，包括零样本TTS、语音增强等任务。
analysis.experiments: 在SUPERB上接近WavLM性能（8倍维度压缩），重建质量与现有声学表示相当，零样本TTS达到SOTA且训练收敛更快，在SUPERB-SG的语音增强、分离、转换任务上表现优异。
limitations: 可能依赖特定SSL编码器（如WavLM），泛化性待验证。
两阶段训练可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WavCube通过语义-声学联合建模，从SSL特征中提取紧凑连续潜变量，统一支持语音理解、重建与生成。

papers.title: Consistent Geometric Deep Learning via Hilbert Bundles and Cellular Sheaves
papers.abstract: Modern deep learning architectures increasingly contend with sophisticated signals that are natively infinite-dimensional, such as time series, probability distributions, or operators, and are defined over irregular domains. Yet, a unified learning theory for these settings has been lacking. To start addressing this gap, we introduce a novel convolutional learning framework for possibly infinite-dimensional signals supported on a manifold. Namely, we use the connection Laplacian associated with a Hilbert bundle as a convolutional operator, and we derive filters and neural networks, dubbed as \textit{HilbNets}. We make HilbNets and, more generally, the convolution operation, implementable via a two-stage sampling procedure. First, we show that sampling the manifold induces a Hilbert Cellular Sheaf, a generalized graph structure with Hilbert feature spaces and edge-wise coupling rules, and we prove that its sheaf Laplacian converges in probability to the underlying connection Laplacian as the sampling density increases. Notably, this result is a generalization to the infinite-dimensional bundle setting of the Belkin \& Niyogi \cite{BELKIN20081289} convergence result for the graph Laplacian to the manifold Laplacian, a theoretical cornerstone of geometric learning methods. Second, we discretize the signals and prove that the discretized (implementable) HilbNets converge to the underlying continuous architectures and are transferable across different samplings of the same bundle, providing consistency for learning. Finally, we validate our framework on synthetic and real-world tasks. Overall, our results broaden the scope of geometric learning as a whole by lifting classical Laplacian-based frameworks to settings where the signal at each point lives in its own Hilbert space.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Hilbert丛和细胞层的几何深度学习框架HilbNets，实现无限维流形信号的卷积学习并证明一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代深度学习处理无限维信号（如时间序列、概率分布）且定义在不规则域上，但缺乏统一的学习理论。
analysis.problem: 如何为流形上可能无限维的信号设计可实现的卷积学习框架并保证一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用Hilbert丛上的连接拉普拉斯作为卷积算子，通过两步采样实现：先采样流形诱导Hilbert细胞层，证明其层拉普拉斯概率收敛到连接拉普拉斯；再离散化信号并证明离散HilbNets收敛到连续架构且可迁移。
contributions: 提出HilbNets，首个针对无限维流形信号的卷积学习框架。
证明采样诱导的Hilbert细胞层层拉普拉斯概率收敛到连接拉普拉斯，推广了Belkin & Niyogi的经典结果。
证明离散HilbNets收敛到连续架构且跨采样一致，提供理论保证。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实任务上验证了框架。
limitations: 可能依赖流形和Hilbert丛的平滑性假设。
实际计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Hilbert丛和细胞层的几何深度学习框架HilbNets，实现无限维流形信号的卷积学习并证明一致性。

papers.title: Automated alignment is harder than you think
papers.abstract: A leading proposal for aligning artificial superintelligence (ASI) is to use AI agents to automate an increasing fraction of alignment research as capabilities improve. We argue that, even when research agents are not scheming to deliberately sabotage alignment work, this plan could produce compelling but catastrophically misleading safety assessments resulting in the unintentional deployment of misaligned AI. This could happen because alignment research involves many hard-to-supervise fuzzy tasks (tasks without clear evaluation criteria, for which human judgement is systematically flawed). Consequently, research outputs will contain systematic, undetected errors, and even correct outputs could be incorrectly aggregated into overconfident safety assessments. This problem is likely to be worse for automated alignment research than for human-generated alignment research for several reasons: 1) optimisation pressure means agent-generated mistakes are concentrated among those that human reviewers are least likely to catch; 2) agents are likely to produce errors that do not resemble human mistakes; 3) AI-generated alignment solutions may involve arguments humans cannot evaluate; and 4) shared weights, data and training processes may make AI outputs more correlated than human equivalents. Therefore, agents must be trained to reliably perform hard-to-supervise fuzzy tasks. Generalisation and scalable oversight are the leading candidates for achieving this but both face novel challenges in the context of automated alignment.

analysis.tldr: 自动化对齐研究可能因难以监督的模糊任务而产生系统性错误，导致灾难性安全评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 对齐超级智能是AI安全的核心挑战，自动化对齐研究被视为扩展方案，但其中隐藏的风险尚未被充分认识。
analysis.problem: 自动化对齐研究可能产生系统性的、未被察觉的错误，导致对未对齐AI的过度自信部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对齐研究包含许多难以监督的模糊任务（缺乏明确评估标准，人类判断有系统性缺陷），自动化研究比人类研究更容易产生集中、不似人类、难以评估且相关的错误。
analysis.method: 通过分析自动化对齐研究中的模糊任务特性，指出泛化和可扩展监督面临的新挑战。
contributions: 识别自动化对齐研究中因模糊任务导致的系统性错误风险
提出自动化对齐研究比人类研究更易出错的四个原因
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证数据支持论点
未提出具体解决方案
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自动化对齐研究可能因难以监督的模糊任务而产生系统性错误，导致灾难性安全评估。

papers.title: Reconstruction or Semantics? What Makes a Latent Space Useful for Robotic World Models
papers.abstract: World model-based policy evaluation is a practical proxy for testing real-world robot control by rolling out candidate actions in action-conditioned video diffusion models. As these models increasingly adopt latent diffusion modeling (LDM), choosing the right latent space becomes critical. While the status quo uses autoencoding latent spaces like VAEs that are primarily trained for pixel reconstruction, recent work suggests benefits from pretrained encoders with representation-aligned semantic latent spaces. We systematically evaluate these latent spaces for action-conditioned LDM by comparing six reconstruction and semantic encoders to train world model variants under a fixed protocol on BridgeV2 dataset, and show effective world model training in high-dimensional representation spaces with and without dimension compression. We then propose three axes to assess robotic world model performance: visual fidelity, planning and downstream policy performance, and latent representation quality. Our results show visual fidelity alone is insufficient for world model selection. While reconstruction encoders like VAE and Cosmos achieve strong pixel-level scores, semantic encoders such as V-JEPA 2.1 (strongest overall on policy), Web-DINO, and SigLIP 2 generally excel across the other two axes at all model scales. Our study advocates semantic latent space as stronger foundation for policy-relevant robotics diffusion world models.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较重建型和语义型潜空间在机器人世界模型中的表现，发现语义潜空间在策略相关任务上更优。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于世界模型的策略评估是机器人控制的重要代理方法，但潜扩散模型中选择合适的潜空间至关重要，现有研究对重建型和语义型潜空间的优劣缺乏系统比较。
analysis.problem: 确定在动作条件潜扩散模型中，哪种潜空间（重建型 vs 语义型）对机器人世界模型更有效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在BridgeV2数据集上，使用固定协议训练六种重建型和语义型编码器的世界模型变体，并从视觉保真度、规划与下游策略性能、潜表示质量三个维度评估。
contributions: 系统比较了六种重建型和语义型潜空间在机器人世界模型中的表现。
提出了评估机器人世界模型性能的三个轴：视觉保真度、规划与策略性能、潜表示质量。
发现语义潜空间（如V-JEPA 2.1）在策略相关任务上优于重建型潜空间。
analysis.experiments: 在BridgeV2数据集上，使用固定协议训练并评估了六种编码器的世界模型变体。
limitations: 仅在BridgeV2数据集上评估，泛化性未知。
未探讨不同任务或机器人平台的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统比较重建型和语义型潜空间在机器人世界模型中的表现，发现语义潜空间在策略相关任务上更优。

papers.title: Asymmetric On-Policy Distillation: Bridging Exploitation and Imitation at the Token Level
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own trajectories with token-level teacher feedback and often outperforms off-policy distillation and standard reinforcement learning. However, we find that its standard advantage weighted policy gradient suffers from three structural weaknesses, including high variance updates, vanishing gradients in zero-advantage regions, and exploration bottlenecks when corrective signals are insufficient. We therefore propose Asymmetric On-Policy Distillation (AOPD), which replaces ineffective negative reinforcement with localized divergence minimization in non-positive advantage regions while preserving positive reinforcement learning. Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that AOPD consistently outperforms standard OPD, with average gains of 4.09 / 8.34 under strong / weak initialization, respectively. AOPD also maintains higher policy entropy during training and better capability retention during sequential tool-use adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出非对称同策略蒸馏（AOPD），通过局部散度最小化替代无效负强化，提升数学推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 同策略蒸馏（OPD）虽优于离策略蒸馏和标准强化学习，但其优势加权策略梯度存在高方差、零优势区梯度消失和探索瓶颈等结构性问题，限制了性能提升。
analysis.problem: 解决标准同策略蒸馏中优势加权策略梯度的三个结构弱点：高方差更新、零优势区域梯度消失以及纠正信号不足时的探索瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准OPD在零优势区域梯度消失，导致无效负强化；高方差更新影响训练稳定性；纠正信号不足时探索受限。
analysis.method: 提出非对称同策略蒸馏（AOPD），在非正优势区域用局部散度最小化替代无效负强化，同时保留正优势区域的强化学习。
contributions: 识别并分析了标准同策略蒸馏中优势加权策略梯度的三个结构弱点
提出AOPD方法，通过非对称处理正负优势区域来缓解上述弱点
在数学推理基准上验证了AOPD的显著提升，并展示了更好的策略熵保持和工具适应能力
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理基准上实验，AOPD在强/弱初始化下平均提升4.09/8.34，并保持更高策略熵和更好的顺序工具适应能力。
limitations: 可能仅在数学推理任务上验证，泛化性未知
未讨论计算开销对比
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非对称同策略蒸馏（AOPD），通过局部散度最小化替代无效负强化，提升数学推理性能。

papers.title: MinMax Recurrent Neural Cascades
papers.abstract: We show that the MinMax algebra provides a form of recurrence that is expressively powerful, efficiently implementable, and most importantly it is not affected by vanishing or exploding gradient. We call MinMax Recurrent Neural Cascades (RNCs) the models obtained by cascading several layers of neurons that employ such recurrence. We show that MinMax RNCs enjoy many favourable theoretical properties. First, their formal expressivity includes all regular languages, arguably the maximal expressivity for a finite-memory system. Second, they can be evaluated in parallel with a runtime that is logarithmic in the input length given enough processors; and they can also be evaluated sequentially. Third, their state and activations are bounded uniformly for all input lengths. Fourth, at almost all points, their loss gradient exists and it is bounded. Fifth, they do not exhibit a vanishing state gradient: the gradient of a state w.r.t. a past state can have constant value one regardless of the time distance between the two states. Finally, we find empirical evidence that the favourable theoretical properties of MinMax RNCs are matched by their practical capabilities: they are able to perfectly solve a number of synthetic tasks, showing superior performance compared to the considered state-of-the-art recurrent neural networks; also, we train a MinMax RNC of 127M parameters on next-token prediction, and the obtained model shows competitive performance for its size, providing evidence of the potential of MinMax RNCs on real-world tasks.

analysis.tldr: MinMax循环神经级联（RNC）通过MinMax代数实现无梯度消失/爆炸的强表达力循环结构，理论性质优越且实验表现良好。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统RNN面临梯度消失/爆炸问题，限制了其处理长序列的能力；MinMax代数提供了一种可能避免这些问题的循环形式。
analysis.problem: 设计一种既具有强表达力又不受梯度消失/爆炸影响的循环神经网络架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MinMax循环神经级联（RNC），使用MinMax代数构建循环层，并级联多层神经元。
contributions: 证明MinMax RNC能表达所有正则语言，具有有限记忆系统的最大表达力。
证明MinMax RNC可并行评估（对数时间）和顺序评估，状态和激活值对所有输入长度一致有界，损失梯度存在且有界，且状态梯度不会消失。
analysis.experiments: 在合成任务上完美解决多个任务，性能优于现有RNN；训练了一个127M参数的MinMax RNC用于下一个token预测，在模型大小下表现有竞争力。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更大规模或更复杂真实任务上的表现。
MinMax RNC的并行化可能依赖足够多的处理器，实际部署中可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MinMax循环神经级联（RNC）通过MinMax代数实现无梯度消失/爆炸的强表达力循环结构，理论性质优越且实验表现良好。

papers.title: Rethinking Vacuity for OOD Detection in Evidential Deep Learning
papers.abstract: Vacuity, or Uncertainty Mass (UM), is commonly used as a metric to evaluate Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection in Evidential Deep Learning (EDL). It generally involves dividing the number of classes ($K$) by the total strength of belief ($S$) of the model's predictions, where $S$ is derived from summing the Dirichlet parameters. As such, UM is sensitive to the cardinality of $K$. In particular, it is unlikely in practice that there is a linear relationship between $K$ and $S$ as $K$ and $S$ increase due to the nature of EDL (suppressing incorrectly assigned evidence). As a result, when comparing In Distribution (ID) and OOD results, it is important that $K_{\mathrm{ID}}$ and $K_{\mathrm{OOD}}$ are equal; something that is not always ensured in practice. We provide an empirical demonstration of how results for AUROC and AUPR can substantially differ when class cardinality between ID and OOD differs by 1, with AUROC differing by as much as 0.318 and AUPR by 0.613 for standard EDL, and AUROC by 0.360 and AUPR by 0.683 for IB-EDL. More concretely, our findings isolate an evaluation artefact: when K differs between ID and OOD, AUROC/AUPR can be artificially inflated without any change in model predictions. We further discuss the evaluation of EDL over causal language models using Multiple-Choice Question-Answer (MCQA) datasets and argue for clearer definitions of ID and OOD in this context. Our primary contribution is an empirical and theoretical demonstration that vacuity-based OOD detection in EDL-fine-tuned LLMs is highly sensitive to uncontrolled differences in evaluated class cardinality.

analysis.tldr: 证据深度学习中的空度（不确定性质量）对类别基数敏感，导致OOD检测评估出现人为偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 空度（UM）是证据深度学习（EDL）中常用的OOD检测指标，但其对类别数K的线性假设在实际中不成立，导致评估结果可能被人为夸大。
analysis.problem: EDL中基于空度的OOD检测指标在ID和OOD类别数不同时会产生评估伪影，需要重新审视其有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当ID和OOD的类别数K相差1时，AUROC和AUPR可分别相差0.318和0.613（标准EDL），以及0.360和0.683（IB-EDL），且这种差异不反映模型预测的真实变化。
analysis.method: 通过理论分析和实证实验，展示空度对类别基数的敏感性，并讨论在因果语言模型的多选题问答（MCQA）数据集上的评估问题。
contributions: 理论和实证证明基于空度的OOD检测在EDL微调LLM中对类别基数差异高度敏感
揭示评估伪影：当ID和OOD类别数不同时，AUROC/AUPR可能被人为夸大
analysis.experiments: 在标准EDL和IB-EDL上，通过改变类别数K进行AUROC和AUPR对比实验，显示最大差异分别为0.318/0.613和0.360/0.683。
limitations: 仅针对空度指标，未讨论其他不确定性度量
实验限于特定EDL变体和MCQA场景
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 证据深度学习中的空度（不确定性质量）对类别基数敏感，导致OOD检测评估出现人为偏差。

papers.title: Empirical Evidence for Simply Connected Decision Regions in Image Classifiers
papers.abstract: Understanding the topology of decision regions is central to explaining the inner workings of deep neural networks. Prior empirical work has provided evidence that these regions are path connected. We study a stronger topological question: whether closed loops inside a decision region can be contracted without leaving that region. To this end, we propose an iterative quad-mesh filling procedure that constructs a finite-resolution label-preserving surface bounded by a given loop and lying entirely within the same decision region. We further connect this construction to natural Coons patches in order to quantify its deviation from a canonical geometric interpolation of the loop. By evaluating our method across several modern image-classification models, we provide empirical evidence supporting the hypothesis that decision regions in deep neural networks are not only path connected, but also simply connected.

analysis.tldr: 提出迭代四边形网格填充方法，实证表明深度图像分类器的决策区域不仅是路径连通的，而且是单连通的。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解决策区域的拓扑结构对于解释深度神经网络内部机制至关重要，但现有工作仅证明了路径连通性，更强的单连通性尚未被验证。
analysis.problem: 验证深度图像分类器决策区域是否具有单连通性（即闭环能否在区域内连续收缩）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出迭代四边形网格填充过程，构造给定闭环的有限分辨率标签保持曲面，并连接至Coons patch以量化与规范几何插值的偏差。
contributions: 提出一种验证决策区域单连通性的迭代四边形网格填充方法
通过多个现代图像分类模型提供实证证据，支持决策区域单连通的假设
analysis.experiments: 在多个现代图像分类模型上评估了所提方法，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法依赖于有限分辨率网格，可能无法完全覆盖所有拓扑情况
仅针对图像分类器，未推广到其他模型或任务
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
tags: 深度神经网络可解释性
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出迭代四边形网格填充方法，实证表明深度图像分类器的决策区域不仅是路径连通的，而且是单连通的。

papers.title: Continuous-Time Distribution Matching for Few-Step Diffusion Distillation
papers.abstract: Step distillation has become a leading technique for accelerating diffusion models, among which Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) and Consistency Distillation are two representative paradigms. While consistency methods enforce self-consistency along the full PF-ODE trajectory to steer it toward the clean data manifold, vanilla DMD relies on sparse supervision at a few predefined discrete timesteps. This restricted discrete-time formulation and mode-seeking nature of the reverse KL divergence tends to exhibit visual artifacts and over-smoothed outputs, often necessitating complex auxiliary modules -- such as GANs or reward models -- to restore visual fidelity. In this work, we introduce Continuous-Time Distribution Matching (CDM), migrating the DMD framework from discrete anchoring to continuous optimization for the first time. CDM achieves this through two continuous-time designs. First, we replace the fixed discrete schedule with a dynamic continuous schedule of random length, so that distribution matching is enforced at arbitrary points along sampling trajectories rather than only at a few fixed anchors. Second, we propose a continuous-time alignment objective that performs active off-trajectory matching on latents extrapolated via the student's velocity field, improving generalization and preserving fine visual details. Extensive experiments on different architectures, including SD3-Medium and Longcat-Image, demonstrate that CDM provides highly competitive visual fidelity for few-step image generation without relying on complex auxiliary objectives. Code is available at https://github.com/byliutao/cdm.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续时间分布匹配（CDM），将扩散模型的分布匹配蒸馏从离散时间步扩展到连续时间优化，提升少步生成视觉保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）依赖稀疏的离散时间步监督，导致视觉伪影和过度平滑，常需GAN等复杂辅助模块；而一致性方法虽沿完整轨迹约束，但计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖复杂辅助模块的情况下，通过连续时间优化提升少步扩散蒸馏的视觉质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，DMD的离散时间步公式和反向KL散度的模式寻求特性会导致视觉伪影和过度平滑输出。
analysis.method: 提出连续时间分布匹配（CDM），包含两个连续时间设计：1）动态连续调度，在随机长度的连续时间点上进行分布匹配；2）连续时间对齐目标，通过学生速度场外推潜在表示进行主动离轨迹匹配。
contributions: 首次将DMD框架从离散锚定迁移到连续时间优化，提出CDM方法。
设计动态连续调度和连续时间对齐目标，无需GAN等辅助模块即可提升少步生成视觉保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在SD3-Medium和Longcat-Image等不同架构上进行实验，表明CDM在少步图像生成中具有高度竞争力的视觉保真度。
limitations: 可能对连续时间调度的超参数敏感。
未在更大规模模型或视频生成任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续时间分布匹配（CDM），将扩散模型的分布匹配蒸馏从离散时间步扩展到连续时间优化，提升少步生成视觉保真度。

papers.title: A Unified Pair-GRPO Family: From Implicit to Explicit Preference Constraints for Stable and General RL Alignment
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) alignment via reinforcement learning from human preferences (RLHF) suffers from unstable policy updates, ambiguous gradient directions, poor interpretability, and high gradient variance in mainstream pairwise preference learning paradigms. To systematically address these limitations, we establish a unified theoretical framework for preference-based RL optimization centered on the Pair-GRPO family, comprising two tightly coupled variants: Soft-Pair-GRPO and Hard-Pair-GRPO. Soft-Pair-GRPO is a minimal modification of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) that replaces group-normalized scalar rewards with binary pairwise preference rewards, retaining GRPO's clipped surrogate and KL-regularized structure. We prove a critical gradient equivalence theorem: under first-order Taylor expansion around the current policy, Soft-Pair-GRPO's gradient is a positive scalar multiple of standard GRPO's gradient, explaining its empirical stability despite discarding continuous reward magnitudes. Building on this foundation, we propose Hard-Pair-GRPO, an advanced variant introducing explicit local probability constraints and constrained KL-fitting optimization to further suppress gradient noise and global policy drift. We provide comprehensive theoretical guarantees for both variants--including monotonic policy improvement, deterministic gradient direction, gradient-variance reduction, and dynamic step-size convergence. Extensive experiments on standard LLM alignment benchmarks (HH-RLHF,UltraFeedback) and the MuJoCo continuous control task HalfCheetah-v4 demonstrate that our Pair-GRPO family consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in alignment quality, human preference win rate, training stability, and generalization to general reinforcement learning. Ablation studies validate the critical contributions of each core component.

analysis.tldr: 提出Pair-GRPO系列，通过隐式和显式偏好约束统一框架，提升RLHF对齐的稳定性和泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLHF方法存在策略更新不稳定、梯度方向模糊、可解释性差和高梯度方差等问题，亟需系统性的理论框架来统一和解决这些局限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种稳定、可解释且泛化的偏好强化学习对齐方法，克服主流成对偏好范式的缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Pair-GRPO系列，包括Soft-Pair-GRPO（最小化修改GRPO，用二元偏好奖励替代组归一化标量奖励）和Hard-Pair-GRPO（引入显式局部概率约束和约束KL拟合优化），并给出梯度等价定理和理论保证。
contributions: 建立了基于Pair-GRPO的统一偏好RL优化理论框架，包含两个紧密耦合的变体。
证明了Soft-Pair-GRPO的梯度等价定理，解释了其经验稳定性。
提出了Hard-Pair-GRPO，通过显式约束进一步抑制梯度噪声和策略漂移。
提供了单调策略改进、确定性梯度方向、梯度方差降低和动态步长收敛等理论保证。
analysis.experiments: 在HH-RLHF、UltraFeedback和MuJoCo HalfCheetah-v4上实验，表明Pair-GRPO在对齐质量、人类偏好胜率、训练稳定性和泛化性上优于SOTA基线，消融研究验证了各核心组件的贡献。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，尤其是约束强度。
理论分析基于一阶泰勒展开，高阶影响未考虑。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Pair-GRPO系列，通过隐式和显式偏好约束统一框架，提升RLHF对齐的稳定性和泛化性。

papers.title: Debiased Multimodal Personality Understanding through Dual Causal Intervention
papers.abstract: Multimodalpersonalityunderstandingplaysacriticalroleinhuman centered artificial intelligence. Previous work mainly focus on learn-ing rich multimodal representations for video personality under standing. However, they often suffer from potential harm caused by subject bias (e.g., observable age and unobservable mental states), as subjects originate from diverse demographic backgrounds. Learn ing such spurious associations between multimodal features and traits may lead to unfair personality understanding. In this work, weconstruct aStructural Causal Model (SCM)toanalyze theimpact of these biases from a causal perspective, and propose a novel Dual Causal Adjustment Network (DCAN) to mitigate the interference of subject attributes on personality understanding. Specifically, we design a Back-door Adjustment Causal Learning (BACL) module to block spurious correlations from observable demographic factors via a prototype-based confounder dictionary, and subsequently ap ply a Front-door Adjustment Causal Learning (FACL) module to ad dress latent and unobservable biases throughalearnedmediatordic tionary intervention, thereby achieving causal disentanglement of representations for deconfounded reasoning. Importantly, we con struct a Demographic-annotated Multimodal Student Personality (DMSP) dataset to support the analysis and discussion of fairness related factors. Extensive experiments on the benchmark dataset CFI-V2 and our DMSPdataset demonstrate that DCAN consistently improves prediction accuracy, reaching 92.11% and 92.90%, respec tively. Meanwhile, the improvementsinthefairnessmetricsofequal opportunity and demographic parity are 6.57% and 7.97% on CFI-V2, and 15.38% and 20.06% on the DMSP dataset. Our code and DMSP dataset are available at https://github.com/Sabrina-han/DCAN

analysis.tldr: 提出双因果干预网络（DCAN）消除多模态个性理解中的主体偏见，在CFI-V2和DMSP数据集上分别达到92.11%和92.90%的准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态个性理解中，主体来自不同人口背景，导致模型学习到多模态特征与特质之间的虚假关联，造成不公平的个性理解。
analysis.problem: 如何从因果角度消除多模态个性理解中由可观测和不可观测主体属性引起的偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 主体偏见（如年龄、心理状态）会导致模型学习虚假关联，影响个性理解的公平性。
analysis.method: 构建结构因果模型（SCM），提出双因果调整网络（DCAN），包含后门调整因果学习（BACL）模块（通过原型混淆字典阻断可观测因素的虚假关联）和前门调整因果学习（FACL）模块（通过中介字典干预处理潜在不可观测偏见），实现因果解耦。
contributions: 构建了人口统计注释的多模态学生个性（DMSP）数据集，支持公平性分析。
提出双因果调整网络（DCAN），通过后门和前门调整因果学习消除主体偏见。
在CFI-V2和DMSP数据集上显著提升预测准确率和公平性指标。
analysis.experiments: 在CFI-V2和DMSP数据集上进行实验，DCAN分别达到92.11%和92.90%的准确率，公平性指标（均等机会和人口均等）在CFI-V2上提升6.57%和7.97%，在DMSP上提升15.38%和20.06%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的人口统计注释数据。
中介字典的构建和干预可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双因果干预网络（DCAN）消除多模态个性理解中的主体偏见，在CFI-V2和DMSP数据集上分别达到92.11%和92.90%的准确率。

papers.title: eXplaining to Learn (eX2L): Regularization Using Contrastive Visual Explanation Pairs for Distribution Shifts
papers.abstract: Despite extensive research into mitigating distribution shifts, many existing algorithms yield inconsistent performance, often failing to outperform baseline Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM) across diverse scenarios. Furthermore, high algorithmic complexity frequently limits interpretability and offers only an indirect means of addressing spurious correlations. We propose eXplaining to Learn (eX2L): an interpretable, explanation-based framework that decorrelates confounding features from a classifier's latent representations during training. eX2L achieves this by penalizing the similarity between Grad-CAM activation maps generated by a primary label classifier and those from a concurrently trained confounder classifier. On the rigorous Spawrious Many-to-Many Hard Challenge benchmark, eX2L achieves an average accuracy (AA) of 82.24% +/- 3.87% and a worst-group accuracy (WGA) of 66.31% +/- 8.73%, outperforming the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) by 5.49% and 10.90%, respectively. Beyond its competitive performance, eX2L demonstrates that functional domain invariance can be achieved by explicitly decoupling label and nuisance attributes at the group level.

analysis.tldr: 提出eX2L框架，利用对比解释图正则化解耦混杂特征，在分布偏移基准上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分布偏移缓解算法性能不稳定，常不如经验风险最小化（ERM），且复杂度高、可解释性差，难以直接处理虚假相关。
analysis.problem: 如何通过可解释的方法在训练中解耦标签相关特征与混杂特征，提升模型在分布偏移下的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: eX2L：在训练中同时训练主标签分类器和混杂分类器，通过惩罚两者Grad-CAM激活图的相似性，强制解耦标签特征与混杂特征。
contributions: 提出一种可解释的基于解释的框架eX2L，通过对比解释图正则化实现特征解耦。
在Spawrious Many-to-Many Hard Challenge基准上取得SOTA性能，平均准确率82.24%，最差组准确率66.31%。
analysis.experiments: 在Spawrious Many-to-Many Hard Challenge基准上评估，eX2L平均准确率82.24%±3.87%，最差组准确率66.31%±8.73%，分别超过SOTA 5.49%和10.90%。
limitations: 依赖Grad-CAM解释图，可能受解释质量影响。
需要额外训练混杂分类器，增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出eX2L框架，利用对比解释图正则化解耦混杂特征，在分布偏移基准上超越SOTA。

papers.title: From Agent Loops to Deterministic Graphs: Execution Lineage for Reproducible AI-Native Work
papers.abstract: Large language model systems are increasingly deployed as agentic workflows that interleave reasoning, tool use, memory, and iterative refinement. These systems are effective at producing answers, but they often rely on implicit conversational state, making it difficult to preserve stable work products, isolate irrelevant updates, or propagate changes through intermediate artifacts. We introduce execution lineage: an execution model in which AI-native work is represented as a directed acyclic graph (DAG) of artifact-producing computations with explicit dependencies, stable intermediate boundaries, and identity-based replay. The goal is not to make the model a better one-shot writer, but to make evolving AI-generated work maintainable under change. We compare execution-lineage replay against loop-centric update baselines on two controlled policy-memo update tasks. In an unrelated-branch update, DAG replay preserved the final memo exactly in all runs, with zero churn and zero unrelated-branch contamination, while loop baselines regenerated the memo and frequently imported unrelated context. In an intermediate-artifact edit, all systems reflected the new constraint in the final memo, but only DAG replay achieved perfect upstream preservation, downstream propagation, unaffected-artifact preservation, and cross-artifact consistency. These results show that final answer quality and maintained-state quality are distinct. Strong loop baselines can remain competitive at producing polished final outputs when the task is a bounded synthesis/update problem and all current sources fit in context, but immediate task success can mask partial state inconsistency that may compound over future revisions. Execution lineage provides stronger guarantees about what should change, what should remain stable, and how work evolves across revisions.

analysis.tldr: 提出执行谱系（execution lineage）模型，将AI工作流表示为有向无环图（DAG），通过显式依赖和确定性重放实现可复现的AI原生工作。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM代理工作流依赖隐式对话状态，导致工作产品难以稳定保存、无关更新难以隔离、中间产物变更传播困难，亟需一种可维护、可复现的执行模型。
analysis.problem: 如何将AI原生工作流从隐式循环状态转变为显式、可复现、可维护的确定性执行模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 执行谱系：将AI原生工作表示为产生制品的计算有向无环图（DAG），具有显式依赖、稳定中间边界和基于身份的重放机制。
contributions: 提出执行谱系模型，用DAG表示AI工作流，支持确定性重放和变更传播。
通过策略备忘录更新任务实验，证明DAG重放在无关分支更新中零污染、零变动，在中间制品编辑中实现完美上游保留和下游传播。
analysis.experiments: 在两项受控策略备忘录更新任务上比较DAG重放与循环基线：无关分支更新任务中，DAG重放精确保留最终备忘录，零污染；中间制品编辑任务中，DAG重放实现完美上游保留、下游传播、未影响制品保留和跨制品一致性。
limitations: 实验仅涉及文本备忘录更新任务，未在更复杂多模态或长流程场景验证。
DAG构建和维护可能引入额外开销，摘要未讨论效率问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出执行谱系（execution lineage）模型，将AI工作流表示为有向无环图（DAG），通过显式依赖和确定性重放实现可复现的AI原生工作。

papers.title: Flow Matching with Arbitrary Auxiliary Paths
papers.abstract: We introduce a new generative modeling framework, \textbf{Flow Matching with Arbitrary Auxiliary Paths (AuxPath-FM)}, which generalizes conditional flow matching by incorporating an auxiliary variable drawn from an arbitrary distribution into the probability path. Unlike prior methods that restrict auxiliary components to Gaussian noise, AuxPath-FM allows the variable $η$ to follow any distribution, producing trajectories of the form $X_t = a(t)X_1 + b(t)X_0 + c(t)η$. We theoretically demonstrate that this construction preserves the continuity equation and maintains a training objective consistent with the marginal formulation. This flexibility enables the design of diverse probability paths using various priors, including Gaussian, Uniform, Laplace, and discrete Rademacher distributions, each offering unique geometric properties for generative flows. Furthermore, our framework allows for specialized tasks such as label-guided generation by encoding structured semantic information into the auxiliary distribution. Overall, AuxPath-FM provides a principled and general foundation for probability path design, offering both theoretical generality and practical flexibility for diverse generative modeling tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出AuxPath-FM框架，允许在流匹配中使用任意辅助分布来设计概率路径，提升生成模型的灵活性与通用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有条件流匹配方法将辅助变量限制为高斯噪声，限制了概率路径设计的多样性，无法灵活适应不同生成任务的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个通用的流匹配框架，允许辅助变量服从任意分布，从而生成多样化的概率路径。
