analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AuxPath-FM框架，将辅助变量η从任意分布中采样，定义轨迹形式X_t = a(t)X_1 + b(t)X_0 + c(t)η，并证明该构造保持连续性方程和边际训练目标。
contributions: 提出AuxPath-FM框架，将辅助变量推广到任意分布，包括高斯、均匀、拉普拉斯和离散Rademacher分布。
理论上证明该框架保持连续性方程和边际训练目标的一致性。
展示了框架在标签引导生成等任务中的灵活性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未在实验中验证不同辅助分布的实际性能差异。
可能面临高维辅助分布采样效率的挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AuxPath-FM框架，允许在流匹配中使用任意辅助分布来设计概率路径，提升生成模型的灵活性与通用性。

papers.title: The frame-level leakage trap: rethinking evaluation protocols for intrinsic image decomposition, with source-separable uncertainty as a case study
papers.abstract: Evaluation protocols for learned intrinsic image decomposition on MPI Sintel have been inconsistent. Several prior works split the dataset by frames, which allows spatially similar frames of the same scene to appear in both train and test partitions. We quantify this leakage effect for the first time, across three architectures: a frame-level split inflates test R_PSNR by 1.6 to 2.0 dB (p less than 0.01 for all three, paired t-test across 3 seeds) relative to a scene-level split, confirming an architecture-independent protocol effect. A three-point gradient (random/temporal/scene) shows the gap is continuous, and under extended training the frame-level inflation exceeds 10 dB. We advocate scene-level splits as the community standard and provide reference numbers for six representative models under this protocol. As a case study within the corrected protocol, we present a physics-informed decomposition I = R composed with S + N with a source-separable three-way heteroscedastic uncertainty head. We empirically verify channel specialization: the non-Lambertian uncertainty channel shows r = 0.67 cross-correlation with non-Lambertian residual error, more than 4 times the texture channel's correlation. We further demonstrate downstream utility: filtering out the 75% highest-uncertainty pixels reduces reconstruction MSE by 77% on retained pixels, whereas random filtering produces no improvement. The specialization also holds on out-of-distribution real photographs. We report negative results for a more elaborate variant combining frequency decomposition, cross-task supervision, evidential learning, contrastive loss, and test-time adaptation. Our method reaches 15.98 plus or minus 0.41 dB R_PSNR, within 0.8 dB of a 5-member Deep Ensemble at one-fifth the cost, with the unique capability of source-separated uncertainty.

analysis.tldr: 揭示内在图像分解中帧级数据泄露导致评估指标虚高，提出场景级分割标准并展示源可分离不确定性头的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 内在图像分解的评估协议不一致，帧级数据分割导致训练和测试集包含相似帧，造成性能虚高，影响方法比较的公平性。
analysis.problem: 量化帧级数据泄露对评估指标的影响，并建立更可靠的场景级评估协议；同时提出一种能分离不同误差源的物理感知不确定性分解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 帧级分割相比场景级分割使测试R_PSNR虚高1.6-2.0 dB，且随训练延长差距超过10 dB；非朗伯不确定性通道与残差误差相关性高（r=0.67），纹理通道相关性低。
analysis.method: 提出物理感知分解模型 I = R ∘ S + N，并设计源可分离三向异方差不确定性头，分别建模朗伯、非朗伯和噪声不确定性。
contributions: 首次量化帧级数据泄露对内在图像分解评估的影响，并倡导场景级分割作为标准协议。
提出源可分离不确定性头，验证通道专业化及其下游效用（过滤高不确定性像素使MSE降低77%）。
提供六种代表性模型在场景级协议下的参考性能，并报告复杂变体的负面结果。
analysis.experiments: 在MPI Sintel数据集上使用三种架构（未具体命名）进行对比，验证帧级与场景级分割的差异；在真实照片上验证不确定性专业化；报告R_PSNR为15.98±0.41 dB，成本为Deep Ensemble的五分之一。
limitations: 方法在复杂变体（结合频率分解、跨任务监督等）上未取得提升，表明设计需谨慎。
不确定性头的泛化性可能受限于特定数据集和场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示内在图像分解中帧级数据泄露导致评估指标虚高，提出场景级分割标准并展示源可分离不确定性头的有效性。

papers.title: Memory Efficient Full-gradient Attacks (MEFA) Framework for Adversarial Defense Evaluations
papers.abstract: This work studies the robust evaluation of iterative stochastic purification defenses under white-box adversarial attacks. Our key technical insight is that gradient checkpointing makes exact end-to-end gradient computation through long purification trajectories practical by trading additional recomputation for substantially lower memory usage. This enables full-gradient adaptive attacks against diffusion- and Langevin-based purification defenses, where prior evaluations often resort to approximate backpropagation due to memory constraints. These approximations can weaken the attack signal and risk overestimating robustness. In parallel, stochasticity in iterative purification is frequently under-controlled, even though different purification trajectories can substantially change reported robustness metrics. Building on this insight, we introduce a memory-efficient full-gradient evaluation framework for stochastic purification defenses. The framework combines checkpointed backpropagation with evaluation protocols that control stochastic variability, thereby reducing memory bottlenecks while preserving exact gradients. We evaluate diffusion-based purification and Langevin sampling with Energy-Based Models (EBMs), demonstrating that full-gradient attacks uncover vulnerabilities missed by approximate-gradient evaluations. Our framework yields stronger state-of-the-art $\ell_{\infty}$ and $\ell_{2}$ white-box attacks and further supports probing out-of-distribution robustness. Overall, our results show that exact-gradient evaluation is essential for reliable benchmarking of iterative stochastic defenses.

analysis.tldr: 提出内存高效的全梯度攻击框架MEFA，通过梯度检查点技术实现精确端到端梯度计算，揭示迭代随机净化防御的脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对迭代随机净化防御的鲁棒性评估常因内存限制采用近似反向传播，这会削弱攻击信号并高估鲁棒性，同时随机性控制不足导致评估结果不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何在内存约束下对迭代随机净化防御进行精确的全梯度白盒攻击评估，避免近似梯度带来的鲁棒性高估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：近似反向传播会削弱攻击信号，导致鲁棒性被高估；迭代净化中的随机性（不同净化轨迹）会显著改变报告的鲁棒性指标，但常被忽视。
analysis.method: 提出MEFA框架，结合梯度检查点（gradient checkpointing）实现长净化轨迹的精确端到端梯度计算，并引入控制随机性的评估协议，在降低内存占用的同时保留精确梯度。
contributions: 提出内存高效的全梯度攻击框架MEFA，利用梯度检查点实现精确反向传播，克服了长净化轨迹的内存瓶颈。
通过扩散和朗之万净化防御的实验证明，全梯度攻击能发现近似梯度攻击遗漏的漏洞，并实现更强的ℓ∞和ℓ2白盒攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在扩散净化防御和基于能量模型的朗之万采样上评估，显示全梯度攻击比近似梯度攻击更有效，并支持分布外鲁棒性探测。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 框架可能仍受限于检查点引入的额外计算开销。
仅针对白盒攻击场景，黑盒或灰盒场景未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出内存高效的全梯度攻击框架MEFA，通过梯度检查点技术实现精确端到端梯度计算，揭示迭代随机净化防御的脆弱性。

papers.title: SwiftI2V: Efficient High-Resolution Image-to-Video Generation via Conditional Segment-wise Generation
papers.abstract: High-resolution image-to-video (I2V) generation aims to synthesize realistic temporal dynamics while preserving fine-grained appearance details of the input image. At 2K resolution, it becomes extremely challenging, and existing solutions suffer from various weaknesses: 1) end-to-end models are often prohibitively expensive in memory and latency; 2) cascading low-resolution generation with a generic video super-resolution tends to hallucinate details and drift from input-specific local structures, since the super-resolution stage is not explicitly conditioned on the input image. To this end, we propose SwiftI2V, an efficient framework tailored for high-resolution I2V. Following the widely used two-stage design, it addresses the efficiency--fidelity dilemma by first generating a low-resolution motion reference to reduce token costs and ease the modeling burden, then performing a strongly image-conditioned 2K synthesis guided by the motion to recover input-faithful details with controlled overhead. Specifically, to make generation more scalable, SwiftI2V introduces Conditional Segment-wise Generation (CSG) to synthesize videos segment-by-segment with a bounded per-step token budget, and adopts bidirectional contextual interaction within each segment to improve cross-segment coherence and input fidelity. On VBench-I2V at 2K resolution, SwiftI2V achieves performance comparable to end-to-end baselines while reducing total GPU-time by 202x. Particularly, it enables practical 2K I2V generation on a single datacenter GPU (e.g., H800) or consumer GPU (e.g., RTX 4090).

analysis.tldr: SwiftI2V通过条件分段生成实现高效高分辨率图像到视频生成，在2K分辨率下性能与端到端模型相当，GPU时间减少202倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率图像到视频生成在2K分辨率下极具挑战，现有端到端模型内存和延迟过高，而级联超分辨率方法会幻觉细节并偏离输入结构。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成高分辨率（2K）图像到视频，同时保持输入图像的细节保真度和时间一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SwiftI2V框架，采用两阶段设计：首先生成低分辨率运动参考以降低token成本和建模负担，然后通过强图像条件的2K合成恢复输入保真细节；引入条件分段生成（CSG）逐段合成视频，每步token预算有界，并在段内使用双向上下文交互改善跨段连贯性和输入保真度。
contributions: 提出SwiftI2V，一种高效的高分辨率图像到视频生成框架，解决了效率与保真度的权衡。
引入条件分段生成（CSG）方法，实现可扩展的逐段视频合成，并采用双向上下文交互提升连贯性。
在2K分辨率下，SwiftI2V性能与端到端基线相当，GPU时间减少202倍，并能在单张数据中心或消费级GPU上运行。
analysis.experiments: 在VBench-I2V基准上评估2K分辨率性能，与端到端基线对比，报告了GPU时间减少202倍，并提及在H800和RTX 4090上可行。
limitations: 可能对长视频生成或复杂运动场景的泛化能力有限。
分段生成可能引入段间不一致性，尽管有双向交互缓解。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SwiftI2V通过条件分段生成实现高效高分辨率图像到视频生成，在2K分辨率下性能与端到端模型相当，GPU时间减少202倍。

papers.title: Topological Signatures of Grokking
papers.abstract: We study the grokking phenomenon through the lens of topology. Using persistent homology on point clouds derived from the embedding matrices of a range of models trained on modular arithmetic with varying primes, we identify a clear and consistent topological signature of grokking: a sharp increase in both the maximum and total persistence of first homology ($H_1$). Persistence diagrams reveal the emergence of a dominant long-lived topological feature together with increasingly structured secondary features, reflecting the underlying cyclic structure of the task. Compared to existing spectral and geometric diagnostics -- specifically, Fourier analysis and local intrinsic dimension -- persistent homology provides a unified geometric and topological characterization of representation learning, capturing both local and global multi-scale structure. Ablations across data regimes and control settings show that these topological transitions are tied to generalization rather than memorization. Our results suggest that persistent homology offers a principled and interpretable framework for analyzing how neural networks internalize latent structure during training.

analysis.tldr: 通过持续同调发现grokking现象中一阶同调持久性激增的拓扑特征。
analysis.research_motivation: Grokking现象中模型从记忆到泛化的转变机制尚不明确，现有谱与几何诊断方法（如傅里叶分析、局部本征维数）缺乏对表征学习的统一几何拓扑刻画。
analysis.problem: 如何从拓扑角度表征和检测神经网络训练中的grokking现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到grokking发生时，一阶同调的最大持久性和总持久性均急剧增加，持久性图中出现主导的长寿命拓扑特征及结构化次级特征，反映任务的循环结构。
analysis.method: 对模型嵌入矩阵的点云计算持续同调，提取一阶同调持久性指标（最大持久性、总持久性），并与傅里叶分析、局部本征维数对比。
contributions: 首次从拓扑角度识别出grokking的清晰一致拓扑信号：一阶同调持久性激增。
提出持续同调作为统一几何拓扑框架，可同时捕捉局部与全局多尺度结构，优于现有谱与几何诊断方法。
analysis.experiments: 在模算术任务上训练不同素数规模的模型，进行消融实验（数据规模、控制设置）表明拓扑转变与泛化相关而非记忆。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅验证了模算术任务，可能不适用于其他类型任务。
持续同调计算复杂度较高，大规模模型可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过持续同调发现grokking现象中一阶同调持久性激增的拓扑特征。

papers.title: Is Escalation Worth It? A Decision-Theoretic Characterization of LLM Cascades
papers.abstract: Model cascades, in which a cheap LLM defers to an expensive one on low-confidence queries, are widely used to navigate the cost-quality tradeoff at deployment. Existing approaches largely treat the deferral threshold as an empirical hyperparameter, with limited guidance on the geometry of the resulting cost-quality frontier over a model pool. We develop a decision-theoretic framework grounded in constrained optimization and duality. For a two-model cascade, we establish piecewise concavity of the cost-quality frontier on decreasing-benefit regions of the confidence support, with reciprocal shadow prices linking the budget- and quality-constrained formulations. Given a pool of $k$ models, we characterize the frontier achievable by deterministic two-model threshold cascades as the pointwise envelope over $\binom{k}{2}$ pairwise cascades, with switching points where the optimal pair changes. For $k$-model cascades, we derive first-order conditions in which a single shadow price equalizes marginal quality-per-cost across stage boundaries. We validate the framework on five benchmarks (MATH, MMLU, TriviaQA, SimpleQA, LiveCodeBench) across eight models from five providers. Within the deterministic threshold-cascade class, full fixed chains underperform the pairwise envelope, and optimized subsequence cascades do not deliver practically meaningful held-out gains over it. A lightweight pre-generation router exceeds the best cascade policy on four of five datasets, mainly because it avoids the cheap model's generation cost on queries sent directly to a larger model rather than because of a stronger routing signal. These results suggest that cascade performance is limited primarily by structural cost, since cascades pay the cheap model before any escalation decision, rather than by a shortage of intermediate stages.

analysis.tldr: LLM级联策略的成本-质量边界受结构成本限制，预生成路由器优于级联。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM级联方法将延迟阈值视为经验超参数，缺乏对成本-质量边界几何特性的理论指导，导致部署时难以优化成本与质量的权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何从决策理论角度刻画LLM级联的成本-质量边界，并评估其实际有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 级联策略的性能主要受结构成本限制（即每次查询都需先支付廉价模型成本），而非中间阶段不足；预生成路由器因避免廉价模型生成成本而表现更优。
analysis.method: 基于约束优化和对偶理论的决策框架，分析两模型级联的成本-质量边界（分段凹性），k模型级联的包络线及一阶条件（边际质量-成本相等）。
contributions: 建立了LLM级联的决策理论框架，严格刻画了成本-质量边界的几何性质。
通过五个基准和八个模型验证，发现级联性能受结构成本限制，预生成路由器更优。
analysis.experiments: 在MATH、MMLU、TriviaQA、SimpleQA、LiveCodeBench五个基准上，使用来自五个提供商的八个模型进行验证。
limitations: 仅考虑确定性阈值级联，未涵盖随机或更复杂的路由策略。
预生成路由器的优势可能依赖于特定数据集和模型池。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM级联策略的成本-质量边界受结构成本限制，预生成路由器优于级联。

papers.title: Human-AI Co-Evolution and Epistemic Collapse: A Dynamical Systems Perspective
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are reshaping how knowledge is produced, with increasing reliance on AI systems for generation, summarization, and reasoning. While prior work has studied cognitive offloading in humans and model collapse in recursive training, these effects are typically considered in isolation. We propose a unified perspective: humans and language models form a coupled dynamical system linked by a feedback loop of usage, generation, and retraining. We introduce a minimal model with three variables -- human cognition, data quality, and model capability -- and show that this feedback can give rise to distinct dynamical regimes. Our analysis identifies three regimes: co-evolutionary enhancement, fragile equilibrium, and degenerative convergence. Through a simple simulation, we demonstrate that increasing reliance on AI can induce a transition toward a low-diversity, suboptimal equilibrium. From an information-theoretic perspective, this transition corresponds to an emergent information bottleneck in the human-AI loop, where entropy reduction reflects loss of diversity and support under closed-loop feedback rather than beneficial compression. These results suggest that the trajectory of AI systems is shaped not only by model design, but by the dynamics of human-AI co-evolution.

analysis.tldr: 人类与LLM构成耦合动力系统，过度依赖AI可能导致知识多样性丧失和次优均衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究孤立地看待人类认知卸载和模型递归训练崩溃，缺乏统一视角理解人-AI相互作用的长期动态影响。
analysis.problem: 如何建模并分析人类与LLM之间通过使用、生成和再训练形成的反馈循环，揭示其可能导致的系统性风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过模拟发现，增加对AI的依赖会引发系统向低多样性、次优均衡的转变，从信息论角度对应人-AI循环中的信息瓶颈，熵减少反映多样性丧失而非有益压缩。
analysis.method: 提出一个包含人类认知、数据质量和模型能力三个变量的最小动力系统模型，通过简单模拟分析不同动态机制。
contributions: 统一了认知卸载和模型崩溃的视角，将人-AI交互建模为耦合动力系统。
识别出三种动态机制：协同进化增强、脆弱均衡和退化收敛，并揭示过度依赖AI导致知识多样性丧失的风险。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及简单模拟。
limitations: 模型过于简化，可能忽略现实中的复杂因素。
缺乏实证数据验证，结论主要基于理论分析和模拟。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人类与LLM构成耦合动力系统，过度依赖AI可能导致知识多样性丧失和次优均衡。

papers.title: Prediction and Empowerment: A Theory of Agency through Bridge Interfaces
papers.abstract: We study agency under partial observability in deterministic physical or simulated worlds, where apparent randomness arises from uncertainty over initial conditions, fixed law bits, and unrolled exogenous noise. We model sensing and actuation as bridge interfaces split between agent-controlled parameters and environment-controlled channel state, inducing a deterministic POMDP through a prior over latent microstates and many-to-one observation coarsening. Within this framework, we prove a separation between prediction, compression, and empowerment. Perfect prediction can be achieved either by identifying the hidden quotient relevant to the target family or by overwrite control that makes the future target action-determined; high empowerment alone is insufficient. Under refinable interfaces and sufficient memory, action-conditioned observation-compression progress reduces posterior uncertainty about the latent quotient, and when refinement requires steering world-side channel conditions, this creates target-conditioned interface empowerment. A bit-string specialization with a conserved information budget makes the resulting tradeoff explicit: prediction by identification requires internal capacity at least the relevant latent entropy, whereas overwrite control requires terminal action capacity over the controlled quotient. For modern AI agents, the results suggest a design principle rather than a theorem of inevitability: objectives should distinguish hidden-state identification, interface refinement, task-relevant controllability, and mere overwrite or distractor control. Human--AI alignment is partly an interface-design problem, where the relevant bridge is between human intent, agent internal state, external tools, and world-side channel conditions. This is a working draft: feedback and criticism is most welcome.

analysis.tldr: 在确定性部分可观测世界中，通过桥接接口分离预测、压缩与赋能，提出智能体设计原则。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体理论在部分可观测环境下对预测、压缩和赋能之间的关系缺乏清晰理解，导致设计目标模糊。
analysis.problem: 在确定性部分可观测环境中，如何形式化并分离预测、压缩与赋能，并揭示它们之间的权衡关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 完美预测可通过识别隐藏商或覆盖控制实现，高赋能本身不足；在可细化接口和足够记忆下，动作条件观测压缩可减少后验不确定性。
analysis.method: 将感知和驱动建模为桥接接口，在确定性POMDP框架下证明预测、压缩与赋能的分离，并通过比特串特例展示信息预算权衡。
contributions: 提出桥接接口模型，形式化部分可观测环境中的智能体感知与驱动。
证明预测、压缩与赋能的分离，并揭示两种实现完美预测的路径。
给出比特串特例下的信息预算权衡，为现代AI智能体设计提供原则。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论框架在复杂真实环境中的适用性未验证。
未涉及随机环境或非确定性动力学。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在确定性部分可观测世界中，通过桥接接口分离预测、压缩与赋能，提出智能体设计原则。

papers.title: More Than Can Be Said: A Benchmark and Framework for Pre-Question Scientific Ideation
papers.abstract: AI research agents have shown strong potential in automating literature search and manuscript refinement, yet most assume a clear and actionable initial input, operating only after a research question has been made explicit. In contrast, human research often begins with tacit friction, a sense of misalignment before a question can be formed. We introduce InciteResearch, a multi-agent framework designed to make a researcher's implicit understanding explicit, inspectable, and actionable. InciteResearch decomposes the logical chain of Socratic questioning and distributes it across the entire pipeline that: (1) Elicits a structured five-dimensional researcher profile state anchored by specific friction points from vague, even domain-unrelated inputs; (2) Violates hidden assumptions by maximizing the feasibility-novelty product with enforcing a 7-stage causal derivation trace; and (3) check whether the proposed method is a Necessary consequence of the reframed insight. We further introduce TF-Bench, the first benchmark for tacit-to-explicit research assistance that distinguishes domain-related from domain-unrelated inspirations across four scientific modes. On TF-Bench, InciteResearch achieves leapfrogging gains over a prompt-based baseline (novelty/impact from 3.671/3.806 to 4.250/4.397), shifting generated proposals from recombination to architectural insight. Our work demonstrates that AI can serve as an extension of thinking itself, rather than merely automating downstream execution.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体框架InciteResearch和基准TF-Bench，将研究者内隐的模糊想法转化为可操作的科学问题，显著提升新颖性和影响力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI研究助手通常需要明确的问题输入，但人类研究常始于模糊的直觉或不适感，缺乏将这种内隐知识显式化的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将研究者模糊、甚至与领域无关的初始想法转化为结构化的、可检验的科学问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: InciteResearch框架：通过苏格拉底式提问链，先提取五维研究者状态，再最大化可行性-新颖性乘积并强制7阶段因果推导，最后验证方法是否为重构洞察的必要结果。
contributions: 提出InciteResearch多智能体框架，实现从模糊输入到结构化科学问题的转化。
构建TF-Bench基准，区分领域相关与无关灵感，评估内隐到外显的研究辅助能力。
analysis.experiments: 在TF-Bench上，InciteResearch相比基于提示的基线，新颖性从3.671提升至4.250，影响力从3.806提升至4.397。
limitations: 可能依赖苏格拉底提问链的预设结构，灵活性有限。
基准TF-Bench的覆盖范围可能不够广泛。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体框架InciteResearch和基准TF-Bench，将研究者内隐的模糊想法转化为可操作的科学问题，显著提升新颖性和影响力。

papers.title: Mind the Gap? A Distributional Comparison of Real and Synthetic Priors for Tabular Foundation Models
authors: Telmo de Menezes e Silva Filho
papers.abstract: Tabular foundation models are pre-trained on one of three classes of corpus: curated datasets drawn from benchmark repositories, tables harvested at scale from the web, or synthetic tables sampled from a parametric generative prior. Despite the centrality of pre-training data to model performance, little is known about how these corpora relate to one another in distribution, and the impact this has on downstream performance. In this work we take three canonical, archetypal datasets used to train tabular foundation models; the T4 dataset represents web-scraped corpora, the TabFM dataset curated tables from Kaggle, and the TabICL dataset as the only well-used synthetic prior with publicly available parameters. We characterise each corpus using aggregate features over whole tables, columns and correlations, and compare them using discriminator AUCs and k-NN coverage metrics. We find that the TabICL synthetic prior occupies a narrow region of the space of real tables, that this mismatch cannot be closed by optimising prior hyper-parameters across more than 86 thousand configurations, and that curated and web-scraped corpora are broadly interchangeable on a distributional level in feature space. Surprisingly, the distributional gap between synthetic pre-training data and real tables has a clearly detectable effect on performance under neither feature-based proximity measures or TabICL's own internal representations, suggesting that coverage of the real-data distribution is not the primary driver of TabICL's generalisation.

analysis.tldr: 对比真实与合成表格预训练语料的分布差异，发现合成先验覆盖窄且无法通过超参优化弥补，但分布差距对下游性能影响有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格基础模型依赖不同来源的预训练语料（基准库、网络抓取、合成数据），但各类语料之间的分布关系及其对下游性能的影响尚不明确，理解这一差距对改进预训练策略至关重要。
analysis.problem: 系统比较三类典型表格预训练语料（T4、TabFM、TabICL）的分布特性，评估合成先验与真实表格的分布差距及其对下游泛化的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TabICL合成先验仅覆盖真实表格空间的一小片区域；通过优化超参数（超过8.6万种配置）无法弥合分布差距；而分布差距在下游性能上并未产生显著影响，表明覆盖真实数据分布并非TabICL泛化的主要驱动力。
analysis.method: 使用聚合特征（整表、列、相关性）表征语料，通过判别器AUC和k-NN覆盖度量比较分布差异，并分析分布差距与下游性能的关系。
contributions: 首次系统比较三类表格预训练语料的分布特性，揭示合成先验的覆盖狭窄性。
发现分布差距无法通过超参数优化弥补，且对下游性能影响有限，挑战了“覆盖真实分布是泛化关键”的假设。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了比较方法和发现。
limitations: 仅分析三种代表性语料，可能无法推广到其他合成方法或更大规模语料。
分布差距对性能的影响可能因任务或模型而异，需更多下游任务验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对比真实与合成表格预训练语料的分布差异，发现合成先验覆盖窄且无法通过超参优化弥补，但分布差距对下游性能影响有限。

papers.title: CoupleEvo: Evolving Heuristics for Coupled Optimization Problems Using Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Many real-world optimization problems consist of multiple tightly coupled subproblems whose solutions must be coordinated to achieve high overall performance. However, existing large language model driven automated heuristic design approaches are limited to single-problem settings. In this paper, we propose CoupleEvo. CoupleEvo proposes three evolutionary coordination strategies to evolve heuristics for coupled optimization problems: the sequential strategy evolves heuristics for one subproblem after the other; the iterative strategy alternates the evolution of heuristics for different subproblems over successive generations; and the integrated strategy evolves heuristics for all problems simultaneously. The approach is evaluated on two representative coupled optimization problems. Experimental results show that decomposition-based strategies (sequential and iterative) provide more stable convergence and higher solution quality, while the integrated evolution strategy suffers from increased search complexity and variability. These findings highlight the importance of coordinating evolutionary search across interdependent subproblems and demonstrate the potential of LLM-driven heuristic design for complex coupled optimization problems. The code is available: https://github.com/tb-git-kit-research/CoupleEvo.

analysis.tldr: 提出 CoupleEvo，利用 LLM 通过三种进化协调策略为耦合优化问题自动设计启发式算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实中的优化问题常包含多个紧密耦合的子问题，需要协调求解才能获得高性能，但现有 LLM 驱动的自动启发式设计方法仅针对单问题场景，缺乏对耦合问题的支持。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 LLM 自动设计启发式算法来解决多个子问题相互耦合的优化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于分解的策略（顺序和迭代）提供更稳定的收敛和更高的解质量，而集成进化策略因搜索复杂度和变异性增加而表现较差。
analysis.method: 提出 CoupleEvo，包含三种进化协调策略：顺序策略（依次为子问题进化启发式）、迭代策略（在连续代中交替进化不同子问题的启发式）和集成策略（同时进化所有子问题的启发式）。
contributions: 首次将 LLM 驱动的自动启发式设计扩展到耦合优化问题。
提出三种进化协调策略并实验验证了分解策略的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在两个代表性耦合优化问题上评估，结果显示分解策略优于集成策略。
limitations: 仅测试了两个问题，泛化性有待验证。
集成策略的搜索复杂度高，可能不适用于大规模问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 CoupleEvo，利用 LLM 通过三种进化协调策略为耦合优化问题自动设计启发式算法。

papers.title: A Regime Theory of Controller Class Selection for LLM Action Decisions
papers.abstract: Deployed language and vision-language models must decide, on each input, whether to answer directly, retrieve evidence, defer to a stronger model, or abstain. Contrary to the common monotonicity intuition, greater per-input expressivity is not uniformly beneficial in finite samples: under identical strict cross-validation, different benchmarks prefer different controller classes. This reflects a finite-sample limitation of instance-level uncertainty signals, which can be exhausted at a distribution-dependent scale. We organize controllers into a nested lattice of four classes: fixed actions, partition routers, instance-level controllers, and prior-gated controllers, ordered by complexity. We prove a regime theory that turns three data-estimable bottlenecks into a class choice: how much improvement is possible beyond the best fixed action, whether there are enough samples for instance-level controllers to make reliable decisions, and how much improvement a coarse partition router can recover when instance-level signal is unreliable. The resulting Bernstein-tight threshold has a matching information-theoretic lower bound, and strict nested cross-validation provably selects a near-best class. Across SMS-Spam, HallusionBench, A-OKVQA, and FOLIO, the predicted class matches the empirical winner; the prior-gated controller wins on TextVQA when OCR tokens supply a label-free prediction-time prior. Code is available at https://github.com/Anonymous-Awesome-Submissions/Regime-Theory.

analysis.tldr: 提出控制器类选择机制理论，证明有限样本下实例级不确定性信号存在瓶颈，并通过嵌套交叉验证选择最优控制器类。
analysis.research_motivation: 部署的LLM/VLM需要在每个输入上决定直接回答、检索证据、延迟到更强模型或弃权，但常见直觉认为更大表达性总是更好，实际中不同基准偏好不同控制器类，缺乏理论指导。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限样本下为LLM/VLM选择最优的控制器类（固定动作、分区路由器、实例级控制器、先验门控控制器），以平衡表达性与可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到在相同严格交叉验证下，不同基准偏好不同控制器类，表明实例级不确定性信号存在有限样本限制，其可耗尽程度依赖于数据分布。
analysis.method: 将控制器组织为嵌套格（固定动作、分区路由器、实例级控制器、先验门控控制器），提出基于三个数据可估计瓶颈的机制理论：超越最佳固定动作的改进潜力、实例级控制器可靠决策所需样本量、当实例级信号不可靠时粗分区路由器可恢复的改进。推导出Bernstein紧阈值及其信息论下界，并证明严格嵌套交叉验证可渐近选择近最优类。
contributions: 提出控制器类选择的机制理论，将三个数据可估计瓶颈转化为类选择规则。
证明Bernstein紧阈值具有匹配的信息论下界，且严格嵌套交叉验证可渐近选择近最优类。
在SMS-Spam、HallusionBench、A-OKVQA、FOLIO和TextVQA上验证理论预测与经验胜者一致。
analysis.experiments: 在SMS-Spam、HallusionBench、A-OKVQA、FOLIO和TextVQA五个基准上验证，预测的控制器类与经验胜者匹配；先验门控控制器在TextVQA上获胜（OCR令牌提供无标签预测时先验）。
limitations: 理论假设数据分布固定，可能不适用于动态分布变化场景。
实验基准数量有限，未在更多样化任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出控制器类选择机制理论，证明有限样本下实例级不确定性信号存在瓶颈，并通过嵌套交叉验证选择最优控制器类。

papers.title: Earth-o1: A Grid-free Observation-native Atmospheric World Model
papers.abstract: Despite the unprecedented volume of multimodal data provided by modern Earth observation systems, our ability to model atmospheric dynamics remains constrained. Traditional modeling frameworks force heterogeneous measurements into predefined spatial grids, inherently limiting the full exploitation of raw sensor data and creating severe computational bottlenecks. Here we present Earth-o1, an observation-native atmospheric world model that overcomes these structural limitations. Rather than relying on conventional atmospheric dynamical modeling systems or traditional data assimilation, Earth-o1 directly learns the continuous, three-dimensional physical evolution of the Earth system from ungridded observational data. By integrating diverse sensor inputs into a unified, grid-free dynamical field, the model autonomously advances the atmospheric state in space and time. We show that this fundamentally distinct paradigm enables direct, real-time forecasting and cross-sensor inference without the overhead of explicit numerical solvers. In hindcast evaluations, Earth-o1 achieves surface forecast skill comparable to the operational Integrated Forecasting System (IFS). These results establish that continuous, observation-driven world models -- a new class of fully observation-native geophysical simulators -- can match the fidelity of established physical frameworks, providing a scalable data-driven foundation for a digital twin of the Earth.

analysis.tldr: Earth-o1 是一个无需网格的观测原生大气世界模型，直接从非网格观测数据学习连续三维物理演化，实现实时预报和跨传感器推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代地球观测系统提供大量多模态数据，但传统建模框架将异构测量强制映射到预定义空间网格，限制了原始传感器数据的充分利用并造成计算瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何从非网格观测数据直接学习大气系统的连续三维物理演化，避免传统数据同化和数值求解器的限制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Earth-o1 是一个观测原生的大气世界模型，通过将多种传感器输入整合到统一的、无网格的动力学场中，直接学习地球系统的连续三维物理演化，无需显式数值求解器即可自主推进大气状态。
contributions: 提出了一种全新的观测原生大气世界模型范式，无需网格化预处理。
在回算评估中，地表预报技能与业务化综合预报系统（IFS）相当。
analysis.experiments: 在回算评估中，Earth-o1 的地表预报技能与业务化综合预报系统（IFS）相当。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 可能仅在地表预报方面进行了评估，未提及对其他高度层或变量的性能。
摘要未讨论模型的可解释性、计算效率或泛化到极端天气事件的能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Earth-o1 是一个无需网格的观测原生大气世界模型，直接从非网格观测数据学习连续三维物理演化，实现实时预报和跨传感器推理。

papers.title: TinyBayes: Closed-Form Bayesian Inference via Jacobi Prior for Real-Time Image Classification on Edge Devices
papers.abstract: Cocoa (Theobroma cacao) is a critical cash crop for millions of smallholder farmers in West Africa, where Cocoa Swollen Shoot Virus Disease (CSSVD) and anthracnose cause devastating yield losses. Automated disease detection from leaf images is essential for early intervention, yet deploying such systems in resource-constrained settings demands models that are small, fast, and require no internet connectivity. Existing edge-deployable plant disease systems rely on end-to-end deep learning without uncertainty quantification, while Bayesian methods for edge devices focus on hardware-level inference architectures rather than agricultural applications. We bridge this gap with TinyBayes, the first framework to combine a closed-form Bayesian classifier with a mobile-grade computer vision pipeline for crop disease detection. Our pipeline uses YOLOv8-Nano (5.9 MB) for lesion localisation, MobileNetV3-Small (3.5 MB) for feature extraction, and the Jacobi prior; a Bayesian method that provides a closed form non-iterative estimators via projection, for the classification. The Jacobi-DMR (Distributed Multinomial Regression) classifier adds only 13.5 KB to the pipeline, bringing the total model size within 9.5 MB, while achieving 78.7% accuracy on the Amini Cocoa Contamination Challenge dataset and enabling end-to-end CPU inference under 150 ms per image. We benchmark against seven classifiers including Random Forest, SVM, Ridge, Lasso, Elastic Net, XGBoost, and Jacobi-GP, and demonstrate that the Jacobi-DMR offers the best trade-off between accuracy, model size, and inference speed for edge deployment. We have proved the asymptotic equivalence and consistency, asymptotic normality and the bias correction of Jacobi-DMR. All data and codes are available here: https://github.com/shouvik-sardar/TinyBayes

analysis.tldr: TinyBayes 将闭式贝叶斯分类器与轻量级视觉流水线结合，实现边缘设备上的实时作物病害检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 西非小农依赖可可作物，但 CSSVD 和炭疽病造成严重减产；自动病害检测需要小、快、无需联网的模型，现有边缘部署系统缺乏不确定性量化，而贝叶斯方法未针对农业应用。
analysis.problem: 在资源受限的边缘设备上实现具有不确定性量化的实时作物病害图像分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 TinyBayes 框架，包含 YOLOv8-Nano 进行病灶定位、MobileNetV3-Small 提取特征，以及基于 Jacobi 先验的闭式贝叶斯分类器 Jacobi-DMR，通过投影实现非迭代估计。
contributions: 首个将闭式贝叶斯分类器与移动级视觉流水线结合用于作物病害检测的框架
证明 Jacobi-DMR 的渐近等价性、一致性、渐近正态性和偏差校正
analysis.experiments: 在 Amini Cocoa Contamination Challenge 数据集上达到 78.7% 准确率，总模型大小 9.5 MB，端到端 CPU 推理每张图像低于 150 ms，并与七种分类器对比。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上评估，泛化性待验证
准确率 78.7% 可能不足以满足高精度农业应用需求
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TinyBayes 将闭式贝叶斯分类器与轻量级视觉流水线结合，实现边缘设备上的实时作物病害检测。

papers.title: Fine-Tuning Small Language Models for Solution-Oriented Windows Event Log Analysis
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise for event log analysis, but their high computational requirements, reliance on cloud infrastructure, and security concerns limit practical deployment. In addition, most existing approaches focus only on the identification of the problem and do not provide actionable remediation. Small language models (SLMs) present a light-weight alternative that can be fine-tuned for a specific purpose and hosted locally. This paper investigates whether SLMs, when fine-tuned for a specific task, can serve as a practical alternative for event log analysis while also generating solutions. We first create a large-scale synthetic Windows event log dataset that contains remediation actions using a high-performing LLM. We then fine-tune multiple SLMs and LLMs using the LoRA parameter-efficient fine-tuning technique and evaluate their performance by comparing with expert assessment. The results show that the dataset accurately reflects real-world scenarios and that fine-tuned SLMs consistently outperform LLMs in identifying issues and providing relevant remediation, while requiring fewer computational resources.

analysis.tldr: 微调小语言模型在Windows事件日志分析中优于大模型，且资源需求更低。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型用于事件日志分析时计算成本高、依赖云基础设施且存在安全风险，现有方法仅识别问题而不提供解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用小语言模型实现高效、本地化且能生成修复建议的Windows事件日志分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用高性能LLM生成大规模合成Windows事件日志数据集（含修复动作），然后采用LoRA参数高效微调技术微调多个SLM和LLM。
contributions: 创建了包含修复动作的大规模合成Windows事件日志数据集
证明微调后的SLM在问题识别和修复建议上优于LLM，且计算资源需求更低
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集为合成数据，可能无法完全覆盖真实场景的多样性
仅针对Windows事件日志，泛化性未验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 微调小语言模型在Windows事件日志分析中优于大模型，且资源需求更低。

papers.title: Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Network (GeoKAN)
papers.abstract: We introduce Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (GeoKANs), a family of geometry-aware KAN-type models in which approximation is carried out in learned, geometry-adapted coordinates rather than in fixed Euclidean input coordinates. GeoKAN achieves this by learning a diagonal Riemannian metric that warps the input before basis expansion and feature mixing. The learned metric provides a geometric inductive bias through local length scaling and volume distortion, and in physics-informed settings it also affects the differential structure seen by the model. Within this framework, we develop three main variants, namely GeoKAN-NNMetric, GeoKAN-$γ$, and LM-KAN. For LM-KAN, we further consider three basis-specific versions, LM-KAN-RBF, LM-KAN-Wav, and LM-KAN-Fourier. These variants allow us to study geometry-aware KAN models both as general function approximators and as surrogates in physics-informed learning. By stretching regions with rapid variation and compressing smoother regions, GeoKAN reallocates representational resolution in a task-dependent manner, allowing the model to place capacity where it is most needed. As a result, GeoKAN is well suited to sharp, stiff, localized, and strongly non-uniform regimes arising in scientific machine learning and differential-equation problems.

analysis.tldr: GeoKAN通过学习几何自适应坐标变换，提升KAN在科学机器学习中的逼近能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准KAN在固定欧几里得坐标下逼近，难以高效处理具有尖锐、刚性、局部化或强非均匀特性的科学机器学习问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种几何感知的KAN模型，使其能够自适应地分配表示分辨率，以更好地逼近复杂函数和求解微分方程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析。
analysis.method: 学习一个对角黎曼度量来扭曲输入空间，在基展开和特征混合前进行几何自适应坐标变换，并基于此提出三种变体：GeoKAN-NNMetric、GeoKAN-γ和LM-KAN（含RBF、Wav、Fourier三种基版本）。
contributions: 提出GeoKAN框架，将几何感知引入KAN模型，通过学习黎曼度量实现自适应坐标变换。
开发三种变体，支持不同基函数和度量学习方式，适用于通用逼近和物理信息学习。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖任务调参，度量学习增加计算开销。
仅讨论对角度量，更一般的度量形式可能带来额外收益但复杂度更高。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoKAN通过学习几何自适应坐标变换，提升KAN在科学机器学习中的逼近能力。

papers.title: Measuring Evaluation-Context Divergence in Open-Weight LLMs: A Paired-Prompt Protocol with Pilot Evidence of Alignment-Pipeline-Specific Heterogeneity
papers.abstract: Safety benchmarks are routinely treated as evidence about how a language model will behave once deployed, but this inference is fragile if behavior depends on whether a prompt looks like an evaluation. We define evaluation-context divergence as an observable within-item change in behavior induced by framing a fixed task as an evaluation, a live deployment interaction, or a neutral request, and present a paired-prompt protocol that measures it in open-weight LLMs while controlling for paraphrase variation, benchmark familiarity, and judge framing-sensitivity. Across five instruction-tuned checkpoints from four open-weight families plus a matched OLMo-3 base/instruct ablation ($20$ paired items, $840$ generations per checkpoint), we find striking heterogeneity. OLMo-3-Instruct alone is eval-cautious -- evaluation framing raises refusal vs. neutral by $11.8$pp ($p=0.007$) and reduces harmful compliance vs. deployment by $3.6$pp ($p=0.024$, $0/20$ items inverted) -- while Mistral-Small-3.2, Phi-3.5-mini, and Llama-3.1-8B are deployment-cautious}, with marginal eval-vs-deployment refusal effects of $-9$ to $-20$pp. The matched OLMo-3 base also exhibits the deployment-cautious pattern, identifying alignment as the inversion stage; within Llama-3.1, the $70$B model preserves direction with attenuated magnitude, ruling out a simple ``small-model effect that reverses at scale.'' One caveat: the cross-family heterogeneity is judge-dependent. Re-judging with a different-family safety classifier (Llama-Guard-3-8B) preserves the within-OLMo eval-cautious direction but flattens the cross-family contrast, indicating that the two judges operationalize distinct constructs.

analysis.tldr: 提出配对提示协议测量开源LLM的评估-部署行为差异，发现不同对齐管线导致异质性。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全基准常被当作模型部署后行为的证据，但若模型行为依赖于提示是否像评估，这种推断就不可靠。
analysis.problem: 量化开源LLM中评估上下文与部署上下文的行为差异，并探究对齐管线对差异的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现不同模型家族存在异质性：OLMo-3-Instruct是评估谨慎型（评估框架下拒绝率上升），而Mistral-Small-3.2等是部署谨慎型；基础模型也表现出部署谨慎模式，表明对齐是反转阶段。
analysis.method: 提出配对提示协议，通过控制释义变化、基准熟悉度和判断器框架敏感性，测量同一任务在不同上下文（评估、部署、中性）下的行为变化。
contributions: 定义了评估-上下文发散概念并设计配对提示协议进行测量。
在多个开源LLM上发现对齐管线特异性异质性，并识别出对齐是行为反转的关键阶段。
analysis.experiments: 在5个指令微调检查点（4个家族）和OLMo-3基础/指令消融上进行实验，每个检查点20个配对项，840个生成结果。
limitations: 跨家族异质性依赖于判断器，不同安全分类器结果不一致。
仅测试了开源模型，可能不适用于闭源模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出配对提示协议测量开源LLM的评估-部署行为差异，发现不同对齐管线导致异质性。

papers.title: Improving the Efficiency of Language Agent Teams with Adaptive Task Graphs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in teams, yet existing coordination approaches often occupy two extremes. Highly structured methods rely on fixed roles, pipelines, or task decompositions assigned a priori. In contrast, fully unstructured teams enable adaptability and exploration but suffer from inefficiencies such as error propagation, inter-agent conflicts, and wasted resources (measured in time, tokens, or file operations). We introduce Language Agent Teams for Task Evolution (LATTE), a framework for coordinating LLM teams inspired by distributed systems, where processors must operate under partial observability and communication constraints. In LATTE, a team of agents collaboratively construct and maintain a shared, evolving coordination graph which encodes sub-task dependencies, individual agent assignment, and the current state of sub-task progress. This protocol maintains consistency while empowering agents to dynamically allocate work, adapt coordination, and discover new tasks. Across multiple collaborative tasks and a variety of base models, we demonstrate how LATTE reduces token usage, wall-clock time, communication, and coordination failures (e.g. file conflicts and redundant outputs) while matching or exceeding the accuracy of standard designs including MetaGPT, decentralized teams, top-down Leader-Worker hierarchies, and static decompositions.

analysis.tldr: 提出LATTE框架，通过自适应任务图协调LLM团队，减少资源消耗并提升效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM团队协调方法要么过于结构化（固定角色/流水线），要么完全无结构（导致错误传播、资源浪费），缺乏兼顾效率与适应性的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种协调机制，使LLM团队在保持适应性的同时，减少令牌使用、时间、通信和协调失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出完全无结构的团队存在错误传播、代理间冲突和资源浪费（时间、令牌、文件操作）等低效现象。
analysis.method: 提出LATTE框架，代理团队协作构建并维护一个共享的、动态演化的协调图，编码子任务依赖、代理分配和进度状态，实现动态工作分配和自适应协调。
contributions: 提出LATTE框架，将分布式系统思想引入LLM团队协调，通过自适应任务图提升效率。
在多种协作任务和基础模型上验证，LATTE减少令牌使用、时间、通信和协调失败，同时匹配或超越现有方法（如MetaGPT）的准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种协作任务和基础模型上，与MetaGPT、去中心化团队、Leader-Worker层级和静态分解等标准设计对比，测量令牌使用、墙钟时间、通信量和协调失败（如文件冲突、冗余输出）。
limitations: 可能依赖任务图初始化的质量，复杂任务中图维护开销可能增加。
未讨论大规模团队或极端动态环境下的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LATTE框架，通过自适应任务图协调LLM团队，减少资源消耗并提升效率。

papers.title: NavOne: One-Step Global Planning for Vision-Language Navigation on Top-Down Maps
papers.abstract: Existing Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) methods typically adopt an egocentric, step-by-step paradigm, which struggles with error accumulation and limits efficiency. While recent approaches attempt to leverage pre-built environment maps, they often rely on incrementally updating memory graphs or scoring discrete path proposals, which restricts continuous spatial reasoning and creates discrete bottlenecks. We propose Top-Down VLN (TD-VLN), reformulating navigation as a one-step global path planning problem on pre-built top-down maps, supported by our newly constructed R2R-TopDown dataset. To solve this, we introduce NavOne, a unified framework that directly predicts dense path probabilities over multi-modal maps in a single end-to-end forward pass. NavOne features a Top-Down Map Fuser for joint multi-modal map representation, and extends Attention Residuals for spatial-aware depth mixing. Extensive experiments on R2R-TopDown show that NavOne achieves state-of-the-art performance among map-based VLN methods, with a planning-stage speedup of 8x over existing map-based baselines and 80x over egocentric methods, enabling highly efficient global navigation.

analysis.tldr: 将视觉语言导航重构成一步全局路径规划，提出NavOne框架在俯视地图上直接预测路径概率，实现8-80倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLN方法采用逐步自中心范式，存在误差累积和效率低下的问题；基于地图的方法依赖增量更新或离散路径评分，限制了连续空间推理并造成离散瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何将视觉语言导航转化为在预构建俯视地图上的一步全局路径规划问题，并实现高效、连续的路径预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出逐步自中心方法误差累积严重，现有地图方法因增量更新或离散评分导致效率低且空间推理受限。
analysis.method: 提出NavOne框架，包含Top-Down Map Fuser用于联合多模态地图表示，并扩展Attention Residuals实现空间感知深度混合，通过单次前向传播直接预测稠密路径概率。
contributions: 提出TD-VLN范式，将VLN重新定义为一步全局路径规划问题，并构建R2R-TopDown数据集。
设计NavOne框架，实现端到端的一步路径概率预测，显著提升规划效率。
analysis.experiments: 在R2R-TopDown数据集上，NavOne在基于地图的VLN方法中达到SOTA，规划阶段速度相比现有地图基线提升8倍，相比自中心方法提升80倍。
limitations: 依赖预构建的俯视地图，可能限制在未知环境中的泛化能力。
摘要未提及在真实机器人平台上的验证结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将视觉语言导航重构成一步全局路径规划，提出NavOne框架在俯视地图上直接预测路径概率，实现8-80倍加速。

papers.title: Pro-KLShampoo: Projected KL-Shampoo with Whitening Recovered by Orthogonalization
papers.abstract: Optimizers that exploit the matrix structure of gradients are central to modern LLM pre-training, with two distinct frontiers: explicit Kronecker-factored preconditioning -- most recently KL-Shampoo, which estimates the preconditioner via KL divergence minimization -- and orthogonalization of the gradient momentum, exemplified by Muon and analyzed as steepest descent under the spectral norm. The two routes are typically developed in isolation. We make a structural observation about KL-Shampoo's Kronecker preconditioners: their eigenvalue spectra exhibit a \emph{spike-and-flat} shape -- a few dominant eigenvalues followed by an approximately uniform tail -- across layers and training stages, holding exactly under a rank-$ρ$ signal-plus-noise gradient model. We exploit this structure by restricting one of KL-Shampoo's Kronecker factors to a parametric family aligned with the spike-and-flat shape: full spectral structure on a tracked $r$-dimensional subspace, single shared eigenvalue across the remaining $n-r$ directions. On these directions, we apply orthogonalization. An identity shows that this orthogonalization recovers the algebraic form of full KL-Shampoo's preconditioner. On four pre-training scales (GPT-2 124M / 350M, LLaMA 134M / 450M), Pro-KLShampoo consistently outperforms KL-Shampoo at every subspace rank we test in validation loss, peak per-GPU memory, and wallclock time to reach each loss level.

analysis.tldr: 提出Pro-KLShampoo优化器，利用梯度协方差矩阵的尖峰-平坦谱结构，通过子空间投影和正交化恢复全KL-Shampoo预条件子，在多个LLM预训练规模上实现更优的验证损失、内存和速度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代LLM预训练中，利用梯度矩阵结构的优化器（如Kronecker因子预条件与正交化）是核心，但这两条路线通常独立发展，缺乏统一理解；KL-Shampoo的预条件子存在可被利用的谱结构，但现有方法未充分挖掘。
analysis.problem: 如何利用KL-Shampoo Kronecker预条件子的尖峰-平坦谱结构，设计更高效且性能更优的优化器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到KL-Shampoo的Kronecker预条件子的特征值谱呈现尖峰-平坦形状：少数主导特征值后跟随近似均匀的尾部，该现象在多个层和训练阶段一致存在，且在秩-ρ信号加噪声梯度模型下精确成立。
analysis.method: Pro-KLShampoo将KL-Shampoo的一个Kronecker因子限制为与尖峰-平坦谱对齐的参数族：在跟踪的r维子空间上保留全谱结构，在剩余n-r方向上使用单一共享特征值并施加正交化；理论证明该正交化恢复全KL-Shampoo预条件子的代数形式。
contributions: 揭示了KL-Shampoo Kronecker预条件子的尖峰-平坦谱结构，并在信号加噪声模型下给出理论解释。
提出Pro-KLShampoo优化器，通过子空间投影和正交化利用该结构，在多个LLM预训练规模上优于KL-Shampoo。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-2 124M/350M和LLaMA 134M/450M四个预训练规模上测试，Pro-KLShampoo在每个子空间秩下均优于KL-Shampoo，在验证损失、峰值每GPU内存和达到各损失水平的墙钟时间上一致胜出。
limitations: 方法依赖于尖峰-平坦谱假设，可能不适用于所有模型或任务。
子空间秩r的选择需要调参，可能影响实际应用便利性。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Pro-KLShampoo优化器，利用梯度协方差矩阵的尖峰-平坦谱结构，通过子空间投影和正交化恢复全KL-Shampoo预条件子，在多个LLM预训练规模上实现更优的验证损失、内存和速度。

papers.title: Measuring Black-Box Confidence via Reasoning Trajectories: Geometry, Coverage, and Verbalization
papers.abstract: Reliable confidence estimation enables safe deployment of chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning through text-only APIs. Yet the dominant black-box baseline, self-consistency over K samples, is linearly expensive and ignores the geometry of the trace. We propose a black-box trajectory-confidence score: we embed a CoT as a sliding-window trajectory and measure its convergence to external answer anchors with a one-parameter softmax. The method needs no logits, hidden states, or supervised calibrators. Across six (benchmark, reasoner) settings on MedQA-USMLE, GPQA Diamond, and MMLU-Pro with Gemini 3.1 Pro and Claude Sonnet 4.6, fusing this score with coverage and verbalized-confidence channels at K=4 yields Pareto improvements over self-consistency at K=8 in 6/6 settings (median AUC 0.78 vs 0.71, deltaAUC=+0.075). A fixed-pick control (+0.060) and E5 cross-embedder replication rule out answer switching and single-vendor artifacts. Geometry peaks in the penultimate window across benchmarks and reasoners, and inverts at the terminal window on GPQA Diamond. Three unscaffolded regimes separate black-box confidence into a judge-mediated Coverage prior (C), within-trace Geometry (G), and a conditional Verbalization channel (V). Across 18 benchmark x reasoner x proposer settings, C and G provide independent signal in 18/18 and 16/18, while V contributes residual signal in 6/18. Swapping the judge from GPT-5-mini to Claude Sonnet 4.6 leaves G-only AUC unchanged (|delta|<=0.013) and shifts C-only AUC by at most +/-0.02 (kappa=0.82). Fusion beats the best single channel in 17/18 settings (median AUC 0.78, max 0.92).

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于推理轨迹几何结构的黑盒置信度评分方法，无需logits或隐藏状态，在多个基准上以更少样本超越自一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 链式推理（CoT）的可靠置信度估计对于安全部署至关重要，但现有黑盒基线（如自一致性）计算成本高且忽略轨迹几何结构。
analysis.problem: 如何在不访问模型内部状态的情况下，高效且准确地估计黑盒CoT推理的置信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 几何置信度在倒数第二个窗口达到峰值，在GPQA Diamond的终端窗口反转；覆盖度与几何信号独立，而语言化通道仅在部分设置中提供残差信号。
analysis.method: 将CoT嵌入为滑动窗口轨迹，通过单参数softmax测量其与外部答案锚点的收敛性，并与覆盖度和语言化置信度通道融合。
contributions: 提出一种无需logits或隐藏状态的黑盒轨迹置信度评分方法。
在6个基准×推理器设置中，以K=4样本融合三个通道，在6/6设置中优于K=8的自一致性（中位AUC 0.78 vs 0.71）。
揭示了覆盖度、几何和语言化三个通道的独立性与可迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在MedQA-USMLE、GPQA Diamond和MMLU-Pro上使用Gemini 3.1 Pro和Claude Sonnet 4.6进行实验，共18个基准×推理器×提议器设置。
limitations: 方法依赖外部答案锚点，可能不适用于开放式生成任务。
语言化通道仅在部分设置中有效，通用性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于推理轨迹几何结构的黑盒置信度评分方法，无需logits或隐藏状态，在多个基准上以更少样本超越自一致性。

papers.title: From Specification to Deployment: Empirical Evidence from a W3C VC + DID Trust Infrastructure for Autonomous Agents
papers.abstract: Autonomous AI agents now transact at production scale -- 69,000 bots executing 165 million transactions across 50 million USDC in cumulative volume on a single marketplace -- without any shared trust layer between participants. Regulatory frameworks (Singapore IMDA, NIST CAISI, EU AI Act) and major AI laboratories (Anthropic, Google) have independently converged on the same structural requirement: an open, portable, cryptographically verifiable trust infrastructure for autonomous agents that no single vendor can deliver alone. This paper presents MolTrust, a production-deployed implementation of such an infrastructure built on W3C Verifiable Credentials 2.0 and Decentralized Identifiers v1.0, with on-chain anchoring on Base Layer 2. The system architecture is organized around four primitives (identity, authorization, behavioral record, portability), a five-party accountability chain, and the Agent Authorization Envelope (AAE) -- a machine-evaluable authorization structure enforced at three layers: cryptographic signatures, API-level credential lifecycle management, and kernel-level syscall monitoring via Falco eBPF integration. The paper documents three distinguishing capabilities: kernel-layer AAE enforcement below the agent process boundary; cross-protocol interoperability through five reproducible test vectors verified against independent implementations; and layered Sybil resistance combining dual-signature interaction proofs, cross-vertical endorsement diversity gating, and principal-DID-linked violation persistence. The reference implementation has been operational since March 2026 across eight credential verticals. Empirical validation at adversarial scale is pending. The contribution is deployment-first evidence that the trust infrastructure regulators and industry have converged on is implementable today using W3C-standardized primitives.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于W3C VC+DID的自主智能体信任基础设施MolTrust，已在生产环境部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主AI智能体在缺乏共享信任层的情况下大规模交易，存在安全与合规风险，监管与业界均要求开放可验证的信任基础设施。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个开放、可移植、密码学可验证的自主智能体信任基础设施，并实现生产级部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于W3C Verifiable Credentials 2.0和Decentralized Identifiers v1.0，结合Base Layer 2链上锚定，设计四原语（身份、授权、行为记录、可移植性）、五方问责链及Agent Authorization Envelope（AAE），在密码签名、API级凭证生命周期管理和内核级系统调用监控（Falco eBPF）三层实施。
contributions: 提出MolTrust，首个基于W3C标准的自主智能体信任基础设施生产部署实现。
设计并实现AAE，在密码、API和内核三层强制执行授权。
展示跨协议互操作性（5个可复现测试向量）和分层Sybil抵抗机制。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及参考实现自2026年3月运行于8个凭证垂直领域，对抗规模验证待进行。
limitations: 对抗规模验证尚未完成，安全性未充分评估。
可能依赖特定区块链（Base Layer 2），通用性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于W3C VC+DID的自主智能体信任基础设施MolTrust，已在生产环境部署。

papers.title: Addressing Labelled Data Scarcity: Taxonomy-Agnostic Annotation of PII Values in HTTP Traffic using LLMs
papers.abstract: Automated privacy audits of web and mobile applications often analyse outbound HTTP traffic to detect Personally Identifiable Information (PII) leakage. However, existing learning-based detectors typically depend on scarce, manually labelled traffic and are tightly coupled to fixed label taxonomies, limiting transferability across domains and evolving definitions of PII. This paper investigates whether Large Language Models (LLMs) can support taxonomy-agnostic annotation of explicitly transmitted PII values in HTTP message bodies when the taxonomy is provided at runtime. We introduce a multi-stage LLM-based pipeline that combines deterministic pre-processing with label-level classification, targeted instance-level value annotation, and output validation. To enable controlled evaluation and exemplar-based prompting without relying on sensitive real-user captures, we further propose an LLM-based generator for synthetic HTTP traffic with manually validated, taxonomy-derived PII annotations. We evaluate the approach across three taxonomies spanning different PII domains and granularity levels. Results show that the pipeline accurately detects PII types and extracts corresponding values for concrete PII taxonomies. Overall, our findings position LLMs as a promising foundation for flexible, taxonomy-agnostic traffic annotation and for creating labelled data under evolving privacy taxonomies.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于LLM的多阶段流水线，实现HTTP流量中PII值的分类无关标注，并合成带标注数据以缓解标注稀缺问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于学习的PII检测器依赖稀缺的手动标注数据，且与固定标签分类紧密耦合，难以跨领域迁移或适应不断演变的PII定义。
analysis.problem: 如何在HTTP流量中实现分类无关的显式PII值标注，即运行时提供分类即可自动标注，无需重新训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多阶段LLM流水线：确定性预处理 + 标签级分类 + 实例级值标注 + 输出验证；并利用LLM生成合成HTTP流量及对应标注。
contributions: 提出一种分类无关的LLM流水线，可在运行时根据给定分类自动标注HTTP流量中的PII值。
提出基于LLM的合成HTTP流量生成器，用于创建带验证标注的数据集，支持示例提示和受控评估。
analysis.experiments: 在三个不同粒度和领域的PII分类上评估，流水线能准确检测PII类型并提取对应值。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理能力，对复杂或模糊PII定义可能不鲁棒。
合成数据与真实流量分布可能存在差异，影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于LLM的多阶段流水线，实现HTTP流量中PII值的分类无关标注，并合成带标注数据以缓解标注稀缺问题。

papers.title: Render, Don't Decode: Weight-Space World Models with Latent Structural Disentanglement
papers.abstract: Training world models on vast quantities of unlabelled videos is a critical step toward fully autonomous intelligence. However, the prevailing paradigm of encoding raw pixels into opaque latent spaces and relying on heavy decoders for reconstruction leaves these models computationally expensive and uninterpretable. We address this problem by introducing NOVA, a world modelling framework that represents the system state as the weights and biases of an auxiliary coordinate-based implicit neural representation (INR). This structured representation is analytically rendered, which eliminates the decoder bottleneck while conferring compactness, portability, and zero-shot super-resolution. Furthermore, like most latent action models, NOVA can be distilled into a context-dependent video generator via an action-matching objective. Surprisingly, without resorting to auxiliary losses or adversarial objectives, NOVA can disentangle structural scene components such as background, foreground, and inter-frame motion, enabling users to edit either content or dynamics without compromising the other. We validate our framework on several challenging datasets, achieving strong controllable forecasting while operating on a single consumer GPU at $\sim$40M parameters. Ultimately, structured representations like INRs not only enhance our understanding of latent dynamics but also pave the way for immersive and customisable virtual experiences.

analysis.tldr: NOVA 用隐式神经表示的权重作为世界模型状态，消除解码器瓶颈，实现可解释、紧凑、零样本超分和可控视频预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界模型依赖编码像素到不透明潜空间并用重解码器重建，导致计算昂贵且不可解释，限制了其在自主智能中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建计算高效、可解释且支持可控预测的世界模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 NOVA 框架，用辅助坐标基隐式神经表示（INR）的权重和偏置表示系统状态，通过解析渲染避免解码器瓶颈，并通过动作匹配目标蒸馏为上下文相关的视频生成器。
contributions: 提出基于 INR 权重的结构化世界模型表示，消除解码器瓶颈，实现紧凑、可移植和零样本超分辨率。
发现无需辅助损失或对抗目标即可解耦背景、前景和帧间运动等结构场景组件，支持内容与动态的独立编辑。
analysis.experiments: 在多个具有挑战性的数据集上验证，以约4000万参数在单消费级GPU上实现强可控预测。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景或长视频的扩展性有限。
解耦能力可能依赖特定数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NOVA 用隐式神经表示的权重作为世界模型状态，消除解码器瓶颈，实现可解释、紧凑、零样本超分和可控视频预测。

papers.title: Attributions All the Way Down? The Metagame of Interpretability
papers.abstract: We introduce the metagame, a conceptual framework for quantifying second-order interaction effects of model explanations. For any first-order attribution $φ(f)$ explaining a model $f$, we measure the directional influence of feature $j$ on the attribution of feature $i$, denoted as meta-attribution $\varphi_{j \to i}(f)$, by treating the attribution method itself as a cooperative game and computing its Shapley value. Theoretically, we prove that attributions hierarchically decompose into meta-attributions, and establish these as directional extensions of existing interaction indices. Empirically, we demonstrate that the metagame delivers insights across diverse interpretability applications: (i) quantifying token interactions in instruction-tuned language models, (ii) explaining cross-modal similarity in vision-language encoders, and (iii) interpreting text-to-image concepts in multimodal diffusion transformers.

analysis.tldr: 提出元博弈框架，通过元归因量化解释的二阶交互效应，并在多种可解释性任务中验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有归因方法仅提供一阶特征重要性，无法捕捉特征间对归因的相互影响，缺乏对解释本身的高阶分析。
analysis.problem: 如何量化模型解释中特征之间的二阶交互效应（即一个特征对另一个特征归因的影响）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将归因方法视为合作博弈，计算其Shapley值得到元归因，证明归因可层次分解为元归因，并建立其与现有交互指标的联系。
contributions: 提出元博弈框架，用于量化解释的二阶交互效应。
理论上证明归因可分解为元归因，并建立其作为方向性交互扩展。
在指令微调语言模型、视觉-语言编码器和多模态扩散Transformer上展示应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 计算元归因可能增加开销。
框架依赖Shapley值，可能受限于其计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出元博弈框架，通过元归因量化解释的二阶交互效应，并在多种可解释性任务中验证。

papers.title: Log-Likelihood, Simpson's Paradox, and the Detection of Machine-Generated Text
papers.abstract: The ability to reliably distinguish human-written text from that generated by large language models is of profound societal importance. The dominant approach to this problem exploits the likelihood hypothesis: that machine-generated text should appear more probable to a detector language model than human-written text. However, we demonstrate that the token-level signal distinguishing human and machine text is non-uniform across the hidden space of the detector model, and naively averaging likelihood-based token scores across regions with fundamentally different statistical structure, as most detectors do, causes a form of Simpson's paradox: a strong local signal is destroyed by inappropriate aggregation. To correct for this, we introduce a learned local calibration step grounded in Bayesian decision theory. Rather than aggregating raw token scores, we first learn lightweight predictors of the score distributions conditioned on position in hidden space, and aggregate calibrated log-likelihood ratios instead. This single intervention dramatically and consistently improves detection performance across all baseline detectors and all datasets we consider. For example, our calibrated variant of Fast-DetectGPT improves AUROC from $0.63$ to $0.85$ on GPT-5.4 text, and a locally-calibrated DMAP detector we introduce achieves state-of-the-art performance across the board. That said, our central contribution is not a new detector, but a precise diagnosis of a significant cause of under-performance of existing detectors and a principled, modular remedy compatible with any token-averaging pipeline. This will serve as a foundation for the community to build upon, with natural avenues including richer distributional models, improved calibration strategies, and principled ensembling with hidden-space geometry signals via the full Bayes-optimal decision rule.

analysis.tldr: 发现似然检测机器生成文本时存在辛普森悖论，提出基于贝叶斯决策理论的局部校准方法显著提升检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 可靠区分人类与机器生成文本具有重大社会意义，但现有基于似然假设的检测器因忽视token级信号在隐藏空间中的非均匀性而性能受限。
analysis.problem: 现有检测器对token似然分数进行简单平均聚合，导致辛普森悖论——局部强信号被不当聚合破坏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出token级区分信号在检测器隐藏空间中非均匀分布，简单平均聚合不同统计结构的区域会破坏局部信号，形成辛普森悖论。
analysis.method: 引入基于贝叶斯决策理论的局部校准步骤：先学习轻量级预测器估计隐藏空间中位置条件化的分数分布，再聚合校准后的对数似然比。
contributions: 精确诊断现有检测器性能不足的重要原因——辛普森悖论
提出一种原则性、模块化的局部校准方法，可兼容任何token平均检测流水线
analysis.experiments: 在多个基线检测器和数据集上，校准变体显著提升性能，例如Fast-DetectGPT在GPT-5.4文本上AUROC从0.63提升至0.85，新提出的DMAP检测器达到全面最优。
limitations: 校准依赖隐藏空间位置条件化，可能需额外计算开销
未探索更丰富的分布模型或与隐藏空间几何信号的全贝叶斯最优集成
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现似然检测机器生成文本时存在辛普森悖论，提出基于贝叶斯决策理论的局部校准方法显著提升检测性能。

papers.title: Data Language Models: A New Foundation Model Class for Tabular Data
papers.abstract: Every major data modality now has a foundation model that understands it natively: text has language models, images have vision models, audio has audio models. Tabular data, the modality on which many consequential real-world AI decisions are made, does not. Every approach to tabular AI today, from gradient-boosted trees to the latest tabular foundation models, requires a preprocessing pipeline before any model can consume the data. None of them understand tabular data as a modality. We introduce the Data Language Model (DLM), the missing foundation model for tabular data. A DLM understands tables the way a language model understands sentences: natively, without serialization or preprocessing, directly from raw cell values. It is the tabular data layer on which AI models, agents, and vertical AI applications can be built, eliminating the preprocessing pipelines that currently stand between raw data and every AI system that consumes it. We present Schema-1, the first DLM: a 140M parameter model trained on more than 2.3M synthetic and real-world tabular datasets. Schema-1 outperforms gradient-boosted ensembles, AutoML stacks, and the tabular foundation models we evaluate on established row-level prediction benchmarks. On missing value reconstruction it achieves lower reconstruction error than all classical statistical methods and frontier large language models on mean performance across conditions, establishing that structural understanding of a dataset's own distributional geometry is more useful for imputation than world knowledge encoded in language. It identifies the industry sector of any unseen dataset from raw cell values alone, reliably across any domain, a task no prior tabular model can perform. It is the native tabular understanding layer that has been missing from the AI stack.

analysis.tldr: 提出数据语言模型（DLM），一种原生理解表格数据的基础模型，无需预处理即可直接处理原始单元格值。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格数据是许多重要AI决策的基础，但目前缺乏像文本、图像和音频那样的原生基础模型，所有现有方法都需要预处理流水线，无法直接理解表格数据。
analysis.problem: 表格数据缺乏一种能够原生理解其模态的基础模型，导致现有AI系统必须依赖繁琐的预处理步骤。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出数据语言模型（DLM），以Schema-1为例，是一个1.4亿参数的模型，在超过230万个合成和真实表格数据集上训练，能够直接处理原始单元格值，无需序列化或预处理。
contributions: 首次提出数据语言模型（DLM）这一新基础模型类别，用于原生理解表格数据。
发布Schema-1模型，在行级预测基准上优于梯度提升集成、AutoML堆栈和现有表格基础模型，并在缺失值重建和行业分类任务上表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在行级预测基准上评估，Schema-1优于梯度提升集成、AutoML堆栈和现有表格基础模型；在缺失值重建上，平均性能优于所有经典统计方法和前沿大语言模型；在行业分类任务上，能仅从原始单元格值可靠地识别未见数据集的行业领域。
limitations: 模型规模较小（1.4亿参数），可能在大规模或复杂表格上存在局限。
训练数据主要为合成和真实数据集，可能未覆盖所有表格数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出数据语言模型（DLM），一种原生理解表格数据的基础模型，无需预处理即可直接处理原始单元格值。

papers.title: Multimodal Deep Generative Model for Semi-Supervised Learning under Class Imbalance
papers.abstract: When modeling class-imbalanced data, it is crucial to address the imbalance, as models trained on such data tend to be biased towards the majority classes. This problem is amplified under partial supervision, where pseudo-labels for unlabeled data are predicted based on imbalanced labeled data, propagating the bias. While recent semi-supervised models address class imbalance, they typically assume single-modal input data. However, with the growing availability of multimodal data, it is essential to leverage complementary modalities. In this article, we propose a multimodal deep generative model for semi-supervised learning under class imbalance. Our approach uses separate encoders for each modality, sharing latent variables across modalities, and simplifies joint posterior computation with a product-of-experts method. To further address class imbalance, we replace typical Gaussian distributions with Student's t-distributions for the prior, encoder, and decoder, better capturing the heavy-tailed latent distributions in imbalanced data. We derive a new objective function for training the proposed model on both labeled and unlabeled data using $γ$-power divergence. Empirical results on benchmark and real-world datasets demonstrate that our model outperforms baseline methods in generalization, achieving superior classification performance for partially labeled multimodal data with imbalanced class distributions.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态深度生成模型，利用Student-t分布和γ-散度处理半监督学习中的类别不平衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 类别不平衡数据在部分监督下会放大偏差，现有半监督模型通常假设单模态输入，无法利用多模态数据的互补信息。
analysis.problem: 如何在多模态半监督学习中有效处理类别不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 为每个模态使用独立编码器，通过专家乘积共享潜在变量；用Student-t分布替代高斯分布以捕捉重尾潜在分布；基于γ-散度推导新的目标函数。
contributions: 提出多模态深度生成模型用于半监督学习下的类别不平衡场景。
引入Student-t分布和γ-散度以缓解不平衡带来的偏差。
analysis.experiments: 在基准和真实数据集上，模型在泛化性和分类性能上优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，如Student-t的自由度。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态深度生成模型，利用Student-t分布和γ-散度处理半监督学习中的类别不平衡问题。

papers.title: A Topological Sorting Criterion for Random Causal Directed Acyclic Graphs
papers.abstract: Random directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) based on imposing an order on Erdős-Rényi and scale free random graphs are widely used for evaluating causal discovery algorithms. We show that in such DAGs, the set of nodes reachable via open paths, termed relatives, increases monotonically along the causal order. We assess the prevalence of this pattern numerically, and demonstrate that it can be exploited for causal order recovery via sorting by the estimated number of relatives. We note that many simulations in the literature feature settings where this yields an excellent proxy for the causal order, and show that a strict increase of relatives along the causal order leads to a singular Markov equivalence class. We propose sampling time-series DAGs as a possible alternative and discuss implications for causal discovery algorithms and their evaluation on synthetic data.

analysis.tldr: 论文发现随机因果DAG中亲属数沿因果序单调递增，并利用该性质通过排序恢复因果序。
analysis.research_motivation: 随机有向无环图（DAG）广泛用于评估因果发现算法，但现有生成方法可能引入未预期的结构偏差，影响算法评估的公平性和可靠性。
analysis.problem: 揭示基于Erdős-Rényi和无标度随机图生成的因果DAG中存在的结构规律（亲属数单调递增），并利用该规律改进因果序恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在随机因果DAG中，通过开放路径可达的节点集（称为亲属）沿因果序单调递增；该模式在数值实验中普遍存在，且严格递增会导致奇异马尔可夫等价类。
analysis.method: 提出通过估计每个节点的亲属数并排序来恢复因果序的方法。
contributions: 发现随机因果DAG中亲属数沿因果序单调递增的规律，并数值验证其普遍性。
证明亲属数严格递增导致奇异马尔可夫等价类，并提出基于亲属数排序的因果序恢复方法。
建议采样时间序列DAG作为替代方案，并讨论对因果发现算法评估的影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法依赖于亲属数单调递增的假设，可能不适用于所有类型的DAG。
仅讨论了随机图模型，未在真实数据上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文发现随机因果DAG中亲属数沿因果序单调递增，并利用该性质通过排序恢复因果序。

papers.title: Eulerian Motion Guidance: Robust Image Animation via Bidirectional Geometric Consistency
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in image animation have utilized diffusion models to breathe life into static images. However, existing controllable frameworks typically rely on Lagrangian motion guidance, where optical flow is estimated relative to the initial frame. This paper revisits the same optical-flow primitive through a more local supervision design: we use adjacent-frame Eulerian motion fields to guide generation, where the motion signal always describes a short temporal hop. This shift enables parallelized training and provides bounded-error supervision throughout the generation process. To mitigate the drift artifacts common in adjacent frame generation, we introduce a Bidirectional Geometric Consistency mechanism, which computes a forward-backward cycle check to mathematically identify and mask occluded regions, preventing the model from learning incorrect warping objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach accelerates training, preserves temporal coherence, and reduces dynamic artifacts compared to reference-based baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于相邻帧欧拉运动场引导的图像动画方法，通过双向几何一致性机制消除遮挡伪影。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像动画方法依赖拉格朗日运动引导（光流相对于初始帧），存在误差累积和训练效率低的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用相邻帧欧拉运动场实现高效、鲁棒的图像动画，并解决相邻帧生成中的漂移伪影。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相邻帧生成中常见漂移伪影，源于遮挡区域导致错误的光流监督。
analysis.method: 使用相邻帧欧拉运动场替代拉格朗日运动场进行引导，实现并行训练和有界误差监督；引入双向几何一致性机制，通过前向-后向循环检查识别并掩蔽遮挡区域。
contributions: 提出基于相邻帧欧拉运动场的图像动画框架，支持并行训练并降低误差累积。
设计双向几何一致性机制，有效消除遮挡导致的漂移伪影。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对快速运动或大位移场景效果有限。
双向一致性计算增加额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于相邻帧欧拉运动场引导的图像动画方法，通过双向几何一致性机制消除遮挡伪影。

papers.title: Correct Code, Vulnerable Dependencies: A Large Scale Measurement Study of LLM-Specified Library Versions
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are now largely involved in software development workflows, and the code they generate routinely includes third-party library (TPL) imports annotated with specific version identifiers. These version choices can carry security and compatibility risks, yet they have not been systematically studied. We present the first large-scale measurement study of version-level risk in LLM-generated Python code, evaluating 10 LLMs on PinTrace, a curated benchmark of 1,000 Stack Overflow programming tasks. LLMs tend to specify version identifiers when directly prompted at 26.83%-95.18%, while down to 6.45%-59.19% in creating a manifest file directly. Among the specified versions, 36.70%-55.70% of tasks contain at least one known CVE, and 62.75%-74.51% of them carry Critical or High severity ratings. In 72.27%-91.37% of cases, the associated CVEs were publicly disclosed before the model's knowledge cutoff. The statistics show all models converge on the same small set of risky release versions, indicating a systemic bias rather than isolated model error. Static compatibility rates range from 19.70% to 63.20%, with installation failure as the dominant cause. The dynamic test cases confirm the pattern by 6.49%-48.62% pass rates. Further experiments confirm that these failures are attributable to version selection rather than code quality, and that externally anchored version constraints substantially reduce both vulnerability exposure and compatibility failures. Our findings reveal LLM version selection as a first-class, previously overlooked risk surface in LLM-based development. We disclosed these findings to the community of the evaluated models, and several confirmed the issue. All the code and dataset have been released for open science at https://github.com/dw763j/PinTrace.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成的代码中指定的第三方库版本存在严重安全漏洞和兼容性问题，且模型存在系统性偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM已广泛用于代码生成，但生成的第三方库版本选择可能引入安全与兼容性风险，此前缺乏系统研究。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在生成Python代码时指定的第三方库版本是否存在已知漏洞和兼容性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型倾向于选择相同的小范围高风险版本，表明存在系统性偏差而非孤立错误；兼容性失败主要由安装失败导致。
analysis.method: 构建PinTrace基准（1000个Stack Overflow编程任务），评估10个LLM在指定版本时的漏洞暴露率和兼容性，并通过外部锚定版本约束进行对比实验。
contributions: 首次大规模测量LLM生成代码中第三方库版本的风险，揭示系统性偏差。
发布PinTrace基准和开源代码/数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在PinTrace上评估10个LLM，测量版本指定率、CVE暴露率、严重性分布、兼容性通过率及动态测试通过率，并验证外部锚定约束的效果。
limitations: 仅针对Python语言和特定基准任务。
未覆盖所有LLM和所有第三方库。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成的代码中指定的第三方库版本存在严重安全漏洞和兼容性问题，且模型存在系统性偏差。

papers.title: Linear Semantic Segmentation for Low-Resource Spoken Dialects
papers.abstract: Semantic segmentation is a core component of discourse analysis, yet existing models are primarily developed and evaluated on high-resource written text, limiting their effectiveness on low-resource spoken varieties. In particular, dialectal Arabic exhibits informal syntax, code-switching, and weakly marked discourse structure that challenge standard segmentation approaches. In this paper, we introduce a new multi-genre benchmark (more than 1000 samples) for semantic segmentation in conversational Arabic, focusing on dialectal discourse. The benchmark covers transcribed casual telephone conversations, code-switched podcasts, broadcast news, and expressive dialogue from novels, and was annotated and validated by native Arabic annotators. Using this benchmark, we show that segmentation models performing well on MSA news genres degrade on dialectal transcribed speech. We further propose a segmentation model that targets local semantic coherence and robustness to discourse discontinuities, consistently outperforming strong baselines on dialectal non-news genres. The benchmark and approach generalize to other low-resource spoken languages.

analysis.tldr: 针对低资源口语方言的线性语义分割方法，构建了多体裁基准并验证了模型在方言口语上的退化与改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语义分割模型主要针对高资源书面文本开发，在低资源口语方言（如阿拉伯语方言）上效果有限，因为这些方言具有非正式句法、代码切换和弱标记话语结构。
analysis.problem: 解决低资源口语方言（特别是阿拉伯语方言）的语义分割问题，提升模型在非正式、代码切换和话语结构弱标记场景下的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在MSA新闻体裁上表现良好的分割模型，在方言转录语音上性能显著下降。
analysis.method: 提出一种针对局部语义连贯性和话语不连续鲁棒性的分割模型。
contributions: 构建了首个多体裁阿拉伯语方言语义分割基准（超过1000样本），涵盖电话对话、代码切换播客、广播新闻和小说对话。
提出一种对局部语义连贯性和话语不连续鲁棒的分割模型，在方言非新闻体裁上持续优于强基线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准规模相对较小（1000+样本），可能限制泛化性。
方法仅在阿拉伯语方言上验证，对其他低资源语言的适用性需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对低资源口语方言的线性语义分割方法，构建了多体裁基准并验证了模型在方言口语上的退化与改进。

papers.title: When Labels Have Structure: Improving Image Classification with Hierarchy-Aware Cross-Entropy
papers.abstract: Standard cross-entropy is the default classification loss across virtually all of machine learning, yet it treats all misclassifications equally, ignoring the semantic distances that a class hierarchy encodes. We propose Hierarchy-Aware Cross-Entropy (HACE), a drop-in replacement for standard cross-entropy that incorporates a known class hierarchy directly into the loss. HACE combines two components: prediction aggregation, which propagates the model's probability mass upward through the class hierarchy to ensure that parent nodes accumulate the confidence of their children; and ancestral label smoothing, which distributes the ground-truth signal along the path from the true class to the root. We evaluate HACE on CIFAR-100, FGVC Aircraft, and NABirds in two regimes: end-to-end training across six architectures spanning convolutional and attention-based designs, and linear probing on frozen DINOv2-Large features. In end-to-end training, HACE improves accuracy over standard cross-entropy in 15 out of 18 architecture--dataset pairs, with a mean gain of 4.66\%. In linear probing on frozen DINOv2-Large features, HACE outperforms all competing methods on all three datasets, with a mean improvement of 2.18\% over the next best baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出层级感知交叉熵损失函数HACE，利用类别层级结构提升图像分类准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准交叉熵损失平等对待所有错误分类，忽略了类别层级编码的语义距离，导致模型无法利用层级结构信息。
analysis.problem: 如何将已知的类别层级结构直接融入损失函数，以提升图像分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HACE损失，包含两个组件：预测聚合（将模型概率质量沿层级向上传播）和祖先标签平滑（将真实标签信号沿路径分布到根节点）。
contributions: 提出HACE，一种即插即用的层级感知交叉熵损失函数。
在多个数据集和架构上验证了HACE的有效性，端到端训练平均提升4.66%，线性探测平均提升2.18%。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-100、FGVC Aircraft和NABirds上，使用6种架构（卷积和注意力）进行端到端训练，以及在冻结的DINOv2-Large特征上进行线性探测。
limitations: 需要预定义的类别层级结构，可能不适用于无层级或层级不明确的数据集。
仅验证了图像分类任务，未在其他领域（如自然语言处理）测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层级感知交叉熵损失函数HACE，利用类别层级结构提升图像分类准确率。

papers.title: On-Orbit Real-Time Wildfire Detection Under On-Board Constraints
papers.abstract: We present a deployed system for on-orbit wildfire detection aboard a nine-satellite commercial thermal infrared constellation, operating under demanding joint constraints: sub-megabyte model footprint, sub-150 ms per-batch TensorRT FP16 inference on an NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX, and an end-to-end alert pipeline targeting under 10 minutes from satellite overpass to fire event communication. The system operates on uncalibrated mid-wave infrared (MWIR) single-band imagery at 200 m ground sampling distance, where fires frequently appear as sub-pixel or single-pixel thermal anomalies under extreme class imbalance -- challenges not addressed by the contextual thermal-thresholding pipelines (MODIS, VIIRS) that currently dominate operational fire monitoring. We present an empirical study of lightweight dense representation learning for this regime using a proprietary nine-satellite MWIR dataset. We compare dense masked autoencoding (DenseMAE) and a hybrid DenseMAE+EMA (exponential moving average) distillation variant, and evaluate representations via linear probing and full-distribution pixel-level average precision (AP) under extreme class imbalance. DenseMAE pretraining enables compact downstream models on the latency-accuracy Pareto frontier: our fastest SSL-pretrained model achieves 0.640 test AP and 0.69 event-level Fire-F1 with 65.34 ms latency per batch and a 0.52 MB engine, without pruning or compression. The best configuration reaches 0.699 AP and 0.744 Fire-F1 below 1 MB, outperforming a supervised baseline (0.650 AP) under comparable constraints.

analysis.tldr: 在轨卫星上实现亚兆字节模型、亚150毫秒推理的实时野火检测系统，采用DenseMAE自监督预训练优于监督基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MODIS/VIIRS等热红外阈值方法无法处理亚像素热异常和极端类别不平衡，且星载计算资源严格受限，亟需轻量高效的深度学习方案。
analysis.problem: 在星载约束（模型<1MB、推理<150ms、端到端<10分钟）下，利用单波段中波红外图像实现高精度野火检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DenseMAE（密集掩码自编码）及其混合DenseMAE+EMA蒸馏变体进行自监督预训练，再微调轻量下游模型，在NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX上部署TensorRT FP16推理。
contributions: 首个在商业热红外卫星星座上部署的实时野火检测系统，满足严格星载约束。
系统比较了DenseMAE和DenseMAE+EMA自监督方法，证明预训练能显著提升极端类别不平衡下的检测精度。
analysis.experiments: 使用专有九卫星MWIR数据集，评估线性探测和全分布像素级平均精度（AP）及事件级Fire-F1，最快模型AP 0.640、Fire-F1 0.69，延迟65.34ms，引擎0.52MB；最佳配置AP 0.699、Fire-F1 0.744，优于监督基线（AP 0.650）。
limitations: 仅使用单波段MWIR数据，未融合多光谱或可见光信息。
数据集为专有，方法可迁移性未在公开基准上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在轨卫星上实现亚兆字节模型、亚150毫秒推理的实时野火检测系统，采用DenseMAE自监督预训练优于监督基线。

papers.title: Spark3R: Asymmetric Token Reduction Makes Fast Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction models based on Vision Transformers can directly estimate scene geometry and camera poses from a small set of input images, but scaling them to video inputs with hundreds or thousands of frames remains challenging due to the quadratic cost of global attention layers.
