Recent token-merging methods accelerate these models by compressing the token sequence within the global attention layers, but they apply a uniform reduction to query tokens and key-value tokens, ignoring their functionally distinct roles in 3D reconstruction. In this work, we identify a key property of feed-forward 3D reconstruction models: query tokens encode view-specific geometric requests and are sensitive to compression, while key-value tokens represent shared scene context and tolerate aggressive compression. Guided by this insight, we propose Spark3R, a training-free acceleration framework that decouples the compression of query tokens and key-value tokens by assigning distinct reduction factors, with intra-group token merging applied to query tokens and lightweight token pruning to key-value tokens. Additionally, Spark3R adaptively adjusts the key-value reduction factor across layers, further improving the quality-efficiency trade-off. As a plug-and-play framework requiring no retraining, Spark3R integrates directly into multiple pretrained feed-forward 3D reconstruction models, including VGGT, $π^3$, and Depth-Anything-3, and achieves up to $28\times$ speedup on 1,000-frame inputs while maintaining competitive reconstruction quality.

analysis.tldr: Spark3R通过非对称令牌压缩实现快速前馈3D重建，在1000帧输入上加速28倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 前馈3D重建模型基于Vision Transformer，处理视频输入时全局注意力层的二次复杂度成为瓶颈，现有令牌合并方法忽略查询令牌和键值令牌的功能差异，导致压缩效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，高效压缩前馈3D重建模型中的令牌序列，以处理数百至数千帧的视频输入。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现查询令牌编码视图特定几何请求，对压缩敏感；键值令牌表示共享场景上下文，可容忍激进压缩。
analysis.method: 提出Spark3R，一种无需训练的加速框架，解耦查询令牌和键值令牌的压缩：对查询令牌使用组内令牌合并，对键值令牌使用轻量级令牌剪枝，并自适应调整各层的键值缩减因子。
contributions: 识别前馈3D重建模型中查询令牌和键值令牌的功能差异，并据此提出非对称令牌压缩策略。
提出Spark3R，一种即插即用、无需重新训练的加速框架，可集成到多个预训练模型。
在1000帧输入上实现高达28倍加速，同时保持竞争性重建质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个预训练模型（VGGT、π³、Depth-Anything-3）上评估，使用1000帧输入，报告加速比和重建质量。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于Vision Transformer的前馈3D重建模型。
自适应缩减因子调整策略可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Spark3R通过非对称令牌压缩实现快速前馈3D重建，在1000帧输入上加速28倍。

papers.title: ZScribbleSeg: A comprehensive segmentation framework with modeling of efficient annotation and maximization of scribble supervision
papers.abstract: Curating fully annotated datasets for medical image segmentation is labour-intensive and expertise-demanding. To alleviate this problem, prior studies have explored scribble annotations for weakly supervised segmentation. Existing solutions mainly compute losses on annotated areas and generate pseudo labels by propagating annotations to adjacent regions. However, these methods often suffer from inaccurate and unrealistic segmentations due to insufficient supervision and incomplete shape information. In contrast, we first investigate the principle of good scribble annotations, which leads to efficient scribble forms via supervision maximization and randomness simulation. We further introduce regularization terms to encode the spatial relationship and the shape constraints, where the EM algorithm is utilized to estimate the mixture ratios of label classes. These ratios are critical in identifying the unlabeled pixels for each class and correcting erroneous predictions, thus the accurate estimation lays the foundation for the incorporation of spatial prior. Finally, we integrate the efficient scribble supervision with the prior into a framework, referred to as ZScribbleSeg, and apply it to multiple scenarios. Leveraging only scribble annotations, ZScribbleSeg achieves competitive performance on six segmentation tasks including ACDC, MSCMRseg, BTCV, MyoPS, Decathlon-BrainTumor and Decathlon-Prostate. Our code will be released via https://github.com/DLwbm123/ZScribbleSeg.

analysis.tldr: 提出ZScribbleSeg框架，通过高效涂鸦标注和最大化监督信号实现弱监督医学图像分割，在六个任务上达到竞争性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割需要大量专家标注，成本高昂；现有弱监督涂鸦方法因监督不足和形状信息不完整导致分割不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效的涂鸦标注形式并最大化其监督信号，以提升弱监督医学图像分割的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有涂鸦方法仅计算标注区域损失，通过传播生成伪标签，但监督不足和形状信息不完整导致分割不准确。
analysis.method: 首先研究良好涂鸦标注原则，通过监督最大化和随机模拟得到高效涂鸦形式；引入正则项编码空间关系和形状约束，利用EM算法估计标签类混合比例以识别未标注像素并纠正错误预测；将高效涂鸦监督与先验集成到ZScribbleSeg框架。
contributions: 提出高效涂鸦标注原则，通过监督最大化和随机模拟生成高效涂鸦形式。
引入基于EM算法的标签类混合比例估计，结合空间先验和形状约束提升分割准确性。
在六个医学图像分割任务上验证了仅用涂鸦标注即可达到竞争性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ACDC、MSCMRseg、BTCV、MyoPS、Decathlon-BrainTumor和Decathlon-Prostate六个分割任务上评估，仅用涂鸦标注取得竞争性能。
limitations: 可能对复杂形状或小目标分割效果有限。
EM算法估计混合比例可能受初始值影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ZScribbleSeg框架，通过高效涂鸦标注和最大化监督信号实现弱监督医学图像分割，在六个任务上达到竞争性能。

papers.title: Inference-Time Refinement Closes the Synthetic-Real Gap in Tabular Diffusion
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based generators set the current state of the art for synthetic tabular data. These methods approach but rarely exceed real-data utility, and closing this synthetic-real gap has so far been pursued exclusively at training time, via architectural advances, scaling, and retraining of monolithic generators. The inference-time alternative, i.e., refining the outputs of a pre-trained backbone with parameters left untouched, has remained largely unexplored for tabular synthesis. We introduce TARDIS (Tabular generation through Refinement, Distillation, and Inference-time Sampling), an inference-time refinement framework that operates on a frozen pre-trained backbone, configured per dataset by a Tree-structured Parzen Estimator search over score-level guidance during reverse diffusion, with each trial's objective set by an inner grid search over post-hoc sample selectors and an optional soft-label distillation step. The search space encodes a single mathematical pattern we name Bidirectional Chamfer Refinement (BCR): the symmetric Chamfer functional between synthetic and real samples is minimized both continuously, via a score-level gradient, and discretely, via batch-ranking post-generation. The per-dataset search recovers BCR-aligned configurations on most datasets, evidence for BCR as the dominant refinement pattern. Across 15 binary, multiclass, and regression benchmarks TARDIS achieves a median +8.6% downstream-task improvement over models trained on real data (95% CI [+3.3, +16.4], Wilcoxon p=0.016, 11/15 strict wins) and improves over the TabDiff backbone on all 15 datasets (mean +12.9%, p<10^-4), matching the backbone on manifold fidelity, diversity, and sample-level privacy. Inference-time refinement of a pre-trained tabular diffusion backbone reaches and exceeds real-data utility in 1 to 80 minutes on a single consumer-grade GPU.

analysis.tldr: 提出推理时精炼框架TARDIS，通过双向Chamfer精炼模式在冻结的预训练骨干网络上提升表格扩散模型合成数据的效用，超越真实数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格数据合成中，扩散模型虽为SOTA，但合成数据效用常低于真实数据，且此前缩小差距仅通过训练时改进（架构、缩放、重训），推理时精炼未被探索。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改预训练扩散模型参数的情况下，通过推理时精炼缩小合成表格数据与真实数据之间的效用差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出推理时精炼在表格合成中未被探索，且BCR模式在多数数据集上被恢复为最优配置。
analysis.method: TARDIS框架：冻结预训练扩散骨干，通过树结构Parzen估计器搜索分数级引导（反向扩散中），内层网格搜索后验样本选择器和软标签蒸馏，优化双向Chamfer精炼（BCR）目标（连续分数梯度+离散批次排序）。
contributions: 首次提出表格扩散模型的推理时精炼框架TARDIS，无需重新训练骨干网络。
发现并形式化双向Chamfer精炼（BCR）作为主导精炼模式，通过搜索自动恢复。
在15个基准上实现中位+8.6%的下游任务提升（超过真实数据），并在所有数据集上优于TabDiff骨干。
analysis.experiments: 在15个二分类、多分类和回归基准上评估，TARDIS相比真实数据训练模型实现中位+8.6%提升（95% CI [+3.3, +16.4]，Wilcoxon p=0.016，11/15严格胜出），并在所有15个数据集上优于TabDiff骨干（平均+12.9%，p<10^-4），同时保持流形保真度、多样性和样本级隐私。
limitations: 搜索过程可能耗时（1-80分钟），对实时应用有局限。
BCR模式虽主导，但未在所有数据集上完全恢复，可能存在其他有效模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出推理时精炼框架TARDIS，通过双向Chamfer精炼模式在冻结的预训练骨干网络上提升表格扩散模型合成数据的效用，超越真实数据。

papers.title: The Weight Gram Matrix Captures Sequential Feature Linearization in Deep Networks
papers.abstract: Understanding how deep neural networks learn representations remains a central challenge in machine learning theory. In this work, we propose a feature-centric framework for analyzing neural network training by relating weight updates to feature evolution. We introduce a simple identity, the Feature Learning Equation, which identifies the weight Gram matrix as the key object capturing feature dynamics. This enables us to interpret gradient descent as implicitly inducing a hypothetical evolution of features, whose covariance structure - termed the Virtual Covariance - characterizes how representations evolve during training. Building on this perspective, we introduce Target Linearity, a measure quantifying the linear alignment between features and targets. By analyzing the training and layer-wise dynamics, we show that deep networks learn to sequentially transform representations toward target-linear structure. This linearization perspective provides a unified interpretation of several empirical phenomena, including Neural Collapse and linear interpolation in generative models.

analysis.tldr: 提出权重Gram矩阵作为核心对象，揭示深度网络训练中特征逐步线性化的机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解深度神经网络如何学习表示是机器学习理论的核心挑战，现有方法缺乏统一框架来关联权重更新与特征演化。
analysis.problem: 如何从特征演化的角度统一解释深度网络训练中的表示变化，包括神经坍缩和生成模型中的线性插值等现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出深度网络在训练中会逐步将特征变换为与目标线性对齐的结构，并观察到神经坍缩和生成模型线性插值等经验现象。
analysis.method: 提出特征学习方程，将权重Gram矩阵作为捕获特征动力学的关键对象，并引入虚拟协方差和目标线性度来量化特征演化。
contributions: 提出特征学习方程，建立权重更新与特征演化的直接联系
引入目标线性度度量，统一解释神经坍缩和生成模型线性插值等现象
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论框架可能仅适用于特定网络架构或训练设置
目标线性度度量在实际大规模模型中的计算可行性未讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出权重Gram矩阵作为核心对象，揭示深度网络训练中特征逐步线性化的机制。

papers.title: Cumulative-Goodness Free-Riding in Forward-Forward Networks: Real, Repairable, but Not Accuracy-Dominant
papers.abstract: Forward-Forward (FF) training allows each layer to learn from a local goodness criterion. In cumulative-goodness variants, however, later layers can inherit a task that earlier layers have already partially separated. We formalize this phenomenon as layer free-riding: under the softplus FF criterion, the class-discrimination gradient reaching block $d$ decays exponentially with the positive margin accumulated by preceding blocks. We then study three local remedies -- per-block, hardness-gated, and depth-scaled -- that recover current-layer separation measures without relying on backpropagated gradients. On CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, these remedies dramatically improve layer-separation statistics, with $4\times$--$45\times$ gains in deeper layers, while changing accuracy by less than one percentage point for non-degenerate training procedures. Tiny ImageNet provides a tougher cross-dataset check for our selected block-wise configuration and reveals the same qualitative gap between layer-health diagnostics and final accuracy. Calibration experiments further show that architecture and augmentation choices have a larger effect on final accuracy than the training-rule modifications studied here. Cumulative free-riding is therefore a real and repairable optimization pathology. Nonetheless, for the FF training rules, architectures, and datasets we study, it is not the dominant factor limiting achievable accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 前向-前向网络中累积好处的层间搭便车现象是真实存在且可修复的，但并非限制精度的主导因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 前向-前向（FF）训练允许每层从局部好标准学习，但在累积好处变体中，后层可能继承前层已部分分离的任务，导致优化病理。理解并修复这一现象对改进FF训练至关重要。
analysis.problem: FF网络中后层利用前层累积好处的层间搭便车问题，导致深层分离度量退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在softplus FF准则下，后层的类别区分梯度随前层累积的正边距呈指数衰减，导致深层分离度量极低。
analysis.method: 提出三种局部修复方法：逐块、硬度门控和深度缩放，在不依赖反向传播梯度的情况下恢复当前层分离度量。
contributions: 形式化定义了FF网络中的层间搭便车现象，并证明其梯度衰减机制。
提出三种局部修复方法，在CIFAR-10/100上实现深层分离度量4-45倍提升，且精度变化小于1个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny ImageNet上验证，修复方法显著改善层健康指标，但精度变化微小；校准实验显示架构和数据增强对精度影响更大。
limitations: 修复方法对最终精度提升有限，表明搭便车并非精度瓶颈。
仅在特定FF训练规则、架构和数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 前向-前向网络中累积好处的层间搭便车现象是真实存在且可修复的，但并非限制精度的主导因素。

papers.title: Band Together: Untargeted Adversarial Training with Multimodal Coordination against Evasion-based Promotion Attacks
papers.abstract: Multimodal recommender systems exploit visual and textual signals to alleviate data sparsity, but this also makes them more vulnerable to evasion-based promotion attacks. Existing defenses are largely limited to single-modal settings and mainly focus on poisoning-based threats, leaving evasion-based threats underexplored. In this work, we first identify a cross-modal gradient mismatch under the multi-user promotion setting, where visual and textual perturbations are optimized in inconsistent directions due to the dominance of distinct user groups. This phenomenon dilutes the attack effectiveness and leads robust training to underestimate worst-case risks. To address this issue, we propose Untargeted Adversarial Training with Multimodal Coordination (UAT-MC). UAT-MC tackles the challenge of unknown targeted items in evasion-based attacks (as opposed to poisoning-based attacks) by treating all items as potential targets, and introduces a gradient alignment mechanism to explicitly correct this mismatch. This design ensures synchronized perturbations across modalities, thereby maximizing adversarial strength for robust training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UAT-MC significantly improves robustness against promotion attacks while maintaining acceptable recommendation performance under the defense-accuracy trade-off. Code is available at https://github.com/gmXian/UAT-MC.

analysis.tldr: 针对多模态推荐系统的逃避式推广攻击，提出多模态协调的无目标对抗训练方法UAT-MC，通过梯度对齐机制解决跨模态梯度失配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态推荐系统利用视觉和文本信号缓解数据稀疏性，但同时也更容易受到逃避式推广攻击；现有防御主要针对单模态和投毒攻击，对逃避式攻击研究不足。
analysis.problem: 多用户推广场景下，视觉和文本模态的扰动优化方向不一致（跨模态梯度失配），导致对抗训练低估最坏情况风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现跨模态梯度失配现象：不同用户群体主导的模态导致视觉和文本扰动方向不一致，削弱攻击有效性并影响鲁棒训练。
analysis.method: 提出UAT-MC，将逃避式攻击中未知目标项视为所有项，引入梯度对齐机制显式纠正跨模态梯度失配，确保模态间扰动同步以最大化对抗强度。
contributions: 首次识别多模态推荐系统中逃避式推广攻击下的跨模态梯度失配问题
提出UAT-MC方法，通过梯度对齐机制实现多模态协调的无目标对抗训练
实验证明UAT-MC在保持推荐性能的同时显著提升对推广攻击的鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行了广泛实验，表明UAT-MC显著提升对推广攻击的鲁棒性，同时保持可接受的推荐性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于多模态推荐场景，未验证其他多模态任务
梯度对齐机制可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对多模态推荐系统的逃避式推广攻击，提出多模态协调的无目标对抗训练方法UAT-MC，通过梯度对齐机制解决跨模态梯度失配问题。

papers.title: OBLIQ-Bench: Exposing Overlooked Bottlenecks in Modern Retrievers with Latent and Implicit Queries
papers.abstract: Retrieval benchmarks are increasingly saturating, but we argue that efficient search is far from a solved problem. We identify a class of queries we call oblique, which seek documents that instantiate a latent pattern, like finding all tweets that express an implicit stance, chat logs that demonstrate a particular failure mode, or transcripts that match an abstract scenario. We study three mechanisms through which obliqueness may arise and introduce OBLIQ-Bench, a suite of five oblique search problems over real long-tail corpora. OBLIQ-Bench exposes an overlooked asymmetry between retrieval and verification, where reasoning LLMs reliably recognize latent relevance whenever relevant documents are surfaced, but even sophisticated retrieval pipelines fail to surface most relevant documents in the first place. We hope that OBLIQ-Bench will drive research into retrieval architectures that efficiently capture latent patterns and implicit signals in large corpora.

analysis.tldr: 提出 OBLIQ-Bench 基准，揭示现代检索器在隐式和潜在查询上的瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有检索基准趋于饱和，但高效搜索远未解决，尤其是处理隐式或潜在模式的查询。
analysis.problem: 检索器难以处理需要识别潜在模式（如隐式立场、失败模式、抽象场景）的斜向查询。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检索与验证之间存在不对称性：推理LLM能可靠识别潜在相关性，但检索管道无法首先召回相关文档。
analysis.method: 定义斜向查询的三种机制，构建包含五个真实长尾语料库的斜向搜索问题基准。
contributions: 识别并形式化斜向查询这一被忽视的检索挑战
构建 OBLIQ-Bench 基准，包含五个真实长尾语料库的斜向搜索问题
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有斜向查询类型
未提供具体检索架构改进方案
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 OBLIQ-Bench 基准，揭示现代检索器在隐式和潜在查询上的瓶颈。

papers.title: LLM Translation of Compiler Intermediate Representation
papers.abstract: GCC and LLVM underpin much of modern software infrastructure, relying on distinct Intermediate Representations (IRs) to drive optimizations and code generation. However, the semantic and structural differences between these IRs create significant barriers for cross-toolchain interaction, limiting the reuse of compiler frontends, backends, and optimization pipelines across programming languages and compilation ecosystems. Traditional rule-based translators have attempted to bridge this gap, but their complexity and maintenance cost have hindered practical adoption. In this context, Large Language Models (LLMs) appear to be an emerging technology that offers a data-driven alternative, capable of learning complex mappings between heterogeneous compiler IRs directly from sufficiently representative examples. To explore this approach, this paper presents IRIS-14B, a 14-billion-parameter transformer model fine-tuned to translate GIMPLE (as emitted by GCC) to LLVM IR (as emitted by LLVM). The model is trained on paired IRs extracted from C sources and evaluated on the GIMPLE-to-LLVM IR transformation applied to IRs derived from real-world C code and competitive programming problems. To the best of our knowledge, IRIS-14B is the first model trained explicitly for IR-to-IR translation. It outperforms the accuracy of widely used models, including the largest state-of-the-art open models available today, ranging from 13 to 1,000 billion parameters, by up to 44 percentage points. The proposed transformation supports the integration of LLMs as complementary components within hybrid neuro-symbolic compiler architectures, where models such as IRIS-14B act as interoperability layers enabling cross-toolchain workflows without modifying existing compiler passes, while traditional compiler infrastructure continues to perform deterministic compilation and optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出IRIS-14B模型，将GCC的GIMPLE IR翻译为LLVM IR，准确率超越现有大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: GCC和LLVM使用不同的中间表示（IR），导致跨工具链交互困难，传统基于规则的翻译器复杂且维护成本高，限制了编译器前端、后端和优化管线的复用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大语言模型（LLM）实现编译器中间表示（IR）之间的自动翻译，以桥接GCC和LLVM的IR差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 微调一个14B参数的Transformer模型（IRIS-14B），使用从C源码提取的配对IR（GIMPLE和LLVM IR）进行训练，实现GIMPLE到LLVM IR的翻译。
contributions: 首次提出专门用于IR到IR翻译的模型IRIS-14B。
在真实C代码和编程竞赛问题的IR翻译任务上，准确率比现有最大开源模型（13B-1000B参数）高出最多44个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在从真实C代码和编程竞赛问题提取的IR上评估GIMPLE到LLVM IR的翻译准确率。
limitations: 仅针对GIMPLE到LLVM IR的翻译，未验证反向或其他IR对。
依赖C源码提取的配对数据，可能无法覆盖所有编译器场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IRIS-14B模型，将GCC的GIMPLE IR翻译为LLVM IR，准确率超越现有大模型。

papers.title: Safactory: A Scalable Agentic Infrastructure for Training Trustworthy Autonomous Intelligence
papers.abstract: As large models evolve from conversational assistants into autonomous agents, challenges increasingly arise from long-horizon decision making, tool use, and real environment interaction. Existing agenticinfrastructure remain fragmented across evaluation, data management, and agent evolution, making it difficult to discover risks systematically and improve models in a continuous closed loop. In this report, we present \textbf{Safactory}, a scalable agent factory for trustworthy autonomous intelligence. Safactory integrates three tightly coupled platforms: a \textbf{Parallel Simulation Platform} for trajectory generation, a \textbf{Trustworthy Data Platform} for trajectory storage and experience extraction, and an \textbf{Autonomous Evolution Platform} for asynchronous reinforcement learning and on-policy distillation. As far as we know, Safactory is the first framework to propose a unified evolutionary pipeline for next-generation trustworthy autonomous intelligence.

analysis.tldr: Safactory 是一个可扩展的智能体基础设施，通过并行仿真、可信数据平台和自主进化平台实现可信自主智能体的闭环训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体基础设施在评估、数据管理和进化方面碎片化，难以系统性地发现风险并持续改进模型。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一的、可扩展的框架来支持长程决策、工具使用和真实环境交互中的可信自主智能体训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Safactory框架，集成并行仿真平台（轨迹生成）、可信数据平台（轨迹存储与经验提取）和自主进化平台（异步强化学习与同策略蒸馏）。
contributions: 首次提出用于下一代可信自主智能体的统一进化流水线。
集成三个紧密耦合的平台，实现从仿真到进化的闭环。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖仿真环境的保真度。
大规模部署的工程复杂性未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Safactory 是一个可扩展的智能体基础设施，通过并行仿真、可信数据平台和自主进化平台实现可信自主智能体的闭环训练。

papers.title: Look Beyond Saliency: Low-Attention Guided Dual Encoding for Video Semantic Search
papers.abstract: Video semantic search in densely crowded scenes remains a challenging task due to visual encoders tendency to prioritize salient foreground regions while neglecting contextually important, background areas. We propose an Inverse Attention Embedding mechanism that explicitly captures and highlights these overlooked regions. By combining inverse attention embeddings with traditional visual embeddings, our method significantly enhances semantic retrieval performance without additional training. Initial experiments and ablation studies demonstrate promising improvements over existing approaches in recall for video semantic search in crowded environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出逆注意力嵌入机制，结合传统视觉嵌入提升密集场景视频语义搜索的召回率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉编码器在密集场景中偏向显著前景区域，忽略背景上下文信息，导致语义检索性能受限。
analysis.problem: 解决视频语义搜索中视觉编码器忽略背景上下文信息的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉编码器倾向于关注显著前景区域，而忽略上下文重要的背景区域。
analysis.method: 提出逆注意力嵌入机制，显式捕获被忽略的区域，并与传统视觉嵌入结合，无需额外训练。
contributions: 提出逆注意力嵌入机制，用于捕获被忽略的上下文区域。
通过结合逆注意力嵌入与传统嵌入，显著提升密集场景视频语义搜索的召回率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到初步实验和消融研究显示在召回率上有提升。
limitations: 可能仅在密集场景下有效，泛化性未知。
未提供与其他方法的详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出逆注意力嵌入机制，结合传统视觉嵌入提升密集场景视频语义搜索的召回率。

papers.title: Soft Deterministic Policy Gradient with Gaussian Smoothing
papers.abstract: Deterministic policy gradient (DPG) is widely utilized for continuous control; however, it inherently relies on the differentiability of the critic with respect to the action during policy updates. This assumption is violated in practical control problems involving sparse or discrete rewards, leading to ill-defined policy gradients and unstable learning. To address these challenges, we propose a principled alternative based on a smoothed Bellman equation formulated via Gaussian smoothing. Specifically, we define a novel action-value function based on a smoothed Bellman equation and derive the soft deterministic policy gradient (Soft-DPG). Our formulation eliminates explicit dependence on critic action-gradients and ensures that the gradient remains well-defined even for non-smooth Q-functions. We instantiate this framework into a deep reinforcement learning algorithm, which we call soft deep deterministic policy gradient (Soft DDPG). Empirical evaluations on standard continuous control benchmarks and their discretized-reward variants show that Soft DDPG remains competitive in dense-reward settings and provides clear gains in most discretized-reward environments, where standard DDPG is more sensitive to irregular critic landscapes.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于高斯平滑的软确定性策略梯度（Soft-DPG），消除对评论家动作梯度的依赖，提升非平滑奖励下的稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 确定性策略梯度（DPG）在连续控制中广泛应用，但依赖评论家对动作的可微性，在稀疏或离散奖励等实际控制问题中，该假设被违反，导致策略梯度定义不良和学习不稳定。
analysis.problem: 解决DPG在非平滑Q函数下梯度定义不良的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准DDPG在离散化奖励环境中对不规则的评论家景观更敏感，性能下降。
analysis.method: 通过高斯平滑定义平滑贝尔曼方程，推导软确定性策略梯度（Soft-DPG），消除对评论家动作梯度的显式依赖，并实例化为Soft DDPG算法。
contributions: 提出基于平滑贝尔曼方程的软确定性策略梯度（Soft-DPG），确保非平滑Q函数下梯度良定义。
实例化为Soft DDPG算法，在连续控制基准和离散化奖励变体上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准连续控制基准及其离散化奖励变体上进行评估，结果显示Soft DDPG在密集奖励设置中保持竞争力，在大多数离散化奖励环境中取得明显提升。
limitations: 摘要未讨论计算开销或超参数敏感性。
可能仅在特定离散化奖励场景下优势明显。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于高斯平滑的软确定性策略梯度（Soft-DPG），消除对评论家动作梯度的依赖，提升非平滑奖励下的稳定性。

papers.title: Price of Fairness in Short-Term and Long-Term Algorithmic Selections
papers.abstract: Algorithmic decision-making in high-stakes settings can have profound impacts on individuals and populations. While much prior work studies fairness in static settings, recent results show that enforcing static fairness constraints may exacerbate long-run disparities. Motivated by this tension, we study a stylized sequential selection problem in which a decision-maker repeatedly selects individuals, affecting both immediate utility and the population distribution over time. We introduce notions of group fairness for both the short and long term and theoretically analyze the trade-off between fairness and utility via the Price of Fairness (PoF). We characterize optimal and fair policies in the short term and show that the PoF can be large even when group distributions are nearly identical. In contrast, we show that long-term disparities can vanish under simple investment policies that achieve a low PoF. We also empirically validate these theoretical observations using both synthetic and real datasets.

analysis.tldr: 公平性约束在短期可能导致高代价，但长期可通过简单投资策略以低代价消除差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 算法决策在高风险场景中影响深远，但静态公平性约束可能加剧长期不平等，亟需理解短期与长期公平性之间的权衡。
analysis.problem: 研究在序列选择问题中，短期与长期群体公平性约束与效用之间的权衡，并量化公平性的代价（Price of Fairness）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使群体分布几乎相同，短期公平性代价也可能很大；而长期不平等可通过简单投资策略以低代价消除。
analysis.method: 理论分析：定义短期与长期群体公平性概念，刻画最优与公平策略，并推导公平性代价的界；结合合成与真实数据集进行实证验证。
contributions: 提出了短期与长期群体公平性的形式化定义，并分析了公平性代价的理论性质。
证明了短期公平性代价可能很大，而长期不平等可通过低代价投资策略消除。
analysis.experiments: 使用合成和真实数据集进行实证验证，支持理论观察。
limitations: 理论分析基于简化的序列选择模型，可能未涵盖更复杂的现实场景。
长期投资策略的具体形式可能依赖于问题设定，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 公平性约束在短期可能导致高代价，但长期可通过简单投资策略以低代价消除差距。

papers.title: A Versatile AI Agent for Rare Disease Diagnosis and Risk Gene Prioritization
papers.abstract: Accurate and timely diagnosis is essential for effective treatment, particularly in the context of rare diseases. However, current diagnostic workflows often lead to prolonged assessment times and low accuracy. To address these limitations, we introduce Hygieia, a multi-modal AI agent system designed to support precision disease diagnosis by integrating diverse data sources, including phenotypic features, genetic profiles, and clinical records. Hygieia features a router-based and knowledge-enhanced framework that mitigates hallucination and tailors diagnostic strategies to different disease categories. Notably, it prioritizes risk-related genomic factors for rare diseases and provides confidence scores to assist clinical decision-making. We conducted a comprehensive evaluation demonstrating that Hygieia achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple diagnostic benchmarks. In collaboration with clinical experts from Yale School of Medicine and Duke-NUS Medical School, we further validated its practical utility by showing (1) Hygieia's superior diagnostic performance compared to physicians with an improvement from 12%-60% and (2) its effectiveness in assisting clinicians with medical records for handling real-world cases. Our findings indicate that Hygieia not only enhances diagnostic accuracy and interpretability but also significantly reduces clinician workload, highlighting its potential as a valuable tool in clinical decision support systems.

analysis.tldr: Hygieia是一个多模态AI智能体系统，通过整合表型、遗传和临床数据，在罕见病诊断和风险基因优先排序上超越医生12%-60%。
analysis.research_motivation: 罕见病诊断耗时长、准确率低，现有工作流难以有效整合多源数据，亟需智能辅助系统提升效率与准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个多模态AI智能体，实现罕见病的精准诊断和风险基因优先排序，并缓解幻觉问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于路由器和知识增强框架的多模态AI智能体系统，整合表型、遗传和临床数据，针对不同疾病类别定制诊断策略，并提供置信度分数。
contributions: 提出Hygieia多模态AI智能体系统，在多个诊断基准上达到SOTA性能。
临床验证显示诊断准确率比医生提升12%-60%，并能有效辅助临床决策。
analysis.experiments: 在多个诊断基准上评估，并与耶鲁医学院和杜克-新加坡国立大学医学院的临床专家合作，验证了实际效用。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多模态数据，数据缺失或噪声可能影响性能。
临床部署需进一步验证泛化性和长期效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Hygieia是一个多模态AI智能体系统，通过整合表型、遗传和临床数据，在罕见病诊断和风险基因优先排序上超越医生12%-60%。

papers.title: Memory Inception: Latent-Space KV Cache Manipulation for Steering LLMs
papers.abstract: Steering large language models (LLMs) is usually done by either instruction prompting or activation steering. Prompting often gives strong control, but caches guidance tokens at every layer and can clutter long interactions; activation steering is compact but typically weaker and does not support large structured reminders. We introduce memory inception (MI), a training-free method that steers in latent attention space by inserting text-derived key-value (KV) banks only at selected layers. Rather than materializing reminder content throughout the prompt cache, MI treats steering as selective KV allocation, injecting latent slots only where the model routes to them. On matched personality-steering tasks, MI gives the best overall control--drift trade-off, remaining competitive with prompting while consistently outperforming CAA. On updateable guidance, MI supports mid-conversation behavior shifts without rewriting the visible transcript, achieving the highest post-shift alignment on Qwen3. On structured reasoning, MI outperforms visible prompting on HARDMath and PHYSICS (10/12 subject$\times$mode cells), serving as proxies for structured reasoning in verifiable domains, while cutting content-matched KV storage by up to 118$\times$. These results position MI as a powerful steering method when guidance is persistent, structured, or expensive to keep in the visible transcript.

analysis.tldr: 提出记忆注入（MI），通过在潜在注意力空间选择性插入KV缓存来引导LLM，无需训练即可实现高效、可更新的行为控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM引导方法中，指令提示控制力强但缓存开销大且易干扰长交互，激活引导紧凑但效果弱且不支持结构化提醒，需要一种兼顾控制力与效率的引导方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练开销和显式提示缓存负担的前提下，实现高效、可更新的LLM行为引导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 记忆注入（MI）：一种无需训练的方法，通过在选定的注意力层插入文本派生的键值（KV）缓存，在潜在注意力空间中进行引导，将引导视为选择性KV分配。
contributions: 提出记忆注入（MI），一种无需训练的潜在空间KV缓存操作引导方法。
在个性引导、可更新引导和结构化推理任务上验证了MI的有效性，相比提示和CAA方法在控制-漂移权衡、对齐和KV存储效率上取得优势。
analysis.experiments: 在个性引导任务上，MI在控制-漂移权衡上优于CAA且与提示竞争；在可更新引导上，MI支持对话中行为切换且对齐度最高；在结构化推理上，MI在HARDMath和PHYSICS的10/12个subject×mode单元上优于显式提示，且KV存储减少高达118倍。
limitations: 方法依赖预训练模型，可能不适用于所有架构。
KV插入层选择需要启发式或额外分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出记忆注入（MI），通过在潜在注意力空间选择性插入KV缓存来引导LLM，无需训练即可实现高效、可更新的行为控制。

papers.title: Proactive Instance Navigation with Comparative Judgment for Ambiguous User Queries
papers.abstract: Natural-language instance navigation becomes challenging when the initial user request does not uniquely specify the target instance. A practical agent should reduce the user's burden by actively asking only the information needed to distinguish the target from similar distractors, rather than requiring a detailed description upfront. Existing approaches often fall short of this goal: they may stop at the first plausible candidate before sufficiently exploring alternatives, or, even after collecting multiple candidates, ask about the target's attributes derived from individual candidates rather than questions selected to distinguish candidates in the pool. As a result, despite the dialogue, the agent may still fail to distinguish the target from distractors, leading to premature decisions and lengthy user responses. We propose Proactive Instance Navigation with Comparative Judgment (ProCompNav), a two-stage framework that first constructs a candidate pool and then identifies the target through comparative judgment. At each round, ProCompNav extracts an attribute-value pair that splits the current pool, asks a binary yes/no question, and prunes all inconsistent candidates at once. This reframes disambiguation from open-ended target description to pool-level discriminative questioning, where each question is chosen to narrow the candidate set. On CoIN-Bench, ProCompNav improves Success Rate over interactive baselines with the same minimal input and non-interactive baselines with detailed descriptions, while substantially reducing Response Length. ProCompNav also achieves state-of-the-art Success Rate on TextNav, suggesting that comparative judgment is broadly useful for instance-level navigation among similar distractors.

analysis.tldr: 提出ProCompNav框架，通过比较判断主动提问来消除用户模糊查询中的歧义，提升实例导航成功率并减少用户响应长度。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然语言实例导航中，用户初始查询往往无法唯一指定目标实例，现有方法要么过早停止探索候选，要么基于单个候选提问，导致歧义未消除和用户负担重。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个主动提问的智能体，在实例导航中通过最少的问题高效区分目标与相似干扰物。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在收集多个候选后，仍可能因提问基于单个候选属性而非区分候选池的问题，导致无法消除歧义，造成过早决策和冗长用户响应。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架ProCompNav：先构建候选池，再通过比较判断识别目标。每轮提取一个属性-值对来分割当前候选池，询问二元是否问题，并剪枝所有不一致候选。
contributions: 提出ProCompNav框架，将消歧从开放式目标描述重构为池级区分性提问。
在CoIN-Bench上提升成功率并显著减少响应长度，在TextNav上达到最先进成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在CoIN-Bench和TextNav数据集上评估，与交互式和非交互式基线对比，ProCompNav在成功率和响应长度上均表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖候选池构建的质量。
二元提问可能不适用于需要多值或连续属性的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ProCompNav框架，通过比较判断主动提问来消除用户模糊查询中的歧义，提升实例导航成功率并减少用户响应长度。

papers.title: When to Trust Imagination: Adaptive Action Execution for World Action Models
papers.abstract: World Action Models (WAMs) have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation by jointly predicting future visual observations and future actions. However, current WAMs typically execute a fixed number of predicted actions after each model inference, leaving the robot blind to whether the imagined future remains consistent with the actual physical rollout. In this work, we formulate adaptive WAM execution as a future-reality verification problem: the robot should execute longer when the WAM-predicted future remains reliable, and replan earlier when reality deviates from imagination. To this end, we propose Future Forward Dynamics Causal Attention (FFDC), a lightweight verifier that jointly reasons over predicted future actions, predicted visual dynamics, real observations, and language instructions to estimate whether the remaining action rollout can still be trusted. FFDC enables adaptive action chunk sizes as an emergent consequence of prediction-observation consistency, preserving the efficiency of long-horizon execution while restoring responsiveness in contact-rich or difficult phases. We further introduce Mixture-of-Horizon Training to improve long-horizon trajectory coverage for adaptive execution. Experiments on the RoboTwin benchmark and in the real world demonstrate that our method achieves a strong robustness-efficiency trade-off: on RoboTwin, it reduces WAM forward passes by 69.10% and execution time by 34.02%, while improving success rate by 2.54% over the short-chunk baseline; in real-world experiments, it improves success rate by 35%.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应动作执行机制，通过轻量验证器判断世界动作模型预测的可靠性，动态调整执行步长，提升机器人操作效率与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界动作模型（WAM）在每次推理后执行固定数量的预测动作，无法感知预测与真实物理展开的一致性，导致在接触密集或困难阶段响应不足，而在可靠阶段又可能浪费计算资源。
analysis.problem: 如何让机器人根据预测与真实观测的一致性，自适应地决定执行多少步预测动作，在保持长程执行效率的同时恢复对偏差的响应能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前WAM固定执行步长导致机器人对预测与真实偏差“盲视”，而自适应执行可视为未来-现实验证问题。
analysis.method: 提出Future Forward Dynamics Causal Attention (FFDC)，一个轻量验证器，联合推理预测动作、预测视觉动态、真实观测和语言指令，估计剩余动作序列是否可信；并引入Mixture-of-Horizon Training改善长程轨迹覆盖。
contributions: 将自适应WAM执行形式化为未来-现实验证问题，并提出FFDC轻量验证器实现动态动作块大小。
提出Mixture-of-Horizon Training提升长程轨迹覆盖，实验证明在RoboTwin和真实世界取得鲁棒性与效率的强平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在RoboTwin基准和真实世界实验中，方法减少WAM前向传播69.10%，执行时间34.02%，成功率比短块基线提升2.54%；真实世界成功率提升35%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量预测模型，若WAM本身预测不准则验证器效果受限。
真实世界实验规模未详细说明，泛化性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应动作执行机制，通过轻量验证器判断世界动作模型预测的可靠性，动态调整执行步长，提升机器人操作效率与鲁棒性。

papers.title: Joint Consistency: A Unified Test-Time Aggregation Framework via Energy Minimization
papers.abstract: This paper studies test-time aggregation, an approach that generates multiple reasoning traces and aggregates them into a final answer. Most existing methods rely on evaluation signals collected from candidate traces in isolation or answer frequencies, while ignoring comparative interactions among candidates. We propose Joint Consistency (JC), formulated as a constrained Ising-type energy minimization problem, where independent evaluation signals act as external fields and pairwise comparisons act as interactions. JC provides a unified framework for test-time aggregation that subsumes existing voting and weighted aggregation methods as special cases. Our construction of the interaction matrix leverages LLM-as-a-judge comparisons, and admits a theoretical interpretation under answer-level homogeneity assumptions. Moreover, we develop an efficient approximation strategy that makes interaction modeling practical for large-scale test-time aggregation. Experiments on math and code reasoning benchmarks show that JC consistently outperforms existing baselines across tasks, judge models, trace budgets, and trace-generation settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出联合一致性（JC）框架，将测试时聚合建模为约束伊辛型能量最小化问题，统一了投票和加权聚合方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时聚合方法多依赖独立评估信号或答案频率，忽略了候选答案间的比较交互，导致聚合效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用候选答案间的成对比较交互来改进测试时聚合的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将测试时聚合建模为约束伊辛型能量最小化问题，其中独立评估信号作为外场，成对比较作为交互项；利用LLM作为裁判生成交互矩阵，并开发高效近似策略。
contributions: 提出联合一致性（JC）框架，统一了投票和加权聚合方法。
引入成对比较交互，并给出理论解释。
开发高效近似策略，使交互建模适用于大规模测试时聚合。
analysis.experiments: 在数学和代码推理基准上，JC在任务、裁判模型、轨迹预算和轨迹生成设置中一致优于现有基线。
limitations: 依赖LLM作为裁判生成交互矩阵，可能引入额外成本。
理论解释基于答案级同质性假设，可能不适用于所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出联合一致性（JC）框架，将测试时聚合建模为约束伊辛型能量最小化问题，统一了投票和加权聚合方法。

papers.title: TIDE: Every Layer Knows the Token Beneath the Context
papers.abstract: We revisit a universally accepted but under-examined design choice in every modern LLM: a token index is looked up once at the input embedding layer and then permanently discarded. This single-injection assumption induces two structural failures: (i) the Rare Token Problem, where a Zipf-type distribution of vocabulary causes rare-token embeddings are chronically under-trained due to receiving a fraction of the cumulative gradient signal compared to common tokens; and (ii) the Contextual Collapse Problem, where limited parameters models map distributionally similar tokens to indistinguishable hidden states. As an attempt to address both, we propose TIDE, which augments the standard transformer with EmbeddingMemory: an ensemble of K independent MemoryBlocks that map token indices to context-free semantic vectors, computed once and injected into every layer through a depth-conditioned softmax router with a learnable null bank. We theoretically and empirically establish the benefits of TIDE in addressing the issues associated with single-token identity injection as well as improve performance across multiple language modeling and downstream tasks.

analysis.tldr: TIDE通过向每层注入token身份信息，解决LLM中罕见token欠训练和上下文塌陷问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代LLM普遍采用仅在输入嵌入层注入一次token索引的设计，这导致罕见token因梯度信号不足而欠训练，以及上下文塌陷问题，限制了模型性能。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM中单次token身份注入导致的罕见token欠训练和上下文塌陷问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出罕见token因Zipf分布接收梯度少而欠训练，且有限参数模型将分布相似的token映射到难以区分的隐藏状态。
analysis.method: 提出TIDE，通过EmbeddingMemory（K个独立MemoryBlock）生成上下文无关的语义向量，经深度条件softmax路由器注入每一层，并包含可学习的空库。
contributions: 识别并形式化了LLM中单次token身份注入的两个结构缺陷：罕见token问题和上下文塌陷问题。
提出TIDE方法，通过每层注入token身份信息来缓解上述问题，并在理论和实验上验证其有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销，因为每层都需要路由和注入额外向量。
MemoryBlock和路由器的设计可能引入额外超参数，需要调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TIDE通过向每层注入token身份信息，解决LLM中罕见token欠训练和上下文塌陷问题。

papers.title: FunctionalAgent: Towards end-to-end on-top functional design
papers.abstract: Multiconfiguration pair-density functional theory (MC-PDFT) offers an efficient and accurate framework for computing electronic energies in strongly correlated molecular systems, with the quality of the on-top functional being a key determinant of its predictive accuracy. Here we introduce FunctionalAgent, an agentic system for fully automated functional development. FunctionalAgent orchestrates a team of specialized sub-agents to decompose the development process into dataset construction, active-space generation, MCSCF calculation and descriptor generation, loss-function construction, and functional fitting, optimization, and evaluation, thereby linking all stages into a closed-loop automated workflow. Using FunctionalAgent, we developed MC26, a hybrid meta-GGA on-top functional that achieves improved overall accuracy on the training set compared with other methods evaluated on the same benchmark dataset. We further introduce COF26, a new functional form that, owing to the optimized training process, achieves the best performance on both the training and test sets.

analysis.tldr: FunctionalAgent 是一个全自动开发多组态对密度泛函理论中 on-top 泛函的智能体系统，并开发了性能更优的 MC26 和 COF26 泛函。
analysis.research_motivation: 多组态对密度泛函理论 (MC-PDFT) 中 on-top 泛函的质量直接影响预测精度，但传统人工开发过程繁琐且效率低，亟需自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化设计并优化 MC-PDFT 中的 on-top 泛函，以提升计算精度和开发效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FunctionalAgent 是一个智能体系统，通过多个专业子智能体协作，将泛函开发流程分解为数据集构建、活性空间生成、MCSCF 计算、描述符生成、损失函数构建以及泛函拟合、优化和评估等步骤，形成闭环自动化工作流。
contributions: 提出了 FunctionalAgent，一个全自动的 on-top 泛函开发智能体系统。
开发了 MC26 和 COF26 两种新型泛函，在训练集和测试集上均取得更优性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 MC-PDFT 框架，泛化性未知。
未提及计算成本或可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FunctionalAgent 是一个全自动开发多组态对密度泛函理论中 on-top 泛函的智能体系统，并开发了性能更优的 MC26 和 COF26 泛函。

papers.title: Differentiable Adaptive 4D Structured Illumination for Joint Capture of Shape and Reflectance
papers.abstract: We present a differentiable framework to adaptively compute 4D illumination conditions with respect to an object, for efficient, high-quality simultaneous acquisition of its shape and reflectance, with a unified spatial-angular structured light and a single camera. Using a simple histogram-based pixel-level probability model for depth and reflectance, we differentiably link the next illumination condition(s) with a loss that encourages the reduction in depth uncertainty. As new structured illumination is cast, corresponding image measurements are used to update the uncertainty at each pixel. Finally, a fine-tuning-based approach reconstructs the depth map and reflectance parameter maps, by minimizing the differences between all physical measurements and their simulated counterparts. The effectiveness of our framework is demonstrated on physical objects with wide variations in shape and appearance. Our depth results compare favorably with state-of-the-art techniques, while our reflectance results are comparable when validated against photographs.

analysis.tldr: 提出可微自适应4D结构光框架，联合捕获物体形状与反射率。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统结构光方法通常分别优化形状或反射率捕获，难以高效同时获取高质量结果，且光照条件固定，缺乏自适应性。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地计算4D照明条件，以高效、高质量地同时捕获物体的形状和反射率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于直方图的像素级概率模型，可微地链接下一照明条件与深度不确定性降低损失；通过物理测量与模拟的差异最小化，联合重建深度图和反射率参数图。
contributions: 提出可微自适应4D结构光框架，实现形状与反射率联合捕获。
引入直方图概率模型和可微损失，自适应优化照明条件。
analysis.experiments: 在形状和外观差异大的物理物体上验证，深度结果优于现有技术，反射率结果与照片验证相当。
limitations: 可能依赖初始照明条件。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可微自适应4D结构光框架，联合捕获物体形状与反射率。

papers.title: Beyond Fixed Benchmarks and Worst-Case Attacks: Dynamic Boundary Evaluation for Language Models
papers.abstract: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) today rests on fixed benchmarks that apply the same set of items to any model, producing ceiling and floor effects that mask capability gaps. We argue that the most informative evaluation signal lies at the boundary, where the per-prompt pass probability is near $0.5$ under random-sampling decoding, and propose Dynamic Boundary Evaluation (DBE), which actively locates each model's boundary and places it on a globally comparable difficulty scale. DBE delivers three artifacts: (i) a calibrated item bank covering safety, capability, and truthfulness, with per-item difficulty labels validated across $9$ reference LLMs; (ii) Skill-Guided Boundary Search (SGBS), a search algorithm that finds boundary items for a given target LLM using only API-level query access; and (iii) an evaluation protocol that places a new LLM on a unified ability scale and grows the evaluation set adaptively when the target falls outside the bank's coverage. We instantiate DBE on four categories spanning safety (harmful request refusal and over-refusal), capability (constrained instruction following), and truthfulness (multi-turn sycophancy resistance). The resulting evaluation covers a broader model spectrum without saturation while remaining compatible with existing datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态边界评估（DBE），通过定位模型在通过概率0.5附近的边界项来克服固定基准的天花板和地板效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM评估依赖固定基准，导致天花板和地板效应掩盖能力差距，无法提供信息量最大的评估信号。
analysis.problem: 固定基准无法动态适应不同模型的能力边界，评估信号饱和或不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出固定基准对所有模型使用相同测试项，产生天花板和地板效应，而最有信息的评估信号位于每个提示通过概率接近0.5的边界处。
analysis.method: 提出动态边界评估（DBE），包括校准题库、技能引导边界搜索（SGBS）算法和自适应评估协议，主动定位模型边界并统一难度标尺。
contributions: 提出DBE框架，通过定位边界项提供信息量更大的评估。
构建跨9个参考LLM验证的校准题库，覆盖安全、能力和真实性。
提出SGBS算法，仅通过API查询即可找到目标LLM的边界项。
设计自适应评估协议，统一能力标尺并动态扩展评估集。
analysis.experiments: 在安全（有害请求拒绝和过度拒绝）、能力（约束指令遵循）和真实性（多轮谄媚抵抗）四个类别上实例化DBE，评估覆盖更广模型谱系且无饱和，与现有数据集兼容。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 边界搜索可能依赖API查询次数，效率待验证。
题库覆盖范围可能有限，需自适应扩展机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态边界评估（DBE），通过定位模型在通过概率0.5附近的边界项来克服固定基准的天花板和地板效应。

papers.title: Playing the network backward: A Game Theoretic Attribution Framework
papers.abstract: Attribution methods explain which input features drive a model's prediction, making them central to model debugging and mechanistic interpretability. Yet backward attribution methods, including gradients, LRP, and transformer-specific rules, lack a shared framework in which to compare the underlying backward calculations. We introduce such a framework by recasting backward attribution as a two-player game on an extended network graph, building on Gaubert and Vlassopoulos' ReLU Net Game. Gradients and the full alpha-beta-LRP family arise as integrals over game trajectories under specific equilibria, so attribution maps become projections of trajectory distributions rather than the primary object. Desired explanation properties, such as localisation focus, robustness to input noise, or stable attention routing, can be specified as game-theoretic concepts, including policy regularization, risk aversion, and extended action sets, and translate directly into novel adaptations of the well-known backward rules. On ViT-B/16, one such selected adaptation of alpha-beta-LRP outperforms prior transformer-specific backward methods across all considered localisation metrics.

analysis.tldr: 将反向归因重新解释为扩展网络图上的二人博弈，统一梯度与LRP等方法的理论框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有反向归因方法（如梯度、LRP、Transformer专用规则）缺乏统一的比较框架，难以理解其底层计算差异和设计新方法。
analysis.problem: 如何建立一个共享的理论框架来统一、比较和改进各种反向归因方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将反向归因建模为扩展网络图上的二人博弈，梯度与alpha-beta-LRP族作为特定均衡下轨迹的积分，解释属性（如局部聚焦、鲁棒性）可转化为博弈论概念（策略正则化、风险规避等），从而导出新的反向规则。
contributions: 提出将反向归因视为扩展网络图上二人博弈的统一框架。
证明梯度与alpha-beta-LRP族是该框架下特定均衡的轨迹积分。
将解释属性转化为博弈论概念，并导出新的反向规则。
在ViT-B/16上，一种新的alpha-beta-LRP变体在所有定位指标上优于现有Transformer专用方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ViT-B/16上评估定位指标，新alpha-beta-LRP变体优于先前Transformer专用反向方法。
limitations: 框架可能主要适用于ReLU网络，对其他激活函数的扩展未明确。
实验仅涉及ViT-B/16，泛化性需更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将反向归因重新解释为扩展网络图上的二人博弈，统一梯度与LRP等方法的理论框架。

papers.title: Contrastive Identification and Generation in the Limit
papers.abstract: In the classical identification in the limit model of Gold [1967], a stream of positive examples is presented round by round, and the learner must eventually recover the target hypothesis. Recently, Kleinberg and Mullainathan [2024] introduced generation in the limit, where the learner instead must eventually output novel elements of the target's support. Both lines of work focus on positive-only or fully labeled data. Yet many natural supervision signals are inherently relational rather than singleton, which encode relationships between examples rather than labels of individual ones. We initiate the study of contrastive identification and generation in the limit, where the learner observes a contrastive presentation of data: a stream of unordered pairs $\{x,y\}$ satisfying $h(x)\ne h(y)$ for an unknown target binary hypothesis $h$, but which element is positive is hidden from the learner. We first present three results in the noiseless setting: an exact characterization of contrastive identifiable classes (a one-line geometric refinement of Angluin [1980]'s tell-tale condition), a combinatorial dimension called contrastive closure dimension (a contrasitive analogue of the closure dimension in Raman et al. [2025]) and exactly characterizing uniform contrastive generation with tight sample complexity, and a strict hierarchy in which contrastive generation and text identification are mutually incomparable. We then prove a sharp reversal under finite adversarial corruption: there exist classes identifiable from contrastive pairs under any finite corruption budget by a single budget-independent algorithm, yet not identifiable from positive examples under even one corrupted observation. The unifying technical object is the common crossing graph, which encodes pairwise ambiguity, family-level generation obstructions, and corruption defects in a single coverage-and-incidence language.

analysis.tldr: 在极限识别与生成框架下，首次研究对比式数据（仅知两例标签不同但不知正负）的识别与生成，给出了精确刻画、组合维度和对抗噪声下的严格分离结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典极限识别与生成模型仅处理正例或全标注数据，但许多自然监督信号本质上是关系型的（如对比对），现有理论无法刻画这种设置下的学习能力与样本复杂度。
analysis.problem: 在对比式呈现（仅提供无序对{x,y}满足h(x)≠h(y)，隐藏正负标签）下，研究极限识别与生成的可学习性、样本复杂度及抗噪声能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出对比式极限识别与生成模型，定义对比式可识别类的精确刻画（Angluin tell-tale条件的几何细化）、对比式闭包维数（统一刻画均匀生成与紧样本复杂度），并引入公共交叉图作为统一技术对象。
contributions: 给出了对比式可识别类的精确刻画（Angluin条件的几何细化）。
定义了对比式闭包维数，严格刻画了均匀对比式生成的样本复杂度。
证明了对比式生成与正例识别在无噪声下不可比，但在有限对抗噪声下存在严格分离：某些类在任意有限噪声下可被对比式识别，但即使一个噪声正例也无法识别。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅考虑二元假设空间，未推广到多类或实值情形。
理论结果未涉及计算效率或实际算法实现。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在极限识别与生成框架下，首次研究对比式数据（仅知两例标签不同但不知正负）的识别与生成，给出了精确刻画、组合维度和对抗噪声下的严格分离结果。

papers.title: Super-Level-Set Regression: Conditional Quantiles via Volume Minimization
papers.abstract: Constructing minimum-volume prediction regions that satisfy conditional coverage is a fundamental challenge in multivariate regression. Standard approaches rely on explicitly estimating the full conditional density and subsequently thresholding it. This two-step plug-in process is notoriously difficult, sensitive to estimation errors, and computationally expensive. One would like to instead optimize the region directly. Formulating a direct solution is challenging, however, because it requires minimizing a volume objective that is coupled with the conditional quantiles of the model's own estimation error. In this work, we address this challenge. We introduce super-level-set regression (SLS), a novel mathematical framework that successfully resolves this implicit coupling, allowing us to directly parameterize and optimize the geometric boundaries of the target conditional level sets. By bypassing full distribution estimation and leveraging flexible volume-preserving frontier functions, our approach natively captures complex, multimodal, and disjoint conditional structures end-to-end. Ultimately, SLS offers a new perspective on multivariate conditional quantile regression, replacing the restrictive assumptions of density-first methods with a direct geometric optimization strategy.

analysis.tldr: 提出超水平集回归（SLS），通过直接优化几何边界实现多变量条件分位数回归，避免全密度估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖显式估计全条件密度并阈值化，过程困难、对估计误差敏感且计算昂贵，亟需直接优化预测区域的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不估计全密度的情况下，直接构造满足条件覆盖的最小体积预测区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 超水平集回归（SLS）框架，通过体积保持的前沿函数直接参数化并优化条件水平集的几何边界，解决体积目标与条件分位数之间的隐式耦合。
contributions: 提出SLS框架，直接优化多变量条件分位数回归的几何边界，避免全密度估计。
通过体积保持的前沿函数，端到端捕获复杂、多模态、非连通的分布结构。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对高维数据计算复杂度较高。
体积保持前沿函数的设计可能依赖特定假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出超水平集回归（SLS），通过直接优化几何边界实现多变量条件分位数回归，避免全密度估计。

papers.title: Taming the Entropy Cliff: Variable Codebook Size Quantization for Autoregressive Visual Generation
papers.abstract: Most discrete visual tokenizers rely on a default design: every position in the sequence shares the same codebook. Researchers try to scale the codebook size $K$ to get better reconstruction performance. Such a constant-codebook design hits a fundamental information-theoretic limit. We observe that the per-position conditional entropy of the training set decays so quickly along the sequence that, after a few positions, the conditional distribution becomes essentially deterministic. On ImageNet with $K=16384$, this happens within only 2 out of 256 positions, turning the remaining 254 into a memorization problem. We call this phenomenon the Entropy Cliff and formalize it with a simple expression: $t^{*} = \lceil \log_2 N / \log_2 K \rceil$. Interestingly, this phenomenon is not observed in language, as its natural structure keeps the effective entropy per position well below the codebook capacity. To address this, we propose Variable Codebook Size Quantization (VCQ), where the codebook size $K_t$ grows monotonically along the sequence from $K_{\min}=2$ to $K_{\max}$, leaving the loss function, parameter count, and AR training procedure unchanged. With a vanilla autoregressive Transformer and standard next-token prediction, a base version of VCQ reduces gFID w/o CFG from 27.98 to 14.80 on ImageNet $256\times256$ over the baseline. Scaled up, it reaches gFID 1.71 with 684M autoregressive parameters, without any extra training techniques such as semantic regularization or causal alignment. The extreme information bottleneck at $K_{\min}=2$ naturally induces a coarse-to-fine semantic hierarchy: a linear probe on only the first 10 tokens reaches 43.8% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, compared to 27.1% for uniform codebooks. Ultimately, these results show that what matters is not only the total capacity of the codebook, but also how that capacity is distributed and organized.

analysis.tldr: 提出变长码本量化（VCQ）方法，通过沿序列单调增加码本大小解决自回归视觉生成中的熵悬崖问题，显著提升图像生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有离散视觉分词器默认所有位置共享相同码本，但增大码本大小受信息论极限约束，导致序列后期条件熵极低，码本容量浪费。
analysis.problem: 自回归视觉生成中固定码本大小导致的熵悬崖现象，即序列后期条件分布几乎确定，码本容量被浪费为记忆问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到训练集逐位置条件熵沿序列快速衰减，在ImageNet上K=16384时仅2个位置后熵已极低，剩余254个位置成为记忆问题；语言中因自然结构保持有效熵低于码本容量，未出现此现象。
analysis.method: 提出变长码本大小量化（VCQ），码本大小K_t沿序列从K_min=2单调增长至K_max，不改变损失函数、参数数量和自回归训练流程。
contributions: 发现并形式化自回归视觉生成中的熵悬崖现象，给出表达式t* = ceil(log2 N / log2 K)。
提出VCQ方法，通过变长码本大小分配容量，在ImageNet 256x256上gFID从27.98降至14.80（无CFG），扩展至684M参数时gFID达1.71。
揭示极端信息瓶颈（K_min=2）自然诱导粗到细语义层次，前10个token线性探针top-1准确率43.8%（均匀码本27.1%）。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256x256上使用vanilla自回归Transformer和标准下一个token预测，对比基线（固定码本）和VCQ变体，报告gFID指标及线性探针准确率。
limitations: 仅验证了图像生成任务，未在视频或多模态生成中测试。
码本大小增长策略可能需针对不同数据集调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出变长码本量化（VCQ）方法，通过沿序列单调增加码本大小解决自回归视觉生成中的熵悬崖问题，显著提升图像生成质量。

papers.title: A Self-Healing Framework for Reliable LLM-Based Autonomous Agents
papers.abstract: Autonomous agents based on Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly being utilized in complex software systems. However, reliability remains a significant challenge due to unpredictable failures such as hallucinations, execution errors, and inconsistent reasoning. This paper proposes a reliability-aware self-healing framework for LLM-based software agents. The framework integrates failure detection, reliability assessment, and automated recovery mechanisms. First, we define a taxonomy of failure types and introduce a quantitative reliability assessment model. Next, we propose a failure detection method that identifies abnormal agent behavior based on execution patterns and output consistency. Finally, we design a self-healing mechanism that dynamically recovers from failures through adaptive replanning and corrective prompting strategies. The proposed framework was implemented in a multi-agent workflow environment and evaluated using real-world task scenarios. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach significantly increases task success rates, reduces failure propagation, and enhances overall system robustness compared to existing methods. In particular, this study distinguishes itself by establishing an integrated monitoring system that combines the agent's internal reasoning process with external execution results. These findings are expected to contribute to securing the stability of advanced autonomous systems and lowering the barriers to LLM adoption in production environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自愈框架，通过故障检测、可靠性评估和自动恢复机制提升LLM智能体的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在复杂软件系统中可靠性不足，面临幻觉、执行错误和不一致推理等不可预测故障，现有方法缺乏系统性的故障检测与恢复机制。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个集成的自愈框架，使LLM智能体能够自动检测、评估并恢复故障，从而提升任务成功率和系统鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出可靠性感知的自愈框架，包含故障类型分类、定量可靠性评估模型、基于执行模式和输出一致性的故障检测方法，以及通过自适应重规划和纠正提示策略的动态自愈机制。
contributions: 定义了LLM智能体故障类型分类体系并引入定量可靠性评估模型。
提出结合内部推理与外部执行结果的集成监控系统，实现故障检测与自动恢复。
analysis.experiments: 在多智能体工作流环境中使用真实任务场景评估，结果显示任务成功率显著提升、故障传播减少、系统鲁棒性增强。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
自愈机制可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自愈框架，通过故障检测、可靠性评估和自动恢复机制提升LLM智能体的可靠性。

papers.title: STDA-Net: Spectrogram-Based Domain Adaptation for cross-dataset Sleep Stage Classification
papers.abstract: Accurate sleep stage classification across datasets remains challenging due to variability in EEG channel montages, sampling rates, recording environments, and subject populations. Although deep learning has shown considerable promise for automated sleep staging, most existing cross-dataset methods rely on one-dimensional EEG signal representations, whereas the use of two-dimensional spectrogram-based inputs within an unsupervised domain adaptation framework has remained largely unexplored. Here, we propose STDA-Net (Spectrogram-based Temporal Domain Adaptation Network), a framework that combines a convolutional neural network (CNN) for spectrogram-based feature extraction, a bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM) module for temporal modeling of sleep dynamics, and a domain-adversarial neural network (DANN) for source-to-target feature alignment without requiring any labeled target-domain data during training. Experiments are conducted on three publicly available datasets Sleep-EDF, SHHS-1, and SHHS-2 under six cross-dataset transfer settings. Results show that the proposed framework achieves an average accuracy of 89.03% and an average macro F1-score of 87.64%, consistently outperforming existing 1D baseline methods in terms of balanced classification performance, with substantially lower variance across five independent runs, indicating improved stability and reproducibility. Overall, these findings demonstrate that 2D spectrogram-based representations, combined with temporal modeling and adversarial domain adaptation, provide a robust and competitive alternative to conventional 1D EEG inputs for cross-dataset sleep staging.

analysis.tldr: 提出STDA-Net，利用频谱图、BiLSTM和域对抗网络实现跨数据集睡眠分期，平均准确率89.03%。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨数据集睡眠分期因EEG通道配置、采样率、记录环境和受试人群差异而极具挑战，现有方法多基于一维EEG信号，二维频谱图在无监督域适应框架中的应用尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 解决跨数据集睡眠分期中因数据分布差异导致的性能下降问题，无需目标域标签。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: STDA-Net结合CNN提取频谱图特征、BiLSTM建模睡眠时序动态、DANN进行源域到目标域的特征对齐，训练时无需目标域标签。
contributions: 首次将二维频谱图与无监督域适应结合用于跨数据集睡眠分期。
提出STDA-Net框架，在六个跨数据集设置下平均准确率89.03%，宏F1 87.64%，优于一维基线方法且方差更低。
analysis.experiments: 在Sleep-EDF、SHHS-1、SHHS-2三个公开数据集上进行了六个跨数据集迁移实验，报告了平均准确率和宏F1分数。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定EEG通道配置和采样率。
未探讨对更多数据集或真实临床环境的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STDA-Net，利用频谱图、BiLSTM和域对抗网络实现跨数据集睡眠分期，平均准确率89.03%。

papers.title: Towards Annotation-Free Validation of MLLMs: A Vision-Language Logical Consistency Metric
papers.abstract: Dominant accuracy evaluation might reward unwarranted guessing of Large Language Models, and it might not be applicable to novel tasks for model validation without ground-truth (gt) annotation. Based on basic logic principle, we propose a novel framework to evaluate the vision-language logical consistency of MLLMs on both sufficient and necessary cause-effect relations. We define Vision-Language Logical Consistency Metric (VL-LCM) on traditional MC-VQA tests, and recent NaturalBench tests without the need for gt annotation. Through systematic experiments on representative VL benchmark MMMU and recent VL challenges like NaturalBench, we evaluated 11 recent open-source MLLMs from 4 frontier families. Our findings reveal that, despite significant progress of recent MLLMs on accuracy, logical consistency lags behind significantly. Extensive evaluations on the correlations of VL-LCM with metrics on gt, the reliability of LCM, and the relation of VL-LCM with response distribution justify the validity and applicability of VL-LCM even without gt annotation. Our findings suggest that, beyond accuracy, logical consistency could be employed for both accuracy and reliability. VL-LCM can also be employed for MLLM selection, validation, and reliable answer justification in novel tasks without gt annotation.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需标注的视觉-语言逻辑一致性指标VL-LCM，用于评估多模态大模型的因果推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有准确率评估可能奖励大模型的盲目猜测，且在新任务上缺乏标注时无法进行模型验证。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有真实标注的情况下，评估多模态大模型在视觉-语言任务中的逻辑一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 尽管近期MLLM在准确率上取得显著进步，但逻辑一致性仍明显滞后。
analysis.method: 基于充分和必要因果关系的基本逻辑原则，定义视觉-语言逻辑一致性指标VL-LCM，适用于传统MC-VQA和NaturalBench测试，无需真实标注。
contributions: 提出无需标注的VL-LCM指标，用于评估MLLM的视觉-语言逻辑一致性。
在多个基准上系统评估11个开源MLLM，揭示逻辑一致性落后于准确率的现象。
验证VL-LCM在无标注场景下的有效性和适用性，可用于模型选择、验证和答案合理性判断。
analysis.experiments: 在MMMU和NaturalBench上评估11个开源MLLM，验证VL-LCM与真实标注指标的相关性、可靠性及与响应分布的关系。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的视觉-语言任务（如MC-VQA）。
逻辑一致性的定义可能未覆盖所有因果推理形式。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需标注的视觉-语言逻辑一致性指标VL-LCM，用于评估多模态大模型的因果推理能力。

papers.title: Bridging visual saliency and large language models for explainable deep learning in medical imaging
papers.abstract: The opaque nature of deep learning models remains a significant barrier to their clinical adoption in medical imaging. This paper presents a multimodal explainability framework that bridges the gap between convolutional neural network (CNN) predictions and clinically actionable insights for brain tumor classification, leveraging large language models (LLMs) to deliver human-interpretable diagnostic narratives. The proposed framework operates through three coupled stages. First, nine CNN architectures are extended with a dual-output hybrid formulation that simultaneously optimises a classification head and a segmentation head, enabling spatially richer feature learning. Second, visual saliency attribution methods, namely Grad-CAM, Grad-CAM++, and ScoreCAM, are applied to generate class-discriminative heatmaps, which are subsequently refined into binary tumor masks via an adaptive percentile thresholding pipeline. Third, the resulting masks are mapped onto the Harvard-Oxford cortical atlas to translate pixel-level evidence into named neuroanatomical structures, and the extracted findings are encoded into a structured JSON file that conditions three LLMs (Grok3, Mistral, and LLaMA) to generate coherent, radiological-style diagnostic reports. Evaluated on a dataset of 4,834 contrast-enhanced T1-weighted brain MRI images spanning three tumor classes, InceptionResNetV2 achieved the highest classification performance and Grad-CAM++ yielded the best segmentation overlap. Among the language models, Grok3 led in lexical diversity and coherence, while LLaMA achieved the highest readability score. By integrating visual, anatomical, and linguistic modalities into a unified pipeline, the framework produces explanations that are technically grounded and meaningfully interpretable, advancing the transparency and clinical accountability of artificial intelligence assisted brain tumor diagnosis.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态可解释性框架，结合CNN、视觉显著性图和LLM生成脑肿瘤诊断报告。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型的黑箱特性阻碍了其在医学影像中的临床采用，需要可解释的方法来提供临床可操作的见解。
analysis.problem: 如何将CNN预测转化为人类可理解的诊断叙述，实现脑肿瘤分类的可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段框架：1) 双输出CNN同时优化分类和分割；2) 视觉显著性方法生成热图并二值化；3) 将掩膜映射到脑图谱，结构化信息输入LLM生成诊断报告。
contributions: 提出结合CNN、视觉显著性和LLM的多模态可解释性框架
在脑肿瘤MRI数据集上验证了框架的有效性，InceptionResNetV2分类最优，Grad-CAM++分割最佳，Grok3在词汇多样性和连贯性上领先
analysis.experiments: 在4,834张对比增强T1加权脑MRI图像上评估，涵盖三类肿瘤。
limitations: 仅针对脑肿瘤分类，泛化性待验证
LLM生成报告的质量依赖模板和结构化输入
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态可解释性框架，结合CNN、视觉显著性图和LLM生成脑肿瘤诊断报告。

papers.title: The Granularity Axis: A Micro-to-Macro Latent Direction for Social Roles in Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are routinely prompted to take on social roles ranging from individuals to institutions, yet it remains unclear whether their internal representations encode the granularity of such roles, from micro-level individual experience to macro-level organizational, institutional, or national reasoning. We show that they do. We define a contrast-based Granularity Axis as the difference between mean macro- and micro-role hidden states. In Qwen3-8B, this axis aligns with the principal axis (PC1) of the role representation space at cosine 0.972 and accounts for 52.6% of its variance, indicating that granularity is the dominant geometric axis organizing prompted social roles. We construct 75 social roles across five granularity levels and collect 91,200 role-conditioned responses over shared questions and prompt variants, then extract role-level hidden states and project them onto the axis. Role projections increase monotonically across all five levels, remain stable across layers, prompt variants, endpoint definitions, held-out splits, and score-filtered subsets, and transfer to Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct. The axis is also causally relevant: activation steering along it shifts response granularity in the predicted direction, with Llama moving from 2.00 to 3.17 on a five-point macro scale under positive steering on prompts that admit local responses. The two models differ in controllability, suggesting that steering depends on each model's default operating regime. Overall, our findings suggest that social role granularity is not merely a stylistic surface feature, but a structured, ordered, and causally manipulable latent direction in role-conditioned language model behavior.

analysis.tldr: 发现LLM内部存在一个主导社会角色粒度（从微观个体到宏观机构）的潜在方向，可通过激活操控改变输出粒度。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM常被赋予不同社会角色，但内部表征是否编码角色粒度（从个体到机构）尚不清楚，理解这一机制有助于提升模型的可控性和对齐性。
analysis.problem: 揭示LLM内部表征中社会角色粒度的几何组织方式及其因果可操控性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在Qwen3-8B中，粒度轴与角色表征空间的主成分（PC1）高度对齐（余弦0.972），解释52.6%方差；角色投影在五个粒度级别上单调递增，且跨层、提示变体、端点定义等保持稳定。
analysis.method: 定义对比粒度轴为宏观与微观角色隐藏状态均值之差；构建75个角色（5个粒度级别）和91,200条条件响应；提取角色级隐藏状态并投影到轴上；通过激活操控沿轴移动以改变响应粒度。
contributions: 首次证明LLM内部表征中存在一个主导社会角色粒度的潜在方向，且是表征空间的主轴。
通过激活操控验证该轴的因果相关性，可有效改变模型输出粒度。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-8B和Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上实验，使用75个角色和91,200条响应，验证单调性、稳定性、跨模型迁移性及因果操控效果。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
limitations: 仅验证了两个8B规模模型，更大模型或不同架构是否适用未知。
操控效果因模型默认运行模式而异，通用性需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现LLM内部存在一个主导社会角色粒度（从微观个体到宏观机构）的潜在方向，可通过激活操控改变输出粒度。

papers.title: EA-WM: Event-Aware Generative World Model with Structured Kinematic-to-Visual Action Fields
papers.abstract: Pretrained video diffusion models provide powerful spatiotemporal generative priors, making them a natural foundation for robotic world models. While recent world-action models jointly optimize future videos and actions, they predominantly treat video generation as an auxiliary representation for policy learning. Consequently, they insufficiently explore the inverse problem: leveraging action signals to guide video synthesis, thereby often failing to preserve precise robot spatial geometry and fine-grained robot-object interaction dynamics in the generated rollouts. To bridge this gap, we present EA-WM, an Event-Aware Generative World Model that effectively closes the loop between kinematic control and visual perception. Rather than injecting joint or end-effector actions as abstract, low-dimensional tokens, EA-WM projects actions and kinematic states directly into the target camera view as Structured Kinematic-to-Visual Action Fields. To fully exploit this geometrically grounded representation, we introduce event-aware bidirectional fusion blocks that modulate cross-branch attention, capturing object state changes and interaction dynamics. Evaluated on the comprehensive WorldArena benchmark, EA-WM achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing baselines by a significant margin.

analysis.tldr: 提出事件感知生成世界模型EA-WM，通过结构化运动-视觉动作场提升机器人视频生成中空间几何与交互动态的保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界-动作模型将视频生成视为策略学习的辅助表征，未能充分利用动作信号引导视频合成，导致生成轨迹中机器人空间几何和细粒度交互动态失真。
analysis.problem: 如何利用动作信号有效引导视频生成，以在机器人世界模型中保持精确的空间几何和交互动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将动作和运动状态投影为目标相机视图中的结构化运动-视觉动作场，并引入事件感知双向融合模块调制跨分支注意力，以捕捉对象状态变化和交互动态。
contributions: 提出结构化运动-视觉动作场，将动作信号直接投影到相机视图，增强几何保真度。
设计事件感知双向融合模块，有效捕捉交互动态。
analysis.experiments: 在WorldArena基准上评估，EA-WM显著优于现有基线，达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定相机视角和动作表示。
未提及在真实机器人平台上的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出事件感知生成世界模型EA-WM，通过结构化运动-视觉动作场提升机器人视频生成中空间几何与交互动态的保真度。

papers.title: Systematic Evaluation of Large Language Models for Post-Discharge Clinical Action Extraction
papers.abstract: The work in this paper evaluates zero-shot and few-shot large language models (LLMs) for safety-critical clinical action extraction using the CLIP discharge-note dataset, with particular emphasis on transitions of care and post-discharge patient safety. To manage the complexity of clinical documentation, we introduce a two-stage extraction framework that decomposes discharge notes, that are written in narrative form, into fine-grained, explicitly actionable clinical tasks through a staged prompting strategy. Our contributions include a systematic assessment of generative LLMs for clinical action extraction, a detailed comparison between general-purpose LLMs and task-specific supervised BERT-based models, and an analysis of annotation inconsistencies across different action categories. We show that contemporary LLMs achieve performance comparable to or exceeding supervised models on binary actionability detection, while supervised baselines retain a meaningful advantage on fine-grained multi-label category classification, despite the absence of task-specific fine-tuning and under strict data-privacy constraints. Qualitative error analysis reveals that many failures stem from misalignment between model reasoning and dataset annotation conventions, particularly in cases involving implicit clinical actions and rigid structural labeling rules. These results indicate that reported performance reflects model limitations due to lack of clinical reasoning, that is not captured by plain annotations. Labels without rationales make it impossible to distinguish clinical reasoning failures from annotation convention mismatches. Advancing clinical NLP requires reasoning-annotated datasets that document why specific spans are actionable, not merely which spans were labeled, enabling proper evaluation of model clinical understanding.

analysis.tldr: 系统性评估LLM在出院后临床行动提取中的表现，发现其与监督模型各有优劣，并指出缺乏推理标注的数据集限制了模型临床推理能力的评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床行动提取对出院后患者安全至关重要，但现有方法在复杂临床文档中面临挑战，且缺乏对LLM在此安全关键任务上的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估零样本和少样本LLM在临床行动提取中的性能，并分析其与监督模型的差异及失败原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在二元可行动性检测上表现与监督模型相当或更优，但在细粒度多标签分类上监督模型仍有优势；错误分析显示许多失败源于模型推理与数据集标注惯例之间的错位，尤其是隐含临床行动和刚性结构标注规则。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段提取框架，通过分阶段提示策略将叙述性出院记录分解为细粒度、明确可操作的临床任务。
contributions: 系统评估了生成式LLM在临床行动提取中的表现
比较了通用LLM与任务特定监督BERT模型的性能差异
分析了不同行动类别中的标注不一致性
analysis.experiments: 使用CLIP出院记录数据集进行零样本和少样本评估，并与监督BERT模型对比，进行了定性错误分析。
limitations: 未进行任务特定微调，可能限制LLM潜力
数据集标注惯例与模型推理之间的错位问题未完全解决
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统性评估LLM在出院后临床行动提取中的表现，发现其与监督模型各有优劣，并指出缺乏推理标注的数据集限制了模型临床推理能力的评估。

papers.title: OPSD Compresses What RLVR Teaches: A Post-RL Compaction Stage for Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) has recently emerged as an alternative to Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), promising higher accuracy and shorter responses through token-level credit assignment from a self-teacher conditioned on privileged context. However, this promise does not carry over to thinking-enabled mathematical reasoning, where reported accuracy gains shrink and sometimes turn negative. We hypothesize that hindsight supervision can specify better token-level alternatives in short thinking-disabled outputs, but in long thinking-enabled traces it more readily identifies redundancy than supplies better replacements. To test this, we applied OPSD separately to correct and incorrect rollout groups, so that compression and correction can be observed in isolation. Our results show that in thinking-enabled mathematical reasoning, OPSD behaves most reliably as a compression mechanism rather than a correction mechanism: training only on correct rollouts preserves accuracy while substantially shortening responses, whereas training only on incorrect rollouts damages accuracy. In light of these findings, we propose a revised post-training pipeline for thinking-enabled mathematical reasoning: SFT then RLVR then OPSD.

analysis.tldr: OPSD在数学推理中主要起压缩作用而非纠错，建议后训练流程为SFT→RLVR→OPSD。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR在数学推理中有效但产生冗长输出，OPSD虽在短输出中表现好，但在长思维链推理中效果不佳，需要理解其行为机制。
analysis.problem: OPSD在长思维链数学推理中为何无法提升准确率，以及其真实作用是什么。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: OPSD在正确rollout上训练可保持准确率并缩短响应，在错误rollout上训练则损害准确率，表明其主要作为压缩机制而非纠错机制。
analysis.method: 将OPSD分别应用于正确和错误的rollout组，隔离观察压缩和纠错效果。
contributions: 发现OPSD在长思维链数学推理中主要起压缩作用而非纠错。
提出改进的后训练流程：SFT→RLVR→OPSD。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对数学推理任务，可能不适用于其他领域。
未探讨OPSD压缩机制对推理质量的具体影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OPSD在数学推理中主要起压缩作用而非纠错，建议后训练流程为SFT→RLVR→OPSD。

papers.title: Gated QKAN-FWP: Scalable Quantum-inspired Sequence Learning
papers.abstract: Fast Weight Programmers (FWPs) encode temporal dependencies through dynamically updated parameters rather than recurrent hidden states. Quantum FWPs (QFWPs) extend this idea with variational quantum circuits (VQCs), but existing implementations rely on multi-qubit architectures that are difficult to scale on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices and expensive to simulate classically. We propose gated QKAN-FWP, a fast-weight framework that integrates FWP with Quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (QKAN) using single-qubit data re-uploading circuits as learnable nonlinear activation, known as DatA Re-Uploading ActivatioN (DARUAN). We further introduce a scalar-gated fast-weight update rule that stabilizes parameter evolution, supported by a theoretical analysis of its adaptive memory kernel, geometric boundedness, and parallelizable gradient paths. We evaluate the framework across time-series benchmarks, MiniGrid reinforcement learning, and highlight real-world solar cycle forecasting as our main practical result. In the long-horizon setting with 528-month input window and 132-month forecast horizon, our 12.5k-parameter model achieves lower scaled Mean Square Error (MSE), peak amplitude error, and peak timing error than a suite of classical recurrent baselines with up to 13x more parameters, including Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks (25.9k-89.1k parameters), WaveNet-LSTM (167k), Vanilla recurrent neural network (11.5k), and a Modified Echo State Network (132k). To validate NISQ compatibility, we further deploy the trained fast programmer on IonQ and IBM Quantum processors, recovering forecasting accuracy within 0.1% relative MSE of the noiseless simulator at 1024 shots. These results position gated QKAN-FWP as a scalable, parameter-efficient, and NISQ-compatible approach to quantum-inspired sequence modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出门控QKAN-FWP，用单量子比特数据重上传电路作为非线性激活，实现可扩展的量子启发序列学习，在长时程太阳周期预测中超越经典循环网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有量子快速权重编程器依赖多量子比特架构，在NISQ设备上难以扩展且经典模拟昂贵，亟需可扩展的量子启发序列学习方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可扩展、参数高效且兼容NISQ设备的量子启发快速权重序列学习框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将快速权重编程器与量子启发KAN结合，使用单量子比特数据重上传电路（DARUAN）作为可学习非线性激活，并引入标量门控快速权重更新规则，理论分析其自适应记忆核、几何有界性和可并行梯度路径。
contributions: 提出gated QKAN-FWP框架，集成FWP与QKAN，使用单量子比特DARUAN激活。
引入标量门控快速权重更新规则，提供理论分析。
在时间序列、MiniGrid强化学习和太阳周期预测中验证有效性，12.5k参数模型超越13倍参数量的经典基线。
在IonQ和IBM量子处理器上部署，1024次采样下相对MSE在0.1%以内，证明NISQ兼容性。
analysis.experiments: 在时间序列基准、MiniGrid强化学习和太阳周期预测（528个月输入，132个月预测）上评估，12.5k参数模型在缩放MSE、峰值幅度误差和峰值时序误差上优于LSTM（25.9k-89.1k）、WaveNet-LSTM（167k）、Vanilla RNN（11.5k）和Modified ESN（132k）。在IonQ和IBM量子处理器上部署，1024次采样下相对MSE在0.1%以内。
limitations: 可能仅适用于中等规模序列任务，超长序列或高维输入需进一步验证。
量子硬件噪声可能影响更复杂任务的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出门控QKAN-FWP，用单量子比特数据重上传电路作为非线性激活，实现可扩展的量子启发序列学习，在长时程太阳周期预测中超越经典循环网络。

papers.title: In-Context Black-Box Optimization with Unreliable Feedback
papers.abstract: Black-box optimization in science and engineering often comes with side information: experts, simulators, pretrained predictors, or heuristics can suggest which candidates look promising. This information can accelerate search, but it can also be biased, input-dependent, or misleading. Feedback-aware BO methods typically handle one task at a time, limiting their ability to generalize over multiple sources of feedback. In-context optimizers address cross-task adaptation, but usually assume that optimization history is the only available signal at test time. We study feedback-informed in-context black-box optimization (FICBO), where a pretrained optimizer conditions on both the observed history and cheap auxiliary feedback for the current candidate set. We introduce a structured feedback prior that models how feedback sources vary in their access, relevance, and distortion relative to the true objective, and use it to pretrain a feedback-aware transformer. At test time, the model estimates source reliability in context by comparing observed objective values with auxiliary signals, improving query selection.
