On synthetic and real-world tasks, FICBO effectively exploits informative feedback while remaining robust to weak or misleading sources, improving over other baselines. Empirical investigations further illustrate how the model perceives test-time sources, offering insights into its interpretability and decision-making process.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种能利用不可靠辅助反馈的上下文黑箱优化方法，通过结构化先验和Transformer预训练提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学和工程中的黑箱优化常伴随专家、模拟器等辅助反馈，但这些反馈可能带有偏差或误导性，现有方法要么一次只处理一个任务，要么假设测试时只有优化历史可用，缺乏对多源反馈的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让预训练优化器在测试时同时利用历史观测和当前候选集的廉价辅助反馈，并自动评估反馈源的可靠性以提升查询选择。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FICBO框架，设计结构化反馈先验建模反馈源在访问、相关性和失真方面的差异，基于此预训练反馈感知Transformer，测试时通过比较观测目标值与辅助信号估计源可靠性。
contributions: 首次将多源不可靠反馈融入上下文黑箱优化，提出结构化反馈先验和预训练框架。
在合成和真实任务上验证方法能有效利用信息性反馈并对弱或误导源保持鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实世界任务上进行了实验，与基线方法比较，FICBO表现更好。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练时反馈源的分布假设，实际中反馈类型可能超出先验范围。
Transformer的计算开销可能限制大规模实时应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种能利用不可靠辅助反馈的上下文黑箱优化方法，通过结构化先验和Transformer预训练提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。

papers.title: Event-Causal RAG: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Long Video Reasoning in Complex Scenarios
papers.abstract: Recent large vision-language models have achieved strong performance on short- and medium-length video understanding, yet they remain inadequate for ultra-long or even infinite video reasoning, where models must preserve coherent memory over extended durations and infer causal dependencies across temporally distant events. Existing end-to-end video understanding methods are fundamentally limited by the $O(n^2)$ complexity of self-attention, while recent retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) approaches still suffer from fragmented clip-level memory, weak modeling of temporal and causal structure, and high storage and online inference costs. We present Event-Causal RAG, a lightweight retrieval-augmented framework for infinite long-video reasoning. Instead of indexing fixed-length clips, our method segments streaming videos into semantically coherent events and represents each event as a structured State-Event-State (SES) graph, capturing the event together with its surrounding state transitions. These graphs are merged into a global Event Knowledge Graph and stored in a dual-store memory that supports both semantic matching and causal-topological retrieval. On top of this memory, we design a bidirectional retrieval strategy to efficiently identify the most relevant event causal chains and provide them, together with the associated video evidence, to a backbone video foundation model for answer generation. Experiments on long-video understanding benchmarks demonstrate that Event-Causal RAG consistently outperforms strong clip-based retrieval baselines and long-context video models, particularly on questions requiring multi-event integration and causal inference across long temporal gaps, while also achieving improved memory efficiency and robust streaming performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出事件因果RAG框架，通过事件分割和因果图实现超长视频推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大视觉语言模型在超长视频推理中面临自注意力O(n²)复杂度、片段级记忆碎片化、因果结构建模弱以及存储和推理成本高等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地对无限长视频进行推理，特别是需要跨长时间间隔的多事件整合和因果推断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将流式视频分割为语义连贯的事件，每个事件表示为结构化状态-事件-状态（SES）图，合并为全局事件知识图谱，采用双存储记忆支持语义匹配和因果拓扑检索，并设计双向检索策略获取相关事件因果链。
contributions: 提出事件因果RAG框架，结合事件分割和因果图实现长视频推理。
设计SES图和双存储记忆机制，提升因果建模和存储效率。
analysis.experiments: 在长视频理解基准上，该方法在需要多事件整合和因果推断的问题上优于基于片段的检索基线和长上下文视频模型，同时具有更好的记忆效率和流式性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的事件分割。
因果图构建的复杂度可能随事件数量增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出事件因果RAG框架，通过事件分割和因果图实现超长视频推理。

papers.title: Rethinking Adapter Placement: A Dominant Adaptation Module Perspective
papers.abstract: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) is a widely used parameter-efficient fine-tuning method that places trainable low-rank adapters into frozen pre-trained models. Recent studies show that using fewer LoRA adapters may still maintain or even improve performance, but existing methods still distribute adapters broadly, leaving where to place a limited number of adapters to maximize performance largely open. To investigate this, we introduce PAGE (Projected Adapter Gradient Energy), a gradient-based sensitivity probe that estimates the initial trainable gradient energy available to each candidate LoRA adapter. Surprisingly, we find that PAGE is highly concentrated on a single shallow FFN down-projection across two model families and four downstream tasks. We term this module the dominant adaptation module and show that its layer index is architecture-dependent but task-stable. Motivated by this finding, we propose DomLoRA, a placement method that places a single adapter at the dominant adaptation module. With only ~0.7% of vanilla LoRA's trainable parameters, DomLoRA outperforms it on average across various downstream tasks, including instruction following, mathematical reasoning, code generation, and multi-turn conversation. This method also improves other LoRA variants, supporting the dominant adaptation module perspective as a practical placement guideline.

analysis.tldr: LoRA适配器放置位置至关重要，仅需在单个主导模块放置一个适配器即可超越标准LoRA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法如LoRA通常广泛分布适配器，但研究表明使用更少的适配器可能仍保持甚至提升性能，因此如何最优放置有限数量的适配器以最大化性能是一个开放问题。
analysis.problem: 确定在预训练模型中放置少量LoRA适配器的最佳位置，以最大化下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过提出的PAGE探针发现，可训练的梯度能量高度集中在单个浅层FFN下投影模块上，该模块称为主导适应模块，其层索引与架构相关但跨任务稳定。
analysis.method: 提出PAGE（投影适配器梯度能量）作为基于梯度的敏感性探针，用于估计每个候选LoRA适配器的初始可训练梯度能量；基于此发现提出DomLoRA，仅将单个适配器放置在主导适应模块上。
contributions: 引入PAGE探针，揭示LoRA适配器梯度能量高度集中在单个主导模块的现象。
提出DomLoRA方法，仅使用约0.7%的标准LoRA可训练参数，在多个下游任务上平均性能超越标准LoRA。
analysis.experiments: 在指令跟随、数学推理、代码生成和多轮对话等多种下游任务上评估，DomLoRA平均性能优于标准LoRA，并改进了其他LoRA变体。
limitations: 仅验证了LoRA及其变体，可能不适用于其他参数高效微调方法。
主导模块的识别依赖于梯度计算，可能增加额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LoRA适配器放置位置至关重要，仅需在单个主导模块放置一个适配器即可超越标准LoRA。

papers.title: SuperFace: Preference-Aligned Facial Expression Estimation Beyond Pseudo Supervision
papers.abstract: Accurate facial estimation is crucial for realistic digital human animation, and ARKit blendshape coefficients offer an interpretable representation by mapping facial motions to semantic animation controls. However, learning high-quality ARKit coefficient prediction remains limited by the absence of reliable ground-truth supervision. Existing methods typically rely on capture software such as Live Link Face to provide pseudo labels, which may contain noisy activations, biased coefficient magnitudes, and missing or inaccurate facial actions. Consequently, models trained with supervised learning tend to reproduce imperfect pseudo labels rather than optimize for perceptual expression fidelity. In this paper, we propose SuperFace, a preference-driven framework that moves ARKit facial expression estimation from pseudo-label imitation toward human-aligned perceptual optimization. Instead of treating software-estimated coefficients as fixed ground truth, SuperFace uses them only as an initialization and further improves coefficient prediction through human preference feedback on rendered facial expressions. By aligning the model with perceptual judgments rather than numerical pseudo labels, SuperFace enables more visually faithful and expressive facial animation. Experiments show that SuperFace improves expression fidelity over Live Link Face supervision, demonstrating the effectiveness of preference-driven optimization for semantic facial action prediction.

analysis.tldr: SuperFace 通过人类偏好反馈优化 ARKit 面部表情系数预测，超越伪标签监督。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 ARKit 系数预测依赖 Live Link Face 等软件提供的伪标签，这些标签存在噪声、偏差和缺失，导致模型复现不完美伪标签而非优化感知保真度。
analysis.problem: 如何从伪标签监督转向人类对齐的感知优化，提升面部表情估计的视觉保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 伪标签存在噪声激活、系数幅度偏差、动作缺失或不准确，监督学习模型会复制这些缺陷。
analysis.method: 提出 SuperFace 框架，以软件估计系数为初始化，通过人类对渲染表情的偏好反馈进一步优化系数预测，实现感知对齐。
contributions: 提出从伪标签监督转向偏好驱动优化的新范式
通过人类偏好反馈提升 ARKit 表情系数预测的视觉保真度
analysis.experiments: 实验表明 SuperFace 在表情保真度上优于 Live Link Face 监督，但摘要未提供具体数值或基准。
limitations: 依赖人类偏好反馈，可能成本较高
未讨论泛化到不同人脸或场景的能力
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SuperFace 通过人类偏好反馈优化 ARKit 面部表情系数预测，超越伪标签监督。

papers.title: Beyond Factor Aggregation: Gauge-Aware Low-Rank Server Representations for Federated LoRA
papers.abstract: Federated LoRA enables parameter-efficient adaptation of large language models under decentralized data and limited client resources.However, directly averaging LoRA factors is representation-dependent: the same intrinsic update admits infinitely many gauge-equivalent factorizations, so factor-level aggregation can change under arbitrary coordinate choices while the underlying update remains unchanged. This reveals a semantic mismatch in existing federated LoRA aggregation rules. We propose \textbf{GLoRA}, a gauge-aware server representation for federated LoRA.Instead of aggregating raw factors, GLoRA estimates a consensus update subspace from client projectors and aggregates client updates in shared reference coordinates, thereby representing semantic update aggregation entirely in low-rank form. To support heterogeneous client capacities, GLoRA further provides a rank-compatible readout that instantiates adapters of different ranks from the same server state without dense update reconstruction. Experiments on GLUE and SuperNI show that GLoRA consistently outperforms federated LoRA baselines under data, resource, and task heterogeneity, including heterogeneous client ranks, sparse participation, larger backbones, and unseen-task evaluation. GLoRA also achieves a favorable efficiency--performance trade-off, suggesting that effective federated LoRA requires not merely averaging low-rank factors, but defining a semantically meaningful server-side representation for aggregation.

analysis.tldr: 提出GLoRA，通过规范表示空间解决联邦LoRA中因子聚合的语义歧义问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦LoRA中直接平均低秩因子存在表示依赖问题，相同更新可对应无穷多种等价分解，导致聚合规则缺乏语义一致性。
analysis.problem: 现有联邦LoRA聚合规则在因子层面平均，无法保证语义一致的更新聚合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LoRA因子的聚合结果随坐标选择变化，而底层更新不变，揭示了因子级聚合的语义不匹配。
analysis.method: GLoRA：从客户端投影器估计共识更新子空间，在共享参考坐标下聚合客户端更新，并以低秩形式表示语义更新聚合；同时提供秩兼容读出，支持异构客户端容量。
contributions: 揭示了联邦LoRA中因子聚合的表示依赖问题，并提出规范表示空间的解决方案。
提出GLoRA方法，实现语义一致的更新聚合，并支持异构客户端秩。
在GLUE和SuperNI上验证了GLoRA在数据、资源和任务异构下的优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在GLUE和SuperNI数据集上，与联邦LoRA基线对比，涵盖异构客户端秩、稀疏参与、更大骨干网络和未见任务评估，GLoRA一致优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖共识子空间估计的准确性。
未讨论在极端异构或非凸目标下的理论保证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GLoRA，通过规范表示空间解决联邦LoRA中因子聚合的语义歧义问题。

papers.title: BioMedArena: An Open-source Toolkit for Building and Evaluating Biomedical Deep Research Agents
papers.abstract: Building a deep research agent today is an exercise in glue code: the same backbone evaluated on the same benchmark can report different accuracies in different papers because harness and tool registry all differ, and integrating a new foundation model into a comparable evaluation surface costs weeks of model-specific engineering. We call this the per-paper engineering tax and release BioMedArena, an open-source toolkit that not only alleviates it but also provides an arena for fair comparison of different foundation models when evaluating them as deep-research agents. BioMedArena decouples six layers of biomedical agent evaluation -- benchmark loading, tool exposure, tool selection, execution mode, context management, and scoring -- and exposes 147 biomedical benchmarks and 75 biomedical tools across 9 functional families. Adding a new model, benchmark, or tool reduces to registering a few-line provider adapter. We further provide 6 agent harnesses with 6 context-management strategies, which provide 12 backbones with competitive research capabilities and significantly improved performance, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on 8 representative biomedical benchmarks, with an average lift of +15.03 percentage points over prior SOTA. The toolkit, configurations, and per-task traces are available at https://github.com/AI-in-Health/BioMedArena

analysis.tldr: BioMedArena 是一个开源工具包，用于构建和公平比较生物医学深度研究智能体，解耦评估流程并集成大量基准和工具。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前构建深度研究智能体时，由于评估框架、工具注册和模型集成不统一，导致不同论文中同一模型在同一基准上的结果不一致，且集成新模型需要大量工程工作，即“每篇论文的工程税”。
analysis.problem: 解决生物医学深度研究智能体评估中缺乏统一、可扩展和公平比较平台的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，同一骨干网络在不同论文中因评估框架和工具集不同而报告不同准确率，且集成新模型需要大量特定工程。
analysis.method: BioMedArena 解耦了生物医学智能体评估的六个层次（基准加载、工具暴露、工具选择、执行模式、上下文管理和评分），提供 147 个生物医学基准和 75 个工具，支持通过注册少量适配器添加新模型、基准或工具，并提供 6 种智能体框架和 6 种上下文管理策略。
contributions: 提出 BioMedArena 开源工具包，统一生物医学深度研究智能体的评估流程，降低工程开销。
集成 147 个基准和 75 个工具，提供 6 种智能体框架和上下文管理策略，在 8 个代表性基准上实现平均 +15.03 个百分点的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在 8 个代表性生物医学基准上评估，12 个骨干模型取得 SOTA 结果，平均提升 +15.03 个百分点。
limitations: 可能仅适用于生物医学领域，泛化到其他领域需额外适配。
工具和基准的覆盖范围可能仍有遗漏，需社区持续贡献。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BioMedArena 是一个开源工具包，用于构建和公平比较生物医学深度研究智能体，解耦评估流程并集成大量基准和工具。

papers.title: Retina-RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Vision-Language Modeling for Joint Retinal Diagnosis and Clinical Report Generation
papers.abstract: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of preventable blindness among working-age adults worldwide, yet most automated screening systems are limited to image-level classification and lack clinically structured reporting. We propose Retina-RAG, a low-cost modular framework that jointly performs DR severity grading, macular edema (ME) detection, and report generation. The architecture decouples a high-performance retinal classifier and a parameter-efficient vision-language model (Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct) adapted via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), enabling flexible component integration. A retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) module injects curated ophthalmic knowledge together with structured classifier outputs at inference time to improve diagnostic consistency and reduce hallucinations. Retina-RAG achieves an F1-score of 0.731 for DR grading and 0.948 for ME detection, substantially outperforming zero-shot Qwen (0.096, 0.732) and MMed-RAG (0.541, 0.641) on a retinal disease detection dataset with captions. For report generation, Retina-RAG attains ROUGE-L 0.438 and SBERT similarity 0.884, exceeding all baselines. The full framework operates on a single consumer-grade GPU, demonstrating that clinically structured retinal AI can be achieved with modest computational resources.

analysis.tldr: Retina-RAG 通过检索增强生成和 LoRA 微调，在单 GPU 上实现糖尿病视网膜病变分级、黄斑水肿检测和临床报告生成，性能显著优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有糖尿病视网膜病变自动筛查系统多限于图像级分类，缺乏结构化临床报告，且难以在资源受限环境下部署。
analysis.problem: 如何以低计算成本实现联合视网膜诊断（严重程度分级、黄斑水肿检测）和结构化临床报告生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零样本 VLM 在视网膜疾病检测上性能极差（F1 0.096），而 RAG 和 LoRA 微调可大幅提升诊断一致性并减少幻觉。
analysis.method: 将高性能视网膜分类器与 LoRA 微调的 Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct 解耦，并在推理时通过 RAG 模块注入眼科知识和分类器输出。
contributions: 提出 Retina-RAG，首个联合 DR 分级、ME 检测和报告生成的低模块化框架
在单消费级 GPU 上实现临床级性能，DR 分级 F1 0.731，ME 检测 F1 0.948，报告生成 ROUGE-L 0.438
analysis.experiments: 在视网膜疾病检测数据集（含描述）上评估，对比零样本 Qwen 和 MMed-RAG，Retina-RAG 在所有指标上显著领先。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知
报告生成质量可能受限于知识库覆盖范围
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Retina-RAG 通过检索增强生成和 LoRA 微调，在单 GPU 上实现糖尿病视网膜病变分级、黄斑水肿检测和临床报告生成，性能显著优于基线。

papers.title: DynT2I-Eval: A Dynamic Evaluation Framework for Text-to-Image Models
papers.abstract: Existing text-to-image (T2I) benchmarks largely rely on fixed prompt sets, leaving them vulnerable to overfitting and benchmark contamination once publicly released and repeatedly reused. In this work, we propose DynT2I-Eval, a fully automated dynamic evaluation framework for T2I models. It constructs a structured visual semantic space from long-form descriptions, decomposing prompts into controllable dimensions (e.g., subject, logical constraint, environment, and composition). This enables the continuous generation of fresh prompts via task-specific spaces and difficulty-aware sampling. DynT2I-Eval evaluates model performance across text alignment, perceptual quality, and aesthetics. Heterogeneous outputs are unified into prompt-conditioned pairwise comparisons, allowing a dynamic scheduler, micro-batch aggregation, and weighted Bayesian updates to maintain a stable online leaderboard despite changing prompt distributions and model injection. Experiments with independently sampled prompt streams demonstrate that continually refreshed prompts provide a robust evaluation protocol, reducing the impact of prompt-set-specific tuning. Simulations and ablations further confirm that the proposed ranking framework achieves a strong balance among cold-start convergence, late-entry discovery, and long-run ranking fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态评估框架DynT2I-Eval，通过持续生成新提示词避免T2I模型过拟合和基准污染。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2I基准依赖固定提示集，易导致过拟合和基准污染，需要动态评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个自动化、动态的T2I模型评估框架，避免固定提示集带来的过拟合和污染问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定提示集被公开后，模型可能通过针对性调优获得虚高分数，导致基准失效。
analysis.method: 从长描述构建结构化视觉语义空间，分解提示词为可控维度（主体、逻辑约束、环境、组合），通过任务特定空间和难度感知采样持续生成新提示；采用提示条件成对比较、动态调度器、微批聚合和加权贝叶斯更新维护在线排行榜。
contributions: 提出首个全自动动态T2I评估框架DynT2I-Eval，持续生成新提示词。
设计基于结构化视觉语义空间的提示分解与生成方法。
实现稳定的在线排行榜机制，平衡冷启动、新模型发现和长期排名保真度。
analysis.experiments: 使用独立采样的提示流进行实验，表明持续刷新提示词提供了鲁棒的评估协议；模拟和消融实验验证了排名框架在冷启动收敛、后期发现和长期排名保真度之间的平衡。
limitations: 框架依赖长描述构建语义空间，可能不适用于短提示场景。
动态排行榜的稳定性可能受提示分布变化影响，需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态评估框架DynT2I-Eval，通过持续生成新提示词避免T2I模型过拟合和基准污染。

papers.title: Mean Mode Screaming: Mean--Variance Split Residuals for 1000-Layer Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Scaling Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) to hundreds of layers introduces a structural vulnerability: networks can enter a silent, mean-dominated collapse state that homogenizes token representations and suppresses centered variation. Through mechanistic auditing, we isolate the trigger event of this collapse as Mean Mode Screaming (MMS). MMS can occur even when training appears stable, with a mean-coherent backward shock on residual writers that opens deep residual branches and drives the network into a mean-dominated state. We show this behavior is driven by an exact decomposition of these gradients into mean-coherent and centered components, compounded by the structural suppression of attention-logit gradients through the null space of the Softmax Jacobian once values homogenize. To address this, we propose Mean-Variance Split (MV-Split) Residuals, which combine a separately gained centered residual update with a leaky trunk-mean replacement. On a 400-layer single-stream DiT, MV-Split prevents the divergent collapse that crashes the un-stabilized baseline; it tracks close to the baseline's pre-crash trajectory while remaining substantially better than token-isotropic gating methods such as LayerScale across the full schedule. Finally, we present a 1000-layer DiT as a scale-validation run at boundary scales, establishing that the architecture remains stably trainable at extreme depth.

analysis.tldr: 发现扩散Transformer深层训练中的均值崩溃现象并提出均值-方差分裂残差方法，实现1000层稳定训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 将扩散Transformer扩展到数百层时，网络会陷入均值主导的崩溃状态，导致表征同质化，阻碍深层模型性能提升。
analysis.problem: 深层扩散Transformer训练中出现的均值崩溃（Mean Mode Screaming）问题，即网络进入均值主导的崩溃状态，抑制中心化变异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过机制审计，发现均值崩溃的触发事件是均值相干的反向冲击作用于残差写入器，打开深层残差分支，使网络进入均值主导状态；该行为由梯度分解为均值相干和中心化分量驱动，并通过Softmax Jacobian的零空间抑制注意力logit梯度。
analysis.method: 提出均值-方差分裂残差（MV-Split Residuals），结合独立增益的中心化残差更新和泄漏的主干均值替换。
contributions: 识别并命名了深层扩散Transformer中的均值崩溃现象（Mean Mode Screaming），并揭示了其梯度层面的触发机制。
提出均值-方差分裂残差（MV-Split Residuals），有效防止均值崩溃，实现400层稳定训练并验证了1000层可训练性。
analysis.experiments: 在400层单流DiT上，MV-Split防止了未稳定基线的发散崩溃，跟踪基线崩溃前轨迹且优于LayerScale；在1000层DiT上验证了架构在极端深度下的稳定可训练性。
limitations: 方法可能仅适用于特定架构（如DiT），泛化性需进一步验证。
1000层实验仅为规模验证，未提供下游任务性能对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现扩散Transformer深层训练中的均值崩溃现象并提出均值-方差分裂残差方法，实现1000层稳定训练。

papers.title: Post Reasoning: Improving the Performance of Non-Thinking Models at No Cost
papers.abstract: As the widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) accelerates, token consumption from intermediate reasoning traces increasingly contributes to inference latency and operational cost. Recent studies suggest that many real-world tasks require little to no explicit reasoning, with additional reasoning sometimes even degrading performance. In this work, we propose \textbf{Post-Reasoning}, a simple yet effective approach that improves instruction-tuned models by conditioning them to justify their answers after generating the final response. By design, it enables the final answer to be obtained without additional latency or token cost, while still improving performance through simple instruction augmentation. We evaluate Post-Reasoning across \(117\) model--benchmark settings spanning \(13\) open and proprietary models, \(4\) model families, and \(9\) diverse reasoning and knowledge-intensive benchmarks, including AMC, HMMT, GSM8K, GPQA, MMLU-Pro, and BIG-Bench Hard. Post-Reasoning improves performance in over \(88.19\%\) of evaluated settings, achieving a mean relative improvements of \(17.37\%\). Furthermore, we propose supervised post-reason tuning, which further improves performance in over \(91.11\%\) of evaluated settings, and exceeds the prompt-based post-reasoning baseline by an average of \(8.01\%\), demonstrating that post-reasoning can be effectively internalized through training. Ultimately, Post-Reasoning establishes a new performance ceiling for direct-answer capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出Post-Reasoning方法，让模型在生成最终答案后再给出推理过程，无需额外延迟和成本即可提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推理过程中的中间推理痕迹增加了推理延迟和运营成本，且许多任务不需要显式推理，甚至额外推理会降低性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加推理延迟和token消耗的前提下提升指令微调模型的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Post-Reasoning：通过指令增强，让模型在生成最终答案后再给出推理过程，并进一步提出监督式后推理微调。
contributions: 提出Post-Reasoning方法，无需额外延迟和成本即可提升非思考模型性能。
在117个模型-基准设置上验证，平均相对提升17.37%，监督微调进一步平均提升8.01%。
analysis.experiments: 在13个开源和专有模型、4个模型家族、9个推理和知识密集型基准（包括AMC、HMMT、GSM8K、GPQA、MMLU-Pro、BIG-Bench Hard）上评估，Post-Reasoning在88.19%的设置中提升性能，平均相对提升17.37%；监督后推理微调在91.11%的设置中提升，平均提升8.01%。
limitations: 可能不适用于需要严格推理顺序的任务。
监督微调需要额外训练数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Post-Reasoning方法，让模型在生成最终答案后再给出推理过程，无需额外延迟和成本即可提升性能。

papers.title: Beyond Accuracy: Policy Invariance as a Reliability Test for LLM Safety Judges
papers.abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge pipelines have become the de facto evaluator for agent safety, yet existing benchmarks treat their verdicts as ground-truth proxies without checking whether the verdicts depend on the agent's behavior or merely on how the evaluation policy happens to be worded. We argue that any trustworthy safety judge must satisfy a basic property we call policy invariance, and we operationalize it as three testable principles: rubric-semantics invariance under certified-equivalent rewrites, rubric-threshold invariance under intentional strict-to-lenient shifts, and ambiguity-aware calibration so that verdict instability concentrates on genuinely ambiguous cases. Instantiating these principles as a stress-test protocol with four agent-class judges on trajectories drawn from ASSEBench and R-Judge, we surface a previously unmeasured failure mode: today's judges respond to meaningful normative shifts and to meaningless structural rewrites with comparable strength, and cannot tell the two apart. Content-preserving policy rewrites flip up to 9.1% of verdicts above baseline jitter, and 18-43% of all observed flips occur on unambiguous cases under such rewrites, so existing safety scores conflate what the agent did with how the evaluator was prompted. Beyond the diagnosis, we contribute the Policy Invariance Score and the Judge Card reporting protocol, which expose an order-of-magnitude spread in judge reliability that is invisible to accuracy-only leaderboards. We release the protocol and code so that future agent-safety benchmarks can audit their own evaluators rather than trust them by default.

analysis.tldr: 提出策略不变性作为LLM安全评判的可靠性测试，发现当前评判器无法区分有意义的规范变化与无意义的措辞改写。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM-as-a-Judge基准将评判结果视为真实代理，未检验评判是否依赖于代理行为或仅取决于评估策略的措辞，导致安全评分不可靠。
analysis.problem: 当前LLM安全评判器缺乏策略不变性，无法区分有意义的规范变化与无意义的措辞改写，导致评判结果不可靠。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：内容保留的策略改写可导致高达9.1%的评判翻转，且18-43%的翻转发生在无歧义案例上，说明安全评分混淆了代理行为与评估提示。
analysis.method: 提出策略不变性概念，包含三个可测试原则：规则语义不变性、规则阈值不变性和歧义感知校准，并实例化为压力测试协议。
contributions: 提出策略不变性作为LLM安全评判器的可靠性测试标准
贡献策略不变性评分和Judge Card报告协议，暴露仅靠准确率排行榜无法发现的可靠性差异
analysis.experiments: 在ASSEBench和R-Judge轨迹上对四个代理类评判器进行压力测试，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对代理安全场景，可能不适用于其他LLM评判任务
策略不变性测试的计算成本可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出策略不变性作为LLM安全评判的可靠性测试，发现当前评判器无法区分有意义的规范变化与无意义的措辞改写。

papers.title: Beyond Forgetting in Continual Medical Image Segmentation: A Comprehensive Benchmark Study
papers.abstract: Continual learning (CL) is essential for deploying medical image segmentation models in clinical environments where imaging domains, anatomical targets, and diagnostic tasks evolve over time. However, continual segmentation still faces three main challenges. First, the scenarios for this task remain insufficiently standardized for real-world clinical settings. Second, existing research has been primarily focused on mitigating forgetting, overlooking the other essential properties such as plasticity. Third, a benchmark work with comprehensive evaluation on existing methods is stll desirable. To address these gaps, we present such benchmark study of continual medical image segmentation. We first define three clinically motivated scenarios, namely Domain-CL, Class-CL, and Organ-CL, to respectively capture the cross-center domain shift, the incremental anatomical structure segmentation, and the cross-organ segmentation. We then introduce an evaluation framework that measures not only general performance and forgetting, but also plasticity, forward generalizability, parameter efficiency, and replay burden. The results, from extensive experiments with representative CL methods, showed that it was still challenging to develop a model that could satisfy all the requirements simultaneously. Nevertheless, these studies also suggested that the replay-based methods achieve the best overall balance between stability and plasticity, the parameter-isolation methods should be effective at reducing forgetting, though at the cost of increased model size, and the forward generalizability remain a significantly understudied aspect of this research field. Finally, we discuss related learning paradigms and outline future directions for continual medical image segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出持续医学图像分割的基准研究，定义三种临床场景并引入多维度评估框架，发现重放方法在稳定性与可塑性间平衡最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床环境中成像域、解剖目标和诊断任务随时间演变，持续学习对医学图像分割至关重要，但现有研究缺乏标准化场景、过度关注遗忘而忽略可塑性等关键属性，且缺少全面基准评估。
analysis.problem: 持续医学图像分割中场景定义不标准、评估维度单一（仅关注遗忘），缺乏对现有方法的系统基准研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重放方法在稳定性与可塑性间取得最佳平衡；参数隔离方法能有效减少遗忘但增加模型大小；前向泛化能力是显著未被充分研究的方面。
analysis.method: 定义三种临床场景（Domain-CL、Class-CL、Organ-CL），引入评估框架衡量通用性能、遗忘、可塑性、前向泛化、参数效率和重放负担，并对代表性CL方法进行广泛实验。
contributions: 定义了三种临床驱动的持续医学图像分割场景（Domain-CL、Class-CL、Organ-CL）
提出了包含可塑性、前向泛化等多维度的评估框架
通过大量实验揭示了现有方法的优缺点，并指出前向泛化是未来研究方向
analysis.experiments: 对代表性持续学习方法进行了广泛实验，评估了通用性能、遗忘、可塑性、前向泛化、参数效率和重放负担。
limitations: 未提供具体实验数据集和数值结果
可能未涵盖所有最新持续学习方法
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出持续医学图像分割的基准研究，定义三种临床场景并引入多维度评估框架，发现重放方法在稳定性与可塑性间平衡最佳。

papers.title: Entropy-Regularized Adjoint Matching for Offline Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Integrating expressive generative policies, such as flow-matching models, into offline reinforcement learning (RL) allows agents to capture complex, multi-modal behaviors. While Q-learning with Adjoint Matching (QAM) stabilizes policy optimization via the continuous adjoint method, it remains inherently bound to the fixed behavior distribution. This dependence induces a \textit{popularity bias} that can suppress high-reward actions in low-density regions, and creates a \textit{support binding} that restricts off-manifold exploration. Existing workarounds, such as appending \textit{residual} Gaussian policies, often re-introduce the expressivity bottlenecks associated with unimodal distributions. In this work, we propose \textit{Maximum Entropy Adjoint Matching} (ME-AM), a unified framework that addresses these limitations within the continuous flow formulation. ME-AM incorporates two mechanisms: (1) a Mirror Descent entropy maximization objective that mitigates the popularity bias to facilitate the extraction of optimal policies from offline datasets, and (2) a \textit{Mixture Behavior Prior} that broadens the geometric support to encompass out-of-distribution high-reward regions. By exploring this extended geometry, ME-AM identifies robust actions while preserving the absolute continuity of the generative vector field. Empirically, ME-AM demonstrates competitive or superior performance compared to prior state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods across a diverse suite of sparse-reward continuous control environments.

analysis.tldr: ME-AM通过熵正则化和混合行为先验，解决了离线强化学习中流匹配策略的流行度偏差和支持受限问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线强化学习中，使用流匹配等生成式策略能捕捉复杂多模态行为，但现有方法如QAM受限于固定行为分布，导致流行度偏差（抑制低密度区域的高奖励动作）和支持受限（限制离流形探索），而简单添加残差高斯策略又会引入单模态瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲表达力的前提下，消除离线RL中流匹配策略的流行度偏差并扩展支持域，以提取最优策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出QAM依赖固定行为分布，产生流行度偏差（低密度高奖励动作被抑制）和支持绑定（离流形探索受限），且残差高斯策略会重新引入单模态瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出最大熵邻接匹配（ME-AM），包含两个机制：(1) 镜像下降熵最大化目标，缓解流行度偏差；(2) 混合行为先验，扩展几何支持以覆盖分布外高奖励区域。
contributions: 提出ME-AM框架，通过熵正则化和混合行为先验统一解决离线RL中流匹配策略的流行度偏差和支持受限问题。
在稀疏奖励连续控制环境中，ME-AM达到或超越现有SOTA方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多种稀疏奖励连续控制环境中，ME-AM相比先前SOTA方法表现出竞争性或更优性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算开销或训练稳定性细节。
可能对混合行为先验的设计敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ME-AM通过熵正则化和混合行为先验，解决了离线强化学习中流匹配策略的流行度偏差和支持受限问题。

papers.title: Graphlets as Building Blocks for Structural Vocabulary in Knowledge Graph Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Foundation models excel at language, where sentences become tokens, and vision, where images become pixels, because both reduce to discrete symbols on a shared, fixed grid. Knowledge Graphs share the discreteness, but not the geometry. Their entities and relations are discrete symbols, yet their arrangement is relational and lacks a common, fixed grid. Knowledge Graphs (KGs) share the discreteness, but not the geometry. They form irregular, non-Euclidean topologies whose local neighborhoods differ from graph to graph. Therefore, Knowledge Graph Foundation Models (KGFMs) rely on identifying structural invariances to produce transferable representations. Without a universal token set, KGFMs are limited in their ability to transfer representations across unseen KGs. We close this gap by treating graphlets, small connected graphs, as structural tokens that recur in heterogeneous KGs. In this paper, We introduce a model-agnostic framework based on a vocabulary of graphlets that mines a KG between relations via pattern matching. In particular, we considered closed and open 2- and 3-path, and star graphlets, to obtain robust invariances. The framework is evaluated on 51 KGs from a wide range of domains, for zero-shot inductive and transductive link prediction. Experiments show that adding simple graphlets to the vocabulary yields models that outperform prior KGFMs.

analysis.tldr: 将图元（graphlets）作为结构词汇，构建知识图谱基础模型，实现跨图谱的零样本链接预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识图谱缺乏统一的几何结构，导致基础模型难以在不同图谱间迁移表示，限制了泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 知识图谱基础模型缺乏通用的结构词汇，无法有效处理跨图谱的表示迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 知识图谱的局部邻域因图而异，缺乏固定网格，使得现有基础模型难以捕捉结构不变性。
analysis.method: 提出一个与模型无关的框架，通过模式匹配挖掘知识图谱中的图元（如闭/开2-路径、3-路径和星形图元），构建结构词汇表，用于零样本归纳和直推式链接预测。
contributions: 提出将图元作为知识图谱基础模型的结构词汇，填补了跨图谱表示迁移的空白。
在51个不同领域的知识图谱上验证了方法，零样本链接预测性能优于现有基础模型。
analysis.experiments: 在51个不同领域的知识图谱上进行了零样本归纳和直推式链接预测实验，结果表明添加简单图元词汇的模型优于先前的基础模型。
limitations: 仅考虑了有限的图元类型（2-、3-路径和星形），更复杂的图元可能带来进一步提升。
框架依赖模式匹配，可能在大规模图谱上存在效率问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将图元（graphlets）作为结构词汇，构建知识图谱基础模型，实现跨图谱的零样本链接预测。

papers.title: Secure Seed-Based Multi-bit Watermarking for Diffusion Models from First Principles
papers.abstract: The rapid emergence of generative image models has led to the development of specialized watermarking techniques, particularly in-generation methods such as seed-based embedding. However, current evaluations in this area remain largely empirical, making them heavily reliant on the specific model architectures used for generation and inversion. This prevents any clear conclusion on the performance of any method, especially regarding security, for which a rigorous definition is lacking. Against this approach, we argue that the effectiveness of a watermarking scheme should be established purely through a thorough theoretical analysis. This is enabled by decoupling the model-dependent part from the actual decision mechanism of the watermarking system. Using this decoupling, we introduce a formal evaluation framework based on security, robustness, and fidelity. This allows precise comparisons between watermarking systems through a characteristic surface representing the trade-off between these three quantities, independent of any generative model. Based on this framework, we propose SSB, a novel watermarking method that generalizes previous seed-based methods by allowing to reach any security-robustness-fidelity regime on its characteristic surface. This work opens the door to the design of modern watermarking systems with theoretical guarantees that do not necessitate any costly empirical evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于理论保证的种子型多比特水印框架SSB，通过解耦模型依赖与决策机制实现安全-鲁棒-保真度权衡的形式化评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成图像水印方法依赖经验评估，缺乏严格的安全定义和理论保证，导致性能结论不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何建立不依赖特定生成模型的理论化水印评估框架，并设计可调节安全-鲁棒-保真度权衡的种子型水印方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前种子型水印评估高度依赖生成和反演模型架构，无法得出普适结论，尤其缺乏安全性的严格定义。
analysis.method: 通过解耦模型依赖部分与水印决策机制，提出形式化评估框架（安全、鲁棒、保真度），并设计SSB方法，其通过特征曲面实现任意权衡区域的可达性。
contributions: 提出解耦模型依赖与决策机制的形式化水印评估框架，实现安全-鲁棒-保真度的精确比较。
设计SSB水印方法，可达到特征曲面上任意安全-鲁棒-保真度权衡区域，具有理论保证。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论框架可能未覆盖所有实际攻击场景。
SSB方法在极端权衡下的实际性能需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于理论保证的种子型多比特水印框架SSB，通过解耦模型依赖与决策机制实现安全-鲁棒-保真度权衡的形式化评估。

papers.title: AdaGamma: State-Dependent Discounting for Temporal Adaptation in Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: The discount factor in reinforcement learning controls both the effective planning horizon and the strength of bootstrapping, yet most deep RL methods use a single fixed value across all states. While state-dependent discounting is conceptually appealing, naive deep actor--critic implementations can become unstable and degenerate toward TD-error collapse. We propose AdaGamma, a practical deep actor--critic method for state-dependent discounting that learns a state-dependent discount function together with a return-consistency objective to regularize the induced backup structure. On the theory side, we analyze the Bellman operator induced by state-dependent discounting and establish its basic well-posedness properties under suitable conditions. Empirically, AdaGamma integrates into both SAC and PPO, yielding consistent improvements on continuous-control benchmarks, and achieves statistically significant gains in an online A/B test on the JD Logistics platform. These results suggest that state-dependent discounting can be made effective in deep RL when coupled with a return-consistency objective that prevents degenerate target manipulation.

analysis.tldr: AdaGamma通过状态依赖折扣因子和回报一致性目标，在深度强化学习中实现稳定的时序自适应，提升连续控制性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准深度强化学习方法使用固定折扣因子，无法适应不同状态下的规划需求，而状态依赖折扣虽概念吸引人，但朴素实现会导致不稳定和TD误差崩溃。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个稳定且实用的深度演员-评论家方法，实现状态依赖的折扣因子学习，避免训练崩溃并提升性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，朴素的状态依赖折扣在深度演员-评论家实现中会变得不稳定并趋向TD误差崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出AdaGamma，学习状态依赖折扣函数，并引入回报一致性目标来正则化诱导的备份结构，从而稳定训练。
contributions: 提出一种实用的深度演员-评论家方法AdaGamma，实现状态依赖折扣因子学习。
引入回报一致性目标，防止目标操纵退化，确保训练稳定性。
理论分析了状态依赖折扣的贝尔曼算子的适定性。
在连续控制基准和京东物流在线A/B测试中验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在连续控制基准上集成SAC和PPO均取得一致改进，并在京东物流平台在线A/B测试中获得统计显著提升。
limitations: 可能对折扣函数的形式和初始化敏感。
理论分析仅在特定条件下成立，实际应用可能需要调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AdaGamma通过状态依赖折扣因子和回报一致性目标，在深度强化学习中实现稳定的时序自适应，提升连续控制性能。

papers.title: Learning Discrete Autoregressive Priors with Wasserstein Gradient Flow
papers.abstract: Discrete image tokenizers are commonly trained in two stages: first for reconstruction, and then with a prior model fitted to the frozen token sequences. This decoupling leaves the tokenizer unaware of the model that will later generate its tokens. As a result, the learned tokens may preserve image information well but still be difficult for an autoregressive (AR) prior to predict from left to right. We analyze this mismatch using Tripartite Variational Consistency (TVC), which decomposes latent-variable learning into three consistency conditions: conditional-likelihood consistency, prior consistency, and posterior consistency. TVC shows that two-stage training preserves the reconstruction side but leaves prior consistency outside the tokenizer objective: the overall token distribution is fixed before the AR prior participates in training. Motivated by this view, we add a distribution-level prior-matching signal during tokenizer training, while keeping the reconstruction objective unchanged. We optimize this signal with a Wasserstein-gradient-flow update. For hard categorical tokens, the update reduces to a token-level contrast between an auxiliary AR model that tracks the tokenizer's current token distribution and the target AR prior. It requires only forward passes through the two AR models and does not backpropagate through either of them. The resulting tokenizer, wAR-Tok, reduces AR loss and improves generation FID on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet at comparable reconstruction quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出用Wasserstein梯度流在离散图像分词器训练中加入先验匹配信号，缓解两阶段训练中分词器与自回归先验不匹配的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 两阶段训练中，离散图像分词器先学习重建，再拟合自回归先验，导致分词器对后续先验模型不可知，学到的token虽重建好但难以被自回归模型预测。
analysis.problem: 解决两阶段训练中分词器与自回归先验之间的不匹配问题，使分词器在训练时就考虑先验的可预测性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过三变量变分一致性（TVC）分析，发现两阶段训练只保证了重建侧的一致性，而先验一致性未被纳入分词器目标，导致整体token分布固定后才参与先验训练。
analysis.method: 在分词器训练中加入分布级先验匹配信号，利用Wasserstein梯度流更新，对硬类别token简化为辅助AR模型与目标AR先验之间的token级对比，仅需前向传播。
contributions: 提出wAR-Tok，在分词器训练中引入先验匹配信号，改善自回归先验的可预测性。
利用Wasserstein梯度流实现高效优化，无需反向传播通过AR模型。
在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上降低AR损失并提升生成FID，同时保持重建质量。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上评估，显示AR损失降低和生成FID提升，重建质量相当。
limitations: 仅适用于离散tokenizer，未扩展到连续表示。
辅助AR模型增加了额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用Wasserstein梯度流在离散图像分词器训练中加入先验匹配信号，缓解两阶段训练中分词器与自回归先验不匹配的问题。

papers.title: Unifying Goal-Conditioned RL and Unsupervised Skill Learning via Control-Maximization
papers.abstract: Unsupervised pretraining has driven empirical advances in goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL), but its theoretical foundations remain poorly understood. In particular, an influential class of methods, mutual information skill learning (MISL), discovers behaviorally diverse skills that can later be used for downstream goal-reaching. However, it remains a theoretical mystery why skills learned through MISL should support goal-reaching. A subtle challenge is that both GCRL and MISL are umbrella terms: different GCRL tasks use distinct criteria for measuring goal-reaching performance, while different MISL methods optimize distinct notions of behavioral diversity. We address this challenge and unify GCRL and MISL as instances of control maximization. We identify three canonical GCRL formulations and prove that they are fundamentally inequivalent: they can induce incompatible optimal policies even in the same environment. Nevertheless, they all share a common interpretation: a well-performing goal-conditioned policy is one whose future trajectory is highly sensitive to the commanded goal, with the precise notion of sensitivity determined by the GCRL formulation. Noting that MISL objectives can be understood as measures of skill-sensitivity akin to goal-sensitivity, we show that MISL objectives are bounded by formulation-specific downstream goal-sensitivities. These bounds establish a precise correspondence between MISL methods and downstream GCRL tasks: for every GCRL formulation, there exists a matching MISL objective for which more diverse skills afford greater downstream goal sensitivity. Our results thus lay a theoretical foundation for RL pretraining and have important practical implications, such as suggesting which pretraining objectives to use when a user cares about a specific class of downstream tasks.

analysis.tldr: 通过控制最大化统一目标条件强化学习与无监督技能学习，建立理论对应关系。
analysis.research_motivation: 无监督预训练在目标条件强化学习中取得了经验成功，但其理论基础薄弱，特别是互信息技能学习为何能支持目标达成尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 统一目标条件强化学习（GCRL）与互信息技能学习（MISL）的理论框架，揭示两者之间的内在联系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出GCRL和MISL都是涵盖性术语，不同公式在相同环境下可能诱导不相容的最优策略，但共享控制最大化的解释。
analysis.method: 识别三种典型GCRL公式并证明其不等价性，然后通过控制最大化视角统一GCRL和MISL，建立MISL目标与下游目标敏感性的界限。
contributions: 证明三种典型GCRL公式在相同环境下可能诱导不相容的最优策略。
建立MISL目标与下游GCRL任务之间的精确对应关系，为RL预训练提供理论基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果可能依赖于特定假设，实际应用中的泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论计算效率或大规模实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过控制最大化统一目标条件强化学习与无监督技能学习，建立理论对应关系。

papers.title: AI-Generated Images: What Humans and Machines See When They Look at the Same Image
papers.abstract: The misuse of generative AI in online disinformation campaigns highlights the urgent need for transparent and explainable detection systems. In this work, we investigate how detectors for AI-generated images can be more effective in providing human-understandable explanations for their predictions. To this end, we develop a suite of detectors with various architectures and fine-tuning strategies, trained on our large-scale photorealistic fake image dataset, AIText2Image, and assess their performance on state-of-the-art text-to-image AI generators. We integrate 16 different explainable AI (XAI) methods into our detection framework, and the visual explanations are comprehensively refined and evaluated through a novel approach that prioritizes human understanding of AI-generated images, using both textual and visual responses collected from a survey of 100 participants. This framework offers insights into visual-language cues in fake image detection and into the clarity of XAI methods from a human perspective, measuring the alignment of XAI outputs with human preferences.

analysis.tldr: 研究如何让AI生成图像检测器提供人类可理解的解释，通过集成16种XAI方法并基于人类偏好评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI在虚假信息活动中的滥用亟需透明且可解释的检测系统，现有检测器缺乏人类可理解的解释。
analysis.problem: 如何使AI生成图像检测器不仅检测虚假图像，还能提供符合人类认知的解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建多种架构和微调策略的检测器，在大规模数据集AIText2Image上训练，集成16种XAI方法，并通过100名参与者的调查（文本和视觉反馈）评估解释与人类偏好的对齐程度。
contributions: 构建了大规模逼真假图像数据集AIText2Image
提出了一个集成多种XAI方法的检测框架，并通过人类调查评估解释质量
analysis.experiments: 在多个最新文本到图像生成器上评估检测性能，并通过100人调查评估XAI解释的清晰度和与人类偏好的对齐。
limitations: XAI方法可能仅适用于特定检测器架构
人类调查样本量有限，可能不具广泛代表性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究如何让AI生成图像检测器提供人类可理解的解释，通过集成16种XAI方法并基于人类偏好评估。

papers.title: IRC-Bench: Recognizing Entities from Contextual Cues in First-Person Reminiscences
papers.abstract: When people recount personal memories, they often refer to people, places, and events indirectly, relying on contextual cues rather than explicit names. Such implicit references are central to reminiscence narratives: first-person accounts of lived experience used in therapeutic, archival, and social settings. They pose a difficult computational problem because the intended entity must be inferred from dispersed narrative evidence rather than from a local mention. We introduce IRC-Bench, the Implicit Reminiscence Context Benchmark, for evaluating implicit entity recognition in reminiscence transcripts. The benchmark targets non-locality: entity-identifying cues are distributed across multiple, non-contiguous clauses, unlike named entity recognition, entity linking, or coreference resolution. IRC-Bench comprises 25,136 samples constructed from 12,337 Wiki-data-linked entities across 1,994 transcripts spanning 11 thematic domains. Each sample pairs an Entity-Grounded Narrative, in which the target entity is explicitly mentioned, with an Entity-Elided Narrative, in which direct mentions are removed. We evaluate 19 configurations across LLM generation, dense retrieval, RAG, and fine-tuning. QLoRA-adapted Llama 3.1 8B performs best in the open-world setting (38.94% exact match; 51.59% Jaccard), while fine-tuned DPR leads closed-world retrieval (35.38% Hit@1; 71.49% Hit@10). We release IRC-Bench with data, code, and evaluation tools.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向第一人称回忆录中隐式实体识别的基准 IRC-Bench，包含 25k+ 样本，评估 LLM、检索和微调方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 回忆叙述中实体常通过分散的上下文线索间接提及，现有 NER/EL/共指消解方法无法处理这种非局部性，阻碍了回忆录在治疗、档案等场景的自动理解。
analysis.problem: 从第一人称回忆录中识别通过非连续、分散线索指代的隐式实体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 IRC-Bench 基准，包含实体显式提及的 Entity-Grounded Narrative 和移除直接提及的 Entity-Elided Narrative 配对样本；评估 LLM 生成、稠密检索、RAG 和微调等 19 种配置。
contributions: 提出首个针对回忆录隐式实体识别的基准 IRC-Bench，包含 25,136 个样本和 12,337 个 Wikidata 链接实体。
系统评估 19 种配置，发现 QLoRA 微调的 Llama 3.1 8B 在开放世界设定中最佳，微调 DPR 在封闭世界检索中领先。
analysis.experiments: 在 1,994 个跨 11 个主题领域的回忆录转录本上评估 19 种配置，包括 LLM 生成、稠密检索、RAG 和微调。QLoRA-adapted Llama 3.1 8B 在开放世界设定中精确匹配 38.94%，Jaccard 51.59%；微调 DPR 在封闭世界检索中 Hit@1 35.38%，Hit@10 71.49%。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 11 个主题领域，可能无法完全代表回忆录的多样性。
隐式实体识别任务定义依赖人工构建的 Entity-Elided Narrative，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个面向第一人称回忆录中隐式实体识别的基准 IRC-Bench，包含 25k+ 样本，评估 LLM、检索和微调方法。

papers.title: SymDrift: One-Shot Generative Modeling under Symmetries
papers.abstract: Generative modeling of physical systems, such as molecules, requires learning distributions that are invariant under global symmetries, such as rotations in three-dimensional space. Equivariant diffusion and flow matching models can incorporate such invariances effectively, even when trained on a non-invariant empirical distribution, but they typically rely on costly multi-step sampling. Recently, drifting models have emerged as an efficient alternative, enabling single-step generation and achieving state-of-the-art performance in generative modeling tasks. However, we show that drifting models face a symmetry-specific challenge, since an equivariant generator does not generally produce the same drifting field as the one obtained from the symmetrized target distribution. Addressing this issue would require expensive symmetrization of the empirical distribution. To avoid this cost, we propose SymDrift, a framework that makes the drifting field itself symmetry-aware. We introduce two complementary strategies: (i) a symmetrized drift in coordinate space based on optimal alignment, and (ii) a $G$-invariant embedding that removes symmetry ambiguity by construction. Empirically, SymDrift outperforms existing one-shot methods on standard benchmarks for conformer and transition state generation, while remaining competitive with significantly more expensive multi-step approaches. By enabling one-shot inference, SymDrift reduces computational overhead by up to 40$\times$ compared to existing baselines, making it promising for high-throughput applications such as virtual drug screening and large-scale reaction network exploration.

analysis.tldr: SymDrift 通过对称性感知的漂移场实现单步生成，在分子构象和过渡态生成中达到与多步方法竞争的性能，同时计算开销降低40倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理系统（如分子）的生成建模需要学习全局对称性（如三维旋转）下的不变分布，现有等变扩散/流匹配模型依赖昂贵的多步采样，而新兴的漂移模型虽能单步生成，但面临对称性挑战：等变生成器无法直接产生与对称化目标分布相同的漂移场，需要昂贵的对称化处理。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行昂贵经验分布对称化的前提下，使漂移模型具备对称性感知能力，实现高效的单步生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出漂移模型存在对称性特定挑战：等变生成器通常不会产生与对称化目标分布相同的漂移场，解决该问题需要对经验分布进行昂贵的对称化。
analysis.method: 提出 SymDrift 框架，包含两种互补策略：(i) 基于最优对齐的坐标空间对称化漂移；(ii) G-不变嵌入，通过构造消除对称性歧义。
contributions: 揭示了漂移模型在对称性下的挑战，即等变生成器与对称化目标分布之间的漂移场不一致。
提出了 SymDrift 框架，通过对称性感知的漂移场实现单步生成，避免昂贵的分布对称化。
在构象和过渡态生成基准上，SymDrift 优于现有单步方法，与多步方法竞争，并实现高达40倍的计算加速。
analysis.experiments: 在标准构象和过渡态生成基准上评估，SymDrift 优于现有单步方法，与更昂贵的多步方法竞争，计算开销降低40倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有明确全局对称性的物理系统。
两种策略的适用场景和权衡未在摘要中详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SymDrift 通过对称性感知的漂移场实现单步生成，在分子构象和过渡态生成中达到与多步方法竞争的性能，同时计算开销降低40倍。

papers.title: Listwise Policy Optimization: Group-based RLVR as Target-Projection on the LLM Response Simplex
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a standard approach for large language models (LLMs) post-training to incentivize reasoning capacity. Among existing recipes, group-based policy gradient is prevalent, which samples a group of responses per prompt and updates the policy via group-relative advantage signals. This work reveals that these optimization strategies share a common geometric structure: each implicitly defines a target distribution on the response simplex and projects toward it via first-order approximation. Building on this insight, we propose Listwise Policy Optimization (LPO) to explicitly conduct the target-projection, which demystifies the implicit target by restricting the proximal RL objective to the response simplex, and then projects the policy via exact divergence minimization. This framework provides (i) monotonic improvement on the listwise objective with bounded, zero-sum, and self-correcting projection gradients, and (ii) flexibility in divergence selection with distinct structural properties through the decoupled projection step. On diverse reasoning tasks and LLM backbones, LPO consistently improves training performance over typical policy gradient baselines under matched targets, while intrinsically preserving optimization stability and response diversity.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Listwise Policy Optimization (LPO)，将基于组的 RLVR 优化统一为响应单纯形上的目标投影框架，实现单调改进与灵活散度选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于组的策略梯度方法在 LLM 后训练中广泛应用，但其几何结构不清晰，缺乏理论保证和灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何显式地将基于组的 RLVR 优化建模为响应单纯形上的目标投影，并实现单调改进和灵活散度选择。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有组策略梯度方法隐式定义了响应单纯形上的目标分布并通过一阶近似投影，但缺乏显式建模和理论保证。
analysis.method: 提出 LPO，通过将近端 RL 目标限制在响应单纯形上显式定义目标分布，然后通过精确散度最小化进行投影。
contributions: 揭示了组策略梯度方法的共同几何结构，即响应单纯形上的目标投影。
提出 LPO 框架，实现单调改进、有界零和自校正投影梯度，并支持灵活散度选择。
analysis.experiments: 在多种推理任务和 LLM 骨干网络上，LPO 在匹配目标下持续优于典型策略梯度基线，并保持优化稳定性和响应多样性。
limitations: 可能依赖于响应单纯形的离散性质，扩展至连续动作空间需进一步研究。
散度选择的理论性质分析可能仅适用于特定散度族。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Listwise Policy Optimization (LPO)，将基于组的 RLVR 优化统一为响应单纯形上的目标投影框架，实现单调改进与灵活散度选择。

papers.title: Autoregressive Visual Generation Needs a Prologue
papers.abstract: In this work, we propose Prologue, an approach to bridging the reconstruction-generation gap in autoregressive (AR) image generation. Instead of modifying visual tokens to satisfy both reconstruction and generation, Prologue generates a small set of prologue tokens prepended to the visual token sequence. These prologue tokens are trained exclusively with the AR cross-entropy (CE) loss, while visual tokens remain dedicated to reconstruction. This decoupled design lets us optimize generation through the AR model's true distribution without affecting reconstruction quality, which we further formalize from an ELBO perspective. On ImageNet 256x256, Prologue-Base reduces gFID from 21.01 to 10.75 without classifier-free guidance while keeping reconstruction almost unchanged; Prologue-Large reaches a competitive rFID of 0.99 and gFID of 1.46 using a standard AR model without auxiliary semantic supervision. Interestingly, driven only by AR gradients, prologue tokens exhibit emergent semantic structure: linear probing on 16 prologue tokens reaches 35.88% Top-1, far above the 23.71% of the first 16 tokens from a standard tokenizer; resampling with fixed prologue tokens preserves a similar high-level semantic layout. Our results suggest a new direction: generation quality can be improved by introducing a separate learned generative representation while leaving the original representation intact.

analysis.tldr: 提出Prologue方法，通过添加独立的前言令牌弥合自回归图像生成中的重建-生成差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归图像生成中，视觉令牌需同时满足重建和生成目标，导致两者性能难以兼顾，存在重建-生成差距。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲重建质量的前提下提升自回归图像生成的生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 生成少量前言令牌（prologue tokens）并前置到视觉令牌序列前，前言令牌仅用自回归交叉熵损失训练，视觉令牌专用于重建，实现解耦优化。
contributions: 提出Prologue方法，通过解耦设计弥合重建-生成差距。
从ELBO角度形式化该方法的合理性。
实验表明前言令牌能自发学习语义结构，且生成质量显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256x256上，Prologue-Base将gFID从21.01降至10.75（无无分类器引导），重建几乎不变；Prologue-Large达到rFID 0.99和gFID 1.46。16个前言令牌的线性探测Top-1为35.88%，高于标准令牌的23.71%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于自回归图像生成，未验证其他模态。
前言令牌的语义结构机制尚需进一步解释。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Prologue方法，通过添加独立的前言令牌弥合自回归图像生成中的重建-生成差距。

papers.title: BUILD-AND-FIND: An Effort-Aware Protocol for Evaluating Agent-Managed Codebases
papers.abstract: Most coding-agent benchmarks ask whether generated code behaves correctly. That remains essential, but repository-level engineering is increasingly agent-managed: one agent writes a repository, and later agents inspect, audit, or extend it as working context. In that setting, a generated repository is not only an answer to a task but also a communication artifact for future work. Even when strong agents nearly satisfy the visible behavioral objective, repositories can differ in how clearly they expose the intended behavior and design choices behind that behavior. We introduce BUILD-AND-FIND, a protocol for evaluating whether downstream agents can recover those intended choices from generated repositories, and how much inspection that recovery requires. For each task, a builder sees a hidden repository specification and creates a codebase; a finder sees only the codebase and a specification-traced multiple-choice question bank. The protocol separates behavioral correctness from artifact-side recovery and reports recovery accuracy, repeatability, implementation coverage, and inspection effort. Accuracy and stability act as gates: effort is interpreted only when recovery succeeds reliably. Among artifacts from which the same intent can be recovered, lower effort by the same finder suggests that the artifact makes that intent easier to locate. Question-only and spec-only controls quantify generic priors and specification access, while audits separate omitted claims from finder failures and check whether correct answers cite artifact evidence. In the released high-prior task pack, recovery accuracy is near saturation, so inspection effort and finder-specific effects provide the main panel-local comparison.

analysis.tldr: 提出BUILD-AND-FIND协议，通过下游代理从代码库中恢复设计意图的准确性和努力程度来评估代理管理的代码库质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有编码代理基准主要关注生成代码的行为正确性，但仓库级工程中代码库作为未来工作的通信工件，其设计意图的清晰度同样重要，而现有评估缺乏对此的度量。
analysis.problem: 如何评估代理生成的代码库在行为正确性之外，是否清晰传达设计意图，以及下游代理恢复这些意图所需的工作量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使强代理几乎满足可见行为目标，不同代码库在暴露意图和设计选择方面的清晰度存在差异。
analysis.method: 提出BUILD-AND-FIND协议：构建者根据隐藏规范创建代码库，查找者仅凭代码库和规范追踪的多选题库恢复意图，分离行为正确性与工件侧恢复，报告恢复准确率、可重复性、实现覆盖率和检查努力。
contributions: 提出评估代理管理代码库的新协议，关注设计意图的可恢复性而非仅行为正确性。
引入努力感知的度量，包括恢复准确率、可重复性、实现覆盖率和检查努力，并设置准确率与稳定性作为努力解释的门控条件。
analysis.experiments: 在发布的高先验任务包中，恢复准确率接近饱和，因此检查努力和查找者特定效应提供了主要的局部比较。
limitations: 协议依赖下游查找者的能力，可能引入查找者偏差。
仅在高先验任务包上验证，泛化性待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BUILD-AND-FIND协议，通过下游代理从代码库中恢复设计意图的准确性和努力程度来评估代理管理的代码库质量。

papers.title: Skill1: Unified Evolution of Skill-Augmented Agents via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: A persistent skill library allows language model agents to reuse successful strategies across tasks. Maintaining such a library requires three coupled capabilities. The agent selects a relevant skill, utilizes it during execution, and distills new skills from experience. Existing methods optimize these capabilities in isolation or with separate reward sources, resulting in partial and conflicting evolution. We propose Skill1, a framework that trains a single policy to co-evolve skill selection, utilization, and distillation toward a shared task-outcome objective. The policy generates a query to search the skill library, re-ranks candidates to select one, solves the task conditioned on it, and distills a new skill from the trajectory. All learning derives from a single task-outcome signal. Its low-frequency trend credits selection and its high-frequency variation credits distillation. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop show that Skill1 outperforms prior skill-based and reinforcement learning baselines. Training dynamics confirm the co-evolution of the three capabilities, and ablations show that removing any credit signal degrades the evolution.

analysis.tldr: Skill1通过单一策略联合进化技能选择、利用和蒸馏，在ALFWorld和WebShop上超越先前方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法孤立优化技能选择、利用和蒸馏，导致部分且冲突的进化，限制了智能体跨任务复用策略的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何通过单一任务结果信号联合优化技能选择、利用和蒸馏三个耦合能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Skill1框架，训练单一策略生成查询、重排序候选技能、基于选定技能执行任务、从轨迹蒸馏新技能，所有学习来自单一任务结果信号，利用低频趋势信用选择、高频变化信用蒸馏。
contributions: 提出Skill1框架，实现技能选择、利用和蒸馏的联合进化。
设计基于任务结果信号的信用分配机制，分别指导选择和蒸馏。
在ALFWorld和WebShop上验证有效性，消融实验证明信用信号的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFWorld和WebShop上进行实验，Skill1优于先前基于技能和强化学习的基线，训练动态证实三种能力的共同进化，消融实验显示移除任何信用信号会退化进化。
limitations: 可能依赖任务结果信号的质量和频率。
技能库的初始构建和规模可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Skill1通过单一策略联合进化技能选择、利用和蒸馏，在ALFWorld和WebShop上超越先前方法。

papers.title: Continuous Expert Assembly: Instance-Conditioned Low-Rank Residuals for All-in-One Image Restoration
papers.abstract: Real-world image degradation is often unknown, spatially non-uniform, and compositional, requiring all-in-one restoration models to adapt a single set of weights to diverse local corruption patterns without test-time degradation labels. Existing methods typically modulate a shared backbone with global prompts or degradation descriptors, or route features through predefined expert pools. However, compact global conditioning can bottleneck localized degradation evidence, while static expert routing may produce homogeneous updates or rely on unstable sparse assignments. We propose \textbf{Continuous Expert Assembly} (CEA), a token-wise dynamic parameterization framework for all-in-one image restoration. CEA employs a lightweight \textbf{Cross-Attention Hyper-Adapter} to probe intermediate spatial features and synthesize instance-conditioned low-rank routing bases and residual directions. Each spatial token then assembles its own residual update via dense signed dot-product affinities over the generated rank-wise components, avoiding external prompts, static expert banks, and discrete Top- selection. The resulting assembly rule also admits a linear-attention perspective, making its dense token-wise routing behavior transparent. Experiments on AIO-3, AIO-5, and CDD-11 show that CEA improves average restoration quality over strong prompt-, descriptor-, and expert-based baselines, with the clearest gains on spatially varying and compositional degradations, while maintaining favorable parameter, FLOP, and runtime efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续专家组装（CEA），通过实例条件低秩残差实现全合一图像恢复，无需测试时退化标签。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实图像退化未知、空间非均匀且复合，现有方法依赖全局提示或静态专家池，难以适应局部退化模式。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用测试时退化标签的情况下，让单一模型适应多样化的局部退化模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局条件化会瓶颈局部退化证据，静态专家路由可能产生同质更新或依赖不稳定的稀疏分配。
analysis.method: 提出连续专家组装（CEA），使用轻量级交叉注意力超适配器生成实例条件低秩路由基和残差方向，每个空间token通过密集符号点积亲和度组装自己的残差更新。
contributions: 提出CEA框架，实现token级动态参数化，无需外部提示或静态专家库。
从线性注意力视角解释密集token级路由行为，提升透明度。
在多个基准上超越现有方法，尤其在空间变化和复合退化上表现显著。
analysis.experiments: 在AIO-3、AIO-5和CDD-11数据集上评估，CEA在平均恢复质量上优于基于提示、描述符和专家的基线，且参数、FLOP和运行时效率良好。
limitations: 可能对极端退化类型泛化能力有限。
跨注意力超适配器可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续专家组装（CEA），通过实例条件低秩残差实现全合一图像恢复，无需测试时退化标签。

papers.title: P-Guide: Parameter-Efficient Prior Steering for Single-Pass CFG Inference
papers.abstract: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) is essential for high-fidelity conditional generation in flow matching, yet it imposes significant computational overhead by requiring dual forward passes at each sampling step. In this work, we address this bottleneck by introducing \textbf{P-Guide}, a framework that achieves high-quality guidance through a single inference pass by modulating only the initial latent state. We further show that, under a first-order approximation, P-Guide is equivalent to CFG in the sense that it steers generation from the prior space, without requiring explicit velocity field extrapolation during sampling. We consider both homoscedastic and \textbf{heteroscedastic} priors, and find that jointly modeling the mean and variance enables adaptive loss attenuation and improved robustness to data uncertainty. Extensive experiments demonstrate that P-Guide reduces inference latency by approximately 50\% while maintaining fidelity and prompt alignment competitive with standard dual-pass CFG baselines.

analysis.tldr: P-Guide 通过单次前向传播实现与 CFG 相当的生成质量，将推理延迟降低约 50%。
analysis.research_motivation: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) 在流匹配中至关重要，但每次采样步骤需要双前向传播，计算开销大，限制了实际部署效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲生成保真度和提示对齐的前提下，消除 CFG 的双前向传播瓶颈，实现单次推理的高效引导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: P-Guide 框架：仅通过调制初始潜状态实现单次推理引导；在一阶近似下等价于 CFG；同时考虑同方差和异方差先验，联合建模均值和方差以自适应损失衰减。
contributions: 提出 P-Guide，一种单次前向传播的 CFG 替代方案，显著降低推理延迟。
理论证明 P-Guide 在一阶近似下与 CFG 等价，并从先验空间引导生成。
引入异方差先验建模，提升对数据不确定性的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在流匹配生成任务上，P-Guide 将推理延迟降低约 50%，同时保真度和提示对齐与标准双前向 CFG 基线相当。
limitations: 一阶近似的有效性可能在高曲率区域受限。
异方差先验的建模可能增加额外参数和训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: P-Guide 通过单次前向传播实现与 CFG 相当的生成质量，将推理延迟降低约 50%。

papers.title: Back to the Beginning of Heuristic Design: Bridging Code and Knowledge with LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently advanced automatic heuristic design (AHD) for combinatorial optimization (CO), where candidate heuristics are iteratively proposed, evaluated, and refined. Most existing approaches search over executable programs and distill insights from execution feedback to guide later iterations. Because this process moves from low-level implementations to high-level principles, we refer to it as a bottom-up paradigm. We argue that this view is incomplete and introduce a complementary top-down perspective: knowledge becomes the primary search object and code merely instantiates and tests it, making what is learned explicit and reusable across problems and trajectories. We formalize this shift through a statistical-learning view that exposes a distortion--compression trade-off, and instantiate it in both population-based and tree-based AHD frameworks. Across CO and tasks beyond it, knowledge-first search improves discovery efficiency, transfer, and generalization, often outperforming code-centric pipelines, while combining both strategies yields further gains. Our results suggest that progress in AHD depends on iteratively constructing and evolving interpretable hypotheses that retain value beyond a single search trajectory.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识优先的启发式设计范式，通过显式构建可解释假设提升组合优化中的发现效率与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动启发式设计（AHD）方法主要基于代码搜索和执行反馈，这种自底向上的范式忽略了高层知识的可重用性和可解释性，导致效率低、泛化差。
analysis.problem: 如何将知识作为主要搜索对象，使启发式设计过程更高效、可迁移且可解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出代码中心的自底向上范式存在失真-压缩权衡，而知识优先的搜索能提升发现效率、迁移性和泛化性。
analysis.method: 提出自顶向下的知识优先搜索范式，将知识作为主要搜索对象，代码仅用于实例化和测试；形式化为统计学习视角下的失真-压缩权衡，并在基于种群和基于树的AHD框架中实例化。
contributions: 提出知识优先的自顶向下AHD范式，弥补现有自底向上方法的不足
形式化失真-压缩权衡，解释两种范式的互补性
在组合优化及其他任务上验证知识优先搜索的有效性，并展示与代码中心方法结合可进一步提升
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始知识库
知识表示和演化机制的设计可能复杂
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识优先的启发式设计范式，通过显式构建可解释假设提升组合优化中的发现效率与泛化能力。

papers.title: Pest-Thinker: Learning to Think and Reason like Entomologists via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Pest-induced crop losses pose a major threat to global food security and sustainable agricultural development. While recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong potential for visual understanding and smart agriculture, their direct application to pest recognition remains limited due to the domain's unique challenges such as high inter-species complexity, intra-species variability, and the scarcity of expert-annotated data. In this work, we introduce Pest-Thinker, a knowledge-driven reinforcement learning (RL) framework that enables MLLMs to reason over fine-grained pest morphology. We first construct two high-definition pest benchmarks, QFSD and AgriInsect, comprising diverse species and expert-annotated morphological traits. Leveraging these datasets, we synthesize Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning trajectories to facilitate structured learning of pest-specific visual cues through Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Subsequently, we employ Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a novel feature reward that guides the model to focus on observable morphological evidence, assessed by an LLM-as-a-Judge strategy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Pest-Thinker substantially improves both in-domain and out-of-domain morphological understanding, marking a step toward expert-level visual reasoning for intelligent agricultural pest analysis. The datasets and source code are available upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Pest-Thinker 框架，通过强化学习让多模态大模型像昆虫学家一样推理害虫形态。
analysis.research_motivation: 害虫识别对农业至关重要，但现有 MLLM 因物种间相似性高、种内变异大及专家标注数据稀缺而表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何让 MLLM 具备细粒度害虫形态推理能力，以提升识别准确性和泛化性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建高清害虫基准数据集 QFSD 和 AgriInsect，合成 CoT 推理轨迹进行 SFT，再使用 GRPO 结合特征奖励和 LLM-as-a-Judge 策略优化模型。
contributions: 提出 Pest-Thinker 框架，结合 SFT 和 RL 提升 MLLM 的害虫形态推理能力。
构建两个高清害虫基准数据集 QFSD 和 AgriInsect，包含专家标注的形态特征。
analysis.experiments: 在域内和域外数据集上验证了 Pest-Thinker 在形态理解上的显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖专家标注数据，扩展性受限。
未提及在真实农业场景中的部署效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Pest-Thinker 框架，通过强化学习让多模态大模型像昆虫学家一样推理害虫形态。

papers.title: Policy-Guided Stepwise Model Routing for Cost-Effective Reasoning
papers.abstract: Inference-time computation has greatly enhanced the performance of large language models (LLMs) on challenging reasoning tasks, but this strategy can incur high inference costs. One solution is to route intermediate chain-of-thought (CoT) states to language models of different sizes; however, existing approaches rely on handcrafted routing strategies that limit performance, or on training large process reward models that may be infeasible in many applications. We formulate stepwise model routing as a constrained decision-making problem, which we solve by training a small control policy using reinforcement learning in conjunction with threshold calibration to tune the performance-efficiency tradeoff. We validate our method on three math benchmarks (GSM8K, MATH500, and OmniMath) on both open and closed models. Our method consistently improves the accuracy-cost tradeoff compared to handcrafted approaches, while achieving a comparable tradeoff to methods that require training large process reward models.

analysis.tldr: 用强化学习训练小控制策略，实现分步模型路由，在推理时平衡准确率和成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 推理时计算提升了LLM在复杂推理任务上的性能，但高推理成本成为瓶颈；现有路由方法依赖手工策略或训练大型过程奖励模型，前者性能受限，后者在应用中可能不可行。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖手工规则或大型过程奖励模型的前提下，实现成本有效的分步模型路由，以平衡推理准确率和计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将分步模型路由建模为约束决策问题，使用强化学习训练一个小型控制策略，并结合阈值校准来调节性能-效率权衡。
contributions: 提出将分步模型路由形式化为约束决策问题，并用强化学习求解。
训练小型控制策略，避免依赖大型过程奖励模型，同时通过阈值校准灵活控制成本-准确率权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在GSM8K、MATH500和OmniMath三个数学基准上，使用开源和闭源模型进行验证，方法在准确率-成本权衡上一致优于手工策略，并与需要训练大型过程奖励模型的方法达到可比权衡。
limitations: 仅针对数学推理任务验证，泛化到其他推理任务有待探索。
控制策略的训练可能对奖励函数设计敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用强化学习训练小控制策略，实现分步模型路由，在推理时平衡准确率和成本。

papers.title: CrossCult-KIBench: A Benchmark for Cross-Cultural Knowledge Insertion in MLLMs
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), trained primarily on English-centric data, frequently generate culturally inappropriate or misaligned responses in cross-cultural settings. To mitigate this, we introduce the task of cross-cultural knowledge insertion, which focuses on adapting models to specific cultural contexts while preserving their original behavior in other cultures. To facilitate research in this area, we introduce CrossCult-KIBench, a comprehensive evaluation benchmark for assessing both the effectiveness of knowledge insertion and its unintended side effects on non-target cultures. The benchmark includes 9,800 image-grounded cases covering 49 culturally relevant visual scenarios across English, Chinese, and Arabic language-culture groups. It supports evaluation in both single-insert and sequential-insert settings. We also propose Memory-Conditioned Knowledge Insertion (MCKI) as a baseline method. MCKI retrieves relevant cultural knowledge from an external memory using frozen MLLM representations, prepending matched entries as conditional prompts when applicable. Extensive experiments on CrossCult-KIBench reveal that current approaches struggle to balance effective cultural adaptation with behavioral preservation, highlighting a key challenge in developing culturally-aware MLLMs. Our work thus underscores an important research direction for developing more culturally adaptive and responsible MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨文化知识插入基准CrossCult-KIBench，评估MLLM在特定文化适应与行为保持间的平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型（MLLM）主要基于英语数据训练，在跨文化场景中常生成不适当或不对齐的响应，亟需方法使其适应特定文化语境同时保持其他文化下的原有行为。
analysis.problem: 如何有效评估MLLM在跨文化知识插入中的文化适应效果及其对非目标文化的副作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法难以平衡有效的文化适应与行为保持，在单次插入和顺序插入设置下均表现不佳。
analysis.method: 提出CrossCult-KIBench基准（含9800个图像案例，覆盖英语、中文、阿拉伯语三种语言文化组的49个文化视觉场景），并设计Memory-Conditioned Knowledge Insertion (MCKI)基线方法，从外部记忆检索相关文化知识，作为条件提示插入。
contributions: 定义跨文化知识插入任务，并构建包含9800个案例的评估基准CrossCult-KIBench
提出MCKI基线方法，利用冻结MLLM表征从外部记忆检索文化知识
通过实验揭示当前方法在文化适应与行为保持间的权衡挑战
analysis.experiments: 在CrossCult-KIBench上对多种方法进行实验，评估单次插入和顺序插入设置下的效果，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖三种语言文化组，可能无法泛化到更多文化
MCKI基线方法可能依赖外部记忆质量，且未与其他复杂方法充分对比
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨文化知识插入基准CrossCult-KIBench，评估MLLM在特定文化适应与行为保持间的平衡。

papers.title: Dynamic Pondering Sparsity-aware Mixture-of-Experts Transformer for Event Stream based Visual Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Despite significant progress, RGB-based trackers remain vulnerable to challenging imaging conditions, such as low illumination and fast motion. Event cameras offer a promising alternative by asynchronously capturing pixel-wise brightness changes, providing high dynamic range and high temporal resolution. However, existing event-based trackers often neglect the intrinsic spatial sparsity and temporal density of event data, while relying on a single fixed temporal-window sampling strategy that is suboptimal under varying motion dynamics. In this paper, we propose an event sparsity-aware tracking framework that explicitly models event-density variations across multiple temporal scales. Specifically, the proposed framework progressively injects sparse, medium-density, and dense event search regions into a three-stage Vision Transformer backbone, enabling hierarchical multi-density feature learning. Furthermore, we introduce a sparsity-aware Mixture-of-Experts module to encourage expert specialization under different sparsity patterns, and design a dynamic pondering strategy to adaptively adjust the inference depth according to tracking difficulty. Extensive experiments on FE240hz, COESOT, and EventVOT demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves a favorable trade-off between tracking accuracy and computational efficiency. The source code will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/OpenEvTracking.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种稀疏感知的混合专家Transformer，通过多尺度事件密度建模和动态推理深度调整，提升事件流视觉目标跟踪的精度与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: RGB跟踪器在低光照、快速运动等挑战条件下易失效，事件相机具有高动态范围和高时间分辨率的优势，但现有事件跟踪器忽视事件数据的空间稀疏性和时间密度变化，且采用固定时间窗口采样策略，难以适应动态运动场景。
analysis.problem: 如何利用事件数据的稀疏性和密度变化，设计一个能自适应调整推理深度并实现多密度特征学习的跟踪框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 事件数据具有内在的空间稀疏性和时间密度变化，固定时间窗口采样在运动动态变化时次优。
analysis.method: 提出事件稀疏感知跟踪框架，包含：1）多尺度事件密度注入：将稀疏、中密度、密集事件搜索区域渐进输入三阶段Vision Transformer；2）稀疏感知混合专家模块：针对不同稀疏模式促进专家专业化；3）动态沉思策略：根据跟踪难度自适应调整推理深度。
contributions: 提出事件稀疏感知跟踪框架，显式建模多时间尺度的事件密度变化。
设计稀疏感知混合专家模块和动态沉思策略，实现专家专业化与自适应推理深度。
analysis.experiments: 在FE240hz、COESOT和EventVOT数据集上实验，表明方法在跟踪精度和计算效率之间取得了良好平衡。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定事件表示格式，泛化性需验证。
动态沉思策略的额外开销未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种稀疏感知的混合专家Transformer，通过多尺度事件密度建模和动态推理深度调整，提升事件流视觉目标跟踪的精度与效率。

papers.title: Schedule-and-Calibrate: Utility-Guided Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning for Code LLMs
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards has proven effective at post-training LLMs for coding, yet deploying separate task-specific specialists incurs costs that scale with the number of tasks, motivating a unified multi-task RL (MTRL) approach. However, existing MTRL methods treat all coding tasks uniformly, relying on fixed data curricula under a shared optimization strategy, ultimately limiting the effectiveness of multi-task training. To address these limitations, we propose ASTOR, a multi-tASk code reinforcement learning framework via uTility-driven coORdination. Centered on task utility, a signal capturing each task learning potential and cross-task synergy, ASTOR comprises two coupled modules: 1) Hierarchical Utility-Routed Data Scheduling module hierarchically allocates training budget and prioritizes informative prompts, steering training toward the most valuable data and 2) Adaptive Utility-Calibrated Policy Optimization module dynamically scales per-task KL regularization, matching update constraints to each tasks current training state. Experiments on two widely-used LLMs across four representative coding tasks demonstrate that ASTOR consistently improves a single model across all tasks, outperforming the best task-specific specialist by 9.0%-9.5% and surpassing the strongest MTRL baseline by 7.5%-12.8%.

analysis.tldr: 提出ASTOR框架，通过任务效用驱动的数据调度和策略优化，实现多任务代码强化学习，显著提升单一模型在多个编码任务上的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代码LLM后训练中，为每个任务部署独立专家模型成本高昂，而统一的多任务强化学习方法对所有任务一视同仁，使用固定数据课程和共享优化策略，限制了多任务训练效果。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的多任务强化学习框架，使单一模型在多个编码任务上均能超越任务专用专家模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ASTOR框架，包含两个耦合模块：1) 层次化效用路由数据调度模块，分层分配训练预算并优先选择信息量大的提示；2) 自适应效用校准策略优化模块，动态调整每个任务的KL正则化强度。
contributions: 提出任务效用概念，用于捕捉每个任务的学习潜力和跨任务协同效应。
设计层次化数据调度和自适应策略优化模块，实现效用驱动的多任务协调。
在四个代表性编码任务上，ASTOR使单一模型性能超越最佳任务专用专家9.0%-9.5%，并超过最强多任务基线7.5%-12.8%。
analysis.experiments: 在两个广泛使用的LLM上，针对四个代表性编码任务进行实验，ASTOR一致提升单一模型在所有任务上的表现。
limitations: 可能对任务效用估计的准确性敏感。
未讨论在更多任务或更大规模模型上的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ASTOR框架，通过任务效用驱动的数据调度和策略优化，实现多任务代码强化学习，显著提升单一模型在多个编码任务上的性能。

papers.title: On Time, Within Budget: Constraint-Driven Online Resource Allocation for Agentic Workflows
papers.abstract: Agentic systems increasingly solve complex user requests by executing orchestrated workflows, where subtasks are assigned to specialized models or tools and coordinated according to their dependencies. While recent work improves agent efficiency by optimizing the performance--cost--latency frontier, real deployments often impose concrete requirements: a workflow must be completed within a specified budget and before a specified deadline. This shifts the goal from average efficiency optimization to maximizing the probability that the entire workflow completes successfully under explicit budget and deadline constraints. We study \emph{constraint-driven online resource allocation for agentic workflows}. Given a dependency-structured workflow and estimates of success rates and generation lengths for each subtask--model pair, the executor dynamically allocates models and parallel samples across simultaneously executable subtasks while managing the remaining budget and time. We formulate this setting as a finite-horizon stochastic online allocation problem and propose \emph{Monte Carlo Portfolio Planning} (MCPP), a lightweight closed-loop planner that directly estimates constrained completion probability through simulated workflow executions and replans after observed outcomes. Experiments on CodeFlow and ProofFlow demonstrate that MCPP consistently improves constrained completion probability over strong baselines across a wide range of budget--deadline constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出MCPP方法，通过蒙特卡洛模拟和闭环重规划，在预算和截止时间约束下优化Agent工作流的资源分配。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agent效率优化主要关注平均性能-成本-延迟权衡，但实际部署常面临明确的预算和截止时间约束，需要最大化工作流在约束下成功完成的概率。
analysis.problem: 在给定依赖结构的工作流中，如何动态分配模型和并行样本给可同时执行的子任务，以在剩余预算和时间内最大化整体完成概率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将问题建模为有限时域随机在线分配问题，提出蒙特卡洛组合规划（MCPP），一种轻量级闭环规划器，通过模拟工作流执行直接估计约束完成概率，并在观察到结果后重新规划。
contributions: 形式化定义了约束驱动的在线资源分配问题用于Agent工作流。
提出MCPP方法，有效提升在预算和截止时间约束下的完成概率。
analysis.experiments: 在CodeFlow和ProofFlow基准上，MCPP在多种预算-截止时间约束下持续优于强基线。
limitations: 依赖子任务-模型对的成功率和生成长度估计，实际中可能不准确。
仅考虑线性依赖结构，更复杂的工作流可能需扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MCPP方法，通过蒙特卡洛模拟和闭环重规划，在预算和截止时间约束下优化Agent工作流的资源分配。

papers.title: Shallow Prefill, Deep Decoding: Efficient Long-Context Inference via Layer-Asymmetric KV Visibility
papers.abstract: Long-context inference in decoder-only language models is costly because long prompts are processed during Prefill, cached at every layer, and repeatedly attended to during autoregressive Decode. We introduce \emph{Shallow Prefill, dEEp Decode} (SPEED), a phase-asymmetric KV-visibility policy that materializes non-anchor prompt-token KV states only in lower layers while keeping Decode-phase tokens full-depth. Unlike previous approaches that make upper-layer prompt KV states cheaper to store or construct, SPEED removes prefill tokens from the upper-layer Decode visibility set altogether. With a minimal BoS anchor, this simple change preserves broad benchmark quality while reducing long-context cost. In a controlled Llama-3.1-8B instruction-tuning study, SPEED using only 75\% of layers for prefill tokens reaches 51.2 average score on OLMES-style benchmarks, compared with 51.4 for the full-depth baseline, while improving TTFT by 33\%, TPOT by 22\%, and reducing active KV memory by 25.0\% at 128K context. Layer-wise diagnostics suggest that this cutoff retains the main prompt-selection and representation-stabilization regions of the full-depth model.
