These results show that long-context prompt tokens need not always persist as full-depth KV-cache objects when Decode-phase tokens remain full-depth.

analysis.tldr: 提出SPEED方法，在长上下文推理中仅在下层保留提示词KV缓存，上层完全移除，显著降低计算和内存开销，同时保持模型质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文推理中，解码器仅语言模型处理长提示词时，Prefill阶段计算量大，且所有层的KV缓存被反复访问，导致高延迟和内存消耗。现有方法试图压缩上层KV缓存，但仍有存储和构造开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著牺牲模型质量的前提下，减少长上下文推理中提示词KV缓存的计算和内存成本？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但通过层诊断发现，下层保留了提示词选择和表示稳定化的关键区域，上层移除提示词KV对质量影响小。
analysis.method: 提出SPEED，一种阶段非对称的KV可见性策略：Prefill阶段仅在下层（如75%的层）保留非锚点提示词KV状态，Decode阶段所有层保留完整token KV；上层Decode时完全忽略提示词token。
contributions: 提出SPEED策略，在Decode阶段上层完全移除提示词KV，而非压缩或构造，简化实现并降低开销。
在Llama-3.1-8B上验证，使用75%层时，OLMES基准平均分51.2（基线51.4），TTFT降低33%，TPOT降低22%，活跃KV内存减少25.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama-3.1-8B指令微调模型上进行控制实验，使用OLMES风格基准评估，测量TTFT、TPOT和活跃KV内存。摘要未提供具体实验结果细节。
limitations: 仅验证了8B模型，更大模型或不同架构的效果未知。
锚点token的选择策略可能影响性能，未深入探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SPEED方法，在长上下文推理中仅在下层保留提示词KV缓存，上层完全移除，显著降低计算和内存开销，同时保持模型质量。

papers.title: Beyond Autoregressive RTG: Conditioning via Injection Outside Sequential Modeling in Decision Transformer
papers.abstract: Decision Transformer (DT) formulates offline reinforcement learning as autoregressive sequence modeling, achieving promising results by predicting actions from a sequence of Return-to-Go (RTG), state, and action tokens. However, RTG is a scalar that summarizes future rewards, containing far less information than typical state or action vectors, yet it consumes the same computational budget per token. Worse, the self-attention cost of Transformers grows quadratically with sequence length, so including RTG as a separate token adds unnecessary overhead. We propose SlimDT, which removes RTG from the autoregressive sequence. Instead, we inject RTG information into the state representations before the sequential modeling step, allowing the Transformer to process only a compact (state, action) sequence. This reduces the sequence length by one-third, directly improving inference efficiency. On the D4RL benchmark, SlimDT surpasses standard DT across various tasks and achieves performance comparable to existing state-of-the-art methods. Decoupling a sparse conditioning signal from an information-rich sequence thus yields both computational gains and higher task performance.

analysis.tldr: SlimDT 将 RTG 从自回归序列中移除并注入状态表示，缩短序列长度，提升决策 Transformer 的推理效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 决策 Transformer 中 RTG 作为标量信息量少却占用与状态/动作向量相同的计算预算，且自注意力复杂度随序列长度二次增长，导致不必要的计算开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不损失性能的前提下，减少决策 Transformer 的序列长度以提升推理效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RTG 是标量，信息量远少于状态或动作向量，但作为独立 token 参与自回归建模，增加了序列长度和计算成本。
analysis.method: SlimDT：将 RTG 信息注入状态表示中，然后仅对（状态，动作）序列进行自回归建模，从而将序列长度减少三分之一。
contributions: 提出 SlimDT，通过将 RTG 注入状态表示而非作为独立 token，缩短序列长度，提升推理效率。
在 D4RL 基准上，SlimDT 超越标准 DT，并达到与现有最先进方法相当的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 D4RL 基准上评估，SlimDT 在多种任务上超越标准 DT，并与现有最先进方法性能相当。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 RTG 作为条件信号的场景，泛化性待验证。
注入方式可能引入额外设计选择，需进一步探索最优策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SlimDT 将 RTG 从自回归序列中移除并注入状态表示，缩短序列长度，提升决策 Transformer 的推理效率与性能。

papers.title: CredibleDFGO: Differentiable Factor Graph Optimization with Credibility Supervision
papers.abstract: Global navigation satellite system (GNSS) positioning is widely used for urban navigation, but the covariance reported by the GNSS solver is often unreliable in urban canyons. Existing differentiable factor graph optimization (DFGO) methods already learn measurement weighting through the solver, but they still use position-only objectives. As a result, the mean estimate may improve while the reported covariance remains too small, too large, or wrong in shape. In this work, we propose CredibleDFGO (CDFGO), a differentiable GNSS factor graph framework that makes covariance credibility an explicit training target. The Weighting Generation Network (WGN) predicts per-satellite reliability weights. The differentiable Gauss--Newton solver maps these weights to a position estimate and posterior covariance, and proper scoring rules supervise the East--North predictive distribution end-to-end. We study negative log-likelihood (NLL), Energy Score (ES), and their combination. Results on three UrbanNav test scenes show consistent gains in uncertainty credibility. Positioning accuracy also improves on the medium-urban and harsh-urban scenes, and the mean horizontal error and 95th-percentile error improve on the deep-urban scene. On the harsh-urban Mong Kok (MK) scene, CDFGO-Combined reduces the mean horizontal error from 13.77\,m to 11.68\,m, reduces NLL from 40.63 to 6.59, and reduces ES from 12.31 to 9.05. The case studies link the MK improvement to better axis-wise consistency, more credible local covariance ellipses, and satellite-level reweighting.

analysis.tldr: 提出CredibleDFGO，通过可微因子图优化和可信度监督，提升城市峡谷中GNSS定位的协方差可信度与精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市峡谷中GNSS解算器报告的协方差不可靠，现有可微因子图优化方法仅以位置为目标，导致协方差估计不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何使GNSS定位的协方差估计更可信，同时提升定位精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CredibleDFGO框架，包含权重生成网络预测每颗卫星的可靠性权重，可微Gauss-Newton解算器将权重映射为位置估计和后验协方差，并用适当评分规则（NLL、ES及其组合）端到端监督东-北预测分布。
contributions: 首次将协方差可信度作为显式训练目标引入可微因子图优化。
提出权重生成网络和端到端训练框架，在多个城市峡谷场景中提升不确定性可信度和定位精度。
analysis.experiments: 在三个UrbanNav测试场景上评估，结果显示不确定性可信度一致提升；中度和恶劣城市场景定位精度提升，深度城市场景平均水平误差和95百分位误差改善。具体在恶劣城市MK场景，平均水平误差从13.77m降至11.68m，NLL从40.63降至6.59，ES从12.31降至9.05。
limitations: 可能仅适用于GNSS定位领域，泛化性未知。
未讨论计算开销或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CredibleDFGO，通过可微因子图优化和可信度监督，提升城市峡谷中GNSS定位的协方差可信度与精度。

papers.title: Uncovering Entity Identity Confusion in Multimodal Knowledge Editing
papers.abstract: Multimodal knowledge editing (MKE) aims to correct the internal knowledge of large vision-language models after deployment, yet the behavioral patterns of post-edit models remain underexplored. In this paper, we identify a systemic failure mode in edited models, termed Entity Identity Confusion (EIC): edited models exhibit an absurd behavior where text-only queries about the original entity's identity unexpectedly return information about the new entity. To rigorously investigate EIC, we construct EC-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark that directly probes how image-entity bindings shift before and after editing. Our analysis reveals that EIC stems from existing methods failing to distinguish between Image-Entity (I-E) binding and Entity-Entity (E-E) relational knowledge in the model, causing models to overfit E-E associations as a shortcut: the image is still perceived as the original entity, with the new entity's name serving only as a spurious identity label. We further explore potential mitigation strategies, showing that constraining edits to the model's I-E processing stage encourages edits to act more faithfully on I-E binding, thereby substantially reducing EIC. Based on these findings, we discuss principled desiderata for faithful MKE and provide methodological guidance for future research.

analysis.tldr: 多模态知识编辑后模型出现实体身份混淆，表现为纯文本查询返回新实体信息，根源在于模型混淆了图像-实体绑定与实体-实体关系知识。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态知识编辑旨在修正大视觉语言模型部署后的内部知识，但编辑后模型的行为模式尚未被充分探索，存在系统性失败模式。
analysis.problem: 编辑后的模型出现实体身份混淆（EIC），即纯文本查询原始实体时错误返回新实体信息，需要诊断其成因并探索缓解策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: EIC源于现有方法未能区分图像-实体（I-E）绑定和实体-实体（E-E）关系知识，导致模型将E-E关联作为捷径过拟合：图像仍被视为原始实体，新实体名称仅作为虚假身份标签。
analysis.method: 构建诊断基准EC-Bench，分析编辑前后图像-实体绑定的变化；提出将编辑约束在模型的I-E处理阶段以减轻EIC。
contributions: 识别并命名了多模态知识编辑中的实体身份混淆（EIC）失败模式
构建EC-Bench诊断基准用于量化EIC
揭示EIC的成因并提出缓解策略，为忠实MKE提供原则性指导
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缓解策略可能仅适用于特定模型架构或编辑方法
EC-Bench可能未覆盖所有类型的实体身份混淆
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态知识编辑后模型出现实体身份混淆，表现为纯文本查询返回新实体信息，根源在于模型混淆了图像-实体绑定与实体-实体关系知识。

papers.title: Metonymy in vision models undermines attention-based interpretability
papers.abstract: Part-based reasoning is a classical strategy to make a computer vision model directly focus on the object parts that are relevant to the downstream task. In the context of deep learning, this also serves to improve by-design interpretability, often by using part-centric attention mechanisms on top of a latent image representation provided by a standard, black-box model. This approach is based on a locality assumption: that the latent representation of an object part encodes primarily information about the corresponding image region. In this work, we test this basic assumption, measuring intra-object leakage in vision models using part-based attribute annotations. Through a comprehensive experimental evaluation, we show that modern pretrained vision transformers violate the locality assumption and exhibit a strong intra-object leakage, in which each part encodes information from the whole object, a visual metonymy that compromises the faithfulness of attention-based interpretable-by-design methods for part-based reasoning, ultimately rendering them uninterpretable. In addition, we establish an upper bound using a two-stage approach that prevents leakage by design. We then show that this inherently disentangled feature extraction improves attribute-driven part discovery on a variety of tasks, confirming the practical impact of intra-object leakage. Our results uncover a neglected issue affecting the interpretability of part-based representations, such as those in CBMs relying on part-centric concepts, highlighting that two-stage approaches offer a promising way to mitigate it.

analysis.tldr: 现代视觉Transformer存在物体内部信息泄漏（转喻现象），破坏了基于注意力的可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于部件的推理是提升视觉模型可解释性的经典策略，但现有方法依赖局部性假设（部件表征仅编码对应区域信息），该假设是否成立缺乏验证。
analysis.problem: 验证视觉模型中物体内部信息泄漏（intra-object leakage）的存在性及其对基于注意力的可解释性方法的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现现代预训练视觉Transformer违反局部性假设，每个部件编码了整个物体的信息，即视觉转喻（visual metonymy），导致基于注意力的可解释方法不可靠。
analysis.method: 通过部件属性标注测量泄漏程度，并提出两阶段方法（先提取解耦特征再学习部件注意力）来防止泄漏。
contributions: 首次系统验证视觉Transformer中存在物体内部信息泄漏（视觉转喻），揭示其对基于注意力的可解释性的危害。
提出两阶段方法作为泄漏的上界，证明解耦特征提取能提升部件发现任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上使用部件属性标注进行综合实验，验证泄漏现象并展示两阶段方法的有效性。
limitations: 两阶段方法可能增加计算复杂度。
泄漏现象是否存在于其他架构（如CNN）未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 现代视觉Transformer存在物体内部信息泄漏（转喻现象），破坏了基于注意力的可解释性。

papers.title: VISD: Enhancing Video Reasoning via Structured Self-Distillation
papers.abstract: Training VideoLLMs for complex reasoning remains challenging due to sparse sequence level rewards and the lack of fine grained credit assignment over long, temporally grounded reasoning trajectories. While reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) provides reliable supervision, it fails to capture token level contributions, leading to inefficient learning. Conversely, existing self distillation methods offer dense supervision but lack structure and diagnostic specificity, and often interact unstably with reinforcement learning. In this work, we propose VISD, a structured self distillation framework that introduces diagnostically meaningful privileged information for video reasoning. VISD employs a video aware judge model to decompose reasoning quality into multiple dimensions, including answer correctness, logical consistency, and spatio-temporal grounding, and uses this structured feedback to guide a teacher policy for token level supervision. To stably integrate dense supervision with RL, we introduce a direction magnitude decoupling mechanism, where rollout level advantages computed from rewards determine update direction, while structured privileged signals modulate token level update magnitudes. This design enables semantically aligned and fine grained credit assignment, improving both reasoning faithfulness and training efficiency. Additionally, VISD incorporates curriculum scheduling and EMA based teacher stabilization to support robust optimization over long video sequences. Experiments on diverse benchmarks show that VISD consistently outperforms strong baselines, improving answer accuracy and spatio temporal grounding quality. Notably, VISD reaches these gains with nearly 2x faster convergence in optimization steps, highlighting the effectiveness of structured self supervision in improving both performance and sample efficiency for VideoLLMs.

analysis.tldr: VISD通过结构化自蒸馏框架，利用多维诊断性特权信号提升视频推理的准确性和时空定位质量，并实现近2倍收敛加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频大模型（VideoLLMs）在复杂推理任务中面临序列级奖励稀疏和细粒度信用分配缺失的问题，现有强化学习（RLVR）无法捕捉token级贡献，而自蒸馏方法缺乏结构性和诊断特异性，且与RL结合不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何为视频推理提供细粒度、结构化的密集监督信号，并稳定地整合到强化学习框架中，以提升推理准确性和训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出RLVR无法进行token级信用分配导致学习低效，现有自蒸馏方法缺乏结构且与RL交互不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出VISD框架，包含：1）视频感知评判模型将推理质量分解为答案正确性、逻辑一致性和时空定位等多维度；2）方向-幅度解耦机制，用奖励决定更新方向，结构化特权信号调节token级更新幅度；3）课程调度和EMA教师稳定化策略。
contributions: 提出结构化自蒸馏框架VISD，引入多维诊断性特权信号用于视频推理的细粒度信用分配。
设计方向-幅度解耦机制，稳定整合密集监督与强化学习。
在多个基准上提升答案准确性和时空定位质量，实现近2倍收敛加速。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视频推理基准上评估，VISD一致优于强基线，提升答案准确性和时空定位质量，且收敛速度提升近2倍。
limitations: 依赖视频感知评判模型的质量，可能引入额外偏差。
框架复杂度较高，需要多维度反馈的预定义。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VISD通过结构化自蒸馏框架，利用多维诊断性特权信号提升视频推理的准确性和时空定位质量，并实现近2倍收敛加速。

papers.title: Boosting Self-Supervised Tracking with Contextual Prompts and Noise Learning
papers.abstract: Learning robust contextual knowledge from unlabeled videos is essential for advancing self-supervised tracking. However, conventional self-supervised trackers lack effective context modeling, while existing context association methods based on non-semantic queries struggle to adapt to unlabeled tracking scenarios, making it difficult to learn reliable contextual cues. In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised tracking framework, named \textbf{\tracker}, which introduces a dual-modal context association mechanism that jointly leverages fine-grained semantic prompts and contextual noise to drive the model toward learning robust tracking representations. Adherent to the easy-to-hard learning principle, our contextual association mechanism operates based on two stages. During early training, instance patch tokens (prompts) are assigned to both forward and backward tracking branches to facilitate the acquisition of tracking knowledge. As training progresses, contextual noise is gradually injected into the model to perturb feature, encouraging the tracker to learn robust tracking representations in a more complex feature space. Thus, this novel contextual association mechanism enables our self-supervised model to learn high-quality tracking representations from unlabeled videos, while being applied exclusively during training to preserve efficient inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method.

analysis.tldr: 提出双模态上下文关联机制，结合语义提示和噪声学习提升自监督跟踪的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督跟踪缺乏有效的上下文建模，现有基于非语义查询的上下文关联方法难以适应无标签场景，导致无法学习可靠上下文线索。
analysis.problem: 如何从无标签视频中学习鲁棒的上下文知识以提升自监督跟踪性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双模态上下文关联机制，早期训练使用实例补丁令牌（提示）促进跟踪知识获取，后期逐步注入上下文噪声扰动特征，遵循由易到难原则。
contributions: 提出一种新颖的自监督跟踪框架，引入双模态上下文关联机制。
设计基于语义提示和噪声学习的渐进式训练策略，提升跟踪表示鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视频数据集特性。
噪声注入策略的通用性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双模态上下文关联机制，结合语义提示和噪声学习提升自监督跟踪的鲁棒性。

papers.title: OpenGaFF: Open-Vocabulary Gaussian Feature Field with Codebook Attention
papers.abstract: Understanding open-vocabulary 3D scenes with Gaussian-based representations remains challenging due to fragmented and spatially inconsistent semantic predictions across multi-view observations. In this paper, we present OpenGaFF, a novel framework for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding built upon 3D Gaussian Splatting. At the core of our method is a Gaussian Feature Field that models semantics as a continuous function of Gaussian geometry and appearance. By explicitly conditioning semantic predictions on geometric structure, this formulation strengthens the coupling between geometry and semantics, leading to improved spatial coherence across similar structures in 3D space. To further enforce object-level semantic consistency, we introduce a structured codebook that serves as a set of shared semantic primitives. Furthermore, a codebook-guided attention mechanism is proposed to retrieve language features via similarity matching between query embeddings and learned codebook entries, enabling robust open-vocabulary reasoning while reducing intra-object feature variance. Extensive experiments on standard 2D and 3D open-vocabulary benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms prior approaches, achieving improved segmentation quality, stronger 3D semantic consistency and a semantically interpretable codebook that provides insight into the learned representation.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于3D高斯溅射的开放词汇场景理解框架，通过高斯特征场和码本注意力增强语义一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于高斯的开放词汇3D场景理解方法在多视图观测下产生碎片化且空间不一致的语义预测，限制了性能。
analysis.problem: 如何实现空间一致且对象级语义一致的开放词汇3D场景理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多视图观测下语义预测碎片化和空间不一致，以及对象内特征方差大的问题。
analysis.method: 构建高斯特征场，将语义建模为高斯几何和外观的连续函数；引入结构化码本作为共享语义基元，并通过码本引导的注意力机制检索语言特征。
contributions: 提出高斯特征场，显式将语义预测条件于几何结构，增强几何与语义的耦合，提升空间一致性。
引入码本引导的注意力机制，通过相似性匹配检索语言特征，实现鲁棒的开放词汇推理并降低对象内特征方差。
analysis.experiments: 在标准2D和3D开放词汇基准上实验，方法在分割质量、3D语义一致性和码本可解释性上优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量3D高斯重建。
码本规模对性能的影响未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于3D高斯溅射的开放词汇场景理解框架，通过高斯特征场和码本注意力增强语义一致性。

papers.title: Safety Certification is Classification
papers.abstract: The goal of this paper is certifying safety of dynamical systems subject to uncertainty. Existing approaches use trajectory data to estimate transition probabilities, and compute safety probabilities recursively via dynamic programming (DP). This recursion may lead to compounding errors in the certified safety probability, thus collapsing to a vacuous lower bound for growing horizons $T$. We propose a kernel embedding framework that treats safety certification as a classification problem on trajectory data, directly estimating the $T$-step safety probability without recursion. We show that the framework subsumes well-established approaches from the literature (e.g., barrier certificates, robust Markov models) as special cases, and allows us to go beyond their limitations. As the main consequence, it bypasses compounding error across the horizon and enables certification for systems with non-Markovian dynamics. We demonstrate that direct estimators remain stable independent of the certification horizon and in the non-Markovian setting, whilst DP-based certificates silently go unsound -- confirmed in simulation on a neural-controlled quadrotor.

analysis.tldr: 将安全认证转化为分类问题，避免动态规划递归误差，支持非马尔可夫系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有动态规划方法在安全概率认证中因递归导致误差累积，随时间步长增加而失效，且无法处理非马尔可夫动力学。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用递归的情况下直接估计多步安全概率，避免复合误差并适用于非马尔可夫系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出DP方法在长时域下安全概率下界退化为平凡值，且对非马尔可夫系统不适用；直接估计器则保持稳定。
analysis.method: 提出核嵌入框架，将安全认证视为轨迹数据的分类问题，直接估计T步安全概率，无需递归。
contributions: 提出将安全认证转化为分类问题的核嵌入框架，直接估计安全概率。
证明该框架统一了现有方法（如屏障证书、鲁棒马尔可夫模型），并克服其局限性。
在非马尔可夫动力学和长时域下保持稳定，而DP方法失效。
analysis.experiments: 在神经控制的四旋翼仿真中验证，直接估计器稳定且DP证书无声失效。
limitations: 可能依赖核函数选择，影响估计精度。
未讨论高维状态空间下的可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将安全认证转化为分类问题，避免动态规划递归误差，支持非马尔可夫系统。

papers.title: LARGO: Low-Rank Hypernetwork for Handling Missing Modalities
papers.abstract: Addressing missing modalities is an important challenge in multimodal image analysis and often relies on complex architectures that do not transfer easily to different datasets without architectural modifications or hyperparameter tuning. While most existing methods tackle this problem in feature space by engineering representations that are robust to missing inputs, we instead operate in weight space. We propose LARGO, a hypernetwork that compresses the $2^N-1$ dedicated missing-modality models into a single network by modelling the convolutional weights using the Canonical Polyadic (CP) tensor decomposition. Extensive experimental validation on BraTS 2018 (4 modalities, 15 scenarios) and ISLES 2022 (3 modalities, 7 scenarios) shows that our method ranks first in 47 out of 52 configurations, achieving average Dice improvements of +0.68$\%$ and +2.53$\%$ over state-of-the-art baselines (mmFormer, M$^{3}$AE, ShaSpec, SimMLM). A proof-of-concept experiment on avMNIST suggests that LARGO may extend beyond medical imaging to heterogeneous non-medical modalities.

analysis.tldr: LARGO 通过超网络和 CP 分解将缺失模态的专用模型压缩为单一网络，在脑肿瘤和卒中分割任务上取得 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态图像分析中缺失模态是常见挑战，现有方法多在特征空间设计鲁棒表示，但需要复杂架构且难以跨数据集迁移。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改架构或超参数的情况下，用一个统一模型处理任意模态缺失场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 LARGO 超网络，利用 CP 张量分解建模卷积权重，将 2^N-1 个专用缺失模态模型压缩为单一网络。
contributions: 提出在权重空间而非特征空间处理缺失模态的新范式。
利用 CP 分解实现高效超网络，在 BraTS 2018 和 ISLES 2022 上平均 Dice 分别提升 +0.68% 和 +2.53%。
analysis.experiments: 在 BraTS 2018（4 模态，15 场景）和 ISLES 2022（3 模态，7 场景）上验证，在 52 个配置中 47 个排名第一，并在 avMNIST 上展示跨领域潜力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于卷积架构，对 Transformer 等需额外适配。
CP 分解的秩选择可能影响性能，需手动设定。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LARGO 通过超网络和 CP 分解将缺失模态的专用模型压缩为单一网络，在脑肿瘤和卒中分割任务上取得 SOTA。

papers.title: AMIEOD: Adaptive Multi-Experts Image Enhancement for Object Detection in Low-Illumination Scenes
papers.abstract: In multimedia application scenarios, images captured under low-illumination conditions often lead to lower accuracy in visual perception tasks compared to those taken in well-lit environments. To tackle this challenge, we propose AMIEOD, an image enhancement-enabled object detection framework for low-illumination scenes, where the two tasks are jointly optimized in a detection performance-oriented manner. Specifically, to fully exploit the information in poorly lit images, a Multi-Experts Image Enhancement Module (MEIEM) is proposed, which leverages diverse enhancement strategies. On this basis, aiming to better align the MEIEM with the detection task, we propose a Detection-Guided Regression Loss (DGRL) that utilizes the detection result to decide the regression target. Moreover, to dynamically select the most suitable enhancement strategy from MEIEM during inference, we construct an Expert Selection Module (ESM) guided by the proposed Detection-Guided Cross-Entropy (DGCE) loss, which formulates the optimization of ESM as a classification task. The improved method is well-matched with current detection algorithms to improve their performance in dim scenes. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that the proposed method significantly improves object detection accuracy in low-illumination conditions. Our code has been released at https://github.com/scujayfantasy/AMIEOD

analysis.tldr: 提出AMIEOD框架，通过多专家图像增强和检测引导损失联合优化低光照目标检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光照条件下图像质量差导致目标检测精度显著下降，现有方法未充分联合优化增强与检测任务。
analysis.problem: 如何设计面向检测性能的图像增强方法，以提升低光照场景下的目标检测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AMIEOD框架，包含多专家图像增强模块（MEIEM）、检测引导回归损失（DGRL）和专家选择模块（ESM），通过检测引导交叉熵损失（DGCE）优化专家选择。
contributions: 提出面向检测性能的低光照图像增强框架AMIEOD，联合优化增强与检测。
设计多专家图像增强模块和检测引导损失，实现自适应策略选择。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，表明方法显著提升低光照目标检测精度。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定检测算法，泛化性需验证。
多专家模块增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AMIEOD框架，通过多专家图像增强和检测引导损失联合优化低光照目标检测。

papers.title: Revisiting Uncertainty: On Evidential Learning for Partially Relevant Video Retrieval
papers.abstract: Partially relevant video retrieval aims to retrieve untrimmed videos using text queries that describe only partial content. However, the inherent asymmetry between brief queries and rich video content inevitably introduces uncertainty into the retrieval process. In this setting, vague queries often induce semantic ambiguity across videos, a challenge that is further exacerbated by the sparse temporal supervision within videos, which fails to provide sufficient matching evidence. To address this, we propose Holmes, a hierarchical evidential learning framework that aggregates multi-granular cross-modal evidence to quantify and model uncertainty explicitly. At the inter-video level, similarity scores are interpreted as evidential support and modeled via a Dirichlet distribution. Based on the proposed three-fold principle, we perform fine-grained query identification, which then guides query-adaptive calibrated learning. At the intra-video level, to accumulate denser evidence, we formulate a soft query-clip alignment via flexible optimal transport with an adaptive dustbin, which alleviates sparse temporal supervision while suppressing spurious local responses. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Holmes outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code is released at https://github.com/lijun2005/ICML26-Holmes.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化证据学习框架 Holmes，显式建模部分相关视频检索中的不确定性，在多个基准上超越 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 部分相关视频检索中，简短查询与丰富视频内容之间的不对称性导致检索过程存在固有不确定性，现有方法缺乏对不确定性的显式建模。
analysis.problem: 如何显式量化和建模部分相关视频检索中的不确定性，以提升检索精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模糊查询会引发跨视频的语义歧义，且视频内时间监督稀疏，无法提供充分匹配证据。
analysis.method: 提出层次化证据学习框架 Holmes：在视频间层面，将相似度分数解释为证据支持，通过 Dirichlet 分布建模，并基于三原则进行查询自适应校准学习；在视频内层面，通过带自适应垃圾箱的柔性最优传输实现软查询-片段对齐，缓解稀疏监督并抑制虚假响应。
contributions: 提出层次化证据学习框架，显式建模部分相关视频检索中的不确定性。
设计视频间层面的三原则查询识别与自适应校准学习。
提出视频内层面的柔性最优传输对齐方法，缓解稀疏时间监督。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，Holmes 超越现有方法。代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖查询与视频内容的语义对齐质量。
框架复杂度较高，计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化证据学习框架 Holmes，显式建模部分相关视频检索中的不确定性，在多个基准上超越 SOTA。

papers.title: MSD-Score: Multi-Scale Distributional Scoring for Reference-Free Image Caption Evaluation
papers.abstract: Evaluating image captions without references remains challenging because global embedding similarity often misses fine-grained mismatches such as hallucinated objects, missing attributes, or incorrect relations. We propose MSD-Score, a reference-free metric that models image patch and text token embeddings as von Mises-Fisher mixtures on the unit hypersphere. Instead of treating each modality as a single point, MSD-Score formulates image-text matching as a multi-scale distributional scoring problem. Semantic discrepancies are quantified via a weighted bi-directional KL divergence and combined with global similarity in a multi-scale framework for both single- and multi-candidate evaluations. Extensive experiments show that MSD-Score achieves state-of-the-art correlation with human judgments among reference-free metrics. Beyond accuracy, its probabilistic formulation yields transparent and decomposable diagnostics of local grounding errors, providing a deterministic complementary signal to holistic similarity metrics and judge-based evaluators.

analysis.tldr: 提出MSD-Score，一种无参考图像描述评估指标，通过多尺度分布评分实现细粒度语义对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无参考评估指标依赖全局嵌入相似度，难以捕捉幻觉对象、属性缺失或关系错误等细粒度不匹配问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有参考描述的情况下，准确评估图像描述与图像之间的语义一致性，并定位细粒度错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局嵌入相似度无法区分局部语义错误，如对象幻觉或关系错误。
analysis.method: 将图像块和文本令牌的嵌入建模为von Mises-Fisher混合分布，通过加权双向KL散度量化语义差异，并结合全局相似度形成多尺度评分。
contributions: 提出MSD-Score，一种基于多尺度分布评分的无参考图像描述评估指标。
通过概率公式提供可分解的诊断信息，定位局部接地错误。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上，MSD-Score与人类判断的相关性达到无参考指标中的最优水平。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练嵌入的质量。
计算复杂度可能高于简单相似度指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MSD-Score，一种无参考图像描述评估指标，通过多尺度分布评分实现细粒度语义对齐。

papers.title: Milestone-Guided Policy Learning for Long-Horizon Language Agents
papers.abstract: While long-horizon agentic tasks require language agents to perform dozens of sequential decisions, training such agents with reinforcement learning remains challenging. We identify two root causes: credit misattribution, where correct early actions are penalized due to terminal failures, and sample inefficiency, where scarce successful trajectories result in near-total loss of learning signal. We introduce a milestone-guided policy learning framework, BEACON, that leverages the compositional structure of long-horizon tasks to ensure precise credit assignment. BEACON partitions trajectories at milestone boundaries, applies temporal reward shaping within segments to credit partial progress, and estimates advantages at dual scales to prevent distant failures from corrupting the evaluation of local actions. On ALFWorld, WebShop, and ScienceWorld, BEACON consistently outperforms GRPO and GiGPO. Notably, on long-horizon ALFWorld tasks, BEACON achieves 92.9% success rate, nearly doubling GRPO's 53.5%, while improving effective sample utilization from 23.7% to 82.0%. These results establish milestone-anchored credit assignment as an effective paradigm for training long-horizon language agents. Code is available at https://github.com/ZJU-REAL/BEACON.

analysis.tldr: 提出里程碑引导的策略学习框架BEACON，通过分段奖励塑造和双尺度优势估计解决长程语言智能体的信用分配与样本效率问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 长程语言智能体任务需要数十步顺序决策，但强化学习训练面临信用误分配（正确早期动作因终端失败被惩罚）和样本效率低（成功轨迹稀少导致学习信号几乎丢失）两大挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何为长程语言智能体实现精确的信用分配和高效的样本利用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个根因：信用误分配（正确早期动作因终端失败被惩罚）和样本效率低（成功轨迹稀少导致学习信号几乎丢失）。
analysis.method: BEACON框架：在里程碑边界划分轨迹，对片段进行时间奖励塑造以奖励部分进展，并估计双尺度优势以防止远端失败破坏局部动作评估。
contributions: 提出里程碑锚定的信用分配范式，有效解决长程任务中的信用误分配问题。
BEACON在ALFWorld、WebShop和ScienceWorld上显著优于GRPO和GiGPO，尤其在长程ALFWorld任务中成功率从53.5%提升至92.9%，有效样本利用率从23.7%提升至82.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和ScienceWorld三个基准上评估，与GRPO和GiGPO对比，报告了成功率和有效样本利用率。
limitations: 可能依赖任务中里程碑的预定义或可获取性。
未讨论在更复杂或开放域任务中的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出里程碑引导的策略学习框架BEACON，通过分段奖励塑造和双尺度优势估计解决长程语言智能体的信用分配与样本效率问题。

papers.title: Arena as Offline Reward: Efficient Fine-Grained Preference Optimization for Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) effectively promotes preference alignment of text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models. To improve computational efficiency, direct preference optimization (DPO), which avoids explicit reward modeling, has been widely studied. However, its reliance on binary feedback limits it to coarse-grained modeling on chosen-rejected pairs, resulting in suboptimal optimization. In this paper, we propose ArenaPO, which leverages Arena scores as offline rewards to provide refined feedback, thus achieving efficient and fine-grained optimization without a reward model. This enables ArenaPO to benefit from both the rich rewards of traditional RLHF and the efficiency of DPO. Specifically, we first construct a model Arena in which each model's capability is represented as a Gaussian distribution, and infer these capabilities by traversing the annotated pairwise preferences. Each output image is treated as a sample from the corresponding capability distribution. Then, for a image pair, conditioned on the two capability distributions and the observed pairwise preference, the absolute quality gap is estimated using latent-variable inference based on truncated normal distribution, which serves as fine-grained feedback during training. It does not require a reward model and can be computed offline, thus introducing no additional training overhead. We conduct ArenaPO training on Pick-a-Pic v2 and HPD v3 datasets, showing that ArenaPO consistently outperforms existing baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出ArenaPO方法，利用竞技场分数作为离线奖励实现扩散模型的细粒度偏好优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有直接偏好优化（DPO）依赖二元反馈，仅能进行粗粒度建模，导致优化次优；而传统RLHF虽能提供丰富奖励但计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入额外奖励模型和训练开销的前提下，为文本到图像扩散模型提供细粒度的偏好反馈以提升对齐效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 二元反馈限制了偏好优化的粒度，导致模型在chosen-rejected对上的优化不够精细。
analysis.method: 构建模型竞技场，将每个模型的能力表示为高斯分布，通过遍历标注的成对偏好推断能力；利用截断正态分布的潜变量推理估计图像对的绝对质量差距，作为离线细粒度奖励进行训练。
contributions: 提出ArenaPO，结合传统RLHF的丰富奖励和DPO的高效性，无需奖励模型即可实现细粒度优化。
通过模型竞技场和潜变量推理方法，从成对偏好中提取绝对质量差距作为离线反馈。
analysis.experiments: 在Pick-a-Pic v2和HPD v3数据集上训练，ArenaPO一致优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量成对偏好数据构建竞技场。
截断正态分布假设可能不适用于所有数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ArenaPO方法，利用竞技场分数作为离线奖励实现扩散模型的细粒度偏好优化。

papers.title: VibeServe: Can AI Agents Build Bespoke LLM Serving Systems?
papers.abstract: For years, we have built LLM serving systems like any other critical infrastructure: a single general-purpose stack, hand-tuned over many engineer-years, meant to support every model and workload. In this paper, we take the opposite bet: a multi-agent loop that automatically synthesizes bespoke serving systems for different usage scenarios. We propose VibeServe, the first agentic loop that generates entire LLM serving stacks end-to-end. VibeServe uses an outer loop to plan and track the search over system designs, and an inner loop to implement candidates, check correctness, and measure performance on the target benchmark. In the standard deployment setting, where existing stacks are highly optimized, VibeServe remains competitive with vLLM, showing that generation-time specialization need not come at the cost of performance. More interestingly, in non-standard scenarios, VibeServe outperforms existing systems by exploiting opportunities that generic systems miss in six scenarios involving non-standard model architectures, workload knowledge, and hardware-specific optimizations. Together, these results suggest a different point in the design space for infrastructure software: generation-time specialization rather than runtime generality. Code is available at https://github.com/uw-syfi/vibe-serve.

analysis.tldr: VibeServe 是一个多智能体循环系统，能自动为不同使用场景生成定制化的 LLM 服务系统，在标准场景下与 vLLM 竞争，在非标准场景下超越现有系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前 LLM 服务系统采用通用栈，需要大量人工调优，难以适应多样化的模型和工作负载。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成针对特定使用场景的定制化 LLM 服务系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在标准部署中，VibeServe 与高度优化的 vLLM 竞争；在非标准场景（如非标准模型架构、工作负载知识、硬件特定优化）中，VibeServe 能利用通用系统错过的机会，超越现有系统。
analysis.method: VibeServe 采用多智能体循环：外循环规划并跟踪系统设计搜索，内循环实现候选方案、检查正确性并在目标基准上测量性能。
contributions: 提出首个端到端生成 LLM 服务栈的智能体循环 VibeServe。
在标准场景下与 vLLM 竞争，在非标准场景下超越现有系统，展示了生成时特化而非运行时通用的设计空间。
analysis.experiments: 在标准部署设置中与 vLLM 对比，并在六种非标准场景（非标准模型架构、工作负载知识、硬件特定优化）中评估。
limitations: 可能依赖目标基准的准确性和代表性。
生成过程可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VibeServe 是一个多智能体循环系统，能自动为不同使用场景生成定制化的 LLM 服务系统，在标准场景下与 vLLM 竞争，在非标准场景下超越现有系统。

papers.title: Normalized Architectures are Natively 4-Bit
papers.abstract: Training large language models at 4-bit precision is critical for efficiency. We show that nGPT, an architecture that constrains weights and hidden representations to the unit hypersphere, is inherently more robust to low-precision arithmetic. This removes the need for interventions-such as applying random Hadamard transforms and performing per-tensor scaling calculations-to preserve model quality, and it enables stable end-to-end NVFP4 training. We validate this approach on both a 1.2B dense model and hybrid (Mamba-Transformer) MoE models of up to 3B/30B parameters. We trace this robustness to the dot product: while quantization noise remains largely uncorrelated in both standard and normalized architectures, the signal behaves differently. In nGPT, the hypersphere constraint enhances weak positive correlations among the element-wise products, leading to a constructive accumulation of the signal across the hidden dimension while the noise continues to average out. This yields a higher effective signal-to-noise ratio and a flatter loss landscape, with the effect strengthening as the hidden dimension grows, suggesting increasing advantages at scale. A reference implementation is available at https://github.com/anonymous452026/ngpt-nvfp4

analysis.tldr: nGPT架构因单位超球面约束天然支持4-bit训练，无需额外干预即可保持模型质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在4-bit精度下训练对效率至关重要，但标准架构在低精度下需要复杂干预（如随机Hadamard变换、逐张量缩放）来维持模型质量，增加了实现难度和计算开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入额外干预的情况下，实现大语言模型的稳定4-bit训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: nGPT中，超球面约束增强了元素级乘积的弱正相关，使信号在隐藏维度上累积增强，而噪声保持不相关，从而获得更高的有效信噪比和更平坦的损失景观，且优势随隐藏维度增大而增强。
analysis.method: 采用nGPT架构，将权重和隐藏表示约束在单位超球面上，利用其内在对低精度算术的鲁棒性，直接进行端到端NVFP4训练。
contributions: 发现nGPT架构天然支持4-bit训练，无需随机Hadamard变换或逐张量缩放等干预。
揭示了超球面约束通过增强信号相关性、提高有效信噪比来提升低精度鲁棒性的机制。
在1.2B密集模型和高达3B/30B的混合MoE模型上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在1.2B密集模型和混合（Mamba-Transformer）MoE模型（最大3B/30B参数）上进行了验证，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅验证了NVFP4格式，其他4-bit格式（如INT4）可能不适用。
未讨论训练效率（如速度、内存）的具体提升幅度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: nGPT架构因单位超球面约束天然支持4-bit训练，无需额外干预即可保持模型质量。

papers.title: Causal Reinforcement Learning for Complex Card Games: A Magic The Gathering Benchmark
papers.abstract: Causal reinforcement learning (RL) lacks benchmarks for complex systems that combine sequential decision making, hidden information, large masked action spaces, and explicit causal structure. We introduce MTG-Causal-RL, a Gymnasium benchmark built on Magic: The Gathering with a 3,077-dimensional partial observation, a 478-action masked discrete action space, five competitive Standard archetypes, three reward schemes, and a hand-specified Structural Causal Model (SCM) over strategic variables. Every episode exposes causal variables, SCM-predicted intervention effects, and per-factor credit traces, making causal credit assignment, leave-one-out cross-archetype transfer, and policy auditability first-class metrics. We adapt a panel of reference baselines: random, heuristic, masked PPO, a causal-world-model PPO variant, and an architecture-matched scalar control. We propose Causal Graph-Factored Advantage PPO (CGFA-PPO) as a reference causal agent that uses SCM parents of win probability as factor-aligned critic targets with an intervention-calibration loss. All comparisons use paired seeds, paired-bootstrap confidence intervals, and Holm-Bonferroni correction within pre-registered families. Masked PPO and CGFA-PPO reach competitive in-distribution win rates and exceed the random baseline; per-factor calibration trajectories and leave-one-out transfer gaps expose diagnostic structure that scalar win rate alone cannot. We release the benchmark, reference-baseline results, and full evaluation protocol openly. By coupling a strategically rich, partially observed domain with an explicit causal interface and statistical protocol, MTG-Causal-RL gives causal-RL, world-model, and LLM-agent research a shared testbed for questions current benchmarks cannot pose together: causal credit assignment under masked action spaces, structural transfer across archetypes, and SCM-grounded policy auditability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于万智牌的因果强化学习基准，包含显式因果模型和多种评估指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 因果强化学习缺乏结合序列决策、隐藏信息、大掩码动作空间和显式因果结构的复杂系统基准。
analysis.problem: 构建一个支持因果信用分配、跨原型迁移和策略可审计性评估的基准环境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CGFA-PPO，使用SCM父节点作为因子对齐的评论家目标，并加入干预校准损失。
contributions: 构建了MTG-Causal-RL基准，包含高维观测、大掩码动作空间、显式SCM和多种奖励方案。
提出CGFA-PPO算法，利用因果图因子化优势函数。
提供参考基线结果和统计评估协议。
analysis.experiments: 在基准上比较了随机、启发式、掩码PPO、因果世界模型PPO和CGFA-PPO，使用配对种子、配对bootstrap置信区间和Holm-Bonferroni校正。掩码PPO和CGFA-PPO达到竞争性分布内胜率，超过随机基线。
limitations: 基准基于特定卡牌游戏，泛化性有限。
因果模型需手工指定，可能不适用于所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于万智牌的因果强化学习基准，包含显式因果模型和多种评估指标。

papers.title: PersonaGesture: Single-Reference Co-Speech Gesture Personalization for Unseen Speakers
papers.abstract: We propose PersonaGesture, a diffusion-based pipeline for single-reference co-speech gesture personalization of unseen speakers. Given target speech and one motion clip from a new speaker, the model must synthesize gestures that follow the new utterance while retaining speaker-specific pose choices, without per-speaker optimization. This setting is useful for avatars and virtual agents, but it is hard because the reference mixes stable speaker habits with utterance-specific trajectories. PersonaGesture consists of two key components, Adaptive Style Infusion (ASI) and Implicit Distribution Rectification (IDR), to separate temporal identity evidence from residual statistic correction. A Style Perceiver first encodes the variable-length reference into compact speaker-memory tokens. ASI injects these tokens into denoising through zero-initialized residual cross-attention, enabling style evidence to affect motion formation without replacing the pretrained speech-to-motion prior. Building on this, IDR applies a length-aware diagonal affine map in latent space to correct residual channel-wise moments estimated from the same reference. Across BEAT2 and ZeroEGGS, we evaluate quantitative metrics, reference-identity controls, same-audio diagnostics, qualitative comparisons, and human preference. Experiments show that separating denoising-time speaker memory from conservative post-generation moment correction improves unseen-speaker personalization over collapsed style codes, full-reference attention, and one-clip finetuning. Project: https://xiangyue-zhang.github.io/PersonaGesture.

analysis.tldr: 提出单参考共语手势个性化扩散管道，无需针对新说话人优化即可生成保留个人风格的手势。
analysis.research_motivation: 为虚拟化身和智能体生成个性化共语手势时，现有方法需要针对每个新说话人进行优化，成本高且不灵活；单参考设置下参考片段混合了稳定习惯和话语特定轨迹，难以分离。
analysis.problem: 给定目标语音和一个新说话人的单段运动片段，合成跟随新话语且保留说话人特定姿态选择的手势，无需逐说话人优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单参考设置下，参考片段既包含稳定的说话人习惯又包含话语特定的轨迹，直接使用会导致风格混淆；现有方法如全参考注意力或微调效果不佳。
analysis.method: 扩散管道，包含自适应风格注入（ASI）和隐式分布校正（IDR）。ASI通过零初始化残差交叉注意力将说话人记忆令牌注入去噪过程；IDR在潜空间应用长度感知对角仿射映射校正残差通道统计量。
contributions: 提出PersonaGesture，首个单参考共语手势个性化扩散管道，无需逐说话人优化。
设计ASI和IDR组件，分别处理去噪时的说话人记忆和生成后的统计校正，有效分离身份证据与话语轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在BEAT2和ZeroEGGS上评估了定量指标、参考身份控制、相同音频诊断、定性比较和人类偏好，实验表明分离去噪时说话人记忆与保守后生成校正优于风格编码、全参考注意力和单片段微调。
limitations: 依赖单段参考片段，可能无法覆盖说话人的全部风格变化。
扩散模型推理速度较慢，实时应用可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出单参考共语手势个性化扩散管道，无需针对新说话人优化即可生成保留个人风格的手势。

papers.title: Towards Self-Explainable Document Visual Question Answering with Chain-of-Explanation Predictions
papers.abstract: Document Visual Question Answering (DocVQA) requires vision-language models to reason not only about what information in a document is relevant to a question, but also where the answer is grounded on the page. Existing DocVQA models entangle question-relevant evidence and answer localization and operate largely as black boxes, offering limited means to verify how predictions depend on visual evidence. We propose CoExVQA, a self-explainable DocVQA framework with a grounded reasoning process through a chain-of-explanation design. CoExVQA first identifies question-relevant evidence, then explicitly localizes the answer region, and finally decodes the answer exclusively from the grounded region. Prediction via CoExVQA's chain-of-explanation enables direct inspection and verification of the reasoning process across modalities. Empirical results show that restricting decoding to grounded evidence achieves SotA explainable DocVQA performance on PFL-DocVQA, improving ANLS by 12% over the current explainable baselines while providing transparent and verifiable predictions.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoExVQA，通过链式解释实现文档VQA的自解释性推理，在PFL-DocVQA上ANLS提升12%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有DocVQA模型将证据定位与答案生成纠缠在一起，缺乏可解释性，难以验证预测对视觉证据的依赖。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个自解释的DocVQA框架，使推理过程可检查、可验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CoExVQA框架：先识别问题相关证据，再显式定位答案区域，最后仅从该区域解码答案，形成链式解释。
contributions: 提出CoExVQA，首个通过链式解释实现自解释DocVQA的框架。
在PFL-DocVQA上达到SOTA可解释DocVQA性能，ANLS提升12%。
analysis.experiments: 在PFL-DocVQA数据集上评估，ANLS提升12% over当前可解释基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于文档类VQA任务，泛化性未验证。
链式解释可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoExVQA，通过链式解释实现文档VQA的自解释性推理，在PFL-DocVQA上ANLS提升12%。

papers.title: Visual Fingerprints for LLM Generation Comparison
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) outputs arise from complex interactions among prompts, system instructions, model parameters, and architecture. We refer to specific configurations of these factors as generation conditions, each of which can bias outputs in various ways. Understanding how different generation conditions shape model behaviors is essential for tasks such as prompt design and model evaluation, yet it remains challenging due to the stochastic and open-ended nature of text generation. We present an approach to visually compare LLM outputs across generation conditions by modeling responses as collections of linguistic choices, including content, expression, and structure. We extract these choices using natural language processing pipelines and represent their distributions across repeated samples. We then visualize these distributions as visual fingerprints, enabling direct, distribution-level comparison of condition-specific tendencies. Through four usage scenarios, we demonstrate how visual fingerprints reveal consistent patterns in LLM behavior that are difficult to observe through individual responses or aggregate metrics.

analysis.tldr: 通过视觉指纹可视化比较不同生成条件下LLM输出的分布差异。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM输出受提示、系统指令、模型参数和架构等多种因素影响，理解这些生成条件如何塑造模型行为对提示设计和模型评估至关重要，但由于文本生成的随机性和开放性，直接比较十分困难。
analysis.problem: 如何直观地比较不同生成条件下LLM输出的整体分布差异，而非仅依赖单个响应或聚合指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将LLM响应建模为语言选择（内容、表达、结构）的集合，通过NLP管道提取这些选择，并可视化其跨重复样本的分布，形成视觉指纹。
contributions: 提出视觉指纹方法，用于分布级比较不同生成条件下的LLM输出。
通过四个使用场景展示该方法能揭示难以通过单个响应或聚合指标观察的一致模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖NLP管道的准确性和覆盖范围。
视觉指纹的解释性可能受限于可视化设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过视觉指纹可视化比较不同生成条件下LLM输出的分布差异。

papers.title: The E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Transformer: Adaptive Geodesic Operations with Guaranteed Orthogonality
papers.abstract: We present the E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Transformer, a novel architecture that unifies Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), Deep Delta Learning (DDL), and the Cayley transform to obtain input-adaptive, unconditionally orthogonal residual connections. Unlike DDL, whose Householder operator is orthogonal only at $β\in \{0,2\}$, our Data-Dependent Cayley rotation $Q(x)=(I+(β/2)A(x))^{-1}(I-(β/2)A(x))$ preserves orthogonality for all $β$ and all inputs. To handle negation, an eigenvalue $-1$ case that Cayley provably excludes, we introduce the E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Hybrid, which combines Cayley rotation with Householder reflection via a learned operator-selection gate $X'=γ(X)Q(X)X+(1-γ(X))H_2(X)X$. A midpoint-collapse regularizer, $4γ(1-γ)$, encourages boundary gate decisions, where each selected component is orthogonal. In matched-parameter comparisons, with approximately 1.79M parameters per model and mean +/- standard deviation over 3 seeds, against four baselines including the concurrent JPmHC, E$Δ$-MHC-Geo achieves the best long-horizon stability, 1.9x over JPmHC and 3.8x over GPT; the best near-$π$ rotation loss, 4.5x over JPmHC on single-plane; strong norm preservation, with 0.001 mean deviation; and 0.96 negation cosine alignment in a diagnostic reflection probe, all with 33% fewer layers. While JPmHC's wider representation excels on pure rotation, its finite Cayley residual mixer excludes an exact $λ=-1$ operator and has no reflection branch, motivating our hybrid approach for accessing both connected components of $O(n)$.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种保证正交性的自适应测地线变换架构，通过Cayley旋转与Householder反射混合实现全参数域正交残差连接。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度增量学习（DDL）的Householder算子仅在特定β值下正交，且Cayley变换无法处理特征值-1（即反射），限制了残差连接的正交性和表达能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种输入自适应、无条件正交的残差连接，同时支持旋转和反射操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Cayley变换天然排除特征值-1，无法表示反射；JPmHC的有限Cayley残差混合器缺少反射分支，导致在需要反射的任务上性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出EΔ-MHC-Geo Transformer，包含数据依赖的Cayley旋转（保证全β正交）、EΔ-MHC-Geo Hybrid（通过门控融合Cayley旋转与Householder反射）、以及中点坍塌正则化器（鼓励边界门决策）。
contributions: 提出数据依赖的Cayley旋转算子，实现输入自适应且无条件正交的残差连接。
设计混合架构EΔ-MHC-Geo Hybrid，通过门控融合Cayley旋转和Householder反射，覆盖正交群O(n)的两个连通分量。
引入中点坍塌正则化器，促进门控输出接近纯旋转或纯反射，确保子模块正交性。
analysis.experiments: 在约1.79M参数模型上，与JPmHC、GPT等四个基线比较，EΔ-MHC-Geo在长程稳定性（1.9倍于JPmHC，3.8倍于GPT）、近π旋转损失（单平面4.5倍于JPmHC）、范数保持（平均偏差0.001）和反射余弦对齐（0.96）上取得最佳结果，且层数减少33%。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更大规模模型或实际任务（如语言建模）上的表现。
混合门控可能引入额外计算开销，需进一步分析效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种保证正交性的自适应测地线变换架构，通过Cayley旋转与Householder反射混合实现全参数域正交残差连接。

papers.title: RealCam: Real-Time Novel-View Video Generation with Interactive Camera Control
papers.abstract: Camera-controlled video-to-video (V2V) generation enables dynamic viewpoint synthesis from monocular footage, holding immense potential for interactive filmmaking and live broadcasting. However, existing implicit synthesis methods fundamentally rely on non-causal, full-sequence processing and rigid prefix-style temporal concatenation. This architectural paradigm mandates bidirectional attention, resulting in prohibitive computational latency, quadratic complexity scaling, and inherent incompatibility with real-time streaming or variable-length inputs. To overcome these limitations, we introduce \texttt{RealCam}, a novel autoregressive framework for interactive, real-time camera-controlled V2V generation. We first design a high-fidelity teacher model grounded in a \textbf{Cross-frame In-context Learning} paradigm. By interleaving source and target frames into synchronized contextual pairs, our design inherently enables length-agnostic generalization and naturally facilitates causal adaptation, breaking the rigid prefix bottleneck. We then distill this teacher into a few-step causal student via Self-Forcing with Distribution Matching Distillation, enabling efficient, on-the-fly streaming synthesis. Furthermore, to mitigate severe loop inconsistency in closed-loop trajectories, we propose \textbf{Loop-Closed Data Augmentation (LoopAug)}, a novel paradigm that synthesizes globally consistent loop sequences from existing multiview datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \texttt{RealCam} achieves state-of-the-art visual fidelity and temporal consistency while enabling truly interactive camera control with orders-of-magnitude faster inference than existing paradigms. Our project page is at https://xyc-fly.github.io/RealCam/.

analysis.tldr: RealCam提出自回归框架实现实时交互式相机控制视频生成，通过跨帧上下文学习与分布匹配蒸馏突破现有方法延迟瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有相机控制视频生成方法依赖非因果全序列处理和固定前缀拼接，导致计算延迟高、复杂度二次增长，无法支持实时流式或变长输入，限制了在交互式电影制作和直播中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现实时、交互式的相机控制视频到视频生成，同时保持高视觉保真度和时序一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有隐式合成方法因双向注意力机制导致计算延迟高、复杂度二次增长，且无法兼容实时流式或变长输入；闭环轨迹中存在严重的循环不一致性问题。
analysis.method: 提出RealCam自回归框架：1）基于跨帧上下文学习的教师模型，通过交错源帧和目标帧为同步上下文对实现长度无关泛化和因果适应；2）通过自强制分布匹配蒸馏将教师蒸馏为少步因果学生模型，支持高效流式合成；3）提出闭环数据增强（LoopAug）从多视图数据合成全局一致的循环序列以缓解循环不一致。
contributions: 提出首个用于实时交互式相机控制视频生成的自回归框架RealCam，支持流式变长输入。
设计跨帧上下文学习范式，打破固定前缀瓶颈，实现长度无关泛化和因果适应。
提出闭环数据增强LoopAug，有效缓解闭环轨迹中的循环不一致问题。
实验表明RealCam在视觉保真度和时序一致性上达到SOTA，推理速度比现有方法快数个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到大量实验表明RealCam在视觉保真度和时序一致性上达到SOTA，推理速度比现有方法快数个数量级，但未提供具体数据集或指标数值。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景或极端相机运动泛化能力有限。
蒸馏过程可能引入教师模型的部分误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RealCam提出自回归框架实现实时交互式相机控制视频生成，通过跨帧上下文学习与分布匹配蒸馏突破现有方法延迟瓶颈。

papers.title: Fusion in Your Way: Aligning Image Fusion with Heterogeneous Demands via Direct Preference Optimization
papers.abstract: As a key technique in multi-modal processing, infrared and visible image fusion (IVIF) plays a crucial role in integrating complementary spectral information for visual enhancement and downstream vision tasks. Despite remarkable progress, existing methods struggle to flexibly accommodate heterogeneous demands. Achieving adaptive fusion that aligns with various preferences from both human and machine vision remains an open and challenging problem. To address this challenge, we propose DPOFusion, a direct preference optimization (DPO) framework integrating the property-aligned latent diffusion model (PALDM) and the preference-controllable latent diffusion model (PCLDM), enabling task-guided, preference-adaptive IVIF for both human and machine vision. The PALDM leverages a latent fusion prior and a joint conditional loss to generate diverse candidate fusion results with various properties. PCLDM is subsequently fine-tuned via instance direct preference optimization (IDPO), enabling direct control of the final fusion results with heterogeneous preference signals. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework not only attains precise preference alignment among humans, vision-language models, and task-driven networks, but also sets a new benchmark for adaptive fusion quality and task-oriented transferability.

analysis.tldr: 提出DPOFusion框架，利用直接偏好优化对齐图像融合中的异构需求，实现自适应融合。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有红外与可见光图像融合方法难以灵活适应人类视觉和机器视觉的多样化偏好，缺乏自适应对齐能力。
analysis.problem: 如何实现能够对齐异构偏好（人类、视觉语言模型、任务驱动网络）的自适应图像融合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DPOFusion框架，包含属性对齐潜扩散模型（PALDM）和偏好可控潜扩散模型（PCLDM），PALDM通过潜融合先验和联合条件损失生成多样化候选结果，PCLDM通过实例直接偏好优化（IDPO）微调以直接控制最终融合结果。
contributions: 提出DPOFusion框架，首次将直接偏好优化引入图像融合领域，实现异构偏好对齐。
设计PALDM和PCLDM两个模块，分别用于生成多样化候选和偏好可控融合。
实验证明该方法在自适应融合质量和任务导向迁移性上达到新基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量偏好数据。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DPOFusion框架，利用直接偏好优化对齐图像融合中的异构需求，实现自适应融合。

papers.title: TFM-Retouche: A Lightweight Input-Space Adapter for Tabular Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Tabular foundation models (TFMs), such as TabPFN-2.6, TabICLv2, ConTextTab, Mitra, LimiX, and TabDPT, achieve strong zero-shot performance through in-context learning, but their inductive biases remain fixed at inference time. Adapting a pretrained TFM to a specific dataset or task typically requires either full fine-tuning, which is computationally expensive, or parameter-efficient tuning methods (PEFT) such as LoRA, which must be tailored to the internal architecture of each TFM. Furthermore, the evidence on whether weight-space fine-tuning improves accuracy or calibration is mixed \citep{tanna_exploring_2026,rubachev_finetuning_2025}. We introduce TFM-Retouche, a lightweight input-space residual adapter that is architecture-agnostic by design with respect to the frozen TFM backbone. TFM-Retouche learns a small residual correction in the input space to align the input data with the inductive biases of the pretrained model. The adapter is trained end-to-end through the frozen TFM, with a post-training identity guard that falls back to the unmodified TFM whenever adaptation does not help on held-out validation. On TabArena-Lite (51 datasets spanning binary classification, multiclass classification, and regression), TabICLv2-Retouche -- the framework instantiated on TabICLv2 -- is the top-ranked method on the leaderboard with light per-task tuning and ensembling, lifting aggregate Elo by +56 over the frozen TabICLv2 base and sitting on the Pareto front of predictive quality versus both training and inference time.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级输入空间残差适配器TFM-Retouche，无需修改表格基础模型内部结构即可提升下游任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格基础模型（TFM）在推理时归纳偏置固定，现有适配方法（全微调或LoRA）计算成本高或需针对架构定制，且权重空间微调对精度/校准的提升效果存在争议。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改TFM内部架构的前提下，高效地将预训练TFM适配到特定数据集或任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TFM-Retouche：一个轻量级输入空间残差适配器，通过可学习的输入残差校正对齐输入数据与预训练模型的归纳偏置，端到端训练（冻结TFM），并包含后训练身份保护机制（在适配无效时回退到原始TFM）。
contributions: 提出架构无关的输入空间适配器TFM-Retouche，避免修改TFM内部结构。
在TabArena-Lite基准上，基于TabICLv2的实例化方法取得排行榜第一，Elo评分比冻结基线提升+56，且位于预测质量与训练/推理时间的帕累托前沿。
analysis.experiments: 在TabArena-Lite（51个数据集，涵盖二分类、多分类和回归）上评估，TFM-Retouche（基于TabICLv2）在排行榜上排名第一，且位于预测质量与训练/推理时间的帕累托前沿。
limitations: 适配器仅在输入空间操作，可能无法处理需要深层特征变换的任务。
身份保护机制依赖验证集，可能在小验证集上失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级输入空间残差适配器TFM-Retouche，无需修改表格基础模型内部结构即可提升下游任务性能。

papers.title: Domain Generalization through Spatial Relation Induction over Visual Primitives
papers.abstract: Domain generalization requires identifying stable representations that support reliable classification across domains. Most existing methods seek such stability through improving the training process, for example, through model selection strategies, data augmentation, or feature-alignment objectives. Although these strategies can be effective, they leave the representation learning of structural composition implicit, which may limit performance on compositional domain generalization benchmarks. In this work, we propose Primitive-Aware Relational Structure for domain gEneralization (PARSE), an image classification framework that factors visual recognition into visual primitives and their relational composition. We represent these compositions using soft binary, ternary, and quaternary predicates over primitive locations, yielding differentiable measures of spatial alignment that can be learned end-to-end. To learn primitives and relational structures jointly, we design an end-to-end architecture with three components: (1) a convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone that extracts general visual features, (2) a concept bottleneck layer that maps these features to primitive heatmaps with differentiable spatial coordinates, and (3) a structural scoring layer that evaluates candidate spatial relations among the detected primitives. We then compute class probability from the joint evidence of its class-specific relational compositions. Across CUB-DG and the DomainBed benchmark suite,PARSE improves accuracy by over 4.5 percentage points on CUB-DG and remains competitive with existing DG methods on DomainBed.

analysis.tldr: 提出PARSE框架，通过显式建模视觉基元及其空间关系实现域泛化图像分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有域泛化方法通过改进训练过程（如数据增强、特征对齐）隐式学习结构组成，在组合性域泛化基准上性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何显式学习视觉基元及其空间关系结构，以提升域泛化图像分类的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PARSE框架，包含CNN骨干、概念瓶颈层（将特征映射为基元热图及可微空间坐标）和结构评分层（评估基元间候选空间关系），通过类特定关系组合计算类别概率。
contributions: 提出显式建模视觉基元及其空间关系的域泛化框架PARSE。
设计可端到端学习的软二元、三元、四元空间谓词表示。
在CUB-DG和DomainBed基准上验证有效性，CUB-DG上提升超4.5个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在CUB-DG和DomainBed基准套件上评估，PARSE在CUB-DG上准确率提升超4.5个百分点，在DomainBed上与现有方法竞争力相当。
limitations: 可能依赖基元定义的质量，对复杂场景泛化能力待验证。
空间关系谓词种类有限，可能无法捕获更复杂的结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PARSE框架，通过显式建模视觉基元及其空间关系实现域泛化图像分类。

papers.title: Novelty-based Tree-of-Thought Search for LLM Reasoning and Planning
papers.abstract: Although advances such as chain-of-thought, tree-of-thought or reinforcement learning have improved the performance of LLMs in reasoning and planning tasks, they are still brittle and have not achieved human-level performance in many domains, and often suffer from high time and token costs. Inspired by the success of width-based search in planning, we explore how the concept of novelty can be transferred to language domains and how it can improve tree-of-thought reasoning. A tree of thoughts relies on building possible "paths" of consecutive ideas or thoughts. These are generated by repeatedly prompting an LLM. In our paper, a measurable concept of novelty is proposed that describes the uniqueness of a new node (thought) in comparison to nodes previously seen in the search tree. Novelty is estimated by prompting an LLM and making use of embedded general knowledge from pre-training. This metric can then be used to prune branches and reduce the scope of the search. Although this method introduces more prompts per state, the overall token cost can be reduced by pruning and reducing the overall tree size. This procedure is tested and compared using several benchmarks in language-based planning and general reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于新颖性的树搜索方法，通过剪枝降低LLM推理的token成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM推理方法（如思维链、思维树）在复杂任务中仍显脆弱，且时间和token成本高，需要更高效的搜索策略。
analysis.problem: 如何将规划中的宽度搜索概念（新颖性）迁移到语言领域，以改进思维树推理的效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义可测量的新颖性概念，通过LLM提示评估新节点与已见节点的独特性，并据此剪枝，减少搜索树规模。
contributions: 提出将新颖性概念应用于语言领域的思维树搜索。
通过新颖性剪枝降低整体token成本，尽管每个状态需额外提示。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基于语言的规划和通用推理基准上测试，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 新颖性估计依赖LLM的预训练知识，可能引入偏差。
每个状态额外提示可能增加延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于新颖性的树搜索方法，通过剪枝降低LLM推理的token成本。

papers.title: OmicsLM: A Multimodal Large Language Model for Multi-Sample Omics Reasoning
papers.abstract: Interpreting transcriptomic data is one of the most common analytical tasks in modern biology. Yet most current models either consume expression profiles without producing natural-language biological explanations, or reason in language without direct access to quantitative omics measurements. We introduce OmicsLM, a multimodal LLM that connects quantitative omics profiles with natural-language biological tasks. OmicsLM represents each transcriptomic profile as a compact continuous representation within the LLM context. This interface preserves quantitative expression signal while allowing natural-language instructions, explicit gene mentions, and multiple interleaved biological samples to be processed together in one model context. We train OmicsLM on more than 5.5 million instruction-following examples spanning over 70 task types, combining continuous transcriptomic inputs, experimental data rendered through diverse language templates, and free-text biological knowledge and question-answering data. This mixture covers cell type annotation, perturbation prediction, clinical prediction, pathway reasoning, and open-ended biological question answering. Existing benchmarks evaluate either profile-level prediction or text-only biological QA, leaving language-guided, multi-sample reasoning over real expression profiles unmeasured. To close this gap, we introduce GEO-OmicsQA, a benchmark for multi-sample biological question answering built from real Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO) studies. We demonstrate that OmicsLM can use expression profiles directly and perform comparably to specialized omics models on profile-level tasks, while outperforming both omics-specialized models and general LLMs on language-guided biological reasoning over expression data.

analysis.tldr: OmicsLM 是一个多模态大语言模型，将定量转录组数据与自然语言推理结合，支持多样本生物问答。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型要么处理表达数据但不生成自然语言解释，要么在语言中推理但无法直接访问定量组学测量，缺乏连接两者的统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何让大语言模型直接利用定量转录组数据进行多样本生物推理和自然语言问答。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将每个转录组谱表示为LLM上下文中的紧凑连续表示，在超过550万条指令示例上训练，涵盖70多种任务类型，包括连续转录组输入、实验数据模板和自由文本生物知识。
contributions: 提出OmicsLM，一个连接定量组学数据与自然语言推理的多模态LLM。
构建GEO-OmicsQA基准，用于评估真实表达谱上的多样本生物问答。
analysis.experiments: 在profile-level任务上与专用组学模型性能相当，在语言引导的生物推理上优于组学专用模型和通用LLM。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模训练数据，泛化到新物种或新实验条件的能力未知。
紧凑表示可能丢失部分细粒度表达信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OmicsLM 是一个多模态大语言模型，将定量转录组数据与自然语言推理结合，支持多样本生物问答。

papers.title: Optimal Transport for LLM Reward Modeling from Noisy Preference
papers.abstract: Reward models are fundamental to Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), yet real-world datasets are inevitably corrupted by noisy preference. Conventional training objectives tend to overfit these errors, while existing denoising approaches often rely on homogeneous noise assumptions that fail to capture the complexity of linguistic preferences. To handle these challenges, we propose SelectiveRM, a framework grounded in optimal transport. We first devise a Joint Consistency Discrepancy to align the distribution of model predictions with preference data. Furthermore, to address the limitation of strict mass conservation which compels the model to fit outliers, we incorporate a Mass Relaxation mechanism via partial transport. This enables the autonomous exclusion of samples with noisy preference that contradict semantic consistency. Theoretically, we demonstrate that SelectiveRM optimizes a tighter upper bound on the unobserved clean risk. Extensive experiments validate that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across diverse benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 利用最优传输理论中的部分传输机制，自动排除噪声偏好样本，提升RLHF奖励模型的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实世界中的偏好数据不可避免地包含噪声，传统训练目标容易过拟合这些错误，而现有去噪方法通常依赖同质噪声假设，无法捕捉语言偏好的复杂性。
analysis.problem: 如何从含噪声的偏好数据中学习鲁棒的奖励模型，避免过拟合噪声样本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SelectiveRM框架，基于最优传输理论：1) 设计联合一致性差异（Joint Consistency Discrepancy）对齐模型预测与偏好数据的分布；2) 引入质量松弛机制（Mass Relaxation）通过部分传输自动排除与语义一致性矛盾的噪声偏好样本。
contributions: 提出基于最优传输的奖励模型去噪框架SelectiveRM，能够自动识别并排除噪声偏好样本。
理论证明SelectiveRM优化了未观测干净风险的一个更紧的上界。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对噪声比例较高的场景仍需进一步验证。
部分传输机制的超参数选择可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用最优传输理论中的部分传输机制，自动排除噪声偏好样本，提升RLHF奖励模型的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Quantum Kernels for Audio Deepfake Detection Using Spectrogram Patch Features
papers.abstract: Quantum machine learning has emerged as a promising tool for pattern recognition, yet many audio-focused approaches still treat spectrograms as generic images and do not explicitly exploit their time-frequency structure. We propose Q-Patch, a quantum feature map tailored to audio that encodes local time-frequency patches from mel-spectrograms into quantum states using shallow, hardware-efficient circuits with adjacency-aware entanglement. Each selected patch is summarized by a compact four-dimensional acoustic descriptor and mapped to a four-qubit circuit with depth at most three, enabling practical quantum kernel construction under near-term constraints. We evaluate Q-Patch on an audio spoofing detection task using a controlled, balanced protocol and compare it with size-matched classical baselines. Q-Patch improves discrimination between bona fide and spoofed samples, achieving an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) of 0.87, compared with 0.82 for a radial basis function support vector machine (RBF-SVM) trained on the same patch-level features. Kernel-space analysis further reveals a clear class structure, with cross-class similarity around 0.615 and within-class self-similarity of 1.00. Overall, Q-Patch provides a practical framework for incorporating time-frequency-aware representations into quantum kernel learning for audio authenticity assessment in low-resource settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出Q-Patch量子核方法，利用频谱图局部时频斑块特征提升音频深度伪造检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音频深度伪造检测方法将频谱图视为通用图像，未充分利用其时频结构，而量子机器学习在模式识别中展现出潜力，但缺乏针对音频的专用特征映射。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种量子特征映射，能够显式利用音频频谱图的时频局部结构，并在近期量子硬件约束下实现有效的音频伪造检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Q-Patch，从梅尔频谱图中提取局部时频斑块，用紧凑的四维声学描述子表示，并映射到浅层四量子比特电路（深度≤3），利用邻域感知纠缠构建量子核。
contributions: 提出首个针对音频时频结构的量子特征映射Q-Patch，利用局部斑块和浅层电路实现实用量子核。
在音频欺骗检测任务上，Q-Patch的AUROC达0.87，优于RBF-SVM的0.82，且核空间分析显示清晰的类结构。
analysis.experiments: 在音频欺骗检测任务上，使用受控平衡协议评估，与大小匹配的经典基线（RBF-SVM）比较，Q-Patch取得AUROC 0.87，RBF-SVM为0.82；核空间分析显示跨类相似度约0.615，类内自相似度1.00。
limitations: 仅评估了单一任务（音频欺骗检测），泛化性未知。
量子核方法在更大规模数据集上的可扩展性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Q-Patch量子核方法，利用频谱图局部时频斑块特征提升音频深度伪造检测性能。

papers.title: When AI Meets Science: Research Diversity, Interdisciplinarity, Visibility, and Retractions across Disciplines in a Global Surge
papers.abstract: The extent to which Artificial Intelligence (AI) can trigger generalized paradigm shifts in science is unclear. Although some of these technologies have revolutionized data collection and analysis in specific scientific fields such as Chemistry, their overall impact depends on the scope of adoption and the ways scholars use them. In this study, we document substantial differences in the timing and extent of AI adoption across countries and scientific domains from 1960 to 2015. After 2015, we find generalized exponential growth in AI adoption, with the number of AI-supported works multiplying by at least four across all domains. The transformative nature of this rapid growth is less apparent and points to multiple challenges should adoption trends persist. According to our analyses, AI-supported research is confined to very few topics with strong ties to Computer Science and conventional statistical frameworks, suggesting limited transformational potential in epistemological terms. AI-supported works are also associated with an unwarranted citation premium and exhibit substantially higher retraction rates than non-AI-supported works across most fields. Geographically, AI adoption displays pronounced heterogeneity at the country level, along with an acceleration in the relevance of middle-income countries in Asia, from China and beyond. Thus, the transformative capacity of AI in science remains largely untapped, and its rapid adoption underlines challenges in research openness, transparency, reproducibility, and ethics from a global perspective. We discuss how best research practices could boost the benefits of AI adoption and highlight fields and geographies where these trends warrant closer scrutiny.

analysis.tldr: AI在科学中的采用增长迅速但主题狭窄、引用溢价高且撤稿率上升，跨学科和地理差异显著。
analysis.research_motivation: AI对科学范式转变的潜力尚不明确，需要系统评估其跨学科、跨地区的采用模式、影响及潜在挑战。
analysis.problem: 量化分析1960-2015年及之后AI在科学中的采用趋势、主题分布、引用影响、撤稿率及地理异质性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI采用在2015年后呈指数增长，但集中在与计算机科学和传统统计框架紧密相关的少数主题；AI支持论文存在不当引用溢价，且撤稿率显著高于非AI论文；地理上中低收入亚洲国家（如中国）加速采用。
analysis.method: 基于1960-2015年科学文献数据，统计AI相关论文的采用率、主题分布、引用影响、撤稿率及国家差异。
contributions: 首次系统揭示AI在科学中采用的全球趋势、主题局限性和地理异质性
发现AI支持论文的引用溢价和更高撤稿率，指出透明度与可重复性挑战
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述基于1960-2015年数据的统计分析。
limitations: 数据截止到2015年，可能未反映最新进展
未深入分析AI方法的具体类型或质量差异
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI在科学中的采用增长迅速但主题狭窄、引用溢价高且撤稿率上升，跨学科和地理差异显著。

papers.title: Does Synthetic Data Help? Empirical Evidence from Deep Learning Time Series Forecasters
papers.abstract: Synthetic data has transformed language model training, yet its role in time series forecasting remains poorly understood. We present a large-scale empirical study: nine experiment groups, 4,218 runs systematically evaluating synthetic time series augmentation across five architectures, four synthetic signals and seven datasets. The effect is sharply architecture-conditional: channel-mixing models (TimesNet, iTransformer) benefit in the majority of trials, while channel-independent models (DLinear, PatchTST) are consistently degraded. In selected low-resource settings the gains are striking: TimesNet trained on only 10\% of Weather data with synthetic augmentation surpasses the full-data baseline (4 of 16 sparsity-dataset combinations). Averaged across all architectures, augmentation hurts in 67\% of trials. We further find that only the Seasonal-Trend generator reliably helps across the tested benchmarks, and that hard curriculum switching is actively harmful (+24\% MSE degradation). These results provide concrete, actionable guidelines on how to use synthetic data: use synthetic augmentation with channel-mixing architectures, use gradual annealing schedules, and treat low-resource augmentation as architecture- and dataset-dependent. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/hugoiscracked/synthetic-ts/tree/main}

analysis.tldr: 合成数据对时间序列预测的帮助高度依赖于模型架构，通道混合模型受益而通道独立模型受损。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成数据在语言模型训练中取得了巨大成功，但在时间序列预测中的作用尚不明确，缺乏系统性的大规模实证研究来指导实践。
analysis.problem: 系统评估合成数据增强对深度学习时间序列预测器的影响，并识别其有效或有害的条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成数据增强的效果强烈依赖于模型架构：通道混合模型（如TimesNet、iTransformer）在多数试验中受益，而通道独立模型（如DLinear、PatchTST）则持续退化。此外，仅季节性-趋势生成器可靠地帮助，硬课程切换策略有害（MSE增加24%）。
analysis.method: 大规模实证研究：在5种架构、4种合成信号和7个数据集上进行4218次系统实验，比较不同架构和设置下合成数据增强的效果。
contributions: 揭示了合成数据增强对时间序列预测的效果是架构条件性的，通道混合模型受益而通道独立模型受损。
提供了具体可操作的指南：使用通道混合架构、渐进退火调度，并注意低资源增强的架构和数据集依赖性。
analysis.experiments: 9个实验组，4218次运行，涵盖5种架构、4种合成信号和7个数据集。在低资源设置下，TimesNet仅用10%的Weather数据加合成增强即可超越全数据基线（4/16稀疏-数据集组合）。平均而言，增强在67%的试验中有害。
limitations: 仅评估了有限数量的架构和合成信号，可能无法推广到所有时间序列模型。
未深入分析合成数据质量或生成过程对结果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 合成数据对时间序列预测的帮助高度依赖于模型架构，通道混合模型受益而通道独立模型受损。

papers.title: Pathways to AGI
papers.abstract: Our focus are five related questions that stem from a critical software studies perspective. Underpinning this view is the acknowledged need to avoid assumptions regarding the inevitability of the current situation relating to AI. What we need to see is the closeness of the linkage between current commercial AI development and our prevailing social, political and economic circumstances. This does mean that the perspectives presented here are done so critically and conditionally. Most importantly, Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) is seen as being problematic both conceptually and definitionally. This conditioning of any view regarding AGI does lead the discussion in specific directions and to certain conclusions regarding the future. However, adopting this perspective enables the work to offer some final recommendations. We set out to ask the following questions, 1. What are the critical pathways that produced the current dominant generative AI tools (capabilities, product forms, adoption patterns)? 2. Which decision points acted as leverage nodes (small changes that had large downstream effects), and which dead ends reveal alternative possibilities that did not become dominant? 3. How do pathways differ across three foundational-model trajectories such as the frontier proprietary models, open-weight models or specific domain and sovereign models? 4. Which alternative projects branched from key leverage nodes, what is their current state, and why did some succeed, stall, fail or become absorbed? 5. Based on this analysis, what socio-technical development programmes could plausibly move toward AGI-adjacent capability while meeting requirements for transparency, moderation, wellbeing and sustainable business models?

analysis.tldr: 从批判软件研究视角分析通往AGI的路径，提出五个关键问题并给出建议。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI发展与社会经济环境紧密关联，需要避免对现状的必然性假设，批判性审视AGI的概念和定义问题。
analysis.problem: 如何从历史路径、决策节点、模型轨迹和替代项目中识别通往AGI的关键因素，并设计满足透明度、节制、福祉和可持续商业模型的社会技术发展方案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用批判软件研究视角，提出五个关键问题并进行定性分析，包括路径识别、杠杆节点分析、轨迹比较、替代项目评估以及发展方案设计。
contributions: 提出五个关键问题作为分析框架，涵盖历史路径、决策节点、模型轨迹、替代项目和发展方案。
从批判视角重新审视AGI的概念和定义，强调社会技术条件的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏实证数据支持，主要基于定性分析。
可能受限于批判视角的主观性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从批判软件研究视角分析通往AGI的路径，提出五个关键问题并给出建议。

papers.title: Strat-LLM: Stratified Strategy Alignment for LLM-based Stock Trading with Real-time Multi-Source Signals
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are evolving into autonomous trading agents, yet existing benchmarks often overlook the interplay between architectural reasoning and strategy consistency. We propose Strat-LLM, a framework grounded in Stratified Strategy Alignment. Operating in a live-forward setting throughout 2025, it integrates heterogeneous data including sequential prices, real-time news, and annual reports to eliminate look-ahead bias. Extensive stress tests on A-share and U.S. markets reveal: (1) reasoning-heavy models achieve peak utility in Free Mode via internal logic, whereas standard models require Strict Mode as a vital risk anchor; (2) alignment utility is regime-dependent, with Free and Guided modes capturing momentum in uptrending markets, while Strict Mode mitigates drawdowns in downtrends; (3) mid-scale models (35B) show optimal fidelity under strict constraints, whereas ultra-large models (122B) suffer an alignment tax under rigid rules but gain a performance premium in Guided Mode; (4) standard LLMs often fall into a high win-rate trap, optimizing for small gains at the expense of total returns, which can only be mitigated through deep reasoning or strict external guardrails. Project details are available at https://Strat-LLM.github.io.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层策略对齐框架Strat-LLM，在2025年实时交易中验证不同规模LLM的策略一致性，发现推理型模型在自由模式最优，标准模型需严格模式控制风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM交易基准忽略了架构推理与策略一致性之间的相互作用，缺乏对实时多源信号和前瞻偏差的考虑。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个框架，使LLM在股票交易中保持策略一致性，同时利用实时多源信号避免前瞻偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推理型模型在自由模式下通过内部逻辑达到峰值效用；标准模型需要严格模式作为风险锚；对齐效用具有市场状态依赖性；中等规模模型在严格约束下保真度最佳，超大模型在严格规则下存在对齐税但在引导模式有性能溢价；标准模型易陷入高胜率陷阱。
analysis.method: 提出Strat-LLM框架，基于分层策略对齐，在2025年实时前向设置中集成顺序价格、实时新闻和年报等异构数据，消除前瞻偏差。
contributions: 提出分层策略对齐框架Strat-LLM，用于LLM股票交易
在2025年实时前向设置中集成多源信号，消除前瞻偏差
通过A股和美股压力测试揭示不同规模LLM的策略一致性规律
analysis.experiments: 在A股和美股市场进行广泛压力测试，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅测试了2025年数据，可能无法泛化到其他年份
未详细说明不同模式的具体实现细节
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层策略对齐框架Strat-LLM，在2025年实时交易中验证不同规模LLM的策略一致性，发现推理型模型在自由模式最优，标准模型需严格模式控制风险。

papers.title: PlotPick: AI-powered batch extraction of numerical data from scientific figures
papers.abstract: Systematic reviews and meta-analyses frequently require numerical data that authors report only as figures, yet manual digitisation is slow and does not scale. We present PlotPick, an open-source tool that uses vision-language models (VLMs) to batch-extract structured tabular data from scientific figures. We evaluate six VLMs from three providers on two established chart-to-table benchmarks (ChartX and PlotQA) and compare against the dedicated chart-to-table model DePlot. All six VLMs outperform DePlot on both benchmarks. On ChartX (restricted to bar charts, line charts, box plots, and histograms; n=300), VLMs achieve 88-96% recall versus 71% for DePlot. On PlotQA (n=529), VLMs achieve 86-99% RMSF1 versus 94% for DePlot. The gap is largest on chart types absent from the dedicated models' training data: on box plots, DePlot achieves 24% RMSF1 while VLMs achieve 83-97%. PlotPick is available at https://plotpick.streamlit.app.

analysis.tldr: PlotPick 利用视觉语言模型从科学图表中批量提取数值数据，性能优于专用模型 DePlot。
analysis.research_motivation: 系统综述和元分析常需从图表中提取数值数据，但手动数字化速度慢且难以规模化。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、准确地从科学图表中批量提取结构化表格数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 专用图表转表格模型 DePlot 在未见过的图表类型（如箱线图）上表现较差，而视觉语言模型（VLM）泛化能力更强。
analysis.method: PlotPick 是一个开源工具，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）从科学图表中批量提取结构化表格数据。
contributions: 提出 PlotPick 开源工具，利用 VLM 实现科学图表批量数据提取。
在 ChartX 和 PlotQA 基准上评估六种 VLM，均超越专用模型 DePlot。
analysis.experiments: 在 ChartX（n=300）和 PlotQA（n=529）上评估六种 VLM，并与 DePlot 对比。ChartX 上 VLM 召回率 88-96% vs DePlot 71%；PlotQA 上 VLM RMSF1 86-99% vs DePlot 94%。箱线图上 DePlot 仅 24% RMSF1，VLM 达 83-97%。
limitations: 仅评估了四种图表类型（柱状图、折线图、箱线图、直方图），其他类型未测试。
未提供 VLM 的具体型号和计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PlotPick 利用视觉语言模型从科学图表中批量提取数值数据，性能优于专用模型 DePlot。

papers.title: Quantizing With Randomized Hadamard Transforms: Efficient Heuristic Now Proven
papers.abstract: Uniform random rotations (URRs) are a common preprocessing step in modern quantization approaches used for gradient compression, inference acceleration, KV-cache compression, model weight quantization, and approximate nearest-neighbor search in vector databases.
