In practice, URRs are often replaced by randomized Hadamard transforms (RHTs), which preserve orthogonality while admitting fast implementations. The remaining issue is the performance for worst-case inputs. With a URR, each coordinate is individually distributed as a shifted beta distribution, which converges to a Gaussian distribution in high dimensions. Generally, one RHT is not suitable in the worst case, as individual coordinates can be far from these distributions. We show that after composing two RHTs on any $d$-sized input vector, the marginal distribution of every fixed coordinate of the normalized rotated vector is within $O(d^{-1/2})$ of a standard Gaussian both in Kolmogorov distance and in $1$-Wasserstein distance. We then plug these bounds into the analyses of modern compression schemes, namely DRIVE and QUIC-FL, and show that two RHTs achieve performance that asymptotically matches URRs. However, we show that two RHTs may not be sufficient for Vector Quantization (VQ), which often requires weak correlation across fixed-size blocks of coordinates (as opposed to only marginal distribution convergence for single coordinates). We prove that a composition of three RHTs leads to decaying coordinate covariance. This ensures that any fixed, bounded, multi-dimensional VQ codebook optimized for URRs has the same expected error when using three RHTs, up to an additive term that vanishes with the dimension. Finally, because practical inputs are rarely adversarial, we propose a linear-time ${O}(d)$ check on the input's moments to dynamically adapt the number of RHTs used at runtime to improve performance.

analysis.tldr: 证明随机哈达玛变换（RHT）组合在量化中渐近匹配均匀随机旋转（URR），并提出自适应方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 均匀随机旋转（URR）是量化预处理的标准步骤，但计算成本高；实践中常用随机哈达玛变换（RHT）替代，但最坏情况性能未知，限制了其在量化中的可靠应用。
analysis.problem: 证明RHT组合在量化中能否达到与URR相同的理论保证，并解决最坏情况输入下的性能问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单个RHT在最坏情况下坐标分布偏离高斯；两个RHT使边际分布接近高斯；三个RHT可衰减坐标协方差，满足向量量化需求。
analysis.method: 理论分析RHT组合的分布收敛性，并设计基于输入矩的线性时间自适应算法动态调整RHT数量。
contributions: 证明两个RHT后坐标边际分布与标准高斯的Kolmogorov和1-Wasserstein距离为O(d^{-1/2})，并用于DRIVE和QUIC-FL分析。
证明三个RHT可衰减坐标协方差，使向量量化码本误差与URR渐近一致。
提出线性时间自适应算法，根据输入矩动态调整RHT数量以提升实际性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果仅针对固定维度d，未考虑有限样本下的实际性能。
自适应算法依赖输入矩，可能对特定分布不敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 证明随机哈达玛变换（RHT）组合在量化中渐近匹配均匀随机旋转（URR），并提出自适应方法。

papers.title: T2I-VeRW: Part-level Fine-grained Perception for Text-to-Image Vehicle Retrieval
papers.abstract: Vehicle Re-identification (Re-ID) aims to retrieve the most similar image to a given query from images captured by non-overlapping cameras. Extending vehicle Re-ID from image-only queries to text-based queries enables retrieval in real-world scenarios where only a witness description of the target vehicle is available. In this paper, we propose PFCVR, a Part-level Fine-grained Cross-modal Vehicle Retrieval model for text-to-image vehicle re-identification. PFCVR constructs locally paired images and texts at the part level and introduces learnable part-query tokens that aggregate both part-specific and full-sentence context before aligning with visual part features. On top of this explicit local alignment, a bi-directional mask recovery module lets each modality reconstruct its masked content under the guidance of the other, implicitly bridging local correspondences into global feature alignment. Furthermore, we construct a new large-scale dataset called T2I-VeRW, which contains 14,668 images covering 1,796 vehicle identities with fine-grained part-level annotations. Experimental results on the T2I-VeRI dataset show that PFCVR achieves 29.2\% Rank-1 accuracy, improving over the best competing method by +3.7\% percentage points. On the newly proposed T2I-VeRW benchmark, PFCVR achieves 55.2\% Rank-1 accuracy, outperforming a comprehensive set of recent state-of-the-art methods. Source code will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/Neuromorphic_ReID

analysis.tldr: 提出PFCVR模型和T2I-VeRW数据集，通过局部细粒度对齐提升文本到图像车辆检索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有车辆重识别主要基于图像查询，但在实际场景中常仅有目击文本描述，因此需要将车辆重识别扩展到文本到图像的跨模态检索。
analysis.problem: 文本到图像车辆检索中，全局特征对齐难以捕捉局部细节对应关系，导致检索精度不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PFCVR模型，包含局部配对图像-文本构建、可学习部件查询令牌（聚合部件特定和全句上下文）、双向掩码恢复模块（跨模态引导重建），实现显式局部对齐和隐式全局对齐。
contributions: 提出PFCVR模型，通过局部细粒度对齐提升文本到图像车辆检索性能。
构建T2I-VeRW大规模数据集，包含14,668张图像、1,796个车辆身份及细粒度部件级标注。
analysis.experiments: 在T2I-VeRI数据集上Rank-1准确率29.2%，比最佳方法高3.7个百分点；在T2I-VeRW基准上Rank-1准确率55.2%，优于多种最新方法。
limitations: 可能依赖部件级标注，扩展性受限。
仅在车辆领域验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PFCVR模型和T2I-VeRW数据集，通过局部细粒度对齐提升文本到图像车辆检索性能。

papers.title: Adding Thermal Awareness to Visual Systems in Real-Time via Distilled Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Purely RGB-based vision models often fail to provide reliable cues in challenging scenarios such as nighttime and fog, leading to degraded performance and safety risks. Infrared imaging captures heat-emitting sources and provides critical complementary information, but existing high-fidelity fusion methods suffer from prohibitive latency, rendering them impractical for real-time edge deployment. To address this, we propose FusionProxy, a real-time image fusion module designed as a fully independent, plug-and-play component with diffusion level quality. FusionProxy exploits two complementary statistics of a teacher sample ensemble: per-pixel variance in raw image space, used to weight pixel-level supervision, and per-pixel variance inside frozen foundation backbones, used to route feature-level alignment spatially. Once trained, FusionProxy can be directly integrated into any visual perception system without joint optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance on static recognition tasks and significantly enhances robustness in dynamic tasks, including closed-loop autonomous driving. Crucially, FusionProxy achieves real-time inference speeds on diverse platforms, from high-end GPUs to commodity hardware, providing a flexible and generalizable solution for all-day perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出FusionProxy，一种实时、即插即用的图像融合模块，通过蒸馏扩散模型为视觉系统添加热感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 纯RGB视觉模型在夜间、雾天等挑战场景下性能下降，存在安全风险；红外成像可提供互补信息，但现有高保真融合方法延迟高，无法在实时边缘设备部署。
analysis.problem: 如何实现实时、高质量的红外与可见光图像融合，且能即插即用于现有视觉系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FusionProxy利用教师样本集的两个互补统计量：原始图像空间的逐像素方差（用于加权像素级监督）和冻结基础骨干网络内的逐像素方差（用于空间对齐特征级对齐），通过蒸馏扩散模型训练得到实时融合模块。
contributions: 提出FusionProxy，一种实时、即插即用的图像融合模块，具有扩散模型级别的质量。
利用教师样本集的两个互补统计量实现高效训练和高质量融合。
在静态识别和动态自动驾驶任务中验证了鲁棒性提升，并在多种硬件上实现实时推理。
analysis.experiments: 在静态识别任务和闭环自动驾驶等动态任务上进行了实验，展示了优越性能和鲁棒性提升，并在从高端GPU到普通硬件的多种平台上实现了实时推理速度。
limitations: 可能依赖教师样本集的质量和多样性。
未讨论在极端天气或传感器噪声下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FusionProxy，一种实时、即插即用的图像融合模块，通过蒸馏扩散模型为视觉系统添加热感知能力。

papers.title: PersonaKit (PK): A Plug-and-Play Platform for User Testing Diverse Roles in Full-Duplex Dialogue
papers.abstract: As spoken dialogue systems expand beyond traditional assistant roles to encompass diverse personas -- such as authoritative instructors, uncooperative merchants, or distracted workers -- they require distinct, human-like turn-taking behaviors to maintain psychological immersion. However, current full-duplex systems often default to a rigid, overly accommodating ``always-yield'' policy during overlapping speech, which severely undermines character consistency for non-submissive roles. Evaluating alternative, persona-specific turn-taking strategies through empirical user studies is challenging because building real-time full-duplex test environments requires substantial engineering overhead. To address this, we present PersonaKit (PK), an open-source, low-latency web platform for the rapid prototyping and evaluation of conversational agents. Using intuitive JSON configurations, researchers can define personas, specify probabilistic interruption-handling behaviors (e.g., yield, hold, bridge, or override), and automatically deploy comparative A/B surveys. Through an in-the-wild evaluation with 8 distinct personas, we demonstrate that PersonaKit provides an extensible, end-to-end framework for studying complex sociolinguistic behaviors in next-generation spoken agents.

analysis.tldr: PersonaKit是一个开源低延迟Web平台，用于快速原型设计和评估全双工对话中不同角色的对话策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前全双工对话系统在重叠语音时默认采用僵化的“总是让步”策略，破坏了非顺从角色的角色一致性，而构建实时测试环境需要大量工程开销。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个易于使用的平台来快速原型化和评估全双工对话中不同角色的个性化轮流策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前全双工系统在重叠语音时默认采用“总是让步”策略，这严重破坏了非顺从角色的角色一致性。
analysis.method: PersonaKit是一个开源低延迟Web平台，通过直观的JSON配置定义角色、指定概率性中断处理行为（如让步、保持、桥接或覆盖），并自动部署比较性A/B调查。
contributions: 提出了PersonaKit，一个用于快速原型化和评估全双工对话中不同角色轮流策略的开源低延迟Web平台。
通过8个不同角色的野外评估，展示了PersonaKit作为研究下一代语音代理中复杂社会语言学行为的可扩展端到端框架。
analysis.experiments: 通过8个不同角色的野外评估，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅支持有限的角色配置和中断行为。
评估可能局限于特定场景和角色，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PersonaKit是一个开源低延迟Web平台，用于快速原型设计和评估全双工对话中不同角色的对话策略。

papers.title: Neuromorphic visual attention for Sign-language recognition on SpiNNaker
papers.abstract: Sign-language recognition has achieved substantial gains in classification accuracy in recent years; however, the latency and power requirements of most existing methods limit their suitability for real-time deployment. Neuromorphic sensing and processing offer an alternative paradigm based on sparse, event-driven computation that supports low-latency and energy-efficient perception. In this work, we introduce an end-to-end neuromorphic architecture for American Sign Language (ASL) fingerspelling recognition that integrates a spiking visual attention mechanism for online region-of-interest extraction with a compact spiking neural network deployed on the SpiNNaker neuromorphic platform. We benchmark the proposed system against two datasets: a synthetically generated event-based version of the Sign Language MNIST dataset and a natively recorded ASL-DVS dataset, whilst providing a comprehensive overview of Sign-language recognition and related work. This work yields competitive performance in simulation (92.27%) and comparable performance on neuromorphic hardware deployment (83.1%), while achieving the most energy-efficient architecture (0.565 mW) and low latency (3 ms) across all benchmarked approaches. Despite its compact design, the system demonstrates the suitability of task-dependent visual attention applications for edge deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于脉冲视觉注意和SpiNNaker平台的端到端神经形态手语识别架构，在低功耗和低延迟下取得有竞争力的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有手语识别方法在实时部署中受限于高延迟和高功耗，神经形态计算提供了一种稀疏、事件驱动的低功耗替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个端到端的神经形态架构，实现低延迟、低功耗的在线手语识别，并部署在SpiNNaker平台上。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成脉冲视觉注意力机制进行在线感兴趣区域提取，结合紧凑型脉冲神经网络，部署在SpiNNaker神经形态平台上。
contributions: 提出首个端到端神经形态手语识别架构，融合脉冲视觉注意力与SNN。
在仿真和硬件部署上实现有竞争力的性能，同时达到最低功耗（0.565 mW）和低延迟（3 ms）。
analysis.experiments: 在合成事件版Sign Language MNIST和原生ASL-DVS数据集上评估，仿真准确率92.27%，硬件部署准确率83.1%。
limitations: 硬件部署准确率低于仿真，可能存在部署损失。
仅针对手指拼写识别，未扩展到连续手语识别。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于脉冲视觉注意和SpiNNaker平台的端到端神经形态手语识别架构，在低功耗和低延迟下取得有竞争力的性能。

papers.title: Enabling Unsupervised Training of Deep EEG Denoisers With Intelligent Partitioning
papers.abstract: Denoising wearable electroencephalogram (EEG) is inherently challenging since neural activity is not only subtle but also inseparable from spectrally overlapping noise artifacts. Classical signal processing methods, relying on fixed or heuristic rules, cannot handle the time-varying pervasive artifacts in wearable EEGs. Deep learning methods, on the other hand, show promise in decomposition-free EEG denoising using highly expressive neural networks, but the training requires artifact-free EEG, which is inherently unobtainable. To address this, we propose Intelligent Partitioning for Self-supervised Denoising (iPSD). Our method eliminates the need for clean references by learning to partition an input EEG segment into independent noisy realizations with the same underlying signal. This enables self-supervision of deep learning denoisers, even in zero-shot settings where only a single EEG segment to be denoised is available. We validate iPSD through extensive experiments, including validations on wearable EEG from in-ear sensors. The results show that iPSD achieves state-of-the-art performance, most notably under extremely low signal-to-noise ratios (down to -10 dB) and challenging artifacts (e.g., EMG), with spectral fidelity orders of magnitude higher than competitive baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出智能分区方法(iPSD)实现无干净参考的深度EEG去噪自监督训练，在极低信噪比下达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 可穿戴EEG去噪极具挑战，因为神经信号微弱且与噪声频谱重叠；传统信号处理方法依赖固定规则无法处理时变伪迹，深度学习方法需要无法获取的无伪迹EEG作为训练目标。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有干净参考EEG的情况下训练深度去噪网络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出智能分区自监督去噪(iPSD)，通过学习将输入EEG片段划分为具有相同底层信号的独立噪声实现，从而无需干净参考即可自监督训练深度去噪器，支持零样本设置。
contributions: 提出iPSD方法，首次实现无需干净参考的深度EEG去噪自监督训练，支持零样本场景。
在可穿戴EEG（包括耳内传感器）上验证，在极低信噪比(-10 dB)和挑战性伪迹（如EMG）下达到SOTA，频谱保真度比基线高数个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 在可穿戴EEG（包括耳内传感器）上进行实验，包括极低信噪比和EMG伪迹场景，iPSD达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖EEG信号的特定统计假设（如噪声独立性）。
零样本设置下性能可能受限于单段EEG的长度和内容。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出智能分区方法(iPSD)实现无干净参考的深度EEG去噪自监督训练，在极低信噪比下达到SOTA。

papers.title: A Fine-Grained Understanding of Uniform Convergence for Halfspaces
papers.abstract: We study the fine-grained uniform convergence behavior of halfspaces beyond worst-case VC bounds. For inhomogeneous halfspaces in $\mathbb{R}^d$ with $d\ge 2$, we show that standard first-order VC bounds are essentially tight: even consistent hypotheses can incur population error $Θ(d\ln(n/d)/n)$, and in the agnostic setting the deviation scales as $\sqrt{τ\ln(1/τ)}$ at true error $τ$. In contrast, homogeneous halfspaces in $\mathbb{R}^2$ exhibit a markedly different behavior. In the realizable case, every hypothesis consistent with the sample has error $O(1/n)$. In the agnostic case, we prove a bandwise, log-free deviation bound on each dyadic risk band via a critical-wedge localization argument. Unioning over bands incurs only a $\ln\ln n$ overhead, and we establish a matching lower bound showing this overhead is unavoidable. Together, these results give a fine-grained and nearly complete picture of uniform convergence for halfspaces, revealing sharp dimensional and structural thresholds.

analysis.tldr: 半空间均匀收敛的细粒度分析揭示了维度和结构阈值。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准VC界对半空间的均匀收敛行为描述过于粗糙，无法区分不同维度和结构下的真实收敛速率，需要更精细的理论刻画。
analysis.problem: 精确刻画非齐次和齐次半空间在可实现和不可知场景下的均匀收敛速率，并揭示维度和结构对收敛的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非齐次半空间在d≥2时一阶VC界本质紧致，可实现误差为Θ(d ln(n/d)/n)，不可知偏差为√(τ ln(1/τ))；而齐次半空间在R²中可实现误差为O(1/n)，不可知偏差通过带状分析仅引入ln ln n开销，且下界表明该开销不可避免。
analysis.method: 针对齐次半空间，提出关键楔形局部化论证，在二进风险带上建立无对数的偏差界，并通过带并集获得整体界。
contributions: 证明了非齐次半空间在d≥2时标准VC界本质紧致，给出了紧的上下界。
揭示了齐次半空间在R²中可实现误差为O(1/n)，并建立了不可知场景下带对数因子的紧偏差界。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 结果主要针对半空间，未推广到更复杂的假设类。
高维齐次半空间的行为未完全刻画。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 半空间均匀收敛的细粒度分析揭示了维度和结构阈值。

papers.title: 4DThinker: Thinking with 4D Imagery for Dynamic Spatial Understanding
papers.abstract: Dynamic spatial reasoning from monocular video is essential for bridging visual intelligence and the physical world, yet remains challenging for vision-language models (VLMs). Prior approaches either verbalize spatial-temporal reasoning entirely as text, which is inherently verbose and imprecise for complex dynamics, or rely on external geometric modules that increase inference complexity without fostering intrinsic model capability. In this paper, we present 4DThinker, the first framework that enables VLMs to "think with 4D" through dynamic latent mental imagery, i.e., internally simulating how scenes evolve within the continuous hidden space. Specifically, we first introduce a scalable, annotation-free data generation pipeline that synthesizes 4D reasoning data from raw videos. We then propose Dynamic-Imagery Fine-Tuning (DIFT), which jointly supervises textual tokens and 4D latents to ground the model in dynamic visual semantics. Building on this, 4D Reinforcement Learning (4DRL) further tackles complex reasoning tasks via outcome-based rewards, restricting policy gradients to text tokens to ensure stable optimization. Extensive experiments across multiple dynamic spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that 4DThinker consistently outperforms strong baselines and offers a new perspective toward 4D reasoning in VLMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhangquanchen/4DThinker.

analysis.tldr: 提出4DThinker框架，让VLM通过动态潜在心理意象进行4D空间推理，无需外部几何模块。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态空间推理对VLM至关重要，但现有方法要么将时空推理完全文本化导致冗长不精确，要么依赖外部几何模块增加复杂度且不提升模型内在能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM具备从单目视频中进行动态空间推理的内在能力，避免文本化或外部模块的缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出4DThinker框架，包括：1) 可扩展的无标注数据生成管线；2) 动态意象微调(DIFT)联合监督文本和4D潜在表示；3) 4D强化学习(4DRL)通过结果奖励优化文本token。
contributions: 首个让VLM通过动态潜在心理意象进行4D推理的框架
提出无标注数据生成管线、DIFT和4DRL方法
analysis.experiments: 在多个动态空间推理基准上，4DThinker持续优于强基线。
limitations: 可能依赖视频数据质量
4D潜在表示的可解释性有待探索
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出4DThinker框架，让VLM通过动态潜在心理意象进行4D空间推理，无需外部几何模块。

papers.title: Safety Anchor: Defending Harmful Fine-tuning via Geometric Bottlenecks
papers.abstract: The safety alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) remains vulnerable to Harmful Fine-tuning (HFT). While existing defenses impose constraints on parameters, gradients, or internal representations, we observe that they can be effectively circumvented under persistent HFT. Our analysis traces this failure to the inherent redundancy of the high-dimensional parameter space: attackers exploit optimization trajectories that are orthogonal to defense constraints to restore harmful capabilities while deceptively adhering to safety restrictions. To address this, we propose Safety Bottleneck Regularization (SBR). SBR shifts the defensive focus from the redundant parameter space to the unembedding layer, which serves as a geometric bottleneck. By anchoring the final hidden states of harmful queries to those of the safety-aligned model, SBR enables the model to maintain safe responses even under persistent HFT. Extensive experiments confirm SBR's effectiveness, demonstrating that utilizing just a single safety anchor is sufficient to reduce the Harmful Score to $<$10 while preserving competitive performance on benign downstream tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出安全瓶颈正则化（SBR），通过几何瓶颈锚定有害查询的最终隐藏状态，有效防御有害微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型的安全对齐在有害微调（HFT）下容易失效，现有防御方法在高维参数空间中存在冗余，攻击者可利用与防御约束正交的优化轨迹绕过防御。
analysis.problem: 如何有效防御有害微调，避免模型在持续微调后恢复有害能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有防御在高维参数空间中存在冗余，攻击者利用与防御约束正交的优化轨迹绕过防御，同时表面遵守安全限制。
analysis.method: 提出安全瓶颈正则化（SBR），将防御焦点从冗余参数空间转移到作为几何瓶颈的unembedding层，通过锚定有害查询的最终隐藏状态到安全对齐模型的隐藏状态，使模型在持续有害微调下仍能保持安全响应。
contributions: 揭示了现有防御在高维参数空间中的冗余导致被绕过的问题
提出SBR方法，利用几何瓶颈有效防御有害微调
analysis.experiments: 大量实验证实SBR的有效性，仅使用单个安全锚即可将有害分数降至10以下，同时保持良性下游任务的竞争性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于unembedding层的防御，其他架构需调整
单个安全锚的泛化性可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出安全瓶颈正则化（SBR），通过几何瓶颈锚定有害查询的最终隐藏状态，有效防御有害微调。

papers.title: iPhoneBlur: A Difficulty-Stratified Benchmark for Consumer Device Motion Deblurring
papers.abstract: Motion blur restoration on consumer mobile devices is typically evaluated using aggregate metrics that obscure performance variation across blur difficulty, masking model behavior under real deployment conditions. This work introduces iPhoneBlur, a difficulty-stratified benchmark of 7,400 image pairs synthesized from high-framerate iPhone 17 Pro videos captured in diverse real-world scenarios. Samples are partitioned into Easy, Medium, and Hard categories through PSNR-guided adaptive temporal windowing, with stratification validated by monotonic 2.2x increase in optical flow magnitude across tiers. Each sample includes comprehensive metadata enabling investigation of ISP-aware and difficulty-adaptive restoration strategies. Spectral analysis confirms synthesized blur exhibits high-frequency suppression patterns consistent with authentic motion degradation. Evaluation of six architectures reveals consistent 7-9 dB performance degradation from Easy to Hard subsets, a substantial gap entirely hidden by aggregate reporting. The benchmark further exposes a domain gap between professional and consumer cameras which targeted fine-tuning substantially recovers. By coupling difficulty stratification with deployment-critical metadata, iPhoneBlur enables systematic assessment of model reliability and failure modes for resource-constrained edge systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出iPhoneBlur难度分层基准，揭示运动去模糊模型在真实部署中的性能退化被聚合指标掩盖。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有运动模糊恢复评估使用聚合指标，掩盖了不同难度下的性能差异，无法反映模型在真实部署条件下的行为。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能按难度分层、包含真实场景元数据的基准，以系统评估消费设备运动去模糊模型的可靠性和失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 从Easy到Hard子集，六种架构性能一致下降7-9 dB，该差距被聚合报告完全隐藏；2) 专业相机与消费相机之间存在域差距，可通过针对性微调大幅恢复。
analysis.method: 从iPhone 17 Pro高帧率视频合成7,400对图像，通过PSNR引导的自适应时间窗口划分为Easy、Medium、Hard三层，并提供ISP感知和难度自适应恢复策略所需的元数据。
contributions: 构建了首个难度分层的消费设备运动去模糊基准iPhoneBlur，包含7,400对图像和三层难度划分。
揭示了聚合指标掩盖的7-9 dB性能退化，并暴露了专业与消费相机之间的域差距。
analysis.experiments: 评估了六种架构，显示从Easy到Hard子集性能下降7-9 dB；通过针对性微调可恢复域差距。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 基准仅基于iPhone 17 Pro，可能不泛化到其他设备。
合成模糊虽经光谱验证，但与真实模糊仍可能存在差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出iPhoneBlur难度分层基准，揭示运动去模糊模型在真实部署中的性能退化被聚合指标掩盖。

papers.title: BioResearcher: Scenario-Guided Multi-Agent for Translational Medicine
papers.abstract: Translational medicine turns underspecified development goals into evidence synthesis that must combine literature, trials, patents, and quantitative multi-omics analysis while preserving identifiers, uncertainty, and retrievable provenance. General-purpose foundation models and off-the-shelf tool-augmented or multi-agent systems are not built for this: they tend to produce single-shot answers or run open-endedly, and fall short on the auditable, scenario-specific workflows that heterogeneous biomedical sources demand. This paper introduces Ingenix BioResearcher, a scenario-guided multi-agent system that maps queries to versioned research playbooks, delegates to specialized subagents over 30+ tools and machine-learning endpoints, mixes structured database access with sandboxed code for genome-scale analyses, and applies claim-level multi-model reconciliation before editorial assembly. We evaluate BioResearcher across unit-level capabilities, open-ended biomedical reasoning, and end-to-end clinical discovery. It leads evaluated baselines on 109 single-step tests (83.49% pass rate; 0.892 average score), achieves strong biomedical benchmark performance (89.33% on BixBench-Verified-50 and the top 0.758 mean score on BaisBench Scientific Discovery), and leads on a 30-query clinical end-to-end benchmark with the highest positive hit rate (74.7% $\pm$ 3.3%) and negative clear rate (96.8% $\pm$ 0.2%). These results show broad, competitive performance across unit-level, open-ended, and end-to-end clinical evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出场景引导的多智能体系统BioResearcher，用于转化医学中的证据综合与临床发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 转化医学需要将未明确的发展目标转化为结合文献、试验、专利和多组学分析的证据综合，同时保留标识符、不确定性和可追溯来源。通用基础模型和现成的工具增强或多智能体系统不适用于此，它们倾向于产生单次答案或无限运行，无法满足异构生物医学来源所需的可审计、场景特定工作流。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够处理异构生物医学数据、执行可审计的场景特定工作流、并生成可靠证据综合的多智能体系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Ingenix BioResearcher，一种场景引导的多智能体系统，将查询映射到版本化的研究剧本，委托给30多个工具和机器学习端点的专业子智能体，混合结构化数据库访问和沙盒代码进行基因组规模分析，并在编辑组装前应用声明级多模型协调。
contributions: 提出场景引导的多智能体框架BioResearcher，专门针对转化医学的证据综合任务。
在单元级能力、开放式生物医学推理和端到端临床发现三个层面进行系统评估，展示了广泛且具有竞争力的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在109个单步测试中达到83.49%通过率和0.892平均分；在BixBench-Verified-50上达到89.33%，在BaisBench Scientific Discovery上达到0.758平均分；在30个查询的临床端到端基准上，正面命中率74.7%±3.3%，负面清除率96.8%±0.2%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工具和端点，泛化到其他领域需调整。
多智能体协调开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出场景引导的多智能体系统BioResearcher，用于转化医学中的证据综合与临床发现。

papers.title: TACT: Mitigating Overthinking and Overacting in Coding Agents via Activation Steering
papers.abstract: When language model agents tackle complex software engineering tasks, they often degrade over long trajectories, which we define as *agent drift*. We focus on two recurring failure modes *overthinking* and *overacting*, i.e., where the agent repeatedly reasons over information it already has, and where it issues tool calls without integrating recent observations or acquiring new evidence. In this paper, we introduce TACT (Think-Act Calibration via activation Steering), to detect and mitigate agent drift in the residual stream before it surfaces as a behavioral failure. In specific, we label trajectory steps as overthinking, overacting, or calibrated, and find that their hidden states can separate linearly along two *drift axes*, pointing from calibrated behavior toward each failure mode (AUC $\approx$ 0.9). To mitigate agent drift, we project each step's activation onto these axes at test time and pull drifted ones back toward the calibrated region. Experiments show that TACT outperforms unsteered baselines across SWE-bench Verified, Terminal-Bench 2.0, and CLAW-Eval, lifting average resolve rate by $+5.8$ pp on Qwen3.5-27B and $+4.8$ pp on Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it while cutting steps-to-resolve by up to $26\%$. These gains frame agent drift as a steerable direction in the residual stream, and position TACT as a viable handle for reliable long-horizon agents.

analysis.tldr: 通过激活干预在残差流中检测并缓解编码智能体的过度思考与过度行动，提升长程任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型智能体在长程软件工程任务中性能退化（智能体漂移），现有方法缺乏对过度思考与过度行动这两种失败模式的系统检测与干预。
analysis.problem: 如何检测并缓解编码智能体在长程轨迹中的过度思考（重复推理已有信息）和过度行动（未整合新证据即调用工具）行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 智能体轨迹步骤的隐藏状态沿两条漂移轴线性分离，从校准行为指向过度思考或过度行动（AUC≈0.9），表明漂移方向在残差流中可识别。
analysis.method: TACT：在测试时，将每一步的激活投影到漂移轴上，将漂移的激活拉回校准区域，从而缓解智能体漂移。
contributions: 定义并形式化了编码智能体中的过度思考与过度行动两种失败模式。
提出TACT方法，通过激活干预在残差流中检测并缓解智能体漂移。
在SWE-bench Verified、Terminal-Bench 2.0和CLAW-Eval上验证有效性，平均解决率提升+5.8pp（Qwen3.5-27B）和+4.8pp（Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it），步骤数减少26%。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-bench Verified、Terminal-Bench 2.0和CLAW-Eval三个基准上评估，对比未干预基线，报告了解决率和步骤数改进。
limitations: 仅针对编码智能体，可能不直接适用于其他领域。
依赖离线标注的漂移轴，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过激活干预在残差流中检测并缓解编码智能体的过度思考与过度行动，提升长程任务成功率。

papers.title: Prompt-Free and Efficient SAM2 Adaptation for Biomedical Semantic Segmentation via Dual Adapters
papers.abstract: Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM2) demonstrated impressive zero-shot capabilities on natural images but faces challenges in biomedical segmentation due to significant domain shifts and prompt dependency. To address these limitations, we propose a prompt-free, parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework designed for multi-class segmentation on variable-sized inputs. We introduce a convolutional Positional Encoding Generator to adapt effectively to arbitrary aspect ratios and present a dual-adapter strategy: High-Performance Adapter utilizing deformable convolutions for precise boundary modeling and Lightweight Adapter employing structural re-parameterization to minimize inference latency. Experiments on ISBI 2012, Kvasir-SEG, Synapse, and ACDC datasets demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms strong adaptation baselines. Specifically, our method improved segmentation accuracy by up to 19.66\% over the vanilla SAM2, while reducing computational costs by approximately 87\% compared to heavyweight medical SAM adaptations, establishing a superior trade-off between accuracy and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出无提示、参数高效的SAM2微调框架，通过双适配器在医学图像分割中实现高精度与高效率。
analysis.research_motivation: SAM2在自然图像上表现优异，但直接应用于医学图像分割时面临领域差异大和依赖提示输入的问题，现有适配方法计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖提示且保持参数高效的前提下，使SAM2适应多类别、变尺寸输入的医学图像分割任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出无提示的SAM2微调框架，包含卷积位置编码生成器适应任意宽高比，以及双适配器策略：高性能适配器（可变形卷积）精确建模边界，轻量适配器（结构重参数化）降低推理延迟。
contributions: 提出无提示、参数高效的SAM2医学图像分割微调框架。
设计双适配器策略，在精度和效率之间取得优越平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在ISBI 2012、Kvasir-SEG、Synapse和ACDC四个数据集上实验，相比强基线方法，分割精度最高提升19.66%，计算成本降低约87%。
limitations: 可能仅在特定医学图像模态上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
双适配器设计可能增加模型复杂度，部署时需权衡。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无提示、参数高效的SAM2微调框架，通过双适配器在医学图像分割中实现高精度与高效率。

papers.title: BehaviorGuard: Online Backdoor Defense for Deep Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Backdoor attacks pose a serious threat to deep reinforcement learning (DRL). Current defenses typically rely on reward anomalies to reverse-engineer triggers and model finetuning to remove backdoors. However, complex trigger patterns undermine their robustness, and fine-tuning entails high costs, limiting practical utility. Therefore, we shift defense concerns to trigger-agnostic backdoor output behaviors and propose BehaviorGuard, an online behavior-based backdoor detection and mitigation framework for DRL. Specifically, we find that regardless of attacks, backdoored policies induce consistent shifts in action distributions to ensure reliable activation, leaving detectable traces in high-quantile regions and distribution tails, even in the absence of triggers. Based on this, we design a novel metric that captures behavioral drift in action distributions to identify and suppress backdoor actions at runtime. To our knowledge, this is the first online backdoor defense that counters attacks both in single- and multi-agent DRL. Evaluated across diverse benchmarks with different backdoor attacks, BehaviorGuard consistently surpasses prior methods in both efficacy and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个在线行为级后门防御框架BehaviorGuard，通过检测动作分布偏移来防御单/多智能体DRL后门攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有后门防御依赖奖励异常和模型微调，对复杂触发器鲁棒性差且成本高，缺乏实用在线方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖触发器先验知识且无需微调的情况下，在线检测并抑制DRL中的后门攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 后门策略在无触发器时也会在动作分布的高分位数和尾部区域留下可检测的偏移痕迹。
analysis.method: 设计度量指标实时捕获动作分布的行为漂移，在线识别并抑制后门动作。
contributions: 首个同时适用于单智能体和多智能体DRL的在线后门防御框架
提出基于动作分布行为漂移的触发器无关检测指标
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和不同后门攻击下评估，BehaviorGuard在有效性和效率上均优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能对正常策略的分布偏移敏感
未讨论对抗性规避攻击
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个在线行为级后门防御框架BehaviorGuard，通过检测动作分布偏移来防御单/多智能体DRL后门攻击。

papers.title: PragLocker: Protecting Agent Intellectual Property in Untrusted Deployments via Non-Portable Prompts
papers.abstract: LLM agents rely on prompts to implement task-specific capabilities based on foundation LLMs, making agent prompts valuable intellectual property. However, in untrusted deployments, adversaries can copy and reuse these prompts with other proprietary LLMs, causing economic losses. To protect these prompts, we identify four key challenges: proactivity, runtime protection, usability, and non-portability that existing approaches fail to address. We present PragLocker, a prompt protection scheme that satisfies these requirements. PragLocker constructs function-preserving obfuscated prompts by anchoring semantics with code symbols and then using target-model feedback to inject noise, yielding prompts that only work on the target LLM. Experiments across multiple agent systems, datasets, and foundation LLMs show that PragLocker substantially reduces cross-LLM portability, maintains target performance, and remains robust against adaptive attackers.

analysis.tldr: 提出PragLocker，通过非便携提示保护LLM Agent提示词知识产权，防止跨模型盗用。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent的提示词是宝贵的知识产权，但在不可信部署中易被对手复制并用于其他专有LLM，造成经济损失。现有方法无法同时满足主动性、运行时保护、可用性和非便携性。
analysis.problem: 如何保护LLM Agent提示词，使其仅能在目标LLM上有效工作，防止被跨模型盗用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PragLocker通过代码符号锚定语义构建功能保持的混淆提示，并利用目标模型反馈注入噪声，生成仅对目标LLM有效的提示。
contributions: 识别了提示保护中的四个关键挑战：主动性、运行时保护、可用性和非便携性。
提出PragLocker方案，通过语义锚定和噪声注入实现非便携提示保护。
analysis.experiments: 在多个Agent系统、数据集和基础LLM上实验，表明PragLocker显著降低跨LLM便携性，保持目标性能，并对自适应攻击者具有鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖目标模型反馈的质量。
对极端复杂的提示或攻击者可能仍有风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PragLocker，通过非便携提示保护LLM Agent提示词知识产权，防止跨模型盗用。

papers.title: Towards Reliable LLM Evaluation: Correcting the Winner's Curse in Adaptive Benchmarking
papers.abstract: Adaptive prompt and program search makes LLM evaluation selection-sensitive. Once benchmark items are reused inside tuning, the observed winner's score need not estimate the fresh-data performance of the full tune-then-deploy procedure. We study inference for this procedure-level target under explicit tuning budgets. We propose SIREN, a selection-aware repeated-split reporting protocol that freezes the post-search shortlist, separates splitwise selection from held-out evaluation, and uses an item-level Gaussian multiplier bootstrap for uncertainty quantification. In a fixed-shortlist regime with smooth stabilized selection, the estimator admits a first-order item-level representation, and the bootstrap yields valid simultaneous inference on a finite budget grid. This supports confidence intervals for procedure-performance curves and pre-specified equal-budget and cross-budget comparisons. Controlled simulations and MMLU-Pro tuning experiments show that winner-based reporting can be optimistic and can change deployment conclusions, while SIREN remains close to the finite-sample reporting target.

analysis.tldr: 提出SIREN协议，通过选择感知的重复分割报告纠正自适应基准测试中的赢家诅咒，实现可靠的LLM评估。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM评估中自适应提示和程序搜索导致选择敏感性，重复使用基准项进行调优会使观察到的赢家分数无法估计完整调优-部署流程的新数据性能，导致评估不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何在校准预算下对调优-部署流程的目标进行有效的统计推断，纠正自适应基准测试中的赢家诅咒。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出基于赢家的报告可能过于乐观并改变部署结论，而SIREN协议能保持接近有限样本报告目标。
analysis.method: 提出SIREN协议，一种选择感知的重复分割报告方法，冻结搜索后的候选列表，将分割选择与保留评估分离，并使用项目级高斯乘子自助法进行不确定性量化。
contributions: 提出SIREN协议，实现选择感知的重复分割报告，纠正自适应基准测试中的赢家诅咒。
在固定候选列表和平滑稳定选择下，证明估计量具有一阶项目级表示，且自助法在有限预算网格上提供有效的同步推断。
通过控制模拟和MMLU-Pro调优实验验证SIREN的有效性，显示赢家报告可能乐观且改变部署结论。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到进行了控制模拟和MMLU-Pro调优实验，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖于固定候选列表和平滑稳定选择的假设，实际中可能不满足。
未讨论大规模或复杂搜索空间下的计算效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SIREN协议，通过选择感知的重复分割报告纠正自适应基准测试中的赢家诅咒，实现可靠的LLM评估。

papers.title: Smart Railway Obstruction Detection System using IoT and Computer Vision
papers.abstract: Railway track intrusions pose a critical safety challenge for Indian Railways, encompassing wildlife incursions and deliberate malicious obstructions. The December 2025 collision in Assam, in which seven elephants were killed by the Rajdhani Express, underscores the urgency of effective real-time detection. Existing solutions such as the optical fiber-based Gajraj system suffer from prohibitive costs (\$1000/km) and high false alarm rates, limiting deployment to only 20 of India's 101 elephant corridors. This paper proposes NETRA, a cost-effective, internet-independent intrusion detection system deployed on Raspberry Pi Zero W and Raspberry Pi 4 edge platforms. NETRA employs probabilistic sensor fusion integrating a PIR motion sensor and an HC-SR04 ultrasonic distance sensor with a tunable threshold (tau_c = 0.65), enabling event-driven camera activation that reduces unnecessary visual processing by 52%. Upon confirmed intrusion, edge-AI classification using MobileNet-SSD (Pi Zero) or YOLOv5 ONNX (Pi 4) identifies threats including humans, large animals, and track obstructions. Confirmed threats are transmitted via LoRa (868 MHz) to alert the locomotive driver within 2.4 seconds end-to-end. Experimental evaluation across 113 motion events demonstrated 95% detection accuracy with zero false alarms through probabilistic fusion, compared to 85% for binary methods. Raspberry Pi 4 with YOLOv5 achieved 83.5% elephant F1-score, a 5.6x improvement over Pi Zero's heuristic approach (14.8%). LoRa communication achieved 100% packet delivery across 1-2 km in field trials. NETRA reduces deployment cost by 75% (\$247/km vs \$1000/km for Gajraj) while providing unified detection of both wildlife and obstruction threats.

analysis.tldr: 提出NETRA系统，利用IoT和计算机视觉实现低成本、高精度的铁路障碍物检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 印度铁路面临轨道入侵（野生动物和人为障碍物）的安全挑战，现有系统（如Gajraj）成本高（$1000/km）且误报率高，仅覆盖101条大象走廊中的20条，亟需经济有效的实时检测方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在低成本、无互联网条件下实现铁路轨道入侵的实时、准确检测，并同时覆盖野生动物和人为障碍物。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: NETRA系统：在Raspberry Pi Zero W和Pi 4边缘平台上，通过PIR运动传感器和HC-SR04超声波距离传感器进行概率传感器融合（阈值τ_c=0.65），事件驱动摄像头激活（减少52%不必要视觉处理），然后使用MobileNet-SSD（Pi Zero）或YOLOv5 ONNX（Pi 4）进行边缘AI分类，确认威胁后通过LoRa（868 MHz）在2.4秒内发送警报。
contributions: 提出NETRA系统，结合概率传感器融合和边缘AI，实现低成本（$247/km）、低误报的铁路障碍物检测。
在113个运动事件上实现95%检测准确率和零误报，LoRa通信在1-2公里内100%包送达率。
analysis.experiments: 在113个运动事件上评估，概率融合方法检测准确率95%、零误报（二进制方法85%）；Raspberry Pi 4 + YOLOv5大象F1分数83.5%（Pi Zero启发式方法14.8%）；LoRa在1-2公里现场测试中100%包送达率。
limitations: 可能未在极端天气或复杂地形下充分测试。
系统依赖特定传感器和边缘设备，扩展性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NETRA系统，利用IoT和计算机视觉实现低成本、高精度的铁路障碍物检测。

papers.title: Beyond Uniform Credit Assignment: Selective Eligibility Traces for RLVR
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become a key approach for improving the reasoning abilities of large language models. However, widely used critic-free algorithms such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) necessitate a ``uniform credit assignment'' assumption that indiscriminately broadcast trajectory-level advantages, hindering learning efficiency by failing to distinguish critical reasoning steps. To address this limitation, we propose Selective Eligibility Traces (S-trace). Grounded in the intuition of partial trust region preservation, we initially introduce P-trace as a sample-efficient, critic-free eligibility traces method, upon which we build S-trace, implementing a sparse eligibility traces mechanism to further mitigate variance and achieve fine-grained credit assignment by selectively masking low-entropy tokens. Theoretically, we contextualize the recent Group Sequence Policy Optimization (GSPO) method within the critic-free eligibility traces framework, identifying it as a special instance of the eligibility traces method operating under uniform credit assignment. Experiments demonstrate that S-trace not only outperforms GRPO, showing gains of 0.49\% on Qwen3-1.7B and 3.16\% on Qwen3-4B, and maintaining a robust 2.98\% improvement when scaled further to Qwen3-8B in average pass@16, but notably achieves this with simultaneously higher sample and token efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出选择性资格迹S-trace，通过细粒度信用分配提升RLVR训练效率。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR中广泛使用的无评论家算法（如GRPO）采用均匀信用分配假设，无法区分关键推理步骤，导致学习效率低下。
analysis.problem: 解决无评论家RLVR算法中均匀信用分配导致的训练效率低和方差大的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 均匀信用分配假设将轨迹级优势无差别地广播到所有token，忽略了关键推理步骤的差异。
analysis.method: 提出选择性资格迹S-trace，基于部分信任域保持的P-trace，通过选择性掩码低熵token实现稀疏资格迹，达到细粒度信用分配。
contributions: 提出P-trace，一种样本高效的无评论家资格迹方法
提出S-trace，通过稀疏资格迹实现细粒度信用分配，降低方差
理论证明GSPO是均匀信用分配下资格迹方法的特例
实验表明S-trace在多个模型上优于GRPO，且样本和token效率更高
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-1.7B、Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B上评估pass@16，S-trace分别提升0.49%、3.16%和2.98%。
limitations: 仅适用于无评论家RLVR场景
稀疏掩码策略可能对某些任务不敏感
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出选择性资格迹S-trace，通过细粒度信用分配提升RLVR训练效率。

papers.title: TheraAgent: Self-Improving Therapeutic Agent for Precise and Comprehensive Treatment Planning
papers.abstract: Formulating a treatment plan is inherently a complex reasoning and refinement task rather than a simple generation problem. However, existing large language models (LLMs) mainly rely on one-shot output without explicit verification, which may result in rough, incomplete, and potentially unsafe treatment plans. To address these limitations, we propose TheraAgent, an agentic framework that replaces one-shot generation with an iterative generate-judge-refine pipeline. By mirroring the actual reasoning process of human experts who iteratively revise treatment plans, our framework progressively transforms coarse and incomplete drafts into precise, comprehensive, and safer therapeutic regimens. To facilitate the critical judge component, we introduce TheraJudge, a treatment-specific evaluation module integrated into the inference loop to enforce clinical standards. Experiments show TheraAgent achieves state-of-the-art results on HealthBench, leading in Accuracy and Completeness. In expert evaluations, it attains an 86% win rate against physicians, with superior Targeting and Harm Control. Moreover, the highly agreement between TheraJudge and HealthBench evaluations confirms the reliability of our framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出TheraAgent框架，通过迭代生成-判断-优化流程提升治疗计划质量，在HealthBench上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM生成治疗计划主要依赖一次性输出，缺乏显式验证，导致计划粗糙、不完整且存在安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM生成精确、全面且安全的治疗计划，而非一次性粗糙输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TheraAgent框架，采用迭代的生成-判断-优化流程，并引入治疗专用评估模块TheraJudge在推理循环中强制执行临床标准。
contributions: 提出TheraAgent，一个自改进的治疗计划智能体框架，通过迭代精炼替代一次性生成。
引入TheraJudge评估模块，在推理过程中确保临床标准，并与HealthBench评估高度一致。
analysis.experiments: 在HealthBench上达到SOTA，准确率和完整性领先；专家评估中，对医生胜率86%，在靶向性和危害控制上表现优越。
limitations: 可能依赖特定治疗领域的数据和评估标准，泛化性需进一步验证。
迭代过程可能增加推理时间和计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TheraAgent框架，通过迭代生成-判断-优化流程提升治疗计划质量，在HealthBench上达到SOTA。

papers.title: When Language Overwrites Vision: Over-Alignment and Geometric Debiasing in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) increasingly power high-stakes applications, from medical imaging to autonomous systems, yet they routinely hallucinate, confidently describing content not present in the input. We investigate the root causes of these failure modes with a mechanistic analysis focusing on the decoder-based VLMs. We trace these failure modes to a geometric over-alignment: to bridge the modality gap required by attention mechanisms, decoder-based VLMs over-align visual embeddings with the text manifold, injecting a statistical linguistic bias that systematically overshadows fine-grained visual evidence. While prior work either aggressively closes this gap or suppresses hallucinations through expensive black-box decoding strategies, none addresses the underlying geometric cause. We provide the first quantitative characterization of this over-alignment, demonstrating that linguistic bias concentrates in the top principal components of a universal, dataset-agnostic text subspace. Building on this insight, we propose two complementary remedies: a training-free inference strategy and a bias-aware fine-tuning paradigm, both of which explicitly project out this subspace from visual representations. Our methods significantly reduce hallucinations across POPE, CHAIR, and AMBER benchmarks, and improve CLAIR scores on long-form captioning tasks, with the training-free variant adding no computational overhead over the base model.

analysis.tldr: 发现VLM幻觉源于视觉嵌入与文本流形的几何过对齐，提出无训练推理和微调两种去偏方法。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在医疗、自动驾驶等高风险场景中频繁产生幻觉，现有方法未从几何根源解决。
analysis.problem: VLM中视觉嵌入与文本流形的几何过对齐导致语言偏见压倒细粒度视觉证据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语言偏见集中在通用文本子空间的前几个主成分中，形成系统性统计偏差。
analysis.method: 通过投影去除视觉表示中的文本子空间，提出无训练推理和偏置感知微调两种策略。
contributions: 首次定量刻画VLM的几何过对齐现象
提出两种互补的去偏方法，无训练变体不增加计算开销
analysis.experiments: 在POPE、CHAIR、AMBER上显著减少幻觉，在长描述任务上提升CLAIR分数。
limitations: 可能仅适用于解码器型VLM
文本子空间的通用性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现VLM幻觉源于视觉嵌入与文本流形的几何过对齐，提出无训练推理和微调两种去偏方法。

papers.title: From Coordinate Matching to Structural Alignment: Rethinking Prototype Alignment in Heterogeneous Federated Learning
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous federated learning (HtFL) aims to enable collaboration among clients that differ in both data distributions and model architectures. Prototype-based methods, which communicate class-level feature centers (prototypes) instead of full model parameters, have recently shown strong potential for HtFL. Existing prototype-based HtFL methods typically reuse the MSE-based or cosine-based alignment mechanism developed for homogeneous FL when aligning client-specific representations with global prototypes. These approaches are essentially coordinate alignment, where representations of clients are forced to match the global prototypes in the embedding space in an element-wise manner. Such alignment implicitly assumes that all clients should map their representations into the feature subspace defined by the global prototypes. This assumption is reasonable in homogeneous FL, where all clients share the same feature extractor. However, it becomes problematic in HtFL, since heterogeneous feature extractors naturally induce client-specific feature subspaces, and forcing all clients to optimize within a single global subspace unnecessarily suppresses their learning capacity. We observe that coordinate alignment implicitly couples two distinct objectives: aligning inter-class semantic structure, which is directly beneficial for classification, and enforcing a shared feature basis, which is unnecessary and even harmful under model heterogeneity. Building on this insight, we design FedSAF, which shifts the alignment objective from absolute coordinates to inter-class relational structure. We demonstrate that structural alignment consistently outperforms coordinate alignment in heterogeneous settings. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that our structural alignment outperforms state-of-the-art prototype-based HtFL methods by up to 3.52\%.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构对齐替代坐标对齐，解决异构联邦学习中原型对齐的隐式假设问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 异构联邦学习中客户端模型架构不同，现有原型对齐方法沿用同构FL的坐标对齐方式，强制所有客户端在统一特征子空间优化，抑制了异构客户端的表征学习能力。
analysis.problem: 现有原型对齐方法隐式假设所有客户端共享同一特征子空间，导致异构场景下对齐目标耦合了不必要的共享特征基约束，损害模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到坐标对齐隐式耦合了两个不同目标：对齐类间语义结构（有益）和强制共享特征基（有害），后者在模型异构下不必要且有害。
analysis.method: 提出FedSAF，将对齐目标从绝对坐标转向类间关系结构，通过结构对齐实现客户端与全局原型之间的语义一致性。
contributions: 揭示了异构联邦学习中坐标对齐的隐式假设问题及其对学习能力的抑制。
提出结构对齐方法FedSAF，在多个基准上超越现有方法，提升达3.52%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，结构对齐方法优于现有最先进的基于原型的异构联邦学习方法，最高提升3.52%。
limitations: 可能对类间关系结构的定义和计算有额外开销。
未讨论极端异构或非独立同分布数据下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构对齐替代坐标对齐，解决异构联邦学习中原型对齐的隐式假设问题。

papers.title: Temporal Smoothness Doubly Robust Learning for Debiased Knowledge Tracing
papers.abstract: Knowledge Tracing (KT) is fundamental to intelligent education systems, yet relies on educational logs that are selectively observed. The non-random nature of exercise recommendations and student choices inevitably induces severe selection bias. Most existing KT methods neglect this issue, training on observed logs using standard empirical risk, which yields biased mastery estimates and accumulates errors in subsequent recommendations. To address this, we introduce a doubly robust (DR) formulation for KT that integrates a propensity model with an error imputation model, theoretically guaranteeing unbiasedness if either model is accurate. Beyond unbiasedness, in the sequential setting of KT, we identify that the estimator's performance is compromised by variance-dependent stochastic deviations that accumulate over time, thereby causing training instability and limiting performance. To mitigate this, we derive a generalization bound that explicitly characterizes the impact of estimator variance and identifies temporal smoothness as a key factor in controlling it. Building on these theoretical insights, we propose the Temporal Smoothness Doubly Robust (TSDR) framework. TSDR jointly optimizes the KT predictor and the imputation model with a smoothness regularizer, effectively reducing variance while preserving the unbiasedness guarantee of DR. Experiments on multiple real-world benchmarks demonstrate that TSDR consistently enhances various state-of-the-art KT backbones, underscoring the vital role of principled bias correction in KT.

analysis.tldr: 提出时序平滑双重稳健学习框架，通过结合倾向性模型和误差插补模型并引入平滑正则化，有效消除知识追踪中的选择偏差并降低方差。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识追踪依赖有偏的教育日志，现有方法忽略选择偏差导致掌握估计不准确，影响后续推荐。
analysis.problem: 知识追踪中因非随机练习推荐和选择导致的严重选择偏差问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在时序设定下，双重稳健估计器的性能受方差相关随机偏差影响，随时间累积导致训练不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出时序平滑双重稳健（TSDR）框架，联合优化KT预测器和插补模型，并添加平滑正则化以降低方差同时保持无偏性。
contributions: 首次将双重稳健方法引入知识追踪，理论保证无偏性。
推导泛化界，识别时序平滑是控制方差的关键，并提出TSDR框架。
analysis.experiments: 在多个真实世界基准上，TSDR一致提升多种最先进KT骨干的性能。
limitations: 可能依赖倾向性模型和插补模型的准确性。
平滑正则化的超参数选择可能影响效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时序平滑双重稳健学习框架，通过结合倾向性模型和误差插补模型并引入平滑正则化，有效消除知识追踪中的选择偏差并降低方差。

papers.title: TableVista: Benchmarking Multimodal Table Reasoning under Visual and Structural Complexity
papers.abstract: We introduce TableVista, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating foundation models in multimodal table reasoning under visual and structural complexity. TableVista consists of 3,000 high-quality table reasoning problems, where each instance is expanded into 10 distinct visual variants through our multi-style rendering and transformation pipeline. This process encompasses diverse scenario styles, robustness perturbations, and vision-only configurations, culminating in 30,000 multimodal samples for a multi-dimensional evaluation. We conduct an extensive evaluation of 29 state-of-the-art open-source and proprietary foundation models on TableVista. Through comprehensive quantitative and qualitative analysis, we find that while evaluated models remain largely stable across diverse rendering styles, they exhibit pronounced performance degradation on complex structural layouts and vision-only settings, revealing that current models struggle to maintain reasoning consistency when structural complexity combines with visually integrated presentations. These findings highlight critical gaps in current multimodal capabilities, providing insights for advancing more robust and reliable table understanding models.

analysis.tldr: TableVista 是一个多模态表格推理基准，通过 30,000 个样本评估 29 个模型，发现模型在复杂结构和纯视觉设置下性能显著下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表格推理基准缺乏视觉和结构复杂性的系统评估，无法揭示多模态模型在真实场景中的鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 评估多模态基础模型在视觉和结构复杂性下的表格推理能力，特别是渲染风格、结构布局和纯视觉设置的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在不同渲染风格下表现稳定，但在复杂结构布局和纯视觉设置下性能显著下降，表明结构复杂性与视觉集成呈现结合时推理一致性不足。
analysis.method: 构建包含 3,000 个高质量表格推理问题，通过多风格渲染和变换流水线生成 10 种视觉变体，共 30,000 个多模态样本，涵盖多种场景风格、鲁棒性扰动和纯视觉配置。
contributions: 提出 TableVista 基准，包含 30,000 个多模态表格推理样本，覆盖视觉和结构复杂性。
对 29 个开源和专有基础模型进行系统评估，揭示模型在复杂结构和纯视觉设置下的关键缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 对 29 个模型进行定量和定性分析，评估不同渲染风格、结构布局和视觉配置下的性能。
limitations: 基准仅关注表格推理，可能不适用于其他多模态任务。
未提供模型性能改进的具体方法或解决方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TableVista 是一个多模态表格推理基准，通过 30,000 个样本评估 29 个模型，发现模型在复杂结构和纯视觉设置下性能显著下降。

papers.title: Hallucination as an Anomaly: Dynamic Intervention via Probabilistic Circuits
papers.abstract: One of the most critical challenges in Large Language Models is their tendency to hallucinate, i.e., produce factually incorrect responses. Existing approaches show promising results in terms of hallucination correction, but still suffer from a main limitation: they apply corrections indiscriminately to every token, corrupting also the originally correct generations. To overcome this drawback, we propose PCNET, a Probabilistic Circuit trained as a tractable density estimator over the LLM residual stream. The method detects hallucinations as geometric anomalies on the factual manifold, which is done via exact Negative Log-Likelihood computation, hence without the need for sampling, external verifiers, or weight modifications, as in existing techniques. To demonstrate its effectiveness, we exploit PCNET as a dynamic gate that distinguishes hallucinated from factual hidden states at each decoding step. This triggers our second main contribution, PC-LDCD (Probabilistic Circuit Latent Density Contrastive Decoding), only when the latent geometry deviates from factual regions, while leaving correct generations untouched. Across four LLMs, ranging from 1B to 8B models, and four benchmarks covering conversational reasoning, knowledge-intensive QA, reading comprehension, and truthfulness, PCNET achieves near-perfect hallucination detection across CoQA, SQuAD v2.0, and TriviaQA, with AUROC reaching up to 99%. Moreover, PC-LDCD obtains the highest True+Info, MC2, and MC3 scores on TruthfulQA in three out of four models, in comparison with state-of-the-art baselines, while reducing the mean corruption rate to 53.7% and achieving a preservation rate of 79.3%. Our proposed method is publicly available on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 提出PCNET概率电路检测LLM幻觉作为流形异常，并仅在必要时触发对比解码纠正，减少对正确生成的破坏。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有幻觉纠正方法对所有token无差别应用修正，会破坏原本正确的生成，需要更精准的干预策略。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏正确生成的前提下，仅对幻觉token进行动态干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 幻觉在LLM残差流中表现为事实流形上的几何异常，可通过精确负对数似然检测。
analysis.method: 训练概率电路PCNET作为残差流的可处理密度估计器，通过精确负对数似然检测异常；仅在检测到幻觉时使用PC-LDCD对比解码，否则保留原始生成。
contributions: 提出PCNET，利用概率电路进行无采样、无外部验证器的幻觉检测，通过精确负对数似然识别几何异常。
提出PC-LDCD，仅在检测到幻觉时动态触发对比解码，减少对正确生成的破坏，降低平均破坏率至53.7%，保留率79.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在四个LLM（1B-8B）和四个基准（CoQA, SQuAD v2.0, TriviaQA, TruthfulQA）上评估，PCNET在CoQA、SQuAD v2.0、TriviaQA上AUROC接近99%；PC-LDCD在TruthfulQA上三个指标（True+Info, MC2, MC3）在四个模型中的三个上取得最高分。
limitations: 可能依赖残差流表示的质量，对模型架构变化敏感。
概率电路的训练需要额外计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PCNET概率电路检测LLM幻觉作为流形异常，并仅在必要时触发对比解码纠正，减少对正确生成的破坏。

papers.title: HaM-World: Soft-Hamiltonian World Models with Selective Memory for Planning
papers.abstract: World models enable model-based planning through learned latent dynamics, but imagined rollouts become unstable as the planning horizon grows or the dynamics distribution shifts. We argue that this instability reflects two missing structures in planner-facing latents: history-conditioned memory for approximate Markov completeness, and geometric organization that separates configuration, momentum, and task semantics. We propose HaM-World (HMW), a structured world model that decomposes the latent state into a canonical (q, p) subspace and a context subspace c, while using Mamba selective state-space memory as the history-conditioned input to the same latent dynamics. Within this interface, (q, p) evolves through an energy-derived Hamiltonian vector field plus learnable residual/control dynamics, while c captures semantic, dissipative, and non-conservative factors. This gives the planner a single latent state shared by dynamics prediction, reward/value estimation, imagined rollouts, and CEM action search. On four DeepMind Control Suite tasks, HaM-World reaches the highest Avg. AUC (117.9, +9.5%), reduces long-horizon rollout error to 45% of a strong baseline model, and wins 11/12 k in {3,5,7} MSE cells. Under 12 OOD perturbations spanning dynamics shifts, action delay, and observation masking, HaM-World achieves the highest return in every condition, with average OOD-return gains of 10.2% on Finger Spin and 13.6% on Reacher Easy. Mechanism diagnostics further show bounded action-free Hamiltonian-energy drift, structured energy variation under policy rollouts, and coherent control-induced energy transfer, supporting the intended Soft-Hamiltonian dynamics design.

analysis.tldr: HaM-World通过将潜状态分解为哈密顿(q,p)子空间和上下文子空间，并引入Mamba选择性记忆，实现了长时域稳定规划与强OOD泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于世界模型的规划在长时域或分布偏移下不稳定，现有方法缺乏历史条件记忆和几何结构化的潜状态组织。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个结构化的世界模型，使得潜状态同时具备近似马尔可夫完备性、几何组织性，并支持稳定长时域规划与OOD泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出规划不稳定性源于潜状态缺少历史条件记忆（导致马尔可夫不完备）和几何组织（无法分离构型、动量与任务语义）。
analysis.method: 将潜状态分解为规范(q,p)子空间（由哈密顿向量场演化）和上下文子空间c（捕获语义、耗散等非保守因素），并使用Mamba选择性状态空间记忆作为历史条件输入到同一潜动力学中。
contributions: 提出HaM-World，一种结构化世界模型，通过(q,p)子空间和上下文子空间分解实现稳定长时域规划。
引入Mamba选择性记忆作为历史条件输入，增强潜状态的马尔可夫完备性。
在DeepMind Control Suite上达到最高Avg. AUC（117.9，+9.5%），长时域滚动误差降至强基线的45%，并在12种OOD扰动下均取得最高回报。
analysis.experiments: 在DeepMind Control Suite的四个任务上评估，报告了Avg. AUC、长时域滚动误差、MSE对比以及12种OOD扰动下的回报增益。
limitations: 可能仅适用于连续控制任务，离散动作空间未验证。
哈密顿动力学假设可能不适用于高度非保守系统。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HaM-World通过将潜状态分解为哈密顿(q,p)子空间和上下文子空间，并引入Mamba选择性记忆，实现了长时域稳定规划与强OOD泛化。

papers.title: MAS-Algorithm: A Workflow for Solving Algorithmic Programming Problems with a Multi-Agent System
papers.abstract: Algorithmic problem solving serves as a rigorous testbed for evaluating structured reasoning in AI coding systems, as it directly reflects a model's ability to perform structured reasoning in complex scenarios. Existing approaches predominantly rely on model-centric strategies, such as architectural modifications and data scaling, which are costly and offer limited interpretability. Alternative methods leveraging external tools or prompting techniques (e.g., chain-of-thought) are often fragmented and lack a unified framework. In this paper, we propose MAS-Algorithm, a systematic multi-agent workflow for algorithmic problem solving inspired by the practices of competitive programmers and algorithm engineers. Our framework decomposes the end-to-end solving process into modular stages, enabling structured reasoning, tool integration, and flexible coordination among agents. The design emphasizes both rigor and extensibility, allowing it to generalize across diverse problem types. Experimental results on a self-constructed benchmark demonstrate consistent improvements across multiple Qwen series models, achieving an average gain of 6.48% in acceptance rate. In contrast, parameter-efficient fine-tuning on the same data yields only a marginal improvement of 0.89%. We further observe a 4.72% gain on LiveCodeBench-Pro, along with consistent improvements across additional accuracy and efficiency metrics. Beyond performance gains, we conduct comprehensive analyses to better understand the reasoning process within the workflow, including error patterns and cross-scenario behaviors. We further perform customized replacement and ablation studies to explore the upper bound of the framework, showing that individual agents can contribute improvements of up to 27.7%. These results highlight the strong potential of MAS-Algorithm for advancing AI-driven algorithmic reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体工作流MAS-Algorithm，通过模块化分解和工具集成提升算法编程问题的解决能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI编码系统在算法问题求解中依赖模型中心策略（如架构修改、数据扩展），成本高且可解释性差；外部工具或提示方法碎片化，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个系统化、可扩展的多智能体工作流，以提升算法编程问题的结构化推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MAS-Algorithm将端到端求解过程分解为模块化阶段，支持结构化推理、工具集成和智能体间灵活协调，受竞赛程序员和算法工程师实践启发。
contributions: 提出MAS-Algorithm，一个系统化的多智能体工作流，用于算法编程问题求解。
在自建基准和LiveCodeBench-Pro上验证了有效性，平均接受率提升6.48%，并分析了错误模式和上限。
analysis.experiments: 在自建基准上，Qwen系列模型平均接受率提升6.48%（对比参数高效微调仅0.89%）；LiveCodeBench-Pro上提升4.72%；单个智能体贡献可达27.7%。
limitations: 依赖自建基准，泛化性需进一步验证。
多智能体协调可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体工作流MAS-Algorithm，通过模块化分解和工具集成提升算法编程问题的解决能力。

papers.title: MobileEgo Anywhere: Open Infrastructure for long horizon egocentric data on commodity hardware
papers.abstract: The recent advancement of Vision Language Action (VLA) models has driven a critical demand for large scale egocentric datasets. However, existing datasets are often limited by short episode durations, typically spanning only a few minutes, which fails to capture the long horizon temporal dependencies necessary for complex robotic task execution. To bridge this gap, we present MobileEgo Anywhere, a framework designed to facilitate the collection of robust, hour plus egocentric trajectories using commodity mobile hardware. We leverage the ubiquitous sensor suites of modern smartphones to provide high fidelity, long term camera pose tracking, effectively removing the high hardware barriers associated with traditional robotics data collection. Our contributions are three fold: (1) we release a novel dataset comprising 200 hours of diverse, long form egocentric data with persistent state tracking; (2) we open source a mobile application that enables any user to record egocentric data, and (3) we provide a comprehensive processing pipeline to convert raw mobile captures into standardized, training ready formats for Vision Language Action model and foundation model research. By democratizing the data collection process, this work enables the massive scale acquisition of long horizon data across varied global environments, accelerating the development of generalizable robotic policies.

analysis.tldr: 提出利用智能手机采集长时程第一人称数据的开源框架，并发布200小时数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有第一人称数据集时长仅几分钟，无法捕捉复杂机器人任务所需的长时依赖，且传统采集硬件门槛高。
analysis.problem: 如何利用廉价移动设备高效采集长时程（小时级）第一人称轨迹数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于智能手机传感器套件实现高保真长期相机位姿追踪，开发移动应用和标准化处理流水线。
contributions: 发布200小时多样化长时第一人称数据集，含持续状态追踪
开源移动应用，支持任意用户录制第一人称数据
提供完整处理流水线，将原始数据转换为VLA模型和基础模型的标准训练格式
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集可能受限于智能手机传感器精度
未提及数据标注或质量评估细节
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出利用智能手机采集长时程第一人称数据的开源框架，并发布200小时数据集。

papers.title: RAWild: Sensor-Agnostic RAW Object Detection via Physics-Guided Curve and Grid Modeling
papers.abstract: Camera sensor RAW data offers intrinsic advantages for object detection, including deeper bit depth, preserved physical information, and freedom from image signal processor (ISP) distortions. However, varying exposure conditions, spectral sensitivities, and bit depths across devices introduce substantially larger domain gaps than sRGB, making sensor-agnostic generalization a fundamental challenge. In this study, we present \textbf{RAWild}, a physics-guided global-local tone mapping framework for sensor-agnostic RAW object detection. By factoring sensor-induced variations into a global tonal correction and a spatially adaptive local color adjustment, both driven by RAW distribution priors, our framework enables a single network to train jointly across heterogeneous sensors. To further support cross-sensor generalization, we construct a physics-based RAW simulation pipeline that synthesizes realistic sensor outputs spanning diverse spectral sensitivities, illuminants, and sensor non-idealities. Extensive experiments across multiple RAW benchmarks covering bit depths from 10 to 24 demonstrate state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance under single-dataset, mixed-dataset, and challenging robustness settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理引导的全局-局部色调映射框架RAWild，实现跨传感器RAW图像目标检测。
analysis.research_motivation: RAW数据具有位深高、物理信息保留等优势，但不同传感器间的曝光、光谱灵敏度和位深差异导致域间隙远大于sRGB，阻碍了传感器无关的泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何实现传感器无关的RAW目标检测，即训练单一网络处理来自不同传感器的RAW图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同传感器在曝光条件、光谱灵敏度和位深上的差异造成显著的域间隙，这是传感器无关泛化的根本挑战。
analysis.method: 提出RAWild框架，包含物理引导的全局色调校正和空间自适应局部颜色调整，两者均由RAW分布先验驱动；并构建基于物理的RAW模拟管道生成多样化传感器输出。
contributions: 提出物理引导的全局-局部色调映射框架，实现跨传感器RAW目标检测。
构建基于物理的RAW模拟管道，支持多种光谱灵敏度、光照和传感器非理想性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个RAW基准上（位深10-24）进行实验，包括单数据集、混合数据集和鲁棒性设置，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖RAW分布先验的准确性。
模拟管道可能无法完全覆盖真实传感器的所有非理想性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理引导的全局-局部色调映射框架RAWild，实现跨传感器RAW图像目标检测。

papers.title: ICU-Bench:Benchmarking Continual Unlearning in Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress across many domains, their training on large-scale multimodal datasets raises serious privacy concerns, making effective machine unlearning increasingly necessary. However, existing benchmarks mainly focus on static or short-sequence settings, offering limited support for evaluating continual privacy deletion requests in realistic deployments. To bridge this gap, we introduce ICU-Bench, a continual multimodal unlearning benchmark built on privacy-critical document data. ICU-Bench contains 1,000 privacy-sensitive profiles from two document domains, medical reports and labor contracts, with 9,500 images, 16,000 question-answer pairs, and 100 forget tasks. Additionally, new continual unlearning metrics are introduced, facilitating a comprehensive analysis of forgetting effectiveness, historical forgetting preservation, retained utility, and stability throughout the continual unlearning process. Through extensive experiments with representative unlearning methods on ICU-Bench, we show that existing methods generally struggle in continual settings and exhibit clear limitations in balancing forgetting quality, utility preservation, and scalability over long task sequences. These findings highlight the need for multimodal unlearning methods explicitly designed for continual privacy deletion.

analysis.tldr: 提出ICU-Bench基准，用于评估多模态大模型在持续隐私删除场景下的遗忘能力，发现现有方法在持续设置中表现不佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在隐私敏感数据上训练引发严重隐私问题，需要有效的机器遗忘技术；但现有基准主要关注静态或短序列设置，无法支持实际部署中持续的隐私删除请求。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够评估多模态大模型在持续遗忘场景下性能的基准，包括遗忘效果、历史遗忘保持、保留效用和稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有遗忘方法在持续设置中普遍表现不佳，在平衡遗忘质量、效用保持和长任务序列可扩展性方面存在明显局限。
analysis.method: 构建ICU-Bench基准，包含来自医疗报告和劳动合同两个文档领域的1000个隐私敏感档案、9500张图像、16000个问答对和100个遗忘任务，并引入新的持续遗忘评估指标。
contributions: 提出首个面向多模态大模型持续遗忘的基准ICU-Bench，覆盖隐私关键文档数据。
引入新的持续遗忘评估指标，全面分析遗忘效果、历史遗忘保持、保留效用和稳定性。
通过广泛实验揭示现有遗忘方法在持续设置中的局限性，为未来研究提供方向。
analysis.experiments: 在ICU-Bench上对代表性遗忘方法进行实验，结果表明现有方法在持续设置中普遍表现不佳。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖医疗报告和劳动合同两个领域，可能无法代表所有隐私敏感场景。
未提供具体实验数值，无法量化方法间的差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ICU-Bench基准，用于评估多模态大模型在持续隐私删除场景下的遗忘能力，发现现有方法在持续设置中表现不佳。

papers.title: Whole-body CT attenuation and volume charts from routine clinical scans via evidence-grounded LLM report filtering
papers.abstract: Interpreting quantitative CT biomarkers, such as organ volume and tissue attenuation, requires large-scale healthy reference distributions. However, creating these is challenging because clinical datasets are often heavily enriched with pathology. Here, we develop an evidence-grounded, cross-verified large language model (LLM) ensemble to filter pathological findings from radiology reports, enabling the construction of pathology-reduced cohorts from over 350,000 CT examinations. Five LLMs, first, flag structure-level abnormality candidates grounded in verbatim report evidence and, second, resolve disagreements via cross-verification. Using distribution-aware generalized additive models for location, scale, and shape, we establish comprehensive whole-body reference charts for 106 anatomical structures (volumes and attenuation) across adulthood, accounting for age, sex, contrast enhancement, and acquisition parameters. Longitudinal analyses reveal structure- and contrast-dependent changes distinct from cross-sectional trends. These resources facilitate covariate-adjusted centile scoring from routine CT, supporting standardized quantitative phenotyping, multi-site imaging studies, and scalable opportunistic screening research.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM过滤临床报告中的病理发现，从大规模CT数据构建全身参考图谱。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床CT数据集常富含病理，难以获得健康参考分布，限制了定量CT生物标志物的解释。
analysis.problem: 如何从大量临床CT中构建无病理或低病理的参考分布，以建立全身器官体积和衰减的参考图表。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用证据驱动的交叉验证LLM集成过滤放射学报告中的病理发现，结合分布感知的GAMLSS模型建立参考图表。
contributions: 提出证据驱动的交叉验证LLM集成方法，有效过滤病理报告。
基于35万+CT检查构建了106个解剖结构的全身参考图表，并分析年龄、性别、对比剂等因素的影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: LLM过滤可能仍有假阴性或假阳性。
参考图表可能受限于特定扫描协议和人群。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用LLM过滤临床报告中的病理发现，从大规模CT数据构建全身参考图谱。

papers.title: In Data or Invisible: Toward a Better Digital Representation of Low-Resource Languages with Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Emerging digital technologies are exacerbating the existing divide in Open Access Data (OAD) between high-and low-resource languages, excluding many communities from participating in the global digital transformation. In this PhD proposal, we aim to address this gap, focusing on the language coverage of Linked Open Data knowledge graphs (LOD KGs). First, we identify key variables that characterize language distribution in LOD, including the number of Wikipedia articles per language edition and the number of language-tagged entities in LOD KGs. These variables are analyzed across three major multilingual LOD KGs, DBpedia, BabelNet, and Wikidata, providing insights into the representation and distribution of languages within LOD. Building on this analysis, we intend to study the impact of cross-lingual transfer candidate selection on the task of multilingual KG completion. In particular, we plan to investigate strategies based on linguistic proximity and the availability of curated annotated alignments between languages. Language proximity also motivates us to explore the benefits of analogical reasoning that relies on (dis)similarities and has not yet been investigated to identify correspondences across languages to improve KG completion performance and enhance language coverage in LOD.

analysis.tldr: 通过知识图谱改善低资源语言的数字表示，研究跨语言迁移和类比推理以提升知识图谱补全效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字技术加剧了高低资源语言之间的开放数据鸿沟，低资源语言社区被排除在全球数字转型之外，现有知识图谱对低资源语言覆盖不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用知识图谱改善低资源语言的数字表示，特别是通过跨语言迁移和类比推理提升多语言知识图谱补全中的语言覆盖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要分析了低资源语言在Linked Open Data知识图谱中代表性不足的现象，识别了关键变量（如维基百科文章数、语言标记实体数），并指出跨语言迁移候选选择对补全任务有影响。
analysis.method: 计划研究跨语言迁移候选选择策略（基于语言邻近性和人工标注对齐），并探索基于（不）相似性的类比推理以识别跨语言对应关系，从而提升知识图谱补全性能。
contributions: 识别了表征LOD中语言分布的关键变量，并在DBpedia、BabelNet、Wikidata三个多语言知识图谱中进行了分析。
提出研究跨语言迁移候选选择策略和类比推理方法以增强低资源语言覆盖。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 该研究为博士提案，尚未完成实验验证。
依赖语言邻近性和人工标注对齐，可能对资源极少的语言效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过知识图谱改善低资源语言的数字表示，研究跨语言迁移和类比推理以提升知识图谱补全效果。

papers.title: Which Are the Low-Resource Languages of the Semantic Web?
papers.abstract: Emerging digital technologies are exacerbating the existing divide in Open Access Data (OAD) between high-and low-resource languages, excluding many communities from the global digital transformation. Multilingual Linked Open Data Knowledge Graphs (LOD KGs) could contribute to mitigating this divide through cross-lingual transfer; however, no clear quantitative definition of low-resource languages has yet been established in the context of LOD KGs. In this poster, we present a methodology to analyze the distribution of languages across LOD KGs and propose a preliminary multi-level categorization based on DBpedia, BabelNet, and Wikidata. This categorization is leveraged to bring a formal definition of low-, high-, and medium-resource languages that could be later leveraged to select cross-lingual transfer candidates.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于LOD知识图谱的语言资源多级分类方法，定义低资源语言。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字技术加剧了开放获取数据中高低资源语言之间的鸿沟，但缺乏在LOD知识图谱背景下对低资源语言的明确定义。
analysis.problem: 如何定量定义LOD知识图谱中的低资源语言，并建立多级分类体系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于DBpedia、BabelNet和Wikidata分析语言分布，提出多级分类方法。
contributions: 提出一种分析LOD知识图谱中语言分布的方法论
给出低、中、高资源语言的初步形式化定义
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于三个知识图谱，可能不全面
分类标准可能需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于LOD知识图谱的语言资源多级分类方法，定义低资源语言。

papers.title: Backdoor Mitigation in Object Detection via Adversarial Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Backdoor attacks can implant malicious behaviours into deep models while preserving performance on clean data, posing a serious threat to safety-critical vision systems. Although backdoor mitigation has been studied extensively for image classification, defenses for object detection remain comparatively underdeveloped. Adversarial fine-tuning is a common backdoor mitigation approach in classification, but adapting it to detection is nontrivial as classification-oriented adversarial generation does not match the detection attack space, where attacks may cause object misclassification or disappearance, and standard detection losses can dilute the repair signal across many predictions. We address these challenges through a detection-aware adversarial fine-tuning framework for mitigating object-detection backdoors when the defender has access only to a compromised detector and a small clean dataset, without knowing the attack objective. For adversarial generation that does not require knowledge of the attack objective, we introduce soft-branch minimisation, which uses a soft gate to combine objectives aligned with misclassification and disappearance attacks, together with a detection-aware classification-loss maximisation. For targeted repair, we introduce a dual-objective fine-tuning loss applied to target-matched predictions, concentrating the defensive update on predictions most relevant to the backdoor behaviour. Experiments across CNN- and Transformer-based detectors show that our approach more effectively reduces attack success while preserving true detections, compared with classification-oriented baselines, and maintains competitive clean detection performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出检测感知的对抗微调框架，通过软分支最小化和双目标微调损失缓解目标检测后门攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 后门攻击对安全关键视觉系统构成严重威胁，现有防御主要针对图像分类，目标检测的后门缓解研究不足，且分类导向的对抗生成不匹配检测攻击空间。
analysis.problem: 在仅知受损检测器和少量干净数据、未知攻击目标的情况下，有效缓解目标检测模型中的后门攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分类导向的对抗生成不匹配检测攻击空间（攻击可能导致目标误分类或消失），标准检测损失会稀释修复信号。
analysis.method: 提出检测感知的对抗微调框架，包括软分支最小化（结合误分类和消失攻击目标的对抗生成）和双目标微调损失（针对目标匹配预测进行集中修复）。
contributions: 提出首个检测感知的对抗微调框架用于目标检测后门缓解。
引入软分支最小化实现无需攻击目标的对抗生成。
设计双目标微调损失集中修复后门相关预测。
analysis.experiments: 在CNN和Transformer检测器上实验，相比分类导向基线更有效降低攻击成功率并保持干净检测性能。
limitations: 依赖少量干净数据集。
可能不适用于所有攻击类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出检测感知的对抗微调框架，通过软分支最小化和双目标微调损失缓解目标检测后门攻击。

papers.title: Think, then Score: Decoupled Reasoning and Scoring for Video Reward Modeling
papers.abstract: Recent advances in generative video models are increasingly driven by post-training and test-time scaling, both of which critically depend on the quality of video reward models (RMs). An ideal reward model should predict accurate rewards that align with human preferences across diverse scenarios. However, existing paradigms face a fundamental dilemma: \textit{Discriminative RMs} regress rewards directly on features extracted by multimodal large language models (MLLMs) without explicit reasoning, making them prone to shortcut learning and heavily reliant on massive data scaling for generalization. In contrast, \textit{Generative RMs} with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning exhibit superior interpretability and generalization potential, as they leverage fine-grained semantic supervision to internalize the rationales behind human preferences. However, they suffer from inherent optimization bottlenecks due to the coupling of reasoning and scoring within a single autoregressive inference chain. To harness the generalization benefits of CoT reasoning while mitigating the training instability of coupled reasoning and scoring, we introduce DeScore, a training-efficient and generalizable video reward model. DeScore employs a decoupled ``think-then-score'' paradigm: an MLLM first generates an explicit CoT, followed by a dedicated discriminative scoring module consisting of a learnable query token and a regression head that predicts the final reward. DeScore is optimized via a two-stage framework: (1) a discriminative cold start incorporating a random mask mechanism to ensure robust scoring capabilities, and (2) a dual-objective reinforcement learning stage that independently refines CoT reasoning quality and calibrates the final reward, ensuring that higher-quality reasoning directly translates to superior model performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦推理与打分的视频奖励模型 DeScore，先让 MLLM 生成思维链，再用判别式打分模块预测奖励，缓解耦合带来的优化瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频奖励模型面临两难：判别式模型易走捷径、依赖大数据；生成式模型虽可解释性强但推理与打分耦合导致训练不稳定。需要一种兼顾泛化性与训练效率的奖励模型。
analysis.problem: 如何设计视频奖励模型，既能利用思维链推理的泛化优势，又能避免推理与打分耦合带来的优化瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出判别式奖励模型直接回归奖励，缺乏显式推理，易陷入捷径学习；生成式奖励模型将推理与打分耦合在自回归链中，存在固有的优化瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出 DeScore，采用解耦的“先思考后打分”范式：MLLM 先生成显式思维链，再由可学习查询令牌和回归头组成的判别式打分模块预测最终奖励。两阶段训练：判别式冷启动（含随机掩码机制）和双目标强化学习（分别优化推理质量和奖励校准）。
contributions: 提出 DeScore，一种解耦推理与打分的视频奖励模型，兼具生成式推理的泛化性和判别式打分的训练效率。
设计两阶段训练框架：判别式冷启动确保稳健打分，双目标强化学习独立优化推理质量和奖励校准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 MLLM 的推理质量，若 CoT 生成不佳会影响最终打分。
两阶段训练可能增加超参数调优复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦推理与打分的视频奖励模型 DeScore，先让 MLLM 生成思维链，再用判别式打分模块预测奖励，缓解耦合带来的优化瓶颈。

papers.title: Intentmaking and Sensemaking: Human Interaction with AI-Guided Mathematical Discovery
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence offers powerful new tools for scientific discovery, but the interaction paradigms required to effectively harness these systems remain underexplored. In this paper, we present findings from a formative user study with 11 expert mathematicians who used AlphaEvolve, an evolutionary coding agent, to tackle advanced problems in their fields of expertise. We identify and characterize a distinct workflow we term intentmaking, the iterative process of discovering, defining, and refining one's experimental goals through active system interaction. We frame this as a natural extension to sensemaking, the cognitive process of building an understanding of complex or novel data. We suggest that users enter a cycle of intentmaking (defining and updating their experiment) and sensemaking (interpreting the results) which repeats many times during the course of an investigation. Our documentation of these themes suggests an approach to designing AI tools for scientific discovery that goes beyond the existing question/answer model of many current systems, treating them as collaborative instruments rather than opaque black-box assistants.

analysis.tldr: 专家与AI进化编码代理交互时，形成“意图构建-意义构建”循环工作流，为科学发现AI工具设计提供新范式。
analysis.research_motivation: AI为科学发现提供强大工具，但有效利用这些系统的人机交互范式尚不明确，现有问答模型不足以支持探索性研究。
analysis.problem: 如何理解和设计人类与AI在数学发现中的交互流程，超越简单的问答模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户在与AI代理交互时，会经历反复的意图构建（定义和细化实验目标）和意义构建（解释结果）循环。
analysis.method: 通过11位专家数学家使用AlphaEvolve（进化编码代理）解决高级问题的形成性用户研究，识别并描述“意图构建”工作流。
contributions: 提出“意图构建”概念，作为意义构建的自然扩展，描述用户通过系统交互迭代发现、定义和细化实验目标的过程。
揭示用户进入意图构建与意义构建的循环，为设计协作式科学发现AI工具提供新思路。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 样本量较小（11位专家），可能不具广泛代表性。
研究聚焦于数学领域，其他科学领域的适用性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 专家与AI进化编码代理交互时，形成“意图构建-意义构建”循环工作流，为科学发现AI工具设计提供新范式。

papers.title: LLM-Driven Design Space Exploration of FPGA-based Accelerators
