papers.abstract: Designing field-programmable gate array (FPGA)-based accelerators for modern artificial intelligence workloads requires navigating a large and complex hardware design space encompassing architectural parameters, dataflow strategies, and memory hierarchies, making the process time-consuming and resource-intensive. While the SECDA methodology enables rapid hardware-software co-design of accelerators through SystemC simulation and FPGA execution, identifying optimal accelerator configurations still requires substantial manual effort and domain expertise. This work presents SECDA-DSE, a framework that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) into the SECDA ecosystem, comprising tools built around SECDA to automate the design space exploration (DSE) of FPGA-based accelerators. SECDA-DSE combines a structured DSE Explorer for generating accelerator configurations with an LLM Stack that performs reasoning-guided exploration using retrieval-augmented generation and chain-of-thought prompting, alongside a feedback loop that enables reinforced fine-tuning for continuous improvement. We demonstrate the feasibility of SECDA-DSE through an initial high-level synthesis based evaluation of a generated accelerator design that meets synthesis timing and resource constraints on an Zynq-7000 FPGA.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM集成到SECDA生态中，自动化FPGA加速器设计空间探索。
analysis.research_motivation: FPGA加速器设计空间庞大，手动探索耗时且依赖专家经验，现有SECDA方法仍需大量人工干预。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化FPGA加速器设计空间探索，减少人工成本和领域知识依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SECDA-DSE框架，结合结构化DSE Explorer生成配置，LLM Stack通过RAG和思维链进行推理引导探索，并利用反馈循环实现强化微调。
contributions: 将LLM集成到SECDA生态中实现自动化设计空间探索
提出结合RAG、思维链和强化微调的LLM驱动探索方法
analysis.experiments: 通过基于高层次综合的初步评估，验证了生成的加速器设计在Zynq-7000 FPGA上满足时序和资源约束。
limitations: 仅进行了初步评估，缺乏全面基准测试
可能依赖LLM的推理质量，存在不确定性
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将LLM集成到SECDA生态中，自动化FPGA加速器设计空间探索。

papers.title: Quantum-enhanced Large Language Models on Quantum Hardware via Cayley Unitary Adapters
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed artificial intelligence, yet classical architectures impose a fundamental constraint: every trainable parameter demands classical memory that scales unfavourably with model size. Quantum computing offers a qualitatively different pathway, but practical demonstrations on real hardware have remained elusive for models of practical relevance. Here we show that Cayley-parameterised unitary adapters -- quantum circuit blocks inserted into the frozen projection layers of pre-trained LLMs and executed on a 156-qubit IBM Quantum System Two superconducting processor -- improve the perplexity of Llama 3.1 8B, an 8-billion-parameter model in widespread use, by 1.4% with only 6,000 additional parameters and end-to-end inference validated on real Quantum Processing Unit (QPU). A systematic study on SmolLM2 (135M parameters), chosen for its tractability, reveals monotonically improving perplexity with unitary block dimension, 83% recovery of compression-induced degradation, and correct answers to questions that both classical baselines fail -- with a sharp noise-expressivity phase transition identifying the concrete path to quantum utility at larger qubit scales.

analysis.tldr: 在真实量子硬件上通过Cayley酉适配器提升LLM困惑度，仅用6000参数实现1.4%改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典LLM参数量大导致内存开销高，量子计算提供新路径但缺乏实际硬件验证。
analysis.problem: 如何在真实量子硬件上高效微调大规模LLM并验证其有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到困惑度随酉块维度单调改善，存在噪声-表达性相变，且量子模型能回答经典基线失败的问题。
analysis.method: 在预训练LLM的冻结投影层中插入Cayley参数化的酉适配器（量子电路块），并在156量子比特IBM量子处理器上执行推理。
contributions: 首次在真实量子硬件上验证了量子增强LLM的可行性，仅用6000参数使Llama 3.1 8B困惑度降低1.4%。
揭示了噪声-表达性相变，为更大规模量子效用提供路径。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama 3.1 8B和SmolLM2上评估，使用IBM Quantum System Two处理器，测量困惑度、压缩恢复率及问答正确性。
limitations: 仅针对特定适配器结构，泛化性未知。
量子硬件噪声可能限制更大规模应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在真实量子硬件上通过Cayley酉适配器提升LLM困惑度，仅用6000参数实现1.4%改进。

papers.title: Wisteria: A Unified Multi-Scale Feature Learning Framework for DNA Language Model
papers.abstract: DNA language model aims to decipher the regulatory grammar and semantic of genomes by capturing long range dependencies in DNA sequences. Existing methods emphasize long range token interactions but often ignore the interplay between local motifs and global dependencies. In this paper, we propose Wisteria, a genomic language model that integrates multi scale feature learning within a unified framework for DNA sequence. Specifically, Wisteria augments the Mamba based architecture with gated dilated convolutions to capture local motifs and regulatory patterns, while gated multilayer perceptrons refine global dependencies. We further introduce a Fourier based attention mechanism to support frequency domain modeling, periodic extension and length generalization. Across four experimental settings with both short and long range dependencies, Wisteria demonstrates strong performance on downstream benchmarks against competitive DNA language model baselines. These results indicate that Wisteria effectively unifies local and global dependency modeling for multi scale genomic sequence analysis.

analysis.tldr: Wisteria 通过门控膨胀卷积和傅里叶注意力统一了DNA序列的局部与全局多尺度特征学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有DNA语言模型主要关注长程token交互，忽略了局部基序与全局依赖之间的相互作用，限制了基因组序列的全面理解。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个统一框架中同时捕获DNA序列的局部基序和全局依赖关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Mamba架构，引入门控膨胀卷积捕获局部模式，门控MLP细化全局依赖，并加入傅里叶注意力机制进行频域建模和长度泛化。
contributions: 提出Wisteria，一个统一多尺度特征学习的DNA语言模型框架。
设计了门控膨胀卷积、门控MLP和傅里叶注意力三种模块协同工作。
analysis.experiments: 在短程和长程依赖的四种实验设置下，Wisteria在多个下游基准上优于竞争基线。
limitations: 可能对超长序列的计算效率有挑战。
傅里叶注意力的可解释性可能不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Wisteria 通过门控膨胀卷积和傅里叶注意力统一了DNA序列的局部与全局多尺度特征学习。

papers.title: From Drops to Grid: Noise-Aware Spatio-Temporal Neural Process for Rainfall Estimation
papers.abstract: High-resolution rainfall observations are crucial for weather forecasting, water management, and hazard mitigation. Traditional operational measurements are often biased and low-resolution, limiting their ability to capture local rainfall. Accurate high-resolution rainfall maps require integrating sparse surface observations, yet existing deep learning densification methods are hindered by rainfall's skewed, localized nature, noise, and limited spatio-temporal fusion. We present DropsToGrid, a Neural Process-based method that generates dense rainfall fields by fusing temporal sequences from noisy, irregularly distributed private weather stations with spatial context from radar. Leveraging multi-scale feature extraction, temporal attention, and multi-modal fusion, the model produces stochastic, continuous rainfall estimates and explicitly quantifies uncertainty. Evaluations on real-world datasets demonstrate that DropsToGrid outperforms both operational and deep learning baselines, generating accurate high-resolution rainfall maps with well-calibrated uncertainty, even when only few stations are available and in cross-regional scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于神经过程的噪声感知时空融合方法，从稀疏噪声站点和雷达数据生成高分辨率降雨场。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率降雨观测对天气预报和水管理至关重要，但传统测量存在偏差且分辨率低，现有深度学习方法难以处理降雨的偏态、局部性、噪声和时空融合不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从噪声、不规则分布的稀疏地面观测站与雷达数据中生成高分辨率、准确的降雨场，并量化不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 降雨数据具有偏态分布、局部性强、观测噪声大等特点，现有方法在时空融合和不确定性量化方面存在瓶颈。
analysis.method: 基于神经过程的方法DropsToGrid，融合多尺度特征提取、时间注意力和多模态融合，从噪声不规则站点时序和雷达空间上下文生成随机连续降雨估计并显式量化不确定性。
contributions: 提出一种噪声感知的神经过程方法，融合稀疏站点和雷达数据生成高分辨率降雨场。
显式量化降雨估计的不确定性，并在真实数据集上验证了优于操作和深度学习基线。
analysis.experiments: 在真实数据集上评估，DropsToGrid在仅有少量站点和跨区域场景下均优于操作和深度学习基线，生成准确高分辨率降雨图且不确定性校准良好。
limitations: 可能依赖雷达数据的可用性和质量。
神经过程的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于神经过程的噪声感知时空融合方法，从稀疏噪声站点和雷达数据生成高分辨率降雨场。

papers.title: PREFER: Personalized Review Summarization with Online Preference Learning
papers.abstract: Product reviews significantly influence purchasing decisions on e-commerce platforms. However, the sheer volume of reviews can overwhelm users, obscuring the information most relevant to their specific needs. Current e-commerce summarization systems typically produce generic, static summaries that fail to account for the fact that (i) different users care about different product characteristics, and (ii) these preferences may evolve with interactions. To address the challenge of unknown latent preferences, we propose an online learning framework that generates personalized summaries for each user. Our system iteratively refines its understanding of user preferences by incorporating feedback directly from the generated summaries over time. We provide a case study using the Amazon Reviews'23 dataset, showing in controlled simulations that online preference learning improves alignment with target user interests while maintaining summary quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出在线偏好学习框架PREFER，通过用户反馈迭代生成个性化评论摘要。
analysis.research_motivation: 电商评论数量庞大，通用摘要无法满足不同用户的个性化需求，且用户偏好会随交互动态变化。
analysis.problem: 如何为每个用户生成个性化评论摘要，并在线学习其未知且动态变化的偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在线学习框架，通过用户对生成摘要的反馈迭代更新偏好模型，从而生成个性化摘要。
contributions: 提出在线偏好学习框架PREFER，实现个性化评论摘要生成。
在Amazon Reviews'23数据集上通过模拟实验验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在Amazon Reviews'23数据集上进行受控模拟实验，显示在线偏好学习提高了与目标用户兴趣的对齐度，同时保持摘要质量。
limitations: 仅通过模拟实验验证，缺乏真实用户实验。
可能依赖初始偏好假设，冷启动问题未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在线偏好学习框架PREFER，通过用户反馈迭代生成个性化评论摘要。

papers.title: Plug-and-play Class-aware Knowledge Injection for Prompt Learning with Visual-Language Model
papers.abstract: Prompt learning has become an effective and widely used technique in enhancing vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP for various downstream tasks, particularly in zero-shot classification within specific domains. Existing methods typically focus on either learning class-shared prompts for a given domain or generating instance-specific prompts through conditional prompt learning. While these methods have achieved promising performance, they often overlook class-specific knowledge in prompt design, leading to suboptimal outcomes. The underlying reasons are: 1) class-specific prompts offer more fine-grained supervision compared to coarse class-shared prompts, which helps prevent misclassification of data from different classes into a single class; 2) compared to class-specific prompts, instance-specific prompts neglect the richer class-level information across multiple instances, potentially causing data from the same class to be divided into multiple classes. To effectively supplement the class-specific knowledge into existing methods, we propose a plug-and-play Class-Aware Knowledge Injection (CAKI) framework. CAKI comprises two key components, i.e., class-specific prompt generation and query-key prompt matching. The former encodes class-specific knowledge into prompts from few-shot samples that belong to the same class and stores the learned prompts in a class-level knowledge bank. The latter provides a plug-and-play mechanism for each test instance to retrieve relevant class-level knowledge from the knowledge bank and inject such knowledge to refine model predictions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our CAKI effectively improves the performance of existing methods on base and novel classes. Code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/yjh576/CAKI}{this https URL}.

analysis.tldr: 提出即插即用的类感知知识注入框架CAKI，通过类级知识库和查询-键匹配增强CLIP提示学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有提示学习方法要么使用类共享提示，要么生成实例特定提示，但忽略了类特定知识，导致分类性能次优。
analysis.problem: 如何将类特定知识有效注入到现有提示学习方法中，以提升视觉语言模型在下游任务中的分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 类共享提示缺乏细粒度监督，易导致不同类数据误分类为同一类；实例特定提示忽略跨实例的类级信息，可能将同类数据分割为多类。
analysis.method: 提出CAKI框架，包含类特定提示生成（从少样本中编码类知识存入知识库）和查询-键提示匹配（测试时检索并注入相关类知识）。
contributions: 提出即插即用的CAKI框架，可增强现有提示学习方法。
设计类特定提示生成和查询-键匹配机制，有效注入类级知识。
analysis.experiments: 在基类和新类上进行了大量实验，表明CAKI有效提升了现有方法的性能。
limitations: 依赖少样本生成类特定提示，可能受样本质量影响。
知识库的存储和检索效率在大型数据集上可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出即插即用的类感知知识注入框架CAKI，通过类级知识库和查询-键匹配增强CLIP提示学习。

papers.title: Null Space Constrained Contrastive Visual Forgetting for MLLM Unlearning
papers.abstract: The core challenge of machine unlearning is to strike a balance between target knowledge removal and non-target knowledge retention. In the context of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), this challenge becomes even more pronounced, as knowledge is further divided into visual and textual modalities that are tightly intertwined. In this paper, we introduce an MLLM unlearning approach that aims to forget target visual knowledge while preserving non-target visual knowledge and all textual knowledge. Specifically, we freeze the LLM backbone and achieve unlearning by fine-tuning the visual module. First, we propose a Contrastive Visual Forgetting (CVF) mechanism to separate target visual knowledge from retained visual knowledge, guiding the representations of target visual concepts toward appropriate regions in the feature space. Second, we identify the null space associated with retained knowledge and constrain the unlearning process within this space, thereby significantly mitigating degradation in knowledge retention. Third, beyond static unlearning scenarios, we extend our approach to continual unlearning, where forgetting requests arrive sequentially. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves a strong balance between effective forgetting and robust knowledge retention.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于零空间约束的对比视觉遗忘方法，在多模态大模型（MLLM）中实现目标视觉知识遗忘的同时保留非目标视觉和文本知识。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器遗忘需要在移除目标知识与保留非目标知识之间取得平衡，而在多模态大模型中，视觉和文本模态紧密交织，使得这一挑战更加突出。
analysis.problem: 如何在多模态大模型中有效遗忘特定视觉知识，同时不损害非目标视觉知识和所有文本知识的保留。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态大模型中视觉与文本知识紧密交织，直接遗忘视觉知识容易导致非目标知识退化。
analysis.method: 冻结LLM主干，仅微调视觉模块；提出对比视觉遗忘（CVF）机制分离目标与非目标视觉知识；利用保留知识的零空间约束遗忘过程，减少知识保留退化；并扩展到持续遗忘场景。
contributions: 提出对比视觉遗忘机制，引导目标视觉概念表征到特征空间中的适当区域。
识别保留知识的零空间，约束遗忘过程，显著缓解知识保留退化。
将方法扩展到持续遗忘场景，处理顺序到达的遗忘请求。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上进行广泛实验，表明方法在有效遗忘和稳健知识保留之间取得了良好平衡。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视觉模块结构，泛化性需验证。
持续遗忘场景下遗忘顺序可能影响效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于零空间约束的对比视觉遗忘方法，在多模态大模型（MLLM）中实现目标视觉知识遗忘的同时保留非目标视觉和文本知识。

papers.title: Architecture-agnostic Lipschitz-constant Bayesian header and its application to resolve semantically proximal classification errors with vision transformers
papers.abstract: Label noise remains a critical bottleneck for the generalization of supervised deep learning models, particularly when errors are structured rather than random. Standard robust training methods often fail in the presence of such semantically proximal classification errors. This work presents an architecture-agnostic Lipschitz-constant Bayesian header that can be integrated into feature extractors such as vision transformers, yielding the bi-Lipschitz-constrained Bayesian Vision Transformer (LipB-ViT). In contrast to conventional Bayesian layers, our approach enforces spectral normalization on both the mean and log-variance of the variational weights, which promotes calibrated predictive uncertainty and mitigates noise amplification. We further propose a novel metric to jointly capture uncertainty and confidence across misclassification rates, as well as an adaptive arithmetic-mean fusion scheme that combines feature-space proximity with predictive uncertainty to detect corrupted labels outperforming the state of the art k-nearest neighbor based identification methods by more than 7% reaching a recall of more than 0.93 at 15% semantically misclassified labels. Although computational costs increase due to Monte Carlo sampling, the method offers plug-and-play compatibility with pre-trained backbones and consistent hyperparameters across domains, suggesting strong utility for high-stakes applications with variable annotation reliability. The stabilized confidence estimates serve as the foundation for an analysis pipeline that jointly assesses dataset quality and label noise, yielding a second novel metric for their combined quantification. Lastly, we systematically evaluate LipB-ViT under both structured (adversarial) and unstructured noise at inference time, demonstrating its robustness in realistic high-noise and attack scenarios. We compare its performance against baseline methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种架构无关的Lipschitz常数贝叶斯头，集成到视觉Transformer中，通过谱归一化提升校准不确定性，在语义邻近分类错误检测上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 标签噪声尤其是结构化语义邻近错误严重影响深度学习模型泛化，现有鲁棒训练方法对此类错误效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 解决语义邻近分类错误导致的标签噪声问题，提升模型在结构化噪声下的鲁棒性和不确定性校准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准鲁棒训练方法在语义邻近错误下失效，噪声放大导致校准不确定性差。
analysis.method: 提出架构无关的Lipschitz常数贝叶斯头，对变分权重的均值和log方差施加谱归一化，形成bi-Lipschitz约束贝叶斯视觉Transformer (LipB-ViT)，并设计自适应算术均值融合方案结合特征空间邻近性与预测不确定性检测噪声标签。
contributions: 提出架构无关的Lipschitz常数贝叶斯头，可集成到任意特征提取器。
提出新指标联合捕捉不确定性及置信度，以及自适应融合方案，在语义标签噪声检测上召回率超0.93。
analysis.experiments: 在15%语义误标标签下，噪声检测召回率超过0.93，比最先进的k近邻方法提升7%以上；在推理时结构化与非结构化噪声下评估鲁棒性。
limitations: 蒙特卡洛采样增加计算成本。
仅在视觉Transformer上验证，其他架构效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种架构无关的Lipschitz常数贝叶斯头，集成到视觉Transformer中，通过谱归一化提升校准不确定性，在语义邻近分类错误检测上超越SOTA。

papers.title: Understanding Cross-Language Transfer Improvements in Low-Resource HTR: The Role of Sequence Modeling
papers.abstract: Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) for Arabic-script languages benefits from cross-language joint training under low-resource conditions, particularly when using CRNN-based models that combine convolutional encoders with sequence modeling. However, it remains unclear whether these improvements are better explained by shared visual representations or sequence-level dependencies. In this work, we conduct a controlled architectural study of line-level Arabic-script HTR, comparing CNN-only models with CTC decoding and CRNN models under identical single-script and multi-script training regimes. Experiments are performed on Arabic (KHATT), Urdu (NUST-UHWR), and Persian (PHTD) datasets under low-resource settings (K in {100, 500, 1000}). Our results show a clear divergence in transfer behavior: while CNN-only models exhibit limited or unstable improvements, CRNN models achieve better performance under multi-script training, particularly in the most data-constrained regimes. Focusing on transfer improvements (delta CER) rather than absolute performance, we find that cross-language improvements are associated with sequence-level modeling, while sharing visual representations learned by the CNN encoder, corresponding to similarities in character shapes across scripts, alone appears to be insufficient. This finding suggests that contextual modeling plays an important role in enabling effective transfer in low-resource scenarios, and that similar behavior may extend to other low-resource language settings.

analysis.tldr: 低资源手写文本识别中，跨语言迁移提升主要来自序列建模而非共享视觉表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 低资源手写文本识别（HTR）中，跨语言联合训练能提升性能，但提升来源（共享视觉表征 vs. 序列级依赖）尚不明确，理解这一机制有助于设计更有效的迁移方法。
analysis.problem: 探究低资源阿拉伯语系手写文本识别中，跨语言迁移提升是由共享视觉表征还是序列建模主导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CNN-only模型在跨语言训练中提升有限或不稳定，而CRNN模型在数据极受限时表现更好；跨语言提升与序列建模相关，仅共享视觉表征（字符形状相似）不足以带来显著迁移。
analysis.method: 通过控制架构对比实验（CNN-only vs. CRNN），在相同单脚本和多脚本训练设置下，评估低资源（100/500/1000样本）阿拉伯语、乌尔都语和波斯语数据集上的迁移效果。
contributions: 揭示了低资源HTR中跨语言迁移提升主要归因于序列建模而非共享视觉表征。
通过系统架构消融实验，在多个阿拉伯语系数据集上验证了该发现。
analysis.experiments: 在KHATT（阿拉伯语）、NUST-UHWR（乌尔都语）和PHTD（波斯语）数据集上，设置低资源样本量K∈{100,500,1000}，对比CNN-only与CRNN模型在单脚本和多脚本训练下的字符错误率（CER）变化。
limitations: 仅针对阿拉伯语系手写文本，结论可能不适用于其他语系。
未探索更复杂的序列建模方法（如Transformer）的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 低资源手写文本识别中，跨语言迁移提升主要来自序列建模而非共享视觉表征。

papers.title: VARS-FL: Validation-Aligned Client Selection for Non-IID Federated Learning in IoT Systems
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) systems typically employ stateless client selection, treating each communication round independently and ignoring accumulated evidence of client contribution quality. Under non-IID data, this leads to slow convergence and unstable training, particularly when selection relies on local proxies (e.g., training loss) that are misaligned with the global optimization objective. These challenges are especially pronounced in Internet of Things (IoT) and Industrial IoT (IIoT) environments, where data is highly heterogeneous and distributed across devices observing different traffic patterns. In this paper, we propose VARS-FL (Validation-Aligned Reputation Scoring for Federated Learning), a client selection framework that quantifies each client's contribution using the reduction in server-side validation loss induced by its update. These per-round signals are aggregated into a Reputation score that combines a sliding-window average of recent contributions with a logarithmically scaled participation term, enabling robust exploration-exploitation selection. VARS-FL requires no changes to local training or aggregation and remains fully compatible with standard FedAvg. We evaluate VARS-FL on a 15-class non-IID IoT intrusion detection task using the Edge-IIoTset dataset, with 100 clients across multiple seeds, and compare it against FedAvg, Oort, and Power-of-Choice. VARS-FL consistently improves accuracy, F1-Macro, and loss, while accelerating convergence (up to 36% fewer rounds to reach 80% accuracy). These results demonstrate that validation-aligned, history-aware client selection provides a more reliable and efficient training process for federated learning in heterogeneous IoT environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出验证对齐的客户端选择方法VARS-FL，通过服务器端验证损失减少量量化客户端贡献，加速非IID联邦学习收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习在非IID数据下收敛慢且训练不稳定，现有无状态客户端选择方法忽略历史贡献质量，且依赖与全局目标不一致的局部代理（如训练损失），在IoT/IIoT高度异构环境中问题尤为突出。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种与全局优化目标对齐、利用历史贡献信息的客户端选择机制，以加速非IID联邦学习的收敛并提高稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出无状态选择在非IID下导致慢收敛和不稳定，局部代理（如训练损失）与全局目标不一致。
analysis.method: VARS-FL：每轮计算客户端更新引起的服务器端验证损失减少量作为贡献信号，通过滑动窗口平均和对数缩放参与项聚合为信誉分数，实现鲁棒的探索-利用选择，兼容FedAvg。
contributions: 提出验证对齐的客户端选择框架VARS-FL，利用验证损失减少量量化贡献，避免局部代理偏差。
设计信誉分数机制，结合滑动窗口历史贡献和参与频率，实现稳定且高效的客户端选择。
在非IID IoT入侵检测任务上验证，VARS-FL相比FedAvg、Oort、Power-of-Choice提升准确率、F1和损失，并加速收敛（最多减少36%轮次达到80%准确率）。
analysis.experiments: 在Edge-IIoTset数据集上进行15类非IID IoT入侵检测任务，100个客户端，多随机种子，与FedAvg、Oort、Power-of-Choice对比，报告准确率、F1-Macro、损失和收敛轮次。
limitations: 依赖服务器端验证集，可能引入额外计算和存储开销。
仅验证了入侵检测任务，泛化到其他IoT应用或更复杂模型需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出验证对齐的客户端选择方法VARS-FL，通过服务器端验证损失减少量量化客户端贡献，加速非IID联邦学习收敛。

papers.title: Detecting AI-Generated Videos with Spiking Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Modern AI-generated videos are photorealistic at the single-frame level, leaving inter-frame dynamics as the main remaining axis for detection. Existing detectors typically handle this temporal evidence in three ways: feeding the full frame sequence to a generic temporal backbone, reducing one dominant temporal cue to fixed video-level descriptors, or comparing temporal features to real-video statistics through a detection metric. These strategies degrade sharply under cross-generator evaluation, where artifact type and timescale vary across generators. On caption-paired benchmark, GenVidBench, we identify two signatures that prior detectors do not jointly exploit: AI-generated videos exhibit smoother frame-to-frame temporal residuals at the pixel level, and more compact trajectories in the semantic feature space, indicating a temporal smoothness gap at both levels. We further observe that, when raw video is fed into a Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), fake clips elicit firing predominantly at object and motion boundaries, unlike real clips, suggesting that the SNN responds to temporal artifacts localized at edges. These cues are sparse, asynchronous, and concentrated at moments of change, which makes SNNs a natural choice for this task: their event-driven, sparsely-activated dynamics align with the structure of the residual signal in a way that dense ANN backbones do not. Building on this observation, we propose MAST, a detector that processes multi-channel temporal residuals with a spike-driven temporal branch alongside a frozen semantic encoder for cross-generator generalization. On the GenVideo benchmark, MAST achieves 93.14\% mean accuracy across 10 unseen generators under strict cross-generator evaluation, matching or surpassing the strongest ANN-based detectors and demonstrating the practical applicability of SNNs to AI-generated video detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的AI生成视频检测器MAST，利用帧间残差的稀疏异步特性实现跨生成器泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI视频检测器在跨生成器场景下性能急剧下降，因为不同生成器的伪影类型和时间尺度各异，而现有方法未能充分利用帧间动态的稀疏异步特征。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能泛化到未知生成器的AI生成视频检测器，有效利用帧间时序残差中的稀疏异步信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI生成视频在像素级帧间残差更平滑，语义特征空间轨迹更紧凑，且SNN对伪视频的脉冲响应集中在物体和运动边界，表明时序伪影具有稀疏、异步、集中于变化时刻的结构。
analysis.method: 提出MAST检测器，包含一个脉冲驱动的时序分支（处理多通道时序残差）和一个冻结的语义编码器，利用SNN的事件驱动和稀疏激活特性。
contributions: 识别AI生成视频在像素级和语义级的时间平滑性差距，以及SNN对边缘时序伪影的脉冲响应模式。
提出MAST检测器，首次将SNN用于AI生成视频检测，在跨生成器评估中达到93.14%平均准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在GenVideo基准上，对10个未见生成器进行严格跨生成器评估，MAST达到93.14%平均准确率，匹配或超越最强ANN检测器。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集（GenVidBench）的标注，泛化到其他类型视频需验证。
SNN的硬件部署和训练效率可能低于ANN。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的AI生成视频检测器MAST，利用帧间残差的稀疏异步特性实现跨生成器泛化。

papers.title: An Explainable Unsupervised-to-Supervised Machine Learning Framework for Dietary Pattern Discovery Using UK National Dietary Survey Data
papers.abstract: Clinical dietary assessment can generate detailed but high-dimensional nutrient and food-group information that is difficult to translate quickly into counselling priorities. This paper proposes an explainable unsupervised-to-supervised machine learning framework for discovering, reproducing and interpreting dietary patterns using public UK National Diet and Nutrition Survey data. Adult participants aged 19 years and above from NDNS Years 12-15 were represented using 25 energy-adjusted nutrient and food-group features. K-means, Gaussian Mixture Models and Agglomerative Clustering were compared across k = 2-8, with stability and dietetic interpretability used alongside internal validation metrics. The selected K-means k = 4 solution identified four interpretable dietary patterns: high fat/meat and sodium, higher fibre fruit-vegetable micronutrient, high free-sugar snacks and sugary drinks, and dairy/cereal calcium-rich saturated-fat. A supervised surrogate classifier reproduced held-out cluster membership with high test performance (macro-F1 = 0.963), but was interpreted only as an explanatory surrogate rather than as an independent clinical prediction model. SHAP analysis linked predictions to dietetically meaningful drivers, suggesting potential value for dietitian-in-the-loop assessment, counselling prioritisation and follow-up monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可解释的无监督到有监督机器学习框架，用于从英国国家饮食调查数据中发现和解释膳食模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床饮食评估产生的高维营养和食物组信息难以快速转化为咨询优先级，需要一种可解释的方法来发现和再现膳食模式。
analysis.problem: 如何从高维饮食数据中自动发现稳定、可解释的膳食模式，并实现可重复的聚类分配和解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先使用K-means、高斯混合模型和凝聚聚类比较选择最优聚类方案（K-means k=4），再用监督分类器（如随机森林）作为替代模型复现聚类分配，并通过SHAP分析解释驱动因素。
contributions: 提出无监督到有监督的可解释框架用于膳食模式发现
通过SHAP分析提供饮食学上有意义的解释，支持营养师参与评估
analysis.experiments: 使用英国国家饮食与营养调查（NDNS）Years 12-15数据，25个能量调整特征，比较多种聚类方法，监督分类器宏F1=0.963。
limitations: 监督分类器仅作为解释性替代，非独立临床预测模型
可能依赖特定数据集和特征选择
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可解释的无监督到有监督机器学习框架，用于从英国国家饮食调查数据中发现和解释膳食模式。

papers.title: Logic-Regularized Verifier Elicits Reasoning from LLMs
papers.abstract: Verifiers are crucial components for enhancing modern LLMs' reasoning capability. Typicalverifiers require resource-intensive superviseddataset construction, which is costly and faceslimitations in data diversity. In this paper, wepropose LOVER, an unsupervised verifier regularized by logical rules. LOVER treats theverifier as a binary latent variable, utilizinginternal activations and enforcing three logical constraints on multiple reasoning paths:negation consistency, intra-group consistency,and inter-group consistency (grouped by thefinal answer). By incorporating logical rulesas priors, LOVER can leverage unlabeled examples and is directly compatible with any offthe-shelf LLMs. Experiments on 10 datasetsdemonstrate that LOVER significantly outperforms unsupervised baselines, achieving performance comparable to the supervised verifier(reaching its 95% level on average). The sourcecode is publicly available at https://github.com/wangxinyufighting/llm-lover.

analysis.tldr: 提出无监督逻辑正则化验证器LOVER，利用逻辑规则约束推理路径，无需标注数据即可提升LLM推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 监督验证器需要大量标注数据，成本高且多样性受限，亟需无监督方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖标注数据的情况下训练验证器以增强LLM推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将验证器视为二元隐变量，利用内部激活并在多条推理路径上施加三种逻辑约束：否定一致性、组内一致性和组间一致性（按最终答案分组）。
contributions: 提出无监督逻辑正则化验证器LOVER，无需标注数据。
在10个数据集上达到监督验证器95%的平均性能。
analysis.experiments: 在10个数据集上实验，LOVER显著优于无监督基线，性能接近监督验证器（平均95%）。
limitations: 可能对逻辑规则的选择敏感。
未在更大规模模型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无监督逻辑正则化验证器LOVER，利用逻辑规则约束推理路径，无需标注数据即可提升LLM推理能力。

papers.title: MTL-MAD: Multi-Task Learners are Effective Medical Anomaly Detectors
papers.abstract: Anomaly detection in medical images is a challenging task, since anomalies are not typically available during training. Recent methods leverage a single pretext task coupled with a large-scale pre-trained model to reach state-of-the-art performance. Instead, we propose to learn multiple self-supervised and pseudo-labeling tasks from scratch, using a joint model based on Mixture-of-Experts (MoE). By carefully integrating multiple proxy tasks, the joint model effectively learns a robust representation of normal anatomical structures, so that anomaly scores can be derived based on how well the multi-task learner (MTL) solves each task during inference. We perform comprehensive experiments on BMAD, a recent benchmark that comprises a broad range of medical image modalities. The empirical results indicate that our multi-task learner is an effective anomaly detector, outperforming all state-of-the-art competitors on BMAD. Moreover, our model produces interpretable anomaly maps, potentially helping physicians in providing more accurate diagnoses.

analysis.tldr: 多任务学习结合混合专家模型在医学图像异常检测中超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像异常检测中，异常样本在训练时通常不可用，现有方法依赖单一预训练任务，可能无法充分学习正常解剖结构的鲁棒表示。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用异常样本的情况下，学习有效的正常解剖结构表示以进行异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于混合专家模型的多任务学习框架，从零开始联合学习多个自监督和伪标签任务，通过任务求解效果计算异常分数。
contributions: 提出多任务学习与混合专家模型结合的医学图像异常检测方法。
在BMAD基准上超越所有现有方法，并生成可解释的异常图。
analysis.experiments: 在BMAD基准上进行综合实验，涵盖多种医学图像模态，结果表明方法优于所有SOTA竞争者。
limitations: 可能依赖任务设计质量，任务选择不当会影响性能。
混合专家模型可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多任务学习结合混合专家模型在医学图像异常检测中超越SOTA。

papers.title: DBMSolver: A Training-free Diffusion Bridge Sampler for High-Quality Image-to-Image Translation
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based image-to-image (I2I) translation excels in high-fidelity generation but suffers from slow sampling in state-of-the-art Diffusion Bridge Models (DBMs), often requiring dozens of function evaluations (NFEs). We introduce DBMSolver, a training-free sampler that exploits the semi-linear structure of DBM's underlying SDE and ODE via exponential integrators, yielding highly-efficient 1st- and 2nd-order solutions. This reduces NFEs by up to 5x while boosting quality (e.g., FID drops 53% on DIODE at 20 NFEs vs. 2nd-order baseline). Experiments on inpainting, stylization, and semantics-to-image tasks across resolutions up to 256x256 show DBMSolver sets new SOTA efficiency-quality tradeoffs, enabling real-world applicability. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/snumprlab/dbmsolver.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的扩散桥采样器DBMSolver，利用指数积分器加速图像到图像翻译，采样步数减少5倍且质量提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散桥模型在图像到图像翻译中生成质量高，但采样速度慢，需要数十次函数评估，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，显著加速扩散桥模型的采样过程并保持或提升生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散桥模型的基础SDE/ODE具有半线性结构，可利用指数积分器高效求解。
analysis.method: 利用指数积分器设计一阶和二阶求解器，直接求解扩散桥模型的SDE和ODE，无需额外训练。
contributions: 提出DBMSolver，一种无需训练的扩散桥采样器，通过指数积分器利用半线性结构实现高效采样。
在多个图像到图像翻译任务上，采样步数减少5倍的同时，FID等质量指标显著提升（如DIODE上FID降低53%）。
analysis.experiments: 在图像修复、风格化、语义到图像等任务上，分辨率高达256x256，与二阶基线相比，DBMSolver在20步时FID降低53%，实现了新的效率-质量权衡。
limitations: 方法仅在扩散桥模型上验证，可能不适用于其他类型的扩散模型。
实验分辨率最高256x256，更高分辨率下的性能未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的扩散桥采样器DBMSolver，利用指数积分器加速图像到图像翻译，采样步数减少5倍且质量提升。

papers.title: Training-Free Dense Hand Contact Estimation with Multi-Modal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Dense hand contact estimation requires both high-level semantic understanding and fine-grained geometric reasoning of human interaction to accurately localize contact regions. Recently, multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding visual semantics, enabled by vision-language priors learned from large-scale data. However, leveraging MLLMs for dense hand contact estimation remains underexplored. There are two major challenges in applying MLLMs to dense hand contact estimation. First, encoding explicit 3D hand geometry is difficult, as MLLMs primarily operate on vision and language modalities. Second, capturing fine-grained vertex-level contact remains challenging, as MLLMs tend to focus on high-level semantics rather than detailed geometric reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose ContactPrompt, a training-free and zero-shot approach for dense hand contact estimation using MLLMs. To effectively encode 3D hand geometry, we introduce a detailed hand-part segmentation and a part-wise vertex-grid representation that provides structured, localized geometric information. To enable accurate and efficient dense contact prediction, we develop a multi-stage structured contact reasoning with part conditioning, progressively bridging global semantics and fine-grained geometry. Therefore, our method effectively leverages the reasoning capabilities of MLLMs while enabling precise dense hand contact estimation. Surprisingly, the proposed approach outperforms previous supervised methods trained on large-scale dense contact datasets without requiring any training. The codes will be released.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的零样本密集手部接触估计方法，利用多模态大语言模型实现超越监督学习的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 密集手部接触估计需要高层语义理解和细粒度几何推理，但现有方法依赖大规模标注数据，且多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在此任务上尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用MLLM进行密集手部接触估计，同时解决3D手部几何编码和细粒度顶点级接触预测两大挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM主要处理视觉和语言模态，难以编码显式3D手部几何；且MLLM倾向于关注高层语义而非详细几何推理，导致细粒度接触预测困难。
analysis.method: 提出ContactPrompt，一种无需训练和零样本的方法。通过详细手部分割和逐部分顶点网格表示编码3D几何，并采用多阶段结构化接触推理（带部分条件）逐步桥接全局语义和细粒度几何。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练的零样本密集手部接触估计方法，利用MLLM的推理能力。
设计手部分割和逐部分顶点网格表示，有效编码3D几何信息。
多阶段结构化接触推理机制，实现从全局语义到细粒度几何的渐进式预测。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在无训练情况下优于先前在大规模密集接触数据集上训练的监督方法。
limitations: 可能依赖MLLM的视觉语言先验质量，泛化到极端手部姿态或遮挡场景时性能未知。
零样本方法可能对特定手部几何表示敏感，需要进一步验证鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的零样本密集手部接触估计方法，利用多模态大语言模型实现超越监督学习的性能。

papers.title: Tuning Derivatives for Causal Fairness in Machine Learning
papers.abstract: Artificial-intelligence systems are becoming ubiquitous in society, yet their predictions typically inherit biases with respect to protected attributes such as race, gender, or age. Classical fairness notions, most notably Statistical Parity (SP), demand that predictions be independent of the protected attributes, but are overly restrictive when these attributes influence mediating variables that are considered business necessities. Recent causal formulations relax SP by distinguishing allowed from not-allowed causal paths and by complementing SP with Predictive Parity (PP), requiring the predictor to replicate the legitimate influence of business-necessities. Existing path-based definitions are mainly practical when applied to categorical attributes. This paper introduces a new framework for fairness in structural causal models that is tailored to continuous protected attributes. We formalize SP and PP through path-specific partial derivatives, establish conditions under which these criteria coincide with prior causal definitions, and characterize when a fair predictor, one that satisfies SP along not-allowed paths while achieving PP along allowed paths, exists. Building on this theory, we propose a fair tuning algorithm that either constructs such a predictor or, when not possible, allows for a trade-off between SP and PP. We present experiments on simulated and real data to evaluate our proposal, compare it with previously proposed methods, and show that it performs better when PP is considered.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于路径特定偏导数的因果公平框架，用于连续敏感属性，并设计调优算法实现统计均等与预测均等的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有因果公平定义主要适用于离散敏感属性，而连续敏感属性（如年龄）在现实应用中普遍存在，缺乏有效的公平性处理方法。
analysis.problem: 如何为连续敏感属性定义并实现路径特定的因果公平，同时允许统计均等（SP）与预测均等（PP）之间的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于路径特定偏导数的公平框架，形式化SP和PP，并设计调优算法，在满足SP沿不允许路径的同时实现PP沿允许路径，否则允许两者权衡。
contributions: 提出针对连续敏感属性的路径特定偏导数公平框架，统一了SP和PP的因果定义。
给出公平预测器存在的条件，并设计调优算法实现SP与PP的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实数据上进行了实验，与已有方法比较，表明在考虑PP时性能更好。
limitations: 可能依赖正确的因果图结构，实际中难以获取。
调优算法可能计算复杂度较高，尤其在高维连续属性下。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于路径特定偏导数的因果公平框架，用于连续敏感属性，并设计调优算法实现统计均等与预测均等的权衡。

papers.title: Agentic, Context-Aware Risk Intelligence in the Internet of Value
papers.abstract: The Internet of Value (IoV) is a heterogeneous, partially-trusted network in which the dominant marginal risk is composite (route, sentiment, liquidity, and the policy a system is willing to commit to) rather than a property of any single chain. We argue that a risk primitive adequate for this regime is a composition of five engines: a prediction engine over price, liquidity, volatility, and route health; a Bittensor verification subnet that decentralises and economically scores prediction outputs; a sentiment-fusion engine over text, on-chain flow, and grey-literature feeds; an agentic engine under constitutional, role-bound action constraints; and an API-risk and scenario engine that converts forecasts into pre-committed action programs in the sense of Monte-Carlo scenario generation. We anchor the architecture in two empirical artefacts: a 27-hour policy-constrained liquidity stress-response experiment on Solana, and a 168-hour prediction-router calibration arc reported with explicit class-imbalance honesty. The case study supports deployability; the validator-loss decomposition is stated formally and is falsifiable.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向价值互联网的复合风险智能架构，结合预测、验证、情感融合、代理引擎和场景生成，并在Solana上进行了实验验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 价值互联网（IoV）是一个异构、部分可信的网络，其主导边际风险是复合的（路线、情绪、流动性和政策），而非单一链的属性，现有风险原语不足以应对这种复杂场景。
analysis.problem: 如何为IoV设计一个能够处理复合风险、可部署且可验证的风险智能框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个由五个引擎组成的风险原语：价格/流动性/波动性/路线健康预测引擎、Bittensor验证子网、情感融合引擎、基于宪法和角色约束的代理引擎、以及API风险与场景引擎（将预测转化为预承诺行动程序）。
contributions: 提出了一种面向IoV的复合风险智能架构，整合了预测、去中心化验证、情感分析和代理约束。
通过Solana上的27小时流动性压力响应实验和168小时预测路由器校准实验展示了可部署性，并给出了可证伪的验证器损失分解。
analysis.experiments: 在Solana上进行了27小时政策约束的流动性压力响应实验和168小时预测路由器校准实验，报告了类别不平衡的诚实性指标。
limitations: 实验仅在单一区块链（Solana）上进行，泛化性有待验证。
摘要未提供与其他方法的对比实验结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向价值互联网的复合风险智能架构，结合预测、验证、情感融合、代理引擎和场景生成，并在Solana上进行了实验验证。

papers.title: 3DSS: 3D Surface Splatting for Inverse Rendering
papers.abstract: We present 3D Surface Splatting (3DSS), the first differentiable surface splatting renderer for physically-based inverse rendering from multi-view images. Our central insight is that the surface separation problem at the heart of surface splatting admits a direct formulation in terms of the reconstruction kernels themselves. From this foundation we derive a coverage-based compositing model whose per-layer opacity arises directly from the accumulated Elliptical Weighted Average reconstruction weight, yielding anti-aliased silhouettes and informative visibility gradients at sparsely covered edges. Combined with forward microfacet shading under co-optimized HDR environment lighting and density-aware adaptive refinement, 3DSS jointly recovers shape, spatially-varying BRDF materials, and illumination. Because the optimized representation is a set of oriented surface samples, it bridges natively to mesh-based workflows via surface reconstruction from oriented point cloud methods. We evaluate 3DSS against mesh-based, implicit, and Gaussian-splatting baselines across geometry reconstruction, novel-view synthesis, and novel-illumination relighting.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个可微表面溅射渲染器3DSS，用于多视图图像的物理逆向渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有逆向渲染方法在表面分离和边缘抗锯齿方面存在困难，且难以桥接到网格工作流。
analysis.problem: 如何实现基于物理的逆向渲染，同时恢复形状、BRDF材质和光照，并支持网格工作流。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出3D表面溅射（3DSS），通过重建核直接公式化表面分离，结合覆盖合成模型、微表面着色和密度感知自适应细化。
contributions: 首个可微表面溅射渲染器，实现物理逆向渲染。
覆盖合成模型提供抗锯齿轮廓和可见性梯度。
联合恢复形状、BRDF材质和光照，并桥接到网格工作流。
analysis.experiments: 在几何重建、新视图合成和新光照重照明任务上与网格、隐式和Gaussian-splatting基线对比。
limitations: 可能依赖多视图输入，单视图效果未知。
表面溅射的优化可能对初始化敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个可微表面溅射渲染器3DSS，用于多视图图像的物理逆向渲染。

papers.title: CITE: Anytime-Valid Statistical Inference in LLM Self-Consistency
papers.abstract: Large language models often improve reasoning by sampling multiple outputs and aggregating their final answers, but precise and efficient control of error levels remains a challenging task. In particular, deciding when to stop sampling remains difficult when the stopping rule is data-dependent and the set of possible answers is not known in advance. We study anytime-valid certification of a prespecified target answer as the unique mode of the model's response distribution, a guarantee distinct from answer correctness. We propose the Certification by Intersection-union Testing with E-processes (CITE) algorithm, which provably controls false certification at any prescribed level under arbitrary data-driven stopping, without requiring prior knowledge of the answer category set. We also prove an category-set-size-free stopping-time rate, establish matching minimax lower bounds up to constants in the main regime, and extend the construction to confidence-weighted voting. Simulations and LLM self-consistency experiments show empirical error control and improved certification in diffuse-tail settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出CITE算法，在LLM自一致性中实现任意时刻有效的统计推断，无需预设答案集即可控制错误率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM通过多次采样并聚合答案来提升推理能力，但如何高效且精确地控制错误水平、决定何时停止采样仍具挑战，尤其是当停止规则依赖数据且答案集未知时。
analysis.problem: 在LLM自一致性中，对预设目标答案作为模型响应分布的唯一众数进行任意时刻有效的认证，同时控制错误率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CITE算法，基于交集-并集检验与E过程，在任意数据驱动停止下可证明地控制错误认证，无需先验答案类别集知识。
contributions: 提出CITE算法，实现任意时刻有效的统计推断，无需预设答案集。
证明类别集大小无关的停止时间率，并建立匹配的极小化极大下界。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和LLM自一致性实验中，展示了经验错误控制和在扩散尾部设置中改进的认证性能。
limitations: 可能依赖于模型输出分布的特定假设。
实际应用中的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CITE算法，在LLM自一致性中实现任意时刻有效的统计推断，无需预设答案集即可控制错误率。

papers.title: When Does a Language Model Commit? A Finite-Answer Theory of Pre-Verbalization Commitment
papers.abstract: Language models often generate reasoning before giving a final answer, but the visible answer does not reveal when the model's answer preference became stable. We study this question through a narrow computable object: \emph{finite-answer preference stabilization}. For a model state and specified answer verbalizers, we project the model's own continuation probabilities onto a finite answer set; in binary tasks this yields an exact log-odds code, $δ(ξ)=S_θ(\mathrm{yes}\midξ)-S_θ(\mathrm{no}\midξ)$. This target defines parser-based answer onset, retrospective stabilization time, and lead without relying on greedy rollouts or learned probes. In controlled delayed-verdict tasks with Qwen3-4B-Instruct, the contextual finite-answer projection stabilizes before the answer is parseable, with 17--31 token mean lead in the main templates and positive, shorter lead in a parser-clean replication. The signal tracks the model's eventual output rather than truth, is linearly recoverable from compact hidden summaries, is partly separable from cursor progress, and transfers as shared information without a single invariant coordinate. Diagnostics separate the measurement from online stopping, verbalizer-free belief, and causal answer control; exact steering shows local sensitivity of $δ$ but not reliable generation control.

analysis.tldr: 通过有限答案投影理论，发现语言模型在可解析答案输出前17-31个token已稳定其答案偏好。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型在生成最终答案前常进行推理，但无法确定其答案偏好何时稳定，现有方法依赖贪婪解码或学习探针，缺乏精确理论工具。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖贪婪解码或学习探针的情况下，精确测量语言模型答案偏好稳定的时间点。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在延迟判决任务中，模型的有限答案投影在答案可解析前17-31个token已稳定，且该信号追踪模型最终输出而非真实答案，可从隐藏状态线性恢复，与光标进度部分可分离。
analysis.method: 提出有限答案偏好稳定理论，通过将模型续写概率投影到有限答案集上，定义基于解析器的答案起始点、回顾性稳定时间和领先量，无需贪婪解码或学习探针。
contributions: 提出有限答案偏好稳定理论，为测量语言模型答案承诺时间提供精确计算框架。
通过Qwen3-4B-Instruct实验发现答案偏好稳定早于可解析输出17-31个token，并验证信号的可恢复性、可分离性和可转移性。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-4B-Instruct上使用控制延迟判决任务，测量了多种模板下的领先量，并进行了诊断实验（分离测量、无口头化信念、因果控制等）。
limitations: 仅适用于有限答案集任务，对开放生成任务不直接适用。
实验仅基于单一模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过有限答案投影理论，发现语言模型在可解析答案输出前17-31个token已稳定其答案偏好。

papers.title: XDecomposer: Learning Prior-Free Set Decomposition for Multiphase X-ray Diffraction
papers.abstract: Multiphase powder X-ray diffraction (PXRD) analysis remains a fundamental bottleneck in structure identification, as real-world synthesis often produces complex mixtures whose constituent phases (components) cannot be reliably disentangled. While recent advances in representation-based crystal retrieval and generation suggest the possibility of inferring structures directly from PXRD, existing approaches largely assume single-phase inputs and break down in multiphase settings. Here, we present XDecomposer, a prior-free framework for joint decomposition and identification of multiphase XRD patterns without requiring candidate phase lists, structural templates, or prior knowledge of phase number. We formulate multiphase diffraction analysis as a set prediction problem, where the model infers an unordered set of phase-resolved components, their mixture proportions, and corresponding structural representations within a unified architecture. A phase-query-driven decomposition mechanism, together with diffraction-consistent physical reconstruction, enables accurate source separation while preserving crystallographic fidelity. Extensive experiments on both simulated and experimental datasets show that XDecomposer substantially improves reconstruction accuracy and phase identification across diverse chemical systems, while maintaining strong generalization to unseen mixtures. These results provide a practical route toward data-driven, source-resolved multiphase XRD analysis and reduce long-standing dependence on prior-guided iteratively phase matching. The code is openly available at https://github.com/Licht0812/XDecomposer

analysis.tldr: XDecomposer 提出了一种无先验的集合预测框架，用于多相 X 射线衍射图的联合分解与物相识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 多相粉末 X 射线衍射分析是结构鉴定的瓶颈，真实合成常产生复杂混合物，现有方法依赖单相输入或先验知识，无法可靠分离组分。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有候选物相列表、结构模板或相数先验的情况下，对多相 XRD 图谱进行分解并识别各相成分及其比例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将多相衍射分析建模为集合预测问题，通过相位查询驱动分解机制和衍射一致性物理重建，在统一架构中推断无序的相位解析组分、混合比例及对应结构表示。
contributions: 提出无先验的多相 XRD 联合分解与识别框架 XDecomposer。
设计相位查询驱动分解机制和衍射一致性物理重建，实现准确源分离并保持晶体学保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和实验数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明 XDecomposer 在不同化学系统中显著提高了重建精度和物相识别能力，并对未见混合物保持强泛化性。
limitations: 可能对高度重叠的衍射峰或极低含量相识别效果有限。
框架依赖训练数据覆盖的化学系统多样性，极端新系统泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: XDecomposer 提出了一种无先验的集合预测框架，用于多相 X 射线衍射图的联合分解与物相识别。

papers.title: InkDiffuser: High-Fidelity One-shot Chinese Calligraphy via Differentiable Morphological Optimization
papers.abstract: Current Chinese calligraphy generation methods suffer from poor stroke rendering and unrealistic ink morphology, resulting in outputs with limited visual fidelity and artistic fluidity. To address this problem, we propose \textbf{InkDiffuser}, a diffusion-based generative framework for one-shot Chinese calligraphy synthesis. To guarantee high-fidelity rendering, we introduce two core contributions: a high-frequency enhancement mechanism and a Differentiable Ink Structure (DIS) loss that explicitly regularizes ink morphology. Inspired by the observation that high-frequency information in individual samples typically carries contour details, we enhance content extraction by explicitly fusing high-frequency representations for more accurate font structure. Furthermore, we propose a differentiable ink structure loss that integrates differentiable morphological operations into the diffusion process. By allowing the model to learn an explicit decomposition of ink-trace structures, DIS facilitates fine-grained refinement of stroke contours and delivers significantly improved visual realism in the generated calligraphy. Extensive experiments on various calligraphic styles and complex characters demonstrate that InkDiffuser can generate superior calligraphy fonts with realistic ink rendering effects from only a single reference glyph and outperform existing few-shot font generation approaches in structural consistency, detail fidelity, and visual authenticity. The code is available at the following address: https://github.com/JingVIPLab/InkDiffuser.

analysis.tldr: InkDiffuser 通过可微形态学优化实现高保真单样本中国书法生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有书法生成方法笔画渲染差、墨迹形态不真实，导致视觉保真度和艺术流畅性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张参考字生成高保真、墨迹形态自然的书法字体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高频信息携带轮廓细节，可提升字体结构提取精度；可微形态学操作能显式分解墨迹结构，改善笔画轮廓。
analysis.method: 基于扩散模型，引入高频增强机制和可微墨迹结构（DIS）损失，通过可微形态学操作正则化墨迹形态。
contributions: 提出高频增强机制，融合高频表征以提升字体结构准确性。
提出可微墨迹结构损失（DIS），将可微形态学操作集成到扩散过程中，实现笔画轮廓的细粒度优化。
analysis.experiments: 在多种书法风格和复杂字符上实验，相比现有少样本字体生成方法，在结构一致性、细节保真度和视觉真实性上更优。
limitations: 可能依赖单一样本的高频信息质量。
可微形态学操作的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: InkDiffuser 通过可微形态学优化实现高保真单样本中国书法生成。

papers.title: SOPE: Stabilizing Off-Policy Evaluation for Online RL with Prior Data
papers.abstract: Incorporating prior data into online reinforcement learning accelerates training but typically forces a difficult trade-off between high computational costs and long, multi-stage training pipelines. While fixed-length stabilization phases are significantly more computationally efficient than static update schedules, they require task-dependent manual tuning, risking either the waste of prior knowledge or severe overfitting. To address this, we propose SOPE, an algorithm that uses an actor-aligned Off-Policy Policy Evaluation (OPE) signal as an automated early-stopping mechanism to dynamically control the length of offline training phases. By evaluating the critic on a held-out validation split under the current policy's action distribution, SOPE halts gradient updates exactly when out-of-distribution benefits saturate, eliminating the need for manual schedule tuning. Evaluated on 25 continuous control tasks from the Minari benchmark suite, SOPE improves baseline performance by up to 45.6% while reducing the required TFLOPs by up to 22x, thus balancing the tradeoff between sample and computational efficiency. These findings demonstrate that adaptive, evaluation-driven update schedules are more effective than relying on static, exhaustive update schedules.

analysis.tldr: SOPE利用离策略评估信号作为早停机制，动态控制在线强化学习中离线训练阶段的长度，在25个连续控制任务上提升性能达45.6%，同时降低计算量22倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 将先验数据融入在线强化学习能加速训练，但现有方法面临高计算成本与多阶段训练管线的权衡，固定长度稳定阶段虽高效却需手动调参，易浪费先验知识或导致过拟合。
analysis.problem: 如何自动确定在线强化学习中离线训练阶段的合适长度，以平衡样本效率与计算效率，避免手动调参。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SOPE算法，利用与当前策略对齐的离策略策略评估（OPE）信号作为自动早停机制，在验证集上评估评论家，当分布外收益饱和时停止梯度更新。
contributions: 提出基于OPE信号的自动早停机制，动态控制离线训练阶段长度，消除手动调参需求。
在25个连续控制任务上验证，性能提升最高45.6%，计算量降低22倍。
analysis.experiments: 在Minari基准套件的25个连续控制任务上评估，与基线相比性能提升最高45.6%，TFLOPs降低22倍。
limitations: 可能依赖验证集的质量和代表性。
OPE信号在复杂任务中的准确性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SOPE利用离策略评估信号作为早停机制，动态控制在线强化学习中离线训练阶段的长度，在25个连续控制任务上提升性能达45.6%，同时降低计算量22倍。

papers.title: SANEmerg: An Emergent Communication Framework for Semantic-aware Agentic AI Networking
papers.abstract: Future networking systems are envisioned to become part of an agentic AI-native ecosystem in which a vast number of heterogeneous and specialized AI agents cooperate seamlessly to fulfill complex user requirements in real time. However, traditional networking paradigms are characterized by a rigid decoupling of communication and computation, which often leads to significant inefficiencies in large-scale agentic AI networking (AgentNet) systems. Emergent communication offers a novel solution by enabling autonomous agents that support task-specific signaling protocols for information exchange and collaborative coordination. In this paper, we consider a multi-agent emergent communication framework, tailored for semantic-aware AgentNet systems in which the user's semantic intent can be automatically detected, inferred, and linked to a set of sub-tasks to be assigned to a set of agents. We investigate how communication and signaling protocols can emerge among collaborative agents with computationally bounded intelligence under stringent bandwidth constraints. Our proposed framework, called SANEmerg, is designed to facilitate the emergence of communication for collaborative task fulfillment while adhering to the physical limits of AgentNet. SANEmerg incorporates a bandwidth-adaptable importance-filter that dynamically prioritizes the transmission of higher-contribution message dimensions, ensuring robust performance in bandwidth-limited environments. Furthermore, SANEmerg integrates a complexity-regularizer grounded in the Minimum Description Length (MDL) principle to facilitate the emergence of computationally bounded signaling. Evaluated via an AgentNet prototype and extensive experimentation, SANEmerg demonstrates significant performance improvements over state-of-the-art solutions, achieving superior task accuracy while significantly reducing bandwidth and computational overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出SANEmerg框架，通过带宽自适应重要性过滤和MDL复杂度正则化，在带宽受限下实现语义感知的多智能体涌现通信。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统网络通信与计算刚性解耦，导致大规模智能体网络（AgentNet）效率低下；涌现通信虽能实现任务特定信令，但现有方法未考虑带宽和计算约束。
analysis.problem: 如何在带宽受限和计算能力有限条件下，使多智能体系统自动涌现出高效的通信与信令协议以协作完成任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SANEmerg框架，包含带宽自适应重要性过滤（动态优先传输高贡献消息维度）和基于最小描述长度（MDL）原则的复杂度正则化器，以促进计算受限信令的涌现。
contributions: 提出首个面向语义感知AgentNet的涌现通信框架SANEmerg，兼顾带宽和计算约束。
设计带宽自适应重要性过滤和MDL复杂度正则化器，显著提升任务准确率并降低带宽和计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 通过AgentNet原型和大量实验，SANEmerg相比现有方案在任务准确率、带宽和计算开销上均有显著提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的多智能体协作任务，泛化性待验证。
框架依赖语义意图的自动检测与推理，实际部署中语义理解精度可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SANEmerg框架，通过带宽自适应重要性过滤和MDL复杂度正则化，在带宽受限下实现语义感知的多智能体涌现通信。

papers.title: AirQualityBench: A Realistic Evaluation Benchmark for Global Air Quality Forecasting
papers.abstract: Air-quality forecasting models are commonly evaluated on regional, preprocessed, and normalized datasets, where missing observations are removed or artificially completed. Such protocols simplify comparison but hide the conditions that dominate real monitoring networks: uneven global coverage, structured missingness, heterogeneous pollutant scales, and deployment cost. We introduce \textbf{AirQualityBench}, a global multi-pollutant benchmark designed to evaluate forecasting models under these realistic conditions. The benchmark contains hourly observations from 3,720 monitoring stations over 2021--2025, covers six major pollutants, and preserves provider-native observation masks. Rather than imputing a dense data tensor, AirQualityBench exposes missingness as part of the forecasting problem and reports errors on valid future observations after inverse transformation to physical concentration scales. Evaluating representative spatio-temporal models under this unified protocol shows that strong performance on sanitized datasets does not reliably transfer to global, fragmented monitoring streams. AirQualityBench therefore serves as a realistic testbed for scalable, mask-aware, and physically interpretable air-quality forecasting. All benchmark data, code, evaluation scripts, and baseline implementations are available at \href{https://github.com/Star-Learning/AirQualityBench}{GitHub}.

analysis.tldr: AirQualityBench 是一个面向全球空气质量预测的真实评测基准，暴露了现有模型在非理想监测数据上的性能退化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有空气质量预测模型通常在区域、预处理和归一化的数据集上评测，忽略了真实监测网络中的全球覆盖不均、结构化缺失、污染物尺度异质和部署成本等关键条件。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够反映真实监测网络挑战的全球多污染物基准，以评估预测模型在非理想数据上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在清理过的数据集上表现良好的模型，在全局、碎片化的监测流上性能不可靠地迁移。
analysis.method: 构建包含 3720 个站点、2021-2025 年逐小时观测的全球多污染物基准，保留原始缺失模式，不进行数据插补，并在逆变换到物理浓度尺度后报告有效未来观测上的误差。
contributions: 提出了 AirQualityBench，一个覆盖全球、多污染物、保留真实缺失模式的空气质量预测基准。
通过统一协议评估代表性时空模型，揭示了在清理数据集上的强性能无法可靠迁移到真实监测流。
analysis.experiments: 评估了代表性时空模型，显示在清理数据集上的性能无法可靠迁移到全局碎片化监测流。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 2021-2025 年，可能未包含极端事件或长期趋势。
未考虑气象变量等外部特征对预测的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AirQualityBench 是一个面向全球空气质量预测的真实评测基准，暴露了现有模型在非理想监测数据上的性能退化。

papers.title: Align3D-AD: Cross-Modal Feature Alignment and Dual-Prompt Learning for Zero-shot 3D Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Zero-shot 3D anomaly detection aims to identify anomalies without access to training data from target categories. However, existing methods mainly rely on projecting 3D observations into multi-view representations that primarily capture geometric cues rather than realistic visual semantics and process them with vision encoders pretrained on RGB data, leading to a significant domain gap between the encoder and the projected representations. To address this issue, we propose Align3D-AD, a unified two-stage framework that leverages the RGB modality from auxiliary categories as cross-modal guidance for zero-shot 3D anomaly detection. First, we introduce a cross-modal feature alignment paradigm that maps rendering features into the RGB semantic space. Unlike prior works that implicitly rely on pretrained encoders, our method enables direct semantic transfer from RGB observations. A semantic consistency reweighting strategy is further introduced to refine feature alignment by reweighting local regions according to holistic semantic consistency. Second, we propose a modality-aware prompt learning framework with dual-prompt contrastive alignment. By assigning independent prompts to RGB-aligned and rendering features, our method captures complementary semantics across modalities, while the contrastive alignment further enhances prompt representations to improve discriminability. Extensive experiments on MVTec3D-AD, Eyecandies, and Real3D-AD demonstrate that Align3D-AD consistently outperforms existing zero-shot methods under both one-vs-rest and cross-dataset settings, highlighting its generalization capability and robustness. Code and the dataset will be made available once our paper is accepted.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨模态特征对齐与双提示学习的零样本3D异常检测框架，利用RGB模态辅助对齐渲染特征，显著提升检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有零样本3D异常检测方法主要依赖多视图投影，但投影表示与预训练RGB编码器之间存在域差距，导致语义信息丢失，限制了检测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用RGB模态作为跨模态指导，弥合3D渲染特征与RGB语义空间之间的域差距，实现有效的零样本3D异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法将3D观测投影为多视图表示，主要捕获几何线索而非真实视觉语义，与预训练RGB编码器存在域差距。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架Align3D-AD：第一阶段通过跨模态特征对齐范式将渲染特征映射到RGB语义空间，并引入语义一致性重加权策略；第二阶段提出模态感知提示学习，使用双提示对比对齐分别处理RGB对齐特征和渲染特征。
contributions: 提出跨模态特征对齐范式，实现从RGB观测到渲染特征的直接语义迁移，并引入语义一致性重加权策略优化对齐。
提出模态感知双提示对比对齐框架，独立学习RGB对齐和渲染特征的提示，增强跨模态互补语义和判别性。
在MVTec3D-AD、Eyecandies和Real3D-AD数据集上，在one-vs-rest和跨数据集设置下均取得最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在MVTec3D-AD、Eyecandies和Real3D-AD三个数据集上进行实验，在one-vs-rest和跨数据集设置下均优于现有零样本方法。
limitations: 依赖辅助类别的RGB数据，可能限制在无RGB模态场景下的应用。
两阶段框架可能增加计算开销，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨模态特征对齐与双提示学习的零样本3D异常检测框架，利用RGB模态辅助对齐渲染特征，显著提升检测性能。

papers.title: VideoRouter: Query-Adaptive Dual Routing for Efficient Long-Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Video large multimodal models increasingly face a scalability bottleneck: long videos produce excessively long visual-token sequences, which sharply increase memory and latency during inference. While existing compression methods are effective in specific settings, most are either weakly query-aware or apply a fixed compression policy across frames, proving suboptimal when visual evidence is unevenly distributed over time. To address this, we present VideoRouter, a query-adaptive dual-router framework built on InternVL for budgeted evidence allocation. The Semantic Router predicts the dominant allocation policy, choosing between broad temporal coverage and adaptive high-resolution preservation, while the Image Router uses early LLM layers to score frame relevance. This enables aggressive compression on less relevant frames while preserving detail on critical evidence frames. To train both routers, we build Video-QTR-10K for allocation-policy supervision and Video-FLR-200K for frame-relevance supervision. Experiments on VideoMME, MLVU, and LongVideoBench show that VideoRouter consistently improves over the InternVL baseline under comparable or lower budgets, achieving up to a 67.9% token reduction.

analysis.tldr: VideoRouter通过查询自适应双路由框架，在长视频理解中实现高效视觉令牌压缩，最高减少67.9%令牌。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频理解中视觉令牌序列过长导致推理内存和延迟激增，现有压缩方法要么弱查询感知，要么对所有帧采用固定策略，无法适应视觉证据不均匀分布的场景。
analysis.problem: 如何根据查询自适应地分配视觉令牌预算，在保持关键帧细节的同时压缩不相关帧，以提升长视频理解效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出视觉证据在时间上不均匀分布，固定压缩策略次优；现有方法弱查询感知或固定策略。
analysis.method: 提出VideoRouter，包含语义路由器和图像路由器的双路由框架：语义路由器预测主导分配策略（宽时间覆盖或自适应高分辨率保留），图像路由器利用早期LLM层评分帧相关性，实现查询自适应的令牌预算分配。
contributions: 提出查询自适应双路由框架VideoRouter，实现预算化的证据分配。
构建两个训练数据集Video-QTR-10K（分配策略监督）和Video-FLR-200K（帧相关性监督）。
在多个长视频基准上验证有效性，在可比或更低预算下优于InternVL基线，最高减少67.9%令牌。
analysis.experiments: 在VideoMME、MLVU和LongVideoBench上实验，VideoRouter在可比或更低预算下持续优于InternVL基线，实现高达67.9%的令牌减少。
limitations: 依赖预训练的InternVL模型，可能受限于其能力。
双路由框架增加了训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VideoRouter通过查询自适应双路由框架，在长视频理解中实现高效视觉令牌压缩，最高减少67.9%令牌。

papers.title: LoopTrap: Termination Poisoning Attacks on LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Modern LLM agents solve complex tasks by operating in iterative execution loops, where they repeatedly reason, act, and self-evaluate progress to determine when a task is complete. In this work, we show that while this self-directed loop facilitates autonomy, it also introduces a critical risk: by injecting malicious prompts into the agent's context, an adversary can distort the agent's termination judgment, making it believe the task remains incomplete and leading to unbounded computation.To understand this threat, we define and systematically characterize it as Termination Poisoning and design 10 representative attack strategies. Through a empirical study spanning 8 LLM agents and 60 tasks, we demonstrate that different LLM agents exhibit distinct behavioral signatures that determine which strategies succeed. These transferable patterns can serve as principled guidance for crafting effective attacks against previously unseen agents and tasks, enabling scalable red-teaming beyond manually designed templates. Building on these insights, we introduce LoopTrap, an automated red-teaming framework that synthesizes target-specific malicious prompts by exploiting agent behavioral tendencies. LoopTrap first constructs a behavioral profile of the target agent along four vulnerability dimensions via lightweight probing. It then performs adaptive trap synthesis, routing to the most effective strategy and selecting optimal injections via a self-scoring mechanism. Finally, successful traps are abstracted into a reusable skill library, while failed attempts are refined through self-reflection, ensuring continuous improvement. Extensive evaluation shows that LoopTrap achieves an average of 3.57$\times$ step amplification across 8 mainstream agents, with a peak of 25$\times$.

analysis.tldr: 提出针对LLM Agent的终止投毒攻击框架LoopTrap，通过注入恶意提示使Agent陷入无限循环，实现3.57倍平均步数放大。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent通过自循环执行任务，但现有研究未充分关注其终止判断环节的安全风险，攻击者可利用此漏洞导致无限计算消耗。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地利用LLM Agent的终止判断机制发起投毒攻击，并自动化生成高效攻击策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同LLM Agent在终止判断上表现出独特的行为特征，这些特征可被用于预测攻击策略的有效性，并跨Agent迁移。
analysis.method: LoopTrap框架：先通过轻量探测构建目标Agent的脆弱性行为画像，再自适应合成恶意提示，利用自评分机制选择最优注入，并将成功策略抽象为可复用技能库，失败策略通过自反思改进。
contributions: 首次定义并系统刻画了LLM Agent的终止投毒攻击问题，设计了10种代表性攻击策略。
提出LoopTrap自动化红队框架，通过行为画像和自适应合成实现高效攻击，平均步数放大3.57倍。
analysis.experiments: 在8个LLM Agent和60个任务上进行评估，LoopTrap平均步数放大3.57倍，最高25倍。
limitations: 攻击效果依赖于目标Agent的脆弱性探测准确性。
可能仅适用于具有自循环结构的Agent，对非循环Agent无效。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出针对LLM Agent的终止投毒攻击框架LoopTrap，通过注入恶意提示使Agent陷入无限循环，实现3.57倍平均步数放大。

papers.title: Taklif.AI: LLM-Powered Platform for Interest-Based Personalized College Assignments
papers.abstract: Educators face significant challenges in creating engaging, personalized assignments that accommodate students' diverse interests and cognitive abilities. Traditional one-size-fits-all assignments frequently lead to decreased student engagement and increased reliance on unethical practices such as plagiarism. To address these challenges, we present Taklif.AI, a platform that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to automatically generate personalized assignments tailored to individual student interests. Unlike existing AI-powered educational platforms that personalize based on academic performance metrics alone, Taklif.AI incorporates students' extracurricular interests and cultural contexts into the assignment generation process through a structured prompt engineering pipeline with input and output guardrails. The platform employs a serverless architecture on AWS with Next.js, using Llama 3.3 70B as the primary LLM via LiteLLM for multi-provider load balancing and LangChain for prompt orchestration. We describe the system architecture, the prompt design methodology, and the guardrails framework that ensures output quality. Preliminary user acceptance testing with 68 participants (65 students and 3 educators) indicates positive reception, with 84% of participants rating the personalization feature as beneficial. We discuss the platform's current capabilities and limitations, and outline directions for rigorous empirical evaluation of learning outcomes.

analysis.tldr: Taklif.AI 利用 LLM 根据学生兴趣自动生成个性化作业，初步测试获得积极反馈。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统统一作业导致学生参与度下降和抄袭行为增加，亟需个性化作业生成方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 LLM 生成融入学生课外兴趣和文化背景的个性化作业。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 Llama 3.3 70B 的 LLM 平台，通过结构化提示工程管道和输入输出护栏生成个性化作业，采用 AWS 无服务器架构。
contributions: 提出 Taklif.AI 平台，将学生兴趣和文化背景融入作业生成。
设计结构化提示工程管道和护栏框架确保输出质量。
analysis.experiments: 初步用户验收测试：68 名参与者（65 名学生和 3 名教育者），84% 认为个性化功能有益。
limitations: 缺乏对学习成果的严格实证评估。
仅基于初步用户反馈，样本量有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Taklif.AI 利用 LLM 根据学生兴趣自动生成个性化作业，初步测试获得积极反馈。

papers.title: On the Role of Language Representations in Auto-Bidding: Findings and Implications
papers.abstract: Auto-bidding is a crucial task in real-time advertising markets, where policies must optimize long-horizon value under delivery constraints (e.g., budget and CPA). Existing methods for auto-bidding rely on compact numerical state representations: while they can implicitly capture delivery dynamics, they offer limited support for explicitly representing and controlling high-level intent, evolving feedback, and operator-style strategic guidance in real campaigns. Meanwhile, Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a powerful method for encoding semantic information, it remains unclear when LLMs help and how to integrate them without sacrificing numerical precision. Through systematic preliminary studies, we find that (1) LLM embeddings contain bidding-relevant cues yet cannot replace numerical features, and (2) gains emerge only with careful semantic--numeric integration rather than naive concatenation. Motivated by these findings, we propose \textit{SemBid}, a novel auto-bidding framework that injects LLM-encoded semantics into offline bidding trajectories at the token level. SemBid introduces three semantic inputs: \textit{Task}, \textit{History}, and \textit{Strategy}. It injects these semantics as tokens alongside numerical trajectory tokens and uses self-attention to integrate them, improving controllability and generalization across objectives. Across diverse scenarios and budget regimes, SemBid outperforms competitive baselines from offline RL and generative sequence modeling, with more consistent gains in overall performance, constraint satisfaction, and robustness. Our code is available at: \href{https://github.com/AlanYu04/SemBid-KDD2026}{\textcolor{blue}{here}}.

analysis.tldr: 提出SemBid框架，通过将LLM语义嵌入与数值轨迹在token级别融合，提升自动出价策略的可控性和泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动出价方法依赖紧凑数值状态表示，难以显式表达高级意图、动态反馈和策略指导，而LLM虽能编码语义信息，但如何在不牺牲数值精度的情况下有效集成尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM语义表示有效融入自动出价框架，以提升策略的可控性和泛化性，同时保持数值精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 初步研究发现：(1) LLM嵌入包含出价相关线索但无法替代数值特征；(2) 只有通过精心设计的语义-数值集成（而非简单拼接）才能获得性能提升。
analysis.method: 提出SemBid框架，在token级别将LLM编码的三种语义输入（Task、History、Strategy）注入离线出价轨迹，通过自注意力机制与数值轨迹token融合。
contributions: 系统研究了LLM表示在自动出价中的作用，揭示了语义-数值集成的关键条件。
提出SemBid框架，通过token级语义注入和自注意力融合，提升了自动出价的可控性和泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种场景和预算设置下，SemBid在整体性能、约束满足和鲁棒性上均优于离线RL和生成序列建模基线。
limitations: 依赖LLM编码质量，可能受限于预训练模型领域适应性。
token级注入可能增加计算开销，实时性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SemBid框架，通过将LLM语义嵌入与数值轨迹在token级别融合，提升自动出价策略的可控性和泛化性。

papers.title: MolRecBench-Wild: A Real-World Benchmark for Optical Chemical Structure Recognition
papers.abstract: Optical Chemical Structure Recognition (OCSR) aims to translate molecular diagrams in scientific literature into machine-readable formats, but current systems remain unreliable on real-world images due to substantial visual and chemical complexity. We introduce MOSAIC, a dual-dimensional difficulty framework with 37 fine-grained labels that jointly characterize visual interference and chemical semantic challenges in molecular diagrams. Based on this framework, we construct MolRecBench-Wild, a benchmark of 5,029 structures from 820 recent chemistry papers, covering the full difficulty spectrum observed in real publications. To enable faithful semantic evaluation beyond SMILES and MolFile, we propose CARBON, a representation language capable of expressing valence variations, icon-based groups, and other non-standard chemical semantics. We further adopt a dual-track evaluation protocol supporting both CARBON and SMILES outputs for broad model compatibility. Comprehensive experiments over 18 OCSR-capable models reveal severe performance degradation on MolRecBench-Wild, exposing a large gap between previous patent benchmarks and real-world academic scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出真实世界OCSR基准MolRecBench-Wild，揭示现有模型在学术文献分子图上的严重性能下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OCSR系统在真实世界图像上不可靠，缺乏能反映实际化学文献复杂性的基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏覆盖真实出版物中视觉干扰和化学语义挑战的OCSR基准，以及能表达非标准化学语义的评估语言。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MOSAIC双维度难度框架（37细粒度标签），构建包含5029个结构的MolRecBench-Wild基准，并设计CARBON表示语言支持非标准化学语义评估。
contributions: 提出MOSAIC框架，联合表征分子图的视觉干扰和化学语义挑战。
构建MolRecBench-Wild基准，覆盖真实学术文献的完整难度谱。
提出CARBON表示语言，支持价变、图标基团等非标准化学语义。
采用双轨评估协议（CARBON和SMILES），对18个模型进行实验，揭示性能严重下降。
analysis.experiments: 在18个OCSR模型上进行综合实验，发现MolRecBench-Wild上性能严重下降，暴露了与先前专利基准的差距。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖化学文献，可能不适用于其他领域分子图。
CARBON语言可能增加评估复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出真实世界OCSR基准MolRecBench-Wild，揭示现有模型在学术文献分子图上的严重性能下降。

papers.title: Unifying Scientific Communication: Fine-Grained Correspondence Across Scientific Media
papers.abstract: The communication of scientific knowledge has become increasingly multimodal, spanning text, visuals, and speech through materials such as research papers, slides, and recorded presentations. These different representations collectively convey a study's reasoning, results, and insights, offering complementary perspectives that enrich understanding. However, despite their shared purpose, such materials are rarely connected in a structured way. The absence of explicit links across formats makes it difficult to trace how concepts, visuals, and explanations correspond, limiting unified exploration and analysis of research content. To address this gap, we introduce the Multimodal Conference Dataset (MCD), the first benchmark that integrates research papers, presentation videos, explanatory videos, and slides from the same works. We evaluate a range of embedding-based and vision-language models to assess their ability to discover fine-grained cross-format correspondences, establishing the first systematic benchmark for this task. Our results show that vision-language models are robust but struggle with fine-grained alignment, while embedding-based models capture text-visual correspondences well but equations and symbolic content form distinct clusters in the embedding space. These findings highlight both the strengths and limitations of current approaches and point to key directions for future research in multimodal scientific understanding. To ensure reproducibility, we release the resources for MCD at https://github.com/meghamariamkm2002/MCD

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态会议数据集MCD，评估模型在科学媒体间细粒度对应发现能力，揭示当前方法的优势与局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学知识传播日益多模态，但文本、视觉、语音等不同媒体间缺乏结构化关联，阻碍统一探索与分析。
analysis.problem: 如何建立研究论文、演示视频、讲解视频和幻灯片之间的细粒度跨格式对应关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉-语言模型鲁棒但细粒度对齐困难；嵌入模型能捕捉文本-视觉对应，但公式和符号内容在嵌入空间中形成独立簇。
analysis.method: 构建多模态会议数据集MCD，包含论文、视频、幻灯片；评估嵌入模型和视觉-语言模型在跨格式对应发现上的表现。
contributions: 首个整合论文、演示视频、讲解视频和幻灯片的基准数据集MCD
系统评估现有模型在细粒度跨格式对应发现任务上的能力，揭示其优势与不足
analysis.experiments: 在MCD上评估多种嵌入模型和视觉-语言模型，分析其对应发现性能。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，覆盖领域不够广泛
未提出新模型，仅评估现有方法
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态会议数据集MCD，评估模型在科学媒体间细粒度对应发现能力，揭示当前方法的优势与局限。

papers.title: AGPO: Asymmetric Group Policy Optimization for Verifiable Reasoning and Search Ads Relevance at JD
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated notable success in enhancing the reasoning performance of large language models (LLMs). However, recent studies reveal that while current RLVR methods improve sampling efficiency towards correct paths, they do not elicit fundamentally new reasoning patterns. Instead, the reasoning capability boundary of trained models often narrows compared to their base models, with base models achieving higher coverage at large sample sizes. In this work, we propose Asymmetric Group Policy Optimization (AGPO) to counteract this boundary shrinkage. AGPO adopts a negative-dominant reinforcement strategy to suppress incorrect reasoning paths, maintaining the base model's exploration capacity. For positive reinforcement, AGPO adopts a group advantage mechanism, which scales positive updates based on intra-group variance, allowing the model to focus on rare correct paths while suppressing updates from trivial paths. Our experiments on five mathematical benchmarks demonstrate that AGPO achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while consistently improving pass@$k$ performance at scale. In a large-scale industrial application for search ads relevance optimization, AGPO effectively enhances the quality of the data annotation, leading to substantial performance gains in downstream student models.

analysis.tldr: 提出非对称组策略优化（AGPO）方法，通过负主导抑制错误路径、组优势机制聚焦稀有正确路径，缓解RLVR训练中推理边界收缩问题，在数学基准和搜索广告相关性任务上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLVR方法虽提升采样效率，但会缩小模型推理能力边界，基模型在大采样量下覆盖度更高，需要新方法在强化正确路径的同时保持探索能力。
analysis.problem: RLVR训练导致LLM推理边界收缩，即模型无法探索基模型能覆盖的稀有正确路径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到RLVR方法不激发新推理模式，反而使推理边界变窄，基模型在大样本下覆盖度更高。
analysis.method: AGPO采用负主导强化策略抑制错误路径，组优势机制根据组内方差缩放正更新，聚焦稀有正确路径。
contributions: 提出AGPO算法，通过负主导和组优势机制缓解推理边界收缩问题。
在五个数学基准上达到SOTA准确率，并持续提升pass@k性能。
在京东搜索广告相关性优化中验证了大规模工业应用的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在五个数学基准上评估准确率和pass@k，并在京东搜索广告相关性任务中验证下游学生模型性能提升。
limitations: 未讨论AGPO在其他非数学推理任务上的泛化能力。
组优势机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非对称组策略优化（AGPO）方法，通过负主导抑制错误路径、组优势机制聚焦稀有正确路径，缓解RLVR训练中推理边界收缩问题，在数学基准和搜索广告相关性任务上取得SOTA。

papers.title: ChartZero: Synthetic Priors Enable Zero Shot Chart Data Extraction
papers.abstract: Automated data extraction from line charts remains fundamentally bottlenecked by extreme stylistic diversity and a severe scarcity of comprehensively annotated, real-world datasets. Current end-to-end pipelines depend heavily on costly manual annotations, crippling their ability to generalize across arbitrary aesthetics and grid layouts. Furthermore, existing models suffer from two critical failure modes during reconstruction. First, extracting thin, intersecting curves frequently causes structural fragmentation and the erasure of fine visual details, as standard architectures struggle against complex backgrounds. Second, semantic association is notoriously error-prone; current pipelines rely on rigid spatial heuristics that easily break down against the unpredictable legend placements of in-the-wild charts. Finally, measuring true progress is hindered by evaluation protocols that assess isolated sub-tasks rather than holistic, end-to-end data reconstruction. To address these foundational issues, we introduce ChartZero, a parsing framework that leverages synthetic priors to enable robust zero-shot chart data extraction. By training exclusively on a purely synthetic dataset of simple mathematical functions, our model completely bypasses the real-world annotation bottleneck. We overcome curve fragmentation via a novel Global Orthogonal Instance (GOI) loss, and replace brittle spatial rules with an open-vocabulary, Vision-Language Model (VLM)-guided legend matching strategy.
