Accompanied by a new metric and benchmark specifically designed for full end-to-end reconstruction, our evaluations demonstrate that ChartZero significantly advances generalized plot digitization without requiring real-world supervision. Code and dataset will be released upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: ChartZero 通过纯合成数据训练和 VLM 引导的图例匹配，实现零样本图表数据提取。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图表数据提取方法依赖昂贵的人工标注，难以泛化到多样化的图表风格和网格布局，且存在曲线断裂和语义关联错误等关键失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖真实标注数据的情况下，实现鲁棒的零样本图表数据提取，并解决曲线断裂和语义关联错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个关键失败模式：1) 提取细薄交叉曲线时导致结构断裂和细节丢失；2) 基于空间启发式的语义关联在不可预测的图例位置下容易失效。
analysis.method: ChartZero 框架：1) 仅使用纯合成数学函数数据集训练；2) 提出全局正交实例损失（GOI）克服曲线断裂；3) 采用开放词汇的 VLM 引导图例匹配策略替代刚性空间规则。
contributions: 提出 ChartZero 框架，通过合成先验实现零样本图表数据提取，无需真实标注。
设计全局正交实例损失（GOI）解决曲线断裂问题。
引入 VLM 引导的开放词汇图例匹配策略，提升语义关联鲁棒性。
提出新的端到端重建指标和基准，用于全面评估图表数据提取。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对线图，可能不适用于其他图表类型（如柱状图、饼图）。
合成数据与真实世界图表之间的域差异可能影响泛化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ChartZero 通过纯合成数据训练和 VLM 引导的图例匹配，实现零样本图表数据提取。

papers.title: LeakDojo: Decoding the Leakage Threats of RAG Systems
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enables large language models (LLMs) to leverage external knowledge, but also exposes valuable RAG databases to leakage attacks. As RAG systems grow more complex and LLMs exhibit stronger instruction-following capabilities, existing studies fall short of systematically assessing RAG leakage risks. We present LeakDojo, a configurable framework for controlled evaluation of RAG leakage. Using LeakDojo, we benchmark six existing attacks across fourteen LLMs, four datasets, and diverse RAG systems. Our study reveals that (1) query generation and adversarial instructions contribute independently to leakage, with overall leakage well approximated by their product; (2) stronger instruction-following capability correlates with higher leakage risk; and (3) improvements in RAG faithfulness can introduce increased leakage risk. These findings provide actionable insights for understanding and mitigating RAG leakage in practice. Our codebase is available at https://github.com/yeasen-z/LeakDojo.

analysis.tldr: LeakDojo系统评估了RAG系统的数据泄露风险，发现查询生成与对抗指令独立贡献泄露，且模型指令遵循能力越强泄露风险越高。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG系统在增强LLM能力的同时，其数据库面临泄露攻击风险，现有研究缺乏系统性评估框架。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估RAG系统在不同攻击、模型和数据集下的数据泄露风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 查询生成和对抗指令独立贡献泄露，整体泄露近似为两者乘积；更强的指令遵循能力与更高泄露风险相关；RAG忠实度提升可能增加泄露风险。
analysis.method: 提出LeakDojo可配置框架，用于控制变量评估RAG泄露，并基准测试六种现有攻击。
contributions: 提出LeakDojo框架，支持系统评估RAG泄露风险
揭示泄露机制：查询生成与对抗指令独立贡献，忠实度与泄露风险存在权衡
analysis.experiments: 在14个LLM、4个数据集和多种RAG系统上基准测试六种攻击，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估现有攻击，未提出新防御方法
实验可能未覆盖所有RAG变体或攻击类型
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LeakDojo系统评估了RAG系统的数据泄露风险，发现查询生成与对抗指令独立贡献泄露，且模型指令遵循能力越强泄露风险越高。

papers.title: TinySSL: Distilled Self-Supervised Pretraining for Sub-Megabyte MCU Models
papers.abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has transformed representation learning for large models, yet remains unexplored for microcontroller (MCU)-class models with fewer than 500K parameters. We identify three obstacles at this scale -- projection head dominance, representation bottleneck, and augmentation sensitivity -- and propose Capacity-Aware Distilled Self-Supervised Learning (CA-DSSL), a teacher-guided framework that overcomes them without labels or text supervision. CA-DSSL combines asymmetric distillation from a frozen DINO ViT-S/16 teacher, multi-scale feature distillation for spatial representations, and a progressive augmentation curriculum. On a MobileNetV2-0.35 backbone (396K parameters) pretrained on CIFAR-100, CA-DSSL reaches 62.7 0.5% linear-probe accuracy (3-seed mean) -- surpassing SimCLR-Tiny by 18 pp, matching SEED (61.7%) with 10 fewer projection parameters (426K vs. 3.15M), and reaching 94.0% of a supervised upper bound. Standard SSL methods (BYOL-Tiny, DINO-Tiny) collapse entirely at this scale. On Pascal VOC detection, CA-DSSL achieves 2.3 the mAP of random initialization and +3 pp over SEED, though SimCLR-Tiny matches CA-DSSL on detection mAP. The deployed backbone occupies 378 KB (INT8) with no inference overhead from pretraining. Preliminary ImageNet-100 experiments reveal that CA-DSSL's advantage is specific to small-data regimes; scaling to ImageNet-1K is discussed as future work.

analysis.tldr: 提出CA-DSSL，一种针对亚兆字节MCU模型的无标签自监督预训练方法，在CIFAR-100上超越现有方法18个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督学习在大型模型上表现优异，但在参数少于500K的微控制器（MCU）模型上尚未被探索，现有方法在此规模下存在投影头主导、表征瓶颈和增强敏感性问题。
analysis.problem: 如何为MCU级小模型（<500K参数）设计有效的无标签自监督预训练方法，避免模型坍塌并提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准SSL方法（如BYOL-Tiny、DINO-Tiny）在MCU规模下完全坍塌；投影头主导导致表征瓶颈；小模型对数据增强更敏感。
analysis.method: 提出容量感知蒸馏自监督学习（CA-DSSL），包括：从冻结的DINO ViT-S/16教师进行非对称蒸馏、多尺度特征蒸馏用于空间表征、以及渐进式增强课程。
contributions: 首次系统研究MCU级模型的自监督预训练，识别三个关键障碍。
提出CA-DSSL框架，无需标签或文本监督，在CIFAR-100上达到62.7%线性探测准确率，超过SimCLR-Tiny 18个百分点。
在Pascal VOC检测任务上，CA-DSSL的mAP比随机初始化高2.3倍，比SEED高3个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-100和Pascal VOC上评估，使用MobileNetV2-0.35骨干（396K参数），报告线性探测准确率和检测mAP；初步ImageNet-100实验表明优势限于小数据 regime。
limitations: 优势在ImageNet-1K等大数据集上可能减弱，需进一步验证。
检测任务上SimCLR-Tiny与CA-DSSL mAP相当，说明检测任务可能对特定方法不敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CA-DSSL，一种针对亚兆字节MCU模型的无标签自监督预训练方法，在CIFAR-100上超越现有方法18个百分点。

papers.title: A Testable Certificate for Constant Collapse in Teacher-Guided VAEs
papers.abstract: Posterior collapse in variational autoencoders is often diagnosed by its symptoms: a small KL term, a strong decoder, or weak use of the latent code. These signals are useful, but they do not define a collapse boundary. We study a concrete failure mode, input-independent constant collapse, and show that this case admits an exact threshold. For any fixed nonconstant teacher distribution \(T(\cdot\mid x)\), the best constant student is the dataset-average teacher distribution, and its alignment cost is the teacher mutual information \(I_T(X;T)\). Therefore, if a strictly latent-only raw witness achieves alignment loss below this value, with a safety margin, the witness cannot be constant in the input. This identity turns a qualitative failure mode into a measurable one. In CIFAR-100 experiments with per-seed teacher search, full training stays on the certified side of the boundary, removing alignment drives the raw witness into the constant-student regime, and restarting from a collapsed checkpoint with alignment enabled restores the certificate. Tiny-ImageNet-200 fixed-target runs show the same prevention--collapse--rescue pattern across three independently searched teachers. Standard VAE-style baselines, including methods that preserve reconstruction quality or post-hoc predictability, remain negative under the raw certificate. The guarantee is intentionally narrow: it certifies that the matched nonconstant teacher-relative variation passes through the latent pathway, rather than claiming that all forms of posterior collapse have been ruled out.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可测试的证书，通过比较对齐损失与教师互信息阈值来检测教师引导VAE中的恒定后验坍塌。
analysis.research_motivation: 后验坍塌是VAE训练中的常见问题，但现有诊断方法仅依赖症状（如小的KL项），缺乏明确的坍塌边界定义，导致难以量化检测。
analysis.problem: 如何为教师引导VAE中的输入无关恒定坍塌（constant collapse）定义一个精确的、可测试的阈值边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 恒定坍塌是一种具体的失败模式，表现为潜在编码与输入无关；摘要发现最佳常数学生是数据集平均教师分布，其对齐成本等于教师互信息I_T(X;T)，从而将定性失败转化为可测量的边界。
analysis.method: 提出一个基于对齐损失的证书：如果纯潜在编码的原始见证（raw witness）的对齐损失低于教师互信息（加上安全裕度），则见证不能是输入恒定的。
contributions: 首次为教师引导VAE中的恒定坍塌定义了精确的阈值边界，基于教师互信息。
通过CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet-200实验验证了证书的有效性，展示了预防、坍塌和恢复模式。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-100上进行了每种子教师搜索实验，显示完整训练保持在认证侧，移除对齐导致原始见证进入常数学生区域，从坍塌检查点重启并启用对齐可恢复证书。Tiny-ImageNet-200固定目标运行在三个独立搜索的教师上展示了相同的预防-坍塌-恢复模式。标准VAE基线（包括保持重建质量或事后可预测性的方法）在原始证书下仍为阴性。
limitations: 证书仅针对输入无关恒定坍塌，不排除其他形式的后验坍塌。
需要预定义的教师分布，且教师互信息的计算可能依赖于数据集。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可测试的证书，通过比较对齐损失与教师互信息阈值来检测教师引导VAE中的恒定后验坍塌。

papers.title: Long-Horizon Q-Learning: Accurate Value Learning via n-Step Inequalities
papers.abstract: Off-policy, value-based reinforcement learning methods such as Q-learning are appealing because they can learn from arbitrary experience, including data collected by older policies or other agents. In practice, however, bootstrapping makes long-horizon learning brittle: estimation errors at later states propagate backward through temporal-difference (TD) updates and can compound over time. We propose long-horizon Q-learning (LQL), which introduces a principled backstop against compounding error when learning the optimal action-value function. LQL builds on a prior optimality tightening observation: any realized action sequence lower-bounds what the optimal policy can achieve in expectation, so acting optimally earlier should not be worse than following the observed actions for several steps before switching to optimal behavior. Our contribution is to turn this inequality into a practical stabilization mechanism for Q-learning by using a hinge loss to penalize violations of these bounds. Importantly, LQL computes these penalties using network outputs already produced for the TD error, requiring no auxiliary networks and no additional forward passes relative to Q-learning. When combined with multiple state-of-the-art methods on a range of online and offline-to-online benchmarks, LQL consistently outperforms both 1-step TD and n-step TD learning at similar runtime.

analysis.tldr: 提出长视界Q学习(LQL)，通过n步不等式约束稳定值函数学习，在多种基准上超越1步和n步TD方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 离策略值函数强化学习方法（如Q学习）因自举导致长视界学习脆弱，估计误差通过TD更新向后传播并累积，影响学习稳定性。
analysis.problem: 解决Q学习在长视界任务中因自举误差累积导致的值函数学习不准确问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出自举使得长视界学习脆弱：后续状态的估计误差通过TD更新向后传播并随时间累积。
analysis.method: 提出长视界Q学习(LQL)，基于最优性收紧观察，利用铰链损失惩罚违反n步下界的行为，无需额外网络或前向传播。
contributions: 将最优性不等式转化为Q学习的实用稳定机制，通过铰链损失惩罚违反下界的行为。
在多个在线和离线到在线基准上，结合多种SOTA方法，LQL以相似运行时间一致优于1步和n步TD学习。
analysis.experiments: 在多个在线和离线到在线基准上，结合多种SOTA方法进行实验，LQL一致优于1步和n步TD学习，且运行时间相似。
limitations: 可能对n步长度的选择敏感，需要调参。
理论保证仅限于下界约束，上界误差可能未被充分处理。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出长视界Q学习(LQL)，通过n步不等式约束稳定值函数学习，在多种基准上超越1步和n步TD方法。

papers.title: Sheet as Token: A Graph-Enhanced Representation for Multi-Sheet Spreadsheet Understanding
papers.abstract: Workbook-scale spreadsheet understanding is increasingly important for language-model-based data analysis agents, but remains challenging because relevant information is often distributed across multiple sheets with heterogeneous schemas, layouts, and implicit relationships. Existing retrieval-augmented approaches typically decompose spreadsheets into rows, columns, or blocks to improve scalability; however, such chunk-centric representations can fragment worksheets into isolated text spans and weaken global sheet-level semantics. We propose Sheet as Token, a graph-enhanced framework that treats each worksheet as a unified semantic unit for multi-sheet spreadsheet retrieval. Our method extracts schema-aware records from sheet names, column headers, representative values, and layout features, and encodes each worksheet into a compact dense token. Given a natural-language query, a Graph Retriever constructs a query-specific candidate graph over sheet tokens using semantic, query-conditioned, schema-consistency, and shape-compatibility relations, and composes these channels through a multi-stage graph transformer to retrieve supporting sheet sets. Experiments on a constructed multi-sheet spreadsheet corpus show that sheet-level tokenization learns stable representations, and that graph-enhanced cross-sheet reasoning improves listwise retrieval over a shallow graph baseline with limited additional graph-side computation. These results suggest that sheet-level tokenization is a promising abstraction for scalable multi-sheet spreadsheet understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出将每个工作表视为一个语义单元（Sheet as Token），并用图增强检索实现多表电子表格理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言模型在处理多工作表电子表格时，因信息分散在不同工作表且模式、布局和关系复杂，导致理解困难；而基于分块的检索方法会破坏工作表的整体语义。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地表示和检索多工作表电子表格中的相关信息，以支持基于语言模型的数据分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Sheet as Token框架：将每个工作表编码为紧凑的稠密token（包含表名、列头、代表值、布局特征），并构建查询特定的候选图（利用语义、查询条件、模式一致性和形状兼容性关系），通过多阶段图Transformer进行跨工作表推理以检索相关工作表集合。
contributions: 提出将工作表作为统一语义单元进行token化表示的方法。
设计图增强检索器，利用多种关系构建候选图并进行跨工作表推理。
analysis.experiments: 在构建的多工作表电子表格语料库上进行实验，结果表明工作表级token化学习到稳定表示，图增强跨工作表推理在列表检索上优于浅层图基线，且额外计算开销有限。
limitations: 实验仅在构造的语料库上进行，真实场景泛化性未知。
方法依赖预定义的四种关系，可能无法覆盖所有跨工作表关联。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将每个工作表视为一个语义单元（Sheet as Token），并用图增强检索实现多表电子表格理解。

papers.title: CXR-ContraBench: Benchmarking Negated-Option Attraction in Medical VLMs
papers.abstract: When a chest X-ray shows consolidation but the question asks which finding is present, a medical vision-language model may answer "No consolidation." This is more than an incorrect choice: it is a polarity reversal that emits a clinical statement contradicting the image. We study this failure as negated-option attraction, where a model is drawn to a negated answer option even when it conflicts with both the visual evidence and the question. We introduce CXR-ContraBench (Chest X-Ray Contradiction Benchmark), a diagnostic benchmark spanning internal ReXVQA slices and external OpenI and CheXpert protocols. The benchmark centers on present-finding questions, where selecting "No X" despite visible X creates the main clinical risk, and uses absent-finding questions as secondary tests of whether models copy negated wording. Across CheXpert protocols, the failure is substantial and persistent. On a strict direct presence probe, MedGemma and Qwen2.5-VL reach only 31.49% and 30.21% accuracy, respectively; on a matched 135,754-record CheXpert training-split protocol, both models select negated options on over 62% of presence questions. Chain-of-thought prompting reduces some presence-side reversals but does not eliminate them and can amplify absence-side contradictions. Finally, QCCV-Neg (Question-Conditioned Consistency Verifier for Negation) deterministically repairs the measured polarity-confused subset without retraining, raising MedGemma and Qwen2.5-VL to 96.60% and 95.32% accuracy on the direct presence probe. These results show that standard accuracy can hide a clinically meaningful inference-time polarity failure. Source code and benchmark construction scripts are available at https://github.com/fangzr/cxr-contrabench-code.

analysis.tldr: 提出CXR-ContraBench基准，揭示医学VLM在胸部X光片问答中因否定选项吸引导致极性反转的严重失败，并给出无需重训的修复方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学视觉语言模型在临床问答中可能因否定选项吸引而输出与图像矛盾的陈述，这种极性反转错误具有严重临床风险，但标准准确率指标无法暴露该问题。
analysis.problem: 医学VLM在胸部X光片存在性提问中，倾向于选择否定选项（如“无实变”）而忽略视觉证据，导致极性反转错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在存在性问题上频繁选择否定选项，即使图像显示该发现；链式思维提示可减少部分反转但无法消除，甚至加剧缺失侧矛盾；标准准确率隐藏了临床有意义的极性失败。
analysis.method: 构建CXR-ContraBench基准（含内部ReXVQA和外部OpenI/CheXpert协议），并提出QCCV-Neg（问题条件一致性验证器）无需重训即可修复极性混淆子集。
contributions: 首次系统研究医学VLM中的否定选项吸引现象，并定义极性反转错误。
发布CXR-ContraBench基准，覆盖多种协议和问题类型。
提出QCCV-Neg方法，无需重训即可显著修复极性反转错误。
analysis.experiments: 在CheXpert协议上，MedGemma和Qwen2.5-VL在直接存在性探测上准确率仅31.49%和30.21%；在135,754条CheXpert训练集协议中，两模型在超过62%的存在性问题上选择否定选项。QCCV-Neg将准确率提升至96.60%和95.32%。
limitations: QCCV-Neg仅修复极性混淆子集，未解决所有错误类型。
基准主要基于胸部X光片，泛化到其他模态或疾病需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CXR-ContraBench基准，揭示医学VLM在胸部X光片问答中因否定选项吸引导致极性反转的严重失败，并给出无需重训的修复方法。

papers.title: LCC-LLM: Leveraging Code-Centric Large Language Models for Malware Attribution
papers.abstract: LLMs are increasingly explored for malware analysis; however, current LLM-based malware attribution remains limited by unsupported indicators and insufficient code-level grounding for identifying malicious and vulnerable code segments. To address these limitations, this research introduces LCC-LLM, a code-centric benchmark dataset and evidence-grounded framework for malware attribution and multi-task static malware analysis. The proposed LCCD dataset contains approximately 34K PE samples processed through a large-scale reverse-engineering pipeline and represented using decompiled C code, assembly code, CFG/FCG artifacts, hexadecimal data, PE metadata, suspicious API evidence, and structural features. Beyond dataset construction, LCC-LLM integrates LangGraph-orchestrated static analysis with multi-source cybersecurity knowledge to support evidence-grounded malware reasoning. The framework employs a seven-layer retrieval-augmented generation pipeline, CoVe for IoC validation, and a multi-dimensional quality gate to improve factual reliability and analyst-oriented decision support. Curriculum-ordered instruction data is used to fine-tune DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B and Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B using QLoRA. Evaluation across 43 malware-analysis task types achieves an average semantic similarity of 0.634, with the highest task-level performance in structured report generation, IoC extraction, vulnerability assessment, malware configuration extraction, and malware class detection. In a real-world case study using MalwareBazaar samples, the grounded pipeline achieves a 10/10 structured analysis pass rate, producing CFG/FCG evidence, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, detection guidance, and analyst-ready reports. These results show that code-centric representations, retrieval grounding, and verification-guided reasoning improve the reliability and operational usefulness of LLM-assisted malware attribution.

analysis.tldr: 提出代码中心数据集与证据驱动框架LCC-LLM，提升LLM辅助恶意软件归因的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的恶意软件归因受限于不支持指标和缺乏代码级证据，导致分析不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何利用代码中心表示和证据驱动推理提升LLM在恶意软件归因和多任务静态分析中的准确性和实用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建LCCD数据集（含反编译C代码、汇编、CFG/FCG等），结合LangGraph编排的静态分析、七层RAG流水线、CoVe验证和多维质量门控，使用课程排序指令数据微调DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B和Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B。
contributions: 提出LCCD数据集，包含约34K PE样本的多模态代码中心表示。
提出LCC-LLM框架，集成检索增强、验证引导推理和质量门控，提升归因可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在43种恶意软件分析任务上平均语义相似度0.634，在结构化报告生成、IoC提取等任务上表现最佳；真实案例中结构化分析通过率10/10。
limitations: 仅针对PE格式，可能不适用于其他恶意软件类型。
依赖反编译质量，可能影响低质量样本分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出代码中心数据集与证据驱动框架LCC-LLM，提升LLM辅助恶意软件归因的可靠性。

papers.title: Na-IRSTD: Enhancing Infrared Small Target Detection via Native-Resolution Feature Selection and Fusion
papers.abstract: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) faces the inherent challenge of precisely localizing dim targets amid complex background clutter. While progress has been made, existing methods usually follow conventional strategies to downsample features and discard small targets' details, resulting in suboptimal performance. In this paper, we present Na-IRSTD, a native-resolution feature extraction and fusion framework for IRSTD. This framework elegantly incorporates native-resolution features to preserve subtle target cues, overcoming the resolution limitations of existing infrared approaches and significantly improving the model's ability to localize small targets. We also introduce an effective token reduction and selection strategy, which selects target patches with high accuracy and confidence, boosting the low-level details of the feature while effectively reducing native-resolution patch tokens compared to dense processing, thereby avoiding imposing an unbearable computational burden. Extensive experiments demonstrate the robustness and effectiveness of our token reduction and selection strategy across multiple public datasets. Ultimately, our Na-IRSTD model achieves state-of-the-art performance on four benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出Na-IRSTD框架，通过原生分辨率特征选择和融合提升红外小目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 红外小目标检测中，现有方法通常下采样特征导致小目标细节丢失，性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持计算效率的同时，保留并利用原生分辨率特征来提升小目标定位精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Na-IRSTD框架，包含原生分辨率特征提取与融合，以及令牌缩减与选择策略，高精度选择目标补丁并减少计算负担。
contributions: 提出原生分辨率特征提取与融合框架，保留小目标细节。
引入令牌缩减与选择策略，在提升特征细节的同时降低计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在四个公开数据集上达到最先进性能，验证了令牌缩减与选择策略的鲁棒性和有效性。
limitations: 可能对极端小目标或高噪声场景适应性有限。
令牌选择策略的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Na-IRSTD框架，通过原生分辨率特征选择和融合提升红外小目标检测性能。

papers.title: Revealing Modular Gradient Noise Imbalance in LLMs: Calibrating Adam via Signal-to-Noise Ratio
papers.abstract: The impressive performance of large language models (LLMs) arises from their massive scale and heterogeneous module composition. However, this structural heterogeneity introduces additional optimization challenges. While adaptive optimizers such as Adam(W) provide per-parameter adaptivity, they do not explicitly account for module-level gradient heterogeneity, resulting in slower convergence, suboptimal performance, or training instability. Existing approaches typically rely on manually tuned module-specific learning rates or specific optimization strategies, which are computationally costly and difficult to generalize across tasks or models. To establish a more principled approach, we first analyze the noise-damping behavior of Adam in high-noise modules and introduce \textbf{Module-wise Learning Rate Scaling via SNR (MoLS)}. MoLS estimates module-level SNRs to scale Adam updates, allowing automated module-wise learning rate allocation without manual tuning. Empirical results through multiple LLM training benchmarks demonstrate that MoLS improves convergence speed and generalization, achieving performance comparable to carefully tuned module-specific learning rates, while remaining compatible with memory-efficient training algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于信噪比的模块级学习率缩放方法MoLS，自动校准Adam优化器以缓解LLM训练中的梯度噪声不平衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的异构模块组成导致梯度噪声分布不均，而Adam等自适应优化器未显式处理模块级梯度异质性，造成收敛慢、性能次优或训练不稳定。现有手动调参方法计算成本高且难以泛化。
analysis.problem: LLM训练中模块级梯度噪声不平衡导致的优化困难，需要一种无需手动调参的自动化模块级学习率分配方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM中不同模块的梯度噪声水平存在差异，Adam在高噪声模块中的噪声抑制行为需要改进。
analysis.method: MoLS：通过估计模块级信噪比（SNR）来缩放Adam更新步长，实现自动化的模块级学习率分配。
contributions: 揭示了LLM训练中模块级梯度噪声不平衡现象，并分析了Adam在高噪声模块中的噪声抑制行为。
提出MoLS方法，基于SNR自动调整模块级学习率，无需手动调参，兼容内存高效训练算法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM训练基准上验证，MoLS提升了收敛速度和泛化性能，达到了与精心调参的模块级学习率相当的效果。
limitations: 可能依赖SNR估计的准确性，在极端噪声场景下可能不稳定。
未讨论MoLS在不同模型架构（如非Transformer）上的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于信噪比的模块级学习率缩放方法MoLS，自动校准Adam优化器以缓解LLM训练中的梯度噪声不平衡问题。

papers.title: Stego Battlefield: Evaluating Image Steganography Attacks and Steganalysis Defenses
papers.abstract: Image steganography is widely used to protect user privacy and enable covert communication. However, it can also be abused by the adversary as a covert channel to bypass content moderation, disseminate harmful semantics, and even hide malicious instructions in images to elicit dangerous outputs from large models, posing a practical security risk that continues to evolve. To address the lack of a unified and systematic evaluation framework, we propose SADBench, a systematic benchmark that assesses the adversary's ability to inject harmful secrets via steganography and the defender's ability to detect such threats through steganalysis. Crucially, SADBench comprises $4$ core tasks, namely steganography attack capability evaluation, steganalysis defense capability evaluation, efficiency evaluation, and transferability evaluation. It evaluates both image-payload and text-payload steganography across diverse cover distributions, utilizing harmful visual semantics and toxic instructions to simulate malicious attacks. Across a broad set of attacks and detectors, SADBench reveals that (i) INN and autoencoder-based methods demonstrate superior stability compared to other architectures, (ii) in-domain detection is near-perfect and cheaper than generation, (iii) a critical asymmetry exists in transferability where attacks robustly generalize to new distributions while detectors fail to adapt, and (iv) real-world threats persist on social media, where payloads either survive minimal compression or effectively adapt to aggressive compression via simulated training. Overall, SADBench establishes a systematic, reproducible, and extensible framework to quantify risks, paving the way for measurable and security-driven advancements in steganography defense.

analysis.tldr: 提出SADBench基准，系统评估图像隐写攻击与隐写分析防御，揭示攻击与防御之间的不对称性。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像隐写术在保护隐私的同时，可能被滥用于绕过内容审核、传播有害内容或隐藏恶意指令，但缺乏统一的评估框架来量化风险。
analysis.problem: 缺乏系统性的基准来评估隐写攻击能力和隐写分析防御能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了四个关键现象：INN和自编码器方法稳定性更好；域内检测近乎完美且成本低于生成；攻击的迁移性鲁棒而检测器无法适应；社交媒体上真实威胁持续存在。
analysis.method: 提出SADBench基准，包含四个核心任务：隐写攻击能力评估、隐写分析防御能力评估、效率评估和迁移性评估，覆盖图像和文本载荷，使用有害视觉语义和有毒指令模拟恶意攻击。
contributions: 提出了SADBench，一个系统、可重复、可扩展的隐写攻击与防御评估基准。
揭示了攻击与防御之间的迁移性不对称等关键发现。
analysis.experiments: 在多种攻击和检测器上进行实验，包括域内和跨域评估，以及社交媒体压缩场景。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有隐写方法和检测器。
基准的扩展性可能受限于当前数据集和任务设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SADBench基准，系统评估图像隐写攻击与隐写分析防御，揭示攻击与防御之间的不对称性。

papers.title: Steering Visual Generation in Unified Multimodal Models with Understanding Supervision
papers.abstract: Unified multimodal models are envisioned to bridge the gap between understanding and generation. Yet, to achieve competitive performance, state-of-the-art models adopt largely decoupled understanding and generation components. This design, while effective for individual tasks, weakens the connection required for mutual enhancement, leaving the potential synergy empirically uncertain. We propose to explicitly restore this synergy by introducing Understanding-Oriented Post-Training (UNO), a lightweight framework that treats understanding not only as a distinct task, but also a direct supervisory signal to steer generative representations. By incorporating objectives that encode semantic abstraction (captioning) and structural details (visual regression), we enable effective gradient flow from understanding to generation. Extensive experiments on image generation and editing demonstrate that understanding can serve as an effective catalyst for generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出UNO框架，通过理解任务监督信号引导统一多模态模型的生成表征，提升图像生成与编辑性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态模型为追求性能，通常将理解与生成组件解耦，削弱了二者间的协同潜力，导致相互增强的效果不确定。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加大量参数的前提下，恢复理解与生成之间的有效协同，使理解任务能够直接监督并引导生成表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出理解导向后训练（UNO）框架，在生成模型上添加语义抽象（字幕）和结构细节（视觉回归）目标，使理解梯度流向生成模块。
contributions: 提出UNO轻量框架，利用理解监督信号引导生成表征。
通过图像生成与编辑实验验证理解可作为生成的有效催化剂。
analysis.experiments: 在图像生成和编辑任务上进行实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定统一多模态架构。
未在视频或3D生成等更复杂任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UNO框架，通过理解任务监督信号引导统一多模态模型的生成表征，提升图像生成与编辑性能。

papers.title: Von Neumann Networks
papers.abstract: In the mid-twentieth century, mathematician and polymath John von Neumann created a computational system on an array of cells as a simple model of the human brain, where each cell had one of a finite set of roles or states that he predicted would be modelled by a diffusion process. In this work, we show that such a system, when developed in a modern deep learning setting, enables the construction of an artificial neuron having specialized roles that can be learnt. We refer to this neuron as the Von Neumann neuron, and the resulting neural network from such neurons result in a self-engineered design whose architecture is only dependent on the structure and locations of its inputs and outputs on this cellular array. The mathematical framework for these Von Neumann Networks (VNNs) is also constructed and shows that they are based on the extension of neural operators and the learning of Green's functions with convolutions on a cellular topology having a diffusion signature. We also prove that these VNNs are part of a more general computational system called Cellular Machines that are computationally universal. Initial experiments show that VNN based multi-layered perceptrons outperform their equivalent deep learning variant on basic tasks, while being more parameter efficient and are capable of learning new types of tasks. This includes the ability to solve for and construct an extension of the Von Neumann (hardware) architecture common to all modern computers to cells and suggests new opportunities that could be explored.

analysis.tldr: 受冯·诺依曼细胞自动机启发，提出一种新型神经网络架构VNN，其神经元角色可学习，架构仅依赖输入输出在细胞阵列上的位置，并证明其计算通用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 冯·诺依曼在20世纪中期提出的细胞计算系统作为大脑简化模型，其预测的扩散过程尚未在现代深度学习中得到充分探索，现有神经网络架构缺乏这种自组织设计。
analysis.problem: 如何将冯·诺依曼的细胞自动机思想融入深度学习，构建一种架构仅由输入输出位置决定、神经元角色可学习的神经网络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Von Neumann神经元，其角色可学习；基于神经算子扩展和格林函数学习，在具有扩散特征的细胞拓扑上使用卷积构建Von Neumann网络（VNN）；证明VNN是计算通用的细胞机器的一部分。
contributions: 提出Von Neumann神经元和VNN架构，其设计仅依赖输入输出在细胞阵列上的位置。
构建VNN的数学框架，基于神经算子和格林函数学习。
证明VNN属于计算通用的细胞机器系统。
实验表明VNN多层感知机在基本任务上优于等效深度学习变体，参数效率更高，并能学习新类型任务。
analysis.experiments: 初始实验表明基于VNN的多层感知机在基本任务上优于等效深度学习变体，参数效率更高，并能学习新类型任务，包括求解和构建冯·诺依曼硬件架构的细胞扩展。
limitations: 实验规模较小，仅涉及基本任务。
实际应用中的可扩展性和训练稳定性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受冯·诺依曼细胞自动机启发，提出一种新型神经网络架构VNN，其神经元角色可学习，架构仅依赖输入输出在细胞阵列上的位置，并证明其计算通用性。

papers.title: HEDP: A Hybrid Energy-Distance Prompt-based Framework for Domain Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: Domain Incremental Learning is a critical scenario that requires models to continuously adapt to new data domains without retraining. However, domain shifts often cause severe performance degradation. To address this, we propose Hybrid Energy-Distance Prompt, a domain-incremental framework inspired by Helmholtz free energy. HEDP introduces an energy regularization loss to enhance the separability of domain representations and a hybrid energy-distance weighted mechanism that fuses energy-based and distance-based cues to improve domain selection and generalization. Experiments on multiple benchmarks, including CORe50, show that HEDP achieves superior performance on unseen domains with a 2.57\% accuracy gain, effectively mitigating catastrophic forgetting and enhancing open-world adaptability. Our code is \href{https://github.com/dannis97500/HEDP/}{available here}.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合能量-距离提示的域增量学习框架，通过能量正则化和混合加权机制提升域分离与泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 域增量学习要求模型在不重训练的情况下持续适应新数据域，但域偏移常导致性能严重下降，现有方法在域选择与泛化上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效缓解域增量学习中的灾难性遗忘并提升模型对未见域的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 域偏移导致模型性能严重退化，现有方法在域表示的可分离性和域选择机制上存在瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出HEDP框架，包含能量正则化损失以增强域表示的可分离性，以及混合能量-距离加权机制融合能量和距离线索以改进域选择与泛化。
contributions: 提出基于Helmholtz自由能的混合能量-距离提示框架HEDP，用于域增量学习。
设计能量正则化损失和混合加权机制，有效缓解灾难性遗忘并提升开放世界适应性。
analysis.experiments: 在CORe50等多个基准上实验，HEDP在未见域上取得2.57%的准确率提升。
limitations: 可能对能量函数的设计敏感，需要调参。
未在更多样化的域增量场景（如大规模域序列）中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合能量-距离提示的域增量学习框架，通过能量正则化和混合加权机制提升域分离与泛化。

papers.title: The autoPET3 Challenge: Automated Lesion Segmentation in Whole-Body PET/CT $\unicode{x2013}$ Multitracer Multicenter Generalization
papers.abstract: We report the design and results of the third autoPET challenge (MICCAI 2024), which benchmarked automated lesion segmentation in whole-body PET/CT under a compositional generalization setting. Training data comprised 1,014 [18F]-FDG PET/CT studies from the University Hospital Tübingen and 597 [18F]/[68Ga]-PSMA PET/CT studies from the LMU University Hospital Munich, constituting the largest publicly available annotated PSMA PET/CT dataset to date. The held-out test set of 200 studies covered four tracer-center combinations, two of which represented unseen compositional pairings. A complementary data-centric award category isolated the contribution of data handling strategies by restricting participants to a fixed baseline model. Seventeen teams submitted 27 algorithms, predominantly nnU-Net-based 3D networks with PET/CT channel concatenation. The top-ranked algorithm achieved a mean DSC of 0.66, FNV of 3.18 mL, and FPV of 2.78 mL across all four test conditions, improving DSC by 8% and reducing the false-negative volume by 5 mL relative to the provided baseline. Ranking was stable across bootstrap resampling and alternative ranking schemes for the top tier. Beyond the benchmark, we provide an in-depth analysis of segmentation performance at the patient and lesion level. Three main conclusions can be drawn: (1) in-domain multitracer PET/CT segmentation is sufficient and probably approaching reader agreement; (2) compositional generalization to unseen tracer-center combinations remains an open problem mainly driven by systematic volume overestimation; (3) heterogeneity and case difficulty drive performance variation substantially more than the choice of algorithm among top-ranked teams.

analysis.tldr: 第三届autoPET挑战赛在全身PET/CT病灶分割中评估了组合泛化能力，发现域内多示踪剂分割接近读者一致性，但未见过的示踪剂-中心组合泛化仍是开放问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 全身PET/CT病灶自动分割在临床诊断和治疗评估中具有重要价值，但现有方法在跨示踪剂和跨中心的组合泛化场景下性能不足，缺乏系统性基准。
analysis.problem: 解决全身PET/CT病灶分割在组合泛化设置下的算法评估问题，特别是未见过的示踪剂-中心组合的泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：(1) 域内多示踪剂分割性能足够且可能接近读者一致性；(2) 组合泛化到未见过的示踪剂-中心组合时，主要问题为系统性体积高估；(3) 异质性和病例难度对性能变异的影响远大于顶级算法之间的选择。
analysis.method: 组织MICCAI 2024挑战赛，提供包含1,014例FDG和597例PSMA PET/CT的多中心数据集，设置四种示踪剂-中心组合的测试集（含两种未见过的组合），并设立数据导向奖项以隔离数据处理策略的影响。
contributions: 发布了迄今为止最大的公开注释PSMA PET/CT数据集（597例），并提供了多示踪剂多中心的组合泛化基准。
通过挑战赛结果和深入分析，揭示了域内多示踪剂分割的充分性和组合泛化的瓶颈（体积高估），以及病例难度比算法选择更影响性能。
analysis.experiments: 17支队伍提交27个算法，主要为基于nnU-Net的3D网络，在200例测试集上评估，最佳算法平均DSC 0.66，FNV 3.18 mL，FPV 2.78 mL，相比基线DSC提升8%，假阴性体积减少5 mL。排名通过bootstrap重采样和替代排名方案验证稳定性。
limitations: 仅包含两种示踪剂（FDG和PSMA），泛化到其他示踪剂或更多中心有待验证。
挑战赛设置可能偏向nnU-Net架构，其他创新方法未被充分探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 第三届autoPET挑战赛在全身PET/CT病灶分割中评估了组合泛化能力，发现域内多示踪剂分割接近读者一致性，但未见过的示踪剂-中心组合泛化仍是开放问题。

papers.title: CircuitFormer: A Circuit Language Model for Analog Topology Design from Natural Language Prompt
papers.abstract: Automating analog circuit design remains a longstanding challenge in Electronic Design Automation (EDA). While Transformer-based Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized software code generation, their application to analog hardware design is hindered by two critical limitations: (i) the scarcity of analog design datasets containing natural language description of a design and its corresponding netlist, and (ii) the inefficiency of general-purpose tokenizers (e.g., Byte Pair Encoding (BPE)) in capturing the inherent graph structure of circuits. To bridge this gap, first, we curate the largest annotated dataset of analog circuit netlists to date, comprising 31,341 netlist-natural language description pairs across all major circuit classes. Furthermore, we propose Circuit Tokenizer (CKT), a novel circuit graph tokenizer designed to encode netlist connectivity by explicitly mining frequent subcircuits. In terms of scalability, CKT overcomes the bottleneck of prior circuit graph serialization methods where vocabulary size scales linearly with maximum number of components in the dataset, n_max, (O(n_max)); instead, CKT decouples vocabulary growth from circuit complexity, achieving a constant O(1) complexity. Empirically, CKT outperforms standard BPE on circuit topology representation, reducing sequence length by 57% and achieving a 2.3x superior compression ratio using a compact, fixed vocabulary of size 512. Leveraging this optimized tokenization, we train a circuit-specific language model, CircuitFormer, a 511M parameter encoder-decoder transformer. Our model achieves 100% syntactic correctness and an 83% functional success rate across all major analog circuit categories, outperforming state-of-the-art open-source LLMs by 10% and 14%, respectively, while requiring 240x fewer parameters. The dataset is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/touhid314/cktformer-dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出电路专用分词器CKT和语言模型CircuitFormer，从自然语言描述生成模拟电路网表，实现高语法正确率和功能成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 模拟电路设计自动化是长期挑战，现有LLM因缺乏标注数据集和通用分词器无法有效处理电路图结构。
analysis.problem: 从自然语言描述生成模拟电路网表，解决数据集稀缺和分词器不匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用分词器（如BPE）无法捕捉电路图结构，导致序列长、压缩率低；先前电路图序列化方法词汇表大小随组件数线性增长。
analysis.method: 构建最大模拟电路网表-描述数据集（31,341对），提出电路图分词器CKT挖掘频繁子电路，词汇表大小恒定O(1)，训练511M参数编码器-解码器Transformer模型CircuitFormer。
contributions: 构建了最大规模的模拟电路网表-自然语言描述数据集（31,341对）。
提出电路图分词器CKT，实现恒定词汇表大小和高效压缩。
训练CircuitFormer模型，在语法正确性和功能成功率上超越开源LLM，参数少240倍。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟电路网表生成任务上，CKT相比BPE序列长度减少57%，压缩比提升2.3倍；CircuitFormer实现100%语法正确率和83%功能成功率，优于开源LLM 10%和14%。
limitations: 仅针对模拟电路，未验证数字电路或其他领域。
功能成功率83%仍有提升空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出电路专用分词器CKT和语言模型CircuitFormer，从自然语言描述生成模拟电路网表，实现高语法正确率和功能成功率。

papers.title: Confidence is the key: how conformal prediction enhances the generative design of permeable peptides
papers.abstract: Generative models coupled with reinforcement learning (RL), such as REINVENT and PepINVENT, have emerged as a powerful framework for de novo molecular design. During the ideation process these generative frameworks utilize various predictive models as part of the optimization objectives. However, the utility of the predictive models can be limited by their domain of applicability. When RL is used to explore the chemical space with predictive models, it can suggest molecules that lie outside the predictor's domain of applicability. As a result, the predictions may become less reliable, potentially steering designs into high reward but also high uncertainty chemical spaces. This is particularly pronounced for cyclic peptides which show therapeutic promise due to their modifiability and large interaction surfaces but are understudied compared to small molecules. While passive membrane permeation in cyclic peptides has attracted interest, identifying optimal permeable designs remains challenging yet crucial for targeting intracellular sites. We present an RL-guided generative framework that designs permeable cyclic peptides using an uncertainty-aware permeability predictor as the scoring component. To address predictive uncertainty, especially impacted by novel chemistry, we integrate conformal prediction (CP) as our uncertainty quantification method. CP assesses designs based on the calibrated model under a user-defined confidence level. We demonstrate that rewarding generated peptides with CP-informed predictions improves both reliability and efficiency of peptide optimization process. This also discourages exploration outside the predictor's applicability domain. This approach bridges the gap between predictive uncertainty and RL-guided exploration, showing how generative modelling and conformal prediction can be combined for the first time.

analysis.tldr: 将共形预测与强化学习结合，提升生成模型设计可渗透环肽的可靠性和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成模型结合强化学习在分子设计中广泛应用，但预测模型在探索化学空间时可能超出其适用范围，导致不可靠的预测，尤其对于研究不足的环肽。
analysis.problem: 解决强化学习引导的生成模型在探索化学空间时，预测模型不确定性导致设计不可靠的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当强化学习探索化学空间时，可能提出超出预测模型适用域的分子，导致预测不可靠，将设计导向高奖励但高不确定性的区域。
analysis.method: 提出一个RL引导的生成框架，使用不确定性感知的渗透性预测器作为评分组件，并集成共形预测（CP）量化不确定性，在用户定义置信水平下评估设计。
contributions: 首次将共形预测与生成模型和强化学习结合，用于分子设计。
提出不确定性感知的RL引导框架，提高环肽渗透性设计的可靠性和效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于环肽渗透性预测，泛化性未知。
共形预测的置信水平选择可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将共形预测与强化学习结合，提升生成模型设计可渗透环肽的可靠性和效率。

papers.title: Adaptive Selection of LoRA Components in Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning
papers.abstract: Differentially private federated fine-tuning of large models with LoRA suffers from aggregation error caused by LoRA's multiplicative structure, which is further amplified by DP noise and degrades both stability and accuracy. Existing remedies apply a single update mode uniformly across all layers and all communication rounds (or alternate them on a fixed schedule), ignoring both the structural asymmetry between the two LoRA factors and the round-wise dynamics of training. We propose AS-LoRA, an adaptive framework defined by three axes (i) layer-wise freedom, in which each layer independently selects its active component, (ii) round-wise adaptivity, in which the selection updates over communication rounds, and (iii) a curvature-aware score derived from a second-order approximation of the loss. Theoretically, AS-LoRA eliminates the reconstruction-error floor of layer-tied schedules, accelerates convergence, implicitly biases solutions toward flatter minima, and incurs no additional privacy cost. Across GLUE, SQuAD, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet under strict DP budgets and non-IID partitions, AS-LoRA improves over the federated LoRA baselines by up to $+7.5$ pp on GLUE and $+12.5$ pp on MNLI-mm for example, while matching or exceeding SVD-based aggregation methods at $33\text{--}180 \times$ lower aggregation cost and with negligible communication overhead. Code for the proposed method is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/as_lora-F75F/.

analysis.tldr: AS-LoRA通过自适应选择LoRA组件，在差分隐私联邦微调中显著降低聚合误差并提升精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 差分隐私联邦微调中，LoRA的乘法结构导致聚合误差，DP噪声进一步放大该误差，降低稳定性和精度；现有方法对所有层和通信轮次使用统一更新模式，忽略了LoRA因子间的结构不对称性和训练动态。
analysis.problem: 解决差分隐私联邦微调中LoRA聚合误差大、稳定性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LoRA的乘法结构导致聚合误差，DP噪声放大该误差；统一更新模式忽略层间不对称和轮次动态，存在重构误差下限。
analysis.method: 提出AS-LoRA自适应框架，包含三个维度：层级自由度（每层独立选择活跃组件）、轮次自适应（选择随通信轮次更新）、曲率感知评分（基于损失二阶近似）。理论证明消除层绑定方案的重构误差下限，加速收敛，隐式偏向平坦极小值，且不增加隐私成本。
contributions: 提出AS-LoRA自适应框架，通过层级和轮次自适应选择LoRA组件，显著降低聚合误差。
理论分析证明AS-LoRA消除重构误差下限、加速收敛、偏向平坦极小值且无额外隐私成本。
在GLUE、SQuAD、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet上，AS-LoRA在严格DP预算和非IID分区下，相比联邦LoRA基线提升高达+7.5pp（GLUE）和+12.5pp（MNLI-mm），并以33-180倍更低的聚合成本匹配或超越SVD方法。
analysis.experiments: 在GLUE、SQuAD、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet数据集上，使用严格DP预算和非IID分区进行实验，AS-LoRA相比联邦LoRA基线提升高达+7.5pp（GLUE）和+12.5pp（MNLI-mm），并以33-180倍更低的聚合成本匹配或超越SVD方法。
limitations: 可能依赖二阶近似计算的准确性，在极大规模模型上计算开销可能增加。
实验仅在中等规模数据集上进行，未在超大规模模型或更复杂任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AS-LoRA通过自适应选择LoRA组件，在差分隐私联邦微调中显著降低聚合误差并提升精度。

papers.title: X-OmniClaw Technical Report: A Unified Mobile Agent for Multimodal Understanding and Interaction
papers.abstract: Inspired by the development of OpenClaw, there is a growing demand for mobile-based personal agents capable of handling complex and intuitive interactions. In this technical report, we introduce X-OmniClaw, a unified mobile agent designed for multimodal understanding and interaction in the Android ecosystem. This unified architecture of perception, memory, and action enables the agent to handle complex mobile tasks with high contextual awareness. Specifically, Omni Perception provides a unified multimodal ingress pipeline that integrates UI states, real-world visual contexts, and speech inputs, leveraging a temporal alignment module to decompose raw data into structured multimodal intent representations. Omni Memory leverages multimodal memory optimization to enhance personalized intelligence by integrating runtime working memory for task continuity with long-term personal memory distilled from local data, enabling highly context-aware and personalized interactions. Finally, Omni Action employs a hybrid grounding strategy that combines structural XML metadata with visual perception for robust interaction. Through Behavior Cloning and Trajectory Replay, the system captures user navigation as reusable skills, enabling precise direct-access execution. Demonstrations across diverse scenarios show that X-OmniClaw effectively enhances interaction efficiency and task reliability, providing a practical architectural blueprint for the next generation of mobile-native personal assistants.

analysis.tldr: X-OmniClaw 是一个统一的多模态移动智能体，通过感知、记忆与动作的融合架构提升 Android 生态中的交互效率与任务可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着 OpenClaw 等工作的启发，移动端个人智能体需要处理复杂、直观的交互，但现有系统在感知、记忆与动作的整合上存在不足，缺乏统一架构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的移动智能体架构，使其能够融合多模态输入（UI、视觉、语音）、维护上下文记忆并执行鲁棒的动作，以完成复杂的移动任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 X-OmniClaw 架构，包含三个核心模块：Omni Perception（统一多模态输入管道，含时间对齐模块）、Omni Memory（运行时工作记忆与长期个人记忆的融合）、Omni Action（混合定位策略，结合 XML 元数据与视觉感知，并通过行为克隆和轨迹回放实现技能复用）。
contributions: 提出了一个统一的多模态移动智能体架构，整合感知、记忆与动作。
设计了 Omni Perception、Omni Memory 和 Omni Action 三个模块，分别处理多模态输入、个性化记忆和鲁棒交互。
通过行为克隆和轨迹回放实现可复用的用户导航技能，提升直接访问执行效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多种场景下展示了有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖 Android 生态的特定接口，泛化性待验证。
长期记忆的隐私与安全性问题未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: X-OmniClaw 是一个统一的多模态移动智能体，通过感知、记忆与动作的融合架构提升 Android 生态中的交互效率与任务可靠性。

papers.title: Conditional generation of antibody sequences with classifier-guided germline-absorbing discrete diffusion
papers.abstract: Antibody therapeutics are among the most successful modern medicines, yet computationally designing antibodies with desirable binding and developability properties remains challenging. While protein language models (pLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for antibody sequence design, existing approaches largely suffer from two key limitations: they predominantly memorize germline sequences rather than modeling biologically meaningful somatic variation, and they offer limited support for flexible classifier-guided conditional generation. We address these challenges through two primary contributions. First, we demonstrate that discrete diffusion fine-tuning achieves strong language modeling performance on antibody sequences while allowing for generation conditioned on any off-the-shelf classifier. Second, we introduce germline absorbing diffusion, a novel modification of the discrete diffusion noise process in which the germline sequence - rather than a masked sequence - serves as the absorbing state. This biologically motivated inductive bias restricts the model to learning the trajectory from germline to observed sequence, effectively excluding genetic variation and V(D)J recombination statistics from the learned distribution and dramatically mitigating germline bias. We show that germline diffusion improves non-germline residue prediction accuracy from 26 percent to 46 percent, approaching the theoretical upper bound set by true biological variability. We then demonstrate the utility of our germline diffusion model on the conditional generation tasks of sampling antibodies with improved hydrophobicity and predicted binding affinity. On both tasks our model shows an improved tradeoff between class adherence and sample quality, significantly outperforming EvoProtGrad, a popular strategy to sample from pLMs with gradient-based discrete Markov Chain Monte Carlo.

analysis.tldr: 提出种系吸收离散扩散模型，通过将种系序列设为吸收态来缓解种系偏差，实现抗体序列的条件生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 抗体治疗药物是现代医学的重要工具，但计算设计具有理想结合性和可开发性的抗体仍具挑战。现有蛋白质语言模型主要记忆种系序列而非建模有意义的体细胞变异，且缺乏灵活的分类器引导条件生成能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计抗体序列生成模型，使其既能学习从种系到观测序列的生物学轨迹、避免种系偏差，又能支持基于任意分类器的条件生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有pLM模型存在种系偏差，即主要记忆种系序列而非体细胞变异；离散扩散微调可提升语言建模性能并支持分类器引导生成。
analysis.method: 提出种系吸收离散扩散（germline absorbing diffusion），将种系序列作为离散扩散噪声过程的吸收态，使模型学习从种系到观测序列的轨迹；结合离散扩散微调实现分类器引导的条件生成。
contributions: 证明离散扩散微调在抗体序列上取得强语言建模性能，并支持任意分类器引导的条件生成。
提出种系吸收扩散，通过将种系序列设为吸收态来缓解种系偏差，显著提升非种系残基预测准确率（26%→46%）。
在疏水性和结合亲和力条件生成任务上，模型在类别遵循度和样本质量之间取得更优权衡，显著优于EvoProtGrad。
analysis.experiments: 在抗体序列语言建模任务上评估非种系残基预测准确率，并在疏水性和预测结合亲和力条件生成任务上比较与EvoProtGrad的性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于抗体序列，泛化性未知。
条件生成依赖外部分类器，分类器质量可能影响生成效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出种系吸收离散扩散模型，通过将种系序列设为吸收态来缓解种系偏差，实现抗体序列的条件生成。

papers.title: iTRIALSPACE: Programmable Virtual Lesion Trials for Controlled Evaluation of Lung CT Models
papers.abstract: We introduce iTRIALSPACE, a programmable evaluation framework for controlled assessment of lung CT models. Standard benchmarks are static retrospective collections that entangle lesion size, lobe prevalence, anatomy, and acquisition context, making it difficult to determine what structurally drives model accuracy. iTRIALSPACE addresses this limitation by composing real clinical CTs and lesion profiles into controlled virtual lesion trials through a four-stage pipeline: multidataset nodule profiling, explicit trial specification, anatomy-aware mask insertion, and ControlNet-conditioned CT synthesis. The framework is built on a unified 54-attribute nodule-profile dataset spanning 13,140 annotated nodules from seven public CT sources and instantiated as 13 trial modes. We evaluate iTRIALSPACE in a 55,469-sample Virtual Lesion Study spanning three medical VLMs, four spatialguidance conditions, and three clinical tasks. Across all 13 modes, the synthetic substrate remains within the real-to-real FID baseline, and synthetic performance rankings transfer strongly to real clinical data ($ρ$ = 0.93, p < 10$^{-15}$). Controlled trial modes expose findings unavailable to fixed-distribution benchmarks, including shortcut-driven size prediction collapse under lobe-equalized sampling and hostto-donor variance ratios of 8.9x and 3.3x in twin-cross analysis. These results position iTRIALSPACE as an auditable evaluation infrastructure for controlled, falsifiable testing beyond static retrospective benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出可编程虚拟病灶试验框架iTRIALSPACE，用于可控评估肺CT模型，揭示静态基准无法发现的模型缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准基准是静态回顾性数据集，病灶大小、叶分布、解剖和采集上下文纠缠不清，难以确定模型精度的结构性驱动因素。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可控、可审计的评估框架，以解耦病灶属性并系统测试肺CT模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 四阶段流水线：多数据集结节分析、显式试验规范、解剖感知掩膜插入、ControlNet条件CT合成；基于统一54属性结节数据集（7个公共源，13140个结节），实例化为13种试验模式。
contributions: 提出iTRIALSPACE可编程评估框架，实现肺CT模型的可控虚拟病灶试验。
构建统一54属性结节数据集，覆盖7个公共CT源。
通过55,469样本虚拟病灶研究验证，合成数据FID接近真实，性能排名与真实临床数据强相关（ρ=0.93）。
发现固定分布基准无法揭示的模型缺陷，如捷径驱动的尺寸预测崩溃和宿主-供体方差比差异。
analysis.experiments: 在55,469样本虚拟病灶研究中评估，涵盖3个医学VLM、4种空间引导条件和3个临床任务。
limitations: 可能仅适用于肺CT结节评估，泛化到其他器官或病变类型需验证。
合成数据与真实数据之间仍可能存在未发现的分布差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可编程虚拟病灶试验框架iTRIALSPACE，用于可控评估肺CT模型，揭示静态基准无法发现的模型缺陷。

papers.title: MaMi-HOI: Harmonizing Global Kinematics and Local Geometry for Human-Object Interaction Generation
papers.abstract: Generating realistic 3D Human-Object Interactions (HOI) is a fundamental task for applications ranging from embodied AI to virtual content creation, which requires harmonizing high-level semantic intent with strict low-level physical constraints. Existing methods excel at semantic alignment, however, they struggle to maintain precise object contact. We reveal a key finding termed \textit{Geometric Forgetting}: as diffusion model depth increases, semantic feature tend to overshadow object geometry feature, causing the model to lose its perception to object geometry. To address this, we propose MaMi-HOI, a hierarchical framework reconciling \textbf{Ma}cro-level kinematic fluidity with \textbf{Mi}cro-level spatial precision. First, to counteract geometric forgetting, we introduce the Geometry-Aware Proximity Adapter (GAPA), which explicitly re-injects dense object details to perform residual snapping corrections for precise contact. Nevertheless, such aggressive local enforcement can disrupt global dynamics, leading to robotic stiffness. In response, we introduce the Kinematic Harmony Adapter (KHA), which proactively aligns whole-body posture with spatial objectives, ensuring the skeleton actively accommodates constraints without compromising naturalness. Extensive experiments validate that MaMi-HOI simultaneously achieves natural motion and precise contact. Crucially, it extends generation capabilities to long-term tasks with complex trajectories, effectively bridging the gap between global navigation and high-fidelity manipulation in 3D scenes. Code is available at https://github.com/DON738110198/MaMi-HOI.git

analysis.tldr: 提出MaMi-HOI框架，通过全局运动学与局部几何协调，解决3D人-物交互生成中几何遗忘导致的接触不精确问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D人-物交互生成在具身AI和虚拟内容创作中至关重要，现有方法虽擅长语义对齐，但难以维持精确的物体接触，限制了生成的真实性和实用性。
analysis.problem: 扩散模型深度增加时，语义特征掩盖物体几何特征，导致模型失去对物体几何的感知（几何遗忘），从而产生接触不精确的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现几何遗忘现象：随着扩散模型深度增加，语义特征逐渐主导，物体几何特征被削弱，模型对物体几何的感知能力下降。
analysis.method: 提出MaMi-HOI层次化框架，包含几何感知邻近适配器（GAPA）显式注入物体细节进行残差校正，以及运动学和谐适配器（KHA）主动对齐全身姿态与空间目标，平衡局部精度与全局自然性。
contributions: 揭示了几何遗忘现象，即扩散模型中语义特征压制几何特征导致接触不精确。
提出MaMi-HOI框架，通过GAPA和KHA适配器协调宏观运动学与微观几何，实现自然运动与精确接触。
扩展了长时复杂轨迹任务的生成能力，弥合全局导航与高保真操作之间的差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂多物体交互场景的泛化能力有限。
适配器引入额外计算开销，可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MaMi-HOI框架，通过全局运动学与局部几何协调，解决3D人-物交互生成中几何遗忘导致的接触不精确问题。

papers.title: Transformers Provably Implement In-Context Reinforcement Learning with Policy Improvement
papers.abstract: We investigate the ability of transformers to perform in-context reinforcement learning (ICRL), where a model must infer and execute learning algorithms from trajectory data without parameter updates. We show that a linear self-attention transformer block can provably implement policy-improvement methods, including semi-gradient SARSA and actor-critic, via explicit parameter constructions. Beyond existence, we design a teacher-mimicking training procedure, analyze its gradient-flow dynamics, and establish the first convergence guarantee in the ICRL literature: under suitable richness conditions on the training MDP distribution, gradient flow converges locally and exponentially to an optimal parameter manifold corresponding to the desired RL update. Empirically, training transformers on randomly generated tabular MDPs confirms these predictions: the learned models recover the parameter structure of our explicit constructions and, when deployed on unseen MDPs, deliver strong in-context control performance. Together, these results illuminate how transformer architectures internalize and execute classical reinforcement learning algorithms in context, bridging mechanistic understanding and training dynamics in ICRL.

analysis.tldr: 证明线性自注意力Transformer能通过显式参数构造实现策略改进型上下文强化学习，并首次给出收敛性保证。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解Transformer如何在不更新参数的情况下从轨迹数据中推断并执行强化学习算法，对于揭示其上下文学习能力和设计更高效的ICRL模型至关重要。
analysis.problem: 证明Transformer能够实现策略改进型上下文强化学习（如半梯度SARSA和Actor-Critic），并分析其训练动态和收敛性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过显式参数构造证明线性自注意力块可实现策略改进方法；设计教师模仿训练过程，分析梯度流动力学，给出局部指数收敛保证。
contributions: 首次证明线性自注意力Transformer可显式实现策略改进型上下文强化学习算法。
建立了ICRL文献中首个收敛性保证，证明在合适条件下梯度流局部指数收敛到最优参数流形。
analysis.experiments: 在随机生成的表格MDP上训练Transformer，验证了模型恢复显式构造的参数结构，并在未见MDP上表现出强上下文控制性能。
limitations: 理论结果限于线性自注意力块和表格MDP，可能不直接扩展到深层Transformer或连续状态空间。
收敛性分析依赖于训练MDP分布的丰富性条件，实际中可能难以满足。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 证明线性自注意力Transformer能通过显式参数构造实现策略改进型上下文强化学习，并首次给出收敛性保证。

papers.title: Jointly Learning Structured Representations and Stabilized Affinity for Human Motion Segmentation
papers.abstract: Human Motion Segmentation (HMS), which aims to partition a video into non-overlapping segments corresponding to different human motions, has recently attracted increasing research attention. Existing HMS approaches are predominantly based on subspace clustering, which are grounded on the assumption that the distribution of high-dimensional temporal features well aligns with a Union-of-Subspaces (UoS). For videos in the real world, however, the raw frame-level features often violate the UoS assumption and yield unsatisfactory segmentation performance. To address this issue, we propose an efficient and effective approach for HMS, named Temporal Deep Self-expressive subspace Clustering (TDSC), which jointly learns temporally consistent structured representations and stabilized affinity for accurate and robust HMS. Specifically, in TDSC, we alternately learn structured representations of the input frame features and self-expressive coefficients via a properly regularized self-expressive model, in which a coding-rate maximization regularizer is incorporated to avoid representation collapse and conform the learned representations to span a desired UoS distribution, and meanwhile, temporal constraints are incorporated to promote temporally adjacent frames to be partitioned into the same groups. Moreover, we develop a temporal momentum averaging mechanism to stabilize affinity evolution and design a reparameterization strategy to enable efficient optimization. We conduct extensive experiments on five benchmark HMS datasets using both conventional (HoG) and up-to-date deep features (i.e., CLIP, DINOv2) to validate the effectiveness of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出TDSC方法，通过联合学习结构化表示和稳定亲和度，提升人体运动分割的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于子空间聚类的人体运动分割方法假设高维时序特征符合子空间并集分布，但真实视频的原始帧级特征往往违反该假设，导致分割性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何使学习到的特征表示更好地符合子空间并集分布，并利用时序一致性提高运动分割的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 原始帧级特征不符合子空间并集假设，导致现有方法分割性能不理想。
analysis.method: 提出时序深度自表达子空间聚类（TDSC），交替学习输入帧特征的结构化表示和自表达系数，通过编码率最大化正则化避免表示坍塌并促使表示符合子空间并集分布，同时加入时序约束促进相邻帧分组一致；采用时序动量平均机制稳定亲和度演化，并设计重参数化策略实现高效优化。
contributions: 提出TDSC方法，联合学习时序一致的结构化表示和稳定亲和度，用于人体运动分割。
引入编码率最大化正则化避免表示坍塌，并促使表示符合子空间并集分布。
设计时序动量平均机制和重参数化策略，提升优化效率和亲和度稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在五个基准数据集上使用传统HoG特征和现代深度特征（CLIP、DINOv2）进行实验，验证了方法的有效性。
limitations: 可能对复杂运动场景的泛化能力有限。
计算复杂度可能较高，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TDSC方法，通过联合学习结构化表示和稳定亲和度，提升人体运动分割的准确性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: Ray-Aware Pointer Memory with Adaptive Updates for Streaming 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Dense 3D reconstruction from continuous image streams requires both accurate geometric aggregation and stable long-term memory management. Recent feed-forward reconstruction frameworks integrate observations through persistent memory representations, yet most rely primarily on appearance-based similarity when updating memory. Such appearance-driven integration often leads to redundant accumulation of observations and unstable geometry when viewpoint changes occur. In this work, we propose a ray-aware pointer memory for streaming 3D reconstruction that explicitly models both spatial location and viewing direction within a unified memory representation. Each memory pointer stores its 3D position, associated ray direction, and feature embedding, allowing the system to reason jointly about geometric proximity and viewpoint consistency. Based on this representation, we introduce an adaptive pointer update strategy that replaces traditional fusion-based memory compression with a retain-or-replace mechanism. Instead of averaging nearby observations, the system selectively retains informative pointers while discarding redundant ones, preserving distinctive geometric structures while maintaining bounded memory growth. Furthermore, the joint reasoning over spatial distance and ray-direction discrepancy enables the system to distinguish between local redundancy, novel observations, and potential loop revisits in a unified manner. When loop candidates are detected, pose refinement is triggered to enforce global geometric consistency across the reconstruction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed ray-aware memory design significantly improves long-term reconstruction stability and camera pose accuracy while maintaining efficient streaming inference. Our approach provides a principled framework for scalable and drift-resistant online 3D reconstruction from image streams.

analysis.tldr: 提出射线感知指针记忆与自适应更新策略，用于流式3D重建，提升长期稳定性和位姿精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流式3D重建方法主要依赖外观相似性更新记忆，导致冗余累积和视角变化时几何不稳定，亟需更高效的记忆管理机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种记忆表示和更新策略，既能融合空间位置与视角方向，又能避免冗余积累、保持几何一致性，并支持环路检测与位姿优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出基于外观相似性的记忆更新会导致冗余观测累积和视角变化时的几何不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出射线感知指针记忆，每个指针存储3D位置、射线方向和特征嵌入；采用保留或替换的自适应更新策略，替代传统融合式压缩；通过空间距离和射线方向差异联合推理，区分局部冗余、新观测和环路回访，触发位姿优化。
contributions: 提出射线感知指针记忆，统一建模空间位置与视角方向。
设计自适应指针更新策略，保留信息性指针、丢弃冗余，控制记忆增长。
实现环路检测与位姿优化，提升长期重建稳定性与位姿精度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对快速运动或极端视角变化敏感。
指针数量增长边界需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出射线感知指针记忆与自适应更新策略，用于流式3D重建，提升长期稳定性和位姿精度。

papers.title: Evaluating Explainability in Safety-Critical ATR Systems: Limitations of Post-Hoc Methods and Paths Toward Robust XAI
papers.abstract: Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) is increasingly rec ognized as essential for deploying machine learning systems in safety critical environments. In Automatic Target Recognition (ATR), where models operate on image, video, radar, and multisensor data, high pre dictive performance alone is insufficient. Model decisions must also be interpretable, reliable, and suitable for validation. This paper presents a structured evaluation of explainability methods in the context of safety-critical ATR systems: We identify major XAI paradigms, including saliency-based, attention-based, and surrogate ap proaches, as well as recent detection-aware extensions. Based on this, we formalize explainability as an assurance-oriented assessment problem, introduce a taxonomy, and assess these methods with respect to four key dimensions: interpretability, robustness, vulnerability to manipula tion, and suitability for validation and verification. The analysis identifies systematic limitations of current post-hoc explanation methods. In par ticular, we derive critical failure modes such as spurious explanations, instability under perturbations, and overtrust induced by visually con vincing outputs. These findings indicate that widely used XAI techniques may be insufficient for safety-critical deployment. Finally, we discuss implications for ATR systems and outline directions toward more robust, causally grounded, and physically informed explain ability methods. Our results emphasize the need to move beyond visually plausible explanations toward approaches that support reliable decision making and system-level assurance.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估了安全关键ATR系统中可解释性方法的局限性，指出事后解释方法存在虚假解释、不稳定性和过度信任等关键失效模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 在安全关键领域（如自动目标识别），仅靠高预测性能不足以保证系统可信，模型决策必须可解释、可靠且适合验证，但现有事后XAI方法缺乏系统性评估。
analysis.problem: 当前事后可解释性方法在安全关键ATR系统中存在系统性局限，无法满足验证与确认的保障需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出事后解释方法存在虚假解释、扰动下不稳定、视觉上令人信服但导致过度信任等关键失效模式。
analysis.method: 提出一个面向保障的可解释性评估框架，包括分类法，从可解释性、鲁棒性、对操纵的脆弱性、验证与确认适用性四个维度评估主要XAI范式（基于显著性、注意力、代理方法及检测感知扩展）。
contributions: 形式化了安全关键ATR中的可解释性评估问题，并引入分类法
系统识别了事后解释方法的系统性局限和关键失效模式
指出了向更鲁棒、因果驱动和物理信息可解释性方法的发展方向
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 评估主要基于理论分析和分类，缺乏大规模实证验证
提出的发展方向（因果、物理信息）尚未给出具体实现方案
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统评估了安全关键ATR系统中可解释性方法的局限性，指出事后解释方法存在虚假解释、不稳定性和过度信任等关键失效模式。

papers.title: Best Arm Identification in Generalized Linear Bandits via Hybrid Feedback
papers.abstract: We study fixed-confidence best arm identification in generalized linear bandits under a hybrid feedback model: at each round, the learner may query either (i) absolute reward feedback from a single arm or (ii) relative (dueling) feedback from an arm pair, both governed by generalized linear models. We introduce a likelihood-ratio--based confidence sequence that unifies heterogeneous generalized linear observations and yields an explicit ellipsoidal confidence set under a self-concordance assumption. Building on this confidence set, we propose a hybrid Track-and-Stop algorithm that adaptively allocates queries by tracking a minimax-optimal design over a joint action space of arms and pairs. We establish $δ$-correctness and provide high-probability upper bounds on the stopping time. We further extend the framework to a cost-aware setting that accounts for heterogeneous acquisition costs across feedback modalities. Empirical experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithms significantly improve sample efficiency over baseline methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合反馈下广义线性老虎机的最佳臂识别算法，统一绝对与相对反馈，显著提升样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有最佳臂识别研究多局限于单一反馈类型（绝对或相对），而实际场景中两者均可获取，但缺乏统一的理论框架和高效算法。
analysis.problem: 在固定置信度下，如何利用混合反馈（绝对奖励和相对成对反馈）高效识别广义线性老虎机中的最佳臂。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 混合反馈能提供互补信息，但异构观测的置信序列构造和最优设计分配是主要挑战。
analysis.method: 基于似然比的置信序列统一异构广义线性观测，提出混合Track-and-Stop算法，通过追踪联合动作空间上的极小极大最优设计自适应分配查询。
contributions: 首次在广义线性老虎机中统一处理绝对和相对反馈的混合反馈模型，并建立显式椭球置信集。
提出混合Track-and-Stop算法，证明δ-正确性并给出停止时间的高概率上界，同时扩展到成本感知场景。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明所提算法在样本效率上显著优于基线方法。
limitations: 假设自洽性条件，可能限制应用范围。
未讨论反馈类型选择策略的最优性。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合反馈下广义线性老虎机的最佳臂识别算法，统一绝对与相对反馈，显著提升样本效率。

papers.title: Fourier Feature Methods for Nonlinear Causal Discovery: FFML Scoring, TRFF Scoring, and FFCI Testing in Mixed Data
papers.abstract: Gaussian process (GP) marginal likelihood scores and kernel conditional independence tests are theoretically appealing for nonlinear causal discovery but computationally prohibitive at scale. We present three complementary RFF-based methods forming a practical toolkit for score-based, constraint-based, and hybrid causal discovery. The Fourier Feature Marginal Likelihood (FFML) score approximates the exact GP marginal likelihood by replacing the $n x n$ kernel Gram matrix with a finite-dimensional feature representation, reducing cost to $O(nm^2 + m^3)$ while retaining the probabilistic interpretation and automatic complexity penalty of the exact score. FFML extends to mixed (continuous and discrete) parent sets via a product-kernel construction, with a Kronecker path for small discrete parent sets and a Hadamard-product path otherwise. The Tetrad Random Fourier Feature (TRFF) score is a complementary BIC-style alternative using penalized Student-t regression with random Fourier features. TRFF offers robustness to heavy-tailed noise and faster runtime than FFML. Empirically, TRFF and FFML exhibit a complementary precision-recall profile: TRFF achieves higher precision while FFML achieves better recall and lower SHD overall. The Fourier Feature Conditional Independence (FFCI) test is a fast nonparametric CI test for mixed data, using ridge residualization in feature space and a Frobenius-norm cross-covariance statistic approximated as a weighted sum of chi-squared variables. Empirically, BOSS+FFML achieves the lowest SHD on nonlinear data, while BOSS+TRFF offers the highest precision. When run through PC-Max, FFCI and RCIT exhibit complementary precision-recall profiles: RCIT is more precise while FFCI achieves better recall and substantially lower SHD, at approximately twice the runtime.

analysis.tldr: 提出三种基于随机傅里叶特征的因果发现方法，在混合数据上实现高效的非线性因果推断。
analysis.research_motivation: 高斯过程边际似然分数和核条件独立性检验在理论上适用于非线性因果发现，但计算成本过高，难以扩展到大规模数据。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地进行非线性因果发现，同时处理混合类型数据（连续和离散）并保持统计可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三种互补的RFF方法：FFML分数（近似GP边际似然，降低计算复杂度）、TRFF分数（基于惩罚学生t回归的BIC风格分数，对重尾噪声鲁棒）、FFCI检验（基于特征空间岭残差化和Frobenius范数交叉协方差统计量的非参数条件独立性检验）。
contributions: 提出FFML分数，通过有限维特征表示近似GP边际似然，将计算复杂度从O(n^3)降至O(nm^2+m^3)，并保留概率解释和自动复杂度惩罚。
提出TRFF分数，一种基于随机傅里叶特征的BIC风格分数，对重尾噪声鲁棒且运行速度更快。
提出FFCI检验，一种用于混合数据的快速非参数条件独立性检验，使用特征空间岭残差化和近似卡方加权和的统计量。
analysis.experiments: 在非线性数据上，BOSS+FFML获得最低的SHD，BOSS+TRFF获得最高精度；在PC-Max框架下，FFCI比RCIT获得更好的召回率和更低的SHD，但运行时间约为两倍。
limitations: FFML和TRFF的精度-召回率互补，可能需要根据具体任务选择。
FFCI运行时间约为RCIT的两倍，在极大规模数据上可能仍有瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三种基于随机傅里叶特征的因果发现方法，在混合数据上实现高效的非线性因果推断。

papers.title: HyperLens: Quantifying Cognitive Effort in LLMs with Fine-grained Confidence Trajectory
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across diverse tasks, their inference dynamics remain poorly understood because of the limited resolution of existing analysis tools. In this work, we identify an intrinsic magnification mechanism in transformer architectures: deeper layers inherently magnify the small changes of layer-wise confidence, providing a fine-grained confidence trajectory. Building on this insight, we introduce HyperLens, a high-resolution probe designed to trace confidence trajectories and quantify the cognitive effort during inference. Across LLMs and datasets, HyperLens reveals a consistent divergence in confidence trajectories that separates complex from simple tasks. We abstract this pattern into a quantitative cognitive effort metric. Our analysis reveals a fundamental principle: complex tasks consistently require higher cognitive effort. Finally, we provide a mechanistic diagnosis of a common side effect of standard Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT): it can reduce cognitive effort and consequently degrade performance on in-domain tasks.

analysis.tldr: HyperLens通过细粒度置信度轨迹量化LLM推理中的认知努力，揭示复杂任务需要更高认知努力，并诊断SFT可能降低认知努力导致性能下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分析工具分辨率有限，难以理解LLM推理动态，需要更精细的方法来量化模型在处理不同任务时的认知努力。
analysis.problem: 如何通过细粒度置信度轨迹量化LLM推理过程中的认知努力，并分析其对任务复杂性和微调的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 深层Transformer层会固有地放大逐层置信度的微小变化，形成细粒度置信度轨迹；复杂任务与简单任务的置信度轨迹存在一致的分歧模式。
analysis.method: 提出HyperLens，一种高分辨率探针，用于追踪置信度轨迹并量化推理过程中的认知努力。
contributions: 发现Transformer深层存在内在放大机制，可提供细粒度置信度轨迹。
提出HyperLens方法，通过置信度轨迹量化认知努力，并揭示复杂任务需要更高认知努力。
诊断标准SFT的副作用：可能降低认知努力，从而损害域内任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的LLM。
认知努力度量的普适性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HyperLens通过细粒度置信度轨迹量化LLM推理中的认知努力，揭示复杂任务需要更高认知努力，并诊断SFT可能降低认知努力导致性能下降。

papers.title: Multi-Dimensional Behavioral Evaluation of Agentic Stock Prediction Systems Using LLM Judges with Closed-Loop Reinforcement Learning Feedback
papers.abstract: Agentic stock prediction systems make sequences of interdependent decisions (regime detection, pathway routing, reinforcement learning control) whose individual quality is hidden by aggregate metrics such as mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) or directional accuracy. We present a behavioral evaluation framework that addresses this gap. Behavioral traces logged at every autonomous decision point are grouped into five-day episodes and scored along six domain-specific dimensions (regime detection, routing, adaptation, risk calibration, strategy coherence, error recovery) by an ensemble of three large language model (LLM) judges (GPT 5.4, Claude 4.6 Opus, Gemini 3.1 Pro). Perturbation-based validation on 420 episodes yields targeted score drops of $-1.6$ to $-2.4$ on intended dimensions versus an average of $-0.32$ on the remaining five, with cross-model agreement up to Krippendorff's $α= 0.85$. The composite behavioral score, used here only for cross-episode reporting, correlates at $ρ= 0.72$ with realized 20-day Sharpe ratio from offline backtesting. Closing the loop, the framework converts deficient per-dimension scores into a credit-assigned penalty term added to the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) reward. Three short fine-tuning cycles, all confined to the validation period, produce on the held-out 2017-2025 test period a one-day MAPE reduction from 0.61% to 0.54% (an 11.5% relative reduction; $p<0.001$, Cohen's $d=0.31$), a directional accuracy increase from 71% to 74%, and an 18% Sharpe ratio improvement (95% bootstrap CI [8.2%, 27.4%]), with gains concentrated in high-volatility episodes where the original system was most behaviorally deficient. Results are from offline backtesting and do not address effects specific to live deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出多维度行为评估框架，用LLM评委打分并闭环强化学习反馈，提升股票预测系统的MAPE、方向准确率和夏普比率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有聚合指标（如MAPE）无法揭示智能体股票预测系统中各决策步骤的个体质量，导致系统缺陷难以定位和优化。
analysis.problem: 如何细粒度评估并改进智能体股票预测系统的多步决策行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扰动验证显示，针对特定维度的扰动会导致该维度分数显著下降（-1.6至-2.4），而其他维度平均仅下降-0.32，表明评估维度具有区分度；跨模型一致性高达Krippendorff's α=0.85。
analysis.method: 构建行为评估框架：记录每个自主决策点的行为轨迹，按五天为周期分组，由三个LLM评委（GPT 5.4, Claude 4.6 Opus, Gemini 3.1 Pro）在六个领域特定维度上打分；将低分维度的信用分配惩罚项加入SAC奖励，进行短周期闭环强化学习微调。
contributions: 提出多维度行为评估框架，可细粒度诊断智能体股票预测系统的决策质量。
将评估分数转化为强化学习奖励信号，通过闭环反馈显著提升系统性能。
analysis.experiments: 在420个episode上进行扰动验证，并在2017-2025年测试集上评估：MAPE从0.61%降至0.54%（相对降低11.5%，p<0.001，Cohen's d=0.31），方向准确率从71%升至74%，夏普比率提升18%（95% bootstrap CI [8.2%, 27.4%]），收益集中在高波动性episode。
limitations: 结果基于离线回测，未考虑实盘部署的特定影响。
LLM评委的评分可能受模型自身偏差影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多维度行为评估框架，用LLM评委打分并闭环强化学习反馈，提升股票预测系统的MAPE、方向准确率和夏普比率。

papers.title: CoMemNet: Contrastive Sampling with Memory Replay Network for Continual Traffic Prediction
papers.abstract: In recent years, the integration of non-topological space modeling with temporal learning methods has emerged as an effective approach for capturing spatio-temporal information in non-Euclidean graphs. However, most existing methods rely on static underlying graph structures, which are inadequate for capturing the continuously expanding and evolving patterns in streaming traffic networks. To address this challenge, we propose a simple yet efficient dual-branch continual learning framework for traffic prediction, named CoMemNet. The fast-converging Online branch undertakes the primary prediction tasks, while the momentum-updated Target branch extracts historical information using Wasserstein Distance features to create a Dynamic Contrastive Sampler (DC Sampler). This sampler selects a node set with significant dynamic network feature changes for training, effectively mitigating the issue of catastrophic forgetting. Additionally, the backbone incorporates a lightweight Node-Adaptive Temporal Memory Buffer (TMRB-N) to consolidate old knowledge through memory replay and address the risk of memory explosion. Finally, we provide two newly curated open-source datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that CoMemNet achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance across all three large-scale real-world datasets. The code is available at: https://github.com/meiwu5/CoMemNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出双分支持续学习框架CoMemNet，通过对比采样和记忆回放解决交通预测中的灾难性遗忘问题，在三个大规模数据集上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有交通预测方法依赖静态图结构，无法捕捉流式交通网络中不断扩展和演化的模式，导致灾难性遗忘。
analysis.problem: 持续交通预测中，如何有效学习动态演化的时空模式并避免灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 双分支持续学习框架：Online分支负责主预测任务，Target分支通过Wasserstein距离构建动态对比采样器（DC Sampler）选择动态特征变化显著的节点训练，并采用轻量级节点自适应时间记忆缓冲器（TMRB-N）通过记忆回放巩固旧知识。
contributions: 提出双分支持续学习框架CoMemNet，结合对比采样和记忆回放解决灾难性遗忘。
设计动态对比采样器（DC Sampler）基于Wasserstein距离选择关键节点。
提出轻量级节点自适应时间记忆缓冲器（TMRB-N）避免记忆爆炸。
提供两个新的大规模开源数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在三个大规模真实世界数据集上达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，如对比采样阈值。
记忆缓冲器容量需针对不同场景调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双分支持续学习框架CoMemNet，通过对比采样和记忆回放解决交通预测中的灾难性遗忘问题，在三个大规模数据集上达到SOTA。

papers.title: ReFlect: An Effective Harness System for Complex Long-Horizon LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: Current reasoning paradigms for LLMs include chain-of-thought, ReAct, and post-hoc self-critique. These paradigms rely on two assumptions that fail on long-horizon, multi-stage tasks. As a result, errors accumulate silently across reasoning steps, leaving an open question: can a reasoning system effectively detect and recover from its own failures? We present ReFlect, a \emph{harness} system for LLM reasoning that creates standalone error detection and recovery logic as a deterministic wrapper around the model. Controlled experiments across 6 reasoning domains show that prompt-level self-critique produces formulaic templates that flag no issues in 90 of 100 audited reflection blocks, and the investigated LLMs wrongly accept a wrong answer in at least 76\% of cases. Our ReFlect harness achieves task success rates ranging from 41\% on gpt-4o-mini to 56\% on Claude Sonnet 4.5 across six models spanning small and frontier scale, with per-model gains over Direct CoT ranging from +7 pp on Qwen2.5-72B to +29 pp on Claude Sonnet 4.5, and additionally raises SWE-bench patch-structural quality from 0\% (Direct CoT) to between 82\% (Qwen2.5-72B) and 87\% (GPT-4o). Notably, the harness gain is inversely proportional to the model's Direct CoT task success rate (the fitted slope is -1.69 with r=-0.76): each pp lost in baseline success rate is mechanically recovered by 1.69 pp of harness gain. We spot that adding structured reasoning state and operators yields only 15.0--18.7\% pair-mean on Llama-3.3-70B and Qwen2.5-72B because models at this scale cannot reliably populate the state its operators require. ReFlect is model-agnostic, training-free, and operates entirely at inference time.

analysis.tldr: ReFlect 是一种模型无关、无需训练的推理 harness 系统，通过确定性错误检测与恢复机制显著提升 LLM 在长程多阶段任务上的成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理范式（如思维链、ReAct）在长程多阶段任务中假设不成立，导致错误无声累积，缺乏有效的错误检测与恢复机制。
analysis.problem: 如何为 LLM 推理设计一个能有效检测并恢复自身错误的系统，以应对复杂长程多阶段任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：提示级自我批评产生公式化模板，在 100 个审计反思块中 90 个未发现问题；LLM 在至少 76% 的情况下错误接受错误答案；结构化推理状态和操作符在较小模型上效果差（15.0-18.7%），因为模型无法可靠填充所需状态。
analysis.method: ReFlect 是一个 harness 系统，将独立的错误检测与恢复逻辑作为确定性包装器包裹在 LLM 推理过程之外，不依赖模型内部修改。
contributions: 提出 ReFlect harness 系统，实现模型无关、无需训练、推理时运行的错误检测与恢复。
在 6 个推理领域和多种模型上验证有效性，任务成功率提升 7-29 个百分点，SWE-bench 补丁结构质量从 0% 提升至 82-87%。
analysis.experiments: 在 6 个推理领域、6 种模型（包括 gpt-4o-mini、Claude Sonnet 4.5、Qwen2.5-72B 等）上进行控制实验，报告任务成功率和 SWE-bench 补丁结构质量。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更复杂或开放域任务上的表现。
harness 增益与基线成功率负相关，对强模型提升较小。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReFlect 是一种模型无关、无需训练的推理 harness 系统，通过确定性错误检测与恢复机制显著提升 LLM 在长程多阶段任务上的成功率。

papers.title: SDFlow: Similarity-Driven Flow Matching for Time Series Generation
papers.abstract: Vector quantization (VQ) with autoregressive (AR) token modeling is a widely adopted and highly competitive paradigm for time-series generation. However, such models are fundamentally limited by exposure bias: during inference, errors can accumulate across sequential predictions, leading to pronounced quality degradation in long-horizon generation. To address this, we propose SDFlow ($\textbf{S}$imilarity-$\textbf{D}$riven $\textbf{Flow}$ Matching), a non-autoregressive framework that operates entirely in the frozen VQ latent space and enables parallel sequence generation via flow matching. We tackle three key challenges in making this transition: (1) eliminating exposure bias by replacing step-wise token prediction with a global transport map; (2) mitigating the high-dimensionality of VQ token spaces via a low-rank manifold decomposition with a learned anchor prior over the latent manifold; and (3) incorporating discrete supervision into continuous transport dynamics by introducing a categorical posterior over codebook indices within a variational flow-matching formulation. Extensive experiments show that SDFlow achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving Discriminative Score and substantially reducing Context-FID, particularly for challenging long-sequence generation. Moreover, SDFlow provides significant inference speedups over autoregressive baselines, offering both high fidelity and computational efficiency. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SDFlow-D6F3/

analysis.tldr: SDFlow通过流匹配在VQ潜空间实现非自回归并行时序生成，消除暴露偏差并提升长序列生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归时序生成模型存在暴露偏差，导致长序列生成质量下降，且推理速度慢。
analysis.problem: 如何消除自回归时序生成中的暴露偏差，并实现高效的长序列并行生成。
