analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自回归模型在推理时误差累积，长序列生成质量显著下降。
analysis.method: 提出SDFlow，一种非自回归框架，在冻结的VQ潜空间中通过流匹配实现并行序列生成，包括低秩流形分解、学习锚定先验和变分流匹配中的分类后验。
contributions: 提出非自回归流匹配框架消除暴露偏差
通过低秩流形分解和锚定先验处理高维VQ空间
引入分类后验将离散监督融入连续传输动力学
analysis.experiments: 在多个时序数据集上实验，SDFlow在判别分数和Context-FID上达到SOTA，尤其长序列生成，并显著加速推理。
limitations: 依赖预训练的VQ编码器，可能限制泛化性
流匹配训练可能对超参数敏感
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SDFlow通过流匹配在VQ潜空间实现非自回归并行时序生成，消除暴露偏差并提升长序列生成质量。

papers.title: CRAFT: Forgetting-Aware Intervention-Based Adaptation for Continual Learning
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can acquire new capabilities through fine-tuning, but continual adaptation often leads to catastrophic forgetting. We propose CRAFT, a continual learning framework that avoids updating model weights by instead learning low-rank interventions on hidden representations. CRAFT proceeds in three stages: it first routes each task to a group of similar tasks based on output-distribution divergence; it then fine-tunes the model using a Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence against the group's prior state, which directly controls forgetting and determines convergence; finally, it merges interventions for the updated task into the shared representation using the same KL signal. This design unifies routing, regularization, and merging through a single KL-based objective. CRAFT improves overall performance and reduces forgetting compared to strong LoRA-based approaches across multiple benchmarks and model scales, while remaining robust to task ordering. These results suggest that controlling adaptation in representation space, guided by output-space divergence, provides a scalable and principled approach to continual learning in LLMs.

analysis.tldr: CRAFT通过基于KL散度的低秩干预实现LLM持续学习，避免权重更新并缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型通过微调获取新能力时，持续适应常导致灾难性遗忘，现有方法如LoRA仍存在遗忘问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在持续学习中避免灾难性遗忘，同时保持模型对新任务的高效适应能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CRAFT框架，通过三个步骤：基于输出分布散度的任务路由、使用KL散度对组先验状态进行微调以控制遗忘、基于相同KL信号合并干预到共享表示，所有步骤统一于KL目标。
contributions: 提出基于低秩干预的持续学习框架，避免更新模型权重。
通过单一KL散度目标统一路由、正则化和合并，简化设计。
在多个基准和模型规模上优于强LoRA基线，减少遗忘且对任务顺序鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和不同模型规模上评估，与强LoRA方法对比，CRAFT提升整体性能并减少遗忘，对任务顺序鲁棒。
limitations: 可能依赖任务分组质量，分组不当可能影响性能。
低秩干预的秩选择可能影响效果，需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CRAFT通过基于KL散度的低秩干预实现LLM持续学习，避免权重更新并缓解灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: Knee Osteoarthritis Severity Grading Using Optimized Deep Learning and LLM-Driven Intelligent AI on Computationally Limited Systems
papers.abstract: Knee osteoarthritis (KOA) is among the musculoskeletal disorders that considerably restrict joint mobility, cause severe chronic pain and impact negatively on quality life. It is one of the persistent health issues worldwide. Generally, subjectivity and inter-observer variability undermine conventional practices and evaluation process that are adopted to address such health issues. Hence precise and timely diagnosis would be one of the effective ways for the assessment of its severity. This paper proposes an automated diagnostic approach for severity grading of KOA by blending a deep learning convolutional neural network (CNN) with a device-based inference platform powered by TensorFlow Lite. It proposes a model based on the ResNet-18 convolutional neural network. The designed model is trained on publicly available database. Through a transfer learning approach obtained knee images are first classified into five Kellgren-Lawrence (KL) grades. Further the developed model is optimised. During the training of the model test accuracy of 94.48% with stable convergence has been achieved. Subsequently the optimised model transformed into a lightweight TensorFlow Lite format, facilitating seamless deployment on resource-constrained devices. The designed model is capable enough to operate in the environment having no continuous internet connectivity. Also, an auxiliary Large Language Model (Gemini-2.0-flash) is applied to generate structured interpretive findings like potential symptoms, risk factors, and preventive majors etc. The LLM component functions as interface without influencing the classification process. The proposed model articulates the feasibility of an on-device, interpretable decision-support tools for early diagnosis and improve accessibility to Artificial Intelligence (AI)-assisted knee screening tool.

analysis.tldr: 提出结合ResNet-18和TensorFlow Lite的轻量级KOA分级模型，并集成LLM生成结构化解释。
analysis.research_motivation: KOA诊断依赖主观评估，存在观察者间差异，且现有AI方法难以在资源受限设备上部署，缺乏可解释性。
analysis.problem: 在计算资源有限的设备上实现KOA严重程度的自动、准确分级，并提供可解释的诊断辅助信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用ResNet-18 CNN通过迁移学习对膝关节X光图像进行KL分级，优化后转换为TensorFlow Lite格式部署，并利用Gemini-2.0-flash LLM生成结构化解释。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级KOA分级模型，在资源受限设备上实现94.48%测试准确率。
集成LLM生成可解释的诊断报告，提升AI辅助工具的临床可用性。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上训练，测试准确率94.48%，模型收敛稳定。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 仅基于单一公开数据集，泛化性待验证。
LLM部分未参与分类，可能无法处理复杂病例。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结合ResNet-18和TensorFlow Lite的轻量级KOA分级模型，并集成LLM生成结构化解释。

papers.title: WARP: A Benchmark for Primal-Dual Warm-Starting of Interior-Point Solvers
papers.abstract: Solving AC Optimal Power Flow (AC-OPF) is of central importance in electricity market operations, where interior-point methods (IPMs) such as IPOPT are the standard solvers. A growing body of work uses machine learning to predict primal warm-start iterates, reporting iteration reductions of 30-46\%. We show that these reported gains rest on an inappropriate evaluation baseline: prior methods benchmark against the flat start $V_m = 1, V_a = 0$, whereas the solver's actual default - the variable-bound midpoint $(l+u)/2$ - is near-optimal for log-barrier centrality. Against this corrected baseline, no primal-only warm-start method reduces solver iterations. We trace the failure to a geometric property of interior-point methods: primal prediction accuracy is anticorrelated with convergence speed, and providing the ground-truth optimal solution $x^*$ without dual variables causes the solver to diverge. Oracle experiments establish that the complete primal-dual-barrier state $(x^*, λ^*, z^*, μ^*)$ reduces IPOPT iterations from 23 to 3 - an 85\% reduction that is structurally inaccessible to primal-only methods. To enable rigorous evaluation of warm-start methods on this task, we release a benchmark suite comprising dual-labeled AC-OPF datasets with IPOPT-extracted solutions, a corrected evaluation protocol, and WARP - a topology-conditioned encode-process-decode interaction network that predicts the full interior-point state $(\hat{x}, \hatλ, \hat{z}, \hatμ)$ on the heterogeneous constraint graph. WARP achieves a 76\% reduction in IPOPT iterations while natively accommodating N-1 contingency topology variations without retraining.

analysis.tldr: WARP通过预测完整原始-对偶-障碍状态，在AC最优潮流问题上实现76%的IPOPT迭代减少，并揭示了仅预测原始变量的方法无效的根本原因。
analysis.research_motivation: AC最优潮流（AC-OPF）是电力市场运营的核心问题，内点法（如IPOPT）是标准求解器，但现有机器学习方法仅预测原始变量进行热启动，且评估基线不当，导致声称的迭代减少不可靠。
analysis.problem: 现有原始变量热启动方法在纠正评估基线后无法减少求解器迭代次数，需要预测完整原始-对偶-障碍状态以实现有效加速。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 原始预测精度与收敛速度反相关，仅提供最优原始解x*而无对偶变量会导致求解器发散；完整原始-对偶-障碍状态可将IPOPT迭代从23次降至3次（减少85%），而仅原始方法无法达到。
analysis.method: 提出WARP，一种拓扑条件编码-处理-解码交互网络，在异构约束图上预测完整内点状态(^x, ^λ, ^z, ^μ)，并原生适应N-1拓扑变化。
contributions: 揭示仅原始变量热启动方法在纠正基线后无效，并指出其根本原因（原始预测与收敛反相关、缺少对偶变量导致发散）。
发布包含双标签AC-OPF数据集、纠正评估协议和WARP模型的基准套件，实现76%的IPOPT迭代减少。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到WARP在N-1拓扑变化下无需重新训练即可实现76%的迭代减少。
limitations: 可能仅适用于AC-OPF特定问题，泛化性未知。
WARP需要完整状态预测，计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WARP通过预测完整原始-对偶-障碍状态，在AC最优潮流问题上实现76%的IPOPT迭代减少，并揭示了仅预测原始变量的方法无效的根本原因。

papers.title: SkillRet: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Skill Retrieval in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: As LLM agents are increasingly deployed with large libraries of reusable skills, selecting the right skill for a user request has become a critical systems challenge. In small libraries, users may invoke skills explicitly by name, but this assumption breaks down as skill ecosystems grow under tight context and latency budgets. Despite its practical importance, skill retrieval remains underexplored, with limited benchmarks and little understanding of retrieval behavior on realistic skill libraries. To address this gap, we introduce SkillRet, a large-scale benchmark for skill retrieval in LLM agents. SkillRet contains 17,810 public agent skills, organized with structured semantic tags and a two-level taxonomy spanning 6 major categories and 18 sub-categories. It provides 63,259 training samples and 4,997 evaluation queries with disjoint skill pools, enabling both benchmarking and retrieval-oriented training. Across a diverse set of retrievers, we find that skill retrieval remains far from solved: off-the-shelf models struggle on realistic large-scale skill libraries, and prior skill-retrieval models still leave substantial headroom. Task-specific fine-tuning on SkillRet substantially improves performance, improving NDCG@10 by +13.1 points over the strongest prior retriever and by +16.9 points over the strongest off-the-shelf retriever. Our analysis further suggests that these gains arise because fine-tuned models better focus on the small skill-relevant signals within long and noisy queries. These results establish SkillRet as a strong benchmark and foundation for future research on retrieval in large-scale agent systems.

analysis.tldr: SkillRet是一个大规模技能检索基准，发现现有检索器在真实场景下表现不佳，微调可显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM Agent技能库规模增长，手动调用技能不再可行，而现有研究缺乏大规模基准和检索行为理解。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM Agent在大型技能库中高效准确检索技能的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现成检索器在真实大规模技能库上表现不佳，先前技能检索模型仍有较大提升空间；微调模型能更好聚焦于长噪声查询中的技能相关信号。
analysis.method: 构建包含17,810个技能、63,259训练样本和4,997评估查询的基准SkillRet，并基于结构化语义标签和两级分类体系组织技能。
contributions: 提出SkillRet，首个大规模技能检索基准，包含丰富的技能库和查询。
通过实验揭示现有检索器在真实场景下的不足，并证明任务特定微调可显著提升性能（NDCG@10提升13.1-16.9点）。
analysis.experiments: 在多种检索器上评估，包括现成模型和先前技能检索模型，并进行微调实验，报告了NDCG@10等指标。
limitations: 基准仅包含公开技能，可能未覆盖私有或特定领域技能。
检索性能提升主要来自微调，泛化性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkillRet是一个大规模技能检索基准，发现现有检索器在真实场景下表现不佳，微调可显著提升性能。

papers.title: Detecting Time Series Anomalies Like an Expert: A Multi-Agent LLM Framework with Specialized Analyzers
papers.abstract: Recent studies have explored large language models for time-series anomaly detection, yet existing approaches often rely on a single general-purpose model to directly infer anomaly indices or intervals, limiting controllability, interpretability, and reliability for complex anomaly patterns. We propose SAGE (Specialized Analyzer Group for Expert-like Detection), a multi-agent framework for structured anomaly diagnosis in univariate time series. It decomposes anomaly analysis into four specialized Analyzers for point, structural, seasonal, and pattern anomalies. Each Analyzer applies family-specific numerical tools and diagnostic visualizations to generate evidence, while an evidence-grounded Detector consolidates the evidence into confidence-scored anomaly records with intervals and candidate types. A Supervisor then converts these structured records into analyst-facing diagnostic reports. SAGE further constructs synthetic in-context examples from normal-reference training segments, without using real anomalous segments or anomaly-type labels as in-context examples. Across three benchmarks, SAGE achieves the best average performance among strong ML/DL and language-model-based baselines. Ablation studies and human evaluation further show that the proposed framework improves detection reliability and the practical usefulness of diagnostic outputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体LLM框架SAGE，通过分解异常类型和生成证据，提升时间序列异常检测的可解释性和可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的时间序列异常检测方法通常依赖单一通用模型直接推断异常索引或区间，缺乏可控性、可解释性和对复杂异常模式的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM实现结构化、可解释且可靠的单变量时间序列异常诊断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SAGE框架包含四个专门分析器（点异常、结构异常、季节性异常、模式异常），每个使用特定数值工具和诊断可视化生成证据；证据驱动的检测器整合证据为带置信度、区间和候选类型的异常记录；监督者将记录转换为诊断报告。同时，从正常参考训练段构建合成上下文示例。
contributions: 提出多智能体LLM框架SAGE，将异常分析分解为四个专门分析器，提升可解释性和可靠性。
设计证据驱动的检测器和监督者，生成结构化异常记录和诊断报告。
引入合成上下文示例构建方法，无需真实异常段或类型标签。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准上，SAGE在强ML/DL和基于语言模型的基线中取得最佳平均性能。消融研究和人工评估表明框架提升了检测可靠性和诊断输出的实用性。
limitations: 仅针对单变量时间序列，未扩展到多变量场景。
依赖LLM的推理能力，可能受限于模型规模和计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体LLM框架SAGE，通过分解异常类型和生成证据，提升时间序列异常检测的可解释性和可靠性。

papers.title: Auto Research with Specialist Agents Develops Effective and Non-Trivial Training Recipes
papers.abstract: We study auto research as a closed empirical loop driven by external measurement. Each submitted trial carries a hypothesis, an executable code edit, an evaluator-owned outcome, and feedback that shapes the next proposal. The output is not a generated paper or a single model checkpoint, but an auditable trajectory of proposals, code diffs, experiments, scores, and failure labels. We instantiate this loop with specialist agents that partition recipe surfaces and share measured lineage across trials. The central empirical finding is that lineage feedback lets agents turn evaluator outcomes, including crashes, budget overruns, size failures, and accuracy-gate misses, into later program-level recipe edits rather than one-shot suggestions. Across 1,197 headline-run trials plus 600 Parameter Golf control trials after one-time setup and launch, humans did not choose proposals, edit recipes, override scores, or repair failed trials during the search. In the three headline runs, the same submitted-trial loop reduces Parameter Golf validation bpb by $0.81\%$, raises NanoChat-D12 CORE by $38.7\%$, and reduces CIFAR-10 Airbench96 wallclock by $4.59\%$, with each task measured by its own external evaluator and legality checks. The trace includes a strict architecture-domain audit of 157 headline-run submissions and program rewrites such as a NanoChat attention-kernel path change. Within this scope the loop autonomously writes code, submits experiments, absorbs feedback, applies and combines known techniques inside each environment, and improves public starting recipes.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种由专业智能体驱动的自动研究闭环，通过外部评估反馈自动优化训练配方，在多个任务上取得非平凡改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统机器学习研究依赖人工设计训练配方，耗时且可能遗漏非平凡优化；自动研究可加速探索并发现人类难以直接想到的改进。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个完全自动化的闭环系统，使智能体能够自主提出假设、修改代码、执行实验、吸收反馈并持续改进训练配方。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出智能体通过反馈将评估结果（如崩溃、超预算、大小失败、精度门限未过）转化为程序级配方编辑，而非一次性建议。
analysis.method: 构建由专业智能体组成的自动研究闭环：每个智能体负责配方空间的一部分，通过共享实验谱系（lineage）和反馈，自主提出代码编辑、提交实验、吸收评估结果并迭代改进。
contributions: 提出一种基于外部评估的自动研究闭环框架，输出可审计的实验轨迹而非单一模型。
通过专业智能体分区和谱系反馈机制，在三个不同任务上实现非平凡改进：Parameter Golf验证bpb降低0.81%，NanoChat-D12 CORE提升38.7%，CIFAR-10 Airbench96墙钟时间减少4.59%。
analysis.experiments: 在三个任务上进行了总计1,197次主运行试验和600次Parameter Golf对照试验，人类未干预提案、配方编辑、评分或失败修复。每个任务使用独立的外部评估器和合法性检查。
limitations: 实验范围限于特定任务和配方空间，泛化性未验证。
自动研究可能产生大量无效试验，计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种由专业智能体驱动的自动研究闭环，通过外部评估反馈自动优化训练配方，在多个任务上取得非平凡改进。

papers.title: $\mathcal{B}^{3}$-Net: Controlled Posterior Bridge Learning for Multi-Task Dense Prediction
papers.abstract: Multi-task dense prediction solves complementary pixel-level tasks in a unified model, such as semantic segmentation, depth estimation, surface normal estimation, and edge detection. Existing decoder-side interactions use attention, prompts, routing, diffusion, Mamba, or bridge features to exchange task evidence, but most of them organize this evidence implicitly. They usually fuse task features by similarity or affinity, without explicitly modeling that evidence reliability varies across tasks and spatial locations. As a result, unreliable evidence may contaminate the shared representation and intensify negative transfer. We propose $\mathcal{B}^{3}$-Net, a controlled posterior bridge learning framework for multi-task dense prediction. Our method decomposes decoder-side interaction into reliability estimation, posterior bridge construction, and bounded redistribution. The Precision Field Estimator estimates patch-wise evidence precision from task-reference alignment and local variation. The Posterior Bridge Operator builds a precision-weighted posterior bridge through heteroscedastic evidence fusion, yielding a shared state more reliable than uniform or heuristic mixtures. The Contractive Dispatch Operator redistributes the bridge to each task branch through a bounded update, reducing uncontrolled feature injection. Experiments on NYUD-v2, PASCAL-Context, and Cityscapes show that $\mathcal{B}^{3}$-Net achieves competitive or superior trade-offs over representative CNN-, Transformer-, diffusion-, Mamba-, and bridge-feature-based methods. Backbone-matched comparisons and extensive analyses further verify that the gains arise from controlled posterior bridge learning rather than backbone capacity or decoder scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出B³-Net，通过可控后验桥学习实现多任务密集预测，显式建模证据可靠性以缓解负迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 多任务密集预测中，现有解码器交互方法隐式组织任务证据，未显式建模证据可靠性随任务和空间位置的变化，导致不可靠证据污染共享表征并加剧负迁移。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模任务证据的可靠性，并实现可控的跨任务信息融合，以提升多任务密集预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法通过相似性或亲和度融合任务特征，未考虑证据可靠性差异，导致不可靠证据污染共享表征并加剧负迁移。
analysis.method: 提出B³-Net，包含三个模块：精度场估计器估计逐块证据精度；后验桥算子通过异方差证据融合构建精度加权后验桥；收缩调度算子通过有界更新将桥信息重新分配给各任务分支。
contributions: 提出可控后验桥学习框架，显式建模证据可靠性并实现可控融合。
设计精度场估计器、后验桥算子和收缩调度算子，有效缓解负迁移。
在NYUD-v2、PASCAL-Context和Cityscapes上达到竞争性或更优的性能权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在NYUD-v2、PASCAL-Context和Cityscapes数据集上，与基于CNN、Transformer、扩散、Mamba和桥特征的多种代表性方法比较，并通过骨干匹配对比和大量分析验证了方法的有效性。
limitations: 可能对精度场估计的准确性敏感。
计算开销可能略高于简单融合方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出B³-Net，通过可控后验桥学习实现多任务密集预测，显式建模证据可靠性以缓解负迁移。

papers.title: More Is Not Always Better: Cross-Component Interference in LLM Agent Scaffolding
papers.abstract: LLM agent systems are built by stacking scaffolding components (planning, tools, memory, self-reflection, retrieval) assuming more is better. We study cross-component interference (CCI): degradation when components interact destructively. We run a full factorial experiment over all 2^5=32 subsets of five components on HotpotQA and GSM8K with Llama-3.1-8B/70B (96 conditions, up to 10 seeds). The All-In system is consistently suboptimal: on HotpotQA, a single-tool agent surpasses All-In by 32% (F1 0.233 vs 0.177, p=0.023); on GSM8K, a 3-component subset beats All-In by 79% (0.43 vs 0.24, p=0.010). Optimal component count is task-dependent (k*=1-4) and scale-sensitive: at 70B, combinations that hurt at 8B provide gains, though All-In still trails the best subset. We fit a main-effects regression (R^2=0.916, adj-R^2=0.899, LOOCV=0.872), compute exact Shapley values, and find 183/325 submodularity violations (56.3%), showing greedy selection is unreliable. A three-body synergy among Tool Use, Self-Reflection, and Retrieval (INT_3=+0.175, 95% CI [+0.003,+0.351]) is reported as exploratory. CCI replicates across model families (Qwen2.5) and is robust to prompt paraphrasing. Our findings suggest maximally-equipped agent defaults should be replaced by task-specific subset selection via interaction-aware analysis.

analysis.tldr: LLM Agent系统中组件越多效果不一定越好，组件间存在交叉干扰，最优子集选择比全量组合更有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM Agent系统默认堆叠更多组件（规划、工具、记忆、自反思、检索）以提升性能，但组件间可能产生负面交互，缺乏系统研究。
analysis.problem: 研究LLM Agent系统中组件间的交叉干扰（CCI）现象，即组件组合时性能下降的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全组件系统（All-In）在所有设置下均非最优；最优组件数量因任务而异（1-4个）；组件效果受模型规模影响（70B下部分组合从有害变有益）；贪婪选择组件不可靠（56.3%的子模性违反）。
analysis.method: 对5个组件进行全因子实验（2^5=32种组合），在HotpotQA和GSM8K上使用Llama-3.1-8B/70B评估，并拟合主效应回归、计算Shapley值、分析子模性违反。
contributions: 首次系统定义并量化LLM Agent系统中的交叉组件干扰（CCI）现象。
通过全因子实验证明全组件系统并非最优，提出任务特定子集选择替代默认全组件策略。
analysis.experiments: 在HotpotQA和GSM8K上使用Llama-3.1-8B/70B进行96种条件实验（最多10个种子），并在Qwen2.5上验证跨模型泛化性，通过提示改写验证鲁棒性。
limitations: 仅探索了5种组件，实际系统可能包含更多组件类型。
实验限于两个问答任务，结论在更广泛任务上的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM Agent系统中组件越多效果不一定越好，组件间存在交叉干扰，最优子集选择比全量组合更有效。

papers.title: Decodable but Not Corrected by Fixed Residual-Stream Linear Steering: Evidence from Medical LLM Failure Regimes
papers.abstract: Can linearly decodable failure signals in LLM hidden states be leveraged to correct those failures? We investigate this classification-correction gap via Overthinking (OT)--a stable behavioral regime (Jaccard >= 0.81, 94% inter-annotator agreement) in medical QA where models answer correctly under resampling yet fail in extended chain-of-thought. OT is linearly decodable at 71.6% balanced accuracy (p < 10^{-16}). Yet five families of fixed linear steering (29 configurations, n=1,273) all yield Delta ~= 0, with identical null results cross-architecture (Qwen2.5-7B) and cross-domain (MMLU-STEM). Three convergent lines of evidence suggest representational entanglement: the OT direction has 85-88% overlap with task-critical computation (specificity ratio <= 0.152); non-targeted shared-direction steering damages accuracy (-12.1pp); and LEACE concept erasure damages accuracy (-3.6pp, p=0.01), while 10 random erasures produce Delta=+0.3pp. The per-instance probe-steering correlation is r=-0.002 (p=0.97). Positively, the same probe enables selective abstention (held-out AUROC=0.610, exceeding all five uncertainty baselines, p=0.009): decodable failure structure supports post-generation reliability estimation even when the fixed linear steering family cannot exploit it for correction.

analysis.tldr: 线性解码可检测LLM失败信号，但固定残差流线性干预无法纠正，揭示表征纠缠瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在医疗问答中常出现链式思考失败（过度思考），且隐藏状态中可解码出失败信号，但能否利用该信号进行纠正尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM隐藏状态中线性可解码的失败信号是否可通过固定残差流线性干预进行纠正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 过度思考（OT）是医疗QA中稳定的失败行为模式（Jaccard>=0.81，94%标注者一致性），线性可解码（平衡准确率71.6%，p<10^{-16}），但五种固定线性干预（29种配置，n=1,273）均无效（Delta≈0），跨架构和跨领域结果一致。
analysis.method: 通过线性探针检测过度思考状态，并尝试多种固定线性干预（包括方向干预、概念擦除等）进行纠正，同时分析表征纠缠。
contributions: 发现医疗QA中过度思考失败模式线性可解码但固定线性干预无法纠正，揭示分类-纠正鸿沟。
通过三项证据表明表征纠缠是干预失效的原因：失败方向与任务关键计算重叠85-88%，非目标干预损害准确率-12.1pp，概念擦除损害准确率-3.6pp。
提出利用同一探针进行选择性弃权，在保留集上AUROC=0.610，超过所有不确定性基线。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-7B模型上，使用医疗QA数据集和MMLU-STEM进行跨领域验证，共29种干预配置、n=1,273个样本。
limitations: 仅针对固定线性干预，未探索非线性或自适应干预方法。
实验仅在单一模型和有限领域进行，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 线性解码可检测LLM失败信号，但固定残差流线性干预无法纠正，揭示表征纠缠瓶颈。

papers.title: TriRelVLA: Triadic Relational Structure for Generalizable Embodied Manipulation
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models perform well on training-seen robotic tasks but struggle to generalize to unseen scenes and objects. A key limitation lies in their implicit visual representations, which entangle object appearance, background, and scene layout. This makes policies sensitive to visual variations. Prior work improves transferability through structured intermediate representations that objectify visual content. However, these representations mainly capture scene semantics instead of action-relevant relations. As a result, action prediction remains tied to appearance statistics. We observe that manipulation actions depend on the object-hand-task relational structure, which governs interactions among task requirements, robot states, and object properties. Based on this observation, we propose TriRelVLA, a triadic relational VLA framework for generalizable embodied manipulation. Our approach consists of three components: 1) We construct explicit object-hand-task triadic representations from multimodal inputs as relational primitives. 2) We build a task-grounded relational graph. Task-guided cross-attention forms nodes, and a relation-aware graph transformer models interactions among them. 3) We perform relation-conditioned action generation. The relational structure is compressed into a bottleneck space and projected into the LLM for action prediction. This triadic relational bottleneck reduces reliance on appearance statistics and enables transfer across scenes, objects, and task compositions. We further introduce a real-world robotic dataset for fine-tuning. Experiments show strong performance on fine-tuned tasks and clear gains in cross-scene, cross-object, and cross-task generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出三元关系VLA框架，通过显式建模物体-手-任务关系结构提升具身操作泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型隐式视觉表征纠缠外观、背景和布局，导致策略对视觉变化敏感，难以泛化到未见场景和物体。
analysis.problem: 如何构建动作相关的结构化中间表征，使动作预测摆脱外观统计依赖，实现跨场景、跨物体和跨任务泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 操作动作依赖于物体-手-任务的关系结构，该结构支配任务需求、机器人状态和物体属性之间的交互。
analysis.method: 提出TriRelVLA框架，包括：1) 从多模态输入构建显式物体-手-任务三元表征作为关系基元；2) 构建任务接地关系图，任务引导交叉注意力形成节点，关系感知图Transformer建模交互；3) 关系条件动作生成，将关系结构压缩到瓶颈空间并投影到LLM进行动作预测。
contributions: 提出三元关系VLA框架，通过显式关系瓶颈减少外观统计依赖。
引入真实世界机器人数据集用于微调，实验证明在微调任务和跨场景/物体/任务泛化上取得显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界机器人数据集上微调，评估了微调任务性能以及跨场景、跨物体、跨任务泛化能力，显示强性能和明显增益。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量多模态输入（如物体、手、任务标注）。
关系图构建和瓶颈压缩可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三元关系VLA框架，通过显式建模物体-手-任务关系结构提升具身操作泛化能力。

papers.title: EgoEMG: A Multimodal Egocentric Dataset with Bilateral EMG and Vision for Hand Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: Surface electromyography (sEMG) records muscle activity during hand movement and can be decoded to recover detailed hand articulation. EMG and egocentric vision are complementary for hand sensing: EMG captures fine-grained finger articulation even under occlusion and poor lighting, while vision provides global hand configuration. However, no existing dataset synchronizes both modalities. We present EgoEMG, a multimodal egocentric dataset for bimanual hand pose estimation. EgoEMG includes bilateral wristband EMG with 16 total channels (8 per wrist) sampled at 2 kHz, 120 Hz IMU, egocentric wide-angle RGB video, external RGB-D video, and mocap-derived hand motion with wrist articulation angles. The dataset covers 41 participants performing 60 gesture classes, including 30 single-hand gestures and 30 bimanual gestures, totaling more than 10 hours of recording. We also introduce a benchmark with three tasks -- EMG-to-pose, vision-to-pose, and EMG+vision fusion -- under a shared joint-angle prediction target and common generalization split axes (cross-gesture, cross-user, and combined). As baselines, we evaluate EMGFormer for EMG-to-pose and generic ResNet/ViT backbones for vision-to-pose. We further study a residual fusion architecture that improves over matched lightweight vision-only baselines. Together, EgoEMG and its benchmark establish a foundation for future research on multimodal hand pose estimation with EMG and vision.

analysis.tldr: EgoEMG 是首个同步双侧 EMG 与视觉的双手姿态估计多模态数据集，包含 41 人 60 类手势，并提供了 EMG→姿态、视觉→姿态、EMG+视觉融合三项基准任务。
analysis.research_motivation: EMG 和第一人称视觉在手部感知上互补，但缺乏同步的双模态数据集，限制了多模态手部姿态估计研究。
analysis.problem: 现有数据集未同步 EMG 与视觉，无法支持 EMG-视觉融合的手部姿态估计研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含双侧腕带 EMG、IMU、第一人称 RGB 视频、外部 RGB-D 视频和动作捕捉数据的多模态数据集，并设计 EMG→姿态、视觉→姿态、EMG+视觉融合三项基准任务，采用 EMGFormer、ResNet/ViT 及残差融合架构作为基线。
contributions: 首个同步双侧 EMG 与第一人称视觉的多模态手部姿态估计数据集，覆盖 41 人 60 类手势，总时长超 10 小时。
提出三项基准任务（EMG→姿态、视觉→姿态、EMG+视觉融合）及通用泛化划分轴（跨手势、跨用户、组合），并评估多种基线模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅包含 41 名参与者，可能不足以覆盖广泛人群。
仅提供关节角度预测任务，未涉及其他手部姿态表示（如关键点坐标）。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EgoEMG 是首个同步双侧 EMG 与视觉的双手姿态估计多模态数据集，包含 41 人 60 类手势，并提供了 EMG→姿态、视觉→姿态、EMG+视觉融合三项基准任务。

papers.title: Closing the Loop: Unified 3D Scene Generation and Immersive Interaction via LLM-RL Coupling
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have significantly improved language-driven 3D content generation, but most existing approaches still treat scene generation and user interaction as separate processes, limiting the adaptability and immersive potential of interactive multimedia systems. This paper presents a unified framework that closes the loop between language-driven 3D scene generation and immersive user interaction. Given natural language instructions, the system first constructs structured scene representations using LLMs, and then optimizes spatial layouts via reinforcement learning under geometric and semantic constraints. The generated environments are deployed in a virtual reality setting to facilitate HRI-in-the-loop, where user interactions provide continuous feedback to align generated content with human perception and usability. By tightly coupling generation and interaction, the proposed framework enables more responsive, adaptive, and realistic multimedia experiences. Experiments on the ALFRED benchmark demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in task-based scene generation. Furthermore, qualitative results and user studies show consistent improvements in immersion, interaction quality, and task efficiency, highlighting the importance of closed-loop integration of generation and interaction for next-generation multimedia systems. Our project page can be found at https://proj-showcase.github.io/h3ds/.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM-RL耦合的闭环框架，统一3D场景生成与沉浸式交互，在ALFRED基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将3D场景生成与用户交互分离，限制了交互式多媒体系统的适应性和沉浸感。
analysis.problem: 如何将语言驱动的3D场景生成与用户交互闭环集成，实现自适应、高沉浸的交互体验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用LLM从自然语言指令构建结构化场景表示，再通过强化学习在几何和语义约束下优化空间布局，生成的环境部署在VR中，用户交互反馈持续对齐生成内容。
contributions: 提出LLM-RL耦合的闭环框架，统一3D场景生成与沉浸式交互
在ALFRED基准上达到任务级场景生成的SOTA，用户研究显示沉浸感、交互质量和任务效率提升
analysis.experiments: 在ALFRED基准上评估任务级场景生成性能，并进行了定性结果和用户研究。
limitations: 可能依赖VR设备，泛化到其他交互形式需验证
RL优化可能受限于奖励函数设计
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM-RL耦合的闭环框架，统一3D场景生成与沉浸式交互，在ALFRED基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Conceal, Reconstruct, Jailbreak: Exploiting the Reconstruction-Concealment Tradeoff in MLLMs
papers.abstract: Intent-obfuscation-based jailbreak attacks on multimodal large language models (MLLMs) transform a harmful query into a concealed multimodal input to bypass safety mechanisms. We show that such attacks are governed by a \emph{reconstruction--concealment tradeoff}: the transformed input must hide harmful intent from safety filters while remaining recoverable enough for the victim model to reconstruct the original request. Through a reconstruction analysis of three representative black-box methods, we find that existing transformations struggle to balance this tradeoff, limiting their effectiveness. In contrast, we show that character-removed variants achieve a better balance. Building on this, we propose \emph{concealment-aware variant construction}, which greedily selects character-removed variants that are low in harmful-keyword alignment and mutually diverse, and instantiates them through five modality-aware prompting strategies. We further introduce \emph{keyword-related distractor images} that depict the harmful keyword in diverse contexts, providing more effective auxiliary visual context than generic distractor images. Experiments across closed-source and open-source MLLMs show the proposed strategies outperform strong baselines, revealing an underexplored vulnerability: a model's own reconstruction ability can be exploited to recover hidden harmful intent and produce unsafe responses.

analysis.tldr: 通过字符移除变体与关键词干扰图像，利用重建-隐藏权衡实现多模态大语言模型越狱攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于意图混淆的越狱攻击难以平衡隐藏有害意图与保持可重建性，导致攻击效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计更有效的多模态输入变换，在绕过安全过滤的同时确保受害者模型能重建原始有害请求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过重建分析发现，现有黑盒方法难以平衡重建-隐藏权衡，而字符移除变体能实现更好平衡。
analysis.method: 提出隐蔽感知变体构建方法，贪心选择低有害关键词对齐且多样化的字符移除变体，并设计五种模态感知提示策略；同时引入关键词相关干扰图像提供更有效的辅助视觉上下文。
contributions: 揭示多模态大语言模型中重建-隐藏权衡的存在及其对越狱攻击的影响
提出隐蔽感知变体构建和关键词相关干扰图像两种新攻击策略
analysis.experiments: 在闭源和开源多模态大语言模型上实验，所提策略优于强基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型的重建能力
字符移除变体可能影响自然语言流畅性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过字符移除变体与关键词干扰图像，利用重建-隐藏权衡实现多模态大语言模型越狱攻击。

papers.title: Resolving the bias-precision paradox with stochastic causal representation learning for personalized medicine
papers.abstract: Estimating individualized treatment effects from longitudinal observational data is central to data-driven medicine, yet existing methods face a fundamental limitation: reducing confounding bias often suppresses clinically informative heterogeneity, degrading patient-specific predictions. Here, we identify this tension as a bias-precision paradox in causal representation learning and introduce sampling-based maximum mean discrepancy (sMMD), a stochastic alignment strategy that replaces global adversarial balancing with subset-level matching. We instantiate this approach in a framework for counterfactual outcome prediction with attribution-grounded interpretability. Across two large-scale ICU cohorts (n = 27,783), our framework improves accuracy under distribution shift, reducing error by up to 11.5% and substantially increasing recall in high-risk tasks. Mechanistic analyses show that sMMD selectively preserves clinically decisive variables. In human-AI evaluation, our method outperforms clinicians-in-training and large language models, and improves clinician accuracy by 14.7% while reducing decision time, enabling interpretable, real-time clinical decision support.

analysis.tldr: 提出随机因果表征学习方法sMMD，解决个性化医疗中偏差-精度悖论，提升治疗效果预测精度与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在减少混杂偏差时往往抑制临床信息异质性，导致患者个体预测精度下降，存在偏差-精度悖论。
analysis.problem: 如何同时减少混杂偏差并保留临床相关异质性，实现准确的个体化治疗效果估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出全局对抗性平衡会抑制临床信息异质性，导致偏差-精度悖论。
analysis.method: 提出基于采样的最大均值差异（sMMD）随机对齐策略，用子集级匹配替代全局对抗平衡，并构建反事实结果预测框架。
contributions: 识别并形式化因果表征学习中的偏差-精度悖论
提出sMMD随机对齐方法，实现子集级匹配以保留异质性
在大型ICU队列上验证有效性，提升分布偏移下精度并增强可解释性
analysis.experiments: 在两个大型ICU队列（n=27,783）上评估，误差降低11.5%，高风险任务召回率显著提升；人机评估中优于实习医生和LLM，辅助医生准确率提升14.7%并减少决策时间。
limitations: 方法在非ICU或小规模数据上的泛化性未验证
子集匹配策略的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出随机因果表征学习方法sMMD，解决个性化医疗中偏差-精度悖论，提升治疗效果预测精度与可解释性。

papers.title: SafeHarbor: Hierarchical Memory-Augmented Guardrail for LLM Agent Safety
papers.abstract: With the rapid evolution of foundation models, Large Language Model (LLM) agents have demonstrated increasingly powerful tool-use capabilities. However, this proficiency introduces significant security risks, as malicious actors can manipulate agents into executing tools to generate harmful content. While existing defensive mechanisms are effective, they frequently suffer from the over-refusal problem, where increased safety strictness compromises the agent's utility on benign tasks. To mitigate this trade-off, we propose \textsc{SafeHarbor}, a novel framework designed to establish precise decision boundaries for LLM agents. Unlike static guidelines, \textsc{SafeHarbor} extracts context-aware defense rules through enhanced adversarial generation. We design a local hierarchical memory system for dynamic rule injection, offering a training-free, efficient, and plug-and-play solution. Furthermore, we introduce an information entropy-based self-evolution mechanism that continuously optimizes the memory structure through dynamic node splitting and merging. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \textsc{SafeHarbor} achieves state-of-the-art performance on both ambiguous benign tasks and explicit malicious attacks, notably attaining a peak benign utility of 63.6\% on GPT-4o while maintaining a robust refusal rate exceeding 93\% against harmful requests. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/ljj-cyber/SafeHarbor.

analysis.tldr: SafeHarbor通过层次化记忆增强的防护栏，在LLM Agent安全中平衡了安全性与实用性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent的工具使用能力带来安全风险，现有防御机制存在过度拒绝问题，导致在良性任务上实用性下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在保证LLM Agent安全性的同时，避免过度拒绝，维持其在良性任务上的效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有防御机制在提高安全严格性时，会牺牲Agent在良性任务上的实用性，即安全性与实用性之间存在权衡。
analysis.method: 提出SafeHarbor框架，包括：通过增强对抗生成提取上下文感知的防御规则；设计局部层次化记忆系统实现动态规则注入；引入基于信息熵的自我进化机制，通过动态节点分裂与合并持续优化记忆结构。
contributions: 提出SafeHarbor框架，实现精确的决策边界，缓解安全性与实用性的权衡。
设计层次化记忆系统与自我进化机制，实现无训练、高效、即插即用的安全防护。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-4o上，SafeHarbor在模糊良性任务中达到63.6%的良性效用，同时对有害请求保持超过93%的拒绝率，达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对复杂多步攻击的防御效果未充分验证。
记忆系统的扩展性在极大规模场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SafeHarbor通过层次化记忆增强的防护栏，在LLM Agent安全中平衡了安全性与实用性。

papers.title: Active Learning for Communication Structure Optimization in LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Optimizing the communication structure of large language model based multi-agent systems (LLM-MAS) has been shown to improve downstream performance and reduce token usage. Existing methods typically rely on randomly sampled training tasks. However, tasks may differ substantially in difficulty and domain, and thus they are not equally informative for updating communication structure, making optimization under limited training budgets often unstable and highly sensitive to the particular training set. To actively identify the most valuable tasks for communication-structure optimization, we propose an ensemble-based information-theoretic task selection framework. The proposed method estimates task informativeness by how much a candidate task changes the distribution over graph parameters, using ensemble Kalman inversion as an efficient and derivative-free approximation of the corresponding Bayesian update. The resulting estimator is especially suitable for black-box and noisy multi-agent systems. To enhance scalability, we construct a compact candidate pool through embedding-based representative selection and combine the informative selection with surrogate modeling and batch Thompson sampling. We validate our method in both benign settings and settings with agent attacks, demonstrating its effectiveness for communication-structure optimization under constrained computational budgets.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于集成信息论的任务选择框架，主动优化LLM多智能体系统的通信结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统通信结构优化方法依赖随机采样训练任务，但任务难度和领域差异大，信息量不均，导致有限预算下优化不稳定且对训练集敏感。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限训练预算下主动识别最有价值的任务，以高效优化LLM多智能体系统的通信结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 任务在难度和领域上差异显著，随机采样导致优化不稳定且对训练集敏感。
analysis.method: 提出基于集成的信息论任务选择框架，利用集成卡尔曼反演近似贝叶斯更新，估计候选任务对图参数分布的影响，结合嵌入代表性选择构建紧凑候选池，并采用代理模型和批量汤普森采样提升可扩展性。
contributions: 提出主动任务选择框架，用于LLM多智能体系统通信结构优化。
设计基于集成卡尔曼反演的信息量估计器，适用于黑箱和噪声环境。
通过嵌入代表性选择和批量汤普森采样增强可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在良性设置和智能体攻击设置下验证了方法在有限计算预算下对通信结构优化的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖候选池的构建质量。
集成卡尔曼反演的近似精度可能影响极端情况下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于集成信息论的任务选择框架，主动优化LLM多智能体系统的通信结构。

papers.title: Knowledge-Graph Paths as Intermediate Supervision for Self-Evolving Search Agents
papers.abstract: Self-evolving search agents reduce reliance on human-written training questions by generating and solving their own search tasks. We build on Search Self-Play (SSP), a representative Proposer and Solver framework in which questions are generated and answered via multi-step search and reasoning. In practice, however, SSP faces two bottlenecks: the Proposer constructs questions from isolated answer entities without relational context, yielding many invalid or unverifiable questions in early self-play training, while the Solver receives only a binary outcome reward that discards useful signal from partially on-track search trajectories. We address both bottlenecks by reusing knowledge-graph paths as construction-derived intermediate supervision for both question construction and reward shaping. First, we ground question construction in LLM-guided knowledge-graph subgraphs, providing relational context for the Proposer. Second, we observe that constructing and solving a multi-hop question can involve overlapping intermediate entities: the factual bridges used to formulate the question may provide approximate waypoints for answering it. Exploiting this overlap, we introduce Waypoint Coverage Reward (WCR), which grants graded partial credit to incorrect Solver trajectories according to their coverage of entities on the construction path, while preserving full reward for correct answers. Across seven QA benchmarks and nine model configurations, our approach improves the average score over standard SSP in all configurations, including notable gains on multi-hop QA tasks. These results suggest that knowledge-graph paths can be reused as lightweight intermediate supervision, providing both relational guidance and process feedback without additional task-specific human annotations or manually labeled process steps.

analysis.tldr: 利用知识图谱路径作为中间监督信号，提升自演进搜索智能体的问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自演进搜索智能体依赖自生成任务训练，但现有方法存在无效问题生成和稀疏奖励信号两大瓶颈，限制了训练效率和最终性能。
analysis.problem: 如何为自演进搜索智能体提供有效的中间监督，以改善问题生成质量和搜索轨迹的奖励反馈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到多跳问题的构建路径与求解路径存在实体重叠，可作为近似路标用于奖励塑形。
analysis.method: 在Search Self-Play框架中，利用知识图谱子图指导问题构建，并提出Waypoint Coverage Reward (WCR)基于构建路径的实体覆盖度给予部分奖励。
contributions: 提出利用知识图谱路径作为中间监督，同时改善问题构建和奖励塑形。
引入Waypoint Coverage Reward，为部分正确的搜索轨迹提供分级奖励。
analysis.experiments: 在7个QA基准和9种模型配置上，方法在所有配置中均优于标准SSP，尤其在多跳QA任务上提升显著。
limitations: 依赖知识图谱的可用性和质量。
WCR的有效性可能受限于构建路径与求解路径的重叠程度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用知识图谱路径作为中间监督信号，提升自演进搜索智能体的问答性能。

papers.title: Inference-Time Budget Control for LLM Search Agents
papers.abstract: LLM search agents increasingly rely on tools at inference time, but their trajectories are often constrained by hard limits on both tool calls and generated tokens. Under such dual budgets, better answers require not only stronger models, but also explicit control over which search action should receive the next budget unit and when the accumulated evidence is sufficient to commit a final answer. We study this problem in multi-hop question answering (QA) and formulate it as two-stage inference-time budget control. At search time, our controller assigns each feasible action a task-level Value-of-Information (VOI) score, defined as an operational estimate of marginal task value per unit budget under the current search state and remaining dual budget, and uses this score to choose among retrieval, decomposition, and answer commitment. After search, a selective evidence-grounded finalizer compares the trajectory answer with a refined candidate and rewrites only when the residual error appears to be a low-risk answer-form error. Across four multi-hop QA benchmarks, three LLM backbones, and four budget levels, the method yields positive aggregate gains over four audited baselines under the same hard dual-budget protocol. Ablations show that search-time budget control, especially budget-dependent penalty, provides the main performance gain, while answer-time control helps mainly when the retrieval path is already adequate. These results suggest that inference-time budget control for LLM search agents should govern both how budget is spent during search and how the final answer is committed.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种两阶段推理预算控制方法，通过信息价值评分和选择性答案重写，在固定预算下提升LLM搜索代理的多跳问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM搜索代理在推理时受工具调用和生成token的双重预算限制，现有方法缺乏对预算分配的显式控制，导致在有限资源下难以获得更优答案。
analysis.problem: 如何在多跳问答中，在固定双预算（工具调用和生成token）下，通过显式控制搜索动作的预算分配和最终答案的提交时机来提升回答质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但隐含了现有方法在预算约束下性能瓶颈，以及预算控制对搜索和答案提交阶段的不同影响。
analysis.method: 两阶段推理预算控制：搜索阶段，控制器为每个可行动作计算任务级信息价值（VOI）分数，基于当前搜索状态和剩余双预算选择检索、分解或答案提交；搜索后，选择性证据驱动最终器比较轨迹答案与精炼候选，仅在低风险答案形式错误时重写。
contributions: 提出两阶段推理预算控制框架，显式管理搜索和答案提交阶段的预算分配。
定义任务级信息价值（VOI）分数，用于在双预算下指导搜索动作选择。
引入选择性证据驱动最终器，在低风险下重写答案以提升质量。
在多个基准、LLM骨干和预算水平上验证了方法的有效性，并分析了各组件的贡献。
analysis.experiments: 在四个多跳QA基准、三个LLM骨干和四个预算水平上，与四个基线方法相比，方法在相同硬双预算协议下取得正向聚合增益。消融实验表明搜索时预算控制（尤其是预算依赖惩罚）是主要性能来源，答案时控制主要在检索路径充分时有效。
limitations: 方法依赖对任务级信息价值的准确估计，可能受搜索状态表示影响。
选择性重写仅针对低风险答案形式错误，可能无法处理更复杂的错误类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种两阶段推理预算控制方法，通过信息价值评分和选择性答案重写，在固定预算下提升LLM搜索代理的多跳问答性能。

papers.title: An Empirical Study of Proactive Coding Assistants in Real-World Software Development
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based coding assistants have made substantial progress, yet most systems remain reactive, requiring developers to explicitly formulate their needs. Proactive coding assistants aim to infer latent developer intent from integrated development environment (IDE) interactions and repository context, thereby reducing interaction overhead and supporting more seamless assistance. However, research in this direction is limited by the scarcity of large-scale real-world developer behavior data. Existing studies therefore often rely on LLM-simulated IDE traces, whose fidelity to real development behavior remains unclear. In this paper, we investigate this simulation-to-reality gap through a large-scale empirical study. We collect real IDE interaction traces from 1{,}246 experienced industry developers over three consecutive days using a custom Visual Studio Code extension, and construct paired LLM-simulated traces for controlled comparison. Our analysis shows that simulated traces differ substantially from real traces in behavioral diversity, temporal structure, and exploratory patterns. Based on the collected data, we introduce \textbf{ProCodeBench}, a real-world benchmark for proactive intent prediction. Experiments with representative LLMs, retrieval-augmented methods, and agentic baselines show that current approaches remain far from reliable under real IDE traces, suggesting that simulation-based evaluation can overestimate real-world performance. Finally, our training study shows that simulated data cannot replace real data, but can complement it when used before real-world fine-tuning. These findings highlight the importance of real developer behavior data for evaluating and training proactive coding assistants.

analysis.tldr: 真实开发者行为数据对评估和训练主动式编码助手至关重要，模拟数据存在显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的编码助手多为被动式，主动式助手能减少交互开销，但缺乏大规模真实开发者行为数据，现有研究依赖LLM模拟数据，其真实性未知。
analysis.problem: 评估模拟IDE轨迹与真实开发者行为之间的差距，并构建真实基准以衡量主动式编码助手的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模拟轨迹在行为多样性、时间结构和探索模式上与真实轨迹存在显著差异；基于模拟数据的评估会高估真实世界性能；模拟数据不能替代真实数据，但可在真实微调前作为补充。
analysis.method: 收集1246名行业开发者连续三天的真实IDE交互轨迹，并构建配对的LLM模拟轨迹进行对比分析；基于真实数据构建ProCodeBench基准，评估多种方法。
contributions: 通过大规模实证研究揭示了模拟与真实开发者行为之间的差距。
发布了ProCodeBench，一个基于真实数据的主动式意图预测基准。
实验表明当前方法在真实轨迹下远不可靠，模拟评估会高估性能。
analysis.experiments: 使用1246名开发者的真实数据，对比LLM模拟轨迹，评估了代表性LLM、检索增强方法和智能体基线在ProCodeBench上的表现。
limitations: 数据仅来自三天连续采集，可能未覆盖长期行为模式。
仅针对Visual Studio Code扩展，可能不适用于其他IDE。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 真实开发者行为数据对评估和训练主动式编码助手至关重要，模拟数据存在显著差距。

papers.title: When Quantization Is Free: An int4 KV Cache That Outruns fp16 on Apple Silicon
papers.abstract: KV-cache quantization is framed as a quality--latency trade-off. We show it is \emph{inverted} on Apple Silicon's unified memory: a single fused Metal kernel (sign-randomized FFT $+$ per-channel $λ$ $+$ per-group abs-max $+$ int4 nibble pack), exposed as a HuggingFace \texttt{Cache} subclass, runs \emph{faster than fp16} across $256$--$4096$-token prefixes on Gemma-3 1B ($-3$ to $-8\%$ ms/tok) and at short context on Qwen2.5-1.5B ($-0.7$ to $-2.6\%$ through $1$K), with $3\times$ persistent memory compression and quality preserved ($\dPPL = 0.000$ Qwen short-prompt; $+3.6$ hook $\dPPL$ Gemma). The kernel's $\sim\!25$\,ns/vec overhead is below the bandwidth savings from $3\times$ compression. The fused kernel also closes Qwen's 4-bit per-token catastrophe ($\dPPL = +7975 \to +638.6$, $12.5\times$ reduction) at $182$\,GFLOPS / $D{=}128$. Supporting findings: $\SRFT$ and $\SRHT$ are statistically indistinguishable for KV quality (we pick $\SRFT$ for mixed-radix and matrix-multiply alignment); a learned-rotation ablation surfaces a regularization role for the fixed random SRFT base (learning $R+λ$ without SRFT lowers calibration MSE $84.9\%$ vs $50.3\%$ but yields worse PPL); Householder rotations at $k{=}d/2$ reflectors are effectively lossless at $d{=}256$.

analysis.tldr: 在Apple Silicon上，int4 KV缓存量化不仅不牺牲速度，反而比fp16更快，同时保持质量。
analysis.research_motivation: KV缓存量化通常被视为质量与延迟之间的权衡，但在统一内存架构上，这种权衡可能被颠覆。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种在Apple Silicon上比fp16更快、同时保持质量的int4 KV缓存量化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在Apple Silicon的统一内存上，量化带来的带宽节省超过了计算开销，使得int4 KV缓存比fp16更快。
analysis.method: 提出一个融合的Metal内核，包含符号随机化FFT、逐通道λ、逐组abs-max和int4 nibble打包，作为HuggingFace Cache子类实现。
contributions: 发现Apple Silicon上KV缓存量化的质量-延迟权衡被反转，int4比fp16更快。
设计并实现了一个融合的Metal内核，在多个模型和上下文长度上实现加速和3倍压缩。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma-3 1B和Qwen2.5-1.5B上测试，测量ms/tok和PPL，显示加速和质量保持。
limitations: 仅针对Apple Silicon统一内存架构优化，可能不适用于其他硬件。
仅测试了特定模型和上下文长度，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在Apple Silicon上，int4 KV缓存量化不仅不牺牲速度，反而比fp16更快，同时保持质量。

papers.title: Budgeted Attention Allocation: Cost-Conditioned Compute Control for Efficient Transformers
papers.abstract: Transformers usually expose one inference cost per trained model, while deployed systems often need multiple cost-quality operating points. We study Budgeted Attention Allocation, a monotone head-gating mechanism conditioned on a requested attention budget. Dense warm-starting is important for stability: on a robust synthetic sequence task, one budgeted model reaches 99.7% accuracy at 0.303 estimated attention cost and 100.0% accuracy at 0.504 cost. On held-out AG News with a custom word-level transformer, hard-gate adaptation turns soft cost control into measured single-thread CPU speed, reaching 82.1% accuracy with 1.28x speedup at budget 0.50. In pretrained BERT-Mini AG News, budgeted structural pruning reaches 87.6% accuracy with 1.20x speedup at budget 0.50; a validation-ranked zero-shot dense post-hoc structural baseline reaches 86.1%, and one recovery epoch raises that per-budget specialist to 87.9%. On DBpedia14, BERT-Mini budgeted gates reach 97.4% at exact budget 0.50 versus 96.6% for dense full attention. Static fixed-budget gates and recovered dense specialists remain strong. The contribution is therefore not universal dominance, but a reproducible feasibility study of one controllable checkpoint across budgets that can trade attention cost for accuracy and be converted into measured structural speedups on small CPU benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于预算条件的注意力分配机制，通过门控控制推理成本，实现单个模型覆盖多个成本-精度权衡点。
analysis.research_motivation: 部署的Transformer模型通常只有单一推理成本，但实际系统需要多个成本-质量工作点，现有方法缺乏灵活的成本控制。
analysis.problem: 如何让一个预训练Transformer模型根据给定的注意力预算动态调整计算量，同时保持精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 密集热启动对训练稳定性至关重要；硬门控可将软成本控制转化为实际CPU加速；静态固定预算门控和恢复的密集专家仍有竞争力。
analysis.method: 提出Budgeted Attention Allocation，一种单调头门控机制，根据请求的注意力预算（0到1之间的标量）动态选择注意力头，并通过密集热启动和硬门控适应实现成本-精度权衡。
contributions: 提出预算注意力分配方法，实现单个模型覆盖多个成本-精度工作点
在合成序列任务和真实文本分类任务上验证了方法的有效性，展示了从软成本控制到实际CPU加速的转换
analysis.experiments: 在合成序列任务、AG News（自定义词级Transformer和预训练BERT-Mini）以及DBpedia14上进行了实验，报告了精度、估计注意力成本和实际CPU加速比。
limitations: 方法并非在所有场景下都优于静态固定预算门控或恢复的密集专家，贡献在于可行性研究而非普遍优势
实际加速仅在小型CPU基准上测量，未在大型模型或GPU上验证
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于预算条件的注意力分配机制，通过门控控制推理成本，实现单个模型覆盖多个成本-精度权衡点。

papers.title: Irminsul: MLA-Native Position-Independent Caching for Agentic LLM Serving
papers.abstract: Agentic LLM workloads put bit-identical tokens at shifted positions every turn, voiding prefix caches at the first byte of divergence. Operators report cache-hit regressions ranging from moderate slowdowns to severe TTFT spikes of 10-16s on unchanged content. Prior position-independent caching systems correct RoPE on the full $d_K$-dimensional key, an architectural cost imposed by GQA, not by caching itself. Multi-Head Latent Attention, deployed at scale in DeepSeek-V2/V3/R1, Kimi-K2/Moonlight, GLM-5, and Mistral Large 3, factors each KV row into a position-free $c_{KV}$ and a 64-dim $k_r$ correctable in closed form; this structure motivates content-addressed caching as a natural fit rather than a GQA workaround. We present Irminsul, which extends SGLang's radix cache with content-hash keying over CDC-chunked segments and a $δ$-rotation rule for $k_r$. We evaluate three native MLA-MoE deployments - DeepSeek-V2-Lite (16B/2.4B), Kimi Moonlight-16B-A3B, and JoyAI-Flash (48B/3B) - with output-consistency on all three and recovery measured on the two endpoints; Irminsul recovers up to ~83% of prompt tokens above exact-prefix on agentic traffic while delivering 63% prefill energy savings per cache hit. We argue that content-addressed caching belongs in the serving stack as a first-class primitive, not a retrofit over prefix matching.

analysis.tldr: 提出Irminsul，一种利用MLA架构特性实现内容寻址缓存的系统，在Agentic LLM服务中恢复高达83%的提示令牌并节省63%预填充能耗。
analysis.research_motivation: Agentic LLM工作负载中，每次交互都会使相同令牌出现在不同位置，导致前缀缓存失效，造成严重延迟（TTFT峰值达10-16秒）。现有位置无关缓存系统因GQA架构限制需对完整键进行RoPE校正，成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 解决Agentic LLM服务中因位置偏移导致的前缀缓存命中率下降问题，实现高效的位置无关缓存。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到Agentic LLM工作负载中，位相同令牌在每次交互中位置偏移，导致前缀缓存从第一个不同字节开始失效，缓存命中率严重下降，TTFT峰值达10-16秒。
analysis.method: Irminsul扩展SGLang的基数树缓存，采用内容哈希键控和CDC分块段，并引入δ-旋转规则校正k_r向量，利用MLA架构中c_{KV}的位置无关性和k_r的闭式可校正性实现内容寻址缓存。
contributions: 提出Irminsul系统，利用MLA架构特性实现内容寻址缓存，避免GQA架构的完整键校正开销。
在三个原生MLA-MoE部署上验证，恢复高达83%的提示令牌，并节省63%预填充能耗。
analysis.experiments: 在DeepSeek-V2-Lite、Kimi Moonlight-16B-A3B和JoyAI-Flash三个模型上评估，验证输出一致性，并在两个端点测量恢复效果。
limitations: 仅针对MLA架构设计，不适用于GQA等其他注意力架构。
实验仅在有限模型上验证，大规模部署效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Irminsul，一种利用MLA架构特性实现内容寻址缓存的系统，在Agentic LLM服务中恢复高达83%的提示令牌并节省63%预填充能耗。

papers.title: Adaptive Physical-Facial Representation Fusion via Subject-Invariant Cross-Modal Prompt Tuning for Video-Based Emotion Recognition
papers.abstract: Emotion recognition from facial videos enables non-contact inference of human emotional states. Although facial expressions are widely used cues, they cannot fully reflect intrinsic affective states. Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) provides complementary physiological information, but it is highly susceptible to noise and inter-subject variability, limiting generalization to unseen individuals. Existing multimodal methods combine facial and rPPG features, yet their fusion strategies often disrupt pretrained facial representations and lack explicit mechanisms to suppress subject-specific variations. To address these issues, we propose a subject-invariant cross-modal prompt-tuning framework for video-based emotion recognition. Specifically, rPPG waveforms are transformed into noise-robust time-frequency representations (TFRs), from which modality-complementary prompts are generated to modulate facial tokens within a frozen Vision Transformer (ViT). This design enables effective cross-modal interaction while preserving the generalizable facial representations learned by the pretrained backbone. In addition, we introduce a decoupled shared-specific adapter (DSSA) into each ViT layer to explicitly separate subject-shared and subject-specific components, thereby improving cross-subject generalization. Experiments on the MAHNOB-HCI and DEAP benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms strong baselines in both recognition accuracy and generalization ability, highlighting its effectiveness for video-based emotion recognition.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种跨模态提示调优框架，通过融合面部和rPPG信号提升视频情感识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 面部表情无法完全反映内在情感状态，rPPG信号虽能提供补充生理信息但易受噪声和个体差异影响，现有多模态融合策略会破坏预训练面部表征且缺乏抑制个体差异的机制。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合面部和rPPG信号进行视频情感识别，同时保持预训练面部表征的泛化能力并抑制个体差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: rPPG信号对噪声和个体差异敏感，导致跨个体泛化受限；现有融合策略会干扰预训练面部表征。
analysis.method: 将rPPG波形转换为时频表示（TFR），生成模态互补提示调制冻结ViT的面部token；引入解耦共享-特定适配器（DSSA）分离共享和个体成分。
contributions: 提出基于跨模态提示调优的框架，有效融合面部和rPPG特征且保持预训练表征泛化性。
设计解耦共享-特定适配器（DSSA）显式分离个体差异，提升跨主体泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在MAHNOB-HCI和DEAP基准上，所提方法在识别准确率和泛化能力上持续优于强基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量rPPG信号提取，在噪声环境下性能可能下降。
仅验证了情感识别任务，其他生理信号融合任务需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种跨模态提示调优框架，通过融合面部和rPPG信号提升视频情感识别性能。

papers.title: Saliency-Aware Regularized Quantization Calibration for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is an effective approach for deploying large language models (LLMs) under memory and latency constraints. Most existing PTQ methods determine quantization parameters by minimizing a layer-wise reconstruction error on a predetermined calibration dataset, typically optimized via either scale search or Gram-based methods. However, from the perspective of generalization risk, existing PTQ calibration objectives based solely on empirical reconstruction error over limited or unrepresentative calibration data may move the quantized weights away from the original floating-point weights, potentially degrading downstream performance. To address this issue, we propose \emph{Regularized Quantization Calibration} (RQC), a unified framework that augments standard PTQ objectives with a regularizer that explicitly controls weight deviation from the original weights. We further generalize this framework to incorporate a saliency-aware regularizer, resulting in \emph{Saliency-Aware Regularized Quantization Calibration} (SARQC). The proposed regularization encourages quantized weights to remain close to the original weights during calibration, leading to improved generalization at inference time. SARQC integrates seamlessly into existing PTQ pipelines and enhances both scale-search-based and Gram-based methods under a unified formulation. Extensive experiments on dense and Mixture-of-Experts LLMs demonstrate consistent improvements in perplexity and zero-shot accuracy, without introducing additional inference overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于显著性的正则化量化校准方法，在保持推理效率的同时提升大语言模型量化后的泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有后训练量化方法仅依赖有限校准数据上的经验重构误差，可能导致量化权重偏离原始浮点权重，损害下游性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在校准过程中显式控制量化权重与原始权重的偏差，以提升量化模型的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出仅基于经验重构误差的校准目标可能使量化权重偏离原始权重，导致泛化风险。
analysis.method: 提出正则化量化校准框架RQC，在标准PTQ目标中添加正则项控制权重偏差；进一步推广为显著性感知版本SARQC，根据权重重要性加权正则化。
contributions: 提出RQC统一框架，通过正则化项显式控制量化权重与原始权重的偏差。
引入显著性感知正则化SARQC，提升校准效果。
在密集和MoE大语言模型上验证了困惑度和零样本准确率的持续改进，且无额外推理开销。
analysis.experiments: 在密集和MoE大语言模型上进行了实验，评估困惑度和零样本准确率，显示一致改进。
limitations: 可能对显著性度量方式敏感。
未讨论在极低比特量化下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于显著性的正则化量化校准方法，在保持推理效率的同时提升大语言模型量化后的泛化性能。

papers.title: CFE-PPAR: Compression-friendly encryption for privacy-preserving action recognition leveraging video transformers
papers.abstract: Privacy-preserving action recognition (PPAR) enables machines to understand human activities in videos without revealing sensitive visual content. Among the various strategies for PPAR, encryption-based methods achieve strong privacy protection while maintaining high recognition performance. However, these methods lead to a catastrophic decrease in recognition performance and visual quality when the encrypted videos are compressed. That is, the previous methods are not compression-friendly. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose the first compression-friendly encryption method for PPAR, called CFE-PPAR. In CFE-PPAR, videos encrypted with secret keys can be directly recognized by a video transformer, which uses parameters transformed by the same keys as those used for video encryption. In experiments, it is verified that CFE-PPAR outperforms previous methods on the UCF101 and HMDB51 datasets under Motion-JPEG and H.264 compression.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个压缩友好的隐私保护动作识别加密方法，使加密视频可直接被视频Transformer识别且兼容压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有加密方法在视频压缩后识别性能和视觉质量急剧下降，缺乏压缩友好性，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种加密方法，使得加密后的视频在压缩后仍能保持高识别性能且不泄露隐私。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出先前加密方法在压缩后识别性能和视觉质量灾难性下降，即不具压缩友好性。
analysis.method: 提出CFE-PPAR，使用与视频加密相同的密钥转换视频Transformer参数，使加密视频可直接被识别。
contributions: 首个压缩友好的隐私保护动作识别加密方法
在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上，在Motion-JPEG和H.264压缩下优于先前方法
analysis.experiments: 在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上，使用Motion-JPEG和H.264压缩进行实验，验证了CFE-PPAR优于先前方法。
limitations: 仅验证了动作识别任务，可能不适用于其他视频理解任务
未讨论密钥管理或安全性分析
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个压缩友好的隐私保护动作识别加密方法，使加密视频可直接被视频Transformer识别且兼容压缩。

papers.title: GCCM: Enhancing Generative Graph Prediction via Contrastive Consistency Model
papers.abstract: Conditional generative models, particularly diffusion-based methods, have recently been applied to graph prediction by modeling the target as a conditional distribution given the input graph, yielding competitive results compared to deterministic predictor. However, existing diffusion-based prediction methods typically require expensive iterative denoising at inference and often suffer from unstable sampling, which motivates recent efforts to reduce inference denoising steps and enable stable sampling via techniques such as consistency training. Despite this progress, we find that existing consistency training methods for graph prediction could potentially fall into a shortcut solution: the model may attempt to satisfy the self-consistency constraint by ignoring the noisy target (i.e., assigning it negligible weight), ultimately collapsing into a purely deterministic predictor. To mitigate such shortcut solution, we propose GCCM, a graph contrastive consistency model that goes beyond isolated pairwise matching between the same target at different noise levels by introducing negative pairs into a contrastive consistency objective. This adds an additional separation requirement, making the shortcut solution no longer trivially sufficient to satisfy the proposed objective. Moreover, we apply feature perturbation to the input node/edge features to break identical conditioning on the input graph, so that the shortcut no longer yields the same predictions across noise levels and becomes less attractive. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that GCCM mitigates the shortcut solution and yields consistent performance improvements in graph prediction compared to deterministic predictors.

analysis.tldr: 提出图对比一致性模型GCCM，通过对比一致性目标缓解图预测中一致性训练的捷径解问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型用于图预测时推理慢且采样不稳定，一致性训练可减少步数但易陷入捷径解（模型忽略噪声目标退化为确定性预测器），需要解决此问题。
analysis.problem: 现有图预测的一致性训练方法存在捷径解，模型通过忽略噪声目标满足自一致性约束，导致生成能力丧失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出一致性训练中模型可能通过给噪声目标分配可忽略权重来满足约束，最终坍缩为确定性预测器。
analysis.method: 提出图对比一致性模型GCCM，在一致性目标中引入负样本对形成对比损失，增加分离要求；同时对输入节点/边特征进行扰动，打破相同条件导致捷径解失效。
contributions: 识别并分析了图预测中一致性训练的捷径解问题
提出GCCM，通过对比一致性目标和特征扰动缓解捷径解
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集上实验表明GCCM缓解了捷径解，相比确定性预测器在图预测上取得一致性能提升。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销（对比损失和特征扰动）
未在更大规模或更复杂图数据集上验证
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图对比一致性模型GCCM，通过对比一致性目标缓解图预测中一致性训练的捷径解问题。

papers.title: R2H-Diff: Guided Spectral Diffusion Model for RGB-to-Hyperspectral Reconstruction
papers.abstract: RGB-to-hyperspectral image reconstruction is a highly ill-posed inverse problem, since multiple plausible spectral distributions may correspond to the same RGB observation. Existing regression-based methods usually learn a deterministic mapping, which limits their ability to model reconstruction uncertainty and often leads to over-smoothed spectral responses. Although diffusion models provide strong distribution modeling capability, their direct application to hyperspectral reconstruction remains challenging due to the high spectral dimensionality, strong inter-band correlations, and strict requirement for spectral fidelity. To this end, we propose R2H-Diff, an efficient diffusion-based framework tailored for RGB-to-HSI reconstruction. Specifically, R2H-Diff formulates spectral recovery as a conditional iterative refinement process, enabling progressive reconstruction under RGB guidance. We proposed a Guided Spectral Refinement Module for RGB-conditioned feature fusion and a Hyperspectral-Adaptive Transposed Attention module for efficient spatial--spectral dependency modeling. Furthermore, a normalization-free denoising backbone is adopted to preserve spectral amplitude consistency, while a task-adapted linear noise schedule enables high-quality reconstruction with only five denoising steps. Extensive experiments on NTIRE2022, CAVE, and Harvard demonstrate that R2H-Diff achieves a favorable balance between reconstruction quality and computational efficiency. Notably, on NTIRE2022, R2H-Diff obtains 35.37 dB PSNR with a sub-million-parameter model of 0.58M parameters and 12.25G FLOPs, achieving the lowest model complexity among the evaluated methods while maintaining strong reconstruction fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出R2H-Diff扩散模型，用5步去噪实现RGB到高光谱图像的高效重建，在NTIRE2022上以0.58M参数达到35.37 dB PSNR。
analysis.research_motivation: RGB到高光谱重建是高度病态逆问题，现有回归方法无法建模不确定性且易导致光谱过平滑，而直接应用扩散模型面临高光谱维度、强波段相关性和保真度要求等挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效且保真的扩散模型，用于RGB到高光谱图像的重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出R2H-Diff框架，包含引导光谱细化模块（GSRM）用于RGB条件特征融合、高光谱自适应转置注意力（HATA）模块建模空间-光谱依赖、无归一化去噪骨干保持光谱幅度一致性，以及任务自适应线性噪声调度实现仅5步去噪的高质量重建。
contributions: 提出首个针对RGB到高光谱重建的高效扩散框架R2H-Diff，仅需5步去噪。
设计引导光谱细化模块和高光谱自适应转置注意力，有效融合RGB条件并建模空间-光谱依赖。
采用无归一化去噪骨干和任务自适应噪声调度，在保持光谱保真度的同时降低计算复杂度。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE2022、CAVE和Harvard数据集上评估，NTIRE2022上达到35.37 dB PSNR，模型参数仅0.58M，FLOPs为12.25G，是评估方法中复杂度最低的。
limitations: 可能对极端光谱变化或噪声敏感。
仅需5步去噪，但扩散模型的理论采样质量与步数关系需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出R2H-Diff扩散模型，用5步去噪实现RGB到高光谱图像的高效重建，在NTIRE2022上以0.58M参数达到35.37 dB PSNR。

papers.title: DataDignity: Training Data Attribution for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Auditing language-model outputs often requires more than judging correctness: an auditor may need to identify which source document most likely supports the knowledge expressed in a response. We study this as pinpoint provenance: given a prompt, a target-model response, and a candidate corpus, rank the documents that best support the response. We introduce FakeWiki, a controlled benchmark of 3,537 fabricated Wikipedia-style articles designed to preserve ground-truth provenance while weakening lexical shortcuts. FakeWiki includes QA probes, source-preserving paraphrases, retro-generated variants, hard anti-documents that remain topically similar while removing answer-critical facts, and five query conditions: clean prompting plus four jailbreak-inspired transformations. We evaluate seven retrieval baselines, a training-free activation-steering retrieval-fusion method, SteerFuse, and a supervised contrastive provenance ranker, ScoringModel. ScoringModel maps response and document features into a shared space and is trained with InfoNCE using in-batch, retrieval-mined, and anti-document negatives. Across nine open-weight instruction-tuned LLMs and five query conditions, ScoringModel improves mean Recall@10 from 35.0 for the strongest retrieval baseline to 52.2, without inference-time fusion, and wins 41/45 model-by-condition cells. SteerFuse is usually second-best despite requiring no supervised training, showing that activation-space evidence can efficiently complement text retrieval. On jailbreak-inspired transformed queries, ScoringModel improves Recall@10 by 15.7 points on average over the best baseline. Overall, our work shows that robust training data attribution requires evaluation settings that separate true answer support from topical or lexical resemblance.

analysis.tldr: 提出训练数据归因方法，通过可控基准和对比排序模型提升大语言模型输出溯源能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 审计语言模型输出时，仅判断正确性不足，需要识别支持回答的源文档，但现有方法易受词汇捷径干扰，缺乏可靠归因。
analysis.problem: 如何准确、鲁棒地识别大语言模型回答所依据的训练数据文档。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有检索基线在区分真正支持答案的文档与仅主题或词汇相似的文档时表现不佳，尤其在对抗性查询条件下。
analysis.method: 构建FakeWiki可控基准（含反文档等），提出ScoringModel（对比学习排序器）和SteerFuse（无训练激活融合方法）。
contributions: 构建FakeWiki基准，提供带真实归因的受控评估环境。
提出ScoringModel，通过对比学习显著提升归因召回率。
提出SteerFuse，无需监督训练即可有效补充文本检索。
analysis.experiments: 在9个开源指令微调LLM和5种查询条件下，ScoringModel平均Recall@10从35.0提升至52.2，在41/45个模型-条件组合中最佳。
limitations: FakeWiki为合成数据，真实场景泛化性待验证。
ScoringModel需监督训练，依赖标注数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出训练数据归因方法，通过可控基准和对比排序模型提升大语言模型输出溯源能力。

papers.title: Attractor Geometry of Transformer Memory: From Conflict Arbitration to Confident Hallucination
papers.abstract: Language models draw on two knowledge sources: facts baked into weights (parametric memory, PM) and information in context (working memory, WM). We study two mechanistically distinct failure modes--conflict, when PM and WM disagree and interfere; and hallucination, when the queried fact was never learned. Both produce confident output regardless, making output-based monitoring blind by design. We show both failures share a unified geometric account. In the hidden-state space of autoregressive generation, learned facts form attractor basins. Conflict is basin competition: WM disrupts convergence to the correct basin without raising output entropy. Hallucination is basin absence: the hidden state drifts freely when no memorized basin exists. The frozen LM head, designed for next-token prediction, cannot distinguish these cases and fires confidently either way. We verify this account in a controlled synthetic task--entity identifiers mapped to unique codes with PM installed via LoRA adapters--where ground truth is exact and component roles can be causally isolated through targeted adapter placement. Geometric margin--the hidden state's distance to the nearest memorized basin--reads this geometry directly and separates correct recall from hallucination far more cleanly than output entropy, with zero false refusals where entropy-based detection cannot avoid rejecting the vast majority of correct outputs. The separation holds on natural-language factual queries from the pretrained model with no adaptation, confirming attractor geometry is structural rather than a fine-tuning artifact. The fraction of confident hallucinations follows a scaling law $C = \exp(-c/\barΔ)$, growing with scale even as overall error rates fall. Hidden states reliably encode epistemic state; the frozen output head systematically erases it--and this erasure worsens with scale.

analysis.tldr: Transformer记忆的吸引子几何统一解释了冲突仲裁与自信幻觉两种失败模式，并揭示输出头会系统性擦除隐状态中的认知状态。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型依赖参数记忆和上下文工作记忆两种知识源，但现有方法无法区分冲突（记忆不一致）和幻觉（事实未学习）这两种失败模式，因为两者都会产生自信输出，导致基于输出的监控失效。
analysis.problem: 如何从几何机制上统一理解并区分Transformer记忆中的冲突仲裁与自信幻觉，并解释为何输出头无法区分它们。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在自回归生成的隐状态空间中，已学习事实形成吸引子盆地；冲突是盆地竞争，幻觉是盆地缺失；冻结的输出头无法区分这两种情况，总是自信地输出；自信幻觉的比例随模型规模增大而上升，遵循标度律。
analysis.method: 提出吸引子几何框架：通过几何间隔（隐状态到最近记忆盆地的距离）直接读取隐状态几何，从而区分正确回忆和幻觉，并在合成任务和自然语言事实查询上验证。
contributions: 统一了冲突和幻觉两种失败模式的几何解释，揭示其共享吸引子盆地机制。
提出几何间隔作为比输出熵更干净的检测指标，实现零错误拒绝。
发现自信幻觉的标度律，并揭示输出头系统性擦除认知状态且随规模加剧。
analysis.experiments: 在合成任务（通过LoRA注入参数记忆）和预训练模型自然语言事实查询上验证，几何间隔能清晰分离正确回忆与幻觉，而输出熵无法做到。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 主要基于合成任务和特定事实查询，可能未覆盖更复杂的自然语言场景。
几何间隔的计算依赖于已知记忆盆地的先验，实际应用中可能难以获取。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Transformer记忆的吸引子几何统一解释了冲突仲裁与自信幻觉两种失败模式，并揭示输出头会系统性擦除隐状态中的认知状态。

papers.title: Temporal Functional Circuits: From Spline Plots to Faithful Explanations in KAN Forecasting
papers.abstract: Unlike MLPs, Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) expose explicit learnable edge functions on every connection, enabling mechanistic explanation in time-series forecasting. This paper introduces Temporal Functional Circuits, a framework that transforms KAN edge functions from latent visualizations into faithful, temporally grounded explanations. Built on a gated residual KAN that decomposes forecasts into a linear base and a sparsely activated KAN correction, the framework (i) maps each edge to input lags via output-aware attribution, (ii) ranks edges by learned activation range, and (iii) validates faithfulness through edge-level interventions including zeroing and spline removal. Removing the learned B-spline component while retaining the base SiLU term degrades forecasts, providing evidence that the spline shape itself carries predictive value beyond the base activation. On four synthetic regimes of increasing complexity, the learned gate opens progressively wider as signal complexity grows. On regime-switching signals, gated KAN achieves 59% lower MSE than linear-only models. Across eight benchmarks, the gated architecture is competitive with linear, attention, and MLP alternatives, while providing interpretable edge functions that MLP-based corrections cannot offer.

analysis.tldr: 提出时间功能电路框架，将KAN边函数转化为忠实的时间解释，并通过门控残差KAN实现可解释时间序列预测。
analysis.research_motivation: KAN网络虽具有可解释的边函数，但现有可视化方法缺乏时间上的忠实性，难以用于时间序列预测的机理分析。
analysis.problem: 如何将KAN的边函数从潜在可视化转化为忠实、时间可归因的解释，并验证其预测价值。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 去除学习的B样条分量会降低预测性能，表明样条形状本身携带预测价值；门控机制在信号复杂度增加时开启更宽。
analysis.method: 基于门控残差KAN，通过输出感知归因将边映射到输入滞后，按激活范围排序边，并通过零化与样条移除进行干预验证。
contributions: 提出时间功能电路框架，实现KAN边函数的忠实时间解释
设计门控残差KAN架构，在保持竞争力的同时提供可解释边函数
analysis.experiments: 在四个合成信号和八个基准上评估，门控KAN在切换信号上MSE比线性模型低59%，且与线性、注意力、MLP方法竞争力相当。
limitations: 可能仅适用于时间序列预测场景
门控机制和边函数解释的计算开销未讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时间功能电路框架，将KAN边函数转化为忠实的时间解释，并通过门控残差KAN实现可解释时间序列预测。

papers.title: PersonaTeaming: Supporting Persona-Driven Red-Teaming for Generative AI
papers.abstract: Recent developments in AI safety research have called for red-teaming methods that effectively surface potential risks posed by generative AI models, with growing emphasis on how red-teamers' backgrounds and perspectives shape their strategies and the risks they uncover. While automated red-teaming approaches promise to complement human red-teaming through larger-scale exploration, existing automated approaches do not account for human identities and rarely incorporate human inputs. In this work, we explore persona-driven red-teaming to advance both automated red-teaming and human-AI collaboration. We first develop PersonaTeaming Workflow, which incorporates personas into the adversarial prompt generation process to explore a wider spectrum of adversarial strategies. Compared to RainbowPlus, a state-of-the-art automated red-teaming method, PersonaTeaming Workflow achieves higher attack success rates while maintaining prompt diversity. However, since automated personas only approximate real human perspectives, we further instantiate PersonaTeaming Workflow as PersonaTeaming Playground, a user-facing interface that enables red-teamers to author their own personas and collaborate with AI to mutate and refine prompts. In a user study with 11 industry practitioners, we found that PersonaTeaming Playground enabled diverse red-teaming strategies and outputs that practitioners perceived as useful, and that AI-generated suggestions in the PersonaTeaming Playground encouraged out-of-the-box thinking even when practitioners did not follow them strictly. Together, our work advances both automated and human-in-the-loop approaches to red-teaming, while shedding light on interaction patterns and design insights for supporting human-AI collaboration in generative AI red-teaming.

analysis.tldr: 提出PersonaTeaming框架，通过引入角色驱动策略提升生成式AI红队测试的攻击成功率和多样性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动化红队测试方法未考虑人类身份和视角，难以覆盖多样化的对抗策略，而人类红队测试成本高且规模有限。
analysis.problem: 如何将人类角色（persona）融入自动化红队测试，以生成更多样化、更有效的对抗提示，并支持人机协作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自动化角色只能近似真实人类视角，但用户研究发现，即使不严格遵循AI建议，AI生成的建议也能激发用户跳出常规思维。
analysis.method: 提出PersonaTeaming Workflow，将角色嵌入对抗提示生成过程；并实例化为PersonaTeaming Playground，允许用户自定义角色并与AI协作优化提示。
contributions: 提出角色驱动的红队测试工作流，相比基线方法（RainbowPlus）实现更高攻击成功率和提示多样性。
设计并实现用户界面PersonaTeaming Playground，支持人机协作红队测试，并通过用户研究验证其有效性和设计洞见。
analysis.experiments: 在自动化评估中与RainbowPlus对比，PersonaTeaming Workflow取得更高攻击成功率和提示多样性；用户研究涉及11名行业从业者，发现该界面支持多样化策略且被感知为有用。
limitations: 自动化角色可能无法完全捕捉真实人类视角的细微差别。
用户研究样本量较小（11人），可能限制结论的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PersonaTeaming框架，通过引入角色驱动策略提升生成式AI红队测试的攻击成功率和多样性。

papers.title: MotionGRPO: Overcoming Low Intra-Group Diversity in GRPO-Based Egocentric Motion Recovery
papers.abstract: This paper studies full-body 3D human motion recovery from head-mounted device signals. Existing diffusion-based methods often rely on global distribution matching, leading to local joint reconstruction errors. We propose MotionGRPO, a novel framework leveraging reinforcement learning post-training to inject fine-grained guidance into the diffusion process. Technically, we model diffusion sampling as a Markov decision process optimized via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). To this end, we introduce a hybrid reward mechanism that combines a learned conditioned perceptual model for global visual plausibility and explicit constraints for local joint precision. Our key technical insight is that policy optimization in diffusion-based recovery suffers from vanishing gradients due to limited intra-group sample diversity. To address this, we further introduce a noise-injection strategy that explicitly increases sample variance and stabilizes learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MotionGRPO achieves state-of-the-art performance with superior visual fidelity

analysis.tldr: MotionGRPO通过强化学习后训练和噪声注入策略，解决了基于GRPO的扩散模型中组内样本多样性不足的问题，实现了高保真全身3D人体运动恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散的方法依赖全局分布匹配，导致局部关节重建误差，且强化学习后训练中组内样本多样性不足引起梯度消失，限制了运动恢复的精度。
analysis.problem: 如何利用强化学习后训练为扩散过程注入细粒度指导，同时克服组内样本多样性低导致的梯度消失问题，实现高保真全身3D人体运动恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在基于扩散的运动恢复中，策略优化因组内样本多样性有限而遭受梯度消失，影响学习稳定性。
analysis.method: 提出MotionGRPO框架，将扩散采样建模为马尔可夫决策过程，通过GRPO优化；引入混合奖励机制（学习条件感知模型+显式局部关节约束）；并设计噪声注入策略增加样本方差、稳定学习。
contributions: 提出MotionGRPO，首个将GRPO应用于扩散模型后训练的运动恢复方法。
设计混合奖励机制，结合全局视觉合理性和局部关节精度。
引入噪声注入策略，解决组内多样性低导致的梯度消失问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能，视觉保真度优越。
limitations: 可能依赖头戴设备信号质量，对噪声敏感。
噪声注入策略的通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MotionGRPO通过强化学习后训练和噪声注入策略，解决了基于GRPO的扩散模型中组内样本多样性不足的问题，实现了高保真全身3D人体运动恢复。

papers.title: Chain of Risk: Safety Failures in Large Reasoning Models and Mitigation via Adaptive Multi-Principle Steering
papers.abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) increasingly expose chain-of-thought-like reasoning for transparency, verification, and deliberate problem solving. This creates a safety blind spot: harmful or policy-violating content may appear in reasoning traces even when final answers appear safe. We test whether final-answer safety is a sufficient proxy for the full reasoning-answer trajectory by scoring both stages under a unified twenty-principle safety rubric. Using prompts from seven public harmfulness and jailbreak sources, plus four out-of-distribution (OOD) sources, we evaluate 15 open-weight and API-based LRMs across 41K prompts per model. Reasoning traces consistently reveal additional safety risks beyond final answers, especially in high-severity stage-wise failures: leak cases, where unsafe reasoning precedes a safe-looking answer, and escape cases, where benign-looking reasoning precedes an unsafe final response.
