Principle-level analysis shows that risk concentrates in misinformation, legal compliance, discrimination, physical harm, and psychological harm. We further propose adaptive multi-principle steering, a white-box test-time mitigation that learns one unsafe-to-safe activation direction per safety principle and activates only directions whose current hidden state is closer to the unsafe than safe centroid. On three steerable open reasoning models, adaptive steering reduces unsafe counts in both reasoning traces and final answers on held-out and OOD benchmarks. DeepSeek-R1-Qwen-7B achieves a 40.8% average unsafe-count reduction while retaining 97.7% macro-averaged accuracy on BBH, GSM8K, and MMLU. These results suggest that LRM safety should be evaluated and mitigated over the full exposed reasoning-answer trajectory, not only at the final-answer stage.

analysis.tldr: 大型推理模型在推理链中暴露安全风险，提出自适应多原则引导方法在保持准确率的同时降低不安全内容。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型推理模型（LRM）为透明性和可验证性暴露推理链，但推理链中可能出现有害内容，而仅检查最终答案无法发现这些风险，存在安全盲区。
analysis.problem: LRM的最终答案安全性不足以作为完整推理-答案轨迹的安全代理，需要评估和缓解推理链中的安全风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推理链中持续出现超出最终答案的额外安全风险，特别是高严重性的阶段失败：泄漏案例（不安全推理后跟安全答案）和逃逸案例（看似安全的推理后跟不安全答案）。风险集中在错误信息、法律合规、歧视、身体伤害和心理伤害等原则。
analysis.method: 提出自适应多原则引导（adaptive multi-principle steering），一种白盒测试时缓解方法，为每个安全原则学习一个不安全到安全的激活方向，仅激活当前隐藏状态更接近不安全质心的方向。
contributions: 系统评估了15个LRM在推理链和最终答案上的安全风险，揭示了阶段失败模式。
提出自适应多原则引导方法，在保持准确率的同时显著降低推理链和最终答案中的不安全内容。
analysis.experiments: 使用7个公开有害性和越狱来源及4个分布外来源的提示，评估15个模型，每个模型41K提示。在三个可引导的开放推理模型上，自适应引导在保留和分布外基准上降低了推理链和最终答案的不安全计数。DeepSeek-R1-Qwen-7B平均不安全计数降低40.8%，同时保持BBH、GSM8K和MMLU上97.7%的宏平均准确率。
limitations: 方法仅适用于白盒可引导模型，对黑盒API模型不适用。
安全原则的选取和方向学习可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 大型推理模型在推理链中暴露安全风险，提出自适应多原则引导方法在保持准确率的同时降低不安全内容。

papers.title: Decomposing the Basic Abilities of Large Language Models: Mitigating Cross-Task Interference in Multi-Task Instruct-Tuning
papers.abstract: Recently, the prominent performance of large language models (LLMs) has been largely driven by multi-task instruct-tuning. Unfortunately, this training paradigm suffers from a key issue, named cross-task interference, due to conflicting gradients over shared parameters among different tasks. Some previous methods mitigate this issue by isolating task-specific parameters, e.g., task-specific neuron selection and mixture-of-experts. In this paper, we empirically reveal that the cross-task interference still exists for the existing solutions because of many parameters also shared by different tasks, and accordingly, we propose a novel solution, namely Basic Abilities Decomposition for multi-task Instruct-Tuning (BADIT). Specifically, we empirically find that certain parameters are consistently co-activated, and that co-activated parameters naturally organize into base groups. This motivates us to analogize that LLMs encode several orthogonal basic abilities, and that any task can be represented as a linear combination of these abilities. Accordingly, we propose BADIT that decomposes LLM parameters into orthogonal high-singular-value LoRA experts representing basic abilities, and dynamically enforces their orthogonality during training via spherical clustering of rank-1 components. We conduct extensive experiments on the SuperNI benchmark with 6 LLMs, and empirical results demonstrate that BADIT can outperform SOTA methods and mitigate the degree of cross-task interference.

analysis.tldr: 提出BADIT方法，通过将LLM参数分解为正交的基本能力LoRA专家，缓解多任务指令微调中的跨任务干扰。
analysis.research_motivation: 多任务指令微调是LLM性能提升的关键，但不同任务间的梯度冲突导致跨任务干扰，现有方法（如任务特定神经元选择、混合专家）因参数共享仍无法完全解决此问题。
analysis.problem: 多任务指令微调中跨任务干扰的缓解问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现某些参数持续共激活，自然形成基础组，类比LLM编码多个正交的基本能力，任务可表示为这些能力的线性组合。
analysis.method: 提出BADIT，将LLM参数分解为正交的高奇异值LoRA专家（代表基本能力），并通过秩1分量的球面聚类在训练中动态强制正交性。
contributions: 实证揭示现有方法中跨任务干扰仍然存在。
提出基于基本能力分解的BADIT方法，通过正交LoRA专家和球面聚类缓解干扰。
analysis.experiments: 在SuperNI基准上使用6个LLM进行实验，BADIT优于SOTA方法并减轻了跨任务干扰程度。
limitations: 可能依赖LoRA秩的选择和聚类超参数。
正交性假设可能不完全适用于所有任务组合。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BADIT方法，通过将LLM参数分解为正交的基本能力LoRA专家，缓解多任务指令微调中的跨任务干扰。

papers.title: EGA: Adapting Frozen Encoders for Vector Search with Bounded Out-of-Distribution Degradation
papers.abstract: Vector search systems built on frozen vision encoders face queries from unseen classes at deployment, yet existing adapter training collapses under this shift: high-capacity adapters with global contrastive losses silently reassign unseen-class samples to wrong seen-class clusters, dropping worst-case Label Precision by over 40 points below the frozen baseline in our tests. We propose Euclidean Geodesic Alignment (EGA), a residual adapter that couples three principles: zero initialization, local triplet loss, and hypersphere projection. These collectively induce a self-limiting dynamic: triplets that already satisfy a small margin stop producing gradients, so the adapter automatically stops updating where the local geometry is already correct. Our experiments show that at convergence $96.5\%$ of triplets are gradient-free, leaving unseen-class regions largely untouched while still enabling full-capacity refinement of seen classes. Across five diverse out-of-distribution (OOD) benchmarks, EGA achieves the highest worst-case Label Precision on the four primary splits and a consistent improvement on the fifth. The design also transfers to stronger backbones in addition to CLIP, and we provide an analytical justification linking gradient sparsity to bounded OOD perturbation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种残差适配器EGA，通过零初始化、局部三元组损失和超球面投影，在冻结编码器向量搜索中自动限制OOD退化，保持未见类精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有适配器训练在部署时遇到未见类查询时，高容量适配器会错误地将未见类样本分配到错误的已见类簇中，导致最差标签精度下降超过40个百分点，亟需一种能自动限制OOD退化的适配方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不损害未见类性能的前提下，对冻结视觉编码器进行适配以提升已见类检索精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高容量适配器使用全局对比损失时，会静默地将未见类样本分配到错误的已见类簇中，导致最差标签精度显著下降；而EGA通过梯度稀疏性自动停止更新局部几何正确的区域，收敛时96.5%的三元组无梯度。
analysis.method: 提出Euclidean Geodesic Alignment (EGA)，一种残差适配器，结合零初始化、局部三元组损失和超球面投影，使满足小间隔的三元组停止产生梯度，从而自动限制OOD扰动。
contributions: 提出EGA方法，在冻结编码器向量搜索中实现自限制的OOD退化，保持未见类精度。
在五个OOD基准上，EGA在四个主要分割上取得最高最差标签精度，并在第五个上持续改进。
提供分析证明梯度稀疏性与有界OOD扰动之间的联系。
analysis.experiments: 在五个不同的OOD基准上评估，EGA在四个主要分割上取得最高最差标签精度，并在第五个上持续改进；收敛时96.5%的三元组无梯度；方法可迁移到更强的骨干网络。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于三元组损失的向量搜索场景，对其他任务泛化性未知。
未讨论适配器容量对已见类性能的上限影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种残差适配器EGA，通过零初始化、局部三元组损失和超球面投影，在冻结编码器向量搜索中自动限制OOD退化，保持未见类精度。

papers.title: Large Vision-Language Models Get Lost in Attention
papers.abstract: Despite the rapid evolution of training paradigms, the decoder backbone of large vision--language models (LVLMs) remains fundamentally rooted in the residual-connection Transformer architecture. Therefore, deciphering the distinct roles of internal modules is critical for understanding model mechanics and guiding architectural optimization. While prior statistical approaches have provided valuable attribution-based insights, they often lack a unified theoretical basis. To bridge this gap, we propose a unified framework grounded in information theory and geometry to quantify the geometric and entropic nature of residual updates. Applying this unified framework reveals a fundamental functional decoupling: Attention acts as a subspace-preserving operator focused on reconfiguration, whereas FFNs serve as subspace-expanding operators driving semantic innovation. Strikingly, further experiments demonstrate that replacing learned attention weights with predefined values (e.g., Gaussian noise) yields comparable or even superior performance across a majority of datasets relative to vanilla models. These results expose severe misallocation and redundancy in current mechanisms, suggesting that state-of-the-art LVLMs effectively ``get lost in attention'' rather than efficiently leveraging visual context.

analysis.tldr: LVLM的注意力机制存在严重冗余，替换为高斯噪声仍可保持甚至提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解LVLM内部模块的独特角色对于模型机理分析和架构优化至关重要，但现有归因方法缺乏统一理论基础。
analysis.problem: 现有方法无法统一量化残差更新中注意力和FFN模块的几何与信息论特性，且注意力机制存在功能冗余。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力是子空间保持算子（重配置），FFN是子空间扩展算子（语义创新）；将注意力权重替换为预定义值（如高斯噪声）在多数数据集上表现相当或更优，表明注意力机制存在严重资源错配和冗余。
analysis.method: 基于信息论和几何的统一框架，量化残差更新的几何和熵特性，揭示注意力和FFN的功能解耦。
contributions: 提出统一的理论框架量化残差更新的几何与熵特性。
发现注意力和FFN的功能解耦：注意力保持子空间，FFN扩展子空间。
实验证明注意力权重可被随机噪声替代，揭示当前注意力机制的冗余性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上比较原始模型与注意力权重替换为高斯噪声的变体，结果显示后者性能相当或更优。
limitations: 未探讨其他预定义值（如常数）的影响。
未在更大规模模型或更多任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LVLM的注意力机制存在严重冗余，替换为高斯噪声仍可保持甚至提升性能。

papers.title: Sparse-to-Complete: From Sparse Image Captures to Complete 3D Scenes
papers.abstract: We introduce S2C-3D, a novel sparse-view 3D reconstruction framework for high-fidelity and complete scene reconstruction from as few as six to eight images. Our framework features three components: a specialized diffusion model for scene-specific image restoration, a training-free view-consistency conditioned sampling process in the diffusion model for refined Gaussian optimization, and a camera trajectory planning scheme to ensure comprehensive scene coverage. The specialized diffusion model is developed by finetuning a pretrained architecture on the input views and their corresponding degraded counterparts. The adaptation to the scene distribution allows the model to repair Gaussian renderings while effectively eliminating domain gaps. Meanwhile, the trajectory planning scheme optimizes scene coverage by connecting each newly sampled camera to its two nearest neighbors. By iteratively constructing paths and retaining only those that significantly enhance visibility, the scheme establishes a trajectory that covers the entire scene. To address multi-view conflicts, the view-consistency conditioned sampling process quantifies the consistency between neighboring repaired images. This information is injected as a condition into the sampling process of the frozen diffusion model, facilitating the generation of view-consistent images without additional training. Consequently, our approach produces high-fidelity 3D Gaussians that are robust to artifacts. Experimental results demonstrate that S2C-3D outperforms state-of-the-art methods, constructing high-quality scenes that are free from missing regions, blurring, or other artifacts with very sparse inputs. The source code and data are available at https://gapszju.github.io/S2C-3D.

analysis.tldr: 提出S2C-3D框架，从稀疏图像（6-8张）重建完整高保真3D场景，结合扩散模型修复、无训练视图一致性采样和相机轨迹规划。
analysis.research_motivation: 从稀疏图像重建完整3D场景是计算机视觉中的挑战性问题，现有方法在输入视图极少时容易出现缺失区域、模糊或伪影，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从仅6-8张稀疏图像实现高保真、无缺失的完整3D场景重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出S2C-3D框架，包含三个组件：1）针对场景的扩散模型微调，用于修复高斯渲染图像；2）无训练的视图一致性条件采样过程，量化相邻修复图像的一致性并注入扩散模型以生成一致视图；3）相机轨迹规划方案，通过连接最近邻相机并保留显著提升可见性的路径来覆盖整个场景。
contributions: 提出S2C-3D框架，从稀疏图像实现完整3D场景重建。
设计场景专用扩散模型和视图一致性条件采样，无需额外训练即可生成一致视图。
提出相机轨迹规划方案，确保场景全覆盖。
analysis.experiments: 实验结果表明S2C-3D优于现有方法，在极稀疏输入下构建高质量场景，无缺失区域、模糊或其他伪影。
limitations: 依赖预训练扩散模型，可能受限于其能力。
相机轨迹规划可能不适用于动态场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出S2C-3D框架，从稀疏图像（6-8张）重建完整高保真3D场景，结合扩散模型修复、无训练视图一致性采样和相机轨迹规划。

papers.title: XL-SafetyBench: A Country-Grounded Cross-Cultural Benchmark for LLM Safety and Cultural Sensitivity
papers.abstract: Current LLM safety benchmarks are predominantly English-centric and often rely on translation, failing to capture country-specific harms. Moreover, they rarely evaluate a model's ability to detect culturally embedded sensitivities as distinct from universal harms. We introduce XL-SafetyBench. a suite of 5,500 test cases across 10 country-language pairs, comprising a Jailbreak Benchmark of country-grounded adversarial prompts and a Cultural Benchmark where local sensitivities are embedded within innocuous requests. Each item is constructed via a multi-stage pipeline that combines LLM-assisted discovery, automated validation gates, and dual independent native-speaker annotators per country. To distinguish principled refusal from comprehension failure, we evaluate Attack Success Rate (ASR) alongside two complementary metrics we introduce: Neutral-Safe Rate (NSR) and Cultural Sensitivity Rate (CSR). Evaluating 10 frontier and 27 local LLMs reveals two key findings. First, jailbreak robustness and cultural awareness do not show a coupled relationship among frontier models, so a composite safety score obscures per-axis variation. Second, local models exhibit a near-linear ASR-NSR trade-off (r = -0.81), indicating that their apparent safety reflects generation failure rather than genuine alignment. XL-SafetyBench enables more nuanced, cross-cultural safety evaluation in the multilingual era.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨文化安全基准XL-SafetyBench，揭示前沿模型的安全鲁棒性与文化敏感性解耦，本地模型存在生成失败伪装的安全假象。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM安全基准以英语为中心且依赖翻译，无法捕捉特定国家的危害，也缺乏对文化敏感性检测的评估。
analysis.problem: 构建一个跨语言、跨文化的安全基准，区分原则性拒绝与理解失败，并评估模型的文化敏感性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿模型的安全鲁棒性与文化意识不耦合，本地模型的安全表现与生成失败呈近线性负相关（r=-0.81），表明其安全性实为生成能力不足。
analysis.method: 构建包含5500个测试用例的基准，覆盖10个语言-国家对，包括基于国家的对抗提示（Jailbreak Benchmark）和嵌入文化敏感性的无害请求（Cultural Benchmark），通过多阶段流水线（LLM辅助发现、自动验证、双母语标注）生成，并引入NSR和CSR指标。
contributions: 提出首个基于国家背景的跨文化安全基准XL-SafetyBench，包含5500个测试用例和10个语言-国家对。
引入Neutral-Safe Rate (NSR)和Cultural Sensitivity Rate (CSR)指标，区分原则性拒绝与理解失败。
实验发现前沿模型的安全鲁棒性与文化敏感性解耦，本地模型的安全表现与生成失败高度相关。
analysis.experiments: 评估10个前沿模型和27个本地模型，发现上述现象。
limitations: 基准覆盖的语言-国家对有限，可能无法代表所有文化背景。
指标NSR和CSR的有效性需更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨文化安全基准XL-SafetyBench，揭示前沿模型的安全鲁棒性与文化敏感性解耦，本地模型存在生成失败伪装的安全假象。

papers.title: Retrieval-Conditioned Topology Selection with Provable Budget Conservation for Multi-Agent Code Generation
papers.abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems for code generation face a fundamental routing problem: the optimal orchestration topology depends on the structural complexity of the code under modification, yet existing systems select topologies without consulting the codebase. We present Retrieval-Guided Adaptive Orchestration (RGAO), an architecture that closes this loop by extracting a structural complexity vector from a hierarchical code index before selecting the orchestration topology. RGAO operates within Code-Agent, a multi-agent framework whose sub-agents are governed by formal contracts with six-dimensional budget vectors. Our headline contribution is the composition of two previously separate lines of work -- complexity-conditioned LLM routing and formal resource algebras -- yielding a property neither admits alone: provable budget conservation under retrieval-conditioned dynamic topology selection. Concretely we contribute: (1) a complexity-conditioned topology router that reduces proxy-measured misrouting from 30.1% to 8.2%; (2) a budget algebra with a structural-induction conservation theorem; and (3) a hierarchical code retrieval engine. Empirical evaluation demonstrates sub-millisecond DAG construction and linear tree-index scalability.

analysis.tldr: 提出检索引导自适应编排（RGAO），通过代码结构复杂度向量动态选择多智能体拓扑，并保证预算守恒。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代码生成多智能体系统固定编排拓扑，未考虑代码结构复杂度，导致路由效率低、预算浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何根据代码结构复杂度动态选择最优多智能体编排拓扑，同时保证预算守恒。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RGAO：从分层代码索引提取结构复杂度向量，基于此选择编排拓扑；子智能体由形式化合同约束，使用六维预算向量，通过结构归纳定理保证预算守恒。
contributions: 提出复杂度条件拓扑路由器，将代理误路由率从30.1%降至8.2%。
提出预算代数系统，包含结构归纳守恒定理。
提出分层代码检索引擎。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及亚毫秒级DAG构建和线性树索引可扩展性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量代码索引。
预算向量维度固定，可能不适用于所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出检索引导自适应编排（RGAO），通过代码结构复杂度向量动态选择多智能体拓扑，并保证预算守恒。

papers.title: The Missing Evaluation Axis: What 10,000 Student Submissions Reveal About AI Tutor Effectiveness
papers.abstract: Current Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based tutoring systems (AI tutors) are primarily evaluated based on the pedagogical quality of their feedback messages. While important, pedagogy alone is insufficient because it ignores a critical question: what do students actually do with the feedback they receive? We argue that AI tutor evaluation should be extended with a behavioral dimension grounded in student interaction data, which complements pedagogical assessment. We propose an evaluation framework and apply it to 10,235 code submissions with corresponding AI tutor feedback from an introductory undergraduate programming course to measure whether students act on tutor feedback and whether those actions are applied correctly. Using this framework to compare two deployed AI tutors across different semesters in a large-scale introductory computer science course reveals substantial differences in student engagement patterns that are not captured by pedagogy-only evaluation. Moreover, these engagement-based behavioral signals are more strongly associated with student perception of helpful feedback than pedagogical quality alone, providing a more complete and actionable picture of AI tutor performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于学生行为数据的AI导师评估框架，发现行为信号比教学法质量更能预测学生感知的反馈有用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI导师评估仅关注反馈的教学质量，忽略了学生实际如何利用反馈这一关键维度，导致评估不完整。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个包含学生行为维度的AI导师评估框架，以更全面地衡量其有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过分析10,235份代码提交，发现不同AI导师在学生行为参与模式上存在显著差异，且行为信号与学生对反馈有用性的感知关联更强。
analysis.method: 提出一个评估框架，结合学生交互数据（如是否采纳反馈、是否正确应用）来扩展传统教学法评估。
contributions: 提出行为维度的AI导师评估框架，弥补仅关注教学法的不足。
通过大规模学生提交数据验证框架有效性，揭示行为信号与感知有用性的强关联。
analysis.experiments: 在入门编程课程中应用框架，比较两个部署的AI导师，发现行为参与模式差异。
limitations: 可能仅适用于编程教育场景，泛化性待验证。
行为信号的定义可能依赖具体任务，需进一步标准化。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于学生行为数据的AI导师评估框架，发现行为信号比教学法质量更能预测学生感知的反馈有用性。

papers.title: MUSE: Resolving Manifold Misalignment in Visual Tokenization via Topological Orthogonality
papers.abstract: Unified visual tokenization faces a fundamental trade-off between high-fidelity pixel reconstruction (spatial equivariance) and semantic abstraction (conceptual invariance). We attribute this conflict to Manifold Misalignment: naive joint optimization induces opposing gradients, creating a zero-sum game between reconstruction and perception. To address this, we propose MUSE, a framework based on Topological Orthogonality. By treating Structure as an orthogonal bridge, MUSE decouples optimization within Transformers: structural gradients refine attention topology, while semantic gradients update feature values. This turns destructive interference into Mutual Reinforcement. Experiments show that MUSE breaks the trade-off, achieving state-of-the-art generation quality (gFID 3.08) and surpassing its teacher InternViT-300M in linear probing (85.2\% vs. 82.5\%), demonstrating that structurally aligned reconstruction can enhance semantic perception. Code is available at https://github.com/PanqiYang1/MUSE.

analysis.tldr: 提出拓扑正交框架MUSE，通过结构梯度与语义梯度解耦，解决视觉分词中重建与感知的冲突。
analysis.research_motivation: 统一视觉分词面临高保真像素重建（空间等变性）与语义抽象（概念不变性）之间的根本权衡，现有联合优化导致梯度冲突，形成零和博弈。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉分词中重建与感知之间的流形错位问题，即联合优化产生的对抗梯度导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出联合优化中重建与感知的梯度方向相反，形成零和博弈，称为流形错位。
analysis.method: 提出MUSE框架，基于拓扑正交性，将结构作为正交桥，在Transformer中解耦优化：结构梯度精炼注意力拓扑，语义梯度更新特征值，将破坏性干扰转化为相互增强。
contributions: 识别并形式化视觉分词中的流形错位问题
提出拓扑正交框架MUSE，实现重建与感知的相互增强
在生成质量（gFID 3.08）和语义感知（线性探测85.2%）上达到SOTA
analysis.experiments: 在生成质量（gFID 3.08）和线性探测（85.2% vs 教师模型82.5%）上取得SOTA结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定Transformer架构
拓扑正交性的理论保证需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出拓扑正交框架MUSE，通过结构梯度与语义梯度解耦，解决视觉分词中重建与感知的冲突。

papers.title: Agentic Coding Needs Proactivity, Not Just Autonomy
papers.abstract: Coding agents are rapidly changing the landscape of software development, moving from inline completion to autonomous systems that edit repositories, open pull requests, respond to issues, and run scheduled or webhook triggered routines across the development life cycle. The next generation is increasingly described as proactive and long-horizon: agents should notice relevant changes before the developer asks, connect signals across tools, decide when to interrupt, and carry preferences across sessions. Yet the field still lacks a clear account of what proactivity means for software development, how it differs from autonomy, what acceptance criteria proactive long-horizon tasks should satisfy, and which metrics determine whether unsolicited agent behavior is useful rather than merely active. Proactive coding agents should be evaluated by the quality and improvement of their insight policy: the policy that decides what matters next, what evidence supports it, whether to show it, and how to adapt after feedback. This view is grounded in the principles of mixed initiative interaction. We propose a three level taxonomy of proactivity (Reactive, Scheduled, and Situation Aware), compare contemporary coding agents against five practical criteria, and sketch an active user simulation protocol with three evaluation targets: Insight Decision Quality (IDQ), Context Grounding Score (CGS), and Learning Lift

analysis.tldr: 论文提出编码智能体需要从自主性转向主动性，并定义了主动性层次、评估标准和模拟协议。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前编码智能体主要强调自主性，但缺乏对主动性的清晰定义和评估标准，导致无法区分有用行为与单纯活跃行为。
analysis.problem: 如何定义、分类和评估编码智能体的主动性，以及如何设计能够主动感知、决策和适应的智能体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出下一代编码智能体需要主动性和长程规划能力，但现有研究对主动性的含义、与自主性的区别、接受标准以及评估指标缺乏明确阐述。
analysis.method: 提出一个三级主动性分类法（反应式、计划式、情境感知），基于混合主动交互原则，并设计了一个包含三个评估目标（洞察决策质量、上下文基础分数、学习提升）的主动用户模拟协议。
contributions: 明确了编码智能体中主动性与自主性的区别，并提出了一个三级主动性分类法。
提出了五个实用标准来比较当前编码智能体，并设计了一个主动用户模拟协议及三个评估指标。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 提出的分类法和评估协议尚未在真实场景中验证。
模拟协议可能无法完全反映真实开发者的交互复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文提出编码智能体需要从自主性转向主动性，并定义了主动性层次、评估标准和模拟协议。

papers.title: Text-Graph Synergy: A Bidirectional Verification and Completion Framework for RAG
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a core paradigm for enhancing factual grounding and multi-hop reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs). Traditional text-based RAG often retrieves logically irrelevant pseudo-evidence, while graph-based RAG is frequently hindered by search-time pruning, which may discard potentially valid reasoning paths. Existing hybrid approaches primarily adopt simple evidence concatenation or unidirectional enhancement, which fails to address the fundamental "Information Island" problem caused by asymmetric reasoning flows between unstructured text and structured graphs. We propose \textbf{TGS-RAG}, a unified framework for \textbf{T}ext-\textbf{G}raph \textbf{S}ynergistic enhancement. TGS-RAG introduces a bidirectional mechanism: (i) a \textbf{Graph-to-Text} channel that employs a Global Voting strategy from visited graph nodes to re-rank and refine textual evidence, filtering out semantic noise; and (ii) a \textbf{Text-to-Graph} channel that utilizes the \textbf{Memory-based Orphan Entity Bridging} algorithm. This algorithm utilizes textual cues to proactively resurrect valid but previously pruned reasoning paths from the search history without additional database overhead. Experimental results on multiple multi-hop reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TGS-RAG significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a superior balance between retrieval precision and computational efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出TGS-RAG框架，通过双向文本-图协同增强RAG的多跳推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统文本RAG检索逻辑无关伪证据，图RAG因搜索剪枝丢弃有效路径，现有混合方法仅单向增强，无法解决非对称推理导致的“信息孤岛”问题。
analysis.problem: 解决RAG中文本与图结构之间非对称推理流导致的证据不完整和噪声问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TGS-RAG框架，包含图到文本通道（全局投票重排序文本证据）和文本到图通道（基于记忆的孤立实体桥接算法复活剪枝路径）。
contributions: 提出双向文本-图协同增强框架TGS-RAG，解决信息孤岛问题。
设计图到文本全局投票策略和文本到图孤立实体桥接算法，提升检索精度和效率。
analysis.experiments: 在多跳推理基准上，TGS-RAG显著优于现有基线，在检索精度和计算效率间取得更好平衡。
limitations: 可能依赖图结构质量，对稀疏图效果有限。
记忆桥接算法可能增加少量内存开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TGS-RAG框架，通过双向文本-图协同增强RAG的多跳推理能力。

papers.title: AffectSeek: Agentic Affective Understanding in Long Videos under Vague User Queries
papers.abstract: Existing affective understanding studies have mainly focused on recognizing emotions from images, audio signals, or pre-cliped video clips, where the affective evidence is already given. This passive and clip-centered setting does not fully reflect real-world scenarios, in which users often interact with long videos and express their needs through natural-language queries. In this paper, we study \textbf{Vague-Query-driven video Affective Understanding (VQAU)}, a new task that requires models to localize affective moments in long videos, predict their emotion categories, and generate evidence-grounded rationales under vague user queries. To support this task, we construct \textbf{VQAU-Bench}, a benchmark that integrates long videos, vague affective queries, temporal clip annotations, emotion labels, and rationale explanations into a unified evaluation framework. VQAU-Bench enables systematic assessment of semantic-temporal-affective alignment, affective moment localization, emotion classification, and rationale generation. To address the multi-step reasoning challenges of VQAU, we further propose \textbf{AffectSeek}, an agentic framework that actively seeks, verifies, and explains affective moments in long videos. AffectSeek decomposes VQAU into intent interpretation, candidate localization, clip verification, emotion reasoning, and rationale generation, and progressively aligns vague user intent with long-video evidence through role-specialized reasoning and cross-stage verification. Experiments show that VQAU remains challenging for existing affective recognition models and single-step vision-language models, while AffectSeek provides a simple yet effective framework for agentic long-video affective understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出VQAU任务和AffectSeek框架，用于在长视频中根据模糊用户查询定位情感时刻并生成解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情感理解研究主要基于图像或预剪辑视频，被动且以片段为中心，无法处理用户通过自然语言查询与长视频交互的真实场景。
analysis.problem: 解决模糊查询驱动的长视频情感理解（VQAU）任务，要求模型在长视频中定位情感时刻、预测情感类别并生成基于证据的解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有情感识别模型和单步视觉语言模型在VQAU任务上表现不佳，表明该任务具有挑战性。
analysis.method: 提出AffectSeek智能体框架，将VQAU分解为意图解释、候选定位、片段验证、情感推理和解释生成五个步骤，通过角色专用推理和跨阶段验证逐步对齐模糊用户意图与长视频证据。
contributions: 定义了VQAU新任务，要求模型在模糊用户查询下定位情感时刻、预测情感并生成解释。
构建了VQAU-Bench基准，整合长视频、模糊查询、时间标注、情感标签和解释。
提出了AffectSeek智能体框架，通过多步推理和验证实现长视频情感理解。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明VQAU对现有模型具有挑战性，AffectSeek提供了简单有效的框架。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的角色和推理步骤，泛化性待验证。
基准规模可能有限，未提及跨领域泛化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VQAU任务和AffectSeek框架，用于在长视频中根据模糊用户查询定位情感时刻并生成解释。

papers.title: Learning a Delighting Prior for Facial Appearance Capture in the Wild
papers.abstract: High-quality facial appearance capture has traditionally required costly studio recording. Recent works consider an in-the-wild smartphone-based setup; however, their model-based inverse rendering paradigm struggles with the complex disentanglement of reflectance from unknown illumination. To bridge this gap, we propose to shift the paradigm into training a powerful delighting network as a prior to constrain the optimization. We leverage the OLAT dataset and the rendered Light Stage scans for training, and propose Dataset Latent Modulation (DLM) to seamlessly integrate these heterogeneous data sources. Specifically, by conditioning the core network on learnable source-aware tokens, we decouple dataset-specific styles from physical delighting principles, enabling the emergence of a delighting prior that outperforms existing proprietary models. This powerful delighting prior enables a simple and automatic appearance capture pipeline that achieves high-quality reflectance estimation from casual video inputs, outperforming prior arts by a large margin. Furthermore, we leverage our appearance capture method to transform the multi-view NeRSemble dataset into NeRSemble-Scan, a large-scale collection of 4K-resolution relightable scans. By open-sourcing our model and the NeRSemble-Scan dataset, we democratize high-end facial capture and provide a new foundation for the research community to build photorealistic digital humans.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于去光照先验的面部外观捕捉方法，利用数据集潜在调制整合异构数据，实现从随意视频输入中高质量估计反射率。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量面部外观捕捉传统上需要昂贵的影棚设备，而现有基于模型的反渲染方法在未知光照下难以解耦反射率，限制了在随意环境中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从随意视频输入中实现高质量的面部反射率估计，克服未知光照与反射率复杂解耦的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种去光照先验，通过训练强大的去光照网络作为优化约束；引入数据集潜在调制（DLM），利用可学习源感知令牌解耦数据集特定风格与物理去光照原理，整合OLAT数据集和渲染的光舞台扫描数据。
contributions: 提出基于去光照先验的面部外观捕捉范式，实现从随意视频输入中高质量反射率估计。
提出数据集潜在调制（DLM）方法，有效整合异构数据源，提升去光照先验性能。
开源模型和NeRSemble-Scan数据集（4K分辨率可重光照扫描），推动数字人研究。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定训练数据（OLAT和光舞台扫描），泛化到极端光照或罕见面部特征时效果未知。
去光照先验可能无法完全处理复杂遮挡或极端表情。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于去光照先验的面部外观捕捉方法，利用数据集潜在调制整合异构数据，实现从随意视频输入中高质量估计反射率。

papers.title: Resource-Aware Evolutionary Neural Architecture Search for Cardiac MRI Segmentation
papers.abstract: Cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) segmentation underpins quantitative assessment of ventricular structure and function, yet reliable delineation remains difficult due to low tissue contrast, fuzzy boundaries, and inter scan variability. We present CardiacNAS, an evolutionary neural architecture search (NAS) framework that couples a UNet like supernet with a cardiac aware search space spanning depth width, kernel size, filter size, attention, fusion, activation, dropout, and residual scaling. The search is explicitly resource aware, jointly optimizing dice similarity coefficient (DSC) and 95th percentile Hausdorff distance (HD95) versus model size and floating point operations (FLOPs) under fixed compute budgets. Candidate architectures are instantiated from the supernet, trained with proxy budgets, and evolved through crossover, mutation, and elitist selection. We evaluate on the ACDC dataset and compare against six state of the art methods, using qualitative comparisons, learning curve analyses, and design factor correlation studies. The resulting model attains 93.22% average DSC and 4.73 mm HD95 with 3.58M parameters and 14.56 GFLOPs, demonstrating a favorable accuracy efficiency trade off. Analyses indicate that searched attention and fusion choices, together with residual scaling, contribute to improved boundary fidelity and stability. CardiacNAS offers a principled, resource aware approach to deployable CMR segmentation with transparent reporting of architectural complexity and compute budgets.

analysis.tldr: 提出资源感知的进化神经架构搜索框架CardiacNAS，在心脏MRI分割中实现精度与效率的平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 心脏MRI分割因低组织对比、模糊边界和扫描间变异而困难，现有方法未充分考虑资源约束下的架构搜索。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定计算预算下自动搜索高精度且轻量的心脏MRI分割网络架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将UNet-like超网络与心脏感知搜索空间（深度、宽度、核大小、注意力、融合等）结合，使用进化算法（交叉、变异、精英选择）联合优化DSC、HD95与模型大小、FLOPs。
contributions: 提出资源感知的进化NAS框架CardiacNAS，联合优化分割精度与计算开销。
在ACDC数据集上达到93.22% DSC和4.73 mm HD95，仅3.58M参数和14.56 GFLOPs。
analysis.experiments: 在ACDC数据集上评估，与六种SOTA方法比较，包括定性比较、学习曲线分析和设计因子相关性研究。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集（ACDC）上验证，泛化性未知。
进化搜索的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出资源感知的进化神经架构搜索框架CardiacNAS，在心脏MRI分割中实现精度与效率的平衡。

papers.title: From Storage to Experience: A Survey on the Evolution of LLM Agent Memory Mechanisms
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents have fundamentally reshaped artificial intelligence by integrating external tools and planning capabilities. While memory mechanisms have emerged as the architectural cornerstone of these systems, current research remains fragmented, oscillating between operating system engineering and cognitive science. This theoretical divide prevents a unified view of technological synthesis and a coherent evolutionary perspective. To bridge this gap, this survey proposes a novel evolutionary framework for LLM agent memory mechanisms, formalizing the development process into three stages: Storage (trajectory preservation), Reflection (trajectory refinement), and Experience (trajectory abstraction). We first formally define these three stages before analyzing the three core drivers of this evolution: the necessity for long-range consistency, the challenges in dynamic environments, and the ultimate goal of continual learning. Furthermore, we specifically explore two transformative mechanisms in the frontier Experience stage: proactive exploration and cross-trajectory abstraction. By synthesizing these disparate views, this work offers robust design principles and a clear roadmap for the development of next-generation LLM agents.

analysis.tldr: 综述LLM智能体记忆机制从存储到经验的演化三阶段框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM智能体记忆机制研究碎片化，缺乏统一视角和演化脉络，阻碍技术整合与未来发展。
analysis.problem: 如何系统梳理并形式化LLM智能体记忆机制的演化过程，弥合操作系统工程与认知科学之间的理论鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出记忆机制研究在存储、反思、经验三个阶段存在碎片化问题。
analysis.method: 提出一个三阶段演化框架：存储（轨迹保存）、反思（轨迹精炼）、经验（轨迹抽象），并分析三个核心驱动力（长程一致性、动态环境挑战、持续学习目标），重点探讨经验阶段的前沿机制（主动探索、跨轨迹抽象）。
contributions: 提出LLM智能体记忆机制的三阶段演化框架，统一碎片化研究。
识别并分析演化的三个核心驱动力。
探索经验阶段的前沿机制，提供设计原则和路线图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，缺乏实证验证。
框架可能无法覆盖所有记忆机制变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述LLM智能体记忆机制从存储到经验的演化三阶段框架。

papers.title: One Turn Too Late: Response-Aware Defense Against Hidden Malicious Intent in Multi-Turn Dialogue
papers.abstract: Hidden malicious intent in multi-turn dialogue poses a growing threat to deployed large language models (LLMs). Rather than exposing a harmful objective in a single prompt, increasingly capable attackers can distribute their intent across multiple benign-looking turns. Recent studies show that even modern commercial models with advanced guardrails remain vulnerable to such attacks despite advances in safety alignment and external guardrails. In this work, we address this challenge by detecting the earliest turn at which delivering the candidate response would make the accumulated interaction sufficient to enable harmful action. This objective requires precise turn-level intervention that identifies the harm-enabling closure point while avoiding premature refusal of benign exploratory conversations. To further support training and evaluation, we construct the Multi-Turn Intent Dataset (MTID), which contains branching attack rollouts, matched benign hard negatives, and annotations of the earliest harm-enabling turns. We show that MTID helps enable a turn-level monitor TurnGate, which substantially outperforms existing baselines in harmful-intent detection while maintaining low over-refusal rates. TurnGate further generalizes across domains, attacker pipelines, and target models. Our code is available at https://github.com/Graph-COM/TurnGate.

analysis.tldr: 提出TurnGate，通过检测最早可造成危害的对话轮次来防御多轮对话中的隐藏恶意意图。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮对话中，攻击者可将恶意意图分散在多个看似无害的轮次中，现有安全对齐和外部护栏难以有效防御，亟需更精准的轮次级干预方法。
analysis.problem: 如何检测多轮对话中最早使累积交互足以实施有害行为的轮次，同时避免过早拒绝良性探索性对话。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现代商业模型即使有先进护栏，仍易受多轮分布式恶意意图攻击；现有方法在早期轮次难以区分恶意与良性对话。
analysis.method: 构建多轮意图数据集MTID，包含分支攻击展开、匹配良性难负样本及最早危害启用轮次标注；基于此训练轮次级监控器TurnGate，检测最早可造成危害的轮次。
contributions: 提出响应感知的防御框架TurnGate，实现轮次级恶意意图检测。
构建多轮意图数据集MTID，支持训练与评估。
实验表明TurnGate在有害意图检测上显著优于现有基线，且保持低过度拒绝率，跨领域、攻击流水线和目标模型泛化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到TurnGate在有害意图检测上优于基线，低过度拒绝率，且泛化良好。
limitations: 数据集MTID可能覆盖的攻击模式有限。
方法依赖标注质量，扩展至新攻击类型需额外标注。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TurnGate，通过检测最早可造成危害的对话轮次来防御多轮对话中的隐藏恶意意图。

papers.title: Leveraging Image Generators to Address Training Data Scarcity: The Gen4Regen Dataset for Forest Regeneration Mapping
papers.abstract: Sustainable forest management relies on precise species composition mapping, yet traditional ground surveys are labour-intensive and geographically constrained. While Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) offer scalable data collection, the transition to deep learning-based interpretation is bottlenecked by the severe scarcity of expert-annotated imagery, particularly in complex, visually heterogeneous regeneration zones. This paper addresses the dual challenges of data scarcity and extreme class imbalance in the semantic segmentation of fine-grained forest regeneration species by providing a scalable framework that reduces reliance on manual photo-interpretation for high-resolution, millimetre-level aerial imagery. Importantly, we leverage the large-scale vision-language Nano Banana Pro model to simultaneously generate high-fidelity images and their corresponding pixel-aligned semantic masks from prompts. We introduce WilDReF-Q-V2, an expansion of a natural forest dataset with 13 977 new unlabelled and 50 labelled real images, as well as the Gen4Regen dataset, featuring 2101 pairs of synthetic images and semantic masks. Our methodology integrates real-world data with AI-generated images, highlighting that AI-generated data is highly complementary to real-world data, with unified training yielding an F1 score improvement of over 15 %pt compared to purely supervised baselines. Furthermore, we demonstrate that even small quantities of prompt-generated data significantly improve performance for underrepresented species, some of which saw per-species F1 score gains of up to 30 %pt. We conclude that vision-language models can serve as agile data generators, effectively bootstrapping perception tasks for niche AI domains where expert labels are scarce or unavailable. Our datasets, source code, and models will be available at https://norlab-ulaval.github.io/gen4regen.

analysis.tldr: 利用视觉语言模型生成合成图像与语义掩码，缓解森林再生树种细粒度分割中的数据稀缺与类别不平衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统地面调查劳动密集且地理受限，无人机数据虽可扩展但深度学习标注数据严重不足，尤其在复杂、视觉异质的再生区域。
analysis.problem: 高分辨率航空影像中细粒度森林再生树种的语义分割面临数据稀缺和极端类别不平衡的双重挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI生成数据与真实数据高度互补，联合训练相比纯监督基线F1提升超15个百分点；少量生成数据即可显著提升稀有物种性能（最高30个百分点）。
analysis.method: 利用大规模视觉语言模型Nano Banana Pro从提示词同时生成高保真图像和像素对齐的语义掩码，构建合成数据集Gen4Regen，并与真实数据WilDReF-Q-V2联合训练。
contributions: 提出Gen4Regen数据集，包含2101对合成图像与语义掩码，以及扩展的WilDReF-Q-V2真实数据集。
验证了视觉语言模型作为数据生成器在细粒度生态感知任务中的有效性，显著提升分割性能并缓解类别不平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在森林再生树种语义分割任务上，联合真实与合成数据训练相比纯监督基线F1提升超15个百分点，稀有物种F1提升最高30个百分点。
limitations: 合成数据与真实数据之间可能存在域差异，需进一步验证泛化性。
依赖特定视觉语言模型，生成质量可能影响下游性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用视觉语言模型生成合成图像与语义掩码，缓解森林再生树种细粒度分割中的数据稀缺与类别不平衡问题。

papers.title: When2Speak: A Dataset for Temporal Participation and Turn-Taking in Multi-Party Conversations for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at generating contextually appropriate responses but remain poorly calibrated for multi-party conversations, where deciding when to speak is as critical as what to say. In such settings, naively responding at every turn leads to excessive interruptions and degraded conversational coherence. We introduce When2Speak, a grounded synthetic dataset and four-stage generation pipeline for learning intervention timing in group interactions. The dataset comprises over 215,000 examples derived from 16,000 conversations involving 2-6 speakers, spanning diverse conversational styles, tones, and participant dynamics, and explicitly modeling SPEAK vs. SILENT decisions at each turn. Our pipeline combines real-world grounding, structured augmentation, controlled transcript synthesis, and fine-tuning-ready supervision, and is fully open-sourced to support reproducibility and adaptation to domain-specific conversational norms. Across multiple model families, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on When2Speak significantly outperforms zero-shot baselines (e.g., the average Macro F1 increase across 4B+ parameter models was 60%, with the largest increase being 120%). However, SFT-trained models remain systematically over-conservative, missing nearly half of warranted interventions as seen through the Missed Intervention Rate (MIR), which was on average 0.50 and is noticed even at larger model sizes. To address this limitation, we apply reinforcement learning with asymmetric reward shaping, which reduces MIR to 0.186-0.218 and increases recall from 0.479 to 0.78-0.81. Our findings establish that temporal participation is a distinct and trainable dimension of conversational intelligence, and that grounded synthetic data provides an effective and scalable pathway for enabling LLMs to participate more naturally and appropriately in multi-party interactions.

analysis.tldr: 提出When2Speak数据集和四阶段生成流程，通过监督微调和强化学习提升LLM在多轮对话中的发言时机决策能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在多轮对话中缺乏发言时机判断能力，导致过度打断或沉默，影响对话连贯性。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM学会在多轮对话中决定何时发言（SPEAK vs. SILENT）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 监督微调后模型仍过度保守，错过近一半应发言时机（MIR约0.50），且随模型规模增大未改善。
analysis.method: 构建When2Speak合成数据集（含21.5万样本，来自1.6万段2-6人对话），采用四阶段生成流程（真实世界接地、结构化增强、受控转录合成、微调就绪监督）；先进行监督微调，再应用非对称奖励塑形的强化学习。
contributions: 提出When2Speak数据集和四阶段生成流程，用于学习多轮对话中的发言时机。
发现监督微调后模型仍过度保守，并通过非对称奖励塑形的强化学习显著降低漏干预率（MIR从0.50降至0.186-0.218）。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型家族上，监督微调相比零样本基线平均Macro F1提升60%（最大提升120%）；强化学习将召回率从0.479提升至0.78-0.81，MIR降至0.186-0.218。
limitations: 数据集为合成数据，可能无法完全覆盖真实对话的复杂性和噪声。
强化学习后模型仍存在一定漏干预率（MIR约0.2），且未报告对对话质量的人工评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出When2Speak数据集和四阶段生成流程，通过监督微调和强化学习提升LLM在多轮对话中的发言时机决策能力。

papers.title: RAM-H1200: A Unified Evaluation and Dataset on Hand Radiographs for Rheumatoid Arthritis
papers.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) assessment from hand radiographs requires multi-level analysis and modeling of anatomical structures and fine-grained local pathological changes. However, existing public resources do not support such unified multi-level analysis, often lacking full-hand coverage, fine-grained annotations, and consistent integration with clinical scoring systems. In particular, annotations that enable quantitative analysis of bone erosion (BE) remain scarce. RAM-H1200 contains 1,200 hand radiographs collected from six medical centers, with multi-level annotations including (i) whole-hand bone structure instance segmentation, (ii) pixel-level BE masks, (iii) SvdH-defined joint regions of interest, and (iv) joint-level SvdH scores for both BE and joint space narrowing (JSN). It is designed to evaluate whether models can jointly capture anatomical structure, localized erosive pathology, and clinically standardized RA severity from hand radiographs. The proposed BE masks enable, for the first time, quantitative BE analysis beyond coarse categorical grading by providing explicit spatial supervision for lesion extent and morphology. To our knowledge, RAM-H1200 is the first public large-scale benchmark that jointly supports whole-hand bone structure instance segmentation, pixel-level BE delineation, and clinically grounded joint-level SvdH scoring for both BE and JSN. Results across benchmark tasks show that anatomical modeling is substantially more mature than quantitative BE analysis: whole-hand bone segmentation achieves strong performance, whereas BE segmentation remains a major open challenge. By unifying anatomical structure modeling, quantitative lesion analysis, and clinically grounded SvdH scoring, RAM-H1200 provides a single benchmark for comprehensive RA analysis on hand radiographs.

analysis.tldr: RAM-H1200是一个包含1200张手部X光片的多层级RA评估基准数据集，支持骨骼分割、骨侵蚀分割和SvdH评分。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有手部X光片数据集缺乏统一的多层级分析支持，缺少全手覆盖、细粒度标注和临床评分系统的整合，尤其是骨侵蚀的定量分析标注稀缺，阻碍了RA的全面评估。
analysis.problem: 构建一个统一的多层级基准数据集，支持手部骨骼结构分割、像素级骨侵蚀分割、关节区域定位和SvdH评分，以评估模型对解剖结构、局部病变和临床严重程度的联合建模能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，解剖建模（全手骨骼分割）已较为成熟，而骨侵蚀分割仍是重大开放挑战，说明定量病变分析远未解决。
analysis.method: 收集来自6个医疗中心的1200张手部X光片，提供四类标注：全手骨骼实例分割、像素级骨侵蚀掩膜、SvdH定义的关节ROI、关节级SvdH评分（BE和JSN）。
contributions: 首个公开的大规模基准，同时支持全手骨骼实例分割、像素级骨侵蚀分割和临床SvdH评分。
首次提供像素级骨侵蚀掩膜，实现超越粗粒度分级的定量骨侵蚀分析。
analysis.experiments: 在基准任务上评估，全手骨骼分割表现强，骨侵蚀分割仍是开放挑战。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（1200张），可能不足以覆盖所有变异。
仅关注手部X光片，未涉及其他关节或影像模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RAM-H1200是一个包含1200张手部X光片的多层级RA评估基准数据集，支持骨骼分割、骨侵蚀分割和SvdH评分。

papers.title: X-Voice: Enabling Everyone to Speak 30 Languages via Zero-Shot Cross-Lingual Voice Cloning
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present X-Voice, a 0.4B multilingual zero-shot voice cloning model that clones arbitrary voices and enables everyone to speak 30 languages. X-Voice is trained on a 420K-hour multilingual corpus using the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) as a unified representation. To eliminate the reliance on prompt text without complex preprocessing like forced alignment, we design a two-stage training paradigm. In Stage 1, we establish X-Voice$_{\text{s1}}$ through standard conditional flow-matching training and use it to synthesize 10K hours of speaker-consistent segments as audio prompts. In Stage 2, we fine-tune on these audio pairs with prompt text masked to derive X-Voice$_{\text{s2}}$, which enables zero-shot voice cloning without requiring transcripts of audio prompts. Architecturally, we extend F5-TTS by implementing a dual-level injection of language identifiers and decoupling and scheduling of Classifier-Free Guidance to facilitate multilingual speech synthesis. Subjective and objective evaluation results demonstrate that X-Voice outperforms existing flow-matching based multilingual systems like LEMAS-TTS and achieves zero-shot cross-lingual cloning capabilities comparable to billion-scale models such as Qwen3-TTS. To facilitate research transparency and community advancement, we open-source all related resources.

analysis.tldr: X-Voice是一个0.4B参数的多语言零样本语音克隆模型，通过两阶段训练和IPA统一表示，支持30种语言的零样本跨语言语音克隆。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语音克隆模型在多语言和零样本场景下性能有限，且依赖复杂的预处理如强制对齐，限制了其可扩展性和易用性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖提示文本转录和复杂预处理的情况下，实现高质量的多语言零样本语音克隆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出X-Voice模型，采用两阶段训练范式：第一阶段使用标准条件流匹配训练得到X-Voice_s1，并合成10K小时说话人一致的音频片段作为音频提示；第二阶段在掩码提示文本的音频对上微调得到X-Voice_s2，实现无需提示文本转录的零样本语音克隆。架构上扩展F5-TTS，引入语言标识符的双层注入和解耦调度的无分类器引导。
contributions: 提出X-Voice，一个0.4B参数的多语言零样本语音克隆模型，支持30种语言。
设计两阶段训练范式，消除对提示文本转录和复杂预处理的依赖。
开源所有相关资源，促进研究透明度和社区发展。
analysis.experiments: 主观和客观评估表明，X-Voice优于现有基于流匹配的多语言系统如LEMAS-TTS，并达到与十亿级模型如Qwen3-TTS相当的零样本跨语言克隆能力。
limitations: 模型规模较小（0.4B），可能在大规模数据上性能受限。
未提及对低资源语言或极端口音的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: X-Voice是一个0.4B参数的多语言零样本语音克隆模型，通过两阶段训练和IPA统一表示，支持30种语言的零样本跨语言语音克隆。

papers.title: Nearly Optimal Attention Coresets
papers.abstract: We consider the problem of estimating the Attention mechanism in small space, and prove the existence of coresets for it of nearly optimal size. Specifically, we show that for any set of unit-norm keys and values $(K,V)$ in $\mathbb{R}^d$, there exists a subset $(K',V')$ of size at most $O({\sqrt{d} e^{ρ+o(ρ)}/\varepsilon})$ such that \[ \left\| \operatorname{Attn}(q,K,V)- \operatorname{Attn}(q,K',V') \right\| \le \varepsilon \] simultaneously for all queries whose norm is bounded by $ρ$. This outperforms the best known results for this problem. We also offer an improved lower bound showing that $\varepsilon$-coresets must have size $Ω({\sqrt{d} e^ρ/ε})$.

analysis.tldr: 提出注意力机制近乎最优大小的核心集，实现空间高效估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 注意力机制在Transformer中计算和存储开销大，现有核心集方法尺寸不够小，需要更紧凑的近似。
analysis.problem: 如何构造极小尺寸的核心集来近似任意查询下的注意力输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 证明存在大小为O(√d e^{ρ+o(ρ)}/ε)的核心集，并给出匹配的下界Ω(√d e^ρ/ε)。
contributions: 首次给出注意力核心集的近乎最优上界，优于已知结果。
提供改进的下界，证明核心集尺寸的紧性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅理论存在性证明，未给出构造算法。
假设键和值为单位范数，实际中可能需归一化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出注意力机制近乎最优大小的核心集，实现空间高效估计。

papers.title: Prober.ai: Gated Inquiry-Based Feedback via LLM-Constrained Personas for Argumentative Writing Development
papers.abstract: The proliferation of large language models (LLMs) in educational settings has paradoxically undermined the cognitive processes they purport to support. Students increasingly outsource critical thinking to AI assistants that generate polished text on demand, resulting in measurable cognitive debt and diminished argumentative reasoning skills. We present Prober.ai, a web-based writing environment that inverts the conventional AI-tutoring paradigm: rather than generating or rewriting student text, the system constrains an LLM (Gemini 3 Flash Preview) through persona-specific system prompts and structured JSON output schemas to produce only targeted, inquiry-based questions about argumentative weaknesses. A two-phase interaction architecture -- Challenge and Unlock -- implements a pedagogical friction mechanism whereby revision suggestions are gated behind mandatory student reflection. The system's design is grounded in Toulmin's argumentation theory, research on peer feedforward questioning mechanisms, and evidence on AI-supported feedback in writing instruction. A functional prototype was developed in 36 hours during the NY EdTech Hackathon (March 2026), where it was awarded second place. We describe the system architecture, the prompt engineering methodology for constraining LLM output to pedagogically aligned JSON schemas, and discuss implications for scalable, cognition-preserving AI integration in writing education.

analysis.tldr: Prober.ai 通过约束 LLM 生成引导性提问，强制学生反思，以保护写作中的认知过程。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 在教育中普及导致学生外包批判性思维，造成认知负债和论证推理能力下降，亟需一种保护认知的 AI 辅助方式。
analysis.problem: 如何设计 AI 系统既能提供写作反馈，又不替代学生思考，避免认知外包。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 学生过度依赖 LLM 生成文本，削弱了论证推理能力，形成认知负债。
analysis.method: 构建基于 LLM 的写作环境，通过角色约束系统提示和结构化 JSON 输出，仅生成针对论证弱点的引导性问题；采用两阶段交互架构（Challenge 和 Unlock），将修改建议置于强制学生反思之后。
contributions: 提出一种反转传统 AI 辅导范式的写作环境，通过约束 LLM 输出引导性问题来保护认知过程。
设计了两阶段交互架构（Challenge 和 Unlock），实现教学摩擦机制，强制学生反思。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在 NY EdTech Hackathon 中获得第二名。
limitations: 原型在 36 小时内开发，可能缺乏大规模用户验证。
仅针对论证性写作，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Prober.ai 通过约束 LLM 生成引导性提问，强制学生反思，以保护写作中的认知过程。

papers.title: The Cost of Context: Mitigating Textual Bias in Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are increasingly integrated with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to mitigate hallucinations, the introduction of external documents can conceal severe failure modes at the instance level. We identify and formalize the phenomenon of recorruption, where the introduction of even perfectly accurate "oracle" context causes a capable model to abandon an initially correct prediction. Through a mechanistic diagnosis of internal attention matrices, we show that recorruption is driven by a two-fold attentional collapse: (1) visual blindness, characterized by the systemic suppression of visual attention mass ($M_{vis}$) and sharpness ($S_{vis}$), and (2) a structural positional bias that forces the model to prioritize boundary tokens over semantic relevance. Our analysis reveals an Illusion of Success, demonstrating that many seemingly correct RAG outcomes are merely positional coincidences where the model's textual copying bias happens to align with the ground-truth location. To address these vulnerabilities, we propose Bottleneck Attention Intervention for Recovery (BAIR), a parameter-free, inference-time framework that restores visual saliency and applies position-aware penalties to textual distractors. Across medical factuality, social fairness, and geospatial benchmarks, BAIR successfully restores multimodal grounding and improves diagnostic reliability without requiring model retraining or fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 揭示多模态RAG中外部文本导致视觉注意力崩溃的“再污染”现象，并提出无参数推理时干预方法BAIR。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型结合检索增强生成（RAG）虽能缓解幻觉，但引入的外部文档可能在实例层面隐藏严重失败模式，导致模型放弃原本正确的预测，这一问题尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 多模态RAG中，即使引入完全准确的“oracle”上下文，也会导致模型从正确预测转向错误，即“再污染”现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过内部注意力矩阵的机制诊断，发现再污染由双重注意力崩溃驱动：视觉盲区（视觉注意力质量和锐度系统性抑制）和结构位置偏差（模型优先关注边界token而非语义相关性）。此外，存在“成功幻觉”：许多看似正确的RAG结果只是位置巧合，模型文本复制偏差恰好与真实标签位置一致。
analysis.method: 提出瓶颈注意力干预恢复（BAIR），一种无参数、推理时框架，通过恢复视觉显著性并对文本干扰项施加位置感知惩罚来缓解再污染。
contributions: 形式化定义并诊断了多模态RAG中的“再污染”现象，揭示其注意力崩溃机制。
提出BAIR方法，无需重新训练或微调即可恢复多模态基础并提升诊断可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在医疗事实性、社会公平性和地理空间基准上评估，BAIR成功恢复多模态基础并提升诊断可靠性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: BAIR为推理时干预，可能无法处理训练阶段引入的固有偏差。
方法依赖注意力矩阵分析，对注意力机制不透明的模型可能效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示多模态RAG中外部文本导致视觉注意力崩溃的“再污染”现象，并提出无参数推理时干预方法BAIR。

papers.title: Causal Probing for Internal Visual Representations in Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Despite the remarkable success of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) across diverse tasks, the internal mechanisms governing how they encode and ground distinct visual concepts remain poorly understood. To bridge this gap, we propose a causal framework based on activation steering to actively probe and manipulate internal visual representations. Through systematic intervention across four visual concept categories, our results reveal a divergence in concept encoding: entities exhibit distinct localized memorization, whereas abstract concepts are globally distributed across the network. Critically, this divergence uncovers a mechanistic driver of scaling laws: increasing model depth is indispensable for encoding distributed and complex abstract concepts, whereas entity localization remains remarkably invariant to scale. Furthermore, reverse steering uncovers that blocking explicit output triggers a surge in latent activations, exposing a compensatory mechanism between perception and generation. Finally, extending our analysis to visual reasoning, we expose a disconnect between perception and reasoning although MLLMs successfully recognize geometric relations, they treat them merely as static visual features, failing to trigger the procedural execution necessary for abstract problem-solving.

analysis.tldr: 通过因果探针揭示多模态大模型中视觉概念编码的分布差异与补偿机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型（MLLMs）在多种任务中表现优异，但其内部如何编码和接地不同视觉概念的机制尚不明确，理解这些机制对模型解释和改进至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究MLLMs内部视觉表征的编码方式，特别是实体与抽象概念在模型中的分布差异及其与规模缩放的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实体概念呈现局部记忆化，而抽象概念全局分布；反向干预揭示感知与生成之间的补偿机制；视觉推理中感知与推理脱节。
analysis.method: 基于激活引导的因果框架，通过系统干预四个视觉概念类别来探测和操纵内部视觉表征。
contributions: 提出一种基于激活引导的因果探针方法，用于主动探测和操纵MLLMs中的内部视觉表征。
发现实体与抽象概念编码的分布差异，并揭示其作为缩放定律的机械驱动因素。
揭示反向干预下感知与生成之间的补偿机制，以及视觉推理中感知与推理的脱节。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定MLLM架构，泛化性需验证。
因果干预的粒度可能受限于概念类别定义。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过因果探针揭示多模态大模型中视觉概念编码的分布差异与补偿机制。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Guided Edge Learning for Deep Image Regression in Remote Sensing
papers.abstract: Edge learning refers to training machine learning models deployed on edge platforms, typically using new data accumulated onboard. The computational limitations on edge devices affect not only model optimisation, but also calculation of the predictive uncertainty of the current model on the unlabelled data, which is vital for informing model updating. In this paper, we investigate edge learning in the context of performing deep image regression on a remote sensing satellite, where a deep network is executed by an onboard computer to regress a scalar $y$ from an input image, e.g., $y$ is the percentage of pixels indicating cloud coverage or land use. We propose an uncertainty-guided edge learning (UGEL) algorithm that can accurately prioritise the data to speed up training convergence of the on-board regression model. Underpinning UGEL is the calculation of predictive uncertainty based on deep beta regression, where a deep network is used to estimate the parameters of a beta distribution for which the target $y$ for an input image has a high likelihood. Compared to established methods for uncertainty estimation that are either too costly on edge devices (e.g., require many forward passes per sample) or make strict assumptions on the predictive distribution (e.g., Gaussian), deep beta regression is computable in a single forward pass and allows more general predictive distributions. Results show that UGEL delivers faster-converging edge learning than active or semi-supervised learning. Code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/anh-vunguyen/UGEL.

analysis.tldr: 提出不确定性引导的边缘学习算法，利用深度Beta回归在遥感卫星上加速回归模型收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 边缘设备计算资源有限，影响模型优化和不确定性计算，而遥感卫星上的深度图像回归需要高效的数据选择策略来加速训练。
analysis.problem: 在边缘平台上，如何利用有限计算资源准确计算预测不确定性，以优先选择最有价值的数据进行模型更新，从而加速回归模型收敛。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有不确定性估计方法在边缘设备上计算成本高（如多次前向传播）或对预测分布假设严格（如高斯分布），限制了实际应用。
analysis.method: 提出不确定性引导的边缘学习（UGEL）算法，基于深度Beta回归在单次前向传播中计算预测不确定性，并据此优先选择数据。
contributions: 提出UGEL算法，利用深度Beta回归实现高效不确定性估计，适用于边缘设备。
在遥感卫星图像回归任务中验证UGEL比主动学习和半监督学习收敛更快。
analysis.experiments: 在遥感卫星图像回归任务上，UGEL相比主动学习和半监督学习实现更快收敛。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对标量回归任务，未扩展到多输出或分类任务。
深度Beta回归的适用性可能受限于目标分布特性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出不确定性引导的边缘学习算法，利用深度Beta回归在遥感卫星上加速回归模型收敛。

papers.title: Belief Memory: Agent Memory Under Partial Observability
papers.abstract: LLM agents that operate over long context depend on external memory to accumulate knowledge over time. However, existing methods typically store each observation as a single deterministic conclusion (e.g., inferring "API~X failed" from temporary errors), even though such observations are inherently partial and potentially ambiguous. By committing to one conclusion and discarding uncertainty, these methods introduce self-reinforcing error: the agent acts on the stored conclusion, never revisits alternatives, and reinforces the conclusion over time. To address this issue, we propose BeliefMem, which shifts the memory paradigm from committing to a single conclusion per observation to retaining multiple candidate conclusions with their probabilities. Concretely, BeliefMem stores the candidate conclusions as separate memory entries, each carrying a probability that is updated via Noisy-OR rules as new observations arrive. At retrieval, all candidates surface together with their probabilities, keeping alternatives visible to the agent. Since each conclusion in memory retains its probability, BeliefMem preserves the uncertainty that the deterministic paradigm discards, enabling the agent to act with high confidence on well-evidenced knowledge while retaining the capacity to update its confidence when new evidence arrives. Empirical evaluations on LoCoMo and ALFWorld benchmarks show that, even with limited data, BeliefMem achieves the best average performance, remarkably outperforming well-known baselines. More broadly, such probabilistic memory produces substantial gains and explores a new direction for agent memory in partially observable environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出概率化记忆范式BeliefMem，通过保留多个候选结论及其概率来克服部分可观测环境中的自强化错误。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM智能体在长上下文任务中依赖外部记忆，但通常将每次观测存储为单一确定性结论，忽略了观测的局部性和歧义性，导致自强化错误。
analysis.problem: 如何设计记忆机制，使其在部分可观测环境中保留不确定性，避免过早承诺单一结论并允许后续更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 确定性记忆范式会引入自强化错误：智能体基于存储的结论行动，从不重新审视替代方案，并随时间强化该结论。
analysis.method: BeliefMem：为每个观测保留多个候选结论作为独立记忆条目，每个条目携带概率，通过Noisy-OR规则随新观测更新概率；检索时所有候选及其概率一同呈现。
contributions: 提出概率化记忆范式BeliefMem，将记忆从单一确定性结论转变为多候选概率分布。
在LoCoMo和ALFWorld基准上，即使数据有限，BeliefMem取得最佳平均性能，显著优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在LoCoMo和ALFWorld基准上评估，BeliefMem在有限数据下取得最佳平均性能，显著优于知名基线。
limitations: 可能增加记忆存储和检索的计算开销。
概率更新规则（Noisy-OR）在复杂依赖场景下可能不够精确。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概率化记忆范式BeliefMem，通过保留多个候选结论及其概率来克服部分可观测环境中的自强化错误。

papers.title: AlphaCrafter: A Full-Stack Multi-Agent Framework for Cross-Sectional Quantitative Trading
papers.abstract: Financial markets are inherently non-stationary, driven by complex interactions among macroeconomic regimes, microstructural frictions, and behavioral dynamics. Building quantitative strategies that remain profitable demands the continuous coupling of factor discovery, regime-adaptive selection, and risk-constrained execution. Prevailing approaches, however, optimize these components under static or isolated assumptions. Factor mining frameworks typically treat alpha discovery as a one-time search process, implicitly assuming that factor efficacy persists across market regimes. Execution-oriented systems often adopt role-playing agent architectures that simulate anthropomorphic trading committees, introducing behavioral noise rather than systematic rationality. Consequently, a fully automated, rationality-driven framework unifying a coherent quantitative pipeline remains absent. We introduce AlphaCrafter, a full-stack multi-agent framework that closes this gap through a continuously adaptive factor-to-execution pipeline, designed to track and respond to evolving market conditions without manual intervention. AlphaCrafter operates via three specialized agents: a Miner that continuously expands the factor pool via LLM-guided search, a Screener that assesses prevailing market conditions to construct regime-conditioned factor ensembles, and a Trader that translates these ensembles into quantitative strategies under explicit risk constraints. Together, these three agents form a closed-loop cross-sectional trading system that adapts holistically to evolving market dynamics. Extensive experiments on CSI 300 and S&P 500 demonstrate that AlphaCrafter consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in risk-adjusted returns while exhibiting the lowest cross-trial variance, confirming that integrated and adaptive factor-to-execution design yields robust trading performance.

analysis.tldr: AlphaCrafter 是一个全栈多智能体框架，通过因子挖掘、市场状态筛选和风险约束交易三个智能体实现跨截面量化交易的持续自适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 金融市场非平稳，现有方法将因子发现、状态选择和风险执行静态或孤立优化，缺乏统一的自适应理性框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个全自动、理性驱动的统一量化交易流水线，能够持续适应市场变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 AlphaCrafter，包含三个智能体：Miner（LLM引导的因子池扩展）、Screener（评估市场状态构建因子集成）、Trader（风险约束下生成策略），形成闭环系统。
contributions: 提出全栈多智能体框架 AlphaCrafter，实现因子到执行的持续自适应。
在 CSI 300 和 S&P 500 上超越基线，风险调整收益最高且方差最低。
analysis.experiments: 在 CSI 300 和 S&P 500 指数上进行实验，与最先进基线比较，AlphaCrafter 在风险调整收益上持续领先且跨试验方差最低。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 的搜索质量，存在计算开销。
未提及对极端市场事件的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AlphaCrafter 是一个全栈多智能体框架，通过因子挖掘、市场状态筛选和风险约束交易三个智能体实现跨截面量化交易的持续自适应。

papers.title: Accelerating LMO-Based Optimization via Implicit Gradient Transport
papers.abstract: Recent optimizers such as Lion and Muon have demonstrated strong empirical performance by normalizing gradient momentum via linear minimization oracles (LMOs). While variance reduction has been explored to accelerate LMO-based methods, it typically incurs substantial computational overhead due to additional gradient evaluations. At the same time, the theoretical understanding of LMO-based methods remains fragmented across unconstrained and constrained formulations. Motivated by these limitations, we propose \emph{LMO-IGT}, a new class of stochastic LMO-based methods leveraging implicit gradient transport (IGT). We further introduce a unified framework for stochastic LMO-based optimization together with a new stationarity measure, the \emph{regularized support function} (RSF), which bridges gradient-norm and Frank--Wolfe-gap notions within a common framework. By evaluating stochastic gradients at transported points, LMO-IGT accelerates convergence while retaining the single-gradient-per-iteration structure of standard stochastic LMO. Our analysis establishes that stochastic LMO achieves an iteration complexity of $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-4})$, variance-reduced LMO achieves $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-3})$ at the cost of additional gradient evaluations, and LMO-IGT achieves $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-3.5})$ using only a single stochastic gradient per iteration. Empirically, LMO-IGT consistently improves over stochastic LMO counterparts with negligible overhead. Among its instantiations, Muon-IGT achieves the strongest overall performance across evaluated settings, demonstrating that IGT provides an effective and practical acceleration mechanism for modern LMO-based optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出LMO-IGT，通过隐式梯度传输加速基于线性最小化预言机的优化，在保持单梯度每迭代结构的同时提升收敛速度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LMO优化器（如Lion、Muon）虽有效，但方差缩减方法计算开销大，且理论理解碎片化，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加梯度评估次数的前提下加速基于LMO的随机优化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LMO-IGT，利用隐式梯度传输（IGT）在传输点评估随机梯度，并引入正则化支持函数（RSF）作为统一平稳性度量。
contributions: 提出LMO-IGT，一种新的基于LMO的随机优化方法，通过隐式梯度传输加速收敛且保持单梯度每迭代结构。
建立统一框架分析随机LMO、方差缩减LMO和LMO-IGT的迭代复杂度，并引入RSF度量。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明LMO-IGT在多种设置下一致优于随机LMO基线，其中Muon-IGT整体性能最强，且额外开销可忽略。
limitations: 理论复杂度为O(ε^{-3.5})，仍劣于方差缩减方法的O(ε^{-3})。
隐式梯度传输的具体实现可能依赖问题结构，通用性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LMO-IGT，通过隐式梯度传输加速基于线性最小化预言机的优化，在保持单梯度每迭代结构的同时提升收敛速度。

papers.title: AstroAlertBench: Evaluating the Accuracy, Reasoning, and Honesty of Multimodal LLMs in Astronomical Classification
papers.abstract: Modern astronomical observatories generate a massive volume of multimodal data, creating a critical bottleneck for expert human review. While multimodal large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in interpreting complex visual and textual inputs, their ability to perform specialized scientific classification while providing interpretable reasoning remains understudied. We introduce AstroAlertBench, a comprehensive multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate LLM performance in astronomical event review along a three-stage logical chain: metadata grounding, scientific reasoning, and hierarchical classification over five categories. We use a pilot sample of 1,500 real-world alerts from the Zwicky Transient Facility (ZTF), a wide-field survey that scans the northern sky to detect transient astronomical events. On this dataset, we benchmark 13 frontier closed-source and open-weight LLMs that support visual input. Our results reveal that high accuracy does not always align with model ``honesty,'' defined as the ability to self-evaluate its reasoning, which affects its reliability as a real-world assistant. We further initialize a human-in-the-loop evaluation protocol as a precursor to future community-scale participation. Together, AstroAlertBench provides a framework for developing calibrated and interpretable astronomical assistants.

analysis.tldr: 提出AstroAlertBench基准，评估多模态LLM在天文分类中的准确性、推理和诚实性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代天文台产生海量多模态数据，人工审查成为瓶颈；多模态LLM虽有潜力，但在专业科学分类和可解释推理方面的能力尚未充分研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门评估多模态LLM在天文事件审查中准确性、推理能力和自我评估诚实性的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高准确率并不总是与模型'诚实性'（自我评估推理的能力）一致，这影响其作为实际助手的可靠性。
analysis.method: 构建AstroAlertBench基准，包含1500个真实ZTF天文警报，沿元数据定位、科学推理、层次分类三阶段逻辑链评估模型，并初始化人机交互评估协议。
contributions: 提出首个专门评估多模态LLM在天文分类中准确性、推理和诚实性的基准AstroAlertBench。
基于13个前沿闭源和开源多模态LLM的实验揭示准确率与诚实性之间的不一致。
analysis.experiments: 在1500个ZTF真实警报上评估13个支持视觉输入的多模态LLM，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅基于ZTF数据，可能不适用于其他天文巡天项目。
人机交互评估协议仅为初步，尚未大规模社区参与。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AstroAlertBench基准，评估多模态LLM在天文分类中的准确性、推理和诚实性。

papers.title: Text-to-CAD Retrieval: a Strong Baseline
papers.abstract: Text-based retrieval of Computer-Aided Design (CAD) models is a critical yet underexplored task for the reuse of legacy industrial designs. Existing CAD repositories are typically searched using filenames or directories, which limits the efficiency, scalability, and accuracy of design retrieval. In this paper, we formally introduce text-to-CAD retrieval as a new cross-modal retrieval task, aiming to retrieve semantically relevant CAD models from large-scale databases given natural language queries. Leveraging paired text-CAD annotations from the Text2CAD dataset, we establish a practical benchmark for this task. To achieve text-based retrieval, we propose a unified framework that learns multi-modal CAD embeddings from both procedural sequences and geometric point clouds. Specifically, a sequence encoder captures the construction logic of CAD models, while a point encoder extracts explicit geometric features. A text encoder is used to learn semantic representations of textual queries. During training, we introduce a novel feature decoder that reconstructs masked sequence features via cross-attention with text and point features, encouraging implicit multi-modal alignment. At inference time, we remove this auxiliary decoder to enable efficient retrieval using concatenated sequence-point features. Our framework serves as a strong baseline for text-to-CAD retrieval and lays the foundation for downstream CAD generation paradigms, such as retrieval-augmented generation. The source code will be released.

analysis.tldr: 提出文本到CAD检索任务及统一多模态嵌入框架，作为强基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CAD模型检索依赖文件名或目录，效率低、可扩展性差，亟需基于自然语言的语义检索方法以支持工业设计复用。
analysis.problem: 如何从大规模CAD数据库中根据自然语言查询检索语义相关的CAD模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一框架，分别用序列编码器（捕捉构建逻辑）、点编码器（提取几何特征）和文本编码器（学习语义表示），训练时通过特征解码器用交叉注意力重建掩码序列特征实现多模态对齐，推理时移除解码器以高效检索。
contributions: 正式定义文本到CAD检索这一新跨模态检索任务并建立基准。
提出统一多模态嵌入框架，融合序列与点云特征，实现高效检索。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖Text2CAD数据集，可能受限于数据规模和多样性。
仅使用序列和点云两种模态，未探索其他CAD表示（如网格、参数化）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出文本到CAD检索任务及统一多模态嵌入框架，作为强基线。

papers.title: Locality-aware Private Class Identification for Domain Adaptation with Extreme Label Shift
papers.abstract: Domain adaptation aims to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain with different distributions. In real-world scenarios, the label spaces of the two domains often have an inclusion relationship, where some classes exist only in one domain but not the other. These non-overlapping classes are referred to as private classes. Identifying private class samples and mitigating their adverse effects is critical in the literature. Existing methods rely on the assumption that shifts in private classes are large enough to be considered outliers. However, the variance within a single shared class can be significantly larger than the difference between a private class and another shared class, challenging this assumption. Consequently, private classes substantially increase the difficulty of cross-domain classification. To address these issues, based on local transportation and metric properties of optimal transport (OT), a locality-aware private class identification approach is proposed in the form of a score function on transport mass. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is theoretically proven, highlighting the score function's strong ability to distinguish between shared and private class samples. Building on this, we introduce a reliable OT-based method (ReOT) for domain adaptation under severe label shift. ReOT minimizes classification risk while learning the separated cluster structure between the identified shared classes and private classes, effectively avoiding mismatch between shared-private sample pairs, thus ensuring that important knowledge is reliably transported intra-class to mitigate class-conditional discrepancy. Furthermore, a generalization upper bound of the target risk is provided for extreme label shift scenarios, which can be minimized by ReOT. Extensive experiments on benchmarks validate the effectiveness of ReOT.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于最优传输的局部感知私有类识别方法，解决域适应中极端标签偏移下的私有类样本识别与迁移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 域适应中源域和目标域的标签空间常存在包含关系，私有类（仅存在于一个域的类别）样本会干扰知识迁移。现有方法假设私有类偏移足够大可视为离群点，但共享类内部方差可能大于私有类与共享类差异，导致该假设失效，私有类显著增加跨域分类难度。
analysis.problem: 如何准确识别私有类样本并减轻其对域适应的负面影响，特别是在极端标签偏移场景下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 共享类内部方差可能远大于私有类与另一共享类的差异，使得基于离群点假设的私有类识别方法失效。
analysis.method: 基于最优传输的局部运输和度量性质，设计一个关于传输质量的得分函数来识别私有类样本；进一步提出ReOT方法，在最小化分类风险的同时学习共享类和私有类的分离聚类结构，避免共享-私有样本对错配，确保重要知识在类内可靠传输。
contributions: 提出一种局部感知的私有类识别得分函数，并理论证明其区分共享类和私有类样本的能力。
提出ReOT方法，结合最优传输和聚类结构学习，有效处理极端标签偏移下的域适应问题，并提供目标风险泛化上界。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了ReOT的有效性。
limitations: 方法依赖最优传输计算，可能在大规模数据上存在计算开销。
理论分析假设标签偏移极端，实际中可能不完全满足。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于最优传输的局部感知私有类识别方法，解决域适应中极端标签偏移下的私有类样本识别与迁移问题。

papers.title: Nonsense Helps: Prompt Space Perturbation Broadens Reasoning Exploration
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards, particularly Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, in complex tasks, GRPO frequently suffers from the ``zero-advantage problem'': when all sampled rollouts for a query fail, the relative advantage collapses to zero. Consequently, the model loses effective training signals for these questions, wasting the training data and computational budget. While simply increasing the sampling budget for these questions is a common remedy, the static sampling policy inherently constrains reasoning exploration, limiting the success rate. In this paper, we propose Lorem Perturbation for Exploration (LoPE), a simple yet effective training framework to break this exploration bottleneck. We posit that task-irrelevant prompt-space perturbations can shift the model's output distribution enough to unlock orthogonal reasoning pathways for hard questions. Specifically, LoPE prepends sequences stochastically assembled from Lorem Ipsum vocabulary (a pseudo-Latin placeholder text) to the prompts before resampling. Experiments across 1.7B, 4B, and 7B models demonstrate that LoPE significantly outperforms resampling with the original prompts. Further analysis reveals that other Latin-based random sequences with low perplexity are also effective perturbations. Our results establish LoPE as a strong baseline for broadening exploration in LLM reinforcement learning.

analysis.tldr: 通过向提示中添加无意义文本扰动，LoPE 方法有效缓解了 GRPO 在复杂推理任务中的零优势问题，拓宽了推理探索空间。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO 在复杂推理任务中常因所有采样结果失败而陷入零优势问题，导致训练信号丢失和计算资源浪费，而简单增加采样预算受限于静态采样策略，探索效率不足。
analysis.problem: 解决 GRPO 在复杂推理任务中因零优势问题导致的探索瓶颈，即如何有效打破静态采样策略的限制，为困难问题解锁新的推理路径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当所有采样结果失败时，相对优势归零，模型失去有效训练信号；静态采样策略限制了推理探索，导致成功率难以提升。
analysis.method: LoPE：在重采样前，向提示中随机拼接由 Lorem Ipsum 词汇（伪拉丁占位文本）组成的序列，通过任务无关的提示空间扰动改变模型输出分布，从而解锁正交推理路径。
contributions: 提出 LoPE 框架，通过提示空间扰动有效缓解 GRPO 的零优势问题，拓宽推理探索。
在 1.7B、4B 和 7B 模型上验证了 LoPE 显著优于原始提示重采样，并发现其他低困惑度的拉丁随机序列同样有效。
analysis.experiments: 在 1.7B、4B 和 7B 模型上进行实验，LoPE 显著优于原始提示重采样；摘要未提供具体数值或基准细节。
limitations: 仅验证了拉丁语系随机序列，对其他语言或非文本模态的扰动效果未知。
未分析扰动长度、频率等超参数对性能的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过向提示中添加无意义文本扰动，LoPE 方法有效缓解了 GRPO 在复杂推理任务中的零优势问题，拓宽了推理探索空间。

papers.title: BitCal-TTS: Bit-Calibrated Test-Time Scaling for Quantized Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Post-training quantization makes large reasoning models practical under tight memory and latency budgets, but it can distort the online signals that drive adaptive test-time compute allocation. Under a fixed cap on the number of newly generated tokens, miscalibrated confidence can lead to harmful early halting: the model may surface a plausible final line while the underlying reasoning is still wrong, or the controller may stop before the trace has stabilized. We study this interaction for greedy 4-bit inference and propose BitCal-TTS, a lightweight runtime controller that combines (i) inexpensive online proxies for token-level uncertainty and reasoning-trace stability, (ii) a bit-conditioned confidence rescaling that is conservative at low nominal precision, and (iii) a bit-aware post-marker confirmation horizon designed for GSM8K-style structured outputs. The method requires no fine-tuning of the base model and integrates with standard Hugging Face 4-bit inference using forward hooks for logits and last-layer hidden states. On small evaluation shards of GSM8K with Qwen2.5 Instruct models, BitCal-TTS improves exact-match accuracy over a non-bit-aware adaptive baseline at the 7B and 14B scales while preserving substantial token savings relative to fixed-budget decoding. At a token cap of B=512, on the evaluation shards we report (N=54 for 7B and N=35 for 14B; not the full GSM8K test set), accuracy gains are +3.7 points (7B) and +2.8 points (14B), with the premature-stop rate falling from 14.8% to 11.1% on 7B and from 17.1% to 11.4% on 14B. We report Wilson 95% confidence intervals throughout and explicitly discuss the limited statistical power of the partial-shard comparisons. We release code and figure-generation scripts to support full reproduction.

analysis.tldr: 提出BitCal-TTS，一种轻量级运行时控制器，通过位校准置信度缩放和推理轨迹稳定性代理，改善量化推理模型在测试时计算分配中的早停问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 后训练量化使大推理模型在内存和延迟受限场景下实用，但会扭曲驱动自适应测试时计算分配的在线信号，导致有害的早停现象。
analysis.problem: 量化推理模型在固定token预算下，由于置信度校准错误，可能过早停止推理，输出看似合理但实际错误的答案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在固定新生成token数量上限下，校准错误的置信度会导致有害的早停：模型可能在底层推理仍错误时输出看似合理的最终行，或控制器在轨迹稳定前停止。
analysis.method: BitCal-TTS结合三种组件：1) token级不确定性和推理轨迹稳定性的廉价在线代理；2) 位条件置信度重缩放，在低标称精度下保守；3) 位感知的后标记确认视野，专为GSM8K风格结构化输出设计。无需微调，通过前向钩子集成到标准Hugging Face 4-bit推理。
contributions: 提出BitCal-TTS，一种无需微调的轻量级运行时控制器，改善量化推理模型的自适应测试时计算分配。
在GSM8K小规模评估子集上，BitCal-TTS在7B和14B规模上相比非位感知自适应基线提高了精确匹配准确率，同时保持相对于固定预算解码的显著token节省。
analysis.experiments: 在GSM8K小评估子集上使用Qwen2.5 Instruct模型进行实验，7B规模N=54，14B规模N=35（非完整GSM8K测试集）。在token上限B=512时，7B准确率提升+3.7个百分点，14B提升+2.8个百分点；7B早停率从14.8%降至11.1%，14B从17.1%降至11.4%。报告了Wilson 95%置信区间，并讨论了部分子集比较的有限统计功效。
limitations: 评估仅在GSM8K的小规模子集上进行，统计功效有限，可能无法代表完整测试集性能。
方法针对结构化输出（如GSM8K风格）设计，泛化到其他任务类型需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BitCal-TTS，一种轻量级运行时控制器，通过位校准置信度缩放和推理轨迹稳定性代理，改善量化推理模型在测试时计算分配中的早停问题。

papers.title: Who Prices Cognitive Labor in the Age of Agents? Compute-Anchored Wages
papers.abstract: A natural intuition about the economics of AI agents is that, because agents can be replicated at very low marginal cost, agent labor may be supplied highly elastically, placing downward pressure on cognitive-labor wages when it closely substitutes for human labor. We argue this framing is wrong in mechanism but partially correct in conclusion, and that the correction matters for both theory and policy. \textbf{Agents are not labor; they are a production technology that converts compute capital $K_c$ into effective units of cognitive labor $L_A$.} Once this is recognized, the elastic-supply margin that anchors the equilibrium wage migrates from the labor market to the compute capital market.
