Building on the classic factor-pricing framework \citep{mankiw2020}, we derive a \emph{Compute-Anchored Wage} (CAW) bound stating that, on tasks where human and agent-produced cognitive labor are substitutes, the competitive human wage is bounded above by $λ\cdot k \cdot r_c$, where $r_c$ is the rental rate of compute capital, $k$ is the compute intensity of one effective agent-produced cognitive labor unit, and $λ$ is the relative human-to-agent productivity. We generalize the result through constant elasticity of substitution (CES) aggregation, separate substitutable from complementary tasks, and discuss factor-share consequences. The conclusion is concise: \emph{the price-setter for cognitive labor is no longer the labor market.}

analysis.tldr: 本文提出计算锚定工资（CAW）理论，认为AI智能体不是劳动力，而是将计算资本转化为认知劳动的生产技术，从而推导出人类工资的上限由计算资本租金率决定。
analysis.research_motivation: 直觉上，AI智能体可低成本复制，可能对认知劳动工资产生下行压力，但这种直觉在机制上是错误的，需要正确的理论框架来指导政策。
analysis.problem: 重新理解AI智能体对认知劳动工资的影响机制，并推导出工资的锚定边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，仅从理论推导指出智能体不是劳动力而是生产技术，工资锚定从劳动力市场转移到计算资本市场。
analysis.method: 基于经典要素定价框架，推导计算锚定工资（CAW）边界，并通过CES聚合、任务可替代性分析进行推广。
contributions: 提出计算锚定工资（CAW）理论，纠正了关于AI智能体对工资影响的直觉错误。
推导出竞争性人类工资的上限由计算资本租金率决定，并讨论了要素份额后果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论推导依赖于完全竞争市场假设，现实市场可能存在摩擦。
未考虑智能体与人类协作的互补效应可能改变工资边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文提出计算锚定工资（CAW）理论，认为AI智能体不是劳动力，而是将计算资本转化为认知劳动的生产技术，从而推导出人类工资的上限由计算资本租金率决定。

papers.title: An extremely coarse feedback signal is sufficient for learning human-aligned visual representations
papers.abstract: Artificial neural networks trained on visual tasks develop internal representations resembling those of the primate visual system, a discovery that has guided a decade of computational neuroscience. Research on building brain-aligned models has progressively embraced finer-grained supervisory signals, from object classification to contrastive self-supervised objectives that maximize distinctions among individual images, yet the role of supervisory signal granularity on brain alignment remains largely unexamined. Here we systematically investigate how the coarseness of a learning signal shapes representational alignment with human vision. We parametrically vary the level of signal granularity using a data-driven approach that partitions a set of training images into varied numbers of categories (2, 4, 8, 16, ..., 64) via PCA-based splits of pretrained embeddings. We train hundreds of neural networks across convolutional and transformer architectures on these coarse classification tasks and compare their representations to macaque electrophysiology recordings and human fMRI responses. We find that networks trained to distinguish as few as 8 broad categories learn representations that match or exceed the neural alignment of models distinguishing 1,000-classes. Even more strikingly, these coarsely trained networks align more closely with human perceptual similarity judgments than all other models evaluated, including networks trained with fine-grained supervision or self-supervision as well as leading large-scale vision models. These results demonstrate that human-like visual representations emerge from remarkably coarse feedback, reframing what learning signals vision may require and opening a path toward building AI systems that are more aligned with human perception.

analysis.tldr: 仅用极粗粒度分类信号（如8类）训练的视觉模型，其表征与人类视觉系统的对齐程度可媲美甚至超越细粒度监督或自监督模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 以往研究认为精细监督信号（如1000类分类或对比学习）是构建类脑视觉表征的关键，但监督信号粒度对脑对齐的影响尚未被系统探究。
analysis.problem: 监督信号的粗粒度程度如何影响神经网络视觉表征与人类视觉系统的对齐？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过PCA对预训练嵌入进行分割，将训练图像划分为不同数量的粗类别（2,4,8,...,64类），训练数百个CNN和Transformer网络，并与猕猴电生理记录和人类fMRI响应比较。
contributions: 发现仅用8个粗类别训练的模型在神经对齐上可媲美1000类分类模型。
粗训练模型在人类感知相似性判断上优于所有其他模型，包括细粒度监督、自监督及大规模视觉模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 粗类别划分依赖预训练嵌入的PCA分割，可能引入偏差。
仅评估了视觉表征，未涉及其他模态或下游任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅用极粗粒度分类信号（如8类）训练的视觉模型，其表征与人类视觉系统的对齐程度可媲美甚至超越细粒度监督或自监督模型。

papers.title: A Novel Graph-Regulated Disentangling Mamba Model with Sparse Tokens for Enhanced Tree Species Classification from MODIS Time Series
papers.abstract: Although tree species classification from Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer (MODIS) time series data is critical for supporting various environmental applications, it is a challenging task due to several key difficulties: the subtle signature differences among tree species, strong spatial-spectral-temporal information coupling, and the difficulty of modeling large-scale topological context information. To better address these challenges, this paper presents a novel Graph-regulated Disentangled Sparse Mamba model (GDS-Mamba) for enhanced tree species classification, with the following contributions. (1) First, to improve large-scale context modeling, we design a mini-batch graph-regulated approach that explicitly explores topological correlation effects among input images. (2) Second, to disentangle the high-dimensional spatial-spectral-temporal information coupling for improved feature extraction, we propose a novel disentangling Mamba architecture tailored for capturing independent spatial patterns, spectral signatures, and temporal phenology behaviors in MODIS time series. (3) Third, to improve efficiency and subtle feature learning, we design novel sparse token approaches that adaptively learn the optimum subset of tokens to better address the correlation decay problem that bottlenecks standard Mamba models. Extensive experiments using large-scale annual MOD13Q1 data across two Canadian provinces (i.e., Alberta and Saskatchewan) achieved an overall accuracy of 93.94\% in Alberta and 80.19\% in cross-provincial evaluations, outperforming twelve state-of-the-art classification models.

analysis.tldr: 提出图正则化解缠Mamba模型，结合稀疏令牌提升MODIS时间序列树种分类精度。
analysis.research_motivation: MODIS时间序列树种分类对环境影响监测至关重要，但面临物种间特征差异细微、时空谱信息耦合强、大尺度拓扑上下文建模困难等挑战，现有方法难以有效解决。
analysis.problem: 如何从MODIS时间序列数据中准确分类树种，克服特征差异小、信息耦合和上下文建模难题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准Mamba模型存在相关性衰减问题，限制了长距离依赖建模能力；高维时空谱信息耦合导致特征提取困难。
analysis.method: 提出GDS-Mamba模型，包含三个创新：1）小批量图正则化方法显式建模图像间拓扑相关性；2）解缠Mamba架构分离空间、光谱和时间物候特征；3）稀疏令牌机制自适应学习最优令牌子集，缓解相关性衰减。
contributions: 设计图正则化方法增强大尺度上下文建模
提出解缠Mamba架构分离耦合的时空谱信息
引入稀疏令牌机制提升效率和细微特征学习
analysis.experiments: 使用加拿大两省（阿尔伯塔和萨斯喀彻温）的大规模年度MODIS数据，阿尔伯塔省总体精度93.94%，跨省评估80.19%，优于12个SOTA模型。
limitations: 跨省泛化精度仍有提升空间（80.19%）
方法可能依赖特定MODIS产品，迁移性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图正则化解缠Mamba模型，结合稀疏令牌提升MODIS时间序列树种分类精度。

papers.title: Characterizing Brazilian Atlantic Forest Restoration Outcomes with Geospatial AlphaEarth Embeddings
papers.abstract: The Atlantic Forest in Brazil is a critical biodiversity hotspot, yet less than 12-15% of its original cover remains. Although monitoring forest restoration on a large scale is essential, traditional methods are limited by the impracticality of on-the-ground reporting on such a scale and by the saturation of remote-sensing indices such as NDVI. Furthermore, reforestation is a gradual process as opposed to the rapid spectral changes caused by deforestation. In this study, we examine 1,729 restoration sites in São Paulo, using satellite embeddings from the AlphaEarth Foundation's model to evaluate their effectiveness in characterising early restoration success. We introduce the concept of a 'Reference Trajectory Embedding', defining a metric of restoration success based on cosine similarity to reference sites of mature secondary forest. We observe distinct clusters in embedding space according to different land use and land cover (LULC) types, and we can identify sites with clear change vectors. However, the signal can be noisy, and embeddings may require further fine-tuning to capture and predict site metadata beyond LULC.

analysis.tldr: 利用AlphaEarth卫星嵌入表征巴西大西洋森林早期恢复成效，提出参考轨迹嵌入度量。
analysis.research_motivation: 大西洋森林仅存12-15%原始覆盖，大规模监测恢复至关重要，但传统实地报告不可行且遥感指数（如NDVI）易饱和，且恢复是渐变过程难以捕捉。
analysis.problem: 如何利用卫星嵌入有效表征和评估森林早期恢复成功程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同土地利用/覆盖类型在嵌入空间中形成不同聚类，可识别具有明显变化向量的站点，但信号存在噪声，嵌入需进一步微调以捕获除LULC外的站点元数据。
analysis.method: 使用AlphaEarth基础模型的卫星嵌入，提出参考轨迹嵌入概念，基于与成熟次生林参考站点的余弦相似度定义恢复成功度量。
contributions: 提出参考轨迹嵌入方法用于评估森林恢复成功度
在1729个恢复站点上验证了卫星嵌入表征恢复成效的有效性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 嵌入信号存在噪声，可能影响恢复评估准确性
当前嵌入难以预测除LULC外的站点元数据，需进一步微调
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用AlphaEarth卫星嵌入表征巴西大西洋森林早期恢复成效，提出参考轨迹嵌入度量。

papers.title: SPARK: Self-Play with Asymmetric Reward from Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Self-play reinforcement learning has shown strong performance in domains with formally verifiable structure, such as mathematics and coding, where both problem generation and reward computation can be grounded in explicit rules. Extending this paradigm to scientific literature is more challenging: the relationships among multi-modal elements within and across documents are rarely made explicit in text, which makes automatic generation of relational reasoning questions difficult and weakens the reliability of reward signals. We propose SPARK (Self-Play with Asymmetric Reward from Knowledge Graphs), a framework that automatically constructs a unified knowledge graph (KG) from multi-document scientific literature and uses it as the structural basis for self-play. KG paths over multimodal nodes serve as a source for generating relational reasoning questions, and structured facts stored in the KG provide a basis for verifiable reward computation. A single small vision-language model (sVLM) alternates between Proposer and Solver roles under information asymmetry against a fixed KG, a design that we believe can be naturally extended toward online adaptation in future work. We evaluate SPARK on public benchmarks and a self-constructed cross-document multi-hop QA dataset. Results show that SPARK consistently outperforms flat-corpus-based self-play baselines, and the performance gap widens as hop count increases, suggesting that KG-structure grounding contributes to relational multi-hop reasoning beyond what unstructured corpus grounding can provide.

analysis.tldr: SPARK利用知识图谱为科学文献中的多跳关系推理提供可验证奖励，通过自博弈训练小视觉语言模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 自博弈强化学习在数学和编程等具有可验证结构的领域表现优异，但将其扩展到科学文献时，多模态元素间的关系难以显式表达，导致关系推理问题自动生成困难且奖励信号不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何为科学文献中的多跳关系推理任务自动生成可验证的奖励信号，并利用自博弈提升小视觉语言模型的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SPARK框架：从多文档科学文献自动构建统一知识图谱（KG），基于KG路径生成关系推理问题，利用KG中的结构化事实计算可验证奖励；单个小视觉语言模型在信息不对称条件下交替扮演提议者和求解者角色。
contributions: 提出SPARK框架，利用知识图谱为科学文献自博弈提供可验证奖励。
在公开基准和自建跨文档多跳QA数据集上验证了KG结构对多跳推理的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准和自建跨文档多跳QA数据集上评估，SPARK优于基于纯语料库的自博弈基线，且性能差距随跳数增加而扩大。
limitations: 仅评估了小视觉语言模型，未验证对大模型或在线适应的扩展性。
知识图谱构建依赖多文档，可能受限于文档质量和覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SPARK利用知识图谱为科学文献中的多跳关系推理提供可验证奖励，通过自博弈训练小视觉语言模型。

papers.title: AgenticRAG: Agentic Retrieval for Enterprise Knowledge Bases
papers.abstract: We present AgenticRAG, a practical agentic harness for retrieval and analysis over enterprise knowledge bases. Standard RAG pipelines place significant burden of grounding on the search stack, constraining the language model to a fixed candidate set chosen deep in the retrieval process. Our approach reduces this overdependence by layering a lightweight harness on top of existing enterprise search infrastructure, equipping a reasoning LLM with search, find, open, and summarize tools enabling the model to iteratively retrieve information, navigate within documents, and analyze evidence autonomously. On three open benchmarks we observe substantial gains: $49.6\%$ recall@1 on BRIGHT (+21.8 pp over the best embedding baseline), 0.96 factuality on WixQA ($+13\%$ relative improvement), and $92\%$ answer correctness on FinanceBench--within 2 pp of oracle access to true evidence. Ablation studies show that the most significant factor is the shift from single-shot retrieval to agentic tool use ($5.9\times$ improvement), while multi-query search and in-document navigation contribute to both quality and efficiency. We present various design choices in our agentic harness that were informed by pre-production deployments. Our results demonstrate its suitability for real-world enterprise production environments.

analysis.tldr: AgenticRAG 通过轻量级代理框架在现有企业搜索基础设施上实现迭代检索与证据分析，显著提升召回率与事实性。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准 RAG 管道过度依赖搜索堆栈，将语言模型限制在检索过程中固定的候选集内，导致检索结果对最终生成质量形成瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何减少 RAG 对单次检索的过度依赖，使 LLM 能够自主迭代检索、导航文档并分析证据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单次检索到代理式工具使用的转变带来了 5.9 倍的性能提升，多查询搜索和文档内导航同时提升了质量和效率。
analysis.method: 在现有企业搜索基础设施上叠加轻量级代理框架，为推理 LLM 配备搜索、查找、打开和总结工具，使其能够迭代检索信息、在文档内导航并自主分析证据。
contributions: 提出 AgenticRAG，一种实用的代理式检索与分析框架，减少对单次检索的过度依赖。
在三个公开基准上取得显著提升：BRIGHT 上 recall@1 达 49.6%（+21.8 pp），WixQA 上事实性达 0.96（+13%），FinanceBench 上答案正确率达 92%（接近 oracle 上限）。
通过消融实验揭示代理式工具使用是性能提升的关键因素（5.9 倍改进），并展示了预生产部署中形成的多种设计选择。
analysis.experiments: 在 BRIGHT、WixQA 和 FinanceBench 三个公开基准上评估，报告了 recall@1、事实性和答案正确率指标，并进行了消融实验。
limitations: 摘要未提及对检索延迟或计算开销的详细分析。
方法依赖现有企业搜索基础设施，可能不适用于无此类基础设施的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AgenticRAG 通过轻量级代理框架在现有企业搜索基础设施上实现迭代检索与证据分析，显著提升召回率与事实性。

papers.title: When Does Value-Aware KV Eviction Help? A Fixed-Contract Diagnostic for Non-Monotone Cache Compression
papers.abstract: Long-context LLM inference is bottlenecked by the memory and bandwidth cost of reading large KV caches during decoding. KV compression reduces this cost by keeping only part of the cache, but task accuracy alone does not identify why a selector succeeds or fails. A selector can fail at three steps: it may miss the evidence future decoding needs, give high scores to tokens that do not affect the output, or break related evidence when fitting scores into a small cache. We introduce a fixed-contract diagnostic that holds the selector's setup fixed and changes one decision slot at a time. For value ranking, the probe combines a block's attention mass with the estimated output change from removing it. On LongBench across three models and two budgets, the probe is positive on 72.6% of positive-margin cells and 32.4% of nonpositive-margin cells. NeedleBench M-RT at 32k and a RULER 8k check probe support closure under branched retrieval, and a 264-cell sign evaluation separates support recovery and output-value ranking from leverage effects near the boundary. The resulting order is to recover decode-side evidence, rank its output value, and preserve coupled evidence during projection.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种固定合约诊断方法，用于分析KV缓存压缩中值感知驱逐策略的失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文LLM推理受限于KV缓存的内存和带宽开销，现有压缩方法仅关注任务准确率，无法解释选择器成功或失败的原因。
analysis.problem: 如何诊断KV缓存压缩中值感知驱逐策略的失败模式，区分证据缺失、评分偏差和证据破坏三种失败原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 选择器可能在三个步骤失败：遗漏未来解码需要的证据、给不影响输出的token高分、或在小缓存中破坏相关证据。
analysis.method: 提出固定合约诊断方法，保持选择器设置不变，每次改变一个决策槽；通过探针结合注意力质量和移除块后的输出变化来评估值排名。
contributions: 提出一种固定合约诊断方法，用于分析KV缓存压缩中值感知驱逐策略的失败模式。
在LongBench、NeedleBench和RULER上验证了诊断的有效性，揭示了支持恢复、输出值排名和边界效应。
analysis.experiments: 在LongBench上使用三个模型和两个预算，探针在正边际单元上阳性率72.6%，非正边际单元上32.4%；NeedleBench M-RT 32k和RULER 8k检查探针支持分支检索下的闭包；264单元符号评估分离了支持恢复和输出值排名与边界附近的杠杆效应。
limitations: 诊断方法可能依赖于特定选择器设置，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论不同缓存预算下的诊断结果差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种固定合约诊断方法，用于分析KV缓存压缩中值感知驱逐策略的失败模式。

papers.title: Housing Potential Common Data Model and City Digital Twin
papers.abstract: The evaluation of housing potential requires consideration of a location from multiple perspectives, ranging from zoning and land use to population characteristics and access to services. This research introduces the Housing Potential Common Data Model (HPCDM) to overcome existing data silos, serving as a standard to support integration and interoperability across the diverse range of datasets that are required for housing potential analysis. This report details the evaluation of the model along with the creation of a City Digital Twin for housing and a pilot dashboard application to demonstrate a practical implementation. Beyond the technical framework, this work identifies critical barriers to adoption and provides actionable mitigation strategies for urban planners and stakeholders.

papers.title: Edge Deep Learning in Computer Vision and Medical Diagnostics: A Comprehensive Survey
papers.abstract: Edge deep learning, a paradigm change reconciling edge computing and deep learning, facilitates real-time decision making attuned to environmental factors through the close integration of computational resources and data sources. Here we provide a comprehensive review of the current state of the art in edge deep learning, focusing on computer vision applications, in particular medical diagnostics. An overview of the foundational principles and technical advantages of edge deep learning is presented, emphasising the capacity of this technology to revolutionise a wide range of domains. Furthermore, we present a novel categorisation of edge hardware platforms based on performance and usage scenarios, facilitating platform selection and operational effectiveness. Following this, we dive into approaches to effectively implement deep neural networks on edge devices, encompassing methods such as lightweight design and model compression. Reviewing practical applications in the fields of computer vision in general and medical diagnostics in particular, we demonstrate the profound impact edge-deployed deep learning models can have in real-life situations. Finally, we provide an analysis of potential future directions and obstacles to the adoption of edge deep learning, with the intention to stimulate further investigations and advancements of intelligent edge deep learning solutions. This survey provides researchers and practitioners with a comprehensive reference shedding light on the critical role deep learning plays in the advancement of edge computing applications.
